Genesis1:1 Mu dimatekenu Nzambi ua bhanga diulu ni ixi.
Genesis1:2 Ixi anga i kala ia botomoka
Genesis1:3 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:4 Nzambi anga u mona mukengeji kuma ua uabha; Nzambi anga u uana o mukengeji ni kitombe.
Genesis1:5 Nzambi anga u luka kuma kua zele
Genesis1:6 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:7 Nzambi anga u ta muthandu mu dinga-ni-dinga
Genesis1:8 O muthandu ua bhiti mu dinga-ni-dinga
Genesis1:9 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:10 Nzambi anga u luka mavu makukuta
Genesis1:11 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:12 Ixi anga i sabhuka iangu
Genesis1:13 Anga ku kala ngoloxi ni kimene
Genesis1:14 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:15 I kale imuiku ku dimbinza dia diulu ia kubhana mukengeji mu ngongo. Anga ki di bhanga kienhiki.
Genesis1:16 Nzambi anga u bhanga imuiku iiadi iònene; kimuiku kia dikota ki tumina mu muanha
Genesis1:17 Nzambi anga u i ta ididi mu dimbinza dia diulu phala kubhana mukengeji mu ngongo
Genesis1:18 ni kutumina o muanha ni usuku
Genesis1:19 Anga ku kala ngoloxi ni kimene
Genesis1:20 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:21 Nzambi anga u bhanga iama iònene iendela mu menha
Genesis1:22 Nzambi anga u a tula o kizediuise
Genesis1:23 Anga ku kala ngoloxi ni kimene
Genesis1:24 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:25 Nzambi anga u bhanga iama ia kanga ni ifua iâ; Nzambi anga u mona kuma kiauabha.
Genesis1:26 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:27 Nzambi anga u bhanga muthu mu kidifuanganu kiê
Genesis1:28 Nzambi anga u a tula o kizediuise
Genesis1:29 Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis1:30 ni iama ioso ia kanga
Genesis1:31 Nzambi anga u mona ima ioso ia iudika
Genesis2:1 Kienhiki
Genesis2:2 O mu kizuua kia kasambuadi Nzambi kia zubha kukalakala kuê
Genesis2:3 Nzambi anga u ta kizediuise ku kizuua kia kasambuadi
Genesis2:4 Enhá ene o malunda ma diulu ni ixi kioso kia i bhanga
Genesis2:5 Kiluua-phe ku kala kisasa ku mukáu
Genesis2:6 Maji-phe bhu kala mbundu ienda ni kubanda mu ngongo
Genesis2:7 Jihova Nzambi anga úmba muthu ni mavu ma bhoxi
Genesis2:8 Jihova Nzambi anga u kuna díbhia dia bhange ku mutundila-kumbi mu Edene; anga u tá-mu o muthu a zubha o ku mu iudika.
Genesis2:9 Jihova Nzambi anga u sabhukisa mu mavu mbutu ioso ia miẋi ia uabha ku mesu
Genesis2:10 Bhu kala ue ni ngiji
Genesis2:11 Ngiji imoxi dijina diê Pixone; iene ia kondoloka o ixi ioso ia Havila
Genesis2:12 O ulu ua ixi ienhoio ua uabha muene
Genesis2:13 Ngiji ia kaiadi dijina diê Ngibone; iene ia kondoloka ixi ia Kuxi.
Genesis2:14 O ngiji ia katatu dijina diê Tigre; iene ia bhiti ku mutundila-kumbi ku ixi ia Asídia. O ngiji ia kauana Ufalate.
Genesis2:15 Jihova Nzambi anga u kuata o muthu
Genesis2:16 Jihova Nzambi anga u tendelela o muthu
Genesis2:17 maji ku muẋi-phe ua kuijiia kiauabha ni kiaiibha kana kudia-ku; mukonda o kizuua ki ua kà dia-ku
Genesis2:18 Jihova Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis2:19 Jihova Nzambi
Genesis2:20 Adá anga u luka majina ma ibhaku ioso
Genesis2:21 Jihova Nzambi anga u bhangesa Adá kuia ku kilu kiavulu
Genesis2:22 O ku lumbânji lua katula ku diiala
Genesis2:23 Adá anga u zuela
Genesis2:24 Mukonda dia kiki
Genesis2:25 Ene kiiadi kiâ
Genesis3:1 Tala
Genesis3:2 Muhatu u ambela o nhoka
Genesis3:3 maji muẋi ngó umoxi uala mu kaẋi ka díbhia
Genesis3:4 Nkoka-phe anga u ambela muhatu
Genesis3:5 Mukonda Nzambi ua kʼijiia kuma kizuua ki mu dia-ku
Genesis3:6 O muhatu-phe kia mono kuma muẋi ua mbote phala kudia
Genesis3:7 Bhenhobho ene oso kiiadi kiâ anga a jikuka o mesu
Genesis3:8 Anga evua o dízui dia Jihova Nzambi uala kunhunga mu díbhia
Genesis3:9 Jihova Nzambi anga u ixana Adá
Genesis3:10 Muene uetaia
Genesis3:11 Kuala Nzambi: Nanhi ua ku tangela-kiu
Genesis3:12 Bhenhobho diiala uixi
Genesis3:13 Jihova Nzambi anga u ambela muhatu
Genesis3:14 Jihova Nzambi anga u ambela o nhoka
Genesis3:15 Nga-nda kuta unguma bhu kaẋi ké eie ni muhatu
Genesis3:16 Anga u ambela o muhatu
Genesis3:17 Anga u ambela Adá
Genesis3:18 mavu a ku sabhukila jinga minha ni holokoso
Genesis3:19 ku suualu ia pholo ié kuene ku ua kà dia o mbolo ié
Genesis3:20 Adá anga u luka muhatuʼé o dijina dia Eva; kuma muene mama ia athu oso a muenhu.

Genesis3:22 Ngana Nzambi anga u zuela
Genesis3:23 mukonda dia kiki
Genesis3:24 O muthu kia zubha o ku mu kaia
Genesis4:1 Adá anga u ijiia mukajiʼê Eva
Genesis4:2 Anga u vuala dingi Abele. Abele anga u kala mubidi ua jimbudi
Genesis4:3 Mu kubhanga izuua
Genesis4:4 Abele ue u bheka ku anʼa jimbudi mu kilunga kiê oso a dianga ku a vuala
Genesis4:5 Kaini-phe
Genesis4:6 Ngana anga u ambela Kaini
Genesis4:7 Se u bhanga kia-mbote
Genesis4:8 Kaini anga u zuela ni phangʼê Abele
Genesis4:9 Ngana anga u ambela Kaini
Genesis4:10 Kuala Ngana: Eie ihi i ua bhange? Dízui dia manhinga ma phangʼié dia dikola kokuami tundé mu mavu.
Genesis4:11 Kiki-phe lamba dié
Genesis4:12 Kioso ki ua kà dima jinga o mavu
Genesis4:13 Kaini anga u ambela Ngana
Genesis4:14 Eie-phe ua ngi kaiʼó kizuua kia lelu
Genesis4:15 Ngana anga u mu ambela
Genesis4:16 Kaini anga u tunda bhu pholo ia Ngana
Genesis4:17 Kaini anga u ijiia mukajiʼê; anga u imita
Genesis4:18 Enoko anga u vuala Iiadi; Iiadi u vuala Mehujaiele; Mehujaiele u vuala Metuzaiele; Metuzaiele u vuala Lameke.
Genesis4:19 Lameke anga u sakana hongo
Genesis4:20 Ada anga u vuala Jabale; muene tata ia akua kutunga mu jibalaka
Genesis4:21 Kiubha kiê dijina diê Jubale: muene tata ia akua kuxika mbèndu ni mbànza.
Genesis4:22 Zila ue u vuala Tubale-Kaini; musudi-a-thumba
Genesis4:23 Lameke anga u ambela akajiʼê kiiadi
Genesis4:24 Mukonda se o mulonga ua Kaini
Genesis4:25 Adá anga u tona dingi kuijiia mukajiʼê; anga u vuala monʼa diiala
Genesis4:26 Sethe ue ku izuua u vuala monʼa diiala
Genesis5:1 Didi diene o divulu dia Ingo ia vumu ia Adá: Kizuua kia bhanga Nzambi o muthu
Genesis5:2 Ua a bhange diiala
Genesis5:3 Adá u bhanga hama ia muvu ni makuinhi atatu
Genesis5:4 Kia zubha Adá kuvuala Sethe u bhanga dingi hama nake ia mivu
Genesis5:5 Izuua ioso ia Adá mu ngongo
Genesis5:6 Sethe anga u bhanga hama ia muvu ni itanu
Genesis5:7 O kia zubha Sethe kuvuala Eno
Genesis5:8 Izuua ia Sethe mu ngongo anga i tena hama vua ia muvu ni kuinhi ni iadi; anga u fua.
Genesis5:9 Eno anga u bhanga makuinhiʼvua a muvu
Genesis5:10 O kia zubha Eno kuvuala Kainane
Genesis5:11 Izuua ioso ia Eno mu ngongo anga i tena hamaʼvua a mivu ni itatu; anga u fua.
Genesis5:12 O Kainane kia tenesa makuinhi sambuadi a muvu
Genesis5:13 O kia zubha Kainane kuvuala Mahalalele
Genesis5:14 Izuua ioso ia Kainane mu ngongo i tena konda ia hamaʼvua ia muvu ni kuinhi; anga u fua.
Genesis5:15 Mahalalele anga u bhanga makuinhi a samanu a muvu ni itanu
Genesis5:16 O kia zubha Mahalalele kuvuala Jalede
Genesis5:17 Izuua ioso ia muenhu ua Mahalalele anga itena konda ia hama nakeʼa muvu ni makuinhiʼivua ni itanu; hé u fua.
Genesis5:18 Jalede kia tenesa hama ia muvu ni makuinhi a samanu ni iadi
Genesis5:19 O kia zubha Jalede kuvuala Enoko
Genesis5:20 Izuua ioso ia Jalede anga i tena konda ia hamaʼvua ia muvu ni makuinhi a samanu niʼiadi; hé u fua.
Genesis5:21 Enoko anga u bhanga makuinhi a samanu a muvu ni itanu
Genesis5:22 Enoko anga uenda ni Nzambi; kia zubha kuvuala Matúzala
Genesis5:23 Izuua ioso ia Enoko anga i tena konda ia hama jitatu ja muvu ni makuinhi a samanu ni itanu;
Genesis5:24 Enoko anga uenda ni Nzambi
Genesis5:25 Matúzala anga u bhanga hama ia muvu ni makuinhi nake ni sambuadi ku muenhu
Genesis5:26 O kia zubha Matúzala kuvuala Lameke
Genesis5:27 Izuua ioso ia Matúzala anga i tena konda ia hamaʼvua ia muvu ni makuinhi a samanu nʼivua; hé u fua.
Genesis5:28 Lameke anga u bhanga hamʼa muvu ni makuinhi nake ni iiadi
Genesis5:29 Anga u mu luka dijina dia Noué
Genesis5:30 O kia zubha Lameke kuvuala Noué
Genesis5:31 Izuua ioso ia Lameke anga i tena konda ia hama sambuadiʼa muvu ni makuinhi sambuadi ni sambuadi; hé u fua.
Genesis5:32 Noué kia tenesa hama jitanu ja muvu; u vuala Seme

Genesis6:6 Ngana anga u dielesa mu ku bhanga o muthu mu ngongo

Genesis6:15 U i kalakala kiki: O kulebha kua álaka ku kale hama jitatu ja kóvado
Genesis6:16 Álaka u i ta ni njanena iê
Genesis6:17 Mukonda ijiia na-kiu kuma eme nga-nda kulundulula dilúvio dia menha mu ngongo
Genesis6:18 Maji-phe nga-nda ku ta kikutu kiami ni eie: ua kà bokona mu álaka
Genesis6:19 Ku jixitu joso jala ni muenhu
Genesis6:20 Ku jinjila ni kidifua kiâ
Genesis6:21 Eie-phe u katula ue ku makudia moso mene mu kúdia
Genesis6:22 Noué anga u bhanga kienhókio kala kioso kia mu tumu Nzambi
Genesis7:1 Kienʼokio Ngana anga u ambela Noué
Genesis7:2 Ku jixitu joso ja zele u kuata-ku sambuadi dia ndumbe
Genesis7:3 Ku jinjila ue ji bhita bhulu
Genesis7:4 Kuma kua kambe ngó sambuadi dia izuua
Genesis7:5 Noué anga u bhanga kioso kia mu tumu Ngana.
Genesis7:6 Noué anga u kala mu hama jisamanu ja muvu kioso ki eza o dilúvio dia menha mu ngongo.
Genesis7:7 Noué anga u bokona
Genesis7:8 Ku jixitu jazele
Genesis7:9 A bokona ni Noué mu álaka ku kiiadi-kiiadi
Genesis7:10 Mu kukala-phe
Genesis7:11 Mu muvu ua Noué ua kutenesa hama jisamanu ja muvu
Genesis7:12 Mvula anga i noka mu ngongo mu makuinhi auana a izuua
Genesis7:13 Mu kizuua kimoxi kienhokio
Genesis7:14 Ni ene ni jixitu joso mu idifua iâ
Genesis7:15 O jixitu joso jala ni kubhuima kua muenhu moxi diâ
Genesis7:16 Anga a bokona
Genesis7:17 Dilúvio anga di kala mu ngongo mu makuinhi auana a izuua; menha anga a vula
Genesis7:18 Menha anga a suina
Genesis7:19 Menha hanji aia ni kuvula mu ngongo katé ni jisungu ja milundu ioso ia lebha koxi ia diulu ja jimuka.
Genesis7:20 Menha anga a ta-ku dingi kuinhi dia kóvado ni kitanu ku thandu dia milundu ia boba.
Genesis7:21 Jixitu joso anga ji fua
Genesis7:22 O ioso ia kexile ni muha ua muenhu ua kubuima mu mazulu mâ
Genesis7:23 Ima ioso ia muenhu anga i jimuka ku thandu dia mavu
Genesis7:24 Menha anga a nakina mu ngongo mu hama ia izuua ni makuinhi a tanu.
Genesis8:1 Nzambi anga u lembalala Noué
Genesis8:2 Majiia ma mukiukuluku
Genesis8:3 menha anga ma kala mu bhunhena mu ngongo
Genesis8:4 O álaka anga i tula
Genesis8:5 Menha-phe hanji aia ni kutebhunuka katé bhu mbeji ia kakuinhi; bhu mbeji ia kakuinhi-phe
Genesis8:6 Kia zubha kubhita makuinhi auana a izuua
Genesis8:7 Anga u tubhula kilombelombe
Genesis8:8 Anga u tubhula diembe
Genesis8:9 Diembe-phe ki dia mono kididi bhuoso bha tena ku tula dikanda dia kinama kiê
Genesis8:10 Kia zubha kubhanga dingi sambuadi dia izuua
Genesis8:11 O diembe anga di vutuka kua muene mu kumbi dia ngoloxi; mu kutala u mona ku musungu uambata dífue dia uisu dia mudiva; Noué anga u kʼijiia kuma menha ma tebhunuka kiá mu ngongo.
Genesis8:12 Anga u bhanga dingi sambuadi dia mukuá dia izuua
Genesis8:13 Anga ki bhita kuila mu muvu ua kamoxi ku hama jisamanu
Genesis8:14 Ku mbeji ia kaiadi
Genesis8:15 Kieniʼokio Nzambi anga u ambela Noué

Genesis11:1 Ixi ioso anga i kala ni uzuelelu umoxi
Genesis11:2 Mu kukala-phe
Genesis11:3 Anga a di ambela mudiâ
Genesis11:4 Exi: Ndokuenu
Genesis11:5 Ngana anga u tuluka mu tala mbonge ni kathôndo kala mu tunga anʼathu.
Genesis11:6 Ngana anga u zuela
Genesis11:7 Ndokuenu
Genesis11:8 Ngana bheniʼobho anga u a muangena mu ngongo ioso
Genesis11:9 Kiene ki bhua xalela dijina dia Babele; mukonda Ngana bhenhobho bhua bhidikila o kuzuela kua athu mu ngongo; Ngana bhene bhua a muanganesa mu jixi joso kulu dia mundu.
Genesis11:10 Ingo ia vumu ia Seme ienhiʼii: Seme u kala mu hama ia muvu
Genesis11:11 O kia zubha kuvuala Alufaxade
Genesis11:12 Alufaxade u kala mu makuinhi atatu a muvu ni itanu
Genesis11:13 Kia zubha kuvuala Selahe Alufaxade u bhanga dingi hama jiuana ja muvu ni itatu
Genesis11:14 Selahe u kala mu makuinhi atatu a muvu
Genesis11:15 Kia zubha kuvuala Hebele
Genesis11:16 Hebele u kala mu makuinhi atatu a mivu ni iuana
Genesis11:17 Kia zubha kuvuala Peleke
Genesis11:18 Peleke u kala mu makuinhi atatu a muvu
Genesis11:19 Kia zubha kuvuala Lehu
Genesis11:20 Lehu u kala mu makuinhi atatu a muvu ni iiadi
Genesis11:21 Kia zubha kuvuala Seluke
Genesis11:22 Seluke anga u kala mu makuinhi atatu a muvu
Genesis11:23 Kia zubha kuvuala Naholo
Genesis11:24 Naholo u kala mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu niʼvua
Genesis11:25 Kia zubha kuvuala Tela
Genesis11:26 Tela anga u kala mu makuinhi sambuadi a muvu
Genesis11:27 Ingo ia vumu ienhiʼii ia Tela: Tela u vuala Mbalamu
Genesis11:28 Halane anga u fua ku mesu a tatʼâ Tela
Genesis11:29 Ni Mbalamu ni Naholo anga a sakana ahatuʼâ: muhatu a Mbalamu dijina diê Salai; muhatu a Naholo dijina diê Mídika
Genesis11:30 Salai
Genesis11:31 Tela anga u kuata monʼê Mbalamu; ni Lote monʼa Halane mulaúlʼê; ni Salai mukaji a monʼê Mbalamu; anga a katukila kumoxi mu Ule ia Jikaldeu
Genesis11:32 Izuua ia Tela anga i tena hama jiiadi ja mivu ni itanu: Tela anga u fuila mu Halane.
Genesis12:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mbalamu
Genesis12:2 eme-phe nga-nda ku ku sokolola
Genesis12:3 Nga kà a benzela oso a ku benzela eie
Genesis12:4 Bhenhobho Mbalamu u katuka kala kia mu tumu Jihova; Lote anga uila-nê kumoxi. Mbalamu anga u kala mu makuinhi sambuadi a muvu ni itanu kia katuka mu Halane.
Genesis12:5 Mbalamu anga u katula mukajiʼê Salai
Genesis12:6 Mbalamu anga u nhunga mʼoxi muenhʼomo katé kieza bhu kididi kia Xikeme
Genesis12:7 Jihova anga u tukulukila Mbalamu
Genesis12:8 Anga u tunda-bhu uia ku mulundu ku mbandu ia thunda ia Betele
Genesis12:9 Mbalamu anga u kuata dingi mu kuenda
Genesis12:10 Mʼoxiʼomo anga muiza nzala
Genesis12:11 Mu kuenda-phe
Genesis12:12 Tuenda kuila akua Ijitu kia ku mona

Genesis13:2 Mbalamu muene anga ukala monhi ia dikota ia ibhaku
Genesis13:3 Mu kuenda ni kusondoloka anga u tunda mu sulu
Genesis13:4 bhua tungile ue kalatódio kê mʼokulu. Bhenhobho Mbalamu anga u hingila dingi o dijina dia Jihova.

Genesis45:3 Zuze bhenhobho anga u ambela o jiphange jê

Genesis45:5 Kiki-phe kana kutata ngó

Genesis46:5 Jakobo anga u katuka dingi bhu Bele-seba; anʼa Izalaiele a mala ambata tatʼâ Jakobo

Genesis46:7 Ni anʼê a mala ni aláula a mala

Exodus6:28 A nga ki bhita kuila
Exodus6:29 Jihova u ambela Mozé
Exodus6:30 Mozé anga u zuela bhu pholo ia Jihova
Exodus7:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé
Exodus7:2 Eie u zuela kioso ki ngi ku tuma; phange ié Alá-phe muene u ambela Falaó kuila ehe anʼa Izalaiele
Exodus7:3 Eme-phe ngi kolesa o muxima ua Falaó
Exodus7:4 Falaó-phe ka-nda ku mʼivua
Exodus7:5 O akua Ijitu-phe a kejiia kuma eme ngi Jihova
Exodus7:6 Mozé ni Alá anga a ki bhanga; kala kioso kia a tumu Jihova kiene muene kia bhange.
Exodus7:7 Mozé anga u kala mu makuinhi nake a muvu
Exodus7:8 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé ni Alá
Exodus7:9 Kioso Falaó kia kà zuela ni enu
Exodus7:10 Mozé ni Alá anga a bokona kua Falaó
Exodus7:11 Bhenhobho Falaó ue u ixana jihete ni jinganga
Exodus7:12 Mukonda ene uâ kala muthu ua takula o mbangala iê bhoxi
Exodus7:13 Falaó-phe bhenhobho u kola muẋma
Exodus7:14 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé
Exodus7:15 Eie-phe ndeie kua Falaó mu kimenemene; kuma muene ua-nda kuila ola ioio ku menha; eie-phe ua kʼèmana ku kubumu kia Nilu
Exodus7:16 Ua kà mu ambela kiki
Exodus7:17 Jihova uambe kiki: Bhene bhu ua-nda ku ngʼijidila kuma eme Jihova; bheniabha-phe
Exodus7:18 O jimbiji jala mu ngiji ji fua
Exodus7:19 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé
Exodus7:20 Ni Mozé ni Alá anga a bhanga kala kia a tumu Jihova; Alá anga u zenga o mbangala u beta menha mala mu honga
Exodus7:21 O jimbiji jala mu menha anga ji fua; menha ene oso a bola akua Ijitu anga a lémbua kúnua menha mu honga; mʼoxi ioso ia Ijito anga mu iibha ni manhinga.
Exodus7:22 O imbanda ia akua Ijitu anga a ki bhanga uê ni uanga uâ; anga ki bhekela Falaó ku kola o muxima
Exodus7:23 Falaó anga u tunda-bhu
Exodus7:24 Akua Ijitu oso anga a kala mu kanda jifiẋi bhu mbandu ia honga
Exodus7:25 Kienhokio sambuadi dia izuua anga i tena
Exodus8:1 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé
Exodus8:2 O ki u dituna ku a eha
Exodus8:3 O mazote mu honga a di vuala
Exodus8:4 O mazote a ku kuma ni ku mukutu ué
Exodus8:5 Johova anga u ambela dingi Mozé
Exodus8:6 Alá anga u sununa lukuaku luê ku thandu dia menha ma Ijitu; mazote anga a banda
Exodus8:7 O imbanda ia uanga ue anga a ki bhanga ni uanga uâ
Exodus8:8 Bhenhobho Falaó u ixana Mozé ni Alá
Exodus8:9 Mozé anga u ambela Falaó
Exodus8:10 Muene
Exodus8:11 Mungu mazote a ku batuka ku mukutu ué
Exodus8:12 Bhenhobho ni Mozé ni Alá anga a tunda kua Falaó

Exodus8:14 Anga a a bhongolola jimvumbu-jimvumbu; ixi ioso anga i nuha kibuzu.
Exodus8:15 Falaó-phe kia mono kuila kuala hanji kunhoha
Exodus8:16 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé

Exodus8:21 O ki uila kana

Exodus8:23 Ngi ta mbámbe mu kaẋi ka mundu uami ni mundu uê; mungu ki kúkia kiene ki bhita o kijimbuete kiki.

Exodus8:27 Tu ehe tuie njila ia izuua itatu mu kikangalakata

Exodus9:1 Kienhókio o Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé

Exodus9:4 Jihova ua-nda kutungula ue o ibhaku ia Izalaiele ni ibhaku ia akua Ijitu; phala ki ku fue kima ku ibhaku ioso ia tokala ku anʼa Izalaiele.

Exodus9:6 Kúkia ni kimene

Exodus12:2 Mbeji iii muene
Exodus12:3 Ambelenu o kionge kioso kia Izalaiele kuma: Kizuua kia kakuinhi ku mbeji iii
Exodus12:4 maji se o dibhata-phe dia tolo
Exodus12:5 O mbudi iene i kala iadisanze sé ngó unema
Exodus12:6 anga mu i bhaka katé mu kizuua kia kauana ku dikuinhi
Exodus12:7 Hé a kuata-phe o manhinga-mê anga a ma sangela ku mikangala ia dibhitu iene kiiadi kiâ
Exodus12:8 Xitu a i dia usuku uenʼió
Exodus12:9 Ki mu die-ku kama koso-koso ka uisu
Exodus12:10 Kana kuxia-ku kima katé ki kúkia; se kuxala katé kuáki
Exodus12:11 Mu i dia kala kiki: Mua zuata
Exodus12:12 Mbata mu usuku uenhó eme ngi bhita mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu
Exodus12:13 O manhinga-phe ma kale kijimbuete ku jinzo joso mu mualʼenu; o ki ngi mona manhinga ngi mi somboka
Exodus12:14 Kizuua kienhiki ki mi kala kizuua kia di tungula
Exodus12:15 O jimbolo ja kambe o felemendu mu ji dia mu sambuadi dia izuua; tunde kiá kizuua kiene kia dianga
Exodus12:16 Kizuua kiadianga
Exodus12:17 O fesa ia jimbolo ja kambe felemendu
Exodus12:18 Ku mbeji ia kamoxi
Exodus12:19 Mu sambuadi dia izuua iii
Exodus12:20 Kana kúdia kima kiala ni felemendu; ku mabhata menu
Exodus12:21 Bhenhobho Mozé u tuma kuixana adiakimi oso a Izalaiele
Exodus12:22 Mu kuata ni kakiezu ka hisopo
Exodus12:23 Kuma Jihova ua-nda kubhita mʼoxi ioso mu kuama akua Ijitu; o kia-nda kumona manhinga ku phidika ni ku mikangala iiadi ia dibhitu
Exodus12:24 Kienhiki ki kala kijila kienu ki mu kuata
Exodus12:25 Ku hádia-phe kioso ki mua kà bhiẋila mʼoxi ia tange Jihova ku mi bhana-iu
Exodus12:26 O kia kèla anʼenu a mʼibhula
Exodus12:27 Enu mua kèla kuma: Sata iangene ia Jihova
Exodus12:28 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tunda-bhu
Exodus12:29 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila

Exodus12:32 Ni jimbudi jenu ni jingombe ambatenu-ju

Exodus12:34 O mundu anga a katula o ikose iâ ia jimbolo
Exodus12:35 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhanga kala kia ambela Mozé
Exodus12:36 Jihova anga u bhana o mundu uê ngalasa ku mesu a akua Ijitu
Exodus12:37 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a katuka bhu Lameseji
Exodus12:38 Sai dingi ni kifuẋi kia dikota kia jinzuángiza a di bundu momuʼâ ia endela-nâ kumoxi
Exodus12:39 Anga a kanga o jimbolo ja kambe o felemendu
Exodus12:40 Kala kiki mivu ia bhange anʼa Izalaiele mu Ijitu
Exodus12:41 O mu kukala-kukala-phe
Exodus12:42 Kifua usuku ió Jihova ua a tele muxima mu ku a katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu; usuku iú-phe usuku ua Jihova

Exodus12:44 Maji o mubhika ua muthu-phe
Exodus12:45 O nzuangiza-phe ni ngunza ka tena kudia-ku.

Exodus25:17 U iudika ue ni kibhuna kia kiadi
Exodus25:18 Anga u iudika ue ni jixelube jiiadi ja ulu; ufunu ua kusula u bhita-bhu; ji suka bhu pondo ni pondo ia kibhuna kia kiadi.

Exodus25:20 Jixelube jiji jʼòleka o mabhabha mâ bhulu
Exodus25:21 Kibhuna kia kiadi u ki ta ku thandu dia álaka; o moxi dia álaka

Exodus25:25 Ku bhita ue dibaia di kondoloka mu inama ia meza
Exodus25:26 U iudika ue ni malenge auana a ulu
Exodus25:27 O malenge a zukame mu dibaia dia kondoloka
Exodus25:28 U iudika ue ni mikambu ia muẋi ua xitimi
Exodus25:29 U iudika ue ni malonga mê
Exodus25:30 O ku meza-phe u ta jinga-ku o jimbolo ja ku ngi tela sata
Exodus25:31 U iudika ue ni kandeia ka ulu ua fina; ufunu ua kusula u bhita-bhu mu iudika kandeia
Exodus25:32 ku kala ue thangu jisamanu ji tunda mu jimbanji jê
Exodus25:33 luthangu lu kala ni kopho jitatu jedi kala itulu ia mumendouela ni kixina kiê ni kitulu; luthangu lu kala ni kopho jitatu jedi kala itulu ia mumendouela
Exodus25:34 maji o ku kandeia kuene ku kala kopho jiuana jila kala itulu ia mumendouela
Exodus25:35 thangu jiiadi ji kala ni kixina kimoxi
Exodus25:36 Ni kixina ni jithangu ji kala kima kimoxi ni kandeia; iene ioso a i sudila kumoxi
Exodus25:37 Ku thandu diê u ta-ku jikandeia ji kala sambuadi; a ji sendela jinga phala ji muikine bhu pholo ia kandeia bhuoso bhu kemana; ua kà iudika ue sambuadi dia jikandeia nʼu ji te bhu thandu diê phala a ji bambule jinge ni kumuikina bhuala kandeia.

Exodus28:22 Ku muxila iudikila-ku ue malubhambu ma ulu uóxise kala jingoji
Exodus28:23 Ku muxila ue u iudikila-ku malenge maiadi ma ulu
Exodus28:24 O malubhambu maiadi ma ulu uóxise kala jingoji
Exodus28:25 O jisungu jiiadi jamukuá ja malubhambu ji kuata ni makuatelu mu jifita ja efodi ja bhiti bhu isuxi
Exodus28:26 U iudika dingi malenge maiadi ma ulu
Exodus28:27 U iudika ue malenge aiadi a ulu
Exodus28:28 O muxila-phe ni malenge mê ma bhoxi
Exodus28:29 Kienhokio-phe Alá
Exodus28:30 O moxi dia muxila ua kuzambuila u ta-mu ue Udimi ni Tumimi
Exodus28:31 U bhanga ue o mandu ia efodi
Exodus28:32 I kubuka dizungu mu kaẋi mu bhita o mútue
Exodus28:33 Bhu suka o muxila
Exodus28:34 Kifua ku kala dinzuela ni dibhole
Exodus28:35 Alá u i zuata kioso kiala mu sedivila; o kuxika kua manzuela
Exodus28:36 U iudika ue ni kítandu kia ulu ua fina
Exodus28:37 Kitandu kiki u ki kutila ku kijinga ni fita ia azulu
Exodus28:38 O Alá anga u i zuata bhu dibhomo diê
Exodus28:39 O divunga a di tunga ku mulongo
Exodus28:40 Anʼa Alá ue u a iudikila ni mavunga
Exodus28:41 O izuatu iii anga u i zuika kua phange ié Alá
Exodus28:42 U a iudikila ue ni jikalasá ja linhu
Exodus28:43 a ji zuata ni Alá ni anʼê
Exodus29:1 O ki tokala ku a bhanga kienhiki
Exodus29:2 Ni jimbolo jakambe kifulu-fulu
Exodus29:3 Anga u ji ambatela mu kinda kumoxi ni ngombe ia kiubha ni ilumbe iiadi ia jimbudi.
Exodus29:4 Ni Alá-phe ni anʼê a mala u a bheka bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena
Exodus29:5 Anga u zangula izuatu u i zuika Alá ni mbinza
Exodus29:6 U mu ta kijinga ku mútue
Exodus29:7 Bhenhobho-phe u kuata maji a kuunda u mu lunduluila-nâ mu mútue
Exodus29:8 Hé u bheka ue kiua ni anʼê
Exodus29:9 U a kuta jiphonda
Exodus29:10 O ngombe ia kiubha u i bheka bhu kanga dia balaka ia kutakanena; ni Alá-phe ni anʼê
Exodus29:11 O ngombe anga u i jibhila bhobho
Exodus29:12 Anga u tambula-ku ku manhinga ma ngombe
Exodus29:13 U kuata ue o banha ioso i tunda ku dikutu
Exodus29:14 Xitu-phe ia ngombe ni kibha kiê
Exodus29:15 Kienhókio ku ilumbe ia jimbudi u kuata-bhu ue kimoxi; Alá ni anʼê anga a tula maku mâ ku mútue ua kilumbe;
Exodus29:16 kilumbe anga mu ki jibhila bhenhobho
Exodus29:17 Kilumbe anga u ki bhanga ku idiandu
Exodus29:18 Kilumbe kioso kia muvimba anga u ki ohela ku kalatódio; kífua sata ia Jihova ia kuoha; dizumba diambote
Exodus29:19 Kilumbe kia mbudi kia mukuá anga u ki kuata ue; Alá ni anʼê anga a tula maku mâ ku mútue ua kilumbe.
Exodus29:20 O kilumbe anga mu ki jibhila bhenhobho
Exodus29:21 U katula ue ku manhinga mala ku kalatódio
Exodus29:22 Kala kiki ni muene ni izuatu iê
Exodus29:23 Anga u katula dikende dimoxi dia mbolo
Exodus29:24 iene ioso iii anga mu i bhana bhu maku a Alá
Exodus29:25 O ki u i tambula bhu maku mâ
Exodus29:26 U katula-phe o phetu ia kilumbe kia Alá
Exodus29:27 O phetu iii ia kusakesa
Exodus29:28 Di kala diene o dikânda dia Alá ni anʼê
Exodus29:29 O izuatu ikola ia Alá
Exodus29:30 Ku anʼê
Exodus29:31 O kilumbe kia kulumba na-kiu
Exodus29:32 Ni Alá ni anʼê a dia xitu ienhiʼii
Exodus29:33 A kà dia ima ienhiʼii
Exodus29:34 Se ku xitu ia kulumbila ku subhuka kama
Exodus29:35 Kiene ki u bhangʼiki kua Alá ni anʼê kala kiá kioso ki nga ku tumu
Exodus29:36 Kala kizuua ni kizuua u bhakula ue ngombe ia kiubha mu sata ia ituxi
Exodus29:37 Mu sambuadi dioso dia izuua
Exodus29:38 O sata i u satela jinga ku kalatódio ienhiʼii: Mbudi jiiadi ja kiubha izuua ioso.
Exodus29:39 Mbudi imoxi u i sata mu kimene
Exodus29:40 Ku mbudi imoxi u kuata ni mbandu ia kakuinhi ia efah ia fuba ia fina
Exodus29:41 O mbudi iamukuá u i sata mu ngoloxi
Exodus29:42 Sata iii ia kuoha izuua ioso
Exodus29:43 Bhenhobho bhene bhu ngi takanena jinga ni anʼa Izalaiele phala ku unene uami
Exodus29:44 Anga ngi kôlesa ue ni balaka ia kutakanena
Exodus29:45 Nga kà tunga mu kaẋi ka anʼa Izalaiele

Exodus34:1 Bhenhobho Jihova anga u ambela Mozé

Exodus34:8 Mozé anga muʼanzanzʼomo

Exodus36:2 Mozé anga u ixana Bezalele ni Aholiiabe

Exodus36:4 Jihete jala mu kalakala ufunu uoso ua dibhezelu
Exodus36:5 Eza kua Mozé
Exodus36:6 Mozé anga u tuma kuxikisa ngonge mu kibangu kioso
Exodus36:7 Kuma imbamba ia thungu
Exodus36:8 Kala kiki o jihete joso ja muxima eza ku kalakala
Exodus36:9 Kulutina imoxi kulebha kuê makuinhi aiadi a kóvadu ni nake
Exodus36:10 Mbongo jitanu a ji tungila kumoxi
Exodus36:11 Anga u iudika mazanzu ma azulu ku muhuhu ua suku ku kanga ku thanga imoxi
Exodus36:12 Makuinhi atanu a mazanzu ku thanga imoxi

Exodus36:17 Anga u iudika makuinhi atanu a mazanzu ku muhuhu ua suku ku kanga ku thanga imoxi
Exodus36:18 Anga u iudika ue makuinhi atanu a koloxete ja ngôndo
Exodus36:19 Anga u iudika divunga dia balaka
Exodus36:20 Anga a iudika o mabaia ma jingunhi ja balaka ja muẋi ua xitimi
Exodus36:21 O mabaia iâ kulebha kuê kuinhi dia kôvadu
Exodus36:22 Kala dibaia di kala ni inama iiadi bhoxi
Exodus36:23 O mu ku iudika o mabaia iâ a balaka
Exodus36:24 A iudika ue makuinhi auana a ibaka ia phalata
Exodus36:25 Mbandu ia kaiadi ia balaka i bana ku suku
Exodus36:26 ni makuinhi auana a ibaka ia phalata; dibaia ni ibaka iê iiadi
Exodus36:27 Mbandu ia balaka ia xilu
Exodus36:28 Anga a iudika mabaia aiadi a jithungi ku xilu
Exodus36:29 O mabaia aiadi iâ a a sokeka kumoxi tunde bhoxi katé bhulu bhua a kuatesela ni delenge; kienhiki kiene kia bhange ku mabaia oso a thungi jiiadi.
Exodus36:30 Nake dioso dia mabaia ni ibaka iâ ia phalata
Exodus36:31 Anga a iudika ni mnikangala ia muii ua xitimi; mikangala itanu ia kukuata mabaia ku mbandu imoxi ia balaka
Exodus36:32 mikangala itanu ia kukuata mabaia ku mbandu ia mukuá ia balaka
Exodus36:33 A bhitisa ue mukangala mu kaẋi ka mabaia tunde ku thungi iii katé ku thungi ia mukuá.
Exodus36:34 O mabaia ua a folala ulu
Exodus36:35 Anga a iudika kibatulu kia azulu
Exodus36:36 A iudika ni philadi jê jiuana ja múẋi ua xitimi
Exodus36:37 A iudika ue dibeka dia kuxita bhu muelu ua balaka
Exodus36:38 Ni philadi jê jitanu ni jikoloxete jê; o ibaka iê ia thandu ni moldura iê a i folala ni ulu; o ibaka iê ia bhoxi i kala ia ngôndo.
Exodus37:1 Bezalele anga u iudika álaka ia muẋi ua xitimi; kulebha kuê kôvadu jiiadi ni kaxaxi
Exodus37:2 anga u i folala ni ulu ua fina ni moxi ni ku kanga
Exodus37:3 Anga u iẋika ue ni malenge auana a ulu
Exodus37:4 Anga u iudika ni mikambu ia muẋi ua xitimi
Exodus37:5 Mikambu iii u i ta mu malenge ku mbandu jiiadi ja álaka
Exodus37:6 U iudika ue ni kibhuna kia kiadi
Exodus37:7 Anga u iudika ni jixelube jiiadi ja ulu; ua ji iudika ni ufunu ua kusula
Exodus37:8 Bhu sungu kunu bhu kala xelube imoxi
Exodus37:9 Jixelube anga ji oleka mabhabha mâ bhulu
Exodus37:10 Anga u iudika ue ni meza ma muẋi ua xitimi; o kulebha kuê kôvadu jiiadi
Exodus37:11 Meza ua a folala ni ulu ua fina
Exodus37:12 Iu ua iudika ue ni muhuhu ua kondoloka mu jimbandu
Exodus37:13 Anga u zunza ue malenge mê mauana ma ulu; u ta malenge mu jithungi ja inama iê iuana.
Exodus37:14 Malenge ma zukama ku muhuhu ua kondoloka
Exodus37:15 Mikambu ua i iudika ia muẋi ua xitimi
Exodus37:16 Anga u iudika ni imbamba ia tokala ku meza
Exodus37:17 Anga u iudika ue kandeia ka ulu ua di kenze kiambote; ua ka iudika ni ufunu ua kusula
Exodus37:18 Ku kala thangu jê jisamanu ji tunda mu jimbanji jê
Exodus37:19 Luthangu lu kala ni kopho jitatu jedi kala itulu ia mumêndoua
Exodus37:20 Maji o kandeia kene ka kala ni kopho jiuana jila kala itulu ia mumêndoua
Exodus37:21 Kixina ki kala bhoxi dia thangu jiiadi
Exodus37:22 Ni ixina ni jithangu ji kala pesa imoxi; iene ioso a i sudila kumoxi
Exodus37:23 Anga u iudika jilâmbada jê
Exodus37:24 Talendu ia ulu ua fina uaii-mu
Exodus37:25 Anga u iudika ni kalatódio ka dixi dia dizumba
Exodus37:26 Ua ka folala ni ulu ua fina
Exodus37:27 ua iudika ue ni malenge maiadi ma ulu
Exodus37:28 O mikambu iê ia iudika ia muẋi ua xitimi
Exodus37:29 Anga u iudika ue ni maji akôla a kuundila
Exodus38:1 Anga u iudika ni kalatódio ka jisata ja kuoha
Exodus38:2 Ua iudika ue ni jimbinga bhu thungi jê jiuana; a ji sudila koko ki ji ẋikina ku ji katula-ku; anga u ka folala ni ngôndo.
Exodus38:3 Ua iudika ue ni imbamba ioso ia tokala ku kalatódio
Exodus38:4 Kalatódio ua ka iudikila ue ni ngalade ia ngôndo iila kala uanda; uanda iú u kala ditala diófele dia kuimanena
Exodus38:5 Anga u iẋika malenge mauana
Exodus38:6 Anga u iudika ni mikambu ia muẋi ua xitimi
Exodus38:7 Mikambu anga u i tela mu malenge
Exodus38:8 Anga u iudika ni mbasinha ia kusukuila
Exodus38:9 Anga u iudika ue kithâdi kia balaka; ku mbandu iê ia sulu ku kala jikulutina ja linhu ia fina ioxise; o mbandu imoxi kulebha kuê hâma ia kôvadu.
Exodus38:10 O jiphiladi jê makuinhi aiadi
Exodus38:11 Kiene kimoxi ue ku mbandu ia ku suku: jikulutina jê jʼambata ue hama ia kôvadu
Exodus38:12 Ku mbandu ia mufila-kumbi jikulutina ja makuinhi atanu a kóvadu
Exodus38:13 O ku mbandu ia thunda ue
Exodus38:14 O jikulutina ja mbandu imoxi ia muelu
Exodus38:15 Ku mbandu ia mukuá kiene kimoxi; mbandu iii jikulutina jê ue kuinhi dia kóvadu ni kitanu
Exodus38:16 O jikulutina joso ja kondoloka o kithâdi
Exodus38:17 O ibaka ia jiphiladi ia ngôndo; jingôua ja jiphiladi ni mikambu iê ia phalata; o mítue ku thandu dia jiphiladi
Exodus38:18 O dibeka dia kuxita bhu muelu ua kithâdi
Exodus38:19 Ku kala jiphiladi jê jiuana
Exodus38:20 O jiphapha ja balaka
Exodus38:21 Iii iene o konda ia utadi uaii mu ufunu ua balaka ia umbangi
Exodus38:22 Bezalele monʼa Hule
Exodus38:23 Mesene ia mukuâ ua kexi-nê kumoxi mu sedivisu iii
Exodus38:24 Ulu uoso uaii mu ufunu ua kuiudika dibhezelu
Exodus38:25 O phalata ia oso a a bhangele o disonekenu diâ mu kilômbo
Exodus38:26 Kala mútue u bhana baka
Exodus38:27 O hâma ia talendu ia phalata
Exodus38:28 O midi ni hâma sambuadi ni makuinhi sambuadi ni kitanu kia xikulu
Exodus38:29 O ngôndo ue ia bhakula mu ujitu ua vondadi kuala anʼa Izalaiele oso
Exodus38:30 Ngôndo iii iene ia iudikila ibaka ia muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena
Exodus38:31 Ni ibaka ioso ia kithâdi kia kondoloka
Exodus39:1 O jingoji ja azulu
Exodus39:2 Ua iudika efodi ni ulu
Exodus39:3 O ulu a dianga ku u sula ibasakasa ia fina
Exodus39:4 A i iudika ni jiphakatela jê ji bhita bhu isuxi
Exodus39:5 Ni phonda iê iauabha ia ku i kutila ku mukutu

Exodus39:7 Eneʼá anga u ma jika ku jiphakatela ja efodi bhu isuxi

Exodus39:9 Mbandu jê jiuana ja sokela kumoxi

Exodus39:24 Ku muxiku ua divunga bhoxi

Exodus39:30 Anga a iudika xapa ia ulu ua fina
Exodus39:31 Anga a i ta ni fita ia azulu

Exodus40:4 U bokuesa ue meza

Exodus40:7 O mbasinha ia kusukuila

Exodus40:9 U kuata ue o maji ma kuundila
Exodus40:10 Ni kalatódio ka jisata ja kuoha
Exodus40:11 O mbasinha ia kusukuila
Exodus40:12 Ni Alá ni nʼê a mala u a bheka ue bhu muelu ua balaka
Exodus40:13 Alá anga u mu zuika ni izuatu ikola

Exodus40:24 Iu ua te ue o kandeia mu balaka ia ditakanenu
Exodus40:25 Anga u uika jilâmbada jê
Exodus40:26 Iu ua te o kalatódio ka ulu mu balaka ia kutakanena

Exodus40:34 Kia zubha kubhanga kiki

Leviticus1:1 Jihova anga u ixana Mozé
Leviticus1:2 Zuelesa anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus1:3 Ujitu uê se u kala sata ia kuoha ia ngombe
Leviticus1:4 A tule lukuaku luê mu mútue ua sata ia kuoha; anga a i ẋikina bhu kididi kia muene phala ku mu bhangela kiamenga.
Leviticus1:5 Ngombe anga u i jibha bhu pholo ia Jihova; o jinganga
Leviticus1:6 Sata ia kuoha i bhinga u i tàla
Leviticus1:7 O jinganga

Leviticus1:9 Maji o midia-phe ni inama

Leviticus1:12 Muene anga u i bhanga ku idiandu

Leviticus7:2 Bhu kididi bhuoso bhua mu jibhila o sata ia kuoha
Leviticus7:3 U bhakula-ku o banha iê ioso
Leviticus7:4 ni anasonhi aiadi ni banha iê iala ku malombo
Leviticus7:5 Nganga anga u i ohela ku kalatódio mu ujitu ua ku bhakula kua Jihova ni túbhia; kuma sata ia kuêla.
Leviticus7:6 Diiala dioso ku jinganga
Leviticus7:7 Kioso kia tokala sata ia kituxi
Leviticus7:8 Nganga ue uoso u bhakula sata ia kuoha ia bheka muthu uoso-uoso
Leviticus7:9 O ujitu ua musa ue
Leviticus7:10 O mubhaku ua musa
Leviticus7:11 Ngonge ia sata ia paze ienhiʼii: Se muthu uandala kubhakula kua Jihova.
Leviticus7:12 Se sata iê ua i bhana mu kusakidila
Leviticus7:13 Bhu kala ue ni jimbolo ja felemendu
Leviticus7:14 Nganga-phe ku jimbolo ja kambe felemendu u katula-ku imoxi
Leviticus7:15 O xitu-phe ia sata iii ia paze
Leviticus7:16 Sata iê se i kala ia kukumbidila hàsa ia te
Leviticus7:17 Mu kizuua-phe kia katatu
Leviticus7:18 Mukonda se xitu ia sata iê ia paze
Leviticus7:19 Xitu ue se i tula ku kima kia xidi
Leviticus7:20 Maji muthu uoso-phe uala ni kuxila nʼa die ku xitu ia sata ia paze
Leviticus7:21 Se muthu uoso ua babata ku kima kia xidi
Leviticus7:22 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus7:23 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus7:24 O banha ia kibhaku kioso kia di fuila
Leviticus7:25 Kuma uoso u dia ku banha ia kibhaku kia kuila athu ene ku ki satela Jihova
Leviticus7:26 Bhuoso-bhuoso bhu mu tunga
Leviticus7:27 Uoso u dia manhinga oso-oso
Leviticus7:28 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus7:29 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus7:30 muene u bheka ni maku mê o maujitu ma Jihova ma kubhakula ni túbhia; o banha uiza na-iu kumoxi ni phetu
Leviticus7:31 O banha nganga u i ohela ku kalatódio; phetu-phe i kala iangene ia Alá ni anʼê.
Leviticus7:32 Ni kinama kia taku kia mbandu ia dilu
Leviticus7:33 Uoso ku anʼa Alá u bhakula o manhinga ma jisata ja paze
Leviticus7:34 Mukonda ni phetu ia kubhukila
Leviticus7:35 Dienhidi diene o dikandâ dia Alá
Leviticus7:36 Kuma mu kizuua kia a undu ni maji
Leviticus7:37 Ienhiʼii iene o ngonge ia sata ia kuoha

Leviticus8:1 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus8:2 U kuata Alá ni anʼê a mala kumoxi-nê ni izuatu
Leviticus8:3 anga u bhongolola o kilômbo kioso bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena.
Leviticus8:4 Mozé anga u bhanga kala kia mu tumu Jihova; kilômbo kioso anga ki bhongoloka bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena.
Leviticus8:5 Mozé anga u ambela kilômbo
Leviticus8:6 Mozé anga u bhiẋidisa Alá ni anʼê a mala
Leviticus8:7 Anga u mu zuika divunga
Leviticus8:8 U mu nhenga o kixita-thulu ku phetu: o mu kixita-thulu u ta-mu Udimi ni Tumimi.
Leviticus8:9 Anga u mu ta kijinga ku mútue; o ku kijinga
Leviticus8:10 Mozé hé u katula maji a kuundila
Leviticus8:11 Anga u ma sangela ue ku kalatódio lusambuadi
Leviticus8:12 Anga u lundulula o maji a ku undila mu mútue ua Alá
Leviticus8:13 Mozé anga u bheka ue anʼa Alá a mala
Leviticus8:14 Anga u tuma ku mu bhekela kangombe ka sata ia kituxi
Leviticus8:15 Anga u ka jibha; Mozé anga u tambula o manhinga
Leviticus8:16 Anga u katula o banha ioso iala ku mídia
Leviticus8:17 O ngombe-phe ni kibha kiê ni xitu iê
Leviticus8:18 Anga u tuma ku mu bhekela o kilumbe kia mbudi
Leviticus8:19 Anga u ki jibha
Leviticus8:20 Kilumbe anga u ki bhanga idiandu; Mozé anga u oha o mútue
Leviticus8:21 O mídia anga u i sukula ni menha
Leviticus8:22 Anga u tuma ku mu bhekela o kilumbe kia mukuá
Leviticus8:23 Anga u ki jibha; Mozé anga u katula ku manhinga mê
Leviticus8:24 Mozé anga u bhiẋidisa ue anʼa Alá
Leviticus8:25 Anga u katula o banha iê ioso ni mukila uanete
Leviticus8:26 O mu kinda kia jimbolo ja kambe felemendu
Leviticus8:27 Iene ioso iii anga u i tula bhu maku ma Alá
Leviticus8:28 Mozé anga u i tambula dingi bhu makuʼâ
Leviticus8:29 Mozé anga u tambula o phetu
Leviticus8:30 Mozé anga u tambula ku maji a kuundila
Leviticus8:31 Mozé anga u ambela Alá ni anʼê
Leviticus8:32 Maji se ku xitu ku subhuka
Leviticus8:33 O bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena
Leviticus8:34 Kioso ki tua bhange kizuua kia lelu
Leviticus8:35 Mu kala-phe bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena usuku ni muanha
Leviticus8:36 Alá ni anʼê anga a kumbidila kioso kia a tumu Jihova kua Mozé.
Leviticus9:1 Anga ki bhita kuila
Leviticus9:2 anga u ambela Alá
Leviticus9:3 O anʼa Izalaiele u ambela
Leviticus9:4 ni ndumbe ia ngombe ni kilumbe kia mbudi kia sata ia paze

Leviticus9:6 Mozé anga u a ambela
Leviticus9:7 Bhenhobho Mozé anga u ambela Alá
Leviticus9:8 Alá anga u bhikila bhu kalatódio
Leviticus9:9 Anʼa Alá anga a mu bhekela o manhinga; muene u bondeka-mu mulembu uê
Leviticus9:10 Maji o banha-phe
Leviticus9:11 O xitu-phe ni kibha ua i oha mu túbhia ku mukáu ku kanga dia kibangu.
Leviticus9:12 Anga u jibha sata ia kuoha; o anʼa Alá anga a mu bhekela o manhinga
Leviticus9:13 Anga a mu bhana o sata ia kuoha ku idiandu
Leviticus9:14 Mídia anga u i sukula kumoxi ni inama

Leviticus9:20 o bhanha a i ta ku phetu

Leviticus13:5 Mu kizuua kia sambuadi-phe

Leviticus13:7 O kʼikala-phe o dife díʼvula
Leviticus13:8 o nganga a mu tekule
Leviticus13:9 Muthu-phe

Leviticus13:17 O nganga hé u mu kengelela o kia mona-phe kuamba o kitôto kia zele kiá
Leviticus13:18 Lua mukuá ue
Leviticus13:19 anga bhu bhingana dijiji
Leviticus13:20 O muene kiela sui
Leviticus13:21 Maji o nganga-phe kia di mona kuila
Leviticus13:22 Se diene diala ku di bandekeza ni nguzu ioso mu kikonda

Leviticus13:24 O kʼikala-phe uene ni kítoto kia túbhia

Leviticus14:4 nganga a tume kuila
Leviticus14:5 Anga nganga u tuma phala akuatebhu njila imoxi
Leviticus14:6 anga u kuata njila ia mukuá iala ni muenhu
Leviticus14:7 Anga a kuata kusangela ku thandu dia ió uoso ala ku mu ixika o dibhute
Leviticus14:8 O ió-phe uala ku dʼiẋika kiki
Leviticus14:9 Mu kizuua kia kasambuadi-phe u di konga dingi kindemba kiê kioso
Leviticus14:10 O mu kizuua kia kanake
Leviticus14:11 O nganga uoso ua-nda ku mu ixika anga u bhakula o muthu iú ni ima ioso iii kua Jihova
Leviticus14:12 Nganga-phe anga u kuata-bhu kambudi kamoxi ka ndumbe
Leviticus14:13 Anga o kambudi u ka jibhila bhuoso bhuene kujibhila o sata ia kiamenga kia kusatela kituxi ni sata ia kubhakula ni túbhia
Leviticus14:14 Nganga-phe u katula ku manhinga ma kiamenga kia kuêla
Leviticus14:15 Anga nganga u katula ue ku maji

Leviticus14:18 o maji moso ma subhuka hanji bhu lukuaku lua nganga

Leviticus14:21 Maji-phe o muthu ió kia kala ngadiama
Leviticus14:22 ni membe maiadi ma mukáu
Leviticus14:23 O mu kizuua kia kanake mu ku dʼiẋika kuê

Leviticus14:28 Nganga anga u katula dingi maji mʼala bhu lukuaku luê
Leviticus14:29 O maji moso ma subhuka bhu lukuaku lua nganga

Leviticus15:5 Muthu uoso u di bhiáuna ku hama iê
Leviticus15:6 O uoso ue uxikama bhu kibuta bhua xikamene o mukua kibhubhe

Leviticus15:8 O uala ni kibhubhe-phe
Leviticus15:9 O dikombola dioso ue dia mondalela ió u ala ni kibhubhe
Leviticus15:10 Uoso ubabata kima kioso a ki bhadikila mu inama kua ió uala ni kibhubhe
Leviticus15:11 Uoso ue a mu babata kuala o muthu ió uala ni kibhubhe

Leviticus15:13 Muthu iú-phe uala ni kibhubhe
Leviticus15:14 O mu kizuua kia kanake a kuate tumembe tuiadi tua mukáu
Leviticus15:15 o nganga a mu bhele dimoxi ku kiamenga kia kituxi
Leviticus15:16 Diiala ue
Leviticus15:17 Kizuatu mba kibha kioso kia mbombena mbutu ia muenhu a ki sukule ni menha
Leviticus15:18 Muhatu ue
Leviticus15:19 Maji o muhatu kia kala ni kibhubhe
Leviticus15:20 Ni ima ioso i a zala bhua zeka
Leviticus15:21 Uoso-uoso u di bhiáuna ku hama iê
Leviticus15:22 Uoso ue ubabata kima
Leviticus15:23 Se a tula kima ku hama iê-muène

Leviticus15:27 Uoso u di bhiáuna ku izalu iê

Leviticus16:1 Kuila ana kiiadi a mala a Alá afu kiá
Leviticus16:2 Jihova phe uambela Mozé
Leviticus16:3 Kiela ngi bokona-mu
Leviticus16:4 A zuate túnika ikola ia linho
Leviticus16:5 O ku kionge kia anʼa Izalaiele utambula-ku isutu iiadi ia jihombo phala kiamenga kia kituxi
Leviticus16:6 Bhenhobho-phe Alá ubhakula hanji o ngalote iê ia kiamenga kia kituxi
Leviticus16:7 Hé u tambula ue o isutu iiadi anga u i tudila Jihova bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena.
Leviticus16:8 Alá u ta muondona ku thanduʼa isutu iiadʼiii; u ta muondona phala Jihova
Leviticus16:9 Kisutu kioso kia buila o muondona ua Jihova
Leviticus16:10 Maji o kisutu kioso kia buila o muondona ua hombo-ia-muxídika
Leviticus16:11 Kienhókio Alá uiza kiá ni ngalote ia ujitu uê ua kiamenga kia kituxi
Leviticus16:12 A kuate ue o kiómuenu kiezala ni makala ma uama
Leviticus16:13 A lalumuine o uasu ua dizumba bhu makala a túbhia
Leviticus16:14 A katule ku manhinga ma ngalote
Leviticus16:15 Kienhokio kiene kiua kia jibha o kisutu kia kiamenga kia sata ia kubhela o povo ioso
Leviticus16:16 Mu kubhanga kiki uazelesa Onzo iangene ia dibhezelu
Leviticus16:17 Kioso-phe kia bokona kubhuisa ikuma mu dibhezelu diangene
Leviticus16:18 A tunde-phe kiá
Leviticus16:19 Hé usangela dingi manhinga menhomo ku thanduʼa kalatódio lusambuadi ni mulembu uê
Leviticus16:20 O kia zubha-phe kukindula onzo iangene ia dibhezelu
Leviticus16:21 Anga Alá u tula maku mê maiadi ku thanduʼa mútue ua kisutu kia muenhu
Leviticus16:22 Kienhiki o kisutu kiókio ki di tuika o ikuma iâ ioso
Leviticus16:23 Bhenhobho-phe Alá uvutukila kiua mu balaka ia kutakanena
Leviticus16:24 Anga uiẋika o mukutu uê ni menha mu kididi kiangenʼiki
Leviticus16:25 O banha ioso ia kiamenga kia kituxi u i jikatesa muene ku kalatódio.
Leviticus16:26 O muthu uoso uendele kuxinjikila o hombo-ia-muxídika
Leviticus16:27 Maji o ngalote ia kiamenga
Leviticus16:28 Uoso-phe ua i jikatesa
Leviticus16:29 O kiki kijila ki xialela katé ku hádia; bhu mbeji ia sambuadi mu kizuua kia kakuinhi ku mbeje
Leviticus16:30 Mbata mu kizuuʼokio mua-nda kubhua ituxi bhu pholo ia Jihova
Leviticus16:31 Ikale-phe sabhalu ia dinhohenu phala enu; mienhu ienu-phe kibhinga mu i nhohesa; kijila kiki ki xialela katé ku hádia.
Leviticus16:32 O nganga ue uoso a-nda ku mu unda phala kukuata o ukunji ua unganga bhu kididi kia tatʼâ
Leviticus16:33 anga ubhanga o kiamenga kia kuzelesa dibhezelu
Leviticus16:34 O kienhiki ki kale-phe kijila kienu ki nangenena muende ni ku bhanga jinga kiamenga kia kulàmba o ituxi ioso ia anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus17:1 Jihova anga uambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus17:2 Tangela Alá ni anʼê a mala ni ana oso a Izalaiele
Leviticus17:3 Muthu uoso mu dibhata dia Izalaiele u jibha ngombe
Leviticus17:4 anga ufula ku ji bheka bhu muelu ua Balaka
Leviticus17:5 Mu ki bhanga phala anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus17:6 O nganga-phe ua kà sangela manhinga ku kalatódio ka Jihova
Leviticus17:7 Ki bhua kàle dingi kuila ene abhakula jisata jâ ku madimonho
Leviticus17:8 A tangele-phe kuila muthu uoso kiá mu diembu dia Izalaiele
Leviticus17:9 se ka i bheka bhu muelu ua Balaka ia kutakanena
Leviticus17:10 Muthu uoso ue mu dibhata dia Izalaiele
Leviticus17:11 Mbata muenhu ua xitu uala mu manhinga; kiene ki nga mi bhela-u ku thanduʼa kalatódio mu ku mi jimuina ikuma
Leviticus17:12 Kala kiki
Leviticus17:13 Luamukuâ ue
Leviticus17:14 Mukonda o manhinga uene o muenhu ua xitu ioso-lolo; bhuoso bhuia manhinga bhuai muenhu; kiene-ze ki ngedila kua anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus17:15 Muthu uoso ue kixi mukuaʼxi
Leviticus17:16 Maji o izuatu iê kia kamba ku i sukula
Leviticus18:1 Jihova anga uambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus18:2 Zuelesa anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus18:3 Enu ki mu fikise o imbamba ibhanga akua Ijito
Leviticus18:4 Enu muenda ni kubhanga ioso iala mu mabatuilu mami
Leviticus18:5 Kala kiki o jingonge jami ni mabatuilu mami bhakenu-u; kuma enhó mu ku a bhanga muthu u kola muenhu; Eme Jihova nga ki ambe.
Leviticus18:6 Ki bhu kale muthu u sungila ni muhatu a mu vuala-nê xitu imoxi
Leviticus18:7 Kana kuvungununa mukutu ua tatʼenu ni ua mamʼenu; Kuma mamʼenu
Leviticus18:8 Mukajiʼa tatʼenu eie kana ku mu vungununa o tuẋi iê; se ua mu tale o tuẋi iê
Leviticus18:9 Pangʼié ia muhatu
Leviticus18:10 Muhatu ua tundu mu mala dia monʼé ua diiala
Leviticus18:11 O muhatu
Leviticus18:12 O muhatu
Leviticus18:13 O muhatu
Leviticus18:14 O diiala tiio ié
Leviticus18:15 Mukajiʼa mona eie ku mu vungunune o tuẋi iê; o ió muhatuʼa monʼé; eie kana ku mu zakula nʼu mu mono o tuẋi iê.
Leviticus18:16 O tuẋi ia mukajiʼa phangʼié eie kana ku i ijiia; o mukutu-ze ua phangʼié ia diiala u ua mono.
Leviticus18:17 O tuẋi ia muhatu ni monʼê eie kana ku i ijiia; hé uia ni ku a zakula ni uidi o mama ua muijiia tuẋi
Leviticus18:18 Kana kubhanga hongo ia phange jiiadi
Leviticus18:19 Se muhatu uakuphala
Leviticus18:20 Mukajiʼa mukuenu kana kuzeka-nê mu kuta phanda
Leviticus18:21 Kana kukatula muhatu ku mbutu ia tundu momuʼé phala ku mu bhakula ku sata ia lubhandu lua dihamba dia Mulôko; Kikôla! Kiókio kuselula dijina dia Nzambi ié. Eme Jihova.
Leviticus18:22 Kana kuzeka diiala ni mukuenu
Leviticus18:23 Kana ku di sakana ni kibhaku
Leviticus18:24 Ki bhu kale kima ku iima iii ki mi sekalesa; kuma o ifuẋi i ngala kukaiesa bhu pholo ienu nʼa mi bhue ku mesu
Leviticus18:25 Kiene kia sekalela oxi; Eme ue o kituxi kia kusekala kua oxʼiii hádia ngi kʼibhula
Leviticus18:26 Enu-phe mu aiuka o jingonge jami ni mabatuilu mami
Leviticus18:27 Kuma o isunji ioso ienhiʼii
Leviticus18:28 Enu dilangienu-phe sumba enu uenu ixi i mi lusa
Leviticus18:29 Mbata athu oso a bhanga ima ia isunji kala iii
Leviticus18:30 Uila kiki
Leviticus19:1 Jihova iu ua tangela dingi Mozé
Leviticus19:2 Ambela o kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus19:3 Muthu ni muthu aẋile manhiʼâ
Leviticus19:4 Kana kulunga jipholo jenu ku mahamba
Leviticus19:5 O ki mu bhakula sata ia kusakidila kua Jihova
Leviticus19:6 O satʼii
Leviticus19:7 Se-phe mudia-ku dingi kama mu kizuua kia katatuʼiki
Leviticus19:8 Ni muene ue uoso udia kiókio
Leviticus19:9 O ki mu muna ue mábhia menu mʼoxi ienu
Leviticus19:10 Kiene ue kimoxi
Leviticus19:11 Ki mu nhane jinge
Leviticus19:12 Ki mu loke jinge mu dijina diami
Leviticus19:13 Mukuenu kana ku mu bhondeleka
Leviticus19:14 Kana kulebhula muthu uafu o mátui
Leviticus19:15 Kana kufundisa ni mangonha; o ki mu fundisa kana kuzamena ngadiama
Leviticus19:16 Kana kukala u kitoka kia jimbuémbue muʼaxaxi ka akuenu; kana kusota kujimisa o muenhu ua mukuenu; Eme-muène Jihova.
Leviticus19:17 Mukuenu ku mu bhakele unguma ku muxima; inda ku fule ku mu bazela
Leviticus19:18 Kana kuvutula phonzo ku muthu
Leviticus19:19 O jingonge jami lundenu-ju muene; kana kuehela ibhaku ienu ku di bunda-bunda ngó
Leviticus19:20 Se bhu kala muthu uzeka muhatu a mu sumbisa ku ubhika
Leviticus19:21 O mu kiamenga kia ku di jima o kuêla kuê
Leviticus19:22 o nganga-phe a tambule kilumbe kiókio kia kiamenga kia kuela
Leviticus19:23 O ki mua-nda zubha ku kutuka mu ixi ia polomesa
Leviticus19:24 O mu muvu ua kauana-phe ibundu iê ioso ikale iangene
Leviticus19:25 O mu muvu ua tanu
Leviticus19:26 Ki bhu kale kima ki mudia ni manhinga mê; kana kukaiela imbanda mba mu kuata kuia ni kuzambula
Leviticus19:27 Kana kubhuta kindemba kienu
Leviticus19:28 Kana ue ku di sema jiphoko ku mukutu mu kijimbuete kia kuila ua fundu; kana ue ku di ta jifuma ni jimbumba. Eme-muène ngi Jihova.
Leviticus19:29 Monʼé ua muhatu kana ku mu bongesa lusebu mu ku mu bhangesa ku kituka ndumbu; phala oxi ioso ki i sekale ni undumbu
Leviticus19:30 O jisabhalu jami endenu ni ku ji aiuka
Leviticus19:31 Kana kukaiela imbanda akua-kusuma; kana kulandula akua-ithutha ia kuzambula ni kubhanga iphata; kana ku a kolomona
Leviticus19:32 Ki u mona mukua-jimvi
Leviticus19:33 Muthu ua tundu dikanga se u tunga nʼeie mʼoxi ienu
Leviticus19:34 Ki kala mukuaʼxi
Leviticus19:35 Kana kubhanga mangonha mu kubatula milonga
Leviticus19:36 Jipezu ji ku uabhe
Leviticus19:37 Alukenu o jingonge jami joso
Leviticus20:1 Jihova anga uambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus20:2 Luamukuá anʼa Izalaiele a tangele
Leviticus20:3 Eme uami muthu íó ngi di lulama-nê o pholo mu kuzoka-nê anga ngi mu mona bhu-aia
Leviticus20:4 O kʼikala-phe o mundu uatungu-nê ki kia a kuatela kima muene kia bhakula monʼê kua Mulôko
Leviticus20:5 kiene-phe kimoxi
Leviticus20:6 O ki bhu kala ue muthu u bilukila mu ku ta muxima ku akua-ithutha ia kuzambula ni kubhanga
Leviticus20:7 Uila kiki
Leviticus20:8 O jingonge jami endenu ni ku ji bhaka
Leviticus20:9 Se bhu kala muthu u xinga tatʼâ
Leviticus20:10 Se bhu kala ue diiala u ta phanda ni mukaj ʼangene
Leviticus20:11 Se bhu kala diiala u zeka muhatuʼangeneʼa phaiiʼâ
Leviticus20:12 Kiene ue kimoxi
Leviticus20:13 O ki bhu kala ue muthu uzeka diiala ni mukuâ
Leviticus20:14 Se bhu kala diiala u sakana o mona
Leviticus20:15 Se bhu kala ue diiala u zeka ni kibhaku
Leviticus20:16 Se bhu kala muhatu u setuka ku kibhaku
Leviticus20:17 O ki bhu kala diiala u di bonga ni phangʼiê ia muhatu
Leviticus20:18 Se bhu kala diiala u zeka ni muhatu uala mu kihaẋi anga u mu vungununa o tuẋi
Leviticus20:19 Kana kuvungununa tuẋi ia muhatu
Leviticus20:20 Se bhu kala ue diiala u zeka ni mukajiʼa lemba diê
Leviticus20:21 Se bhu kala diiala u sakana ni mukajiʼa phangʼiê
Leviticus20:22 Bhakenu o jingonge jami joso jenhiʼji ni mabatuilu mosoʼama ku miẋima ienu
Leviticus20:23 Kana kukuata kukaiela o ifua ia akuaʼxi u ngala ku kaiesa bhu pholo ienu nʼa mi bhue ku mesu
Leviticus20:24 Maji Eme-phe nga mi ambela enu
Leviticus20:25 Muenda jinga ni kutungula o ibhaku iazele mu iii iaxidi
Leviticus20:26 Ngi kexidienu mu athuʼami azele
Leviticus20:27 Se bhu kala diiala mba muhatu ukala ni nzumbi ia kuxingila kilundu kia ngômbo-a-nhange

Leviticus21:4 Muthu-phe uala ngó ndandu
Leviticus21:5 O Jinganga ka konge mútue
Leviticus21:6 Jinganga-phe a kale ku ujitu ni Nzambi iâ
Leviticus21:7 Ka sakane muhatu uala kiuaia
Leviticus21:8 Kala kiki
Leviticus21:9 Se bhu kala monʼa-muhatu
Leviticus21:10 O nganga iadikota-phe
Leviticus21:11 ió ka tena kuzukama ku kimbi kioso-kioso
Leviticus21:12 ka tena kutubhuka mu dibhezelu diangene
Leviticus21:13 O kia sakana
Leviticus21:14 Muhatu
Leviticus21:15 Ka sekalesa o mbutu iê muʼaxaxi ka jindandu jê; mbata Eme ngi Jihova nga mu jingisa.

Leviticus21:17 Tangela Alá

Leviticus21:21 Ki bhu kale muthu ku mbutu ia Alá
Leviticus21:22 Maji o mbolo ia Nzambi iê
Leviticus21:23 Maji ka bhumine kubokona ni kubhikila ku mvéu
Leviticus21:24 Mozé anga ukunda ima ioso iii kua Alá ni anʼê
Leviticus22:1 Kienhókio Jihova anga uambela Mozé
Leviticus22:2 Tangela Alá ni anʼê kuila
Leviticus22:3 A tangele: Uoso muthu
Leviticus22:4 Ku mbutu ia Alá
Leviticus22:5 ni uoso uambata kibamba
Leviticus22:6 uoso ngó u di bhiáuna ku ima iii
Leviticus22:7 Maji o ki tula dikumbi
Leviticus22:8 Ka tokala-phe kúdia kima kia di fuila
Leviticus22:9 A kale mu kualuka jinga o ijiia iami
Leviticus22:10 Nzuangiza ue ka tena kudia ku ima ikôla iosatele Nzambi; musonhi a mu langeka kuala nganga
Leviticus22:11 maji se o nganga u sumba mubhika mu kitadi kiê
Leviticus22:12 Monʼamuhatu
Leviticus22:13 O kʼikala monʼa nganga uala mutudi
Leviticus22:14 Se muthu
Leviticus22:15 Mu a bhanga jinga kienhiki
Leviticus22:16 Phala ki kia a bhekele kukala ni mulonga ua kuêla kuthandu diâ
Leviticus22:17 Jihova anga uembela dingi Mozé
Leviticus22:18 Tangela Alá ni anʼê
Leviticus22:19 a bhane kala kiala mu muxima uê
Leviticus22:20 Kana kubhakula kima kiala ni kisemu
Leviticus22:21 O muthu-phe kia bhindamena kubhakula sata ia paze kua Jihova
Leviticus22:22 Kana kubhakula kibhaku kiafu mesu
Leviticus22:23 Maji-phe
Leviticus22:24 Kibhaku ue

Leviticus22:27 Ngombe mba mbudi
Leviticus22:28 Kana ue kukuata kibhaku ni kamona kê
Leviticus22:29 Jihova ue

Leviticus23:1 Kienhókio Jihova uambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus23:2 Tangela anʼa Izalaiele
Leviticus23:3 Ikalakalu ia tokala izuua isamanu
Leviticus23:4 Iene-phe o izokola ia Jihova kiabhuʼiii
Leviticus23:5 Bhu mbeji iadianga
Leviticus23:6 O ki kúkia mu kizuua kia kuinhi ni tanu
Leviticus23:7 Mu kizuua kiadianga mu kala ni kionge kikôla; ki bhu kale kututumba ni midimu iengi ioso-ioso.
Leviticus23:8 Maji mu sambuadi dioso dia izuua muenda ni kubhana ma-ujitu ma kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova; o mu kizuua kia sambuadi
Leviticus23:9 Jihova uambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus23:10 Anʼa Izalaiele a tangele
Leviticus23:11 muene-phe a bhuke o kita kiki bhu pholo ia Jihova
Leviticus23:12 nganga u ki bhukila mu kizuua kia kuila sabhalu mazá kiá iabhiti. O mu kizuua kiene kia bhukila o kita kiókio mu kuata ue kambudi ka ndumbe
Leviticus23:13 O musa ua ujitu uê
Leviticus23:14 Ki mu die-ku-phe luua mbolo
Leviticus23:15 Tunde-phe kiá mu kizuua kia kaiela ku sabhalu iii
Leviticus23:16 O kizuua ki kaiela ku sabhalu ia sambuadi
Leviticus23:17 Enu-oso kiá ku madiembu menu mubheka jimbolo jiiadi ji kale ja kubhukila; ji soke tu-inda tuiadi tua fuba iafina
Leviticus23:18 Mu ji bhakula kumoxi ni sambuadi dia tumbudi tua jindumbe
Leviticus23:19 Mu bhakula ue kisutu kimoxi ku kiamenga kia kituxi
Leviticus23:20 O nganga-phe a ji bhukile kuma sata ia kubhukila bhu pholo ia Jihova kumoxi ni jimbolo ja mutômo
Leviticus23:21 Mu kizuua kienhokio-phe mu xika ngonge kuamba tua-nda kukala ni kionge kikôla ki bhu kale midimu ia kima kioso-kioso; kiki kijila kixialela katé ku miiji ienu
Leviticus23:22 O kioso ki mua kà muna ue o mábhia menu mʼoxi ienu
Leviticus23:23 Jihova anga uambela Mozé
Leviticus23:24 Anʼa Izalaiele a tangele
Leviticus23:25 Ki bhu kale kututumba ni kikalakalu kioso-kioso
Leviticus23:26 Jihova anga uambela dingi Mozé
Leviticus23:27 Maji o mbeji iene ia kasambuadiʼoio
Leviticus23:28 Mu kizuua kienhókio ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso
Leviticus23:29 Kuma
Leviticus23:30 Se bhu kala ue muthu
Leviticus23:31 Bhu kizuuʼokio ki mu bhange-bhu kikalakalu; kijila kiki kixialela muene ku miiji ienu mu madiembu menu moso-lolo.
Leviticus23:32 I mi kale sabhalu ia kunhohena; bhene-phe kiá bhu mu di huhila o mienhu ienu; muandekela mu ngoloxi ia kizuua kia kávua ku mbeji ienhoio anga mu zubhila mu ngoloxi iamukuâ iakaiela-ku
Leviticus23:33 Jihova anga uambela Mozé
Leviticus23:34 Anʼa Izalaiele a tangele kuamba: O mbeji ia sambuadi ienhoio
Leviticus23:35 Mu kizuua kia kuandekela bhu kala kionge kikôla; ki bhu kala-phe kututumba ni midimu ia kima.
Leviticus23:36 Sambuadi dioso dia izuua di mi bhuila muene ni kibhakula jisata ja kuoha kua Jihova; mu kizuua kia kanake bhu kala kionge kikôla
Leviticus23:37 Jiji jene o jifesa ja Jihova
Leviticus23:38 Ku ima iii o jisabhalu ja Jihova ja di kalela
Leviticus23:39 Maji-phe
Leviticus23:40 O mu kizuua kia kuandekela
Leviticus23:41 Muenda jinga ni kubhanga fesa ienhiʼii kua Jihova
Leviticus23:42 Mu tunga jifundu ja miẋi
Leviticus23:43 phala miiji ienu ioso ʼende ni ku kʼijiia kiambote kuamba
Leviticus23:44 Kienhiki Mozé kiambela anʼa Izalaiele kuamba
Leviticus24:1 Jihova anga uambela Mozé
Leviticus24:2 Tuma anʼa Izalaiele a ku bhekele maji ma midiva
Leviticus24:3 Alá muene uenda ni ku ji ta kiambote mu ididi iê ku monôno
Leviticus24:4 O jikandeia u ji tula kiambote ku thandu dia ditudilu dia jikandeia dia ulu nda ji kale mu kuuama bhu pholo ia Jihova usuku ni muanha katé ku hádia ni hádia.
Leviticus24:5 U katula ue fuba iauabha kiambote anga u i kanga kuinhi dia ʼmbolo ni jiiadi
Leviticus24:6 Anga u ji tula bhu pholo ia Jihova ku minôno iiadi
Leviticus24:7 Kadia munônė-phe u u kuua uasu ua dizumba ku thandu
Leviticus24:8 Kadia kizuua kia sabhalu
Leviticus24:9 I kale-phe mbolo iangene ia Alá ni anʼê
Leviticus24:10 Anga muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele mu solomoka mona-diiala
Leviticus24:11 O mona-diialʼú anga uẋonguena Dijina dia Jihova
Leviticus24:12 Anga a mu ta hanji muʼaleia
Leviticus24:13 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé
Leviticus24:14 O ió ua ẋongueneʼó mu tubhule muʼaleia
Leviticus24:15 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe u a jimbuile
Leviticus24:16 Uoso ue u ẋonguena o Dijina dia Jihova
Leviticus24:17 Uoso ue ujibha muthu
Leviticus24:18 Maji uoso ujibha kibhaku kiangene
Leviticus24:19 Se bhu kala muthu ue unemeka mukuâ
Leviticus24:20 ua bukula kifuba
Leviticus24:21 Uoso-phe ujibha kibhaku kiangene
Leviticus24:22 O ngonge-phe iene imoxi i mu kala na-iu; kixi muthu uatunda dikanga
Leviticus24:23 Mozé iu uambela anʼa Izalaiele kuamba o pelezo ia ẋonguena ioio
Leviticus25:1 Jihova uambela dingi Mozé mu mulundu ua Sinai
Leviticus25:2 Tangela anʼa Izalaiele u a ambela
Leviticus25:3 Oxi u i dima katé mu mivu isamanu
Leviticus25:4 O mu muvu ua kasambuadi-phe bhu kale kiá sabhalu ia kunhohesa oxi
Leviticus25:5 O ngolôngo ioso ia di sabhukila mʼóbhia dié kana ku i muna
Leviticus25:6 Isabhukila ia sabhalu kala kiki kene ku i muna
Leviticus25:7 Kuene ue ku di dikila o ibhaku ié
Leviticus25:8 Ukondala jinga ue sambuadi dia jisemana ja mivu
Leviticus25:9 Bhenhobho-phe kiá
Leviticus25:10 Muvu ua makuinhi-a-tanu kolêsa-u
Leviticus25:11 Muvu ua makuinhi a tanu u mi kale ua njubileu; ki mu kune kima
Leviticus25:12 Oko bhuala kiá muvu ua njubileu
Leviticus25:13 O bhu muvu uenhú ua njubileu muthu ni muthu alukile ku mikáu iê ia mu tokala.
Leviticus25:14 Se mu sumbisa kima kioso-kioso kua mukuenu
Leviticus25:15 Ki u sumba kima kua mukuenu ubhanga konda ia mivu ioso iabhiti kiá tunde ku njubileu; o muene kia ku sumbisa kima ubhanga ue konda ia mivu ioso iaxiala-ku hanji ia kubhongolola
Leviticus25:16 Mivu iaxiala-ku
Leviticus25:17 Kana kufumba mukuenu ku uenji; inda u kala jinga ni uoma ua Nzambi ié; kuma ki ngalʼeki Eme-muene ngi Jihova Nzambi ié.
Leviticus25:18 Endenu ni kualuka o jingonge jami
Leviticus25:19 Ni oxi iene ue ia-nda kubhana o ibundu iê
Leviticus25:20 O ki muila-phe: O kiki ku muvu ua sambuadi tua kà dia-hi? Oko ki tua-nda ku u dima
Leviticus25:21 Kuabhu-phe Eme nga-nda ku mi tumikisa o dibesá diami ku muvu ua kasamanu
Leviticus25:22 O mu muvu ua kanake mu dima hé mu kuna jimbutu
Leviticus25:23 Kana kusumbisa mavu anga mendelela ku maku ma ngenji ua ma sumbu
Leviticus25:24 Kala kiki
Leviticus25:25 Se phangʼié uadiama ua mu bokona
Leviticus25:26 O kʼikala-phe muene ka moneka ndandu u tena ku i kula
Leviticus25:27 kuabhu-phe
Leviticus25:28 O kia lémbua-phe kukuata kioso kiasoko phala ku i kula
Leviticus25:29 Muthu-phe
Leviticus25:30 Maji
Leviticus25:31 Maji o jinzo jala mu jisanzala ji kamba o imbaka ikondoloka
Leviticus25:32 O kʼikala jinzo ja jilevita mu mabhata moso ma atokala ene
Leviticus25:33 O ki ki kala-phe mukua-Levi uengi ua i kula iu ua xialelana-iu
Leviticus25:34 Inda o mukáu uala ku mbalelu ia madiembu mâ
Leviticus25:35 Se phangʼié uabudika ni uadiama
Leviticus25:36 Kana ku mu tambula avásu
Leviticus25:37 O ki u mu dievelesa o kitadi kié
Leviticus25:38 Eme-muene Jihova Nzambi ienu
Leviticus25:39 Se u mona kuila phangʼiê uatungu-nê bhuamoxi uabiluka ngadiama ia ngadiádia
Leviticus25:40 Mu bhanga kala ngunza ueza ku nganhu ia kizuua
Leviticus25:41 kuabhu
Leviticus25:42 Mukonda ene ala abhikʼami-Eme
Leviticus25:43 O ki u mu vua ku mu tunde thulu
Leviticus25:44 Mubhika ua diiala mba ua muhatu
Leviticus25:45 Sai bhabha ue mu a sumba jinga ku anʼa jinzuángiza oso eza ku nhunganena muʼaxaxe kenu; ni kua ene ni ku miiji iâ ioso iàtunga nʼenu
Leviticus25:46 Mu a vua muene
Leviticus25:47 Se bhu kala nzuángiza
Leviticus25:48 o kia zubha ku di ta uenji
Leviticus25:49 A mu kule lemba diê
Leviticus25:50 Ngana iê ua mu sumbuʼó a bhange-nê jikonda
Leviticus25:51 O mu bhanga o jikonda-phe
Leviticus25:52 O ki ila-phe mivu iófele ngó ia kambele-ku kiá
Leviticus25:53 Thembu ioso-phe ia bhanga-nê
Leviticus25:54 Maji-phe
Leviticus25:55 Mbata anʼa Izalaiele a ngi kala ene abhikʼami-Eme; ene ala abhika ami muene
Leviticus26:1 Kana
Leviticus26:2 Endenu ni kualuka o jisabhalu jami; o kididi kiami kia dibhezelu mu ki xila jinga; eme ngi Jihova.
Leviticus26:3 Se mukuata kuendela mu jingonge jami
Leviticus26:4 eme-phe ue ngenda ni ku mi bhana mvula ienu bhu thembu iê ia tokala; o ixi ienda ni kutubhula muene ima ia ubhe
Leviticus26:5 O idima ioso i mu bhongolola
Leviticus26:6 Ngi mi bhana ue o ku di bhola ku mátui
Leviticus26:7 Nguma jenu mu ji bhesa muene lusolo
Leviticus26:8 O kitanu mudienu
Leviticus26:9 Enu-phe ngi mi sakukila muene kuma mesu ami ngi a ta kokuenu
Leviticus26:10 O ku ima i mua lunda ukulu kuene ku mu dia katé kia mi kumu
Leviticus26:11 Eme ue Balaka iami ngiza-na-iu muʼaxaxi kenu
Leviticus26:12 Anga ngi kuata kuzungila muʼaxaxe kenu
Leviticus26:13 Eme-muene-ze ngi Jihova Nzambi ienu
Leviticus26:14 Maji-phe
Leviticus26:15 o jingonge jami se mua ji te dikunda
Leviticus26:16 kuabhu
Leviticus26:17 Pholo iami i mi kitukila
Leviticus26:18 O ki mu bhita ni ima kala iii
Leviticus26:19 Kuma uzonda uenu ngi u sokomona
Leviticus26:20 Nguzu ienu ienda ni kudibota mu kingoho. Oxi ienu ki ibhana dingi o ima iê iambote
Leviticus26:21 O ki muila-phe mua jijila muene o ku di thathamesa nʼEme
Leviticus26:22 Mbata nga-nda ku mi thubhuila kiá iama ia mukáu anga ienda ni ku mi dia o tuana
Leviticus26:23 O ku thandu dia ima iosuʼiii
Leviticus26:24 eme uami ngi di ta-mu dingi
Leviticus26:25 Oko kuthandu dienu ngi bheka-ku kiá xibhata
Leviticus26:26 O kioso eme ki nga-nda ku mi sondolola o huta ia kúdia
Leviticus26:27 O ki muila-phe hanji mua ẋinukenunu
Leviticus26:28 Eme uami ngi ẋinukina-ku kiá muene
Leviticus26:29 Mukonda mua-nda kúdia kiá o xitu ia anʼenu a mala ni xitu ia anʼenu a ahatu
Leviticus26:30 O jikalatódio jenu ngi ji lundumuna
Leviticus26:31 O jisanzala jenu nga kà ji sengulula
Leviticus26:32 Oxi ngi i jikinisa
Leviticus26:33 Enu anga ngi mi muangena muʼaxaxi ka akua jixi jengi
Leviticus26:34 Kienhokio-phe
Leviticus26:35 Mukonda mu izuua iê ioso ia kusenguluka kuê itambula dinhohenu; kuma iene ialembuele kunhoha mu ʼsabhalu jenu
Leviticus26:36 O ió-phe oso hanji asubhuka-ku momuenu
Leviticus26:37 O bhua kambe muthu uala ku a landameka
Leviticus26:38 Mua kà buikila muʼaxaxi ka matumbu
Leviticus26:39 Akuenu oso asubhúka-ku
Leviticus26:40 Bhenhobho a kà di ẋikina ufusa uoso
Leviticus26:41 Eme uami
Leviticus26:42 Eme-phe ue nga kà vutula dingi o thulu
Leviticus26:43 Kuma oxi ia di kuata mukondo iaxala umba
Leviticus26:44 O kia di té-ku

Numbers6:26 Jihova a bhetule pholo iê ku thandu dié
Numbers6:27 Kienhiki kiene ki mu ta jinga dijina diami ku thandu dia anʼa Izalaiele; eme ni ngʼa zediuise.

Numbers8:6 Katula Jilevita muʼaxaxi ka Izalaiele

Numbers8:8 A kuate-phe kangombe ka ndumbe
Numbers8:9 Jilevita anga a a bheka bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena; anga u bhongolola kifuẋi kioso kia Izalaiele;
Numbers8:10 anga u bheka Jilevita bhu pholo ia Jihova. Anʼa Izalaiele bhenhobho a tule maku mâ ku thandu dia Jilevita;
Numbers8:11 Alá anga u bhukila Jilevita bhu pholo ia Jihova

Numbers11:1 Kifuẋi anga ki kala mu longolola
Numbers11:2 Kifuẋi anga ki di kola kua Mozé; Mozé anga u sambela Jihova; túbhia anga tu jima.
Numbers11:3 Kididi kiokio anga a kʼixana Tabeláhe mukonda dia túbhia tua Jihova tua uamene muʼaxaxi kâ.
Numbers11:4 Mbutu ia iá ahuku a di lungu mu kifuẋi anga a kala ni uilu uavulu; ni anʼa Izalaiele ene a kala mu dila
Numbers11:5 Tuinda-phe jimbiji ji tua kexi kudia jinga mu Ijitu
Numbers11:6 o kiki-phe
Numbers11:7 Kuma o maná i difuangana kala mbutu ia jikuendulu
Numbers11:8 Athu anga a kala mu di muanga ni ku i nona
Numbers11:9 O kia sonoka jinga dimume bhu kilômbo mu usuku
Numbers11:10 Mozé anga uívua kifuẋi
Numbers11:11 Mozé anga u zuela kua Jihova
Numbers11:12 Kifuẋi kiosuʼiki eme nga emita? Eme nga a vuala? Ki ua ngi tumuʼiki

Numbers11:14 Nga ki lémbua kuambata kifuẋi kioso kiki ubheka uami
Numbers11:15 Hé kiene ki u ngi bhanga
Numbers11:16 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé
Numbers11:17 Eme ngi tuluka
Numbers11:18 Kifuẋi-phe a ambele: Di bônzienu phala o kizuua kia mungu

Numbers11:20 mu i dia mu mbeji ia muvimba katé xitu i mi tundila mu mazulu

Numbers11:35 Kutunda bhu Kiboloto-hatava kifuẋi kienda anga a tula bhu Hazelote; anga a bhanga izuua bhu Hazelote.

Numbers15:2 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele

Numbers15:40 Inda mu banza jinga kukuata o ijiia iami ioso
Numbers15:41 Eme Jihova
Numbers16:1 Anga o Kola
Numbers16:2 hé a balumuka bhu pholo ia Mozé ni hama jiiadi ni makuinhi atanu a muthu ku anʼa Izalaiele
Numbers16:3 Anga a di bhongolola mu kuzoka ni Mozé ni Alá
Numbers16:4 Kuma o kienhiki Mozé ua kʼivu
Numbers16:5 anga u zuelela Kola ni kionge kiê kioso
Numbers16:6 Bhangenu-phe kiki: Ni Kola ni kionge kiê kioso
Numbers16:7 o mungu
Numbers16:8 Mozé anga uambela dingi Kola
Numbers16:9 Manhi enu kia mi tolela kia kuila o Nzambi ia Izalaiele ua mi uanununa ku kionge kia Izalaiele
Numbers16:10 iú ua ku bhiẋidisa eie
Numbers16:11 Ki kia mi bhekesa dingi kuila ni eie ni kionge kié kioso mua di bhongolola mu kuzoka ni Jihova; o Alá
Numbers16:12 Anga o Mozé u tuma kuixana Datane ni Abilamu
Numbers16:13 Manhi kia ku tolela
Numbers16:14 Mu ixi izunzumuka lete ni uemba
Numbers16:15 Kienhókio Mozé o njinda i mu kuata kiavulu
Numbers16:16 Mozé anga uambela dingi Kola
Numbers16:17 Anga mu zangula
Numbers16:18 Anga muthu ni muthu u zangula o kiómuenu kiê
Numbers16:19 O Kola anga kilômbo kioso u ki bhongoluela bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena mu kuzoka-nâ; bhenhobho o kubenha kua Jihova anga ku tukulukila ku kilômbo kioso.
Numbers16:20 O jihova anga u zuelesa Mozé ni Alá
Numbers16:21 O mu kaẋi ka kifuẋi tundenu-mu
Numbers16:22 Maji-phe ene a di ṗhudikila o jipholo jâ bhoxi
Numbers16:23 Jihova anga u zuelela Mozé
Numbers16:24 Ambela o kionge kioso kienhiki
Numbers16:25 Kienhókio o Mozé u balumuka
Numbers16:26 Muene hé uambela o kifuẋi
Numbers16:27 Ene oso anga a katuka mu jimbandu ja jinzu ja Kola
Numbers16:28 Bhenhobho-phe Mozé uamba
Numbers16:29 Hé iá a fua muene kala kiene mu kúfua o athu oso
Numbers16:30 Maji
Numbers16:31 Anga ki bhita-phe muene kuila
Numbers16:32 Anga oxi i jikula o dikanu diê
Numbers16:33 Ni ene ni ioso kiá ia a tokalele
Numbers16:34 O ku mutendu uâ
Numbers16:35 Kuabhu-phe
Numbers16:36 O Jihova anga uamḃela Mozé
Numbers16:37 Tangela Eliiazale
Numbers16:38 o ku iomuenu ia ió a te o kituxi ku mienhu iâ-ène
Numbers16:39 Anga Eliiazale
Numbers16:40 ni i kale dilembalelu phala ana a Izalaiele
Numbers16:41 Maji mu kizuua kia kaiadi
Numbers16:42 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila
Numbers16:43 O Mozé ni Alá anga eza bhu pholo ia bhalaka ia kutakanena.

Numbers16:45 Katukenu muʼaxaxe ka kionge kiki
Numbers16:46 anga Mozé uambela Alá
Numbers16:47 Alá anga u zangula o kiómuenu
Numbers16:48 O muene anga uimana bhu kaẋi ka imbi ni athu a muenhu; o dibhebhu anga di zumbuka kubhita.
Numbers16:49 O afu ku dibhebhu dienhodio a tenene kuinhi ni kiuana dia midi ni hama sambuadi
Numbers16:50 Alá anga u vutukila kua Mozé

Numbers18:11 O ima ia mukuá iii ue i kala ié. O ujitu uâ ua kuzangumuna mu uthu uâ

Numbers18:13 O ibundu ioso ia dianga

Numbers18:25 Jihova anga u zuelela Mozé
Numbers18:26 Eie ue ua ka zuelela o jilevita
Numbers18:27 Anga o ujitu uenu ua kuzangumuna a u kita muene kala jimbundu ja dizanzu dia kuvundila mba kusubhajaka kua ditangi dia kukamena.
Numbers18:28 Kala kiki enu uenu mu bhana jinga kua Jihova ujitu ua kuzangumuna ku mbandu jenu joso ja kakuinhi ji mu tambula jinga ku ana a Izalaiele
Numbers18:29 Ku ima ienu ioso i mu tambula kuene ku mu bhana o ujitu ua kuzangumuna kua Jihova; ku ima ioso ia beta o kuiuka kuene ku mu mu katuila o mbandu iê ikôla.

Numbers26:2 Alula dingi kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele

Numbers26:4 Alulenu kifuẋi
Numbers26:5 Lubene

Numbers26:10 mavu anga a jikuka
Numbers26:11 Kienhiki-phe anʼa Kola kafu
Numbers26:12 Anʼa Ximinhá a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Nemuuele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Nemuuele; kua Jamini ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jamini; kua Jakini ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jakini;
Numbers26:13 kua Zelehe ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Zelehe; Saúlu ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Saúlu;
Numbers26:14 enhá ene o mabhata ma anʼa Ximinhá
Numbers26:15 Anʼa Ngade a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Zefoni ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Zefoni; kua Hangi ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hangi; kua Suni ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Suni.
Numbers26:16 Kua Ojini ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ojini; kua Edi ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Edi;
Numbers26:17 kua Alodi
Numbers26:18 Enhá ene o mabhata ma anʼa Ngade
Numbers26:19 Anʼa Juda a mala: Hele ni Onane; Hele ni Onane-phe
Numbers26:20 Anʼa Juda a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Selahe ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Selahe; kua Peleze ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Peleze; kua Zelehe ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Zelehe.
Numbers26:21 Anʼa Peleze a mala: Kua Hezelone ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hezelone; Hamule ua bhanga dibhata dibhata dia akua Hamule.
Numbers26:22 Enhá ene o mabhata ma Juda
Numbers26:23 Anʼa Isakale a mala ku mabhata mâ: Kua Tola ua bhanga dibhata dia Tola; kua Puvah ua bhanga dibhata dia Puvah;
Numbers26:24 kua Jasube ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jasube; kua Ximidiioni ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ximidiioni;
Numbers26:25 enhá ene mabhata ma Isakale
Numbers26:26 Anʼa Nzebulone a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Selede ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Selede; kua Elone ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Elone; kua Jaheleele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jaheleele.
Numbers26:27 Enhá ene o mabhata ma anʼa Nzebulone
Numbers26:28 Anʼa Zuze a mala ku mabhata mâ: Manasa ni Ifalaimi.
Numbers26:29 Anʼa Manasa a mala: kua Makidi ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Makidi; Makidi u vuala Ngiliiade: kua Ngiliiade ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ngiliiade.
Numbers26:30 Anʼa Ngiliiade a mala: kua Iezele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Iezele; kua Heleke ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Heleke;
Numbers26:31 kua Axidiiele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Axidiiele; kua Xikeme ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Xikeme;
Numbers26:32 kua Semida ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Semida; Hefele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hefele.
Numbers26:33 Zelofadi-phe monʼa Hefele
Numbers26:34 Enhá ene mabhata ma Manasa: A alula a tena makuinhi atanu a midi ni midi jiiadi
Numbers26:35 Enhá anʼa Ifalaimi a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Sutela ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Sutela; kua Bekele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Bekele; Kua Tahane ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Tahane.
Numbers26:36 Anʼa Sutela a mala enhá: Kua Elane ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Elane.
Numbers26:37 Enhá ene mabhata ma anʼa Ifalaimi
Numbers26:38 Anʼa Bejamí a mala
Numbers26:39 kua Sufami
Numbers26:40 Anʼa Bela a mala

Deuteronomy10:4 Anga muene usoneka ku mabaia
Deuteronomy10:5 Bhenhobho-phe ngi biluka
Deuteronomy10:6 Anʼa Izalaiele ia a katukile bhu Beelote-Bene-Jakane anga eza bhu Musela; kutula bhenhobho Alá bhene bhua fuila
Deuteronomy10:7 Anga a katuka eza bhu Ngudingodi
Deuteronomy10:8 Mu thembu muenhomo Jihova anga utungula kibuka kia Levi
Deuteronomy10:9 Kiene kia bhekesa kuila o Levi kala ni undundu ua kima muʼaxaxi ka jiphange jê
Deuteronomy10:10 Kienhokio-phe nga kexile dingi ku mulundu mu makuinhi auana a makumbi ni makuinhi auana a usuku
Deuteronomy10:11 Maji-phe Jihova ua ngʼambela
Deuteronomy10:12 Kiki-phe
Deuteronomy10:13 nda u bhake ijiia ia Jihova
Deuteronomy10:14 Talesa-ze kuma ni maúlu iâ
Deuteronomy10:15 Hé kima Jihova kia mu tundu ku muxima uê
Deuteronomy10:16 Saienu-phe o mabôlo ma miẋima ienu

Deuteronomy10:18 Muene u batula mu kidi o milonga ia monʼa difundu
Deuteronomy10:19 Kala kiki enu ue endenu ni kuzola o jinzuángiza

Deuteronomy10:21 Muene o kijingo kienu
Deuteronomy10:22 Jitata jenu kia kulumukine mu Ijito akexi ngó makuinhi sambuadi a muthu; o kiki-phe Jihova Nzambi ienu ua mi sokolola
Deuteronomy11:1 Zola-phe Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy11:2 Leluʼidi-phe tumenu ku kʼijiia
Deuteronomy11:3 Nuka amuene o ijimbuete iê ionéne ni ikalakalu ia madiuanu ia bhange muʼaxaxi ka Ijito
Deuteronomy11:4 nuka amuene ue kioso kia bhange Jihova o kilômbo kia masoladi a ita a akua Ijito ni jikabalu jâ
Deuteronomy11:5 anʼenu ka mono ue kioso kia mi bhange mu kikangalakata
Deuteronomy11:6 ni kioso kia bhange kua Datane ni Abilame
Deuteronomy11:7 enu-phe o mesu menu mene muene ma di muena o ima ioso ia makota iii ia kalakala Jihova.
Deuteronomy11:8 Ijiia-phe kuatenu-iu kiambote
Deuteronomy11:9 phala mu kole muenhu mu ixi ia lokela Jihova ku i bhana jitata jenu
Deuteronomy11:10 Kuma oxi i mua-nda kubokona ku i vua
Deuteronomy11:11 Maji Oxi i mua-nda kuvuʼiii ixi ia milundu ni makôlo; menha ê u mu nua
Deuteronomy11:12 Oxi iii Jihova Nzambi ienu muene ua i tambula konda; mesu ma Jihova Nzambi ienu mene ku i kengelela mu thembu joso; tundé bhuandekela o muvu katé bhu ubhuila.
Deuteronomy11:13 Kia kà kala kiki-phe kuila
Deuteronomy11:14 Eme-phe oxi ienu ngenda ni ku i bhana o mvula ioso iatokala bhu thembu iê; ngi bhana o mvula ia dianga ia isanga bhu kudinji
Deuteronomy11:15 Ibhaku ienu ngi i bhana ue o iangu ia sabhelela mu mukáu; eie-phe udia anga uikuta.
Deuteronomy11:16 Dimukenu-phe
Deuteronomy11:17 anga njinda ia Jihova i mi uamena
Deuteronomy11:18 Inda lundenu maka mamiʼama ku miẋima ienu
Deuteronomy11:19 Endenu ni ku a longa anʼenu; mu uzuelelu uenu ki mu xikama mʼonzo
Deuteronomy11:20 Mu a soneka ku thanduʼa mielu ienu ni ku mabhitu menu.
Deuteronomy11:21 Phala mu mone ki mua-nda kuvula izuua ia kulaia nʼenu ni anʼenu
Deuteronomy11:22 Xi! Mbata se mua kuata muene muanu ua kubhaka kiambote o jingonge josuʼiji ji nga mi tendelela ku ji langa
Deuteronomy11:23 ifuẋi ioso ia miji iii
Deuteronomy11:24 Kididi kioso kiá ki diata o kànda dienu dia kinama
Deuteronomy11:25 Ki bhua-nda kukala muthu utena kubhânga nʼenu; kuoso kiá ku mu ditela Jihova Nzambi ienu ua-nda kuta-ku kimbuua kia uoma ni kiteketela

Deuteronomy11:27 Kuzediua se mu tumaka o ijiia ia Jihova Nzambi ienu
Deuteronomy11:28 kuxixima se mu dituna kusuua o ijiia ia Jihova Nzambi ienu

Deuteronomy11:31 Mbata Njolodá mua-nda ku mu zaúka muene
Deuteronomy11:32 Tenu-ku-phe muxima mu kumbidile o jingonge ni mabatuilu u ngala ku mi xindila leluʼâ.

Deuteronomy12:3 misônga iâ mu i lundumuna bhoxi
Deuteronomy12:4 Ki kiene-phe ki mu bhanga ni Jihova Nzambi ienu.

Deuteronomy12:7 Ima ienu ikôla bhene bhu mu i dila
Deuteronomy12:8 O ki tuala kubhanga bhabha bhu tualʼabha

Deuteronomy12:10 Maji kioso ki mua-nda kuzaúka Njolodá

Deuteronomy12:13 Di lange-phe

Deuteronomy12:16 Inda o manhinga kana ku a dia; mu a zunzila bhoxi mukua ni menha.

Deuteronomy12:19 O levita-phe ki muthu ua ku mu ta dikunda

Deuteronomy12:21 O kididi kia tungula Jihova Nzambi ienu phala kuxikika-bhu o dijina diê
Deuteronomy12:22 Kifua-phe kiene ki muene mu kúdia o mbambi ni ngulunguʼokio kiene ki mu idia; o muthu uakasanʼó udiê bhuamoxi ni uoso uabhiti ku dibônzo.
Deuteronomy12:23 Inda-phe ta-ku muxima phala o manhinga kana ku a dia; kuma o manhinga uene o muenhu; eie u muthu umoxi kuile udia o muenhu

Deuteronomy15:1 Thembu joso kuila bhua bhiti kiá sambuadi dia mivu
Deuteronomy15:2 Ufuôlo iú-phe u kala kiki: se bhuala muthu ua bhana dikongo mba ua sobhesa kima kua mukuá
Deuteronomy15:3 Se muthu uatundu kuengi ua ku di dikongo u di kobhalala muene; maji o kiaii kua phangʼié
Deuteronomy15:4 Nga ki ambela-phe phala momuenu ki mu kale ngadiama; kuma Jihova Nzambi ié ua-nda ku ku bhana kubhanduluka kuanzungule mʼoxi ia-nda ku ku lunduisa phala ku ivua.
Deuteronomy15:5 Kabasa eie u kalé ngó u muthu ua tumaka kiambote o dízui dia Jihova Nzambi ié ni muanu uoso; anga uenda ni kualuka jinga o ijiia ioso i ngala ku ku tendelela lelu.
Deuteronomy15:6 Kienhókio o Jihova Nzambi ié ua-nda ku ku bhandulula muene
Deuteronomy15:7 Se muʼaxaxi ka mundu ué mu kala ngadiama
Deuteronomy15:8 mu jikuile lusolo o lukuaku lué u mu sobhese kioso kia mu kambe
Deuteronomy15:9 Aluka-phe
Deuteronomy15:10 Eie-phe u mu bhana muene kiambote ni kieha kioso
Deuteronomy15:11 Mukonda mungongo ki mu kambe o jingadiama; kiene kia ngi bhangesa ku ku tendelela kuila: Phangʼié u mu jikuila lukuaku lué ni kieha kioso kia tokala; kiene ue ki u bhanga ni hukunhu ua tate ni ngadiama uene mʼoxi ié.
Deuteronomy15:12 Se a ku sumbisa phangʼié
Deuteronomy15:13 Kioso ki u muambula-phe ku mu ehe kuia ni maku ahatu.

Deuteronomy19:2 ua kà sola jimbonge jitatu muʼaxaxi ka oxi ié ia-nda ku ku bhana Jihova Nzambi ié phala ku ivua.
Deuteronomy19:3 Anga u di iudikila njila iia ku jimbonge jitatuʼiji
Deuteronomy19:4 Kijibha-phe ni kuvula: o uoso ulengela momo kikale uabhiti ni kiluezu kia kujibha mukuá
Deuteronomy19:5 Ni uoso uia ni mukuá ku mukáu
Deuteronomy19:6 Phala o muzokedi a manhinga
Deuteronomy19:7 Kala kiki-phe
Deuteronomy19:8 O ki kala-phe Jihova Nzambi ié u ku vudisila dingi o jimbambe jê
Deuteronomy19:9 (kioso eie ki u kuata kualuka o ijiia iene ioso iii
Deuteronomy19:10 Kulengesa ku bhubhisa manhinga ma muthu kala ni kikuma mʼoxi ia-nda ku ku bhana Jihova Nzambi ié mu ubhinganu
Deuteronomy19:11 Maji o muthu-phe se u kanena mukuá mukonda dia ku mu zemba

Deuteronomy19:16 O ki bhu balumuka mbangi ia makutu
