Deuteronomy20:1 Kioso ki u tunda mu kuia kúlua ita ni jinguma jé
Deuteronomy20:2 Kioso-phe ki mu bhiẋila bhu kididi kia ita
Deuteronomy20:3 kuamba: Ivua
Deuteronomy20:4 Mbata o Jihova Nzambi ienu muene uala kuia nʼenu mu kúlua ita ni jinguma jenu
Deuteronomy20:5 Bhenhobho-phe o jifixiiadi ji tangele mundu ni kuibhula kiki: Mukuahi uatungu inzo iobhe
Deuteronomy20:6 Mukuahi uaphaphe díbhia dia mivide
Deuteronomy20:7 Mukuahi ua solo muhatu
Deuteronomy20:8 Jifixiiadi a kolokote muene ni kutendelela o kifuẋi ni kuibhula
Deuteronomy20:9 O ki zubha jifixiiadi ku tangela o kifuẋi imʼiii
Deuteronomy20:10 O kioso ki u bhiẋila ku diembu phala ku di lua
Deuteronomy20:11 Se o diembuʼodio dia xikina o paze iene
Deuteronomy20:12 O ki kala-phe nguâ paze
Deuteronomy20:13 Bhenhobho Jihova Nzambi ié mbanza ioio ua-nda ku ku bhana-iu bhu maku; mala oso-phe ala-mu bhitisa-na-u ku maju a xibhata.
Deuteronomy20:14 Mu xa ngoho ahatu
Deuteronomy20:15 Kienhiki kiene muene ki mu bhanga ku madiembu oso a ku kala bhualebha
Deuteronomy20:16 Maji o madiembu ma ifuẋi iii ia ku bhana Jihova Nzambi ié mu ubhinganu nuka uxa-mu kima kiala ni muenhu kia-lu bhuima.
Deuteronomy20:17 Kikale mu ki jikinisa muene
Deuteronomy20:18 Kuma avula ku mi longesa kufikisa o ima iâ
Deuteronomy20:19 O ki u kondoloka o diembu mu izuua iavulu
Deuteronomy20:20 Inda o miẋi ngó
Deuteronomy21:1 Se mʼoxi ia-nda ku ku bhana Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy21:2 bhenhobho ni makota ni afundixiʼé a balumuke
Deuteronomy21:3 O mbonge ioso iabeta ku di zukama ni kimbi
Deuteronomy21:4 Anga makota ma mbonge ienhoio abheka kangombe koko mu dikôlo dia kitumba kia maxinde
Deuteronomy21:5 Kienhokio-phe o Jinganga ja anʼâ Levi ji bhiẋila-bhu
Deuteronomy21:6 Adiakime oso atokala ni mbonge ialulamena bhua fuila o mufi
Deuteronomy21:7 anga ata hasa
Deuteronomy21:8 Uila kiki-phe
Deuteronomy21:9 Mu ku bhanga kiki
Deuteronomy21:10 O kioso ki uia ku di lua ni jinguma jé
Deuteronomy21:11 o ki uila o jipelezu suí
Deuteronomy21:12 bhenhobho
Deuteronomy21:13 Anga u zula o kizuatu kia upelezu uê a xikame mʼonzo ié ni kudila o thambi ia tatʼâ ni mamʼâ
Deuteronomy21:14 Maji-phe
Deuteronomy21:15 Se bhu kala muthu usakana ahatu kiiadi
Deuteronomy21:16 bhu kumbi dia kulunduisa dibhata diê ku ana
Deuteronomy21:17 Kale u u bhana muene kua monʼa muhatu a mu zemba; mu kulunduisa
Deuteronomy21:18 Se bhu kala muthu u vuala mona uedi ni kubhukumuka ni kuhuka
Deuteronomy21:19 Tata ni mama a mu kuate
Deuteronomy21:20 a tangele adiakimi a mbonge
Deuteronomy21:21 Bhenhobho-phe athu oso a mu mbongeʼomo a mu bûba ni matadi
Deuteronomy21:22 O kioso ki bhu kala muthu uate mulonga u bhinga Sendesa ia kalunga
Deuteronomy21:23 o kimbi kiê ki ki xialele bhulu dia muẋi
Deuteronomy22:1 Se u mona ngombe mba mbudi ia phangʼié ia jimbidila
Deuteronomy22:2 O kʼikala-phe phangʼié uene makanga
Deuteronomy22:3 Kienhiki kiene ki ubhanga jinga
Deuteronomy22:4 Ki u mona bulu
Deuteronomy22:5 Muhatu ka tokala kuzuata kizuatu kia diiala; o diiala ue ka tokala kuzuata kizuatu kia muhatu; mbata uoso ubhanga kiki kifusa ku pholo ia Jihova Nzambi ié.
Deuteronomy22:6 Mu kunhunga kué
Deuteronomy22:7 uambula o màma
Deuteronomy22:8 Kioso ki u tunga onzo iobhe
Deuteronomy22:9 Díbhia dié dia mivide ku di vudise jimbutu ku idifua-idifua
Deuteronomy22:10 Kana kuila ku arado imoxʼiii u kutila-ku bulu ni ngombe bhuamoxi
Deuteronomy22:11 O ki u zuata
Deuteronomy22:12 O thanga ié ia kudifuta u i ta jifalanja jiuana bhu jithungi.
Deuteronomy22:13 Se muthu usakana muhatu
Deuteronomy22:14 u mu tatela ima ia malebhu
Deuteronomy22:15 o tata-phe ia kilumba kiki ni mama azangule malasola ni ijimbuete ia undenge uê
Deuteronomy22:16 o phaiʼa kilumba a di kexiale ku adiakimi
Deuteronomy22:17 Kua bhingi-phe ua mu tatela kiá ima ia isunji
Deuteronomy22:18 Adiakimi-phe a mbonge ienhoio anga akuata diialʼodio na mu bhane o kaxtiku kê.
Deuteronomy22:19 A mu futisa hama ia itadi ia phalata
Deuteronomy22:20 Maji
Deuteronomy22:21 kilumba muenhô aie-nê bhu muelu ua tatʼâ
Deuteronomy22:22 Se bhu kala diiala a mu sanga ua zeka muhatu uangene ua dikaza
Deuteronomy22:23 O ki bhu kala monʼa kilumba
Deuteronomy22:24 mu a kuata kiiadi kiâ
Deuteronomy22:25 Maji se bhu kala diiala diala kunhungina mu mukáu
Deuteronomy22:26 maji o kilumba kana ku mu bhanga kima; kilumba kʼalé ni mulonga ua kima u fuama ku mu jibha; mukonda kiasoko ni kifumbe u balumuka mu ku jibha muthu ni mukuá
Deuteronomy22:27 Mbata kilumba a mu sange mu mukáu; o kilumba a mu solo ua dikola
Deuteronomy22:28 Se diiala di di bonga ni monʼa kilumba
Deuteronomy22:29 diialʼodio
Deuteronomy22:30 Ki bhua kà kale muthu u sakana mukajiʼa tatʼâ; ki bhua kà kale muthu u vungununa o hama ia tatʼâ ni ku i fukuila.
Deuteronomy23:1 Muthu uoso uala ni mbùmbi
Deuteronomy23:2 Muthu uoso a mu lumbula mu nzunga kuala mamʼâ
Deuteronomy23:3 Kana kuehela mukua muiji ua Amone
Deuteronomy23:4 Mbata o ki mua tundile ku Ijito
Deuteronomy23:5 Maji o Jihova phe ka ẋikinine kuívua ki zuela Balamu; inda Jihova Nzambi ié o mázui ua ma bilula dibesá; mbata Jihova Nzambi ié ua ku zola.
Deuteronomy23:6 Eie u di batuka-nê muene
Deuteronomy23:7 Mukua Edomo kana ku mu zemba
Deuteronomy23:8 Alaula âene
Deuteronomy23:9 Se uasulula kilômbo kié kia ita
Deuteronomy23:10 Se bhuala disoladi
Deuteronomy23:11 a nange muene ku kanga
Deuteronomy23:12 Eie u kala jinga ni kididi ku maxilu a kilômbo; kuene ku uenda ni ku di tela jinga.
Deuteronomy23:13 Mu kala jinga ni pá muʼaxaxi ka ibhakatu ienu ia ita

Deuteronomy24:1 Se bhu kala muthu u sakana muhatu
Deuteronomy24:2 Maji-phe
Deuteronomy24:3 o diiala diengʼidi-phe ue se di mu zemba kiòmuene
Deuteronomy24:4 munumiʼê uadiangʼó
Deuteronomy24:5 Se bhu kala muthu uabhenga díbhanga diê
Deuteronomy24:6 Matadi ma kuhuhila masa kene ku ma tambula ku kikunji ene kiiadi kiâ ni dia thandu
Deuteronomy24:7 Se bhu kala muthu unhana muthu ni mukuá
Deuteronomy24:8 Dimuka jinga ni dibhute
Deuteronomy24:9 Eʼmuene ulembalala ngó kioso kia bhangele Jihova Nzambi ié kua Midiiana mu njila
Deuteronomy24:10 Kioso ki u sobhesa kima kua mukuenu

Deuteronomy24:18 Maji uenda ni ku lembalala jinga kuila eie uakexe u mubhika mu Ijito
Deuteronomy24:19 O kioso ki u muna idima ié mu mábhia
Deuteronomy24:20 O ki u lalumuna o muvide ué
Deuteronomy24:21 O kioso ki u kanza o mulenga ué ua muvide
Deuteronomy24:22 Ki ki ku jimbe jinge kuila uakexe u mubhika mʼoxi ia Ijito. Kiene ki nga ku bhela o kijila kiki; eie ue bhanga jinga kienhiki.
Deuteronomy25:1 Se bhu kala athu kiiadi a di kuata mvunda
Deuteronomy25:2 Se mukua mulonga uatokala ku mu beta ni ku mu bha isanzu
Deuteronomy25:3 Makuinhi auana a jixikote asoko
Deuteronomy25:4 Ngombe i titidila o masa kana ku i kuta dikanu.
Deuteronomy25:5 Se bhu kala jiphange bhuamoxi
Deuteronomy25:6 O monʼa diiala uoso a dianga ku mu vuala
Deuteronomy25:7 Maji
Deuteronomy25:8 Bhenhobho o makota ma dibhata a mu ixane
Deuteronomy25:9 Huediʼê ia muhatu a mu zukame muene bhua tena o makota
Deuteronomy25:10 O dijina dia dibhata diê
Deuteronomy25:11 Se bhu kala mala aiiadi a di kuata mvunda ia kubhânga
Deuteronomy25:12 Muhatu ió mu mu batula o lukuaku; kana ku mu kuatela henda.
Deuteronomy25:13 Kana kuvula jipezo mu muxila ué
Deuteronomy25:14 Mu dibhata dié ku kale-mu ni ji-efa jiiadi ja kuzongela

Deuteronomy26:1 Mu kuila-phe eie ua bokona kiá mʼoxi ia-nda ku ku bhana Jihova Nzambi ié mʼubhinganu
Deuteronomy26:2 u katula ku jisamba-tènde ja ibundu ioso i ua-nda kumuna ku mavu aʼxi ioio ia-nda ku ku bhana Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy26:3 Anga uiza kua nganga uoso uala-ku mu izuuʼomo
Deuteronomy26:4 O nganga-phe u tambula kinda bhu lukuaku lué anga u ki tula bhu mbanduʼa kalatódio ka Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy26:5 eie-phe anga u di hambelela kua Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy26:6 Maji akua Ijito-phe a tu muesa hádi ni mbunda iònene
Deuteronomy26:7 Bhenhobho anga tu di tenda kua Jihova Nzambi ia jitata jetu; Jihova-phe ua tu ivu mutendu ua dízui dietu
Deuteronomy26:8 Jihova iú ua tu katula ku Ijito ni lukuaku lua suina
Deuteronomy26:9 Muene iu ua tu bheka kunu
Deuteronomy26:10 O kiki talesa-phe
Deuteronomy26:11 Anga uenda ni kusanguluka mu mbote ioso-phe i ku bhana Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy26:12 Mu muvu ua katatu
Deuteronomy26:13 O Jihova Nzambi ié-phe u mu ambela kiki
Deuteronomy26:14 Kioso kia ngiza o thambi
Deuteronomy26:15 Kala kiki
Deuteronomy26:16 Bhu kumbi dia leluʼabha Jihova Nzambi ié ua ku tumu ku kumbidila o jingonge jiji ni mabatuilu iá; lunda-ju-phe
Deuteronomy26:17 Lelu-ze ua di tange kua Jihova kuamba muene ukala Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy26:18 Jihova lelu ua ku jingisa iu ua ku edi: Tanga-kiu muene kuamba u kala u kifuẋi kiami muene
Deuteronomy26:19 Kifua ua mu bhana o dikuatelu mukonda muene uandala ku ku zangeleka ku thanduʼa ifuẋi ia miji ioso ia bhange; u kale u di tunda diê

Deuteronomy27:2 Kioso ki uà zubha ku zaúka Njolodá
Deuteronomy27:3 O ki u zubha kuzaúka
Deuteronomy27:4 O ki u zaúka Njolodá
Deuteronomy27:5 Bhenhobho u tunga-bhu ue kalatódio phala Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy27:6 Ma kadié ni muzunda ué
Deuteronomy27:7 Usatela jinga ue jisata ja paze anga bhenhobho údia
Deuteronomy27:8 O ku matadiʼama kuene ku u soneka o maka moso ma Kitumu kiki
Deuteronomy27:9 Anga Mozé uzuela dingi
Deuteronomy27:10 Kala kiki

Deuteronomy27:12 Kioso ki mu zubha kuzaúka Njolodá
Deuteronomy27:13 O iá ue

Deuteronomy27:16 Lamba dia ió uoso u lebhula tatʼâ mba mamʼâ! Mundu uoso-phe a kèla: Amén!
Deuteronomy27:17 Lamba dia ió uoso usondolola o mbambe ia tokala mukuá. Mundu uoso a kèla: Amén!
Deuteronomy27:18 Lamba dia ió uoso u tondalesa kifofo

Deuteronomy27:22 Lamba dia ió uoso uzeka ni phangʼiê ia muhatu
Deuteronomy27:23 Lamba dia ió uoso uzeka ni ukouʼê ua muhatu. Mundu uoso-ze a kèla: Amén!
Deuteronomy27:24 Lamba dia ió uoso muthu u kuama mukuá mu kasuekèle. Mundu uoso-phe a kèla: Amén!
Deuteronomy27:25 Lamba dia ió uoso utambula nganhu phala kujibha muthu ua kambe kikuma. Mundu uoso-phe a kèla: Amén!
Deuteronomy27:26 Lamba dia ió uoso ufula kuẋikina kiambe o kitumu kiki
Deuteronomy28:1 Eie-phe se uaẋikina kuívua ni muanu uoso o dízui dia Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy28:2 Mabesá oso a-nda kuiza kokué u ua-nda kutambula
Deuteronomy28:3 Ua kà zediua mu sanzala
Deuteronomy28:4 Ia kà zedikua o mbutu i tunda mu divumu dié ni mbutu i tunda mu díbhia dié. Ia kà zediua o mbutu ia ibhaku ié ia jingombe
Deuteronomy28:5 Kia kà zediua o kinda kié ni nguiku ié.
Deuteronomy28:6 Ua kà zediua ki u bokona
Deuteronomy28:7 Jihova ua kʼènda ni ku ku toluela o jinguma joso ji balumuka mu ku ku kanena
Deuteronomy28:8 Jihova ua-nda kutuma kusuku-muina o dibesá diê ku itula ié-eie
Deuteronomy28:9 Jihova ua-nda ku ku imika mu ku kala u kifuẋi kia ditungula
Deuteronomy28:10 O ifuẋi ioso mu ngongo a-nda kumona kuma
Deuteronomy28:11 O jimbote Jihova ua-nda ku ku vudixila-ju kiá
Deuteronomy28:12 Jihova ua-nda ku ku jikuila o dibhakelu diê
Deuteronomy28:13 Jihova ua-nda ku ku bhanga u mútue
Deuteronomy28:14 Ku maka iá oso u ngala ku ku tela lelu
Deuteronomy28:15 Kia kà kala-phe kiki
Deuteronomy28:16 Ua kà kala ni uíndua mu sanzala
Deuteronomy28:17 Kuxixima kua kinda kié
Deuteronomy28:18 Mbutu i tunda mu divumu dié ikala ue ni uíndua; o mbutu i tunda mu díbhia dié i kala ue ni uíndua; o ibhanga ié ia jingombe
Deuteronomy28:19 Ua kà xixima ki u bokona
Deuteronomy28:20 Jihova ua kà ku tumikisa mázui ni lusébu ni kubhondalala ku ima i u bhanga
Deuteronomy28:21 Jihova a ku tumikise dibhebhu dia peste nda di ku sange
Deuteronomy28:22 Jihova ua kà ku kuama ni uhaxi ua thulu
Deuteronomy28:23 O diulu dioso di zenzamena bhu thalʼa mútue ué di kale dia ngòndo; o mavu ue u u diata bhoxi akale mukuâ ni felu.
Deuteronomy28:24 O ki uinda o mvula Jihova a ku tumikise fufutila; ku diulu kuende muene ni kulalumuka utôkua mbe o ku ku jikinisa katé ki uia muʼalunga.
Deuteronomy28:25 Jihova u ku toluela muene bhu pholo ia ʼnguma jé; mu ku tundila o jinguma jé phala kutakana-na-ju
Deuteronomy28:26 Bhuoso bhu ua kà fuila o kimbi kié kikale kúdia kua jinjila ja diulu ni iama ia mukáu mungongo
Deuteronomy28:27 Jihova u ku tatesa ni mikôngo ia tokala akua Ijito; anga ku di ta matute ni jihana ni madiazela
Deuteronomy28:28 Jihova ua kà ku kuama ni munhunga
Deuteronomy28:29 Anga ku ku iza kiá uendelu ua kuila katé ni mu ʼkumbi dia mediia uenda ni ku babajala kala ki bhanga o kifofo muʼavundu; mu njila joso kuzediua u ku lémbua. Ku muenhu ué uoso u kala ni kubhondalala; izuua ioso aia ni ku ku nhana ni ku ku bhûnda o u ku kudila ku mu mono.
Deuteronomy28:30 Ua kà sakana muhatu
Deuteronomy28:31 Ngombe ié a ku jibhila-iu bhu pholo ié-bhene
Deuteronomy28:32 Anʼé a mala ni anʼa ahatu a ku bua-u
Deuteronomy28:33 Idima itunda mʼoxi ié
Deuteronomy28:34 Anga ku ku iza kiá kubhuuama
Deuteronomy28:35 Jihova-phe u ku ẋolomona o jiphuna ni matabela anga uila muene ẋôtoto ni kítanga
Deuteronomy28:36 Jihova ua kà ku ambata nʼeie ni sobha i ua-nda ku di hingixile eie-muène
Deuteronomy28:37 Kuabhu-phe
Deuteronomy28:38 O ki u kuna idima iavulu ku mábhia
Deuteronomy28:39 Ua kà phapha mivide ia vulu
Deuteronomy28:40 Mu mikáu ié ioso midiva ukala na-iu muene
Deuteronomy28:41 Uvuala muene anʼa mala ni anʼa ahatu
Deuteronomy28:42 Ni miẋi ié ioso
Deuteronomy28:43 O nzuángiza ua tungu mʼoxi ié
Deuteronomy28:44 Muene muene uenda ni ku ku sobhesa eie
Deuteronomy28:45 O mázui oso enhá a-nda kuiza mu ku ku sukumukina ku thandu dié; anga a ku kuata muene
Deuteronomy28:46 Momué ni mu mbutu ié i ku kaiela
Deuteronomy28:47 Mbata o Jihova Nzambi ié kua mu bhikila ni vondadi
Deuteronomy28:48 Kala kiki
Deuteronomy28:49 Jihova ua kà ku kasela muiji ua akua makanga ku jihota jʼaxi
Deuteronomy28:50 muiji ua isuéia
Deuteronomy28:51 Luvualu luoso ta ibhaku ié ene a kà lu habula anga a lu minha
Deuteronomy28:52 Sanzala jé joso ja kà sekala
Deuteronomy28:53 Kienhókio o mbutu ia mu mala dié
Deuteronomy28:54 Bhenhobho muthu uoso a kexe ku mu ila mu Izalaiele exi
Deuteronomy28:55 O kia kuata kudia xitu ia anʼê
Deuteronomy28:56 O muhatu ua fina muʼaxaxi kenu
Deuteronomy28:57 Ua zemba kiki mukonda ngó dia kibu ni ima dingi itundila mʼoxi a inama iê mu kubhanduluka; o kia vuala mona
Deuteronomy28:58 Se ua kambe kualuka ni ku kumbidila o maka moso ma Kitumu kiki
Deuteronomy28:59 kienhókio Jihova-phe ua-nda ku ku tudikila-ku kiá mabhebhu a makota a madiuanu
Deuteronomy28:60 Jihova ua kà bhangesa kuila o kikote kioso ni mauhaxi oso a ku kuatele uomʼô
Deuteronomy28:61 Katé ni i-mauhaxi
Deuteronomy28:62 Mua-nda kuxala-phe kiá ngó mu tumbalumbalu tua athu
Deuteronomy28:63 Kala mʼokulu Jihova ki kia mu uabhelele kiavulu o ku mi suua
Deuteronomy28:64 Jihova ua ka mi muangena muʼaxaxi ka miji ioso tunde kua tundu oxi ʼté ku maẋokololo ku iasuku; o kuenhoko kuene kiua ku ua kà bhikila o jinzambi jengi
Deuteronomy28:65 Né hanji-phe muʼaxaxi ka miji ienhoio
Deuteronomy28:66 O muenhu ué uila ni uene kala a u nhengeneka
Deuteronomy28:67 Kuma ki kúkia
Deuteronomy28:68 Jihova ua kà mi bhangesa ku vutukila dingi ku Ijitu mu jinaviiu
Deuteronomy29:1 Iá ene o maka ma kikutu kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé
Deuteronomy29:2 Mozé anga uixana Izalaiele ioso
Deuteronomy29:3 Ijimbuete iamakota ia kidi
Deuteronomy29:4 maji-phe Jihova ka mi bhana o muxima ua kutetuluka
Deuteronomy29:5 Makuinhi auana a mivu u nga mi endesa mu kikangalakata; izuatu ienu ki ia kukila ku mikutu
Deuteronomy29:6 Ki muadi mbolo
Deuteronomy29:7 O ki mua tula-phe bhu kididi kiki
Deuteronomy29:8 Oxi anga tu a tambula-iu
Deuteronomy29:9 Maka ma Kikutu kiki bhakenu-u
Deuteronomy29:10 Leluʼidi enu-oso muene muala bhu pholo ia Jihova Nzambi ienu; ni makota ma ibuka ienu
Deuteronomy29:11 ni tuana tuenu
Deuteronomy29:12 phala ene oso a bokone mu Kikutu kia Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy29:13 Mu kusota o ku ku xikika kiambote mu kukala lelu u kifuẋi kiê-muène ngó; o muene ue a ku kale Nzambi ié-eie
Deuteronomy29:14 O kikutu kienhiki-phe ni mulôko uenhú
Deuteronomy29:15 Maji ni uoso lelu uemana nzanza bhabha nʼetu bhu pholo ia Jihova Nzambi ietu
Deuteronomy29:16 Kuma-phe enu-enu mua kʼijiia kiambote kioso ki tua nakina mu Ijito
Deuteronomy29:17 ufusa uâ mua di muena-u
Deuteronomy29:18 Ki bhu kale-phe diiala muʼaxaxi kenu
Deuteronomy29:19 Ki bhu kale ue muthu o kievua maka ma mázui iá mʼònake mu divulu didi
Deuteronomy29:20 Jihova phe ka-nda kuẋikina ku mu loloka! inda o njinda ia Jihova ia-nda kuuama
Deuteronomy29:21 Jihova u mu tungula ku miji ioso ia Izalaiele
Deuteronomy29:22 Oso-phe a kèza-ku ku muiji iú
Deuteronomy29:23 Mù kuila mua bhiti mbòmbe ia xofidi ni môngua oxi ioso ia seluka iazubha
Deuteronomy29:24 Anga miji ia ifuẋi ioso ia kʼèla: Jihova oxi iii ua i bhangela-hi kiki? Kima kiahi kia bheka o njinda isoka kala kiki?

Deuteronomy29:26 A di tele mu ku kaiela ni ku bheza jinzambi jengi
Deuteronomy29:27 Kala kiki-phe Jihova njinda ja mukuata mukonda dia oxi ienhiʼii
Deuteronomy29:28 Jihova ue
Deuteronomy29:29 Ima ioso iosuekeʼoio ima-phe iangene ia Jihova Nzambi ietu; o ioso ia di monekena ia tu tokala etu ni anʼetu

Deuteronomy30:2 o ki u biluka kua Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy30:3 bhenhobho-phe o Jihova Nzambi ié
Deuteronomy30:4 Né-mbe hanji o jihutile jé a a balakala
Deuteronomy30:5 anga Jihova Nzambi ié u ku bheka mʼoxi ia vuile kiá kuala o jitata jé
Deuteronomy30:6 Jihova Nzambi ié ua-nda ku ku saia o muxima ué moxi
Deuteronomy30:7 O Jihova Nzambi ié ua-nda kulundulula o mázui mosoʼama ku thandu dia jinguma jé-eie
Deuteronomy30:8 Eie-phe kibhinga u tolola dingi muene o muxima

Deuteronomy31:1 Mozé bhenhobho

Joshua7:3 Anga a vutuka kua Josuué
Joshua7:4 Ku kifuẋi anga kuiʼé ngó midi jitatu ja makuenze; enhá anga a a kaia kuala akua Hai.

Joshua7:14 Mungu ki kúkia

Joshua8:12 Anga u katula kibuka ki tokala midi jitanu

Joshua8:14 Kia zubha kubhanga kiki

Joshua8:16 Ni ku ta mitendu ia makota

Joshua8:22 Ió ue a tunda mu mbonge a a kondela kuema; kifua Izalaiele ua a te mukonda
Joshua8:23 Sobha ia Hai-phe a mu kuata ni muenhu uê
Joshua8:24 O kiedi akua Izalaiele a zubha kiá kujibha akua Hai oso ala ku mukáu
Joshua8:25 Ene oso-phe a buila kizuua kienhókio
Joshua8:26 Kuma Josuué hanji kia sunununa lukuaku lua kuata ditoma
Joshua8:27 Akua Izalaiele-phe anga a bhûnda ibhaku
Joshua8:28 Josuué anga uoha Hai ni túbhia
Joshua8:29 Sobha ia Hai anga u mu nhenga mu muẋi

Joshua8:32 Anga u soneka-ku
Joshua8:33 Izalaiele ioso-phe
Joshua8:34 O kia zubha kubhanga kiki
Joshua8:35 Josuué ka xi-ku kizuelu kia kima
Joshua9:1 Anga kibhita kiki
Joshua9:2 a di phopha ni muenhu umoxi
Joshua9:3 O akua bhata mu Ngibiione
Joshua9:4 abhanga-bhu ue ndunge; a di bhangesa kala jiphunga jókatule
Joshua9:5 ku inama a zuata jisabhatu jakuka
Joshua9:6 Anga eza kua Josuué
Joshua9:7 Mala a Izalaiele anga a kumbulula o Mahivi
Joshua9:8 Ene-phe ambela Josuué
Joshua9:9 Ene anga a mu vutuila
Joshua9:10 ni ima ioso ue ia bhange ku sobha jiiadi ja Mamodi
Joshua9:11 Kienhiki-phe adiakimi etu
Joshua9:12 Kizuua ki tua katuka ku mabhata metu
Joshua9:13 O isudi-phe iii
Joshua9:14 Athu-phe kia tale ku huta iâ
Joshua9:15 Josuué ua di tambulula-nâ
Joshua9:16 Mu kuila-phe bhu bhita izuua itatu

Joshua11:1 Mu kuila ima iii iabhiti
Joshua11:2 ni ku jisobha ja kexi ku kusuku
Joshua11:3 ni ku Makanana a thunda ni a luiji; ni ku Mamodi

Joshua18:1 Kionge kioso-phe kia anʼa Izalaiele anga ki bhongoloka bhu Silu. O balaka ia kutakanena anga a i oleka bhenhobho
Joshua18:2 O muʼaxaxi-phe kʼanʼa Izalaiele hanji mua subhuka sambuadi dia miiji kiluua
Joshua18:3 Josuué iu uambela anʼa Izalaiele
Joshua18:4 Ku muiji ni muiji a sole-ku mala atatu
Joshua18:5 A i uane mu lusambuadi: Juda a mu xa ku Sulu mu mbambe iê
Joshua18:6 Enu-phe mu xinda oxi mu sambuadi dia mbandu
Joshua18:7 Jilevita-phe (anʼa Levi) ka-nda kutambula kibatu muʼaxaxi kenu
Joshua18:8 Kienhiki o mala enhó abalumuka anga akatuka; Josuué-phe ua tumine oso aia kulonda oxi
Joshua18:9 Athu ió endele
Joshua18:10 Josuué anga ua tela-iu jihasa mu Silu
Joshua18:11 Kua tomboka-phe o hasa ia muiji ua anʼa Bejamí
Joshua18:12 Mbambe iê anga i bhela ku mbandu ia kusuku tundé ku Njolodá; mbambe iii hé i di kunga ni Jedikó ni ku kusuku
Joshua18:13 Mu kutunda bhobho mbambe iii ibhita mu Luze
Joshua18:14 Anga iia kienhiki ni ialukila ku mbandu ia luiji
Joshua18:15 O mu i bhita-phe ku mbandu iê ia sulu
Joshua18:16 Mbambe ii iza ni ku kulumuka tulé bhu thungi ia mulundu uene kuxitila dikôlo dia Hinome
Joshua18:17 mu kutunda bhobho ilungulukila kiá ku kusuku hé i di tela bhu Ene-semexe; o ki itunda bhobho
Joshua18:18 anga isombokela katé ia lungu mu kuia ku Halaba ku kusuku
Joshua18:19 mbambe ienhiʼii i somboka dingi katé ku maxilu ma Bete-Hokala ku kusuku
Joshua18:20 O ku mbandu ia thunda Njolodá muene o mbambe; iú uene o ubhinganu ua anʼa Bejamí mu mbambe jê mbandu ni mbandu
Joshua18:21 O jisanzala ja muiji ua anʼa Bejamí

Joshua21:2 anga a a zuelesa bhu Silu
Joshua21:3 Bhenhobho anʼa Izalaiele a katula ku ubhinganu uâ
Joshua21:4 Muondona-phe u tunda
Joshua21:5 Ana amukuá a Kohate
Joshua21:6 O ku anʼa Ngelexone hasa iâ ia tundila ku konda ia jifamilia ja muiji ua Isakale
Joshua21:7 Anʼa Meladi-phe
Joshua21:8 Anʼa Izalaeiele a bhana o jisanzala jiji ku jilevita kumoxi ni mikáu ia jimbalelu jâ
Joshua21:9 Muiji-phe ua anʼa Juda
Joshua21:10 A ji bhana ku anʼa Alá
Joshua21:11 Kienhiki a a bhana ue sanzala ia Kidiate-Halaba

Joshua21:15 ni sanzala ia Holone
Joshua21:16 ni sanzala ia Aime

Joshua21:18 Anaióte
Joshua21:19 Sanzala joso ja jinganga mu jinganga
Joshua21:20 O jifamília-phe ja anʼa Kohate
Joshua21:21 Anga a a bhana Xikeme ni mbalelu iê
Joshua21:22 ni Kibisaíme
Joshua21:23 O ku muiji ua Dane kua tundu sanzala ia Eliteke
Joshua21:24 Ajalone
Joshua21:25 O ku kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa

Joshua21:27 Anʼa Ngelexone
Joshua21:28 O ku muiji ua Isakale
Joshua21:29 Jalemute
Joshua21:30 O muiji ua Asele ua bhana Misale
Joshua21:31 Helekate
Joshua21:32 O muiji ua Nafitali ua bhana Kadexe
Joshua21:33 konda ia jisanzala joso phala Mangelexone
Joshua21:34 O jifamília-phe ja anʼa Meladi
Joshua21:35 Dimina
Joshua21:36 Muiji ua Lubene ua bhe Bezele
Joshua21:37 Kedimote ni mbalelu iê
Joshua21:38 O muiji ua Ngadi ua bhe Lamote
Joshua21:39 ni Hexebone
Joshua21:40 O sanzala joso jiji a ji bhana anʼa Meladi
Joshua21:41 Jisanzala joso ja jilevita
Joshua21:42 Sanzala ni sanzala ni mbalelu iê ku maxilu moso; sanzala joso muene kienhiki.

Joshua21:45 Maka moso muene ma mbote ma zuelele Jihova ku dibhata dia Izalaiele
Joshua22:1 Bhenhobho Josuué uixana akua Lubene
Joshua22:2 anga ua ambela
Joshua22:3 Phange jenu mua ji bande muene
Joshua22:4 Leluʼidi-phe kuma Jihova Nzambi ienu ua bhana kiá o thungu ni somo ku jiphange jenu
Joshua22:5 Kima kimoxi-phe
Joshua22:6 Kienhiki Josuué ua a te o kizediuise bhenhobho
Joshua22:7 Kuma-phe o kaxaxe ka muiji ua Manasa
Joshua22:8 hé u a ambela
Joshua22:9 Kienhiki anʼa Lubene
Joshua22:10 Anʼa Lubene
Joshua22:11 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe hé a kívua
Joshua22:12 Kienhiki kia zubha ku kʼivua
Joshua22:13 Anga anʼa Izalaiele a tuma jiphunga kua anʼa Lubene
Joshua22:14 ni kuinhi dia ilamba kumoxi-nê; ku muiji ni muiji kua tundu kilamba
Joshua22:15 Enhá o kieza
Joshua22:16 Kionge kioso kia Jihova azuela kiki
Joshua22:17 Kifuá kituxi kiatolo ki tua te bhu Peiole kia bhingi katé leluʼidi hanji tua xidi-na-kiu sumbala bhua bhitile kiá kaxitiku muʼaxaxi ka kionge kia Jihova.
Joshua22:18 Lelu mu batuka dingi kua Jihova? Mua-nda kuila-phe mu zubha ku kitukila Jihova lelu
Joshua22:19 O ki kala-phe mua mono kuila oxi ia mi bhana mu ubhinganu iezala lufuku luoso
Joshua22:20 Akane monʼa Zela ua tele kituxi
Joshua22:21 Bhenhobho anʼa Lubene
Joshua22:22 Nzambi ia jinzambi
Joshua22:23 Se tua tungu kalatódio phala kuta dikunda kua Jihova
Joshua22:24 Inda kia tu bhangesa-kiu
Joshua22:25 Kuma Jihova muene ua tu uanuna kiá nʼenu
Joshua22:26 Tuexi-phe: Kiosuʼiki
Joshua22:27 Maji phala umbangi bhu kaẋi kʼetu
Joshua22:28 Kienhiki-phe tuexi: Né hádia kia tu âmba kiki
Joshua22:29 Ki tualʼiki
Joshua22:30 Finehase phe o nganga
Joshua22:31 Nganga Finehase
Joshua22:32 Bhenhobho Finehase
Joshua22:33 Mahezu enhá anʼa Izalaiele a a uabhela ue
Joshua22:34 Anʼa Lubene ni anʼa Ngadi anga aiuka kalatódio kaka exi: Ede. Mbata ambe exi: Inda kalatódio kaka ka tu kale Umbangi muʼaxaxi ketu
Joshua23:1 Anga kibhita kuila

Joshua23:4 Talesenu kioso ki nga mi uanena o ifuẋi ioso iasubhukile tundé ku Njolodá
Joshua23:5 Jihova Nzambi ienu ua kà mi sondoluela o ifuẋi ienhoio; ua kà mi kaiela-iu
Joshua23:6 Mua bhingi-phe mu di suinisa kinène muene
Joshua23:7 mbé ki mu kuate ku di fungisa ni ifuẋi iii ia mi xikamena hanji. Kana kuila jinga o majina a mahamba mâ enu mu a tumbula
Joshua23:8 Inda enu mu naminina kua Jihova Nzambi ienu

Joshua24:1 O ki kia bhiti
Joshua24:2 Josuué-phe anga uambela o kifuẋi kioso
Joshua24:3 Eme-phe nga tungula-bhu tatʼenu Mbalahamu
Joshua24:4 Izake ue nga mu bhana Jakobo ni Izaú; o Izaú-phe nga mu bhana mulundu ua Seíle phala muene kiá; o Jakobo-phe ni anʼê a kulumukine mu Ijitu.
Joshua24:5 Kiene-phe ki nga tumikisina Mozê ni Alá
Joshua24:6 O ki nga zubha kutundisa adienu mu Ijitu
Joshua24:7 Ene anga a di kola kua Jihova
Joshua24:8 Kiene kiua ki nga mi bheka mʼoxi ia Mamodi
Joshua24:9 Balaki-phe
Joshua24:10 Eme-phe nga ditumu kuívua Balamu; kia mu bhangesa ku mi ta kizediuise anga ngi mi bhulula bhu lukuaku luê.
Joshua24:11 O ki muà zaúka Njolodá enu mueza mu Jedikó
Joshua24:12 Eme nga tuamekesa imadimbuende ku pholo ienu
Joshua24:13 Hé ngiia o ixi nga mi bhana-iu
Joshua24:14 Kiki-phe Jihova mu kuatedienu uoma
Joshua24:15 Maji-phe
Joshua24:16 Benhobho kifuẋi a vutula
Joshua24:17 Mukonda Jihova muene Nzambi ietu. Muene ngó ua tu katula nʼetu ni jitata jetu kʼoxi ia Ijitu
Joshua24:18 Jihova iu ua tu kaiesela o matumbu osoʼâ bhu pholo ietu
Joshua24:19 Josuué-phe uambela o kifuẋi
Joshua24:20 Mukonda o ki mua-nda kuila muene mua mu xi
Joshua24:21 Kifuẋi-phe kiambela Josuué
Joshua24:22 Eme Josuué
Joshua24:23 Texenu-phe
Joshua24:24 Kifuẋi kia vutuila Josuué
Joshua24:25 Kienhiki Josuué

Joshua24:27 Josuué anga uambela o kifuẋi kioso

Joshua24:33 Eleiazale ue
Judges1:1 Mu kukala-kukala
Judges1:2 Jihova-phe
Judges1:3 Juda anga u ambela phangʼiê Ximinhá
Judges1:4 Juda anga u banda; Jihova anga u bhakula Makanana ni Mapelezi bhu lukuaku luâ; anga a beta-ku mu Bezeke
Judges1:5 Anga a sanga Adoni-bezeke
Judges1:6 Adoni-bezeke anga u lenga; anga a mu kaia
Judges1:7 Adoni-bezeke anga u zuela
Judges1:8 Mbata anʼa Juda a lua ni Jeluzaleme anga a i tambula
Judges1:9 Kia zubha ku ki bhanga
Judges1:10 Juda anga uia mu kúlua ue ni Makanana a tungu mu Hebolone (Hebolone-phe dijina diê mʼokulu Kidiata-Halaba); anga a beta Sesai
Judges1:11 Ku tunda bhobho uia mu kúlua ni akua Ndebile. (Ndebile-phe dijina diê mʼokulu Kidiata-sefele).
Judges1:12 Kalebe anga u zuela
Judges1:13 Otoniiele monʼa Kenaze
Judges1:14 Kia zubha ku mu bhenga-phe
Judges1:15 Monʼa muhatu anga u mu ambela
Judges1:16 Anʼa Kene
Judges1:17 Juda anga u ila kumoxi ni phangʼiê Ximinhá
Judges1:18 Juda anga u tambula dingi Ngaza ni jisanzala jê
Judges1:19 Jihova anga u kala kumoxi ni Juda
Judges1:20 Hebolone anga a i bhana Kalebe
Judges1:21 Anʼa Bejamí-phe anga a lémbua kukaia o Majebuzi mu Jeluzaleme; Majebuzi-phe ió
Judges1:22 Dibhata dia Zuze anga di banda mu kúlua ni Betele; Jihova anga u kala-nâ kumoxi.
Judges1:23 Dibhata dia Zuze anga a tuma ilolo kulonda mu Betele. (Mbonge ióio-phe mʼokulu dijina diê Luze).
Judges1:24 Ala mu londa anga a mona muthu iú tunda mu mbonge
Judges1:25 Muene anga u a edikiza dibokuenu dia kubhiẋila mu mbonge; mbonge anga a i kuama ni mazu a xibhata; muthu iú-phe a mu eha ni família iê.
Judges1:26 Muene-phe uia ku ixi ia Mahiti
Judges1:27 Manasa-phe u kamba kukaia akua Bete-Sane ni jisanzala jê
Judges1:28 Ku izuua-izuua-phe
Judges1:29 Ifalaime ue u kamba kukaia Makanana a tungu mu Ngezele; o Makanana-phe anga a tungʼâ mu Ngezele ni ene kumoxi.
Judges1:30 Nzebulone ue u kamba kukaia akua Kitolone
Judges1:31 Asele ue u kamba kukaia akua Haku
Judges1:32 akua Asele-phe a kala mu tunga ni Makanana kumoxi
Judges1:33 Nafitali ue u kamba kukaia akua Bete-seme
Judges1:34 O akua Mamodi anga a bhinjika anʼa Dani kusuka mu milundu; mukonda ka ehela
Judges1:35 Akua Mamodi-phe a jijila ue kutunga mu mulundu ua Helese
Judges1:36 O mbambe ia Mamodi (akua Idumeia) anga i tunda mu phaka ia jimbalanganza mu kubanda bhu Akalabini
Judges2:1 Mukunji ua Jihova anga u tunda bhu Jidingale u banda ku Betele. Uixi: Eme nga mi katula mu Ijitu
Judges2:2 Enu-phe uenu
Judges2:3 Mukonda dia kiki
Judges2:4 Kia zubha mukunji ua Jihova kuzuela makʼama kua ana oso a Izalaiele
Judges2:5 Kididi kienhiki anga a ki luka dijina dia Bokimu; Jihova anga a mu satela bhenhobho.
Judges2:6 Kiki kia zubha Josuué muanganesa mundu
Judges2:7 Mundu anga a bhikila Jihova izuua ioso ia Josuué
Judges2:8 Josuué monʼa Nune
Judges2:9 Anga a mu funda bhu mbambe ia undundu uê mu Timinate-Helese

Judges2:19 Anga aia ni kuila ku izúua-phe

Judges3:9 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a dikola kua Jihova
Judges3:10 Nzumbi ia Jihova anga iiza ku thandu diê

Judges3:13 Muene anga u bhongolola ni anʼa Amone ni Amaleke; hé uia
Judges3:14 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhikila sobha ia Mouabhe mu kuinhi dia muvu ni nake.
Judges3:15 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe anga a di kola kua Jihova
Judges3:16 Ehudi anga u iudika xibhata iê ia mazu aiadi
Judges3:17 Anga u bhakula ujitu kua Engolone sobha ia Mouabhe; Engolone-phe u neta kiavulu.
Judges3:18 Kia zubha kubhakula o ujitu ueza na-u
Judges3:19 Muene anga u vutukila bhu matadi a iteka ia kusonga
Judges3:20 Ehudi anga u bokona muoso muala sobha; u mu sanga ua xikama u bheka uê mu tambula mulenge mu sala ku thandu. Ehudi anga u zuela
Judges3:21 Muene anga u balumuka mu kialu muala. Ehudi anga u sunga lukuaku luê lua kiasu
Judges3:22 o mubhinhi anga u kaiela o phoko ma bokona
Judges3:23 Ehudi anga u tundila mu mbalanda
Judges3:24 Kia zubha kutunda
Judges3:25 Anga a kinga katé kia a kumu
Judges3:26 Kioso-phe kia laleka kiki
Judges3:27 Kia zubha kutula koko
Judges3:28 Uixi: Ngi kaiedienu; kuma Jihova ua bhakula jinguma jenu ja akua Mouabhe bhu lukuaku luenu. Anga a kulumuka ku kunda dia muene
Judges3:29 Ku akua Mouabhe-phe anga a beta-ku kuinhi dia midi ia muthu kithangana kienhokio
Judges3:30 Kienhiki Mouabhe ua toloka kizúua kienhókio
Judges3:31 O kua muene ku kaiela Sangale monʼa Anati

Judges6:1 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha ku mesu ma Jihova; o Jihova anga u a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua akua Midiiana mu sambuadi dia muvu.
Judges6:2 Lukuaku lua Midiiana
Judges6:3 Anga a kala mu kuila
Judges6:4 anga a ta ibangu iâ
Judges6:5 Kuma eza jinga ni ibhaku iâ
Judges6:6 Anʼa Izalaiele anga eza mu uadiama uavulu mukonda dia akua Midiiana; anʼa Izalaiele anga a dikola kua Jihova.
Judges6:7 Kioso-phe kia kuata anʼa Izalaiele kudikola kua Jihova
Judges6:8 Jihova muene u tuma polofeta kua anʼa Izalaiele
Judges6:9 nga mi kudila bhu lukuaku lua akua Ijitu
Judges6:10 Eme nga mi ambela ngixi: Eme Jihova

Judges6:12 Anju ia Jihova anga i mu tukulukila

Judges6:17 Muene anga u mu ambela
Judges6:18 Bhu ualʼobho
Judges6:19 Ngidiione anga uia mʼonzo u kuata xitu ia mona hombo
Judges6:20 Anju ia Nzambi anga i mu ambela
Judges6:21 Bhenhobho anju ia Jihova u sunununa o dikoue dia mu kala bhu lukuaku luê

Judges6:23 Jihova anga u mu ambela

Judges6:25 Anga ki bhita kuma
Judges6:26 u tunge kalatódio ka Jihova Nzambi ié
Judges6:27 Bhenhobho Ngidiione anga u katula kuinhi dia muthu ku akua mbèle iê
Judges6:28 Kukia ni kimene
Judges6:29 Anga a di ibhula mudiâ
Judges6:30 Akua bhata bhenhobho anga ambela Jouaji
Judges6:31 Jouaji anga u ambela enhá oso a mu bhongolokela

Judges6:33 Kienhokio akua Midiiana oso
Judges6:34 Nzumbi ia Jihova phe i tula kua Ngidiione
Judges6:35 Anga u tuma jiphunga mʼoxi ioso ia Manasa; ene uâ anga a bhongoloka mu ku mu kaiela. Anga u tuma ue jiphunga mua Asele
Judges6:36 Ngidiione-phe u ambela Nzambi
Judges6:37 talesa

Judges6:39 Ngidiione anga u ambela dingi Nzambi
Judges6:40 Nzambi anga u ki bhanga usuku uenhó; kuma kindemba ngó kiene kia kukuta
Judges7:1 Bhenhobho Jelubaale
Judges7:2 Jihova anga u ambela Ngidiione
Judges7:3 Kiki-phe bhana ngolokela mu mátui ma mundu
Judges7:4 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Ngidiione
Judges7:5 Kienhiki Ngidiione u bheka mundu ku menha. Jihova anga u ambela Ngidiione
Judges7:6 Ia-phe oso a kabula menha
Judges7:7 Jihova anga u ambela Ngidiione
Judges7:8 Ngidiione anga u tambula o huta ia kúdia ni jibuzina bhu maku a mundu hé u ji bhaka; akua Izalaiele oso muene anga u a muanganesa kala muthu ku balaka iê
Judges7:9 Mu kukala-pe usuku uenhó
Judges7:10 O ki u kala-phe hanji ni uoma ua ku a lundumuna
Judges7:11 u ivue kioso kiala kuzuela; phala maku a ku kale kiua ni nguzu ia ku vubuka bhu kilombo. Muene anga u kulumuka
Judges7:12 Akua Midiiana bhenhobho
Judges7:13 Ngidiione kia zubha kutula bhu kilômbo kia akua Midiiana
Judges7:14 Mukuá anga u mu kumbulula
Judges7:15 Anga ki bhita
Judges7:16 Anga u uanununa o hâma jitatu ja mala mu ibuka itatu
Judges7:17 Anga u a ambela
Judges7:18 Eme ngʼila ngi xika mbungu kumoxi ni iá oso ala ni eme
Judges7:19 Kala kiki
Judges7:20 Ibuka itatu ioso anga a xika jimbungu
Judges7:21 Anga emana kala muthu bhu kididi kiê
Judges7:22 A xiki kia kuata kuxika o hama jitatu ja jimbungu
Judges7:23 Bhenhobho mala ma akua Izalaiele
Judges7:24 Ngidiione muene ue anga u tuma jiphunga mu milundu ioso ia Ifalaime
Judges7:25 Anga a kuata jingana jiiadi
Judges8:1 Akua Ifalaime anga ambela Ngidiione
Judges8:2 Muene anga u a ambela
Judges8:3 Nzambi ua bhakula bhu lukuaku luenu anʼa jisobha ja Midiiana
Judges8:4 Ngidiione anga u tula ku Njolodá hé u zaúka
Judges8:5 Anga u ambela akua Sukote
Judges8:6 Jingana ja Sukote-phe
Judges8:7 Ngidiione-phe
Judges8:8 Anga u tunda bhenhobho
Judges8:9 Muene anga u ambela ue akua Penuuele
Judges8:10 Kienhokio-phe Zeba ni Zalumuna a bhixila bhu Kadikodi
Judges8:11 Ngidiione anga u bandela mu njila ia jisanzala ja jibalaka
Judges8:12 Ni Zeba ni Zalumuna-phe anga a lenga; muene-phe anga u a kaia; jisobha jiiadi ja Midiiana Zeba ni Zalumuna
Judges8:13 Ngidiione monʼa Jouaji anga u vutuka ku ita
Judges8:14 Anga u kuata munzangala múkua Sukote
Judges8:15 Ngidiione anga u tula kua akua Sukote
Judges8:16 Muene anga u kuata adiakime
Judges8:17 O kathondo mu mbonge ia Penuuele ua ka bula-bula
Judges8:18 Muene anga u ambela Zeba ni Zalumuna
Judges8:19 Muene-phe uixi: Enhó jiphange jami
Judges8:20 Anga u ambela Jetele
Judges8:21 Ni Zeba ni Zalumuna anga ambela Ngidiione
Judges8:22 Kia bhiti imʼiii
Judges8:23 Ngiddiione anga u ambela
Judges8:24 Ngidiione anga u a ambela
Judges8:25 Ene a mu vutuila
Judges8:26 O jibixa ja uluʼiji ja bhingi muene
Judges8:27 Ngidiione anga u iudika na-u efodi
Judges8:28 Kala kiki
Judges8:29 Jelubaale monʼa Jouaji
Judges8:30 Ngidiione anga u kala ni makuinhi sambuadi a mona
Judges8:31 A nga u kala ni mukama uê bhu Xikeme
Judges8:32 Ngidiione monʼa Jouaji anga u fua
Judges8:33 Mu kukala-phe
Judges8:34 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a fula kuxinganeka Jihova Nzambi iâ
Judges8:35 a fula ue kuidikiza henda ku dibhata dia Jelubaale
Judges9:1 Abimeleke
Judges9:2 Zuelenu
Judges9:3 Jindandu ja mamʼâ anga a mu tumbula muene kala kiambe muene mu mátui ma akua Xikeme oso; miẋima iâ anga i sola kukaiela Abimekele
Judges9:4 Anga a mu bhana makuinhi sambuadi a itadi ia phalata
Judges9:5 Anga uia ni enhá bhu bhata dia tatʼâ
Judges9:6 Bhenhobho akua Xikeme oso
Judges9:7 Jotamu kia zubha ku mu kunda-kiu
Judges9:8 Sai kizuua o miẋi iele mu kuunda sobha iâ; anga ambela mudiva
Judges9:9 Kuala mudiva-phe
Judges9:10 Miẋi anga i ambela mufiku
Judges9:11 Kuala mufiku-phe
Judges9:12 Miẋi anga i ambela muvide
Judges9:13 Kuala muvide-phe
Judges9:14 Kia zubha kuzuela kiki
Judges9:15 Kuala musonge: Se kidi kiene mu ngʼunda eme mu kala sobha ienu
Judges9:16 Kiki-phe enu se ki mua bhange kia kidi
Judges9:17 Kuma tatʼetu ua mi bhángela ku ita
Judges9:18 Enu-phe kizúua kia lelu mua balukila dibhata dia tatʼetu
Judges9:19 o ki tualʼiki-phe se mua bhange muene kia kidi
Judges9:20 O ki kala-phe makutu
Judges9:21 Jotamu anga u tunda-bhu
Judges9:22 Kioso Abimeleke kia kala mu tumina Izalaiele mu mivu itatu
Judges9:23 Nzambi anga u bheka unguma bhuʼaxaxi ka Abimeleke ni akua Xikeme; akua Xikeme anga a bhanga ufe kua Abimeleke.
Judges9:24 Kienhiki kia bhiti mbebhu o ujibhanganga ua bhange muene (Abimeleke) kua anʼa Jelubaale
Judges9:25 Akua Xikeme anga a tuma ingumba
Judges9:26 Bhu kaẋiʼabha ue
Judges9:27 Anga aia ku mábhia
Judges9:28 Ngahale monʼa Hebede anga u zuela
Judges9:29 Auá! Tamanu mundu iú a dʼivile ni eme
Judges9:30 Zebule-phe
Judges9:31 Anga mu kasuekele u tuma jiphunga
Judges9:32 Zanguka-phe mu usuku
Judges9:33 o ki kúkia
Judges9:34 Abimeleke anga u balumuka ni makuenze mê moso
Judges9:35 Mu kimene Ngahale monʼa Hebede anga u kala mu kuimajana bhu muelu ua kimbaka; Abimeleke ni makuenze-mê kia mu mono
Judges9:36 Ngahale anga u a mona
Judges9:37 Ngahale u zuela lua mukuá
Judges9:38 Bhenhobho Zebule u mu ambela
Judges9:39 Ngahale anga u tuamenena akua Xikeme mu kutunda phala kubhânga ni Abimeleke.
Judges9:40 Abimeleke anga u mu bhesa lusolo
Judges9:41 Abimeleke anga u xala bhu Aluma; Zebule anga u kaia Ngahale ni jiphange jê
Judges9:42 Ki kúkia mundu anga a tunda dingi aia mu mukáu; Abimeleke anga a mu tangela-kiu.
Judges9:43 Muene anga u katula mundu uê
Judges9:44 Abimeleke ni kibuka kié aia-nê kumoxi anga a lenga a batuila akua bhata bhu muelu ua kimbaka kiâ; ibuka iiadi ia mukuá a solomona iá ala mu mukáu
Judges9:45 Abimeleke anga u lua ni dibhata kizuua kioso kienhókio
Judges9:46 Kienhiki-phe akua kathondo mu mbonge ia Xikeme kia zubha ku kʼivua
Judges9:47 Anga bhu kala athu a ki tangela Abimeleke
Judges9:48 Abimeleke anga u banda bhu thala ia mulundu ua Zalamone
Judges9:49 Ene oso anga a fikisa kia bhange muene
Judges9:50 Mu kutunda-bhu
Judges9:51 Muʼaxaxi ka dibhata anga mu kala mbonge ia matala ia lebha kipena
Judges9:52 Abimeleke anga u bhixila bhu mbonge ienhiʼii
Judges9:53 Anga bhu kala muhatu ku thandu
Judges9:54 Muene anga u ixana lusolo kibese kiê ua mu ambatela ibakatu ia ita
Judges9:55 Mala oso a akua Izalaiele kia mono kuma Abimeleke a mu jibha
Judges9:56 Kala kiki Nzambi ua bheka dingi ku thandu dia Abimeleke o kituxi kiê kia tele kua tatʼâ
Judges9:57 Kiene ue kimoxi o kituxi kia akua Xikeme Nzambi ua ki bheka dingi ku thandu diâ. Mázui ma a kuata ma a tele Jotamu monʼa Jelubaale.
Judges10:1 Kutunda mu izúua ia Abimeleke
Judges10:2 Anga u fúndisa Izalaiele mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu ni itatu
Judges10:3 Kutunda kua muene
Judges10:4 U kala ni anʼê a mala
Judges10:5 Jaile muene anga u fua
Judges10:6 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha mu mesu a Jihova
Judges10:7 Njinda ia Jihova anga i uama ku thandu dia Izalaiele
Judges10:8 Ene anga a kala mu bhana malebhu ku anʼa Izalaiele ni ku a bhondeleka
Judges10:9 Anʼa Amone anga a zaúka Njolodá
Judges10:10 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a di kola kua Jihova
Judges10:11 Jihova anga u vutuila anʼa Izalaiele
Judges10:12 Ni kia mi bhikisa akua Sidone
Judges10:13 Sumbala kiene
Judges10:14 Ndenu

Judges10:18 Bhenhobho ni mundu ni anʼa jingana mu Ngiliiade
Judges11:1 Kiki-phe Jefete mukua Ngiliiade u kala kindanda

Judges11:4 Kubhanga izuua

Judges11:8 Adiakimi a Ngiliiade anga ambela Jefete

Judges11:10 Adiakimi-phe a Ngiliiade anga ambela Jefete
Judges11:11 Bhenhobho Jefete anga uia ni adiakimi a Ngiliiade

Judges11:17 Bhenhobho Izalaiele anga a katula jiphunga jiia kua sobha ia Edomo
Judges11:18 Ku izuua anga a vutukila mu kikangalakata
Judges11:19 Izalaiele hé a tuma jiphunga kua Sihone
Judges11:20 Sihone-phe ka xikina kuʼehela Izalaiele kubhita mu mbambe iê; inda Sihone-phe ua bhongolola mundu uê uoso
Judges11:21 O Jihova phe
Judges11:22 Anga a bhingana mʼoxi ioso ia Mamodi katé bhu mbambe iê
Judges11:23 Kala kiki Jihova
Judges11:24 Eie ku bhingana ixi ioso i ku bhana nzambi ié Kemoxi ku i bhingana? Oso phe a a tubhula kuala Jihova Nzambi ietu
Judges11:25 Eie manhi ua tundu Balake
Judges11:26 Tundé bhuoso bhaná
Judges11:27 Eme-phe ki nga te kituxi ko kué
Judges11:28 Kiene kimoxi
Judges11:29 Nzambi ia Jihova u tula kua Jefete
Judges11:30 Jefete anga u di hambelela kua Jihova
Judges11:31 hinu-phe kioso ki tunda mʼonzo iami
Judges11:32 Kienhiki Jefete u sambuka kua anʼa Amone mu kúlua-nâ; Jihova anga ua bhakuila bhu lukuaku luê.
Judges11:33 Muene anga u a beta ni kijibha kionéne tundé mu Alouele katé mu kuia bhu Minite
Judges11:34 Jefete anga u vutuka bhu Mixipa bhu bhata diê; bhenhobho-ze monʼê ua muhatu u tunda mu ku mu kauidila ni isaka ni kukina; muene-phe muene monʼê ngó umoxi-elèle
Judges11:35 Mu kuiza-ku-phe
Judges11:36 Muene-phe u mu ambela
Judges11:37 Muene anga u ambela tatʼâ
Judges11:38 Uixi-phe
Judges11:39 Kia zubha-phe kubhanga mbeji jiiadi
Judges11:40 mukonda ana a ahatu mivu ioso aia jinga mu dila monʼa Jefete mukua Ngiliiade. Ku muvu ilumba ioso a mu dila mu izuua iuana.
Judges12:1 Akua Ifalaime anga a di bhongolola
Judges12:2 Jefete anga u a ambela

Judges13:1 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha ku mesu a Jihova; Jihova anga u a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua akua Fidíxia mu makuinhi auana a muvu.

Judges13:3 Anju ia Jihova anga i tukulukila o muhatu muenhú
Judges13:4 Kienhiki-phe di lange
Judges13:5 Mukonda-ze

Judges13:7 Muenhú ua ngi tangela-phe
Judges13:8 Bhenhobho Manoua usamba u dionda Jihova
Judges13:9 Nzambi anga u ívua dízui dia Manoua
Judges13:10 Muhatu anga u bhanga lusolo
Judges13:11 Manoua anga u balumuka

Judges13:14 Ka die kima ki tunda ku muvide

Judges14:1 Sansau anga u kulumuka ku Timinate; ku Timinate-phe anga u mona-ku muhatu ua tokala ku mbutu ia akua Fidíxia.
Judges14:2 O kia zubha kutunda-ku
Judges14:3 Tatʼâ-phe u mu vutuila
Judges14:4 Tatʼâ-phe ni mamʼâ ka kʼijiia kuila kia tundu kua Jihova; mukonda Sansau uala kusota bhuoso bhua kuatela mvunda ni akua Fidíxia. Mbata thembu ienhoio akua Fidíxia ene ala mu tumina Izalaiele.
Judges14:5 Ku izúua Sansau u kulumuka ku Timinate
Judges14:6 Nzumbi ia Jihova anga iza ni nguzu kua Sansau
Judges14:7 Kia zubha-phe kukulumuka
Judges14:8 Ku izúua-phe

Judges14:10 Tatʼâ kia zubha ku kulumuka kuala muhatu
Judges14:11 O kia mu mono ua mu kuiza
Judges14:12 Sansau anga ua ambela

Judges14:15 Kutula mu kizúua kia mukuá

Judges14:17 Muhatu-phe u jijila kudila bhu pholo ié mu sambuadi dia izuua ioso ia ubhanga (fesa); kutula-phe kizuua kia kasambuadi muene u mu tangela

Judges15:3 Sansau anga u a ambela
Judges15:4 Sansau anga uia

Judges15:6 Akua Fidíxia anga a zuela

Judges16:5 Jisobha ja akua Fidíxia anga jiza ku muhatu muenhú

Judges16:20 Muhatu anga u dikola u mu ambela
Judges16:21 Akua Fidíxia anga a mu kuata
Judges16:22 O jindemba jê-phe ja mu bhutu mu mútue

Judges16:24 Mundu ue kia zubha ku mu mona

Judges18:1 Mu izuua muenhomo ki muala sobha mua Izalaiele; mu izuua muenhomo-phe ue muiji ua akua Dani a kala mu sota ixi ia undundu uâ ia kutungila; kuma katé kizuua kienhokio undundu uâ ka u tambuile luua mu miiji ia Izalaiele.
Judges18:2 Anʼa Dani anga a katula ku jindandu jâ
Judges18:3 Kioso kiala bhu inzu ia Mika
Judges18:4 Muene anga u a ambela
Judges18:5 Ene anga a mu bhomba
Judges18:6 Nganga anga u a ambela
Judges18:7 Kia zubha kubhanga kiki
Judges18:8 Mala iá anga a vutuka ku akuâ
Judges18:9 Kuala ene: Balumukenu
Judges18:10 O ki muia
Judges18:11 Kienhokio anga kukatuka athu ku muiji ua akua Dani
Judges18:12 Mu kubanda anga a ta kibangu kiâ bhu Kidiate-jadimi
Judges18:13 Mu kutunda bhobho a bhita mu milundu ia Ifalaimi
Judges18:14 Bhenhobho malʼatanu a diangele kuia kulónda ixi ia Laixi
Judges18:15 Anga a bhambuka
Judges18:16 O hâma jisamanu ja mala a maneka ibhakatu ia ita
Judges18:17 Malʼatatu a diangele kuia kulónda ixi
Judges18:18 Enhá-phe kia bokona mʼonzo ia Mika iá a katula-mu o kiteka kia kuseta kióuiẋike
Judges18:19 Ene-phe a mu vutuila
Judges18:20 Nganga u sanguluka mu muẋima uê
Judges18:21 Kala kiki a tunda bhenhobho
Judges18:22 O ki edi dibhata dia Mika a di xi kiá dikanga
Judges18:23 Anga a kuata kukola-kola anʼa Dani. Ene anga a sakuka
Judges18:24 Muene-phe
Judges18:25 Anʼa Dani a mu ambela
Judges18:26 Anʼa Dani kia zubha kuzuela kiki
Judges18:27 Ene-phe
Judges18:28 Akuaʼxi ki bhuala ua tena ku a kudila
Judges18:29 Mbonge ioio anga a i luka dijina dia Dani
Judges18:30 Anʼa Dani anga a bhaka muenhomo o kitekʼokio kia iudika mesene ia kuzunza; o Jonatane monʼa Ngelexone

Judges20:1 Kienhokio ana Oso a Izalaiele hé a tunda
Judges20:2 Makotʼathu ku mundu
Judges20:3 Anʼa Bejamí anga a kiʼvua kuila anʼa Izalaiele a bande bhu Mixipa. Anʼa Izalaiele anga a zuela
Judges20:4 Levita
Judges20:5 Mala ma akua Ngibeia anga a ngi balukila
Judges20:6 Bhenhobho ngi kuata mukamʼami
Judges20:7 Talesenu-phe
Judges20:8 Mundu uoso anga a balumuka kala muthu umoxi ngó
Judges20:9 Ngibeia-phe tu i bhanga kiki: tu di tungula mu hasa
Judges20:10 Kala hâma ku tunda kuinhi dia muthu
Judges20:11 Kala kiki
Judges20:12 Miiji ia Izalaiele anga a tuma athu kuibhula mu muiji uoso ua Bejamí
Judges20:13 Kiki-phe mala enhó a sekala
Judges20:14 Inda anʼa Bejamí a tunda ku mabhata mâ
Judges20:15 Anʼa Bejamí anga a alula kizuua kienhokio
Judges20:16 O muʼaxaxi ka mundu uosʼú anga mu kala athu òtungule
Judges20:17 O mala ma akua Izalaiele oso a alula ue a tena hâma jiuana ja midi ia mala
Judges20:18 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a balumuka
Judges20:19 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a di meneka
Judges20:20 Akua Izalaiele anga a tunda mu kúlua ni Bejamí; a di ta ku mikalatata mu mukáu ua Ngibeia
Judges20:21 Anʼa Bejamí anga a tunda mu Ngibeia
Judges20:22 Mundu uoso ua ana a Izalaiele anga a di phopha a di suinisa phala kubhânga dingi
Judges20:23 Anʼa Izalaiele anga aia hanji mù dila bhu pholo ia Jihova
Judges20:24 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhixila dingi kua anʼa Bejamí mu kúlua-nâ kizuua kia kaiadi.
Judges20:25 Akua Bajamí anga a tunda mu Ngibeia mu takana-nâ
Judges20:26 Bhenhobho ana oso a Izalaiele
Judges20:27 Anʼa Izalaiele anga ebhula kua Jihova. (Kuma izuua ienhoio o álaka ia kikutu kia Nzambi ii bhobho ni Finehase monʼa Eleazale
Judges20:28 Exi: O kiki-phe tuia dingi lua mukuá mu kúlua ni anʼa Bejamí
Judges20:29 Izalaiele bhenhobho anga a bhaka athu mu ididi ia kubatamena mu jimbandu ja Sanzala ia Ngibeia.
Judges20:30 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a banda dingi kúlua ni anʼa Bejamí
Judges20:31 Anʼa Bejamí anga a tunda ue mu kúlua ni mundu
Judges20:32 Anʼa Bejamí-phe anga amba
Judges20:33 Mala oso a Izalaiele anga a balumuka kiua mu ididi iâ
Judges20:34 Kuinhi dia midi ia muthu a a nona oso mua Izalaiele
Judges20:35 Jihova anga u nemeka Bejamí bhu pholo ia Izalaiele
Judges20:36 Kala kiki anʼa Bejamí a mona kuma abhi-ku. Mbata akua Izalaiele a dianga kuenda ni kuila kala ala kulenga Bejamí
Judges20:37 Enhá a batama-phe
Judges20:38 Akua Izalaiele
Judges20:39 Akua Izalaiele anga aluluka ku ita kala ala kulenga
Judges20:40 Maji kioso-phe kia mateka dituta kubanda mu dibhata
Judges20:41 Akua Izalaiele-phe aluluka
Judges20:42 Bhenhobho anga a lunguluka mu kulenga a bhana makunda anʼa Izalaiele
Judges20:43 Kuene kuoso akua Bejamí a a kondela

Judges20:46 Kia di bhange konda
Judges20:47 Bhu kala-phe Ndànji ia Dimone

Ruth1:1 Anga ki bhita kuma
Ruth1:2 Diialʼidi dijina diê Elimeleke
Ruth1:3 Mu kubhanga izuua
Ruth1:4 Anʼê anga a sakana ahatu a akua Mouabhe
Ruth1:5 Ni Mahalone ni Kidiione anga afua ue kiiadi kiâ. Muhatu Nouemi anga u xala ngó
Ruth1:6 Nouemi anga u balumuka ni akaji a anʼê mu kutunda mʼoxi ia Mouabhe nʼa vutukise ko kuâ
Ruth1:7 Anga a katuka bhu kididi bhuoso bhuala
Ruth1:8 Mu njila kioso kia muia ni kuenda
Ruth1:9 Jihova a mi bhese kidimba
Ruth1:10 Anga a mu ambela
Ruth1:11 Nouemi-phe uixi: Ndokuenu! Vutukenu tata
Ruth1:12 Vutukenu anʼami tata
Ruth1:13 enu kifua mu a xikamena katé kia kula? kifua ene a mi fudisa kukala ni malʼenu a kusakana? Kana tata
Ruth1:14 Anga a zangula dingi mázui mâ a ta kibúlukutu ni kudila. Olofa anga u bhana ukouʼê jibeju
Ruth1:15 Muene anga u mu ambela
Ruth1:16 Lute-phe
Ruth1:17 O ixi ioso i ua ká fuila eie
Ruth1:18 O kia mu mono ua jiji muene
Ruth1:19 Kienhiki anga ela kumoxi kiiadi kiâ
Ruth1:20 Muene-phe anga uenda ni ku a ambela
Ruth1:21 Ngele ni maku ezala
Ruth1:22 Kala kiki Nouemi ua vutuka ku bhata diâ
Ruth2:1 Nouemi anga u kala ni ndandu ia munumeʼê

Ruth2:4 Bhenhobho-phe Bouaji u tunda mu Beleme
Ruth2:5 Bouaji anga u ibhula selevende iê uala mu kalakesa o jingunza
Ruth2:6 Selevende uala mu kalakesa jingunza

Ruth2:12 Jihova a ku futé-kiu kioso ki ua bhange; o kisakidilu kié ki kale kia dikota ki ku bha Jihova

Ruth2:16 Mu enda ni ku mu fomuena tuixina mu ita

Ruth2:18 Anga u i zangula

Ruth3:8 Kutula mu kaii ka usuku

Ruth3:12 Kidi muene eme ngi ndandu iazukama
Ruth3:13 Nhohena hanji bhenhabha usuku iú lelu

1Samuel1:1 Ku kala muthu mukua Lamataimu dia Zofi
1Samuel1:2 Muenhú anga u kala ni akajiʼê aiadi; umoxi dijina diê Hana
1Samuel1:3 Diialʼidi mukua kuila muvu ni muvu uia kubheza Jihova dia ifuẋi
1Samuel1:4 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel1:5 O Hana-phe u mu bhana mbandu ia mbote; mukonda ua zola Hana
1Samuel1:6 Mukajinʼê anga uia ni ku mu ondolola kiavulu phala ku mu ẋinuna nʼa kale ni dilamba
1Samuel1:7 O diiala kia kala mu kubhanga kiki mivu ioso
1Samuel1:8 Bhenhobho-phe Elikana munumiʼê anga u mu ambela
1Samuel1:9 Kienhiki Hana u balumuka mu Silo
1Samuel1:10 O muhatu mukonda kia mu ludila ku muẋima
1Samuel1:11 Anga u di hambelela
1Samuel1:12 Bhenhobho kiala kuenda ni kusamba kiki bhu pholo ia Jihova
1Samuel1:13 Kuma Hana uala kuzuela ni muẋima uê
1Samuel1:14 Eli anga u mu ambela
1Samuel1:15 Hana-phe anga u vutula
1Samuel1:16 Mubhikʼé ua muhatu ku mu fike-phe uixi monʼa kadia-phemba; mukonda dia ku di tenda kuami kuavulu
1Samuel1:17 Bhenhobho Eli u mu kumbulula
1Samuel1:18 Hana anga u mu vutuila
1Samuel1:19 Ki kúkia a di meneka
1Samuel1:20 kubhiẋila bhu thembu iê
1Samuel1:21 Diialʼidi
1Samuel1:22 Hana-phe u fula kubanda; kuma uambela munumʼie
1Samuel1:23 Elikana munumʼiê anga u mu ambela
1Samuel1:24 Kia zubha ku mu sumuna anga u banda ni mona
1Samuel1:25 Anga a jibha ngalote ia ngombe
1Samuel1:26 Ana anga u zuela
1Samuel1:27 Nga sambelele ku ngi bhana mona muenʼiú; Jihova iú ua ngi bhana ujitu uoso u nga mu bhingile.
1Samuel1:28 Mukonda dia kiki
1Samuel2:1 Hana bhenhobho anga u samba
1Samuel2:2 Ua kambe ituxi kala Jihova ka moneka
1Samuel2:3 Kana kuvudisa dingi kuzuela kuenu kua ukumbu
1Samuel2:4 Mifula ia mazonda i bukujuka
1Samuel2:5 Oso ekutile lelu ʼidi aii ku di umba mu sota kia kúdia
1Samuel2:6 Jihova muene u katula o muenhu
1Samuel2:7 Jihova u bheka muthu mu uadiama
1Samuel2:8 U zangumuna o ngadiama mu mavu
1Samuel2:9 Muene u langa inama ia athuʼê abhu o ituxi; o a ta ituxi-phe u a bheka muʼalunga mua vundu
1Samuel2:10 Oso a bhânga ni Jihova a kà tolojoka; muene u a numinina tunde mu diulu. Jihova uà fúndisa maẋokololo a jixi. Sobha iê ua kà mu bhana o nguzu ni kutumina ua kà zangeleka o kutena kua muthu uê ua mu undu ni maji.
1Samuel2:11 Kiabhiti imʼiii Elikana anga uia ku Lama ku bhata diê. O mona u xala mu xibhidila Jihova bhu pholo ia Eli

1Samuel2:13 Mukonda o kífua kia kexileku ni jinganga ni mundu
1Samuel2:14 anga a toma na-iu mu mbasinha
1Samuel2:15 Kioso ue kiluua a ximika o banha
1Samuel2:16 Muthu-phe se u kumbulula

1Samuel2:18 Samuuele anga u kala mu xibhidila bhu pholo ia Jihova
1Samuel2:19 Manhʼiâ anga u mu tungila kambinza
1Samuel2:20 Eli anga u benzela Elikana ni mukajiʼê
1Samuel2:21 Jihova anga u bhana dibesá kua Hana

1Samuel2:24 Kana tata

1Samuel2:27 Anga kuiza muthu mukua Nzambi kua Eli

1Samuel3:1 Mona Samuuele anga u kala mu xibhidila Jihova bhu pholo ia Eli. Kizuelu kia Jihova ki kia vudile ku kʼivua mu izuuʼomo; kana-ku ue kisukila kia di monekena jinga luavulu.
1Samuel3:2 Thembu ienʼoio-phe ki bhita kuila
1Samuel3:3 kioso kandeia ka Nzambi kiluua ka jima
1Samuel3:4 Jihova u ixana Samuuele; muene-phe anga u itaia
1Samuel3:5 Anga u lengela kua Eli
1Samuel3:6 Jihova anga u mu ixana luamukuá
1Samuel3:7 Samuuele-phe kejidile luua Jihova
1Samuel3:8 Jihova anga u ixana Samuuele lua katatu. Anga u balumuka
1Samuel3:9 Kienhiki Eli u ambela Samuuele
1Samuel3:10 Jihova anga uiza
1Samuel3:11 Jihova anga u ambela Samuuele uixi: Talesa nga-nda kubhanga kima mu Izalaiele
1Samuel3:12 Kuma bhu kizuua kienʼokio ngà kumbidila kua Eli ioso i nga mu tangela ia dibhata diê
1Samuel3:13 Mukonda nga mu tangela kiá kuila dibhata diê ngi di êlesa ku mivu sé dizubhilu
1Samuel3:14 Mu kienhiki nga lokela o dibhata dia Eli
1Samuel3:15 Samuuele anga u zeka katé kuáki
1Samuel3:16 Eli anga u ixana Samuuele
1Samuel3:17 Uixi: Kima kiahi kia ku tangela Jihova? Nga ku diondo
1Samuel3:18 Samuuele anga u mu tangela maka moso
1Samuel3:19 Samuuele anga uia ni ku kula
1Samuel3:20 Izalaiele ioso anga a tuma ku kʼijiia
1Samuel3:21 Jihova anga uenda ni kumoneka jinga dingi mu Silo; kuma Jihova ua di tukuluila jinga kua Samuuele
1Samuel4:1 Izalaiele-phe anga a tunda mu kúlua ita ni akua Fidíxia
1Samuel4:2 Akua Fidíxia anga a di ta ku minonono mu kúlua ni Izalaiele; o kia salumuka o ita
1Samuel4:3 O mundu kia zubha kubhongoloka dingi bhu kibangu kiâ
1Samuel4:4 Kienhiki mundu a tuma athu ku Silo
1Samuel4:5 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel4:6 Akua Fidíxia ki evu o kudikola
1Samuel4:7 Akua Fidíxia anga a kala ni uoma
1Samuel4:8 Kokolo dietu! Nanhi u tu kudila bhu maku a jinzambi jiji jasuina? Jiji jene o jinzambi ja betele akua Ijitu ni mabhebhu moso mu kikangalakata.
1Samuel4:9 Kolenu maku
1Samuel4:10 Akua Fidíxia anga a bhânga ni nguzu ioso
1Samuel4:11 Alaka ia Nzambi anga a i tambula; anʼaiadi a Eli
1Samuel4:12 Anga bhu kala diiala mukua muiji ua Bejamí
1Samuel4:13 Kia zubha kutula
1Samuel4:14 Eli ki evu o dízui dia kudila
1Samuel4:15 Eli-phe kiene kialʼiki
1Samuel4:16 O diialʼidi anga u jimbuila Eli
1Samuel4:17 Eli uixi-phe: Kia bhiti kiebhi
1Samuel4:18 Bhenhobho anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel4:19 Mukajiʼa monʼê-phe
1Samuel4:20 Kithangana kia kala mu kúfua
1Samuel4:21 Mona anga u mu luka Ikabode
1Samuel4:22 Xi! Uixi: Mukonda álaka ia Nzambi a i tambula
1Samuel5:1 Kiki-phe akua Fidíxia a tambula álaka ia Nzambi
1Samuel5:2 Akua Fidíxia anga a kuata álaka ia Nzambi
1Samuel5:3 Ki kúkia ni kimeme
1Samuel5:4 Kia balumuka dingi mu kimene
1Samuel5:5 Mukonda dia kiki jinganga ja Dangoni
1Samuel5:6 O lukuaku lua Jihova phe anga lu nemena ku thandu dia akua Ajindodi
1Samuel5:7 O mala ma akua Ajindode kia zubha ku ki mona
1Samuel5:8 Anga a tuma kubhongolola o jisobha joso ja akua Fidíxia
1Samuel5:9 Anga a bheka álaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele kuenhoko. Kia zubha-phe ku i sondolola
1Samuel5:10 Kienhiki a tumikisa álaka ia Nzambi ku Ekolone. Mu kubhiẋila-phe ni álaka ia Nzambi ku Ekolone
1Samuel5:11 Mukonda dia kiki a tuma kubhongolola dingi jisobha joso ja akua Fidíxia
1Samuel5:12 Oso a kambe kúfua
1Samuel6:1 Alaka ia Jihova anga i kala mʼoxi ia akua Fidíxia sambuadi dia mbeji.

1Samuel6:3 Ene exi: Se mu tumikisa álaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele
1Samuel6:4 Ene-phe
1Samuel6:5 Kienhiki-phe bhangenu idifua ia mabhumbu menu
1Samuel6:6 Mu kolela-hi muxima kala kia kolele muxima ua akua Ijitu ni Falaó a kolesele muxima uâ? Muene Nzambi ia Izalaiele
1Samuel6:7 Kiki-phe mu kuata hé mu iudika dikalu dia ubhe
1Samuel6:8 Anga mu katula álaka ia Jihova
1Samuel6:9 Anga mu tala kiá; se i bandela njila ia mbámbe iê muene katé bhu Bete-seme
1Samuel6:10 Mala enhó anga a ki bhanga
1Samuel6:11 Anga a ta álaka ia Jihova ku thandu dia dikalu
1Samuel6:12 Jingombe anga ji kuata njila iaiuka ditônono
1Samuel6:13 Ene-phe akua Bete-seme a kala mu muna tiliku iâ mu honga izuua ienhoio; o kia zambula mesu
1Samuel6:14 Dikalu anga di bhixila mu díbhia dia Josuué mukua Beteseme
1Samuel6:15 Jilevita anga ji tulula álaka ia Jihova
1Samuel6:16 O jisobha jitanu ja akua Fidíxia
1Samuel6:17 Ene o mabhumbu ma ulu ma vutula akua Fidíxia
1Samuel6:18 ni tundôndo tua ulu
1Samuel6:19 Muene Jihova anga u beta akua Bete-seme
1Samuel6:20 Akua Bete-seme anga a zuela
1Samuel6:21 Anga a tuma jiphunga ku akua Kidiate-jadime a ambela
1Samuel7:1 Kienhokio mala a akua Kidiate-Jadime anga eza
1Samuel7:2 A nga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel7:3 Samuuele anga u zuela ni muiji uoso ua Izalaiele
1Samuel7:4 Kienhokio anʼa Izalaiele anga a tubhula ni Jibaale ni Axitalote
1Samuel7:5 Samuuele anga u zuela dingi
1Samuel7:6 Anga a bhongoloka bhu Mixipa
1Samuel7:7 Akua Fidíxia-phe ki evu kuila anʼa Izalaiele a bhongolokela bhu Mixipa
1Samuel7:8 Anʼa Izalaiele anga ambela Samuuele
1Samuel7:9 Samuuele anga u kuata kambudi hanji kala mu kuámua
1Samuel7:10 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel7:11 Mala ma Izalaiele-phe anga a tunda bhu Mixipa a kaia akua Fidíxia
1Samuel7:12 Samuuele anga u katula ditadi u dʼimika bhu kaẋi ka Mixipa ni Sene
1Samuel7:13 Kienhiki akua Fidíxia a toloka
1Samuel7:14 Mabhata moso ma Izalaiele ma tambuile kuala akua Fidíxia
1Samuel7:15 Samuuele anga u kala mufundixi ua kufúndisa Izalaiele izuua ioso ia muenhu uê.
1Samuel7:16 Mivu ioso ua kexe mu kuila u kondoloka ku Betele ni ku Jidingale ni ku Mixipa; anga u fúndisa Izalaiele mu ididi ioso ioio.
1Samuel7:17 Mu kuvutuka-phe uiza bhu Lama
1Samuel8:1 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel8:2 Thungunu iê dijina diê Jouele
1Samuel8:3 Anʼé-phe anga a fula kuendela mu njila jê
1Samuel8:4 Kienhokio adiakimi oso a Izalaiele a di bhongolola kumoxi
1Samuel8:5 anga a mu ambela
1Samuel8:6 Hundu ienhiʼii-phe i iibhila Samuuele
1Samuel8:7 Jihova anga u ambela Samuuele
1Samuel8:8 Kia kaiela mu imbamba iâ ioso iene kubhanga
1Samuel8:9 Kiki-phe a evue dizui diâ; maji eie-phe ua a ambela kidi kioso
1Samuel8:10 Samuuele anga u kunda mundu uoso a mu bhingi sobha
1Samuel8:11 Anga uamba
1Samuel8:12 Momuenu ua kà tumbika-mu jikabhitangu jitumina jimidi
1Samuel8:13 Anʼenu a ahatu ue ua kà a tambula mu kala jikidiiada jê ja kuiudika nguendu ia dizumba
1Samuel8:14 Ni mábhia menu
1Samuel8:15 Ni jimbutu jenu
1Samuel8:16 U mi tambula ue abhikʼenu a mala ni abhikenu a ahatu
1Samuel8:17 Ku ibhaku ienu u tambula-ku dijimu; enʼuenu mu kala mu kala mu abhikʼê.
1Samuel8:18 Mua kà dikola kizuua kienokio
1Samuel8:19 Mundu-phe aditunu dízui dia Samuuele; exi: Kana; tu kala muene ni sobha i tu tumina
1Samuel8:20 phala tu sokele ni akua jixi jamukuá
1Samuel8:21 Samuuele anga u ivua maka mosoʼama
1Samuel8:22 Jihova anga ambela Samuuele
1Samuel9:1 Kienhiki ku kala muthu
1Samuel9:2 Muenhú anga u kala ni monʼê ua diiala
1Samuel9:3 Tatʼâ Kiji anga u kala ni jibûlu ja mu jimbila. Kiji anga u ambela monʼê Saúlo
1Samuel9:4 Anga u bhita mu milundu mu ixi ia Ifalaime
1Samuel9:5 O kieza mʼoxi ia Sufe
1Samuel9:6 Mukua-mbèle anga u mu ambela
1Samuel9:7 Saúlo-phe u ambela mukua mbèle iê
1Samuel9:8 Mukua-mbèle anga u kumbulula
1Samuel9:9 Mʼokulu-phe mu Izalaiele
1Samuel9:10 Saúlo bhenhobho u ambela mukua-mbèle iê
1Samuel9:11 Mu kubanda-phe bhu thala ia mbonge
1Samuel9:12 Anʼa ilumba a kumbulula
1Samuel9:13 Mua-nda kuila mu tukuluka ngó mu nzunga
1Samuel9:14 Anga a banda mu mbonge; o kia zubha kutula mu mbonge
1Samuel9:15 Jihova-phe ua diangele kulongesa Samuuele
1Samuel9:16 Mungu mu kumbi kala mumu nga-nda ku ku tumikisa muthu
1Samuel9:17 Samuuele-phe kioso kia mono Saúlo
1Samuel9:18 Bhenhobho Saúlo anga u zukama kua Samuuele bhu dibokuenu dia bhata
1Samuel9:19 Samuuele anga u vutuila Saúlo
1Samuel9:20 O jibûlu-phe jedi lelu tatu tunde ki ja jimbila
1Samuel9:21 Saúlo anga u kumbulula
1Samuel9:22 Samuuele anga u tambulula Saúlu
1Samuel9:23 Samuuele anga u ambela mulambi ua kexi kulamba
1Samuel9:24 Mulambi anga u katula kinama kia thulu ni xitu iala-ku
1Samuel9:25 Kia zubha kutunda ku thala kuenhoko
1Samuel9:26 Ki kúkia mu kimenemene
1Samuel9:27 O kia zubha kukulumuka katé bhua suku o dibhata
1Samuel10:1 Bheneʼobho Samuuele anga u sunga thenda ia maji
1Samuel10:2 Ki ua-nda ku ngi xia bhabha lelu
1Samuel10:3 Monʼami olʼiii a mu bhange kiebhi? Mu Kutunda bhobho
1Samuel10:4 A kà ku menekena
1Samuel10:5 Kutunda bhobho ua kà bhita kalundu ka Nzambi
1Samuel10:6 Bheneʼobho-phe Nzumbi ia Jihova ua kà tula ni nguzu ku thandu dié
1Samuel10:7 Ki ua kà mona-phe kuma ijimbuete iii ia ku bhiti
1Samuel10:8 Ua kà ngi tuamenena mu kulumuka ku Jidingale; nga kà ku sanga kuenhoko
1Samuel10:9 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel10:10 O kia bhixila bhu kalundu
1Samuel10:11 Bhenhobho athu a mu ijiia mʼokulu kia mu mono
1Samuel10:12 Mukua-bhata uamukuá anga u kumbulula
1Samuel10:13 O Saúlo kia zubha kuzuela ni unanji ua upolofeta
1Samuel10:14 Sekulu a Saúlo anga u mu ibhula
1Samuel10:15 Sekuluʼê anga u mu ambela
1Samuel10:16 Saúlo anga u ambela sekuluʼê
1Samuel10:17 Samuuele anga u bhongolola mundu uoso kua Jihova
1Samuel10:18 angu u ambela anʼa Izalaiele
1Samuel10:19 Enu-phe kizuua kia lelu mua ditunu Nzambi ienu uene ku mi kudila mu mavuua menu moso ni mu malamba menu; mua mu ambela
1Samuel10:20 O Samuuele anga u zukamesa miiji ioso ia Izalaiele
1Samuel10:21 Anga u zukamesa muiji ua Bejamí mu jifamília jê
1Samuel10:22 Kienhiki ebhula dingi kua Jihova
1Samuel10:23 Anga a lenga
1Samuel10:24 Samuuele anga u ambela mundu uoso
1Samuel10:25 Samuuele anga u ambela mundu kioso kia tokala kuenda o utuminu ua sobha
1Samuel10:26 Saúlo ue anga uia ku bhata diê bhu Ngibeia; anga ku mu kaiela kibuka kia mala
1Samuel10:27 Bhu kala-phe ue ni anʼa Kadiaphemba
1Samuel11:1 Kioso ki bhua bhiti mbeji
1Samuel11:2 Nahaxi mukua Amone anga ua vutuila
1Samuel11:3 Adiakimi akua Jabezi anga a mu ambela
1Samuel11:4 Jiphunga anga ji tula bhu Ngibeia dia Saúlo
1Samuel11:5 Talesa-phe
1Samuel11:6 Nzumbi ia Nzambi anga u tula ni nguzu ku thandu dia Saúlo kievu makʼama
1Samuel11:7 Anga u kuata phadi ia jingombe
1Samuel11:8 Anga u a kuata konda bhu Bezeke; anʼa Izalaiele a tena hâma jitatu ja jimidi
1Samuel11:9 Anga ambela jiphunga jeza
1Samuel11:10 Akua Jabezi anga a zuela
1Samuel11:11 Ki kúkia-phe Saúlo u uanununa mundu mu ibuka itatu
1Samuel11:12 Mundu anga ambela Samuuele
1Samuel11:13 Saúlo-phe
1Samuel11:14 Samuuele anga u ambela mundu
1Samuel11:15 Mundu uoso anga a katuka aia bhu Jidingale; Saúlo a mu hingisa ungana bhebhobho bhu pholo ia Jihova
1Samuel12:1 Samuuele anga u ambela Izalaiele ioso
1Samuel12:2 Kiki-phe talenu
1Samuel12:3 Emʼiú: anuenu bhanenu umbangi bhu plo ia Jihova
1Samuel12:4 Ene a mu vutuila
1Samuel12:5 Muene u a ambela
1Samuel12:6 Samuuele anga u ambela o mundu
1Samuel12:7 Kiki-phe imanenu
1Samuel12:8 Jakobo kioso kia kulumuka mu Ijito
1Samuel12:9 Ene-phe anga a jimba Jihova
1Samuel12:10 Ene anga a dikola kua Jihova
1Samuel12:11 Kienhokio-phe Jihova anga u tumikisa Jelubaale
1Samuel12:12 Maji o ki mua mono-phe Nahaxi
1Samuel12:13 Kiki-phe talenu sobha ienu mua mu solo iú
1Samuel12:14 Se mu kala ni uoma ua Jihova
1Samuel12:15 Maji phe se mu kamba kuíva o dizui dia Jihova
1Samuel12:16 Kiki-phe imanenu
1Samuel12:17 Ngi dikola-phe kua Jihova phala a tumikise o inuminu ni mvula; phala mu kʼijiie nda mu mone kuma kubhukumuka kuenu kua vulu ku mua bhange mu mesu ma Jihova
1Samuel12:18 Bhenhobho Samuuele anga u dikola kua Jihova; Jihova anga u tumikisa inuminu ni mvula kizuua kienʼokio. Mundu uoso anga a kala kiavulu ni uoma ua Jihova
1Samuel12:19 Mundu uoso anga ambela Samuuele
1Samuel12:20 Samuuele-phe u ambela o mundu
1Samuel12:21 Kana kuabhuka mu kukaiela mahamba
1Samuel12:22 Mbata Jihova ka ẋikina ku ambudisa mundu uê
1Samuel12:23 Eme bhabha ue
1Samuel12:24 Kima kimoxi ngó: kolokotenu kukala ni uoma ua Jihova
1Samuel12:25 Se mu jijila-phe kubhanga ima ia kubhukumuka
1Samuel13:1 Saulo-phe ki eza ku ungana
1Samuel13:2 Saúlo u nona midi jitatu ja mala mu Izalaiele
1Samuel13:3 Jonata anga u beta kú mazu a xibhata o poxto ia akua Fidíxia bhu Jibeia; akua Fidíxia anga a kʼivua. Saúlo anga u xikisa koloneta mʼoxi ioso ia Izalaiele
1Samuel13:4 Izalaiele ioso anga evua hundu kuma Saúlo ua beta ku mazu a xibhata o poxto ia akua Fidíxia
1Samuel13:5 Akua Fidíxia ue anga a di bhongolola mu kúlua ni Izalaiele
1Samuel13:6 Mala ma akua Izalaiele-phe kia mono kuma ala bhu kíbhidi
1Samuel13:7 Jihebeleu jamukuá ja zaúka ku sámbua dia Njolodá kʼoxi ia Ngade ni Ngiliiade. Saúlo-phe hanji uala bhu Jidingale
1Samuel13:8 Saúlo anga u kinga mu sambuadi dia izuua
1Samuel13:9 Saúlo anga u amba
1Samuel13:10 Kioso-phe kia zubha kusata o sata ia kuoha
1Samuel13:11 Samuuele anga u zuela
1Samuel13:12 ngixi-phe: Akua Fidíxia a-ndu ngi lundumukina bhabha bhu Jidingale
1Samuel13:13 Samuuele anga u ambela Saúlo
1Samuel13:14 Kiki-phe o utuminu ué ki ua-nda kunanga. Jihova ua di sotela kiá muthu ua mu zelela ku muẋima uê
1Samuel13:15 Samuuele anga u balumuka
1Samuel13:16 Ni Saúlo-phe ni monʼê Jonata
1Samuel13:17 Akua kubhûnda anga a tunda bhu kibangu kia akua Fidíxia
1Samuel13:18 kibuka kiamukuá kʼila njila ia Beteholone; kibuka kiamukuá kʼila njila ia mbámbe
1Samuel13:19 Thembu ienhiʼii mʼoxi ioso ia Izalaiele ki muala muthu ukala musudi-athumba; kuma akua Fidíxia
1Samuel13:20 Mukonda dia kienhiki akua Izalaiele-phe anga a kala mu kulumuka ku akua Fidíxia
1Samuel13:21 Kienhókio iá a kexi ni ma-dima mâ ma kuzuikila matemu
1Samuel13:22 Mukonda dia kiki
1Samuel13:23 Kibuka kia akua Fidíxia anga a ta upoxto uâ bhu phaka ia Mikimaxi.
1Samuel14:1 Anga bhu kala kizuua
1Samuel14:2 Saúlo-phe ua tula ku hota ia Ngibeia
1Samuel14:3 Ni Ahija monʼa Ahitube
1Samuel14:4 O bhu jiphaka-phe bhua-lu bhitila Jonata mu sota kuzaúka ku sámbua bhualela o poxto ia akua Fidíxia
1Samuel14:5 Ndánji imoxi iemanena ku mbandu ia norte bhua lulama ni Mikimaxi
1Samuel14:6 Jonata anga u ambela kibese kiê kia mu mu ambatela o ibhakatu ia ita
1Samuel14:7 Kibese kiê anga u mu ambela
1Samuel14:8 Jónata-phe anga u mu ambela
1Samuel14:9 Ene kia kèla: Imanenu bhobho tu mi sange; etu-phe tu imana bhu kididi kietu
1Samuel14:10 Kia kèla-phe: Bhiẋilenu kunu; etu-phe tu a bhiẋila muene
1Samuel14:11 Ene kiiadi kiâ anga a di tukuluila bhu poxto ia akua Fidíxia: akua Fidixia anga a zuela
1Samuel14:12 Mala ala bhu poxto anga a kumuna Jonata ni kibese kiê
1Samuel14:13 Jónata anga u sambela ni kuavula ku maku ni inama
1Samuel14:14 O kibetu kiki mu kumateka-kê
1Samuel14:15 Anga bhu kala kuteketa bhu kibangu kia akua Fidíxia
1Samuel14:16 Makuenze a Saúlu-phe ala ku ilangidilu mu Ngibeia ia Bejamí
1Samuel14:17 Saúlu anga u zuelela o mundu ualanau u a tangela
1Samuel14:18 Saúlu anga u ambela Ahija
1Samuel14:19 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel14:20 Ni Saúlu-phe
1Samuel14:21 Kienhokio-phe ni Jihebeleu ue mʼokulu a zuamene ku akua Fidíxia
1Samuel14:22 Kiene kimoxi ue ni akua Izalaiele oso a suamene mu milundu ia Ifalaíme
1Samuel14:23 Kienhiki Jihova ua bhulula Izalaiele mu kizuua kienʼokio
1Samuel14:24 Mala ma akua Izalaiele anga a tata kizuua kienʼokio; a iokojoka ni kihongo kia nzala mukonda Saúlo o mundu ua u tendelela ni kuloka
1Samuel14:25 Mundu uoso uenhó anga a bhita mu ditutu diala ni uiki bhoxi.
1Samuel14:26 Mundu kia bokona mu ditutu
1Samuel14:27 Jonata-phe ka kʼivu
1Samuel14:28 Muthu ku mundu anga u mu kumuna
1Samuel14:29 Jonata-phe uixi: Tatʼetu ua tatesa oxi: talesenu eme mu mesu mua ngi zele
1Samuel14:30 Kuambe dingi se o mundu a dile kiambote ku kúdia kua bhûndu ku jinguma jâ; akua Fidíxia hinu tua a bûba kiengi.
1Samuel14:31 Anga a beta akua Fidíxia mu kizuua kienʼokio tunde bhu Mikimaxi katé ku Aihalone. Mundu anga a bhuila muene kiavulu
1Samuel14:32 Anga a di lunduluila mu kubhunda ibhaku ku jinguma ni kuhama
1Samuel14:33 Anga a ki ambela Saúlo
1Samuel14:34 Saúlo anga u a ambela
1Samuel14:35 Saúlo anga u tunga kalatódio ka Jihova bhenhobho; kene kalatódio ka dianga muene kutungila Jihova.
1Samuel14:36 Saúlo anga u a ambela o mundu
1Samuel14:37 Saúlo anga u ibhula kua Nzambi
1Samuel14:38 Saúlo anga u zuela
1Samuel14:39 Saúlo anga u loka
1Samuel14:40 Muene anga u ambela Izalaiela ioso
1Samuel14:41 Saúlo anga uila kua Jihova
1Samuel14:42 Saúlo anga uila
1Samuel14:43 Saúlo bhenhobho anga u ambela Jonata
1Samuel14:44 Saúlo anga u zuela
1Samuel14:45 Mundu anga ambela Saúlo
1Samuel14:46 Saúlo anga u vutuka mu kaiela akua Fidíxia; aku Fidíxia anga a bhiẋila ko kuâ.
1Samuel14:47 Kienhiki Saúlo kia zubha kutambula ungana ua Izalaiele
1Samuel14:48 Anga u bhanga uzonda
1Samuel14:49 Anʼa Saúlo-phe a mala eneʼá: Jonata
1Samuel14:50 Mukajiʼa Saúlo dijina diê Ahinouamu monʼa Ahimaze. O Kabhitangu ka kifuẋi kiê
1Samuel14:51 Mukonda o Kiji tatʼâ Saúlo
1Samuel14:52 Anga kukala ita iatema ni akua Fidíxia izuua ioso ia muenhu ua Saúlo. Saúlo anga u kala mu kuila uoso diiala dia nguzu a mu mono
1Samuel15:1 Samuuele anga u ambela Saúlo
1Samuel15:2 Eme Jihova dia ifuẋi
1Samuel15:3 Kiki-phe ndeie
1Samuel15:4 Saúlo anga u kasa mundu
1Samuel15:5 Saúlo kia bhiẋila bhua zukama ni mbanza ia Amaleke
1Samuel15:6 Saúlo anga u ambela akua Kene
1Samuel15:7 Saúlo anga u beta akua Amaleke ku mazu a xibhata tunde ku Havila katé mu kuia ku Xudi
1Samuel15:8 Anga u kuata Akake sobha ia akua Amaleke
1Samuel15:9 Ni Saúlo-phe ni mundu anga a lendukila Akake
1Samuel15:10 Kia bhiti imʼiii
1Samuel15:11 Nga dielesa kiá o kuta Saúlu ku ungana
1Samuel15:12 Ki kúkia ni kimene Samuuele u dimeneka mu kubatuila Saúlo. Samuuele anga a mu kunda
1Samuel15:13 Samuuele anga u mu kaiela kunhoko hé u bhiẋila bhuala Saúlo
1Samuel15:14 Samuuele-phe
1Samuel15:15 Saúlo-phe
1Samuel15:16 Samuuele anga u ambela Saúlo
1Samuel15:17 Samuuele uixi: Sumbala eie ua tolele ku mesu mé eʼmuene
1Samuel15:18 Jihova-phe iú ua ku tumu njila iii
1Samuel15:19 Kima kiahi-phe kia ku kambesa kutumaka o dízui dia Jihova
1Samuel15:20 Saúlo anga u ambela Sammuuele
1Samuel15:21 Maji o mundu-phe ene a bhûndu
1Samuel15:22 Samuuele-phe
1Samuel15:23 Kuma o kuxibhaka mukuâ ni kituxi kia uoloji; o kubhukumuka
1Samuel15:24 Saúlo anga u ambela Samuuele
1Samuel15:25 O kiki-phe
1Samuel15:26 Samuuele anga u ambela Saúlo
1Samuel15:27 O Samuuele-phe kia lunguluka iu ua bhana dikunda kua Saúlo phala kuiʼê
1Samuel15:28 Kienhoko Samuuele anga u mu ambela
1Samuel15:29 O Kutende ió ua di bhana muene fuma ia Izalaiele
1Samuel15:30 Muene bhenhobho uixi: Nga te kituxi; kiki-phe ngi bhange kia ngó ujitu
1Samuel15:31 Kienhiki Samuuele hé u vutuka dingi
1Samuel15:32 Samuuele anga u zuela
1Samuel15:33 Samuuele-phe
1Samuel15:34 Kia zubha kubhita imʼiii
1Samuel15:35 Tundé kiá bhu Kizuua kienhókio
1Samuel16:1 Jihova anga u ambela Samuuele uixi: Ua-nda kusuka bhebhi ni kudila Saúlo
1Samuel16:2 Samuuele-phe
1Samuel16:3 Ua kèxana Jese ku sata
1Samuel16:4 Samuuele anga u bhanga kioso kia mu ambela Jihova
1Samuel16:5 Muene uixi: Paze iene; ngeza mu satela Jihova. Di bônzienu
1Samuel16:6 Anga ki bhita kuila kia zubha ene oso kubokona
1Samuel16:7 Jihova-phe u ambela Samuuele
1Samuel16:8 Jese bhenhobho anga u ixana Abinadabe
1Samuel16:9 Jese anga u bhitisa-bhu ue Xama. Samuuele uixi-phe: Iú ue ki muene a mu tungula kuala Jihova.
1Samuel16:10 Kienhókio Jese anga u bhangesa kuila o sambuadi dioso dia mona a mu tokala u a bhitisa bhu pholo ia Samuuele. Samuuele anga u ambela Jese
1Samuel16:11 Samuuele anga u ambela Jese
1Samuel16:12 Anga u tuma ku mu takana. Muene-phe ua kusuluka kiambote
1Samuel16:13 Samuuele bhenhobho u sunga lumbinga lua maji
1Samuel16:14 Nzumbi ia Jihova anga kua Saúlo i tunda-ku; anga bhu kala nzumbi iaiibha ia tundu kua Jihova hé i kala mu mu kuatesa uoma.
1Samuel16:15 Akua mbèle ia Saúlo anga a mu ambela
1Samuel16:16 Muadiʼami
1Samuel16:17 Saúlo anga u zuela
1Samuel16:18 Dikuenze diê diamukuá anga u kumbulula
1Samuel16:19 Mukonda dia kiki Saúlo u tuma jiphunga kua Jese
1Samuel16:20 Jese anga u kuata bûlu iê u i longa
1Samuel16:21 Kienhiki Davidi anga uiza kua Saúlo
1Samuel16:22 Saúlo anga u tuma kuambela Jese
1Samuel16:23 Anga aia ni kuila o nzumbi iaiibha ki i tunda kua Nzambi se i kuata Saúlo
1Samuel17:1 Kiki-phe akua Fídixia a bhongolola dingi ilombo iâ mu kúlua ita; anga a bhongolokela bhu Soko
1Samuel17:2 Saúlo ni mala ma akua Izalaiele anga a bhongoloka uâ
1Samuel17:3 Aku Fidíxia anga emana ku mulundu ku sámbua dimoxi
1Samuel17:4 Bhu kibangu kia akua Fidíxia anga bhu tunda dizonda
1Samuel17:5 Ku mútue ua zuata kapasete ka ngôndo iólunge ni utadi uengi
1Samuel17:6 Mu inama u zuata jixapa ja ngôndo
1Samuel17:7 O mubhinhi ua dionga diê u soka ni muẋi ua mulongo
1Samuel17:8 Anga u imana
1Samuel17:9 Se muene ua tena kubhânga ni eme
1Samuel17:10 Mukua Fidíxia muenhú anga u zuela dingi
1Samuel17:11 Saúlophe ni Izalaiele ioso
1Samuel17:12 Davidi-phe monʼa mukua Efalata mu Beleme ku Juda
1Samuel17:13 Anʼê atatu a makota kienhiki aii ni Saúlo ku ita. Anʼatatu aii ku ita
1Samuel17:14 Davidi kifua kasule kâ; o makota kitatu a kaiela Saúlo.
1Samuel17:15 Davidi anga u kala mu kuila
1Samuel17:16 Mukua Fidíxia muenhú anga u kala mu tunda jinga kimeme ni ngoloxi
1Samuel17:17 Kizuua kimoxi Jese anga u ambela monʼê Davidi
1Samuel17:18 O kuinhi dia hejuʼidi u di bhekela kaphitangu ka jimidi jâ
1Samuel17:19 Thembu iii ni Saúlo
1Samuel17:20 Kúkia ni kimene Davidi anga u dimeneka
1Samuel17:21 Ni Izalaiele ni akua Fidíxia a di ta ku monono
1Samuel17:22 Davidi anga u xa muhamba uê kua iú ua tambula konda ia imbamba
1Samuel17:23 Davidi kioso-phe kiala kuzuela ni phange jê
1Samuel17:24 Bhenhobho mala ma izalaiele oso kia mu mono
1Samuel17:25 Mala ma Izalaiele anga a zuela
1Samuel17:26 Davidi anga u zuela ni mala a mu imanena
1Samuel17:27 Mundu anga a mu kumbulula kiki
1Samuel17:28 Bhenhobho kota diê Eliiaba u mu ivua kioso kiala kuzuela ni athu
1Samuel17:29 Davidi-phe uixi: Nga te kituxi kiahi? Ngebhulʼami ngó lumoxi luene.
1Samuel17:30 Anga u sondoloka bhuala phangʼiê
1Samuel17:31 O athu ki evu kioso kiala kuzuela Davidi
1Samuel17:32 Davidi anga u ambela Saúlo
1Samuel17:33 Saúlo anga u ambela Davidi
1Samuel17:34 Davidi anga u ambela Saúlu
1Samuel17:35 anga ngi i kaia
1Samuel17:36 Eme ngi mubhikʼé
1Samuel17:37 Davidi
1Samuel17:38 Saúlo anga u zuika Davidi ibakatu iê
1Samuel17:39 Davidi anga u maneka xibhata ku thandu dia mbinza iii
1Samuel17:40 Anga u kuata dikoue diê bhu lukuaku
1Samuel17:41 Mukua Fidíxia anga uiza ni kuzukama kua Davidi; o kibese kiê ua mu ambatela ngubu
1Samuel17:42 Mukua Fidíxia-phe ki edi suí
1Samuel17:43 Mukua Fidíxia anga u ambela Davidi
1Samuel17:44 Mukua Fidíxia anga u ambela Davidi
1Samuel17:45 Davidi bhenhobho u ambela mukua Fidíxia
1Samuel17:46 Lelu muene Jihova ua-nda ku kubhakula bhu lukuaku luami; ngi ku nemeka
1Samuel17:47 O mundu uoso iú ua bhongoloka bhabha nda u ijiie ue kuila Jihova ka bhulula ni xibhata mba sosá
1Samuel17:48 Bhenhobho anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel17:49 Davidi anga u ta lukuaku mu mbuenge iê; u katula-mu ditadi dimoxi
1Samuel17:50 Kienʼiki Davidi kia lende o mukua Fidíxia
1Samuel17:51 Davidi anga u lenga
1Samuel17:52 Mala ma akua Izalaiela ni Juda anga a balumuka ni ku ta nzòngo ia kibulukutu kia ita
1Samuel17:53 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe ki a vutuka mu kukaia akua Fidíxia
1Samuel17:54 Davidi anga u zangula mútue ua mukua Fidíxia u u ambata
1Samuel17:55 Saúlu kia mono Davidi kutunda mù kuia kubhanga ni mukua Fidíxia
1Samuel17:56 Kuala sobha: Ibhula mba munzangala iú monʼa nanhi?
1Samuel17:57 Davidi-phe kia vutuka mu kujibha mukua Fidíxia
1Samuel17:58 Saúlo anga u mu ibhula

1Samuel18:4 Mukonda dia kienʼiki
1Samuel18:5 Davidi anga uia ni ku tunda kuoso kua mu tumu Saúlo

1Samuel19:1 Saúlo anga u ambela monʼê Jonata ni jiselevende jê joso kuila a jibhe Davidi. Jonata-phe
1Samuel19:2 Jonata anga u tangela Davidi
1Samuel19:3 Eme-phe mungu ngi tunda ni tatʼetu
1Samuel19:4 Jónata bhenhobo u tumbula Davidi kiambote kua Saúlu tatʼâ
1Samuel19:5 Kuma muene muenhu uê ka u suu
1Samuel19:6 Saúlo anga u ívua dízui dia Jonata; Saúlo anga u loka
1Samuel19:7 Jonata anga u ixana Davidi
1Samuel19:8 Anga ku kala dingi ita: Davidi anga u tunda
1Samuel19:9 O nzumbi iaiibha-phe anga i tunda kua Jihova hé i kala ku thandu dia Saúlo. Kioso kia xikama mʼonzo iê
1Samuel19:10 Saúlo anga u sota kukuba Davidi nʼa mu batele ku mutôto ni sosa. Saúlo kia takula o sosa
1Samuel19:11 Maji Saúlo u tuma athu kʼonzo ia Davidi
1Samuel19:12 Kienhiki Mikala u kuatekesa Davidi

1Samuel19:14 Saúlo-phe kia tumu athu kukuata Davidi

1Samuel19:19 Anga a ki jimbuila Saúlo
1Samuel19:20 Kia zubha-phe kusanga o kilunga kia jipolofete ala mu ximana ni kutanga uanji ua upolofeta
1Samuel19:21 Kia ki jimbuila Saúlo

1Samuel20:19 Mu kizuua kia katatu-phe

1Samuel20:23 Ku kima-phe kioso ki tua bangana

1Samuel20:27 Ki kúkia-phe kia zubha mbeji kuthethama

1Samuel20:32 Jonata anga u vutuila Saúlu
1Samuel20:33 Saúlo anga u mu zengela sosa iê phala ku mu toma na-iu; Jonata anga u xala ni ku kʼijiia kuma tatʼâ ua bhindamena muene kujibha Davidi.

1Samuel20:38 Jonata anga u kolela dingi kaiala
1Samuel20:39 Kaiala-phe kʼejiia kima. Jonata ni Davidi ene ngó a kʼijiia.

1Samuel25:4 Davidi ku mikáu iakukuta kuoso kuala
1Samuel25:5 Davidi anga u katula kuinhi dia munzangala
1Samuel25:6 mua kà mu ambela kiki: Tana-ku
1Samuel25:7 Kikiphe ngevu kuma ua kase abhuti mu bhata dié; abidi é-phe tua kexe-nâ buamoxi mu iangu
1Samuel25:8 Ibhula minzangala ié
1Samuel25:9 Minzangala ia Davidi anga eza
1Samuel25:10 Nabale anga u vutuila makuenze a Davidi

1Samuel25:14 Munzangala umoxi-phe u kunda Abingaile
1Samuel25:15 Mala enhó-phe a tu bhangele mbote iavulu
1Samuel25:16 Ene kifua a kexile kimbaka kietu kia ku tu xitila mu usuku ni mu muanha
1Samuel25:17 Kiki-phe eie ijiia na-kiu
1Samuel25:18 Abingaile anga u bhanga lusolo
1Samuel25:19 Muene anga u ambela minzalngala iê
1Samuel25:20 Mu kuenda kiki
1Samuel25:21 Davidi-phe uambele
1Samuel25:22 Nzambi a ki bhange ku jinguma ja Davidi

1Samuel25:24 Anga uiza u fukama bhu inama iê
1Samuel25:25 Nga ku diondo

1Samuel25:29 Sumbala se bhu kala muthu ua balumuka mu ku ku landameka

1Samuel25:31 ki kia kà kala-phe dingi kima kia kudielesa

1Samuel25:37 Anga ki bhita kuila ki kúkia ni kimene
1Samuel25:38 Kubhita dingi kuinhi dia izuua
1Samuel25:39 O ki evu Davidi kuila Nabale uafu
