1Samuel25:44 Saúlophe
1Samuel26:1 Akua Zifi anga eza kua Saúlo ku Ngibeia
1Samuel26:2 Saúlo anga u balumuka
1Samuel26:3 Saúlo anga u ta kibangu mu mulundu ua Hakila
1Samuel26:4 Davidi anga u katula ilôlo iê phala kuia mu kulonda
1Samuel26:5 Davidi anga u balumuka
1Samuel26:6 Bhenhobho Davidi anga u ambela Ahimeleke mukua Hiti
1Samuel26:7 Kienhiki Davidi ni Abisai eza mu usuku muʼ axaxi ka mundu. Anga a sanga Saúlu iú ua zekʼú mu kaẋi ka kibangu bhu kididi kia makalu
1Samuel26:8 Abisai anga u ambela Davidi
1Samuel26:9 Davidi anga u ambela Abisai
1Samuel26:10 Davidi anga u zuela
1Samuel26:11 Ngana ka ngehele; kuma ki kala kisunji se eme ngi mu zengela lukuaku
1Samuel26:12 Kala kiki
1Samuel26:13 Davidi anga uia ku sámbua
1Samuel26:14 Davidi anga u kuata kuhandekela mundu ni Abinele
1Samuel26:15 Davidi anga u ambela Abinele
1Samuel26:16 Ki ki uabha
1Samuel26:17 Saúlo anga u ijiia dízui dia Davidi
1Samuel26:18 Davidi uixi dingi: Phala-hi
1Samuel26:19 Bhenhabha-phe
1Samuel26:20 Kikiphe manhinga mami ka bhubhile ngó bhoxi ku makanga mengi
1Samuel26:21 Saúlo bhenhobho anga u zuela
1Samuel26:22 Davidi anga u mu kumbulula
1Samuel26:23 Jihova u bhana futu mu vutuila muthu uoso kala kiatokala mu uiukilu uê ni mu ufiiele uê. Mukonda Jihova ua ku thelekalele lelu bhu lukuaku luami
1Samuel26:24 Talesa
1Samuel26:25 Saúlo anga u ambela Davidi
1Samuel27:1 Davidi anga u amba ku muẋima uê
1Samuel27:2 Kienhókio Davidi anga u zanguka
1Samuel27:3 Davidi anga u tunga ni Akiji bhu Ngate
1Samuel27:4 Anga a ki tangela Saúlo kuila Davidi ua lengela ku Ngate; muene anga u zumbuka o ku mu sota.
1Samuel27:5 Davidi anga u ambela Akiji
1Samuel27:6 Akiji anga u mu bhana Zikilake kizuua kienʼokio; tunde kienhiki Zikilake ia tokala ku jisobha ja Juda katé mu kizuua kia lelu.
1Samuel27:7 Izuua-phe ia bhange Davidi ni kutunga ku matutu ma akua Fidíxia
1Samuel27:8 Davidi ni makuenze mê anga aia ni kutunda mu kúlua ni akua Ngesula ni akua Ngelesita
1Samuel27:9 Davidi anga uia ni ku beta ixi ioso ienhoio
1Samuel27:10 Akiji-phe anga u ibhula
1Samuel27:11 Davidi-phe ka xi-ku muthu ni muenhu
1Samuel27:12 Akiji anga u xikina Davidi
1Samuel28:1 Anga ki bhita mu izuuʼomo kuma akua Fidíxia a di bhongolola ilombo iâ mu kuia ku ita
1Samuel28:2 Davidi anga u ambela Akiji
1Samuel28:3 Kienhiki kala Samuuele uafua kiá okulo
1Samuel28:4 Akua Fidíxia anga a di bhongolola
1Samuel28:5 Saúlo-phe kia mono kilômbo kia akua Fidíxia
1Samuel28:6 Saúlo-phe ki ebhula kua Jihova
1Samuel28:7 Saúlo anga u ambela akua mbèle iê
1Samuel28:8 Saúlo anga u di kitula
1Samuel28:9 Muhatu anga u mu ambela
1Samuel28:10 Saúlu anga u mu lokela mu dijina dia Jihova
1Samuel28:11 Muhatu uixi: Nzumbi ia nanhi ngi mu ixana ni u mu ivu? Uixi: Ngʼixanene Samuuele.
1Samuel28:12 Muhatu-phe kia mono Samuuele
1Samuel28:13 Muenexi anga u mu ambela
1Samuel28:14 Muene u ambela muhatu
1Samuel28:15 Samuuele anga u ambela Saúlo
1Samuel28:16 Samuuele uixi: U ngʼibhuila-hi-phe eme
1Samuel28:17 Jihova ua ku bhange kioso kia zuelele kó kuami: kuma Jihova ua tambula ungana bhu lukuaku lué
1Samuel28:18 Mukonda eie ua kambe kutumaka dízui dia Jihova
1Samuel28:19 Kua di te dingi kia-nda kubhanga Jihova
1Samuel28:20 Bhenhobho Saúlo udibhala
1Samuel28:21 Muhatu anga u iza kua Saúlo
1Samuel28:22 Kiki-phe
1Samuel28:23 Maji muene-phe u dituna
1Samuel28:24 Muhatuphe u kala ni kangombe kanete mʼonzo iê; anga u bhanga lusolo
1Samuel28:25 Anga uiza ni kúdia kuê u zalela Saúlo
1Samuel29:1 Akua Fidíxia anga a bhongolola ilômbo iâ ioso i tenena bhu Afeke; akua Izalaiele-phe anga a ta kibangu kiâ bhu dijiia dia Jezeleele.
1Samuel29:2 Jisobha ja akua Fidíxia anga a tuamenena ni ilômbo iâ iouane ku ibuka ia jihâma ni jimidi. O Davidi-phe ni makuenze mê a kala ue mu kaiela
1Samuel29:3 Jingana ja akua Fidíxia anga a zuela
1Samuel29:4 Jingana ja akua Fidíxia-phe anga a mu kuatela njinda iavulu. Jingana ja akua Fidíxia anga a mu ambela
1Samuel29:5 Ki muene Davidi-ú a mu tele ku mukûmbi mu kuimba ni kukina
1Samuel29:6 Akiji u ixana Davidi
1Samuel29:7 Kala kiki-phe
1Samuel29:8 Bhenhobho Davidi anga u ambela
1Samuel29:9 Akiji anga u vutuila Davidi
1Samuel29:10 Kala kikiphe mungu di meneke
1Samuel29:11 Kienhiki Davidi ua balumuka mu kimenemene
1Samuel30:1 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Samuel30:2 ahatu oso a a kutu
1Samuel30:3 Davidi-phe ni makuenze-mê kia zubha kutula ku bhata
1Samuel30:4 Bhenhobho ni Davidi
1Samuel30:5 Ni akaji a Davidi aiadi
1Samuel30:6 Davidi anga u tata kiavulu
1Samuel30:7 Davidi anga u ambela nganga Abiiatale
1Samuel30:8 Davidi anga u ibhula kua Jihova
1Samuel30:9 Kienhiki Davidi hé u katuka
1Samuel30:10 Davidi-phe
1Samuel30:11 Anga a sanga mukua Ijito mu mukáu
1Samuel30:12 Anga a mu bhana uê mbandu ia muthadi ua jifiku
1Samuel30:13 Davidi anga u mu ibhula
1Samuel30:14 Tua balukidile kúlua ita mu sulu ia Makelete
1Samuel30:15 Davidi anga u mu ambela
1Samuel30:16 Anga u a kulumuisa. Kia zubha ku mu bheka
1Samuel30:17 Davidi anga ua beta tunde mu mixinda ia maku katé mu ngoloxi ia kizuua kiamukuá; ki bhuala diiala ua tundu-bhu
1Samuel30:18 Davidi anga u tambula dingi imbamba ioso ia mu bhûndile akua Ameleke; Davidi anga u tambula ahatuʼê aiadi.
1Samuel30:19 Ki bhuala kima kia a kambe-ku
1Samuel30:20 Davidi anga u kuata ilunga ioso iamukuá ia jimbudi ni jingombe
1Samuel30:21 Davidi anga uiza u sanga hâma jiiadi ja mala
1Samuel30:22 Bhenhobho akua phulu-phe ni iá oso abhukumuka mu ʼaxaxi ka iá ele ni Davidi andeka kuzuela
1Samuel30:23 Davidi-phe u a ambela bhenhobho
1Samuel30:24 Nanhi muene u mʼivua o hundu ienu i muala na-iu iii? Mukonda kioso ki tambula iú uele ku ita
1Samuel30:25 Tunde-phe kizuua kienhókio muene
1Samuel30:26 Davidi anga u bhixila bhu Zikilake
1Samuel30:27 U tumikisa-ku ue akua bhata mu Betele
1Samuel30:28 ni ku akua bhata mu Alouele
1Samuel30:29 ni ku akua bhata mu Lakele
1Samuel30:30 ni ku akua bhata mu Hóloma
1Samuel30:31 ni ku akua bhata mu Hebolone
1Samuel31:1 Kioso Davidi kia-lu bhita ni imʼiii
1Samuel31:2 Akua Fidíxia-phe anga a landameka Saúlo ni anʼê. Akua Fidíxia anga a jibha Jonata
1Samuel31:3 Ita anga i nemena Saúlo

1Samuel31:5 Kibêse kiê kia zubha ku ki mona kuma Saúlo uafu

1Samuel31:7 Akua Izalaiele a tungu ku sámbua koko dia kibota
1Samuel31:8 Kúkia ni kimene
1Samuel31:9 Anga a mu batula mútue
1Samuel31:10 Ibhakatu iê anga a i bhaka mʼonzo ia Axitalote; kimbi kiê anga a ki nhenga ku kimbaka kia Bete-Sane.

1Samuel31:12 mala oso a nguzu-phe a balumuka

2Samuel11:4 Davidi anga u tuma jiphunga
2Samuel11:5 Muhatu anga u imita; hé u tuma kutangela Davidi
2Samuel11:6 Davidi anga u tuma kua Jouabe
2Samuel11:7 Kia zubha Udiia kutula
2Samuel11:8 Davidi anga u ambela Udiia
2Samuel11:9 Udiia-phe anga u zeka bhu kanga dia inzo ia muenexi kumoxi ni makuenze a muadiʼê
2Samuel11:10 O kia ki tangela Davidi
2Samuel11:11 Udiia anga u ambela Davidi
2Samuel11:12 Davidi anga u ambela Udiia
2Samuel11:13 O kienhokio Davidi anga u mu ixana
2Samuel11:14 Kúkia ni kimene-phe Davidi u soneka mukanda kua Jouabe
2Samuel11:15 Mu mukanda anga u soneka kiki
2Samuel11:16 Mu kukala-phe
2Samuel11:17 Akua mbânza anga a tunda mu bhânga ni Jouabe; ku mundu amoxi a dibhale
2Samuel11:18 Edi ki bhita
2Samuel11:19 anga u tendelela phunga iê
2Samuel11:20 ki u mona muenexi njinda ia mu kuata
2Samuel11:21 Abimeleke
2Samuel11:22 Phunga anga i katuka
2Samuel11:23 Phunga anga u ambela Davidi
2Samuel11:24 Akua mifula-phe ku thandu dia lumbu hé a tu asa tu makuenze mé; amoxi ku makuenze a muenexi afu
2Samuel11:25 Davidi anga u ambela phunga
2Samuel11:26 Mukaji a Udiia-phe ki evu kuila Udiia munumiʼê uafu
2Samuel11:27 O kia bhiti izuua ia kudila o thambi
2Samuel12:1 Jihova phe anga u tuma Natane kua Davidi. Anga u bokona mʼonzo iê
2Samuel12:2 Mvuamʼiii u kala ni ilunga iê iavulu ia ibhaku ia jimbudi ni jingombe;
2Samuel12:3 maji ngadiama-phe kala ni kima
2Samuel12:4 Anga bhu kala musonhi u tula kua mvuama
2Samuel12:5 Davidi anga njinda i mu kuata kiavulu ia muthu muene a mu tangeʼó; anga u ambela Natane
2Samuel12:6 O kambudi u ka futa luuana
2Samuel12:7 Natane anga u ambela Davidi
2Samuel12:8 nga ku bhana o dibhata dia muadiʼé
2Samuel12:9 Kiki-phe
2Samuel12:10 O kiki-phe
2Samuel12:11 Kala kiki
2Samuel12:12 Kuma eie ua ki bhangela mu kusuama ni ku di vudimika
2Samuel12:13 Davidi anga u ambela Natane
2Samuel12:14 Suke kiene
2Samuel12:15 Natane anga u tunda-bhu
2Samuel12:16 Kienhiki Davidi u kala mu diondela o mona ni ku samba kua Nzambi; Davidi anga u fula kúdia
2Samuel12:17 Adiakimi a dibhata anga a mu imanena
2Samuel12:18 Edi a kala kienhiki katé mu sambuadi dia izuua
2Samuel12:19 Davidi-phe kia mono akua mbèle iê ala mu di fuetela
2Samuel12:20 Behnhobho Davidi u balumuka bhoxi
2Samuel12:21 Akua mbèle iê anga a mu ambela
2Samuel12:22 Muene-phe uixi: Mona kia kexile ku muenhu
2Samuel12:23 Kiki-phe uafu

2Samuel12:30 Anga u tambula o kitundu ku mútue ua sobha iâ; ki pezala talendu ia ulu
2Samuel12:31 Hé a kuata o mundu uoso ua xalamu
2Samuel13:1 Kia zubha kubhita kiki
2Samuel13:2 Aminone anga u tata
2Samuel13:3 Aminone-phe hé u kala ni kamba diê
2Samuel13:4 Anga u ambela Aminone

2Samuel13:7 Bhenhobho Davidi u tuma ku bhata kua Tamala
2Samuel13:8 Tamala anga uia ku inzo ia phangʼiê Aminone

2Samuel13:10 Aminone anga u ambela Tamala

2Samuel13:12 Muene u mu vutuila
2Samuel13:13 Mukonda eme o jisonhi nga-nda ku di tela na-ju kuebhi? Eie-phe ue ua-nda ku di sokesa ni jihábhu ja malaji mua Izalaiele! Nga ku diondo-phe
2Samuel13:14 Muene-phe ka xikina ku mu ívua dízui; mukonda-phe uala mu nguzu
2Samuel13:15 Kia zubha ku ki bhanga
2Samuel13:16 Monʼa muhatu anga u mu ambela
2Samuel13:17 Anga u ixana mukua mbèle iê
2Samuel13:18 Monʼa muhatu-phe ua zuata kizuatu kialebha kiala ni maku a lebha kuma uene uzuatelu ua anʼa jisobha mu undenge
2Samuel13:19 Tamala anga u di ta utoka mu mútue
2Samuel13:20 Kota diê Abisalone anga u mu ambela
2Samuel13:21 O muenexi Davidi-phe ki evu ima ioso iii
2Samuel13:22 Abisalone-phe ka kumuna ue kima kua Aminone
2Samuel13:23 Anga ki bhita kuila

2Samuel15:2 Abisalone anga u kala mu di meneka
2Samuel15:3 Abisalone anga u mu ambela

2Samuel17:1 Ahitofele anga u ambela dingi Abisalone
2Samuel17:2 Ngi mu tukumuisa
2Samuel17:3 Mundu uoso-phe hé ngʼa bheka dingi ko kué; kuma muthu umoxi ua mu bhindamena eie
2Samuel17:4 Phangu ienhiʼii anga i uabhela kiambote Abisalone
2Samuel17:5 Bhenhobho-phe Abisalone u zuela
2Samuel17:6 Kia zubha Husai kubhiẋila kua Abisalone
2Samuel17:7 Husai anga u ambela Abisalone
2Samuel17:8 Husai anga u ta-ku
2Samuel17:9 Kialʼokio hinu ua suama kiá mu dibanda
2Samuel17:10 Bhenhobho-phe
2Samuel17:11 Eme-phe ngi bhana phangu kuma a diange kubhongolola hanji akua Izalaiele oso bhu kinama kié
2Samuel17:12 Kienhiki-phe tu mu tukumuisa bhu kididi kioso bhuala
2Samuel17:13 O ki kala-phe ua di kondela kiá mu mbonge ioso-ioso
2Samuel17:14 Abisalone ni mala oso a Izalaiele
2Samuel17:15 Husai anga u ambela Zadoke ni Abiiatale jinganga

2Samuel17:17 Kienhokio Jonata ni Ahimaaze
2Samuel17:18 Suke kiene
2Samuel17:19 Muhatu ua mukua bhata anga u futa-ku thanga

2Samuel17:21 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila
2Samuel17:22 Bhenhobho Davidi u balumuka
2Samuel17:23 Ahitofele-phe kia zubha kumona kuma o phangu iê ka i kaiela
2Samuel17:24 Davidi anga u bhixila bhu Mahanaíme. Abisalone anga u zaúka Njolodá ni muene niu mala oso a Izalaiele kumoxi.
2Samuel17:25 Abisalone anga u tumbika Amasa kutumina o kilômbo bhu kididi kia Jouabe. Amasa-phe monʼa-diiala u kala ni tatʼâ dijina diê Itra
2Samuel17:26 Izalaiele ni Abisalone anga a ta kibangu kiâ moxi ia Ngileiade.

2Samuel17:28 eza ni jiháma ni malonga a menhʼa pholo

2Samuel18:1 Davidi anga u kuata konda ia mundu uoso aia-nê kumoxi
2Samuel18:2 Davidi anga u tubhula o mundu mu ifuẋi itatu; kifuxi kimoxi kiala mu lukuaku lua Jouabe
2Samuel18:3 Mundu-phe exi: Eie kana kutunda; kuma etu né tua lenge
2Samuel18:4 Bhenhobho muenexi anga u a ambela
2Samuel18:5 Muenexi anga u tuma Jouabe ni Abisai ni hai
2Samuel18:6 Kienhiki mundu uoso u tunda mu kuia ku mukáu mu kúlua ni Izalaiele; ita anga i takanena mu ditutu dia Efaleími.
2Samuel18:7 Mundu ua Izalaiele anga a u betela bhenhobho kuala o makuenze a Davidi
2Samuel18:8 Kuma ita ia di zalala mu mukáu uoso uenhó
2Samuel18:9 Abisalone anga u tukulukila mu makuenze a Davidi. Abisalone ua mondala mula iê; mula anga i bhita moxi a jithangu javundu ja muxi ua dikota ua mukaluvalu
2Samuel18:10 Anga bhu kala muthu ua ki mono
2Samuel18:11 Jouabe anga u ambela o muthu ua mu kundu kiki
2Samuel18:12 Muthu iú anga u ambela Jouabe
2Samuel18:13 Né hanji se ngedile ngi ta makutu
2Samuel18:14 Jouabe anga u mu ambela bhenhobho
2Samuel18:15 Kuinhi dia makuenze
2Samuel18:16 Jouabe anga u xika koloneta
2Samuel18:17 Anga a katula Abisalone
2Samuel18:18 Abisalone-phe kia kexile ku muenhu ua di tungisila philadi mu kibota kia sobha

2Samuel18:20 Maji Jouabe u mu ambela
2Samuel18:21 Jouabe anga u ambela mukua Kuxi
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaaze monʼa Zadoke anga u tona dingi kuambela Jouabe
2Samuel18:23 Uixi: Ki kiediʼé kima
2Samuel18:24 Kiosuiki Davidi ua xikama bhu kaẋi ka mielu iiadi. O mulangidi uala ku kilangidilu
2Samuel18:25 Uala ku kilangidilu anga u kola
2Samuel18:26 Uala ku kilangidilu anga u mona muthu uamukuá uala kuiza ni kulenga. Anga u ambela mukua muelu
2Samuel18:27 Uala ku kilangidilu uixi: Ua tuamenena nga fika kulenga kuê kuedi kala kua Ahimaaze monʼa Zadoke. Muenexi uixi: Hé muene
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaaze kia bhixila anga u kola
2Samuel18:29 Muenexi uixi: Manhi o munzangala Abisalone

2Samuel19:1 Anga a ki tangela Jouabe

2Samuel19:3 Mundu anga mu ku bhongoloka ku bhata kizuua kienhokio eza ni kuzomba
2Samuel19:4 Muenexi muene ua di futu o pholo
2Samuel19:5 Jouabe anga u bokona mʼonzo kua muenexi
2Samuel19:6 Mukonda eie uedi kala a ku zembe ene u ua zolo

2Samuel19:12 Enu-phe mu jiphange jami
2Samuel19:13 Mua kambela ue Amasa

2Samuel19:15 Akua Juda anga eza bhu Jidingale
2Samuel19:16 Ni Simei

2Samuel19:19 Anga u ambela muenexi

2Samuel19:23 Muenexi anga u ambela Simei

2Samuel19:28 Kuma dibhata dioso dia tatʼetu a tokalele kuxala madifundu bhu pholo ié

2Samuel20:1 Bhenhobho anga bhu kala muthu ua tokala ni Kadiaphemba
2Samuel20:2 Akua Izalaiele oso anga a batuka kua Davidi
2Samuel20:3 Davidi anga u bhixila mʼonzo iê mu Jeluzaleme; muenexi u kuata kuinhi dia muhatu
2Samuel20:4 Muenexi anga u ambela Amasa
2Samuel20:5 Kienhiki Amasa uia kukola akua Juda ni ku a bhongolola; ku aii-phe ua kokoloka
2Samuel20:6 Davidi anga u ambela Abisai
2Samuel20:7 Abisai anga u tunda ku kunda diê ni akua Jouabe
2Samuel20:8 Kia bhiẋila-phe bhu ditadi dia dikota mu Ngibiione
2Samuel20:9 Jouabe anga uambela Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Amasa-phe xibhata iala bhu lukuaku lua Jouabe ka i mono. Kienhiki-phe muene u mu ta na-iu mu divumu
2Samuel20:11 Amasa anga ku mu imanena-phe dikuenze dia Jouabe bhu kimbi kiê
2Samuel20:12 Amasa anga u kala mu ku di sunha-sunha mu manhinga mê
2Samuel20:13 Kia zubha ku mu katula mu ikoka
2Samuel20:14 Seba anga u bhita mu miji ioso ia izalaiele katé bhu Abele
2Samuel20:15 Anga a mu kuatela mu mbonge ja Abele ku Bete-mahaka
2Samuel20:16 Anga mu mbonge
2Samuel20:17 Muene anga u mu zukama. Muhatu anga u zuela
2Samuel20:18 Muhatu anga u zuela
2Samuel20:19 Eme nga tokala ku athu abatama
2Samuel20:20 Jouabe anga u vutula
2Samuel20:21 Maka ku a te kiambote. Kuma ua ki bheka muthu umoxi ua tundu ku milundu ia Ifalaíme
2Samuel20:22 Muhatu anga uia ku mundu uoso hé u a zuelela ni kilunji kiê kioso. Ene anga a batula mútue ua Seba
2Samuel20:23 Kienhiki Jouabe u kala muene o kumanande u tumina kifuxi kioso kia Izalaiele; Benaia
2Samuel20:24 Adolamu muene u tumina akua sedivisu ala mu bhikila muenexi: Jozafate
2Samuel20:25 Seva muene u kala Sakala; Zadoke ni Abiiatale a kala ene o jinganga;
2Samuel20:26 o Ila ue mukua Jaíle muene kota dia jitata ja kionge kia Davidi.
2Samuel21:1 Anga ku kala nzala mu izuua ia Davidi
2Samuel21:2 Muenexi anga u ixana akua Ngibiione
2Samuel21:3 Davidi anga u ambela akua Ngibiione
2Samuel21:4 Akua Ngibiione anga a mu ambela
2Samuel21:5 Ene anga ambela muenexi
2Samuel21:6 Eie u kuata sambuadi dia anʼê a mala
2Samuel21:7 Muenexi anga u xia Mefibozete monʼa Jonata
2Samuel21:8 Muenexi-phe hé u kuata ana aiadi a mala a Dízipa monʼa Aiia
2Samuel21:9 Anga u a bhakula bhu maku ma akua Ngibiione
2Samuel21:10 Dízipa monʼa Aiia ua muhatu
2Samuel21:11 Anga a ki tangela Davidi kioso kia bhange Dízipa monʼa Aiia ua muhatu
2Samuel21:12 Davidi anga uia u katula ifuba ia Saúlo ni ifuba ia monʼê Jonata kua akua Jabezi-Ngileiade
2Samuel21:13 Muene anga u tunda kuenhoko ni ifuba ia Saúlo
2Samuel21:14 Anga a fûnda ifuba ia Saúlo ni Jonata monʼê mʼoxi ia Bejami
2Samuel21:15 Akua Fidíxia anga a lua dingi ita ni Izalaiele; Davidi anga u kulumuka ni makuenze mê kumoxi
2Samuel21:16 Davidi anga u sota kusènduka. Ixibi-benobi muthu ku mbutu ia kiiala kia dikota
2Samuel21:17 Abisai-phe
2Samuel21:18 Kia bhiti imʼii
2Samuel21:19 Anga ku kala ita iamukuá dingi bhu Ngobe. Elihanana monʼa Jaíle-Odejimi
2Samuel21:20 Anga ku kala dingi ita bhu Ngate. Anga bhu kala diiala dia kitala kiavulu
2Samuel21:21 Muene-phe kia luisa kaẋo kua Izalaiele
2Samuel21:22 Enhá kiuana kiâ ene oso a a vuala kuala kiiala kia dikota bhu Ngate; anga a jima mbutu ku lukuaku lua Davidi ni ku lukuaku lua makuenze-mê.
2Samuel22:1 Davidi anga u tela Jihova maka moso ma muimbu iú
2Samuel22:2 Jihova muene ndánji iami
2Samuel22:3 Nzambi muene ditadi diami
2Samuel22:4 Nga dikola kua Jihova
2Samuel22:5 Mukonda mabhuku a kalunga a sotele ku ngi bobesa
2Samuel22:6 Mikolo ia kúfua ia ngi louele kiá
2Samuel22:7 Mu kutata kuami anga ngi dikola kua Jihova; ngi handekela muene kua Nzambi iami! Muene anga u ngʼivua tunde mu tembulu iê
2Samuel22:8 Bhenhobho ixi anga i tunguta
2Samuel22:9 Mu mazulu mê mu fuafua dixi
2Samuel22:10 Anga diulu u di bheteka
2Samuel22:11 Anga u tuka u endela ku xelube
2Samuel22:12 U bhangesa kitombe ki kala kifua iene balaka iê
2Samuel22:13 O kubenha kua mu tuamenena ku pholo ku uika muene makala ma túbhia.
2Samuel22:14 Jihova anga u numina ku diulu
2Samuel22:15 U asa jihunji
2Samuel22:16 ikhobo ia musanza anga i moneka
2Samuel22:17 Ua di sunununa tunde bhulu bhuala
2Samuel22:18 Ua ngi tambula ku nguma iami iasuina kinéne
2Samuel22:19 Ene andalele ku ngi tukumuisa mu kizuua kiami kia uíndua; maji Jihova-phe muene ua ngi bande.
2Samuel22:20 Ua ngi bheka bhu kididi kiadizanze; ua ngi kudila mukonda muene ua ngi zola.
2Samuel22:21 Jihova ua ngi futu kia tokala mu kulunga kuami; mu ku ngi vutuila ua kaiela makuʼami a hatu ka kuata kima.
2Samuel22:22 Mukonda nga lange jinjila ja Jihova
2Samuel22:23 Kuma jingonge jê joso nga ji bhake ku muẋima uami; o ijila iê ki ia ngi jimbi mba ngi i abhuka.
2Samuel22:24 Muene ka ngi mono ni mixima iiadi bhu pholo iê
2Samuel22:25 Jihova kiene kia ngi vutuila kia tokala mu kulunga kuami
2Samuel22:26 Uoso mukua henda eie u mu idikiza henda; uoso mukua muẋima umoxi eie u mu idikiza muẋima umoxi;
2Samuel22:27 Uoso ua di zelesa eie u mu idikiza kuila eie uazela; uoso-phe ua xibhaka eie u mu idikiza kuthathamana.
2Samuel22:28 Mundu ua di tululula eie u a bhulula; mesuʼé ala ku thandu dia akua izala phala ku a tololola katé bhoxi.
2Samuel22:29 Kuma eie u Jihova u kandeia kami; Jihova muene u ngi muikina muʼavundu.
2Samuel22:30 Mukonda mu nguzu iê ngi kaia ilômbo
2Samuel22:31 Njila ia Nzambi ia iuka
2Samuel22:32 Nzambi iengi uebhi
2Samuel22:33 Nzambi muene mbonge iami iakolo
2Samuel22:34 U bhangesa inama iami i soka ni ia hoha
2Samuel22:35 muene ua longo makuʼami o kubhânga ku ita
2Samuel22:36 Ngubu ia ku ngi xitila i ua ngi bhana
2Samuel22:37 Eie ua ngi bhana kididi kiakulu
2Samuel22:38 Jinguma jami nga ji kaie
2Samuel22:39 Nga a zubhidisa muene
2Samuel22:40 Kuma eie ua ngi zuika ni nguzu ia kubhânga; ua ngi lendesa ku a tolola ió oso a ngi solomokena.
2Samuel22:41 Jinguma jami eie ua ji bhesa lusolo. Ió oso a ngi zembele eie ua a bhuisa-ku.
2Samuel22:42 A kengelela mu kusota uoso ua bhulula
2Samuel22:43 Bhenhobho-phe eme ngʼa beta katé a fufuka kala mavu a bhoxi
2Samuel22:44 Eie ua ngi kudila mu jimvunda ja mundu uami; ua ngi bhake ku ukota ua kutumina jixi; katé ni mundu ki nga u ijidile
2Samuel22:45 Akua makanga ala kuiza ku ngi tolokela; a ngʼivua ngó dízui ia ngi tumaka kiá.
2Samuel22:46 Enhó akua makanga a lela kala iangu; eza ni kuteketa
2Samuel22:47 Jihova a laie mu thembu joso! A tane-ku ditadi diami! A zangalale Nzambi iami ia Kibhamuenhu!
2Samuel22:48 Muene Nzambi iami ua ngi bhana ku a vutuila o phonzo
2Samuel22:49 Muene ua ngi katula muʼaxaxi ka jinguma jami
2Samuel22:50 Mukonda dia kiki nga ku sakidila
2Samuel22:51 Muene
2Samuel23:1 Enhá ene o maka ma sukidila-ku ma Davidi. Davidi monʼa Jese uambe kiki; muthu ió a mu zangeleka ditala dia dikota
2Samuel23:2 Nzumbi ia Jihova ua zuelela moxi diami
2Samuel23:3 Nzambi ia Izalaiele ua zuela ditadi dia Izalaiele muene ua ngʼambela: muthu u tumina athu mu uiukilu uê
2Samuel23:4 U kala mukuâ ni kuma kúkia
2Samuel23:5 Dibhata diami manhi ki kiene ki dia tungiua ku mesu ma Nzambi? Kuma ua te ni eme kikutu ki nangenena
2Samuel23:6 Akua kubhuma-phe a soko ni minha
2Samuel23:7 Muthu u i bhixila
2Samuel23:8 Enhá ene o majina a mazonda ma kexile ni Davidi: Josebe-Basebete
2Samuel23:9 O ku kunda diê kua kaiela Eleizaele
2Samuel23:10 Muene-phe u balumuka anga u beta akua Fidíxia katé lukuaku luê ki lua bhuila
2Samuel23:11 O ku kunda diê kua kaiela Xama monʼa Haje
2Samuel23:12 Muene-phe u imana mu kaẋi ka díbhia u di bhângela
2Samuel23:13 Anga bhu kala kitatu ku makuinhi atatu a makota a mala
2Samuel23:14 Davidi thembu ienhoio u kala mu mutôlo
2Samuel23:15 Davidi anga u sema
2Samuel23:16 Mazonda matatu enhá anga a bula mu kaẋi ka kifuxi kia akua Fidíxia
2Samuel23:17 Uixi: Kikola
2Samuel23:18 Ni Abisai
2Samuel23:19 Manhi ka beta kujinga mu każi ka kitatu? Kiene kia mu ixanena kuila kota diâ; mu kijingophe kia kitatu kiadianga ka tena-mu.
2Samuel23:20 Benaia ue
2Samuel23:21 U jibha ue mukua Ejito
2Samuel23:22 Iene ima ia bhangele Benaia monʼa Jehoiada
2Samuel23:23 Kijingo kiê kia tundu kia makuinhi atatu maji mu kijingo-phe kia kitatu kia dianga ka tena-mu. Davidi anga u mu bhana kutumina kilangidilu kiê.
2Samuel23:24 Azaiele
2Samuel23:25 Xama mukua Halodi
2Samuel23:26 Heleji mukua Paleti
2Samuel23:27 Abiiezele mukua Anatote
2Samuel23:28 Zalumone mukua Ahuoi
2Samuel23:29 Helebe monʼa Baiena mukua Netofa
2Samuel23:30 Banaia mukua Pilatone
2Samuel23:31 Abialibone mukua Alaba
2Samuel23:32 Eliiaba mukua Salibone ku anʼa Jasene
2Samuel23:33 Xama mukua Halale
2Samuel23:34 Elifalete monʼa Ahaxibai mukua Mahaka
2Samuel23:35 Hezelai mukua Kalumelo
2Samuel23:36 Ingali monʼa Natane mukua Zoba
2Samuel23:37 Zeleke mukua Amone
2Samuel23:38 Ila mukua Jetele
2Samuel23:39 Udiia mukua Hiti; ene oso makuinhi atatu a muthu ni sambuadi.
2Samuel24:1 Njinda ia Jihova anga i uamena Izalaiele luamukuá dingi
2Samuel24:2 Muenexi anga u ambela Jouabe
2Samuel24:3 Jouabe anga u ambela muenexi
2Samuel24:4 Sumbala ua zuela kiki
2Samuel24:5 Anga a zaúka Njolodá
2Samuel24:6 anga a bhita ku Ngileiade
2Samuel24:7 A bhiẋla bhu mbonge ia Tilu
2Samuel24:8 Kienhiki kia zubha kubhita ni kunhunga ku mbandu ni mbandu mʼoxi iene ioso
2Samuel24:9 Jouabe anga u bhana konda kua muenexi ia mundu a a kondala mua Izalaiele
2Samuel24:10 Muẋima ua Davidi-phe u mu êlesa
2Samuel24:11 Kúkia ni kimene Davidi u balumuka
2Samuel24:12 Ndeie ua kʼàmbele Davidi: Eme Jihova uedi kiki: Nga ku bhana ima itatu; sola-bhu kima kimoxi kioso ki ngi ku bhanga.
2Samuel24:13 Ngadi anga u iza kua Davidi
2Samuel24:14 Davidi anga u ambela Ngadi
2Samuel24:15 Kienhiki
2Samuel24:16 Kioso kia zenga anjo lukuaku luê ku thandu dia Jeluzaleme mu ku i buikisa
2Samuel24:17 Davidi anga u ambela Jihova
2Samuel24:18 Ngadi anga u iza kua Davidi kizuua kienhokio
2Samuel24:19 Davidi anga u banda ku thala mu kaiela kizuelu kia Ngadi
2Samuel24:20 Alauna anga u tala mu kanga
2Samuel24:21 Alauna anga u zuela
2Samuel24:22 Alauna anga u ambela Davidi
2Samuel24:23 Kùku
2Samuel24:24 Muenexi anga u ambela Alauna
2Samuel24:25 Davidi anga u tungila-bhu kalatódio ka Jihova
1Kings1:1 Kiki kuila sobha Davidi ua kuka kiá
1Kings1:2 Akua mbèle iê anga a mu ambela
1Kings1:3 Kala kiki
1Kings1:4 Monʼa kilumba muenhú u uabha kiavulu muene; anga u kala mu tambula konda ia muenexi
1Kings1:5 Thembu ienʼoio Adoniia
1Kings1:6 Tatʼâ tundiʼé ukulu
1Kings1:7 Anga u ta kikutu ni Jouabe
1Kings1:8 O Nganga Zadoko-phe
1Kings1:9 Adoniia anga u jibha jimbudi ni jingombe
1Kings1:10 Maji o polofeta Natane-phe
1Kings1:11 Natane anga u zuelesa Bete-seba
1Kings1:12 Kiki-phe
1Kings1:13 Ndé kindala kienhiki kua sobha Davidi
1Kings1:14 Kioso-phe eie ki u kala mu zuela kiókio ni muenexi
1Kings1:15 Bete-seba anga u bokona kua muenexi mu xilu; muene-phe ua kuka kiá kiavulu muene; kienhokio
1Kings1:16 Bete-seba anga u bhetama u diundila muenexi
1Kings1:17 Muhatu anga u mu ambela
1Kings1:18 Kiki-phe Adoniia ua hingi ungana; eie-phe
1Kings1:19 Ua mono
1Kings1:20 Kiki-phe
1Kings1:21 O ki u kamba ku ki bhanga
1Kings1:22 Bhenhabha-phe
1Kings1:23 Anga a tangela muenexi
1Kings1:24 Natane anga u zuela
1Kings1:25 Kuma ua kulumuka kunu lelu
1Kings1:26 Eme bhabha-phe
1Kings1:27 Kima kiki
1Kings1:28 Bhenhobho o sobha Davidi u kumbulula
1Kings1:29 Muenexi anga u loka
1Kings1:30 Kala ki nga ku lokela mu dijina dia Jihova
1Kings1:31 Bete-seba bhenhobho anga u bhetama
1Kings1:32 Sobha Davidi anga u zuela
1Kings1:33 Muenexi anga u a ambela
1Kings1:34 O nganga Zadoko
1Kings1:35 O ki mua kà zubha ku ki bhanga
1Kings1:36 Benaia monʼa Jehoiada anga u kumbulula
1Kings1:37 O kioso Jihova kia kexile ni eie
1Kings1:38 Bhenhobho-phe nganga Zadoko
1Kings1:39 Nganga Zadoko hé u tunda ni lumbinga lua maji lua katula mu Balaka
1Kings1:40 Mundu uoso anga a banda ni kukaiela ku dima diê
1Kings1:41 Adoniia-phe ni asonhi oso ala ni muene
1Kings1:42 Kioso-phe kiala mu zuela
1Kings1:43 Jonata-phe anga u kumbulula Adoniia
1Kings1:44 Muenexi ua tumu ue nganga Zadoko
1Kings1:45 Nganga Zadoko
1Kings1:46 Solomá-phe ua Xikama kiá bhu kiandu kia ungana.
1Kings1:47 Ni akuambele oso a muenexi
1Kings1:48 Muenexi ue iu ua zuela
1Kings1:49 Asonhi oso a exanene kuala Adoniia anga a kala ni uoma
1Kings1:50 Adoniia muene u kala ue ni uoma mukonda dia Solomá; anga u tunda-bhu
1Kings1:51 Anga a ki tangela Solomá
1Kings1:52 Solomá-phe
1Kings1:53 Sobha Solomá anga u tuma athu
1Kings2:1 Kiki izuua ia Davidi kuila i mu zukama
1Kings2:2 Eme nga muia mu njila iene mu kuila o mundu uoso; eie-phe kola muẋima u kale u iala
1Kings2:3 Kumbidila o utuminu ua Jihova Nzambi ié
1Kings2:4 Phala Jihova ue a kumbidile o kizuelu kiê kia ngi bhele
1Kings2:5 Kima kiamukuá eie ua kʼijiia kioso kia ngi bhanga Jouabe
1Kings2:6 Eie-muène kiá u ijiia kioso ki u mu bhanga
1Kings2:7 Maji o anʼa Badizilai-phe
1Kings2:8 Muthu uamukuá ua xala-nê Simeii
1Kings2:9 Ko kué-phe ka kambe kikuma; kabasa eie uala u hete
1Kings2:10 Davidi anga uia ku kilu kumoxi ni jitata je
1Kings2:11 O izuua ia bhange Davidi ni kutumina Izalaiele
1Kings2:12 Solomá anga u xala ua xikama bhu kiandu kia tatʼâ Davidi
1Kings2:13 Thembu ioio Adoniia
1Kings2:14 Anga u mu kumuna
1Kings2:15 Kuala muene: Eie ua kʼijiia kuma o ungana ua usobha ua kexile uami
1Kings2:16 Kiki-phe nga mesena ku ku bhinga ngó kima kimoxi
1Kings2:17 Muene-phe uixi: Nga ku diondo u ngi zuelele kua Solomá
1Kings2:18 Bete-seba
1Kings2:19 Bete-seba anga uia kua Solomá
1Kings2:20 Bhenhobho u mu ambela
1Kings2:21 Uixi-phe: Nga ku bhingi kuila Abisaki
1Kings2:22 Sobha Solomá anga u kumbulula mamʼâ uixi: Adoniia u mu bhingila kiebhi Abisaki
1Kings2:23 Sobha Solomá anga u lokela bhenhobho mu dijina dia Jihova
1Kings2:24 Kienhiki muene Jihova a tunge
1Kings2:25 Sobha Solomá anga u katula Benaia
1Kings2:26 Nganga Abiiatale-phe anga a mu ambela kuala muenexi
1Kings2:27 Kala kiki
1Kings2:28 Kiene kioso kia bhiti anga a ki tudila Jouabe; kuma Jouabe ua diangukile mu kaiela ku kunda dia Adoniia
1Kings2:29 Anga a ki kunda sobha Solomá
1Kings2:30 Benaia anga u bhixila mu Balaka ia Jihova
1Kings2:31 Kuala muenexi: Mu bhange kala kia zuela muene
1Kings2:32 Jihova a mu vutuile o manhinga mê ku thandu dia mútue uê-muene
1Kings2:33 Kala kiki
1Kings2:34 Kia zubha ku mu ambela kiki
1Kings2:35 Muenexi anga u ta Benaia
1Kings2:36 Muenexi anga u tuma kuixana Simeii
1Kings2:37 Kuma kizuua kioso ki u tunda-mu
1Kings2:38 Simeii anga u kumbulula
1Kings2:39 Mu kukala-kukala-phe
1Kings2:40 Simeii anga u balumuka
1Kings2:41 Anga a ki kunda Solomá kuila Simeii ua tundile mu Jeluzaleme iu uele ku Ngate
1Kings2:42 Muenexi anga u tuma kuixana Simeii
1Kings2:43 Kiki-phe eie ua kambela-hi kukumbidila kioso ki ua lokele bhu pholo ia Jihova
1Kings2:44 Muenexi anga u kumuna dingi mu tangela Simeii
1Kings2:45 Maji Sobha Solomá-phe u xala ni dibesá
1Kings2:46 Muenexi anga u tuma Benaia
1Kings3:1 Solomá anga u kuata ukamba ni Falaó
1Kings3:2 Mundu-phe hanji a kuata kusatela ku matala
1Kings3:3 Solomá anga u zola Jihova
1Kings3:4 Solomá anga uia ku Ngibiione mu satela-ku
1Kings3:5 Bhu Ngibiione bhenhobho Jihova anga u tukulukila Solomá
1Kings3:6 Solomá anga u zuela
1Kings3:7 Kiki-phe
1Kings3:8 Eme-phe ngi mulekiʼé ua ngi mono
1Kings3:9 O ki ngalʼiki
1Kings3:10 Maka enhá anga a uabhela Ngana
1Kings3:11 Ngana Nzambi anga u mu ambela
1Kings3:12 talesa
1Kings3:13 Ni iii i ua kambe ku i bhinga
1Kings3:14 Se-phe eie uenda mu njila jami
1Kings3:15 Solomá anga u phaphumuka ku kilu
1Kings3:16 Anga kua muenexi
1Kings3:17 Muhatu umoxi anga u zuela
1Kings3:18 O ki ngi zubha kudisanza
1Kings3:19 O monʼa mukuetu iú anga u fua mu usuku
1Kings3:20 Anga muene u balumuka mu kaẋi ka usuku
1Kings3:21 O ki kúkia ni kimene
1Kings3:22 Muhatu uamukuá ukumbulula
1Kings3:23 Muenexi anga u amba
1Kings3:24 Muenexi-phe
1Kings3:25 Sobha anga u amba
1Kings3:26 Muhatu uoso ua vuala monʼa muenhu
1Kings3:27 Muenexi anga u kumbulula
1Kings3:28 Izalaiele ioso anga evua o kubatula kuku kua batula muenexi
1Kings4:1 Kienhiki
1Kings4:2 Enhá-phe ene o makota a tokala mu utuminu uê. Azadiia monʼa nganga Zadoko;
1Kings4:3 Eliholefe ni Ahiji
1Kings4:4 o Benaia
1Kings4:5 Azadiia
1Kings4:6 Ahisadi muene o kimbadi u tambula konda ia mbèle ioso ku lumbu lua sobha; o Adonilamo
1Kings4:7 Solomá anga u kala ni kuinhi dia kimbadi ni kiiadi mʼoxi ioso ia Izalaiele
1Kings4:8 O majina mâ
1Kings4:9 Bebe-Dekele
1Kings4:10 Bebe-Hesede
1Kings4:11 Bebe-Abinadabe
1Kings4:12 Bahama monʼa Ahilude
1Kings4:13 Bene-Ngabele
1Kings4:14 Ahinadaba
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaze
1Kings4:16 Bahana
1Kings4:17 Jozafate
1Kings4:18 Simeii
1Kings4:19 Ngebele
1Kings4:20 Ni Juda ni Izalaiele ioso anga a vula kala kisekele bhu ndúndu ia kalunga
1Kings4:21 Solomá anga utumina o jisobha joso tunde ku Honga ia Ufalate katé ku ixi ia akua Fidíxia
1Kings4:22 O kúdia kua Salomá kua kizuua kimoxi
1Kings4:23 kuinhi dia ngombe ia sevado
1Kings4:24 Kuma Solomá muene ua kexe mu tumina jixi joso ku sámbua dia Honga ia Ufalate kunu
1Kings4:25 Ni Juda ni Izalaiele
1Kings4:26 Solomá anga u kala ni makuinhi auana a midi ia jikabalu ja tokala ku makalu
1Kings4:27 Imbadi iê anga i kala mu sota kúdia kua sobha Solomá
1Kings4:28 Ni sevada ni iangu ia jikabalu kúdia
1Kings4:29 O Nzambi anga u bhana Solomá kuijiia ni kutongoloka kuavulu ni muẋima uakulu mu kutetuluka mukuâ ni kisékele ku ndundu ia kalunga.
1Kings4:30 O kuijiia kua Solomá anga kutunda o kuijiia kua athu oso akexile mu thunda
1Kings4:31 Muene ue kiá o muthu uabetele mu kuijiia athu oso ndenge
1Kings4:32 Uasoneka midi jitatu ja jisabhu ni jihéngele
1Kings4:33 O miẋi ioso ua i tange kioso ki iala
1Kings4:34 Ku miji ioso kueza jinga athu mu kuívua o kuijiia kua Solomá
1Kings5:1 Hilamu
1Kings5:2 Solomá ue anga utumikisa jiphunga jê kua Hilamu
1Kings5:3 Kala ki uejiia kiá
1Kings5:4 O kiki-phe
1Kings5:5 Kala kiki
1Kings5:6 Eie-phe ambela akua mbèle ié
1Kings5:7 Anga kibhita-phe kuila
1Kings5:8 Hilamu anga utumikisa o njimbu kua Solomá
1Kings5:9 Akua mbèle iami a-nda ku i tuta
1Kings5:10 Kienhiki
1Kings5:11 Solomá hé u bhana ue kua Hilamu makuinhi aiadi a midi ia itutu ia jikolo iezala ni tiliku
1Kings5:12 Ngana anga u bhana o kuijiia kua Solomá kala kia mu ambelele kiá; anga bhu kaẋi ka Solomá ni Hilamu bhu kala kutululuka kuasoko muene mukonda kiiadi kiâ a tele kikutu kia ukamba.
1Kings5:13 Sobha Solomá anga unona kibuka kia akalakadi mu Izalaiele ioso
1Kings5:14 Solomá anga ukala mu a tumikisa ku Libano
1Kings5:15 Solomá uakexile hanji ni makuinhi sambuadi a midi ia jíngamba ja kuambata o imbamba
1Kings5:16 O atumini akexile na-u Solomá
1Kings5:17 Sobha anga utuma kuila eza ni matadi a makota
1Kings5:18 O jimesene ja kutunga
1Kings6:1 Anga andeka o kutunga o Tembulu mu muvu ua hama jiuana ni makuinhi nake
1Kings6:2 O inzo ia Sobha Solomá iatungila Jihova
1Kings6:3 O mbalanda ia inzo bhu muelu ua Tembulu
1Kings6:4 O ku Tembulu sobha iu uate-ku jinjanena ja kembesa ni tumiẋi tua bhidijika kiambote.
1Kings6:5 Mu jimbandu joso ja Tembulu ua tungisa-mu maxilu ku matala-matala
1Kings6:6 O dixilu dia ditala dia bhoxi dia kexi ni kóvado jitanu mu kuzanza
1Kings6:7 O mu kutunga o tembulu
1Kings6:8 O dibhitu dia ditala dia bhu kaẋi dia kexile ku mbandu ia kadilu ia inzu. A bandela jinga ku masumbatu a kihole phala kuia bhu ditala dia bhu kaẋi ni bhu ditala dia katatu dia bhulu.
1Kings6:9 Kienhiki Solomá kia tungu o inzo
1Kings6:10 O maxilu a matala a tungu mu jimbandu joso ja tembulu
1Kings6:11 Bhenhobho o kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kua Solomá
1Kings6:12 Eie-phe
1Kings6:13 Nga kà tunga muʼaxaxe ka anʼa Izalaiele
1Kings6:14 Kienhiki Solomá uzubha kutunga o tembulu hé u i iudika kiambote.
1Kings6:15 O ku mutôto uoso mʼonzo uaiudika-ku kiambote ni mabaia a musédelu; mʼoxi dioso tunde bhoxi katé bhu hongo bhulu
1Kings6:16 O moxi ku hota kua suku o inzo uatungu-ku dingi ni mabaia a muxi ua sédulu
1Kings6:17 O Tembulu ioso moxi
1Kings6:18 Inzo ioso ia tembulu o ku i tala moxi
1Kings6:19 Solomá uatungu o dixilu dia dibhezelu
1Kings6:20 O dibhezelu dienhidi
1Kings6:21 Solomá anga inzo ioso
1Kings6:22 Inzo ioso anga u i xiia kienhiki ni ulu ua fina katé inzo ioso kiiabhu; ni kalatódio koso ue ka kexile ku pholo ia dibhezelu
1Kings6:23 O moxiʼa dibhezelu uatula-mu jixelube ji iadi ja iudika ni mabaia a muxi ua mudiva; o jixelube jiji
1Kings6:24 O dibhabha ngó dimoxi dia xelube mu kudizonga di kala ni kóvadu jitanu
1Kings6:25 Kiene ue kimoxi ni xelube iamukuá
1Kings6:26 O xelubhe imoxi kitala kiê kia kuinhi dia kóvadu
1Kings6:27 Solomá anga u ji tula mu dixilu dia iudika moxiʼa tembulu
1Kings6:28 Jixelube ue anga u ji xiia ulu uoso.
1Kings6:29 O ku mutôto inzo ioso a i seta jixelube ni isálale ia maie
1Kings6:30 O bhoxi ue uaxiia-bhu ni ulu
1Kings6:31 O bhu muelu ua dibhezelu uate-bhu mabhitu a mabaia ma muxi ua mudiva; o mikambu ni mikangala kífua iatambula o mbandu ia katanu ku mutôto.
1Kings6:32 O mabhitu ene kiiadi kiâ a a iudika ni mabaia a muxi ua mudiva; ia a seta-ku jixelube
1Kings6:33 O dibhitu dia Tembulu
1Kings6:34 O mabhitu ene kiiadi kiâ a a iudika ni mabaia a muxi ua faia; o ibasakasa iê
1Kings6:35 Anga u tuma kuila a seta-ku kiambote o jixelube
1Kings6:36 O lumbu lua moxi ua-lu tungisa ni mikalatata itatu ia matadi osete kiambote
1Kings6:37 Bhu mbeji ia Zive
1Kings6:38 O mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni umoxi
1Kings7:1 Solomá hé utunga ue o dizemba die
1Kings7:2 Ua tungu ue o inzo ia Muxitu ua Libano; ikala ni hama ia kóvado mu kulebha
1Kings7:3 O mu maxilu a inzo ioso
1Kings7:4 O jinjanena ue ja kexile ku minôno itatu; anga ji di lulama kala njanena imoxi idilunga ni njanena iamukua
1Kings7:5 O mabhitu moso ni jiphidika jê
1Kings7:6 Anga u iudika mbalanda iate ku jiphiladi ja makuinhi atanu a kóvadu mu kulebha ni makuinhi atatu a kóvadu mu kuzanza; o mbalanda anga ikexila ku pholo ni jiphiladi jê ni imikambu iê ia makota ku pholo kuene.
1Kings7:7 Ua tungu ue onzo ia Kiandu mua kexile kufundixila o milonga
1Kings7:8 O inzo iê-muène ia kukala
1Kings7:9 O jinzo joso jenhiji a ji tungu ni matadi ate kiavulu muene
1Kings7:10 O madisesa mê a ma tele a matadi ue a fina
1Kings7:11 O ku thandu dia iá kuene kua tungu ni matadi amukuá a fina
1Kings7:12 O lumbu lua dikota lua kanga lua kondoloka
1Kings7:13 Kia bhiti kiki
1Kings7:14 muenhú monʼa mutudi ua muhetu ua tokala ku muiji ua Nafitali
1Kings7:15 Mbata ua mu bhangela jiphiladi jiiadi ja kobidi
1Kings7:16 Uazunza ue jikapitele jiiadi ja kobidi phala kutula ku thandu dia jiphiladi jiiadi jojo; kapitele imoxi ngó ku i zonga iambata kóvadu jitanu mu kitala
1Kings7:17 Uazunza ue ima iedi kala uanda phala kufuta na-iu o jikapitele ja tula ku mítue ia jiphiladi ni mikolo iê ia utadi ua kuxisa; manda iá a kala sambuadi phala kapitele kamoxi
1Kings7:18 Kienhiki kia bhange o jiphiladi
1Kings7:19 O jikapitele jala kuthanduʼa mítue ia jiphiladi
1Kings7:20 O jikapitele ja kexile ku sungu ia jiphiladi jiiadi
1Kings7:21 Hilamu muene uemika o jiphiladi jiiadi ja mbalanda ia Tembulu; o kiemika o philadi ia mbandu ia kadilu
1Kings7:22 O bhulu ku jisungu kua sukila o jiphiladiʼoko
1Kings7:23 Hilamu ua bhange ue ni musanza ua kalunga ua utadi ua kuzunza ua ngòndo; mu ku u zonga tundé disámbua didi katé disámbua diná
1Kings7:24 O bhoxi dia mizumbu iê a seta-bhu ibundu iedi kala jimbotá ia kondoloka mu jimbandu
1Kings7:25 Musanza anga a u xikika ku thandu dia kuinhi dia ngombe ni kiiadi
1Kings7:26 O mukômo uê ua kanda dia lukuaku
1Kings7:27 Uazunza ue dikuinhi dia maxikikilu a utadi ua ngòndo
1Kings7:28 O maxikikilu enhá a a kalakala kiki: A kexile ima ia a kondoloka kala ji-phonda jazuata
1Kings7:29 O ku thanduʼa jiphonda ja kexile bhu kaẋi ka jimoldura aseta-ku jihoji
1Kings7:30 Maxikikilu enhá akexile ni malola auana-auana a utadi ua ngòndo ni mikambu iê ia utadi ua ngòndo. O bhu thungi jiuana ja maxikikilu enhá bhua kexile ixamenenu ia utadi ua kuzunza ikala koxi dia mbasinha bhua sukila o jinzenzela.
1Kings7:31 O kua suila o jiphiladi mu kaẋi kê mua kexile ni dilonga dia menhʼa pholo diala ni kóvado mu kitala; dia kexile kikondoluesa anga bhu luhata luê di kala ni kóvado ni kaxaxe
1Kings7:32 O bhoxi diê bhene bhuala o malola auana
1Kings7:33 A a iudika ni ufunu kala ua malola a dikalu ene. O mikambu ia malola enhá
1Kings7:34 O bhu jithungi jiuana ja kinama kiê
1Kings7:35 O bhulu dia kixina ni kixina bhua kexi dikoloua dia kitala kia kaxaxe ka kóvado; ifikidilu iê ioso ia ku thandu ia kuata o jimoldula iene ioso ia kexile ni kixina kimoxi.
1Kings7:36 O ku thandu dia ifikidilu ienhiʼii ni ku mikambu iê ua kembesa-ku ni kuseta-ku jixelube
1Kings7:37 Anga u bhanga kienhiki kuinhi dia maxikikilu; ene oso-phe o usudilu uê uene umoxi
1Kings7:38 Anga u bhanga ue kuinhi dia malongʼa menhʼa pholo
1Kings7:39 Hé u tula maxikikilu atanu ku mbandu ia kadilu ia inzo
1Kings7:40 Kia zubha kubhanga ima ioso iii
1Kings7:41 O ima ioso ia zubha kubhanga ienhiʼii: O philadi jiiadi
1Kings7:42 Ni hama jiiuana ja jilomá phala o manda aiadi enhó
1Kings7:43 Ni kuinhi dia maxikikilu kua tudika o dikuinhi dia malonga a menhʼa pholo.
1Kings7:44 Ni musanza ua kalunga uòiudike ku thandu dia kuinhi dia ngombe ni kiiadi ja mu kalela bhoxi diê.
1Kings7:45 Ni jímbia ja makota ni jipá
1Kings7:46 Mu dinhana dia honga ia Njolodá
1Kings7:47 O ima ioso ienhiʼii mukonda dia kuvula kuê ku ia vudile
1Kings7:48 Solomá anga u bhanga ue dingi o itutu ia tokalele mu Kididi Kikôla kia inzo ia Jihova: o Kalatódio ka ulu ni meza a ulu kua kuenda ni kutula jinga o jimbolo ja kutela;
1Kings7:49 ni matundilu a jikandeia a ulu ua fina kinéne
1Kings7:50 Ni jikopho
1Kings7:51 Kienhiki Solomá kia zubha o kikalakalu kioso kia bhange mu kutunga o Tembulu ia Ngana. Anga u tuma kiua kuila a mu bhekele o ima ioso tatʼâ Davidi ia lumbile kua Jihova
1Kings8:1 Bhenhobho Solomá u tuma kubhongolola adiakimi a Izalaiele
1Kings8:2 Anga mala oso a Izalaiele a bhongolokela kua sobha Solomá bhu kizuua kia fesa
1Kings8:3 Adiakimi oso a Izalaiele anga eza; o jinganga anga a zangula o álaka ia Ngana.
1Kings8:4 Anga a bheka álaka ia Ngana ku thandu
1Kings8:5 Anga sobha Solomá
1Kings8:6 Kienhiki kia bheka jinganga o álaka ia kikutu kia Ngana bhu kididi kiê
1Kings8:7 Mukonda o jikelubini mabhabha mâ maiadi a ma oleka ku thandu dia kididi kia álaka
1Kings8:8 O Mikambu mukonda dia kulebha kuê anga i somboloka kiavulu
1Kings8:9 Kana dingi kima kia kexile mu álaka
1Kings8:10 Anga ki bhita kuma
1Kings8:11 Anga jinganga dituta dià fudisa kuimana mu kubhakula sata jâ
1Kings8:12 Bhenhobho Solomá u zuela
1Kings8:13 Ni kidi kiene
1Kings8:14 Bhenhobho u lungulula o pholo iê ku mundu uemana
1Kings8:15 Muene uixi: A tane-ku Jihova
1Kings8:16 Tunde kizuua ki nga katula o kifuxi kiami kia Izalaiele mu Ijito
1Kings8:17 O tatʼetu Davidi ue
1Kings8:18 Maji o Ngana-phe uambela tatʼetu Davidi uixi: Eie kuma kia ku kala ku muẋima ué kutungila o dijina diami inzo
1Kings8:19 Inzo iii-phe kʼeie ua-ndu i tunga; maji ua kà tungila inzo o dijina diami
1Kings8:20 Ngana kienhiki ua tenesa o kizuelu kiê kia tangele; mukonda eme nga balumuka bhu kididi kia tatʼetu Davidi
1Kings8:21 Monżʼomo eme nga bhange-mu kididi kia álaka
1Kings8:22 Anga Solomá uimana ku pholo ia kalatódio ka Jihova
1Kings8:23 Uixi: Eie u Ngana
1Kings8:24 Ua tenesa kioso ki ua tangelele tatʼetu Davidi ngunza ié; mukonda ua ki zuelele ni dikanu dié eie
1Kings8:25 O kiki-phe
1Kings8:26 Kiki ue
1Kings8:27 Maji
1Kings8:28 Sakukila-phe Ngana
1Kings8:29 Phala o mesu mé Ngana
1Kings8:30 Ivua-phe o kudionda kua mubhikʼé
1Kings8:31 Muthu kioso kia ta kituxi kua mukuá
1Kings8:32 Eie-phe ku maúluʼoko ívua
1Kings8:33 Kioso kia kuama o kifuxi kié kia Izalaiele ene anga a lenga ku pholo ia nguma jâ
1Kings8:34 eie-phe ku maúluʼoko ívua
1Kings8:35 Kioso o diulu ki di jika
1Kings8:36 eie-phe ku mauluʼoko ivua
1Kings8:37 Kioso mu ngongo ki mu iza nzala
1Kings8:38 Musambu uoso
1Kings8:39 eie-phe ivua ku mauluʼoko
1Kings8:40 Ene nda a ku kuatele uoma
1Kings8:41 Anga uívua ue o ngenji
1Kings8:42 (Mukonda hádia a kʼevua kutumbula o dijina dié dionéne
1Kings8:43 eie-phe ívua ku maúluʼoko
1Kings8:44 Kioso kiia o kifuxi kié mu ita
1Kings8:45 eie-phe ku mauluʼoko ivua o musambu uâ ni kudionda kuâ
1Kings8:46 Kioso ene kia ku tela kituxi (mbata kana-ku muthu u kamba kuta kituxi) eie anga u a luualela
1Kings8:47 ene anga ku ixi kua ambata ku ubhika a sunga kilunji
1Kings8:48 anga kuenhoko a diela ko kué ni muẋima uâ uoso ni muenhu uâ uoso
1Kings8:49 eie-phe ku mauluʼoko ku kididi kié ku ua tunga
1Kings8:50 anga u loloka o kifuxi kié
1Kings8:51 Mukonda Izalaiele ene o kifuxi kié ni undundu ué u ua katula mu ixi ia Ijito
1Kings8:52 Nda o mesu mé ma jikukile o kudionda kua mubhikʼé ni kudionda kua kifuxi kié kia Izalaiele
1Kings8:53 Mbata eie ua tungula mu madiembu moso mu ngongo
1Kings8:54 Anga ki bhita-phe kuma
1Kings8:55 anga uimana
1Kings8:56 Jihova a taneku
1Kings8:57 O Ngana dia Nzambi ietu a kale ni etu
1Kings8:58 Inda o mixima ietu a i bheke dingi ko kuê
1Kings8:59 Ni kuila o maka mami iá u nga dionda na-u bhu pholo ia Ngana
1Kings8:60 Sembele o madiembu oso mu ngongo ejiie kuma Jihova muene ngó Nzambi
1Kings8:61 Enu-phe muẋima uenu u tenene mu kudituma ni Jihova Nzambi ietu
1Kings8:62 Bhenhobho sobha ni Izalaiele ioso a bhakula jisata ja kuluulula bhu pholo ia Ngana.
1Kings8:63 Solomá ioso ia satela Ngana anga u i bhakula mu sata ia kutululuka
1Kings8:64 Kizuua kieneʼokio sobha ua zelesa mʼoxi dia lumbu lua kexile ku pholo ia inzo ia Ngana; mbata muuene mua bhangelele jisata ja kuoha ni maujitu ni maji ma jisata ja uembu; mukonda o kalatódio ka ngòndo ka kexile bhu pholo ia Ngana
1Kings8:65 Mu kithangana kiene kimoxi
1Kings8:66 Anga mu kizuua kia kanake a sulula kifuxi
1Kings9:1 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila
1Kings9:2 Jihova ua tukulukila dingi Solomá
1Kings9:3 Anga Ngana u mu ambela
1Kings9:4 Eie muene-phe se uenda jinga bhu pholo iami ni kivimba kia muẋima ni uthu ua tenena
1Kings9:5 eme ue nga ka kuatesa muene o kiandu kia ungana ué ku thandu dia Izalaiele ioso ni ku hádia ni hádia
1Kings9:6 Maji enu-phe ni anʼenu
1Kings9:7 bhenhobho Izalaiele nga kà mu buidisa mu ixi i nga a bhana; anga o inzo iii i nga kôlesela dijina diami
1Kings9:8 Anga o inzo iii
1Kings9:9 Anga a kʼèla: Mukonda ene a xile Ngana dia Nzambi iâ
1Kings9:10 Anga ki bhita kuila
1Kings9:11 O jinzo jojo ja bhekelele Hilamu
1Kings9:12 Anga Hilamu u tunda mu Tilo hé uiza mu tala jisanzala ja mu bhele Solomá
1Kings9:13 Kia mu bhekesa ku mu zuelesa
1Kings9:14 O Hilamu muene
1Kings9:15 Ndònda iê bhua tundile Solomá kubhinjia athu ku mu futa lubhaku ienhiʼii: O kutunga inzo ia tembulu ia Ngana
1Kings9:16 Mukonda Falaó
1Kings9:17 Kienhiki Solomá hé u tunga Ngezele
1Kings9:18 ni Bahalate
1Kings9:19 ni jisanzala joso ja mata a kexile-nâ Solomá
1Kings9:20 Mu kutanga o kifuxi kioso kia matumbu a subhukile ku akua Mamodi
1Kings9:21 o anʼâ
1Kings9:22 Maji ku anʼa Izalaiele-phe. Solomá ka bhangele-ku né mubhika umoxi ngó; maji a kexile-phe malʼakua ita
1Kings9:23 Ia ene makotʼa jitata a kexi mu bhangesa o kikalakalu kioso kia Solomá
1Kings9:24 Monʼa Falaó ua muhatu
1Kings9:25 Anga Solomá lutatu ku muvu u kala mu kubhakula jisata ja kuoha
1Kings9:26 Solomá anga u bhanga ue jinavio bhu Enzone-Ngabele bhua lulama ni Elote ku ndundu ia kalunga ka kusuka mu ixi ia Edomo.
1Kings9:27 Anga navio jojo Hilamu u tuma ku ji endesa ku atabhudi
1Kings9:28 Anga ene eza ku Ofidi hé ambata-ku hama jiuana ni makuinhʼaiadi a talendu ja ulu
1Kings10:1 Anga Na Mvuale ia Sabá kievu o fuma ia Solomá ni kutumbula dijina dia Jihova uiza ku mu lolela mu ifika.
1Kings10:2 Anga u bhixila mu Jeluzaleme ueza ni kifuxi kia dikota; ni jikamelo kua longo ima ia kutoua ia mazumba
1Kings10:3 Anga Solomá u mu vutuila o maka mê moso; sobha kana kima kia mu bhonzo iu ua lémbua ku ki vutuila o muhatu ió
1Kings10:4 Na Mvuale ia Sabá kia mono o kuijiia kuoso kua Solomá
1Kings10:5 ni mákudia ku meza mê
1Kings10:6 Anga uambela sobha
1Kings10:7 Maka ió eme ki nga a xikanene katé ki ngeza
1Kings10:8 Azediua o athu é
1Kings10:9 Jihova
1Kings10:10 Anga u bhana kua sobha hama ni makuinhʼaiadi a talendu ja ulu
1Kings10:11 Jinaviu ja Hilamu ue
1Kings10:12 Anga miẋi iii ia Sândalo sobha u bhanga na-iu jiphapha ja kuxitila ku inzo ia Ngana
1Kings10:13 O sobha Solomá anga uila: O ima ioso ia mu bhingile Na Mvale ia Sabá ia mu kexi mu hânji iê ua mu bhana-iu
1Kings10:14 Anga o ulu ua kexi mu bhekela Solomá ku muvu ni muvu kunema kuê ku soka hama jisamanu ni makuinhʼasamanu a talendo ja ulu;
1Kings10:15 ku thandu dia ulu iú
1Kings10:16 Sobha Solomá hé u bhanga ue dingi hama jiiadi ja jingubu jònene ni ulu uòbete kiambote; u tuma kuila a pezala hama jisamanu ja sikulu ja ulu jiia mu ngubu imoxi;
1Kings10:17 kiene ue muene kia bhangesa dingi hama jitatu ja jingubu ja ulu uòbete kiambote; anga u tuma kuila a ji pezalela mina jitatu jiia mu ngubu imoxi; anga sobha u ji bhaka mʼonzo ia ditutu dia Libano.
1Kings10:18 Sobha hé u bhangesa dingi kiandu kionene kia mazu a nzamba
1Kings10:19 Kiandu kiki ki kala ni maxikata a matala asamanu
1Kings10:20 Kuinhi dia hoji ni jiiadi ja kexile ue kuenhoko ku matala asamanu a maxikata
1Kings10:21 O itutu ioso ue ia kunuina ia sobha Solomá ia kexile ia ulu
1Kings10:22 Mukonda o sobha ue ua kexile ni jinaviio ja Talxixi ku musanza ua kalunga kumoxi ni jinavio ja Hilamu. Ji ja kexi mu vutuka lumoxi ku mivu itatu kutunda ku Talxixi
1Kings10:23 Kienhiki sobha Solomã hé u tunda o jisobha joso mu ngongo
1Kings10:24 mundu uoso anga a sota kumona o pholo ia Solomá
1Kings10:25 Anga athu oso a kuata ku mu bhekela muthu ni muthu ni ujitu uê ua itutu ia phalata ni itutu ia ulu
1Kings10:26 Solomá hé u bhongolola ue ndumba ia makalu ni athu endela ku jikabalu
1Kings10:27 Anga sobha u bhangesa kuila mu Jeluzaleme mu izala ni phalata kala matadi; o misédulu mu kuvula
1Kings10:28 Anga Solomã a kala ku mu takanena jikabalu ja Ijito; anga afuni a sobha a kala ku ji tambula mu ilunga ilunga
1Kings10:29 Anga dikalu dia Ijito a kala ku di sumba mu hama jisamanu ja itadi ia phalata
1Kings11:1 Sobha Solomá anga u dizola ni ahatu avulu akua jixi jengi
1Kings11:2 O akua jixi joso ja kidikile Ngana ku anʼa Izalaiele
1Kings11:3 Sobha Solomá anga u kala ni hama sambuadi ia ahatu
1Kings11:4 Mukonda ki bhita kuma
1Kings11:5 Mukonda Solomá ua kaiela kia o dihamba dia Axitalote
1Kings11:6 Kienhiki Solomá anga u bhanga kiaiibha ku mesu ma Ngana mukonda ka kolokota mu ku kaiela Ngana ni ufiiele kala tatʼâ Davidi.
1Kings11:7 Bhenhobho Solomá
1Kings11:8 Ahatuʼê oso a akua matumbu anga u a bhangela kienhiki; ene anga a kala mu kuohela jinzambi jâ uasu ua dizumba ni ku ji satela.
1Kings11:9 Kienhiki Ngana anga ki mu bhekela kuthathamena Solomá; mukonda ua bhambuile o muẋima uê kua Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele
1Kings11:10 Ni ku maka enhá kia mu kidikile kuala Ngana uixi kana kuenda jinga ni kukaiela jinzambi jengi. Maji o muene-phe
1Kings11:11 Kia bhekela Ngana kuambela Salomá
1Kings11:12 Maji kioso ki uala hanji eie ku muenhu
1Kings11:13 Ungana uoso-phe ki nga-nda ku mu tambula-u
1Kings11:14 Ngana-phe anga u balumuna Hadade
1Kings11:15 Mukonda kia bhiti kuma
1Kings11:16 (Mbata Jouabe ua nakina-ku mbeji jisamanu ni Izalaiele ioso
1Kings11:17 Hadadephe hé ulenga ni muene ni mala amoximu a akua Edomo
1Kings11:18 Anga a katuka bhu Midiiane
1Kings11:19 Anga Hadade u di zola kiavulu ni Falaó
1Kings11:20 Anga ndengʼia Tafene u mu vualela monʼê ua diiala dijina diê Jenubate
1Kings11:21 Hadade-phe kievu mu Ijito kuila Davide ua zeka kiá ku mavu kumoxi ni jitata jê
1Kings11:22 Falaó-phe kia kʼivu u mu ambela

1Kings20:2 Anga u tumikisa jiphunga mu sanzala
1Kings20:3 anga u mu ambela
1Kings20:4 Anga sobha ia Izalaiele uitaia
1Kings20:5 Anga jiphunga jiza dingi
1Kings20:6 zekela-kiu kuma mungu bhu kumbi ʼla didi
1Kings20:7 Bhenhobho o sobha ia Izalaiele uixana adiakimi oso mu ixi
1Kings20:8 Anga adiakimi oso
1Kings20:9 Bhenhobho Akabe uambela o jiphunga ja Bene-hadade
1Kings20:10 Anga Bene-hadade u tuma ku mu ambela
1Kings20:11 Sobha ia Izalaiele-phe u vutula
1Kings20:12 Anga ki bhita-phe kuma
1Kings20:13 Bhenhobho polofeta imoxi u zukama Akabe
1Kings20:14 Kuala Akabe: U ngi bhela-nâ kua nanhi? Muene uixi: Ngana uambe kiki: Ngi ku bhela-nâ ku makuenze ma ilamba ia jisengu. Eme muene: Nanhi uandu mateka mvunda? Muene uixi: Eiemuene.
1Kings20:15 Bhenhobho Akabe u tanga hanji makuenze a ilamba ia jisengu anga u mona kuila a tena hama jiiadi ni makuinhʼatatu ni kiiadi; anga ku dima diâ u tanga kiua o kifuẋi kioso kia ana oso a Izalaiele hé u mona kuila a tena sambuadi dia midi ia muthu.
1Kings20:16 Anga a tunda mu kaẋi ka kizuua
1Kings20:17 Bhenhobho o makuenze a ilamba ia jisengu a dianga kutunda mu mbonge; anga Bene-hadade u tuma-ku amoxi
1Kings20:18 Muene uixi: Ene nè-mbe a tundila uembu uene
1Kings20:19 Makuenze a ilamba ia jisengu-phe anga a tunda kiua mu sanzala
1Kings20:20 Ene anga a jibha kala muthu ni muthu uê
1Kings20:21 Sobha ia Izalaiele-phe anga u tunda
1Kings20:22 Bhenhobho o polofeta u zukama kua sobha ia Izalaiele anga u mu ambela
1Kings20:23 Mbata akua mbèle ia sobha ia Sídia a mu ambela
1Kings20:24 eie-phe u bhanga kiki: Uila jisobha

1Kings22:43 Jozafate anga uendela muene mu njila joso ja tatʼâ Aza
