2Kings9:6 Bhenoʼobho u balumuka hé u bokona mu xilu
2Kings9:7 O dibhata dioso dia ngana ié
2Kings9:8 Phala o dibhata dioso dia Akabe di jikinine; mukonda o mua Akabe
2Kings9:9 Mukonda o inzu ia Akabe nga-nda ku i bhanga uila kia bhange o dibhata dia Jeloboamu
2Kings9:10 O jimbua jene ja-nda kua ka-dia Jezabele bhu ka kithungu ka mukáu ua Jizeleiele; ki kuà kala uoso u mu funda. Kia zubha o ku tanga kiki
2Kings9:11 O Jehu kioso kia tundu ku kanga kuala o jiselevende ja ngana iê
2Kings9:12 Maji-phe ene
2Kings9:13 O kievu kiki
2Kings9:14 Kienʼiki Jehu
2Kings9:15 Maji o sobha Jolá ua vutuka
2Kings9:16 Jehu anga u sambela mu dikalu
2Kings9:17 O kilanga-kanga
2Kings9:18 Anga muthu uejiia kusambela o kabalu uia mu ku takana ni Jehu
2Kings9:19 Anga a tuma-ku dingi ua mukuá; o muenʼiú ue kia bhixila kua ene
2Kings9:20 O kilanga-kanga hé u kʼijidisa kua sobha
2Kings9:21 Bheneʼobho kuala Jolá: Ngi iudikidienu o dikalu. Anga a mu iudikila o dikalu diê. Anga ni muene Jolá
2Kings9:22 Anga ki bhita
2Kings9:23 Kieneʼokio-phe Jolá u lungulula o dikalu diê anga u lenga lusolo
2Kings9:24 Maji o Jehu-phe
2Kings9:25 Bheneʼobho Jehu uambela Bhidikale
2Kings9:26 Ni kidi muene
2Kings9:27 O Akaziia
2Kings9:28 O abhikʼê hé a muʼambata mu dikalu
2Kings9:29 O Akaziia muene
2Kings9:30 Jehú anga u bhixila mu Jizeleiele. O Jezabele kioso kia kʼivu
2Kings9:31 O kioso Jehu kia mu bokona bhu mabhitu a dizemba
2Kings9:32 Jehu u bhetula o pholo
2Kings9:33 Bheneʼobho muene
2Kings9:34 Hé u bokona; o kioso kia zubha kiá o kúdia ni kúnua
2Kings9:35 Anga aia phala ku mu funda
2Kings9:36 Hé a vutuka
2Kings9:37 O kimbi kia Jezabele kia kà kala mukuâ ni ditobe ku thandu dia mavu mu kiẋimbu kia mukáu ua Jizeleiele; kia kà bhonza ku muʼila
2Kings10:1 Akabe anga u kala ni makuinhi sambuadi a mona mu Samádia: anga Jehu u soneka mikanda
2Kings10:2 O kioso ki mua-ndu tambula o mukanda iú kuma anʼa nganʼenu muala-nâ kueneʼoko
2Kings10:3 Talenu-ku-phe uoso ua beta kota
2Kings10:4 Maji-pphe ene a teketa kiavulu
2Kings10:5 Bheneʼobho-phe o iú ua kexile ku pholo ia dibhata
2Kings10:6 Muene-phe anga u tona dingi o ku a sonekena mukanda ua kaiadi
2Kings10:7 Anga-phe ki bhita muene
2Kings10:8 Kuiza mukunji umoxi
2Kings10:9 Kutula mu kimenemene
2Kings10:10 Tumenu-phe ku kʼijiia
2Kings10:11 Jehu anga u jibha ue oso a subhuka mu dibhata dia Akabe bhu dizelele kutale o athuʼê onène uixi iá a muʼijidile ngoho
2Kings10:12 Bheneʼobho u balumuka kiua
2Kings10:13 Jehu ua sange o jiphange ja Akaziia
2Kings10:14 Kieneʼokio muene uixi: A kuatienu ni muenhu. Ene anga a a kuata ni muenhu uâ
2Kings10:15 O kia tundu bheneʼobho
2Kings10:16 hé u muʼambela
2Kings10:17 O kioso Jehu kia bhijiẋila mu Samádia
2Kings10:18 Jehu anga u bhongolola o mundu uoso
2Kings10:19 Uila kiki
2Kings10:20 Jehu anga uamba dingi uixi: O Bale mu bhangedienu kionge kiònene ki mu mu lumbila. Anga a ki kola kuoso.
2Kings10:21 Jehu anga u tuma ue jiphunga mu Izalaiele ioso; o ene oso ene mu kubhikila Bale hé eza
2Kings10:22 Kieneʼokio uambela iú ua kexi mu bhaka o izuatu ia akua kubhikila Bale
2Kings10:23 Jehú anga u bokona kumoxi ni Jonadabe
2Kings10:24 Ene kioso kia bokona mu bhana jisata ni mibhaku ia túbhia
2Kings10:25 Anga ki bhita kuila
2Kings10:26 Anga a katula-mu o iteka ia tokalele mʼonzo ia Bale anga a i oha.
2Kings10:27 O kiteka kiene kia Bale ue a ki bulu
2Kings10:28 Kienʼiki Jehu kia sengulula Bale mua Izalaiele.
2Kings10:29 Maji-phe
2Kings10:30 Ki kia bhangesa Jihova kuambela Jehu
2Kings10:31 Maji o Jehu-phe
2Kings10:32 Mu izuua mueneʼomo
2Kings10:33 Tundé ku Njolodá
2Kings10:34 Tala ima ioso kiá ia ibhangelu ia Jehu
2Kings10:35 Jehu anga u zeka ni jitata jê anga a mu funda mu Samádia; o Jouahaji dia monʼê anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê.
2Kings10:36 O izuua ia tumina Jehu ku usobha ua Izalaiele mu Samádia
2Kings11:1 Ataliia
2Kings11:2 Maji o Jozabate
2Kings11:3 Anga a mu sueka kuala o muhatu mueniʼó
2Kings11:4 Kubhikila mu muvu ua kasambuadi
2Kings11:5 Anga u a tendelela
2Kings11:6 Mbandu ia mukuá a kà kala bhu dibhitu dia Sule; o mbandu ia katatu a kà kala bhu muelu
2Kings11:7 O ibuka iene kiiadi kiâ
2Kings11:8 O sobha mua kà mu kondoloka
2Kings11:9 O jikabhitangu ja jihama anga a bhanga kala kia a tendelela nganga Joiada
2Kings11:10 O nganga Joiada hé u bhana ku jikabhitangu ja jihama
2Kings11:11 O akua kilangidilu anga a di zeleka muthu ni muthu ni ibhakatu iê ia ita bhu maku
2Kings11:12 Muene-phe anga u zangula monʼa sobha
2Kings11:13 O Ataliia kioso kievu o dízui dia kudikola kua akua kilangidilu ni dia kifuẋi
2Kings11:14 O kia tale
2Kings11:15 Maji o nganga Joiada ua tendelela o jikabhitangu ja kexile mu kutumina o masoladi
2Kings11:16 Anga a mu ta maku; maji o muene-phe ua di tela o njila ia dibokuenu dia jikabalu
2Kings11:17 Joiada anga u ta kikutu bhu kaẋi ka Jihova ni sobha ni mundu
2Kings11:18 Bheneʼobho o kifuẋi kioso kia tokala mu ixi
2Kings11:19 Anga u zangula ni jikabhitangu ja jihama
2Kings11:20 O kifuẋi kioso kiaʼxi anga ki kala mu tana; o mbonge ue ia tululuka
2Kings11:21 O Jouaji ua kexile ngó mu kitala kia sambuadi dia mivu kioso kia mu bhange sobha.
2Kings12:1 Mu muvu ua kasambuadi ua utuminu ua Jehu
2Kings12:2 Jouaji anga uenda ni kubhanga ima ia iuka ku mesu ma Jihova; izuua iê ioso ia mu bhana jinga o mulongi kuala Joiada
2Kings12:3 Inda ngó o matala ka ma katuile; mukonda hanji o mundu a kexile mu ku bhela jisata ni kuoha uasu ua dizumba bhu ididi ia dileka.
2Kings12:4 Jouaji anga uambela o jinganga
2Kings12:5 O jinganga a ki tambule
2Kings12:6 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila
2Kings12:7 Bheneʼobho o sobha Jouaji uexana nganga Joiada ni jinganga ja mukuá anga u ambela
2Kings12:8 O jinganga anga a xikina o ku kamba kutambula kitadi ku mundu
2Kings12:9 Maji-phe o nganga Joiada ua zangula mbaúlu hé u i kubula dizungu ku thanduʼa kivunginu kiê; hé u i tula bhu mbandu ia kalatódio
2Kings12:10 O kioso ene kia mono kiá kuila o kitadi kia vulu kiala kiá mu mbaúlu
2Kings12:11 O kiela jinga kitadi a ki mono kiá o munemu uê
2Kings12:12 Ni akua kutunga ni matadi ni akua kukanda o mixinda
2Kings12:13 Maji-phe ku kitadi kieneʼokio kia bheka jinga mu inzu ia Jihova
2Kings12:14 Mukonda a kexi mu ku ki bhana ku iá a kexile mu ku bhanga o kikalakalu
2Kings12:15 Athu a kexi mu ku a bhana o kitadi bhu maku mâ phala ku ki uanena oso a kexi mu bhanga o kikalakalu
2Kings12:16 Maji o kitadi kia sata ia mulonga ni kitadi kia sata ia ituxi
2Kings12:17 Kieneʼokio-phe Hazaiele
2Kings12:18 Maji-phe o Jouaji
2Kings12:19 Tala
2Kings12:20 Anga abhikʼê a fundumuka a mu ta kikutu kia ufe; hé a mu jibhila mʼonzo ia Milu iala mu kulumuka bhu Sila.
2Kings12:21 Mukonda ni Jozakale
2Kings13:1 Ku tula mu muvu ua makuinhi aiadi ni kitatu
2Kings13:2 Anga uia ni kubhanga o ima ia ibhila Jihova
2Kings13:3 Anga o njinda ia Jihova i uama ku thandu dia Izalaiele; Nzambi hé u a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua Hazaiele
2Kings13:4 Maji Jouakaji ua dionda bhu pholo ia Ngana
2Kings13:5 Jihova anga u bhana mubhuludi kua Izalaiele anga bhoxi dia lukuaku lua akua Sídia a tunda-bhu; hé anʼa Izalaiele a tunga dingi mu jibalaka jâ kala mu ukulu.
2Kings13:6 Sumbala kiene
2Kings13:7 Mukonda o Jouakaji muene ue ka mu xila dingi mala a ita
2Kings13:8 Tala
2Kings13:9 Jouakaji anga u zeka ni jitata jê
2Kings13:10 Mu muvu ua makuinhi atatu ni sambuadi ua Jouaji
2Kings13:11 Iú ua bhanga jinga kia ibha ku mesu a Jihova
2Kings13:12 Tala
2Kings13:13 Jehouaji anga u zeka ni jitata jê
2Kings13:14 Anga Ilizeu u kala mu kata
2Kings13:15 O Ilizeu u muʼambela
2Kings13:16 Bheneʼobho uambela sobha ia Izalaiele
2Kings13:17 Uixi: Jikula o njanena ia talela ku tundila o dikumbi. Muene anga u i jikula. Ilizeu hé u muʼambela
2Kings13:18 Uixi
2Kings13:19 Bheneʼobho o muthu ua Nzambi u thathamana kiavulu mukonda dia sobha
2Kings13:20 Kia bhiti imʼiii
2Kings13:21 Anga ki bhita kuila
2Kings13:22 O Hazaiele-phe
2Kings13:23 Maji-phe
2Kings13:24 Hazaiele
2Kings13:25 O Jehouaji monʼa Jouakaji
2Kings14:1 Ku muvu ua kaiadi ua Jehouaji
2Kings14:2 O kioso kiandeka o kutumina ua kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu ni kitanu; ua tumina makuinhi aiadi a mivu niʼvua mu Jeluzaleme. O dijina dia mamʼâ a muila jinga
2Kings14:3 Anga u bhanga ima ia kuiuka bhu pholo ia Jihova
2Kings14:4 Inda kia ngoho o matala ka ma katuile; mbata o mundu ua bhela jinga hanji o jisata ni kuoha o uasu ua dizumba bhu ididi ia dileka.
2Kings14:5 Anga ki bhita-phe
2Kings14:6 Maji-phe o anʼa ijibhanganga muene ka a jibha
2Kings14:7 Muenʼiú ua jibha kuinhi dia midi ia akua Idomo
2Kings14:8 Kieneʼokio Amaziia u tumikisa jiphunga kua Jehouaji
2Kings14:9 Maji o Jehouaji
2Kings14:10 Ni kidi kiene
2Kings14:11 Maji-phe Amaziia ngué ku mu ivua; anga o Jehouaji
2Kings14:12 O Juda anga a mu tolola kuala Izalaiele
2Kings14:13 O Jehouaji
2Kings14:14 Anga u katula o ulu uoso ni phalata ni itutu ioso ia sange mʼonzo ia Jihova
2Kings14:15 Tala
2Kings14:16 Jehouaji anga u zeka ni jitata jê
2Kings14:17 Kioso kiafu Jehouaji
2Kings14:18 Tala
2Kings14:19 Mu Jeluzaleme anga a mu ta kikutu kia ufe
2Kings14:20 Anga a mu ambatela ku thandu dia jikabalu
2Kings14:21 O kifuẋi kioso kia Juda
2Kings14:22 Kioso o sobha kia zeka ni mukànda ua mavu kumoxi ni jitata jê
2Kings14:23 Kubhiẋila mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni itanu
2Kings14:24 Anga uenda ni kubhanga ima ia ibhila Jihova ku mesu mê; ua tokoka o ku di batuka ni ituxi ioso ia Jelobouamu
2Kings14:25 O muenʼiú ue ua tona dingi o kuxinda Izalaiele mu jimbambe jê ja ukulu
2Kings14:26 Mukonda o Jihova ua mono kuila o hadi ni mbûnda ia Izalaiele
2Kings14:27 Kuma o Ngana ue muene ka ki zuelele luua
2Kings14:28 Tala-phe
2Kings14:29 Anga Jelobouamu uzeka ni mukànda ua mavu kumoxi ni jitata jê
2Kings15:1 Mu muvu ua makuinhi aiadi ni sambuadi ua utuminu ua Jelobouamu
2Kings15:2 Kioso kiandeka o kutumina ua kexi ngoho mu kitala kia kuinhi dia mivu ni kisamanu
2Kings15:3 Muene ua bhanga jinga ima ia kuiuka bhu pholo ia Ngana Nzambi
2Kings15:4 Inda ngoho o matala ka ma katuile; mukonda o athu hanji a kexi mu kusatela ni kuoha o uasu ua dizumba bhu ididi ia di leka.
2Kings15:5 Sobha anga a mu kuama kuala Jihova; u kuata dibhute katé mu kizuua kiê kia kúfua
2Kings15:6 Tala
2Kings15:7 Anga Azadiia uzeka ni mukànda ua mavu kala o jitata jê
2Kings15:8 Mu muvu ua makuinhi a tatu ni nake a utuminu ua Azadiia
2Kings15:9 Anga u bhanga ia ibhila Jihova ku mesu mê
2Kings15:10 O Salume
2Kings15:11 Tala
2Kings15:12 O kiki kiene o kizuelu kia Jihova kiambelele Jehu
2Kings15:13 O Salume
2Kings15:14 Mukonda o Menaheme
2Kings15:15 Kala kiki o ima dingi ia bhange Salume
2Kings15:16 Kieneʼokio Menaheme u nemeka Tifiza ni oso a tungile momo katé ni mu ikanzu ia jimbambe jê joso tundé Tidiza. Mbata ka muenzelele-mu. Kiene kia mu bhekesele ku a sengulula katé ni ahatu emita
2Kings15:17 Tundé mu muvu ua makuinhi a tatu nʼivua ua Azadiia
2Kings15:18 Anga uenda ni kubhanga ima ia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova; mu izuua iê ioso Kulu-dia-Mundu
2Kings15:19 Kiene kieza Phulu
2Kings15:20 Phala kumona o kitadi kioso kienʼiki
2Kings15:21 Tala
2Kings15:22 Menaheme anga u zeka ku mukànda ua mavu kuʼàia jitata jê; Pekaia dia monʼê anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê.
2Kings15:23 Mu muvu ua makuinhi a tanu ua Azadiia
2Kings15:24 Anga uenda ni kubhanga ima ia ibhila Jihova ku mesu mê; nuka ue a di ambudisile ni ituxi ia Jelubouamu
2Kings15:25 O kabhitangu kê-muène
2Kings15:26 Mu kutanga ima ioso ia bhiti ni Pekaia ni iosololo muene ia bhange
2Kings15:27 Mu muvu ua makuinhi a tanu ni kiiadi a utuminu ua Azadiia
2Kings15:28 Ua bhanga
2Kings15:29 O mu izuua ia Peka
2Kings15:30 Kieneʼokio-phe
2Kings15:31 Ku ima ioso ia bhita na-iu Peka ni iosololo ia bhange
2Kings15:32 Mu muvu ua kaiadi ua utuminu ua Peka
2Kings15:33 Ua kexile mu kitala kia makuinhi a iadi a mivu ni kitanu kioso kiandeka o kutumina; iú ua tumina kuinhi dia muvu ni kisamanu mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia manhʼâ a mu ixana jinga exi: Jeluza monʼa Zadoko.
2Kings15:34 Muenʼ iú hé uenda ni kubhanga ima ia iuka ku mesuʼa Jihova
2Kings15:35 Inda ngoho o matala ka a katula; mukonda o athu hanji a kexi mu kusatela bhu ididi ia di leka ni kuoha o uasu ua dizumba; muenʼiú ua tungu o dibhitu dia thandu dia inzu ia Jihova.
2Kings15:36 Tala
2Kings15:37 Mu izuuʼomo-phe muene mu andeka Jihova o kutumikisa iá a balukila Juda
2Kings15:38 Jotamu hé u zeka ni mukànda ua mavu kumoxi ni jitata jê
2Kings16:1 Mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni sambuadi
2Kings16:2 Akâji kioso kia mateka o kutumina ua kexile mu kitala kia makuinhi a iadi a muvu
2Kings16:3 Mukonda muene uende mu jinjila ja jisobha ja Izalaiele; kí kia bhingi kuila ni monʼê ua mu bhitisa mu túbhia
2Kings16:4 Ua bhana ue jisata ni kuohela o uasu ua dizumba ku matala ni ku tumilundu ni bhoxi dia ixina ia miẋi ioso ia di zandela.
2Kings16:5 Kieneʼokio kiene kia bande Lejime
2Kings16:6 Mu thembu ieneʼoio
2Kings16:7 O Akâji-phe anga u tumikisa jiphunga kua Tiglate-Pilesele
2Kings16:8 Anga Akâji u zangula o phalata ni ulu uoso ua sange mʼonzo ia Jihova ni mu malundilu ma dibhata dia sobha
2Kings16:9 O sobha ia Asídsia iú ua mu ivu muene; mbata o sobha ia Asídia ua bande iú ueza mu kukonda Damasku
2Kings16:10 Kia bhiti imʼiii
2Kings16:11 Udiia
2Kings16:12 Sobha kioso kia tundu ku Damasku
2Kings16:13 Anga uohela-ku o sata iê ia kubhakula ni túbhia ni mubhaku uê ua makudia anga u lunduluila-ku ue o mubhaku uê ua makunua; iú ua sangela ue o manhinga a jisata ja kubatama ku Kalatódio keneʼoko.
2Kings16:14 Maji o Kalatódio ka utadi ua Kobidi ka kexile bhu pholo ia Jihova
2Kings16:15 Sobha Akâji iú uambela Udiia
2Kings16:16 Anga o nganga Udiia u bhanga muene iene ioso kala kia mu tendelela na-iu kuala sobha Akâji.
2Kings16:17 Anga o sobha Akâji u batula o jiphonda ja kuata o ixikikilu
2Kings16:18 Ni kitelembe ue kia tungila ku inzu anga kiia muene katé bhu kanga bhu muelu ua sobha
2Kings16:19 Tala o ima dingi ia bhiti na-iu Akâji ni iosololo muene ia bhange
2Kings16:20 Akâji anga u zeka ni mukànda ua mavu kumoxi ni jitata jê
2Kings17:1 Mu muvu ua kuinhi ni kiiadi ua utuminu ua Akâji
2Kings17:2 Uenda jinga ni kubhanga ima ia ibhila Jihova ku mesu mê
2Kings17:3 O Salamanazale
2Kings17:4 Maji o sobha ia Asídia kia muedi sui
2Kings17:5 Mbata o sobha ia Asídia ua bande ni kuzalata mu ixi ioso iú ueza katé mu mbonge ia Samádia iú ua i kondoloka ni ku i batamena ku mbandu joso mu mivu itatu.
2Kings17:6 Kubhiẋila mu muvu ua kavua ua utuminu ua Ozeia
2Kings17:7 Kingumbʼiki kia ejiia
2Kings17:8 Iá enda jinga mu jingonge ja ifuẋi ia akua jixi
2Kings17:9 O mu kasuèkele ue
2Kings17:10 Iá a di-kubila iteka ni idifua ia mixitu mu tu milundu tuoso ni bhu ixina ioso ia miẋi ia di-zandela.
2Kings17:11 Iá a bhiti ue ni kuohela uasu ua dizumba ku matala eneʼó kala kia bhanga jinga o ifuxi ia akua jixi jengi ia kaiesa kuala Jihova bhu pholo ia ene; iá a bhanga jinga muene ima ia ufusa
2Kings17:12 Iá a bhikila muene o iteka ioio
2Kings17:13 O Jihova iú ua bazela jinga Izalaiele ni Juda ku ukunji ua misesedi iê
2Kings17:14 Maji ene-phe nguaʼiê kubhana mátui; inda a ngangamanesa o jixingu jâ kala kia ngangamana jinga o jixingu ja jitata jâ
2Kings17:15 Iá a tènde o jingonge ni kikutu kia Jihova
2Kings17:16 O ijila ioso ia Jihova
2Kings17:17 Katé ni anʼâ a mala ni anʼâ ahatu a oha jinga mu túbhia mu ku satela o mahamba; a dibhakula mu kuzambula
2Kings17:18 Kiene kia bhekesa Jihova ku thathamena kiavulu Izalaiele
2Kings17:19 Katé ni Juda muene ue
2Kings17:20 Kala kiki-phe
2Kings17:21 Mbata a tandula Izalaiele ku dibhata dia Davidi
2Kings17:22 Kienʼiki anʼa Izalaiele iá enda jinga mu ituxi ioso ia tele Jelubouamu; a lémbua kiá o ku ieha ni ku di-batuka na-iu
2Kings17:23 katé Jihova kia sondolola Izalaiele bhu pholo iê
2Kings17:24 Sobha ia Asídia anga uiza ni athu engi ku Babele
2Kings17:25 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila
2Kings17:26 Kienʼiki ia aii mu ku kitangela sobha ia Asídia
2Kings17:27 Kienhokio o sobha ia Asídia iú ua tumu ku a tangela
2Kings17:28 Anga kuiza-phe nganga imoxi
2Kings17:29 Maji-phe
2Kings17:30 Anga akua Babele a bhanga dihamba diâ
2Kings17:31 Akua Hava a bhange Niba ni Talatake; akua Sefalavaime a kuata kuoha o tuana tuâ mu túbhia
2Kings17:32 Kienʼiki kia kexile mu ku kuatela Jihova uoma. Ia a zangula o athu a suku-ku mu kusebuluka ku mundu
2Kings17:33 Kieneʼokio ià a kexi mu kuila: Jihova a mu kuatela uoma
2Kings17:34 Katé-phe ni mu kizuua kia lelu
2Kings17:35 Né kieneʼokio-phe
2Kings17:36 Maji kikale ngó kua Jihova
2Kings17:37 Ni mabatuilu
2Kings17:38 O kikutu-phe ki nga te ni enu kana ku ki jimba; kana ku kala ni uoma ua jinzambi jengi.
2Kings17:39 Maji Jihova
2Kings17:40 Maji ene-phe a lémbua kuívua ima ioso iii; inda ene a lengulukila kubhanga ima ia kikexilu kiâ kiʼòkulu.
2Kings17:41 Kienhiki
2Kings18:1 Hé ki bhita-phe kuila
2Kings18:2 Kioso ki andeka o kutumina
2Kings18:3 Iú ua bhanga jinga ima ia iuka bhu pholo ia Jihova
2Kings18:4 Kuma muenʼiú ua katula o matala oso
2Kings18:5 Ma kudielela Jihova
2Kings18:6 Mukonda ua di-bande kua Jihova
2Kings18:7 Kienʼiki ue o Jihova iú ua kexile jinge ni muene; o kuoso-kuoso kuʼaia
2Kings18:8 O akua Fidíxia u a tolola katé mu Ngaza
2Kings18:9 Anga ki bhita kuila
2Kings18:10 O kiabhu mivu itatu
2Kings18:11 Anga akua Izalaiele a a balakala ku Asídia kuala sobha ia Asídia; iú ua a tumikisa ku Hala ni ku Habolo
2Kings18:12 Kuma a fulu kutumaka o dízui dia Jihova
2Kings18:13 Maji ue
2Kings18:14 Bhenhobho Ezekiia
2Kings18:15 Ezekiia bhenhobho hé u mu bhana o phalata ioso ia kexile mʼonzo ia Jihova ni iii ioso ia kexile mu malundilu a dibhata dia sobha.
2Kings18:16 Mu thembu ieneʼoio kiene Ezekiia kia batula o ulu ua kexile ku mabhitu a Tembulu ia Jihova ni ku jiphidika jê kua u xiile Ezekiia dia sobha ia Juda muene
2Kings18:17 Sumbala kiene
2Kings18:18 O kiexana sobha
2Kings18:19 Anga Labesaki u a tangela
2Kings18:20 O ki ua mu ki tanga eie
2Kings18:21 Eie-phe ua dielela Ijitu
2Kings18:22 O ki mu ngʼila-phe
2Kings18:23 Tala-ze
2Kings18:24 Eie u tena kiebhi o ku kuatesa sonhi ku kilamba kimoxi ngó ku ilamba iofele ia mu bhikila ngana iami? Inga ua dielela Ijitu mukonda dia kuvula makalu ni athu a a sambela?
2Kings18:25 Inga ua fika kuila eme nga dʼijiia ngó ni kubanda eme mueneʼami mu kumuanga o kididi kiki
2Kings18:26 Bhenhobho ni Eliiakime
2Kings18:27 Maji Labesaki ua a vutuila uixi: Manhi o ngana iami ua ngi tumu o ku ku tangela ngoho eie ni muadiʼé o maka musoʼama? Manhi o maka iá ka a tumu ue
2Kings18:28 Kieneʼokio o Labesaki unzangamana
2Kings18:29 Sobha uambe kiki
2Kings18:30 ni ngó ue bhuʼofele
2Kings18:31 Ezekiia-phe kana ku mu bhana mátui
2Kings18:32 Katé bhu ngʼijila mu ku miʼambata ku ixi ia di-fuangana ni ienu-iene; ixi ia tiliku ni uálua; ixi ia mbolo ni vinhu; ixi iezala midívua
2Kings18:33 Manhi o jinzambi ja akua jixi jengi
2Kings18:34 O jinzambi ja Hamate ni Alapade
2Kings18:35 Mu kaẋi ka jinzambi josuʼiji
2Kings18:36 Maji o mundu uoso muene ni kuene hudí
2Kings18:37 Kieneʼokio ni Eliiakime dia monʼa Hilikiia
2Kings19:1 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila
2Kings19:2 Kieneʼokio ua zangula Eliiakime dia Kimbadi kiê
2Kings19:3 Ene ia a mu tangela
2Kings19:4 Mukonda nga fika muene kuma o Ngana ia Nzambi ié uevu maka oso a tange Labesaki
2Kings19:5 Anga abhika a sobha Ezekiia eza kua Izaia.
2Kings19:6 O Izaía-phe ua ambela
2Kings19:7 Tala kuma eme
2Kings19:8 O Labesaki kioso kia vutuka
2Kings19:9 O sobha muene kioso kievu kuila o Tilaka
2Kings19:10 O Ezekiia sobha ia Juda
2Kings19:11 Kuma eʼmuène ua dʼivila kiá kioso kiene mu kubhanga o jisobha ja Asídia ku jixi ja mukuá
2Kings19:12 Mbehu o jinzambi ja ifuẋi ja tena o kubhulula o jixi joso ja muangamuanga o jisobha ja Asídia
2Kings19:13 O sobha ia Hamate a mu bhange kiebhi? O sobha ia Alapade a mu bhange kiebhi? O jisobha ja mbanza ia Sefalavaime
2Kings19:14 O Ezekiia kioso kia tambula o mikanda iii bhu maku ma jiphunga
2Kings19:15 Ezekiia bhenhobho anga u samba bhu pholo ia Jihova
2Kings19:16 Bheteka
2Kings19:17 Kia kidi kiene Ngana
2Kings19:18 o jinzambi jâ a jii te muene mu túbhia; mukonda o jene ue ki jinzambi
2Kings19:19 O kiki-phe eie u Jihova Nzambi ietu
2Kings19:20 Kieneʼokio Izaia
2Kings19:21 O kizuelu-phe kia tange Jihova kua muene kienhiki: Uedi
2Kings19:22 Nanhi muene ua mu mu lokalala ni ku mu lebhula? Nanhi muene ua mu mu zangumuina o mbimbi ni kulekaleka mesu mê bhulu? Ki muenʼió Ukôla mua Izalaiele?
2Kings19:23 Mu kanu dia jiphunga jé muene mu ua lokalela Jihova
2Kings19:24 Eme nga kande jifiẋi eme ngʼanu menha ma jixi jengi; ni makanda mami ma inama nga ká diota hé ngi kukutisa jingiji joso ja ididi ia nguzu mu Ijitu.
2Kings19:25 Manhi eie kiluua u kʼivua kuila o ima iii nga i sokelesa kiá tundé ukulu
2Kings19:26 Kienʼiki-phe ió oso à tungu momo
2Kings19:27 Maji eie-phe nga kuʼijiia ni uxikamenu ué
2Kings19:28 Mukonda dia njinda ié i ua ngi kuatela
2Kings19:29 O kiki ki ku kala kijimbuete: O muvu iú anda kúdia ioso ia disabhukila iene; o muvu uiza ioso i tunda ku ngolongo; maji o mu muvu ua katatu
2Kings19:30 Mbata o kioso kià bhulaka mu dibhata dia Juda kí kia xala masubhu
2Kings19:31 Mukonda o kia bhulaka kia kà tunda ku mulundu ua Ziione
2Kings19:32 Kala kiki
2Kings19:33 O mu njila muoso muejila
2Kings19:34 Uixi: Mukonda o mbanza iii nga-nda ku i kambuidila
2Kings19:35 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila
2Kings19:36 Kieneʼokio o Senakedibe
2Kings19:37 Anga ki bhita kuila
2Kings20:1 Mu izuua muenhomo Ezekiia anga u kata
2Kings20:2 Kia kʼivu
2Kings20:3 Auá! Jihova
2Kings20:4 Anga ki bhita kuila
2Kings20:5 Vutuka uambele Ezekiia
2Kings20:6 O ku izuua ié nga-nda ku ueza-ku kuinhi dia mivu ni kitanu; o bhu maku ma sobha ia Asídia nga-nda ku ku kudila-bhu nʼeie ni sanzala iii; o sanzala iii nga-nda ku i ifikidila mukonda dia jihenda jami Eme-muène ni mukonda dia henda i nga kuatela Davidi dia mubhikʼami.
2Kings20:7 Izaia hé u zuela dingi
2Kings20:8 Ezekiia anga uambela Izaia
2Kings20:9 Kuala Izaia: O kiki ki ku kala kiene o kijimbuete ku mbandu ia Jihova
2Kings20:10 Bhenhobho Ezekiia uixi: O kizenji ki beta ku tuamena kuinhi dia makânda; maji
2Kings20:11 Bhenhobho o musesedi Izaia ua di-kola kua Jihova
2Kings20:12 Mu thembu ieneʼoio
2Kings20:13 Anga Ezekiia u a bhana mátui mu ku evua
2Kings20:14 Bhenhobho o Musesedi Izaia ueza kua sobha Ezekiia hé u mu ambela
2Kings20:15 Muene uixi: O mʼonzo ié a monʼomo Ohi? Ezekiia-phe
2Kings20:16 Bhenhobho o Izaia uambela Ezekiia
2Kings20:17 Talesa-ze
2Kings20:18 Katé kiabhu ni ku anʼé a tunda momué
2Kings20:19 Anga-phe Ezekiia uambela Izaia
2Kings20:20 Tala-phe
2Kings20:21 Anga Ezekiia u zeka ku mukânda ua mavu ni jitata jê; o Manasa dia monʼê u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê.
2Kings21:1 O Manasa kioso ki andeka o kutumina ua kexi mu kitala kia kuinhi dia muvu ni kiiadi
2Kings21:2 Iu ua bhanga jinga ima ia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova
2Kings21:3 Mbata ua tona dingi o kutunga o matala a muangene tatʼâ Ezekiia
2Kings21:4 O mʼonzo ia Jihova ua tungumu ue jikalatódio
2Kings21:5 O mu malumbu ma iadi ma inzu ia Jihova muene mua tungu jikalatódio phala o kifuẋi kioso kia diulu.
2Kings21:6 Katé ni monʼé muène ua mu bhitisa ue mu túbhia; ua kexi ue mu kuzambuila mu matuta; ua kexile ue mu xingila
2Kings21:7 Ua-te ue kiteka kia kusonga kia muxitu ua iudikile muene mu inzu ioio ia Jihova ia tangelele Davidi ni monʼê Solomá
2Kings21:8 O Izalaiele ki nga-nda ku mu bhangesa dingi kuzangula o kinama kiê mʼoxi iii i nga bhana ku jitata jâ; kabasa a kala ngó ni muanu ua kubhanga ioso i nga a tendelela
2Kings21:9 Maji-phe ene a tokoka o kuívua; mukonda o Manasa ua somboka mu ku a tondalesa katé ene a beta o kubhanga ufusa
2Kings21:10 Kienhokio o Jihova iú ua zuelela mu ukunji ua abhikʼê
2Kings21:11 Mukonda o Manasa
2Kings21:12 kala kiki
2Kings21:13 O ku thandu dia Jeluzaleme ngi tandeleka-ku ka mukolo ka Samádia ni pulumu ia dibhata dia Akabe; o Jeluzaleme ngi mu kondona kala muthu kia kondona ima ia bolo bhu lubaki
2Kings21:14 O iá a subhuka ku undundu uami
2Kings21:15 mukonda a bhange kia ibha ku mesuʼami a kumona
2Kings21:16 O kia di-te-ku dingi o Manasa ue ua zunza manhinga a vulu a athu a bene katé Jeluzaleme kia mu izalesa ngó ni manhinga tundé kua tundu katé kua suku; katu-ku hanji o kituxi kiê kia bhangesa na-kiu Juda o ku-ta kituxi ni kubhanga ima ki ia fuama bhu mesu ma Jihova.
2Kings21:17 Tala
2Kings21:18 Anga Manasa uzeka ku mukânda ua mavu ni jitata jê; hé a mu funda mu dibakala diê dia itulu ia dibhata diê; mu dibakala dia Uza; anga Amone dia monʼê u hinga bhu kididi kiê mu kutumina.
2Kings21:19 Amone ua kexile mu kitala kia makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kiiadi kioso kiandeka o kutumina
2Kings21:20 Anga uenda ni kubhanga ima ia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova kala kia bhanga jinga tatʼâ Manasa.
2Kings21:21 Mukonda uende muene mu jinjila joso jenda jinga tatʼâ; iu ua bhikila ue o iteka ia bhikila jinga tatʼâ
2Kings21:22 Kienhiki iú ua xisa Jihova
2Kings21:23 Maji o abhikʼé muene
2Kings21:24 Inda ue akuaʼxi a sota muene oso a tele kikutu kia kujibha sobha Amone ià a a jibha ue
2Kings21:25 Tala
2Kings21:26 Muene iá a mu fundu mu mbila iê mu dibakala dia itulu mu Uza; o Joziia
2Kings22:1 Joziia ua kexe mu dinake dia mivu kioso kiandeka o kutumina
2Kings22:2 Muene ua bhanga jinga ima ia kuiuka bhu mesuʼa Jihova; uenda jinga mu jinjila joso ja tatʼâ Davidi
2Kings22:3 Kia bhiti-phe kuila
2Kings22:4 Banda kua Hilikiia
2Kings22:5 Nda a ki bhane bhu maku a ió oso ala mu kutumina o kikalakalu
2Kings22:6 Ni ku jikalupindelu
2Kings22:7 Maji-phe ene ka bhange-nâ dingi jikonda ja kitadi kioso kia a bhana jinga bhu makuʼâ
2Kings22:8 Anga
2Kings22:9 Kienhokio o musoneki Safane ua vutuka
2Kings22:10 O musoneki Safane
2Kings22:11 Hé ki bhita-phe kuila
2Kings22:12 Sobha anga u tuma Hilikiia
2Kings22:13 Ndé-nu muà ngʼibhuile kua Jihova
2Kings22:14 Bhenhobho o nganga ia dikota Hilikiia
2Kings22:15 Muene ua vutuila
2Kings22:16 O Jihova uambe kiki: Talesa
2Kings22:17 Mukonda ene a ngi xisa
2Kings22:18 Maji o sobha ia Juda ua mi tumu o ku muʼibhuila kua Jihova
2Kings22:19 uixi: Mukonda o muxima ué ua teketa eie ua toloka bhu pholo ia Jihova
2Kings22:20 Kala kiki
2Kings23:1 Kienhokio Sobha hé u xikisa ngonge
2Kings23:2 O sobha anga u banda
2Kings23:3 Sobha hé uimana bhu mbanduʼa philadi anga u ta kikutu ni Ngana phala kuenda jinga ni Jihova
2Kings23:4 Sobha iú ua tumu o nganga ia dikota Hilikiia
2Kings23:5 O jinganga joso ja tele-ku o jisobha ja Juda phala kuenda ni kuohela o uasu ua dizumba bhu ididi ia di-leka mu jisanzala ja Juda ni mu ikanzu ia Jeluzaleme
2Kings23:6 Mu inzu ia Jihova ua katula-mu ue o kiteka kia muxitu iú uai na-kiu ku kanga mu thaka ia Jeluzaleme katé mu honga ia Kangiji ka Kidolone
2Kings23:7 Anga u bula ue ni jinzu ja jikuala
2Kings23:8 Anga o jinganga joso mu jisanzala ja Juda
2Kings23:9 Maji o jinganga ja matala
2Kings23:10 Ua tumbulula ue Tofete uala mu dikôlo dia anʼa Hinono; mbé ki bhu kale muthu u bhitisa monʼê ua diiala mba monʼê ua muhetu mu túbhia mu ku mu bhana sata ku dihamba dia muloko.
2Kings23:11 Ua katula ue ni jikabalu ja lumbilile dikumbi kuala o jisobha ja Juda ia a ji tele bhu muelu ua inzu ia Jihova bhua lulamena o dixilu dia ngolambole Natane-Meleke ua kexile mu lumbu; o makalu a dikumbi ua oha mu túbhia.
2Kings23:12 Sobha ua bula-bula ue o jikalatódio ja kexile ku di tala dia thandu dia inzu ia Akaji
2Kings23:13 O sobha ua tumbulula ni matala a lulamene ni mbanza ia Jeluzaleme
2Kings23:14 Jipholela joso ue ua ji bula-bula kiòmuene
2Kings23:15 Katé ue ni Kalatódio ka kexile bhu Betele ni ditala dia bhangele Jelubouamu monʼa Nebate
2Kings23:16 O Joziia kioso kia lunguluka
2Kings23:17 Anga uibhula dingi
2Kings23:18 Muene-phe
2Kings23:19 O kia di-te-ku ue dingi
2Kings23:20 Iú ua jibha muene o jinganga joso ja kexi mu kubhela o jisata bhu matala ku thandu dia jikalatódio ni kua ohela ifuba ia athu ku thandu; anga u vutuka kiua ku Jeluzaleme.
2Kings23:21 Sobha bhenhobho o mundu uoso u a xikila o ngonge
2Kings23:22 Mbata kiluua dingi a bhanga kizola kia Phasu kala iii
2Kings23:23 Maji-phe mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni nake
2Kings23:24 Joziia ua zubha-ku ue o akua kuzambula
2Kings23:25 Kioso muene kiluua a kala-ku
2Kings23:26 Sumbala kiene
2Kings23:27 Jihova anga uamba
2Kings23:28 Tala
2Kings23:29 Mu izuua ia Joziia
2Kings23:30 Anga abhikʼê a muʼambata kimbi kiê tunde bhu Mejido hé eza-nê mu Jeluzaleme
2Kings23:31 Nzouakaji ua kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni itatu kioso
2Kings23:32 Iú ua bhange muene ima ia ibha bhu mesuʼa Jihova
2Kings23:33 Maji o Falaó dia Neku ua tumu ku mu kutisa
2Kings23:34 O Falaó dia Neku ue ua zangula Eliiakime dia monʼa Joziia
2Kings23:35 O Nzouakí ua bhana jinga o phalata ioso ioio ni ulu uoso ió kua Falaó
2Kings23:36 Nzouakí ua kexe mu kitala kia makuinhi aiadi a muvu ni kitanu
2Kings23:37 Iú ua bhanga jinga ima ia ibha bhu mesuʼa Jihova
2Kings24:1 Mu izuua ia Nzouakí muene mua bande Nabukodonozolo
2Kings24:2 Maji o Jihova phe ua mu tumikisa ifuẋi ia masoladi ma akua Kaldeia
2Kings24:3 Ni kidi muene phe
2Kings24:4 Kumoxi ue ni manhinga a athu a iuka muene a ẋamuna
2Kings24:5 Mu kutanga ioso ia bhiti na-iu Nzouakí ni ima ioso muene ia bhange
2Kings24:6 Anga Nzouakí u zeka ku mukànda ua mavu ni jitata jê; o Nzuakí dia monʼé anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê.
2Kings24:7 O sobha ia Ijitu ue nuka dingi a tundile mʼoxi ie; mukonda o sobha ia Babilónia ua mu tambula ioso ia kexile na-iu tundé ku ngiji ia Ijitu ndú ku honga ia Ufalate.
2Kings24:8 Nzuakí ua kexile mu kitala kia kuinhi dia mivu ni nake kioso kiandeka o kutumina; iú ua tumina mbeji jitatu mu Jeluzaleme; o mamʼâ dijina die Neuxta
2Kings24:9 Anga uenda ni kubhanga ima ia ibha bhu mesuʼa Jihova
2Kings24:10 Mu izuua ienhoio muene mua bande abhika a Nabokodonozolo
2Kings24:11 Anga Nabokodonozolo
2Kings24:12 Bhenhobho o Nzuakí
2Kings24:13 O jimbongo joso ja inzu ia Jihova ni jimbongo joso ja dibhata dia sobha
2Kings24:14 Iú ua balakala ene oso a tunga mu Jeluzaleme; kutale o ilamba iê
2Kings24:15 Ni Nzuakí a mu balakala ue ku Babilónia; ni manhʼâ sobha
2Kings24:16 o athuʼoso
2Kings24:17 Anga bhu kididi kia Nzuakí ku ungana u bhinganesa-bhu sekuluʼê Mataniia ua tokala katata kê
2Kings24:18 Zedekiia muenhú ua kexi mu kitala kia makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni umoxi kioso kiandeka o kutumina; iú ua tumina mu Jeluzaleme kuinhi dia mivu ni umoxi; o dijina dia manhʼâ Hamutale
2Kings24:19 Iú ua bhanga jinga ima ia ibha bhu mesuʼa Nzambi
2Kings24:20 Kienʼiki kia bhiti mukonda dia njinda ia Jihova ia kuatela Jeluzaleme ni Juda
2Kings25:1 Anga ki bhita kuila mu kubhiẋila mu muvu ua kavua ua utuminu ua Zedekiia mu kizuua kia kakuinhi ku mbeji ia kakuinhi
2Kings25:2 Hé o mbonge a i konda katé mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni umoxi ua sobha Zedekiia.
2Kings25:3 Ku tula ma kizuua kia kavua ku mbeji ia kauana kioso o mbanza kia i tatesa kuala o nzala
2Kings25:4 bhenhobho o mbanza a i bulu
2Kings25:5 Maji o masoladi a akua Kaldeia ai ni kukaia sobha Zedekiia ia a mu kuatela mu iphenza ia Jedikó; o masoladi é-muene kia ki mono
2Kings25:6 Sobha-phe anga a mu kuata a banda-nê kua sobha ia Babilónia
2Kings25:7 o ana a Zedekiia a a batuila o mítue bhu mesuê muene; o Zedekiia muene a mu tufula o mesu
2Kings25:8 O ku tula bhu mbeji ia katanu
2Kings25:9 Iú uoha o inzu ia Jihova ni inzu ia sobha
2Kings25:10 O masoladi oso muene a kilômbo kia akua Kaldeia
2Kings25:11 O athu oso dingi a subhukile ku kifuẋi kia mundu mu mbonge
2Kings25:12 Maji o ku jingadiama ja ngadiadia mu ixi
2Kings25:13 O jiphiladi ja ngondo ja kexile mʼonzo ia Jihova
2Kings25:14 O jímbia ni jipá ni ijiminu ni jikingutu ni itutu ioso ia kobidi ia kexile mu kubhangela ukunji
2Kings25:15 O Kabhitangu ka kilangidilu uambata ue ni iomuenu ia makala
2Kings25:16 O philadi jene kiiadi kiâ ni musanza
2Kings25:17 O philadi imoxi kulebha kuê iambata kuinhi dia kóvadu ni nake
2Kings25:18 Kabhitangu ka kilangidilu ue ua zangula Selaia
2Kings25:19 Mu mbonge ue uambata-mu dingi ngolambole imoxi ua di-bhangele muene o kilolo kia ita a mu bhele ku tumina o makuenze oso a ita
2Kings25:20 O kioso Nebuzaladane kabhitangu ka kilangidilu
2Kings25:21 Anga sobha ia Babilónia u a kuamena bhu Dibaia bhenhobho hé u a jibhila mu ixi ia Hamate; Juda hé a mu katula mu ixi iê anga a mu bheka kuengi mu ubhika.
2Kings25:22 Maji-phe ku ió a subhuka ku mundu mʼoxi ia Juda
2Kings25:23 O jikabhitangu ja ifuẋi
2Kings25:24 O Jedaliia anga ua lokela ni ene ni mundu uâ
2Kings25:25 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila mu kubhiẋila bhu mbeji ia kasambuadi
2Kings25:26 Kienhokio o mundu uoso ua zangumuka tundé ku monʼa ndenge tulé ku muadiakime
2Kings25:27 Kia zubha kubhita imʼiii mu muvu ua makuinhi a tatu ni sambuadi
2Kings25:28 Hé u mu zuelesa ni kiadi kioso
2Kings25:29 Anga u mu zula izuatu ia upelezu ia kexile na-iu mu kiboiongo
2Kings25:30 Sobha muene ku mbandu iê hé uia jinga ni ku mu bhana kúdia

2Chronicles4:4 Musanza anga a u tula ku thandu dia kuinhi dia ngombe ni kiiadi: Jitatu ji lunga jipholo ku suku; jitatu ji lunga jipholo ku luiji; jitatu ji lunga jipholo ku sulu; o jitatu ja mukuá ji talela ku thunda; o musanza ua kalunga a u tula ku thandu diâ; o jimbunda ja jingombe ja bhela ku mbandu ia moxi.

2Chronicles4:10 O musanza ua kalunga ua u tula ku lukuaku lua kadilu ku mbandu ia mutundila-kumbi kua lulamena ku sulu.

2Chronicles7:1 Kioso Solomá kia zubha o kusamba
2Chronicles7:2 O jinganga-phe ka tenene kubokona mʼonzo ia Jihova

2Chronicles7:4 Bheneʼobho sobha ni kifuẋi kioso a kuata kubhakula jisata bhu pholo ia Jihova.
2Chronicles7:5 O Sobha Solomá anga u bhakula makuinhi aiadi ni kiiadi a midi ia sata ja jingombe

2Chronicles30:27 Bhenhobho
2Chronicles31:1 Kioso o ima ioso iii ki iabhu
2Chronicles31:2 Anga Ezekiia u ta o jinganga ni jilevita ku ibuka
2Chronicles31:3 Ku jimbongo ja sobha ue ua xindi-ku mbandu phala o jisata ja kuoha
2Chronicles31:4 Anga u tendelela o mundu
2Chronicles31:5 O kizuelu kienhiki kioso ki kia sambuka ku mbandu joso
2Chronicles31:6 O anʼa Izalaiele ue ni Juda
2Chronicles31:7 Ku mbeji ia katatu kiene kia mateka o kubhanga jimvumbu ja dianga; ku mbeji ia kasambuadi
2Chronicles31:8 Ezekiia kioso kia kieza kumoxi ni ilamba
2Chronicles31:9 Ezekiia anga uibhula o jinganga ni jilevita ku mbandu ia jimvumbu jeneʼojo.
2Chronicles31:10 Azadiia-phe o nganga ia dikota
2Chronicles31:11 Bheneʼobho Ezekiia kuema dia inzu ia Jihova
2Chronicles31:12 Kia zubha ku ma iudika
2Chronicles31:13 Ni Jihiiele
2Chronicles31:14 O Kola
2Chronicles31:15 A kaiela kua muene a mu kexile bhoxi dia lukuaku luê ene a Edene
2Chronicles31:16 Katu-ku ió a alula ku mísala ia Uvuadiue ua athu
2Chronicles31:17 Kumoxi ue ni iá a alula ku mísala ia Uvuadiue ua jinganga
2Chronicles31:18 Kala ue kiala mu mísala ia Uvuadiue uâ
2Chronicles31:19 Ni mu kaẋi ue kʼanʼa Alá
2Chronicles31:20 Ezekiia anga u bhanga kienhiki mu ixi ioso ia Juda anga u bhanga muene kia uabha
2Chronicles31:21 O mu ima ioso i andeka kubhanga
2Chronicles32:1 O kia bhiti ima iosuʼii
2Chronicles32:2 Ezekiia-phe kioso kia mono kuila Sinakedibhe iú uiza muene mu kúlua ni Jeluzaleme
2Chronicles32:3 ua te kikutu ni adiakime aʼxi iê
2Chronicles32:4 Kieneʼokio
2Chronicles32:5 Muene anga ubhua uoma
2Chronicles32:6 ua te jifixiiadi ja ita mu kutumina o mundu
2Chronicles32:7 Kuatenu nguzu
2Chronicles32:8 Muene uala ni lukuaku lua xitu
2Chronicles32:9 Kia bhiti imʼiii
2Chronicles32:10 Sinakedibhe
2Chronicles32:11 Mbé o Ezekiia ki muene uala ku mi funhisa
2Chronicles32:12 Ezekiia ki muene umoxi ua katula o matala mâ ni jikalatódio jâ
2Chronicles32:13 Inga enu ki mua kʼijiia
2Chronicles32:14 Mu jinzambi ja jixi joso jiná ja muanga jinga jitata jami
2Chronicles32:15 Kiki-phe Ezekiia ka mi tobhese
2Chronicles32:16 O abhikʼê a beta dingi kuondolola Jihova Nzambi ni kuondolola Ezekiia dia mubhikʼê.
2Chronicles32:17 Sinakedibhe ua soneka ue ni mikanda ia kuẋonguena Jihova
2Chronicles32:18 Anga a di kola muene ni dízui dia suina mu mbimbi ia akua Juda mu kuondolola akua Jeluzaleme
2Chronicles32:19 O Nzambi ia Jeluzaleme anga a mu zuela muene kala o jinzambi ja akua jixi mungongo
2Chronicles32:20 Maji o sobha Ezekiia ni polofeta Izaía
2Chronicles32:21 Kieneʼokio o Jihova ua tumikisa anju imoxi i ia jikinisa o mala oso a mazonda
2Chronicles32:22 Kienhiki Jihova kia bhulula Ezekiia ni iá a tunga mu Jeluzaleme
2Chronicles32:23 A vulu anga aia ni kubheka maujitu mu Jeluzaleme kua Jihova ni ima ia te kiavulu kua Ezekiia sobha ia Juda
2Chronicles32:24 Mu izuua mueneʼomo anga Ezekiia u katela kufua; anga u samba kua Jihova
2Chronicles32:25 Maji Ezekiia o mbote ia mu bhange ka i tambuijila kala kia tokala
2Chronicles32:26 Ezekiia-phe anga u di tolesa mukonda dia kudizangeleka kua muẋima uê
2Chronicles32:27 Ezekiia anga u kala ni umvuama ni fuma ia vulu; anga u lunda muene jimbongo ja phalata
2Chronicles32:28 Ua bhange ue ni inganja ia kubhongoluela o jimbutu ja tiliku
2Chronicles32:29 Ua tungu ue jimbonge
2Chronicles32:30 Ezekiia muene anga u xitila otho ia dikota ia ngiji ia Jihone
2Chronicles32:31 Maji-phe
2Chronicles32:32 O mu kutanga dingi ima ia mukuá ia bhanga jinga Ezekiia
2Chronicles32:33 Anga Ezekiia u nhoha ni jitata jê
2Chronicles33:1 Manasa kioso kiandeka kutumina
2Chronicles33:2 Anga u bhanga muene kia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova
2Chronicles33:3 Mukonda muene ua tona dingi kutunga o matala a budijile tatʼâ Ezekiia
2Chronicles33:4 O mu inzu ia Jihova ua tungu-mu jikalatódio
2Chronicles33:5 O kifuxi kioso kia diulu anga u ki tungila jikalatódio
2Chronicles33:6 Anga u bhitisa ue anʼê mu túbhia mu honga ia dikôlo dia monʼa Hinome; ua zambula jinga ue
2Chronicles33:7 Anga u ta ue mʼonzo ia Nzambi
2Chronicles33:8 Ki mungu dingi ngi katula o kinama kiami mua Izalaiele
2Chronicles33:9 Anga o sobha Manasa u tondalesa luavulu Juda ni iá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme
2Chronicles33:10 Jihova anga u zuelela Manasa ni kifuxi kiê
2Chronicles33:11 Ki kia bhangesa Jihova kutulula ku thandu diâ o ilamba ia kifuxi kia sobha ia Asídia; ene anga Manasa a mu kuatela mu minha
2Chronicles33:12 O muene
2Chronicles33:13 Anga u mu sambela. O Ngana Nzambi anga o njinda iê kua Manasa i tululuka
2Chronicles33:14 Kia bhiti imiʼii
2Chronicles33:15 Anga o jinzambi jengi joso
2Chronicles33:16 Anga u tunga dingi o kalatódio ka Jihova
2Chronicles33:17 Maji-phe o mundu hanji a kexi mu ku satela bhu matala ma di leka
2Chronicles33:18 O ima dingi ia mukuá ia bhiti ni sobha Manasa
2Chronicles33:19 Ni musambu uê ua sambela Nzambi
2Chronicles33:20 Manasa anga u zeka kuʼàia jitata jê
2Chronicles33:21 Amone kioso kiandeka o kutumina
2Chronicles33:22 Anga u bhanga kia ibha muene bhu pholo ia Jihova
2Chronicles33:23 Maji ua tokoka o ku tolokela Jihova kala kia tolokele Manasa dia tatʼâ; muene-phe kia mu kexile kota o kuvudisa dingi o ikuma ni milonga iê.
2Chronicles33:24 Abhikʼê anga a mu ta o kikutu kia ufe hé a mu jibhila mʼonzo iê muene.
2Chronicles33:25 Maji akuaʼxi ue
2Chronicles34:1 Joziia kioso kiandeka o kutumina ua kexi ngó mu nake dia mivu
2Chronicles34:2 Muene anga u bhanga ima ia iuka bhu pholo ia Jihova; anga uenda muene mu jinjila ja Davidi
2Chronicles34:3 Mukonda o kioso kia bhixila mu muvu ua kanake ua utuminu uê
2Chronicles34:4 O jikalatódio ja Bale ua jimanena mu ku ji bula-bula; muene anga u batujula o iteka ia dikumbi ia kexile ku thandu dia jikalatódio; ni mixitu ni iteka ia kusonga
2Chronicles34:5 O ifuba ia jinganga ua i ohela ku thandu dia jikalatódio jâ; anga kienʼiki u zelesa Juda ni Jeluzaleme.
2Chronicles34:6 Mu jimbonge joso ja Manasa
2Chronicles34:7 O kia zubha kubula o jikalatódio joso ni mixitu
2Chronicles34:8 Mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni nake
2Chronicles34:9 Anga eza
2Chronicles34:10 O kitadi hé a ki bhana kua oso a kexile mu kutumina o kikalakalu
2Chronicles34:11 Anga a ki bhana ku jimesene ja ufunu ni akua kutunga
2Chronicles34:12 Athu eneʼá anga a kalakala ni ufiiele uoso ku kikalakalu; o a kexile mu ku a tumina eneʼá: Johate ni Obadiia
2Chronicles34:13 Anga a kala ue mu kutumina o jingamba ni oso a kexile mu ku a tumina ku kikalakalu kioso-kioso kia kubhanga; amoxi-mu ku jilevita a kexile asoneki
2Chronicles34:14 Ene kioso kia mu katula o kitadi kiejile na-kiu athu kuʼonzo ia Jihova
2Chronicles34:15 Hilikiia anga u kumbulula
2Chronicles34:16 O Safane anga uambata o Divulu kua sobha
2Chronicles34:17 Ene a bhongolola o kitadi kioso ki ala mʼonzo ia Jihova
2Chronicles34:18 O kia di te-ku dingi
2Chronicles34:19 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila o sobha kioso kievu o maka ma kitumu
2Chronicles34:20 Hé u tuma Hilikiia ni Haikane
2Chronicles34:21 Ndenu mua kà ngʼibhuile kua Jihova
2Chronicles34:22 Bheneʼobho Hilikiia ni jiphûnga ja sobha
2Chronicles34:23 Muene anga u a tangela
2Chronicles34:24 Jihova uambe
2Chronicles34:25 Mbata a ngi xisa
2Chronicles34:26 maji-phe o sobha ia Juda ua mi tumu ku ibhula kua Jihova
2Chronicles34:27 Kuma o muẋima ué eie ua teketa
2Chronicles34:28 Tala nga-nda ku ku bhongoluela ku jitata jé
2Chronicles34:29 Bheneʼobho sobha u xika ngonge anga u bhongolola adiakimi oso mua Juda ni mu Jeluzaleme.
2Chronicles34:30 Athu oso mua Juda kumoxi ni iá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme
2Chronicles34:31 Sobha
2Chronicles34:32 Anga u tuma ue kuila ene oso ala mu Jeluzaleme ni mua Bejamí emana; iá-phe a tungu mu Jeluzaleme anga a bhanga muene kala kia tokala o kikutu kia Nzambi
2Chronicles34:33 Joziia anga u katula ima ioso ia isunji mu jixi joso ja tokalele anʼa Izalaiele
2Chronicles35:1 Kieneʼokio Joziia anga u bhanga fesa ia Phasu mu Jeluzaleme kua Jihova; o kambudi ka Phasu anga a ka jibha bhu kizuua kia kuinhi ni kiuana ku mbeji ia dianga.
2Chronicles35:2 Hé u ta dingi o jinganga mu ikalakalu iâ
2Chronicles35:3 Anga uambela o jilevita a di lumbilile kua Jihova
2Chronicles35:4 Di iudikienu-phe kiambote kala ki muala ku mabhata ma jitata jenu
2Chronicles35:5 Ni mu kale mu dibhezelu dikola ku ukunji
2Chronicles35:6 Nda mu jibhe o kambudi ka Phasu; di zelesienu mu iudike o kambudi ka Phasu phala o jiphange jenu
2Chronicles35:7 Joziia anga u bhana ku anʼa kifuẋi tumbudi ni tuhombo tua ndumbe
2Chronicles35:8 O ilamba ia sobha ue
2Chronicles35:9 O Konaniia
2Chronicles35:10 Anga a lunga kienhiki o kikalakalu; o jinganga a di kuua mu ididi iâ
2Chronicles35:11 Anga a jibhila kiá o Phasu; o jinganga a kuala o kusangela o manhinga oso a kexile mu kutambula bhu maku ma jilevita
2Chronicles35:12 O jisata ja kuoha anga a di tudilila-ju ni mbandu iê phala ku ji bhana ku kifuẋi kala kioso kia di uane o mabhata ma jitata jâ
2Chronicles35:13 O mbudi ia Phasu anga a i oha mu túbhia kala kiene o kífua; o maujitu oso a lumbila kua Jihova a ma lambe mu jímbia
2Chronicles35:14 Anga a iudika kiua ioso ia tokalele ene ni jinganga; mukonda o jinganga
2Chronicles35:15 O jingimbidi anʼa Azafe
2Chronicles35:16 Kienʼiki kia xikika o kikalakalu kioso kia Jihova mu kizuua kieneʼokio phala o kuimununa o Phasu ni kubhakula o jisata ja kuoha ku thanduʼa Kalatódio ka Jihova kala kia tumu o ngonge ia sobha Joziia.
2Chronicles35:17 O anʼa Izalaiele a kexile bheneʼobho
2Chronicles35:18 O kuimununa kua Phasu iii
2Chronicles35:19 O Phasu ienʼiii a imununa ku muvu ua kakuinhi ni nake ua utuminu ua sobha Joziia.
2Chronicles35:20 Kia zubha o kubhita o ima iii
2Chronicles35:21 Muene-phe hé u mu tumikisa jiphunga
2Chronicles35:22 Maji-phe o Joziia ua di tunu o kuvutuka kuema ni ku mu bhana dikunda
2Chronicles35:23 O akua kuasa o misongo anga sobha Joziia a mu asa; bheneʼobho sobha uambela abhikʼê
2Chronicles35:24 O abhikʼê anga a mu katula mu dikalu hé a mu ambata a mu ta mu dikalu dia kaiadi dia kexile nadiu
2Chronicles35:25 Jelemiia anga u bhanga mimbu ia thambi mu kudila Joziia; o jingimba joso ja mala ni ja ahatu anga a tenda Joziia mu mimbu iâ ia kudila
2Chronicles35:26 O ima ia mukuá dingi ia bhiti ni Joziia ni jimbote jê ja bhanga jinga kala kia ki soneka mu kitumu kia Jihova
2Chronicles35:27 ni ima ia mukuá dingi ia bhanga jinga
2Chronicles36:1 O bheneʼobho akuaʼxi anga a zangula Jouakaji
2Chronicles36:2 Jouakaji-phe kala uala mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kitatu
2Chronicles36:3 mbata o sobha ia Ijitu ua mu katula ku usobha mu Jeluzaleme; o ixi anga u i jijila kufuta lubhaku lua hama ia jitalendu ja phalata ni talendu imoxi ia ulu.
2Chronicles36:4 O sobha ia Ijitu anga u ta Eliiakí
2Chronicles36:5 Kieneʼokio
2Chronicles36:6 Nabukodonozolo
2Chronicles36:7 O Nabukodonozolo anga uambata ue ni itutu imoxi-mu ia inzu ia Jihova
2Chronicles36:8 Ki tuʼila o ima ia mukuá dingi ia bhange Nzuakí ni maufusa mê ma bhanga jinga ni ima ia mukuá dingi ia vulu ia sange momué
2Chronicles36:9 Nzuakí kioso kia mateka o kutumina ua kexile mu kitala kia nake dia mivu; ua tumina mu Jeluzaleme mbeji jitatu ni kuinhi dia kizuua anga u bhanga ioso ia ibha ku mesu a Jihova.
2Chronicles36:10 O bhu kisonaxi ku muvu
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiia ua kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kitanu kioso kiandeka o kutumina; iú ua tumina kuinhi dia mivu ni kamoxi mu Jeluzaleme.
2Chronicles36:12 Anga u bhanga muene ima ia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova
2Chronicles36:13 O kia di te-ku dingi
2Chronicles36:14 O atumini oso mu jinganga ni kifuẋi ene a kexile mu kuvudisa dingi ni dingi muene
2Chronicles36:15 Anga Jihova
2Chronicles36:16 Maji ene-phe
2Chronicles36:17 Mukonda Jihova ua bhangesa sobha ia jikaldeu kubanda o minzangala iâ
2Chronicles36:18 O itutu ioso ia inzu ia Nzambi
2Chronicles36:19 O inzu ia Jihova anga a i oha
2Chronicles36:20 O ió a subhuka ku xibhata ua ambata
2Chronicles36:21 Mbé o kizuelu kia Jihova ki tenene kia tange ku dikanu dia Jelemiia
2Chronicles36:22 Maji-phe
2Chronicles36:23 Silu

Ezra1:2 Silu

Ezra1:9 Dialuilu diâ didi: Makuinhi a tatu a malonga a pholo a ulu; hulukaji ia malonga pholo a phalata; makuinhi a iadi a phoko niʼvua
Ezra1:10 makuinhi a tatu a kopho ja ulu; hama jiuana ni kuinhi dia kopho ja phalata ia kidifua kiengi ni midi dingi ia itutu ia mukuá.
Ezra1:11 Itutu ioso ia ulu ni ia phalata ia kexile midi jitanu ni hama jiuana. Iene iosuʼiii Sebazale ua i ambata kioso anʼa Izalaiele kia tundu mu ubhika ku Babilónia

Ezra3:1 Kia bhixila mbeji ia kasambuadi
Ezra3:2 Jesuua
Ezra3:3 Anga a xikika Kalatódio ku ibhuna iê (o ifikidilu iê)
Ezra3:4 Fesa ia jifundu ue a i bhange muene kala kia ki soneka; jisata ja izuua ioso aii ni ku ji bhakula
Ezra3:5 Kia zubha iii
Ezra3:6 Tundé mu kizuua kia dianga
Ezra3:7 Hé a bhana-phe ue kitadi ku akua kubatula ni akua ufunu ua kusonga mabaia kumoxi ue
Ezra3:8 Kutula ku muvu ua kaiadi
Ezra3:9 Bhenhobho Jesuua anga u balumuka ni muene ni anʼê ni jiphange jê
Ezra3:10 Kioso akua kutunga kia te madisesa ma Tembulu ia Jihova
Ezra3:11 Anga a kuata ku di tambuijila mu kuimba
Ezra3:12 Sumbala kiene
Ezra3:13 Katé kia bhonzele muene kutungula o mbimbi ia kusanguluka
Ezra4:1 Kioso jinguma ja Juda ni Bejamí kievu kuila a tundu ku ubhika ia a tunga Tembulu ia Jihova
Ezra4:2 A bhixila kua Zolobabele ni ku jitata ja mabhata
Ezra4:3 Bhenhobho-phe ni Zolobabele ni Jesuua ni amukuá dingi
Ezra4:4 Kienhokio-phe kiá
Ezra4:5 Anga a futila jindaxi phala kuia ni ku a fudisa ioso ia mesena kubhanga izuua ioso
Ezra4:6 Ku dimatekenu-phe dia utuminu ua Asuuelu
Ezra4:7 O mu izuua ia Artaxexe ue
Ezra4:8 O komanande Lehu
Ezra4:9 Bhenhobho Lehu
Ezra4:10 Ni ifuẋi dingi ia mukuá
Ezra4:11 Maka a te mu mukanda ua sonekena sobha Artaxexe eneʼá: Abhikʼé
Ezra4:12 Tuma ku kʼijiia
Ezra4:13 Kala kiki-phe
Ezra4:14 Etu-phe
Ezra4:15 Nda u sote divulu dia malunda ma jitata jé
Ezra4:16 Etu-phe tua ku tangela-kiu muene ni kulomboloka kuoso
Ezra4:17 Anga sobha u vutula kiki kua Lehu
Ezra4:18 O mukanda u mua tu tumikisa
Ezra4:19 Mu ku u tongololʼeme
Ezra4:20 Mʼukulu ue kua kexile jisobha ja nguzu mu Jeluzaleme
Ezra4:21 Kindala-phe xikenu ngonge
Ezra4:22 Enu-phe di langienu
Ezra4:23 Kuabhu-phe
Ezra4:24 Kikalakalu kia inzu ia Jihova ia kexile mu Jeluzaleme anga kʼimana; hé ki nakina muene katé mu muvu ua kaiadi ua utuminu ua Ndala

Ezra5:2 Bhenhobho Zolobabele monʼa Selatiiele
Ezra5:3 Mu kithangana kienʼiokio
Ezra5:4 Anga a ebhula dingi lua mukuá
Ezra5:5 Né kienhokio-phe
Ezra5:6 O mukanda uʼokatule ku mukanda ua soneka Tatenai
Ezra5:7 Mua mu bhela kisoneke kia majina moso
Ezra5:8 Ki ku jimbulukile éʼsobha

Esther1:1 Maka a bhita mu izuua ia Asuuelu
Esther1:2 Mu izuua ienhoio kia zubha muenexi Asuuelu kuhinga ungana uê mu mbonge ia Suzana
Esther1:3 kutula mu muvu ua katatu ua kukala ku ungana uê
Esther1:4 muene anga u a edikiza jimbongo jê fa fumana ku mbanza
Esther1:5 Kia zubha kubhanga izuua ienhiʼii
Esther1:6 Bhu kala jithanga ja linhu jizela ni jʼazulu
Esther1:7 O jinganza jâ ja kunuina ji kala ja ulu
Esther1:8 O mukúnua
Esther1:9 Na mvale Váxiti
Esther1:10 Mu kizuua kia kasambuadi-phe
Esther1:11 kuila a takane na mvale Váxiti
Esther1:12 Maji na mvale Váxiti-phe kia mu sange jingolambole
Esther1:13 Anga u zuela ni adiakimi ejiia phangu ni ndongo ia jithembu ku mivu ni minhamo
Esther1:14 Ene-phe ilamba a kaiela kua muenexi majina mâ
Esther1:15 Muenexi anga u a ebhula
Esther1:16 Memukana anga u vutula bhu pholo ia muenexi ni jitata
Esther1:17 Kuma kia bhange na mvalʼiki
Esther1:18 Mu kizuua kia lelu kienhiki
Esther1:19 Se kia uabhela muenexi ku ki bhanga
Esther1:20 O ngonge ia muenexi-phe kia-nda ku i xikisa katé kua suku ixi iê
Esther1:21 Kizuelu kiê anga ki uabhela muenexi ni jitata joso; muenexi anga u ki bhanga kala kia mu longesa Memukana.

Esther2:1 Kia zubha kubhita imʼiii
Esther2:2 Bhenhobho akua mbele ia muenexi
Esther2:3 Nda u sote jifixiiadi mu sengu joso ja utuminu ué
Esther2:4 O mona kilumba-phe uoso ua ku uabhela eie u muenexi
Esther2:5 Mu mbonge ia Suzana-phe mua kexile judé imoxi
Esther2:6 Muenhú ua tûnda ku Jeluzaleme ni jihutile a a balakala kumoxi ni Jekoniia sobha ia Juda
Esther2:7 Muenhú muene ua sase Hadesa
Esther2:8 Mu kukala-phe
Esther2:9 Kilumba kiki anga ki mu uabhela
Esther2:10 Estere-phe ka di tange o muiji uê ni jindandu jê
Esther2:11 Moledekai anga u kala mu kuimajana izuua ioso bhu kanga dia lumbu lua inzo ia ahatu
Esther2:12 Kala kilumba-phe kia tula bhu kizuua kiê kia kubiẋila kua sobha Asuuelu
Esther2:13 O kioso kiza kilumba mu kubhikila kua muenexi a mu bhanga kienhiki: Kioso kia sola mʼonzo ia ahatu kia kuia na-kiu mʼonzo ia muenexi a mu bhana-kiu.
Esther2:14 Uia mu kumbi dia ngoloxi
Esther2:15 Kieza-phe o kizuua kia Estere
Esther2:16 Kienhiki kiambata Estere phala ku mu bheka kua muenexi. O kia zubha kubhiẋila kua muenexi Asuuelu mʼonzo iê
Esther2:17 Muenexi u beta kuzola Estere
Esther2:18 Muenexi anga u bhanga fesa ia dikota ia jifixiiadi jê ni akua mbèle iê; i kala fesa ia fuma ia Estere. Mu sengu joso anga u a bhana hanji kithangana kia kunhoha
Esther2:19 Kioso thembu iamukuá ia kaiadi kia bhongolola ana ilumba

Esther2:22 Moledekai anga u kʼivua
Esther2:23 O kia zubha ku a tokuesa

Esther9:1 Kutula bhu mbeje ia kaiadi ku dikuinhi
Esther9:2 Kizuua kienʼokio jijudé ji di bhongolola mu jimbonge jâ
Esther9:3 Jisobha joso mu jisengu
Esther9:4 Mukonda Moledekai ua tambula ukota mʼonzo ia muenexi; fuma iê ia sambuka mu jisengu joso; kijingo kiê anga kiia ni ku di bandekeza kizuua ni kizuua.
Esther9:5 Jijudé anga ji beta jinguma jâ joso ni mukuale
Esther9:6 Mu mbanza ngó ia Suzana
Esther9:7 Ni Padisandata
Esther9:8 ni Polata
Esther9:9 ni Padimaxita
Esther9:10 kuinhi dia muthu anʼa mala
Esther9:11 Kizuua kienʼokio muenexi a mu tudila o konda ia athu oso a a jibha mu mbanza ia Suzana.
Esther9:12 Muenexi anga u ambela na mvuale Estere
Esther9:13 Estere anga u mu ambela
Esther9:14 Muenexi anga u tuma ku ki bhanga; a ki xikisa ngonge mu Suzana; o kuinhi dia mona a Hamane anga a a nhenga.
Esther9:15 Jijudé a tungu mu Suzana anga a di bhongolola dingi mu kizuua kia kuinhi ni kiuana
Esther9:16 Jijudé jamukuá mu jisengu ja muenexi a di bhongolola ue
Esther9:17 Kienhiki à ki bhanga mu kizuua kia kuinhi ni kitatu
Esther9:18 O jijudé-phe ue ja kexile mu mbonge ia Suzana a di bhongolola mu kizuua kia kuinhi ni kitatu
Esther9:19 Kiene kia bhangesa kuila o jijudé ku matutu
Esther9:20 Moledekai anga u soneka ima iii
Esther9:21 phala ku a tendelela kuila kizuua kia kuinhi ni kiuana
Esther9:22 kuma iene o izuua ia bhanduluka jijudé ku usuéia uambele ku a bhanga o jinguma jâ; iene o mbeje iâ iambele kukala ia lâmba anga i biluka ia ngalasa
Esther9:23 Jijudé anga a xikana ku ki kumbidila
Esther9:24 Mukonda Hamane
Esther9:25 Maji o kieza o maka iá kua muenexi
Esther9:26 Mukonda dia kienhiki izuua ioio aʼixana Phudimi
Esther9:27 jijudé ja xikana o kijila kiki
Esther9:28 Exi izuua ienhiʼii ia tokala ku i lembalala jinga
Esther9:29 Kia bhiti imʼii
Esther9:30 Anga a tumikisa mikanda iii ku jijudé joso
Esther9:31 phala kuxikika ni kukumbidisa o izuua ia Phudimi bhu thembu iê
Esther9:32 Na mvuale Estere anga u xikisa ngonge ia kukumbidisa ima ioso iii ia Phudimi
Esther10:1 Kia zubha kubhita imʼii
Esther10:2 Ima ioso-phe ia bhangele Asuuelu ia uzonda uê ni kusuina kuê
Esther10:3 Kuma o judé Moledekai muene kaiadi ua kaiela kua muenexi Asuuelu
Job1:1 Kua kexile muthu
Job1:2 Anga u vuala sambuadi dia mona ua diiala ni kitatu kia ahetu.
Job1:3 O ibhaku
Job1:4 Anʼê anga a kuata kuila: Lelu aia mʼonzo ia iú
Job1:5 Jobe anga uia ni kuila
Job1:6 Kueza kizuua kimoxi
Job1:7 Bheneʼobho Jihova uibhula Satana uixi: Ua tundu kuebhi? Satana u vutuila Jihova
Job1:8 Ngana anga uibhula dingi Satana
Job1:9 Satana anga u vutuila Jihova uixi: Manhi
Job1:10 Manhi eie ku mu izalesa ni jimbote
Job1:11 Maji zènga hanji ngó o lukuaku lué
Job1:12 Ngana anga uambela Satana
Job1:13 Anga ki bhita kuila
Job1:14 Kueza mukunji kua Jobe u mu tangela
Job1:15 tala
Job1:16 Kioso iú kia mu zuela hanji
Job1:17 Kioso iú kiluua ngó a tula kuzuela
Job1:18 O iú ue ua kexʼé hanji mu zuela
Job1:19 Tala
Job1:20 Bheneʼobho
Job1:21 Uamba
Job1:22 Mu ima ioso iii Jobe ka tela-mu kituxi
Job2:1 Mu kizuua kia mukuá kioso kieza anʼa Nzambi mu ku di bhakula bhu pholo ia Jihova
Job2:2 Bheneʼobho Ngana uambela Satana
Job2:3 Jihova anga uambela Satana
Job2:4 Bheneʼobho Satana u vutuila Jihova
Job2:5 Sunununa ngó lukuaku lué
Job2:6 Jihova anga uambela Satana
Job2:7 Bheneʼobho Satana anga u sondoloka bhu pholo ia Jihova
Job2:8 Jobe anga u xikama mu uthôkua
Job2:9 Bhenhobho muhatuʼê u mu tangela
Job2:10 Maji muene u mu vutuila
Job2:11 O makamba a tatu a Jobe-phe
Job2:12 Ene kia zambula mesu mu kanga phala ku mu tala
Job2:13 Hé a xikama mu mavu kumoxi ni muene
Job3:1 Ki kia bhiti kienhiki
Job3:2 Jobe uamba
Job3:3 Ki jikinine muene o kizuua kia ngi vuala ni usuku uambe
Job3:4 Kizuua kienhókio ki di bhange kitombe; o Nzambi ue bhuluʼobho ka ki kuatele muanu
Job3:5 Usuku ua nzumba u ki sambukila ni kitombe kia kalunga; matuta a vundu a tunge ku thandu diê; ima ioso iedi bhuí ifuafua kala dixi i jimuna o muanha i ki kuatese uoma.
Job3:6 Usuku uenhó a u tambule kuala o kitombe kiedi muene buí; mu izuua ia kutana ku muvu
Job3:7 Auá! Usuku uenhó u kale ni ngùnzu; uile kala muhatu ua mbaku ua lémbua kuvuala; o mimbu iambote ia kusanguluka kana ku imba-mu.
Job3:8 Usuku uenhó a u bhubhidile kuala oso a di zemba kinéne ni muanha; ió oso ejiia muene kuthathamesa o ilulu mu kalunga;
Job3:9 jithéthembua ja usuku uenhó ji fuuetele
Job3:10 Mbata mabhitu ma divumu dia ngʼimitine ua kambe ku ma jika; mba kubhagesa kuila mesuʼami ka mone ki kala o hadi ni ngongo!
Job3:11 Eme ki ngi fuilaʼhi tundé mu divumu dia mamʼetu
Job3:12 Phalaʼhi ngó nga sange jiphuna
Job3:13 Mukonda hinu nga tandelelaʼmi kiá
Job3:14 Kumoxi ni jisobha ni jinjimu ja maka mu ngongo
Job3:15 Mba hinu nga zeka kumoxi ni ilamba a kexile ni ulu
Job3:16 Mba-phe hinu ngeju kuila kala muthu a mu seluka
Job3:17 Momo kiá ni athu a ibha ka tena dingi kuzukutisa; muenhomo mua bhingi kuila ni iá a bhuila a sanga kunhoha.
Job3:18 Oso a a kutu
Job3:19 Momo ua kulu ni ua tolo a sokela kumoxi; o mubhika u di kalela kiá ni ngana iê.
Job3:20 Mbata phalaʼhi ngoho o mukua hadi a mu bhana mukengeji uê
Job3:21 anga ela kingʼé o kalunga
Job3:22 kutana kuahi kua kala na-ku
Job3:23 Phalaʼhi a bhana mukengeji ku muthu ua bhingi o njila iê ia suama
Job3:24 Mukonda bhu kididi kia kúdia kuami
Job3:25 Mbata o kia ngi kuatele uoma
Job3:26 Ki ngene ni kunhoha
Job4:1 Bhenhobho Ilifaji mukua Temane u vutula
Job4:2 Se bhu kala muthu u mesena ku ku zuelesa
Job4:3 Tala
Job4:4 O maka mé a balumuna oso a dibhukana iá a di vundu bhoxi; o jiphuna ja teketa eie ua ji suinisa.
Job4:5 Maji o kindala eie ué kia kuiza
Job4:6 Manhi o uoma ué u ua kuatela Nzambi
Job4:7 Xinganeka hanji; Muthu ua bene
Job4:8 Ku uialelu uami
Job4:9 Ku muha ua dikanu dia Nzambi a jikinina; a buika ni mulenge ua njinda iê.
Job4:10 O ku kumba kua hoji
Job4:11 O hoji ia kuka i di fuila mukonda kana-ku mbole; ni tuana tua mama ia hoji tuia ngó ni kubungana.
Job4:12 Kizuelu kimoxi kia ngi tangela ni kufueta mu kasuekele; o mátui mami a kivu kufueta kuê.
Job4:13 Mu kaxi ka ixinganeku ia jinzoji ja usuku
Job4:14 nga tukumuka kua ngiza kukenana ni kuteketa
Job4:15 Bhenhobho anga ku pholo iami ku bhita kilulu; kia bhangesa kuila ni jindemba jami jʼemana
Job4:16 Kiemana muene
Job4:17 Manhi o muthu u kala kota mu kuiuka
Job4:18 Tala-ze
Job4:19 Kuambe dingi ió a tunga mu jinzu ja malôua
Job4:20 A a vuala mu kimene
Job4:21 Manhi o unéne uâ ki uene mu kubhita kumoxi ni ene
Job5:1 Kindala-phe ixana hanji; bhuala muthu u kuitaia? O kiki-phe kua anju nanhi
Job5:2 Kuma ió ua tobho o njinda iê iene i mu dia; o kiôua-phe a mu jibha kuala muanu uê-muène.
Job5:3 Ua tobho nga mu muene kiambote muene
Job5:4 O anʼé kubhuluka kua a kala dikanga; a a sanujuina muene bhu muelu; ki bhu kala ngó muthu u a kudila.
Job5:5 O idima iê ki íbhia
Job5:6 Mbata ima ioso ku mundu iala ni kuku ku i tunda; o ituxi ue ki i fuáfue ngó mu mavu ahatu.
Job5:7 Maji ku muthu kuene ku tunda o ituxi
Job5:8 Maji eme-phe
Job5:9 Muene u bhanga ima ia makota i bhonza ku ijiia
Job5:10 Muene u nokesa o mvula mu ngongo anga u tumikisa o menha mu mikáu.
Job5:11 Phala ua tolo o dijina a mu tule ditala dia dileka; o ió ua bhiti ni thambi a kale mu sanguluka ni jimbote ja vulu.
Job5:12 O ixinganeku ia jinjimu
Job5:13 Muene
Job5:14 Kuma mu muanha
Job5:15 Nzambi muene u kudila ua tate
Job5:16 Mukonda dia kienhiki
Job5:17 Tala-ze
Job5:18 Mbata muene se u bhanga fidila
Job5:19 Ua kà ku bhulula mu makubhondalala ma samanu; o lua kasambuadi ku ibha ki ku ku bhixila.
Job5:20 Mu nzala
Job5:21 Ku kibetu ki tunda bhu dimi
Job5:22 O kia kèza kibuika ni nzala
Job5:23 Kuma katé ni matadi mu mikáu
Job5:24 Hé ua kà kʼijiia kuila o dibhata dié dia tungu ni kutululuka; ua kà nhunga mu dibhata dié dioso
Job5:25 Anga ua kà kʼijiia ue kuila
Job5:26 O mu mbila ua kà bokona-mu kiá ua kuka muene
Job5:27 Talesa-ze
Job6:1 Bhenhobho
Job6:2 Aiué
Job6:3 Diene-ku
Job6:4 Mukonda o mifula ia Muteni-a-Ioso ia ngi kuata
Job6:5 Mbebhu o bulu ia mukáu i didila bhu mbanduʼa sabhelela? Mba o ngombe i didila bhu mbanduʼa iangu ia kúdia kuê?
Job6:6 Kima kia usáu ene mu ku ki dia kia kambe o môngua? Inga menhʼa diiaki a kala ni kutouala kuahi?
Job6:7 Muenhu uami kiene ki ua di tunina kukuata ku izuelu ienu
Job6:8 Tamanu bá se kia ẋikinine ku di bhanga uila ki ngala kubhinga
Job6:9 Tamanu Nzambi kia mu uabhelele o ku ngi sasujula
Job6:10 Kuma kienhiki hanji kieju beta kota
Job6:11 Ngi kingileʼhi ngó
Job6:12 Mbebhu o nguzu iami ia soko ni nguzu ia ditadi? Mba o xitu ia mukutu uami ia utadi ua ngòndo?
Job6:13 Lémbue! Ki ku ngi kala dingi kubhanduluka kua kima! Nguzu joso ja ngi muangana!
Job6:14 Uoso ua tate
Job6:15 Phange jami ka ngi bhange kiambote
Job6:16 Menha mê ma di vunza ni jelu ia di sueka-mu
Job6:17 O bhu thembu ia kusangumuka kuê ni kizuza
Job6:18 O ibuka ia jingenji
Job6:19 O jingenji ja Temane jʼa sota hanji; abhiteʼa njila ia Seba a tala kua ene ni ku di tula mienhu.
Job6:20 O kudielela kuâ
Job6:21 Kiki-phe enu ue mua soko-nâ; ki mua mono phaxi jami
Job6:22 Mbebhu eme nga miʼambela
Job6:23 Mba ngixi: Ngi kudidienu ku nguzu ia mutatexi? Inga ngedi
Job6:24 Ngi longienu phala ngi di xibhe; ngʼijidisienu ioso i nga tondala.
Job6:25 Ai-ué! Tatʼé! Maka a kulunga ala ni nguzu bá! Maji kima kiahi ki bazela o kubazela kuenu?
Job6:26 O kuila mua mu xinganeka i mu zuela phala ku ngi bazela
Job6:27 Enu-phe kuma monʼa kitungu mua soko-bho ku mu tela muondona
Job6:28 Kala kiki-phe
Job6:29 Ngi fundisienu dingi luamukuá
Job6:30 Mbé bhuala kikuma
Job7:1 Jobe uixi: Manhi o muenhu ua muthu mu ngongo
Job7:2 Mukuâ ni mubhika kia kala mu kuinda o kilembeketa; kala ngunza ua mu kinga o futu iê
Job7:3 kiene kia ngi bhana jimbeji ja hadi ni kukà kuka
Job7:4 O ki ngiza-phe mu kuzeka
Job7:5 O mukutu uami uezala maminhu kala kizuatu
Job7:6 O izuua iami kulenga kuê
Job7:7 Xinganeka
Job7:8 O mesu ma iá ala mu ngi mona lelu
Job7:9 Mukuâ ni dituta ki di kenguluka kiá hé di bhita
Job7:10 Nuka dingi a kà vutukila mʼonzo iê; ni kididi kiê kiene ue ngó bhua tungile ki kia kà muijiia dingi.
Job7:11 Mukonda dia kiki
Job7:12 Mbebhu eme ngi musanza ua kalunga
Job7:13 Eme ki ngi zuela
Job7:14 eie-phe u ngi sasumuna ni jinzoji ji kuatesa uoma
Job7:15 ki kia bhingi o muenhu uami ua mu sola
Job7:16 Muenhu uami ua ngi kumu
Job7:17 Muthu kima kiahi
Job7:18 O imene ioso uia ni ku mu tala
Job7:19 Katé bhebhi ki u ngi xá
Job7:20 Se-phe nga te kituxi
Job7:21 Phalaʼhi
Job8:1 Bhenhobho Bidade
Job8:2 Katé bhebhi bhu ua-nda kusuka ni kuzuela ima iii? Ua-nda kusuka bhebhi ni kulundulula ima ni dikanu dié kala kitembu kia suína?
Job8:3 Mbebhu Nzambi uene mu kubhengeleka ima ia iuka? O Muteni-a-Ioso mu kufundisa u bhengeleka?
Job8:4 Eie Jobe
Job8:5 Maji eie se u di meneka mu ku sota Nzambi
Job8:6 se u zela anga u kala ni kidi ku muxima
Job8:7 Ditala dié dia dianga
Job8:8 Kuma eme nga ku diondo
Job8:9 Mukonda etu tu anʼa mazá
Job8:10 Manhi jitata ki ja-nda ku ku longa? A kamba ku ku zuelela? Mu kuijiia kua mixima iâ
Job8:11 Mbé dibu di sabhuka bhua kambe o maloua? Mba jimbamba ji kula bhua kambe o menha?
Job8:12 Ki ji kala hanji mu kubeketa kuê
Job8:13 Kiene ue kia soko ni jinjila ja ió oso a kambe kusuua ni kuxinganeka Nzambi; o akua kubhanga ia ibha kudielela kuâ kua kà jikinina.
Job8:14 Ioso ia dielela jinga ia kà sendumuka; o kudielela kuâ kua kà di bhanga kala uandanda ua mujandanda.
Job8:15 Ua kèla
Job8:16 Muene mu muanha u buingita kiambote
Job8:17 O jindanji jê ji di zala mu matadi katé bhu mbanduʼa fixi
Job8:18 Maji se Nzambi u mu vuza bhu kididi kiê
Job8:19 Tala
Job8:20 Kuma Nzambi kene mu kamba kusuua muthu ua iuka
Job8:21 Muene ua-nda kuizalesa dikanu dié-eie ni jingolela
Job8:22 Oso a ku zembe
Job9:1 Kienhókio Jobe u vutula
Job9:2 Kutanga o kidi
Job9:3 O muthu kiandala kuila u zoka-nê
Job9:4 Muene njimu ia muẋima
Job9:5 Muene
Job9:6 Muene u tena kusondolola o mavu bhu kididi kiê
Job9:7 Muene u zuelela o dikumbi
Job9:8 Muene ubheka uê ua zale o diulu
Job9:9 Muene ua bhange jithéthembua ja Kitôto ni Udiiono ni ja Ndumbe ia ngombe ni ididi ia di takula makanga ku sulu;
Job9:10 Uene mu bhanga ima ia makota ki i xikina ku i tongolola
Job9:11 Tala
Job9:12 Muene kia kuata o mbole
Job9:13 Nzambi ka kà fudisa kutema kuê o akuatekexi a di zangeleka a kà bhetamena muene bhoxi.
Job9:14 Kuambe dingi eme
Job9:15 Kua muene
Job9:16 Né-mbe hanji nga muʼixanene hé u ngʼitaia
Job9:17 Kuma ua ngi sasujula ni kibhungu kiê
Job9:18 Ni kubhuima ngó ka ngʼehela-ku
Job9:19 Se tu tanga nguzu ia dizonda
Job9:20 Né-mbe eme ngiia ngixi nga lunguʼami
Job9:21 Eme sumbala ngi muthu ua kuiuka
Job9:22 Kokuami iene ioso ia sokoʼé
Job9:23 Se bhu kala kibuika ki jibha mu lusolo
Job9:24 Ngongo a i bhakula bhu maku a isuéia; o afundixiʼé Nzambi u a vunga o pholo; se ki muene-phe ua bhange kiki
Job9:25 O izuua iami ia beta kuenda lusolo
Job9:26 Ia bhiti kala jinaviiu ja kitembu mu kalunga; mukua ni holokoko ki i dioueka anga i tuluka mu ku kuata o mbole.
Job9:27 Se ngʼamba
Job9:28 né kienhókio
Job9:29 Se eme-muène ngi mukua ituxi kiá
Job9:30 Né-mbe ngi di sukula ni menha a kikulakaji
Job9:31 né kienhókio
Job9:32 Mukonda muene Nzambi ki muth kala eme
Job9:33 Bhu kaẋi ketu ki bhuala mutumini
Job9:34 Mbangala iê a i katule ku thandu diami
Job9:35 Bhenhobho-phe ngi zuela
Job10:1 Muenhu ua ngi kumu kiá; kuditenda kuami ki nga-nda ku ku sueka dingi; mu kutata kua muenhu uami
Job10:2 Nzambi nga-nda ku muʼambela
Job10:3 Kiedi kala kia ku uabhela ku ngi bhondeleka; kikalakalu kia maku mé u kiʼehelela anga u kuatekesa kikutu kia isuéia?
Job10:4 Eie
Job10:5 Mbebhu o izuua ié iene imoxi ni izuua ia muthu mukua kúfua? Inga mivu ié ia soko ni mivu ia muthu?
Job10:6 Phala uibhule o kikuma kiami
Job10:7 Eie ua kʼijiia kiambote kuila ki ngi mukua mulonga; maji né kiki
Job10:8 O makuʼé ene a ngʼumbu
Job10:9 Nga ku diondo
Job10:10 Manhi eie ku ngi kame kala lete
Job10:11 Ua ngi zuika kikonda ni misuinhi
Job10:12 Ni muenhu ni mbote ua ngi bhana na-u mu kiadi kié; o muanu ué uene ua lange o nzumbi iami.
Job10:13 Maji ima iosuʼiii ua i sueka ku muẋima ué; nga kʼijiia muene kiambote kuma iene iosuʼiii eie-muène ua i solo.
Job10:14 Se eme ngi ta kituxi
Job10:15 O ki ngi kala ngi mukua phulu
Job10:16 Mbata se eme ngi di zangeleka
Job10:17 Eie u tukulula dingi o jimbangi jé mu ku ngi belesa
Job10:18 Eie-phe ua ngi katuilaʼhi ngó mu divumu dia mamʼetu? Tamanu nga fuile
Job10:19 Hinu ngediʼami kala nuka ngi kala-ku; hé a ngʼambataʼmi kiá mu mbila tundé mu mala!
Job10:20 Manhi o izuua iami ki iòfele ngó? Zumbuka-phe
Job10:21 Kiosuʼiki kiluua ngiia bhu kididi bhua bhingi kuila ki nga kà tena dingi kuvutuka; ku ixi ia kitombe ni kizenji kia kalunga.
Job10:22 Ixi ia vundu kinéne kala kikala o kuvunda kuene; ixi ia kuvunda kuònene ni usuku uedi bui
Job11:1 Bhenhobho Zofale mukua Nahama u vutula
Job11:2 Manhi kubuabuala kuosʼuku ku kamba vutuilu diê? O muthu uzuela kinéne mbé u lunga?
Job11:3 Mukonda dia makutu u ua tange
Job11:4 Kuma eie uambe
Job11:5 Maji kutanga o kidi
Job11:6 Anga u ku tukuluila o kuijiia kuê kuene mu kasuekele
Job11:7 Ua fika eie u tena kuijiia ijinganu ioso ia jinjila ja Nzambi
Job11:8 Kala kia di leka o diulu
Job11:9 Mu kulebha ue kota
Job11:10 Se muene uedi u buidisa
Job11:11 Mukonda muene athu a ngoho ua ejiia
Job11:12 Maji muthu ua ngoho ka moneka kilunji; kiene muene
Job11:13 Eie-phe se ua di iudika o muẋima ué
Job11:14 Se bhu lukuaku lué bhuala kikuma
Job11:15 Kuabhu-phe
Job11:16 Mbata ni jihadi ji ua mono
Job11:17 O muenhu ué ua kà beta kutomboloka
Job11:18 Ua kà dívua kuila ua kondama
Job11:19 Ua kà zeka muene
Job11:20 Maji-phe o isuéia
Job12:1 Bhenhobho Jobe u vutula
Job12:2 Kidi muene
Job12:3 Maji
Job12:4 Eme nga di bhange ngi kima ki thathamesa makamba mami; eme nga hingila jinga Nzambi
Job12:5 Mu ixinganeku ia muthu ualʼê kiambote
Job12:6 Mu jinzu ja iá a bhanga phulu
Job12:7 Maji
Job12:8 Mba-phe zuela hanji ni mavu
Job12:9 Nanhi ki kamba ku mu tongolokela mu ima ioso iii
Job12:10 Kuila o muenhu ua ima ioso i bhuima
Job12:11 Manhi o maka moso kene mu ku a lola ku dítui
Job12:12 O kuijiia kuala ni iá a kuka kiá; o mu kuvula izuua muene muala o kilunji ni kutongoloka.
Job12:13 O Nzambi muene uala ni kuijiia ni nguzu; muene uala ni phangu-ni-ndongo
Job12:14 Muene kia bula
Job12:15 Se menha u a kondela
Job12:16 O nguzu ni kuijiia iala ni muene; ene oso a mu tokala muene
Job12:17 Akua kubhana o kaiula
Job12:18 Ungana ua jisobha uene mu u zubha-ku
Job12:19 O ilamba uene mu i ambata maku a hatu
Job12:20 Muene o nganji ja maka
Job12:21 U takuila o ilamba mu lusebu
Job12:22 Mua vundu
Job12:23 O ifuẋi ia athu u i sokolola
Job12:24 O mixima ia atumini mu ngongo
Job12:25 Mua vundu aia ni kubabajala
Job13:1 Talenu ima ioso ienhiʼii mesuʼami a i mono
Job13:2 Kioso ki muejiia enu
Job13:3 Maji Muteni-a-Ioso nga-nda ku mu zuelela
Job13:4 Maji enu-phe muala mu akua kufunha makutu; anuenuʼoso muala mu imbanda ia kingoho
Job13:5 Tamanu mua di xibhile muene hudí
Job13:6 Kindala ivuenu o ku di zokelela kuami
Job13:7 Mbebhu muambe kuzuelela Nzambi
Job13:8 Muia ni ku tungula athu mukonda dia muene? Nzambi mu mu bhângela mvunda?
Job13:9 Kieji ku mi uabhela
Job13:10 Muene-phe
Job13:11 Manhi unéne uê ki u mi di-uanesa? O kimbulambula kiê

Job13:13 Bhu pholo iami dixibhienu
Job13:14 Mukonda diahi ngi di numata o xitu iami ni mazu ami-eme-muène? Ngi tudilaʼhi muenhu uami bhu lukuaku luami eme-muène?
Job13:15 Né-mbe muene u ngi jibha
Job13:16 Mukonda ue kuene o kubhuluka kuami; kuma muthu ua ibha ka tena kuiza bhu pholo ia muene.

Job13:23 Ikuma iami ni ituxi iami

Job13:28 sumbala eme ngedi kiá kala kima kia bolo

Job15:5 Mukonda o dikanu dié diene dia mu tanga o ikuma ié
Job15:6 O dikanu dié
Job15:7 Manhi

Job15:10 Mu kaẋi ketu ue muala ni iá ala ni jimvi ni iá a kuka

Job15:21 Mitendu i kuatesa uoma iala mu mátui mê; katé ni mu izuua ia mbote ku muʼ ʼiza kingumba ki mu tukumuisa.
Job15:22 Kala ni kuxikana kua kuila hádia ku kitombe u tunda-ku dingi
Job15:23 Uenda ni kututumba mu kusota kia kúdia
Job15:24 O kizuua kiê kia kuvunda ki mu bhekesa kuambuka; ni mukondo ni kubhondalala a mu kuatesa uoma ua vulu; a mu lenda muene kala sobha ia di lungu phala kulua ita.
Job15:25 Mbata muene ua zangula lukuaku luê mu kuzoka ni Nzambi; Muteni-a-Ioso ua mu luisa kaẋu
Job15:26 u di takula muene mu kuzoka-nê ni xingu ia landamana
Job15:27 Mbata o pholo iê ua i vungu ni kuneta
Job15:28 Iú ua tungu mu jimbonge jʼo buikise
Job15:29 Kiene kia bhangesa kuila o umvuama ka kà u mona dingi
Job15:30 Ka kà tena kubhulaka ku kitombe; o milengu ia túbhia ia kaùla o jithangu jê; o ku mulenge ua dikanu dia Nzambi ua kèndelela.

Job16:1 Kienhokio Jobe u mu vutuila

Job16:11 Nzambi ua ngi bhakula muene ku kisuéia

Job18:1 Bheneʼobho Bidade

Job18:10 O mukolo a mu suekela na-u koxi a mavu

Job20:5 o kutana kua isuéia ki ku nange

Job20:11 Né-mbe hanji o ifuba iâ izala ni nguzu ia unzangala uâ

Job20:15 Ua minha maumvuama

Job20:19 Mbata ua tatesa jinga athu
Job20:20 Mukonda dia luimbi luê ki lu kala ni mbambe
Job20:21 O luimbi luê lua kihabula
Job20:22 O Muene kia kà kala bhu ditala dia ima iavulu u mona kingumba kia muʼiza; maku oso a ió a bhindama a kèza ku thandu diê-muène.
Job20:23 Ku kala-phe hanji ima i tena kuizalesa o divumu diê
Job20:24 O kia kà lenga mata a utadi ua felu
Job20:25 Muene ua kà di vuza o mufula ua mu kubu mu mukutu uê
Job20:26 O makuvunda moso ma kà suama mu masuamenu mê-muène; túbhia ki tuʼobhuse ngoho tuene tua kà mu jikinisa
Job20:27 O maúlu a kà tungununa o kikuma kiê; ngongo ia kà zangumuka mu kuzoka ni muene.
Job20:28 Maumvuama ma inzu iê a kà mʼambata; a ka ma lundulula kala menha bhu kizuua kia njinda ia Nzambi.

Job21:11 O tuana tuâ a tuʼehela kutunda ni kulenga-lenga kala kilunga; anʼâ a tuka-tuka muene ni ngalasa.

Job21:22 Manhi Nzambi bhuala u mu longa o kuijiia

Job22:9 Atudi ua a kaie ni maku a hatu

Job22:11 Eie uala mu kitombe mua bhingi kutena kumona kima
Job22:12 Manhi Nzambi kala ku thandu dia maúlu? Tala ditala dia Jithéthembua! Ku di leka kuahi ngó!

Job22:15 Eie uandala u kaiela o hoka ia ukulu mua diota jinga athu a ibha?

Job24:1 Phalaʼhi Muteni-a-Ioso ka xindi ithangana ia kufundisa? Mukonda diahi o ió a muʼijiia
Job24:2 Sai-ku amoxi
Job24:3 O monʼa-kitungu bulu iê a muʼambata na-iu muene; o mutudi ngombe a mu tambula-iu mu kiximbi.
Job24:4 Oso a bhindama a a jimbidisa o njila; o jingadiama jaʼxi kikale joso jiia ni ku di sueka.
Job24:5 Mukua ni ki tunda o mikete ia milundu mu kikangalakata
Job24:6 A muna kúdia kuâ mu mukáu
Job24:7 O mukua tuẋi
Job24:8 O mvula ia milundu i a betesa
Job24:9 O jihukunhu ja tuana tua ndenge
Job24:10 A bhangesa kuila akua tuẋi enda sè izuatu
Job24:11 O mu imbaka ia athu a ibha eneʼá
Job24:12 Tunde mu jimbonge athu ia kema
Job24:13 Ene (o isuéia) ala mu kaẋi ka iâ oso a zemba o mukengeji; jinjila jâ a lémbua ku jʼijiia
Job24:14 O kijibhanganga u balumuka mu kimene-mene
Job24:15 Mukua ni mesu a mukua jiphanda kia kala mu ku kinga o kufulamana kua usuku
Job24:16 O mu usuku a kanda o jinzu ja dianga kiá kulanga mu muanha; o mukengeji ka uiji dingi.
Job24:17 Mukonda ene osuʼó
Job24:18 Enu muexi: Akua phulu ene mu a kungulula lusolo ku thandu dia menha; ku mundu
Job24:19 Mukua ni kixibhu ni munza ki a kukutisa o menha ma kikulakaji; kiene ue hádia o mbila ki ia kà sengumuna ió oso a ta ituxi.
Job24:20 A kà mu jimba kiá kuala mamʼâ; o tubamba tua kà mu dia ni vondadi ioso; kana-ku dingi ua kà mu xinganeka; mukua mangonha a kà mu bukujula kala muxi.
Job24:21 Kuma ua tatesa jinga o kisula kia kambe ana
Job24:22 Lémbua-phe! ki kiene! Nzambi mu nguzu iê u vudisa izuua ia mazonda; a tukumuka hanji emana
Job24:23 O Nzambi kia a bhana kunhoha
Job24:24 A a zangeleka muene mu ka kithangana kòfele; anga a bhita kiua kala kia muia ene oso; a a batula kala mítue ia masa.
Job24:25 Se ki kiene

Job25:2 O kutumina ni kutena kua ngene kua Nzambi
Job25:3 Nanhi u tena kutanga o ifuẋi iê? O ki banda mukengeji uê
