Job25:5 Tala
Job25:6 Kuambe dingi o muthu uedi kala thûthu
Job26:1 Jobe-phe ua vutula
Job26:2 Eie uejiia ku kuatekesʼó
Job26:3 Kaiula kahi ngó ku ua bhana kua iú ua kambe o kuijiia! Ni kulondekesa kuijiia kua subhaka kua kidi!
Job26:4 O kiene ngó ki ua mu zuela ienʼiii
Job26:5 Bidade uexi Katé ni jinzumbi já iá a fua kiá jiteketa koxiʼa mavu
Job26:6 Ku mesu mê ni ithangana ia kèza-ku ia di monekena kala kima kia zula
Job26:7 Muene o thunda u i zala ku thandu dia ngoho
Job26:8 O menha ua a kuikila mu matuta ia xiketela
Job26:9 O mbeji né iala mu kumuika kua nguzu iê
Job26:10 Ku thanduʼa menha ua te-ku mbambe
Job26:11 Jingunji ja diulu ji teketa
Job26:12 Musanza ua kalunga u u tandula ni nguzu iê
Job26:13 O diulu ua di kembesa ni Nzumbi iê; O lukuaku luê luene lua iudika o kinhoka ki di nhonga jihata.
Job26:14 Iii-phe ngoho
Job27:1 Jobe u kuata kuzuela mu ifika
Job27:2 Nzambi a tane-ku! Ua ngi katula o kulúnga kuami
Job27:3 Kioso momuʼami ki mu kala hanji muenhu ni mulenge ua Nzambi mu dizulu diami
Job27:4 dikanu diami ki dia kà zuela kima kia ibha
Job27:5 Ki ngi kale ue dikanga
Job27:6 O kuiuka kuami ngi ku naminina muene
Job27:7 Nguma iami a soke ni mukua phulu
Job27:8 Mbata o mukua mangonha o kudielela kuê kua kà kala kuahi
Job27:9 Mbé Nzambi ua kà muʼivua dingi o kudikola kuê
Job27:10 O muthu ua ibha u tanena kiebhi mua Muteni-a-Ioso? Mba u hingila kiebhi Nzambi mu ithangana ioso?.
Job27:11 Nga-nda ku mi longa kioso kiala bhu lukuaku lua Nzambi
Job27:12 Mbata enuenuʼoso ima iii mua i mono kiá
Job27:13 Talesenu! Muthu ua ibha dikânda diê dia kà kala diahi ku mbandu ia Nzambi? O ió a bhanga kusuina a kà tambula undundu uahi kua Muteni-a-Ioso?
Job27:14 Se anʼê a di sokolola
Job27:15 Oso a kà subhuka-ku
Job27:16 Se o kisuéia u bhongolola phalata kala kufutila ia mavu
Job27:17 muene ua-nda ku i lundé ngo
Job27:18 Muene inzu iê u i tunga kala kibamba; kala o mulangidi kia tunga o muiônga uê.
Job27:19 Mu kuzeka
Job27:20 Kimbulambula ki mu kuata kala menha a disenza; mu usuku a muʼambata ku kibhungu!
Job27:21 Kitembu kia thunda
Job27:22 Ima iosuʼiii
Job27:23 Muene kia di bhana kibhalu
Job28:1 Kidi muene
Job28:2 O felu a i katula mu mavu; ku ditadi kuene kua zunza o kobidi.
Job28:3 Athu usuku ene mu ku u tela mbambe
Job28:4 O kangiji kà di bhanga masenza katé bhu mbandu ia iú uoso ua tungu ue bhu mbandu iê
Job28:5 O mu mavu muene muala ku tunda o kúdia
Job28:6 O matadi mê kiene o kididi kia safidia
Job28:7 O Hoka ienʼiii
Job28:8 Iama ia makota i kuama nuka ia diotele-mu
Job28:9 Muthu-phe lukuaku luê u lu sunununa mu ku bula o matadi
Job28:10 Ujikula mikuluja ku matadi
Job28:11 Ngenda ja menha u ji xita muene
Job28:12 Maji-phe o unjimu a u sanga kuebhi? O kilunji kia kutongolola
Job28:13 Muthu-phe kienhiki ka kʼijiia o ku ta ku kia te
Job28:14 O mukiukuluku uila
Job28:15 Ki ki xikina ku ki bhela ulu ua nzeta
Job28:16 O ku ta kuê ki ku xikina ku ku sokesa ni ulu ua fina ua Ofidi
Job28:17 O ulu ka u sokesa ni kilunji kia kutongolola
Job28:18 Mukonda dia kiene
Job28:19 Ka ki sokesa ue ni ditadi dia topáziu ia Itiiópia
Job28:20 O unjimu-phe ua mu tunda kué? O kilunji kia kutongolola
Job28:21 Mukonda kia di sueka ku mesu ma ima ioso iala ni muenhu
Job28:22 O kidikungu kia mukiukuluku ni kúfua
Job28:23 Nzambi muene ua muʼijiia o njila
Job28:24 Mbata (Nzambi) muene u mona katé kua suku oxi; u mona ioso iala bhoxi dia diulu.
Job28:25 Kioso kia sokelesa kunema kua kitembu
Job28:26 Kioso kia te ngonge ia mvula ni njila ia kubenha kua ibazu ia nzaji.
Job28:27 O muene-phe unjimu ua u muene iú ua uidikiza; ua u xikika iú ua u solokota katé bhu hole iê.
Job28:28 Iú uambela o muthu
Job29:1 Jobe hé u kuata hanji kuzuela
Job29:2 Ai-ué
Job29:3 Kioso Muene kia ngi muikina jinga ni kandeia kê bhu thala ia mútue uami
Job29:4 Kala ki nga kexile mu izuua ia unzangala uami
Job29:5 Kioso hanji Muteni-a-Ioso kia kexile nʼeme
Job29:6 kioso ki nga kexile mu kuila
Job29:7 Kioso ki ngàʼia jinga bhu muelu ua mbonge
Job29:8 minzagala kia ngi mona jinga a suama; o adiakime-phe a balumuka
Job29:9 O ilamba-phe maka mâ a ma jikila jinga ku muẋima
Job29:10 athu òʼnéne
Job29:11 Se bhu kala dítui di ngʼivua
Job29:12 Mukonda eme nga bhulula jinga jingadiama joso ji di kola
Job29:13 Kizediuise kia ió ua mu fua
Job29:14 Eme nga di vunga jinga o kuiuka
Job29:15 Eme nga di bhangele eme kiá ngi diesu dia kifofo
Job29:16 Kua ió a bhindama
Job29:17 Eme o isuéia nga i bukula jinga o jingandelu
Job29:18 Eme nga kexi mu tanga
Job29:19 Lundanji luami lua kà lebhelela muene katé ku menha
Job29:20 Ujitu uami ua-nda kua kàia ni ku di bandekeza momuʼami
Job29:21 Oso a kexe mu ku ngʼivua
Job29:22 O ki ngi zubha kuzuela
Job29:23 Aia jinga muene ni ku ngi kinga
Job29:24 Se nga olelesa
Job29:25 Njila iâ
Job30:1 Maji kindala kiá
Job30:2 Nguzu ia maku mâ
Job30:3 Nzala ni ku kamba ioso
Job30:4 Aia ni kunona tu miẋi tua malva ni tu mafe tua isasa
Job30:5 Mu kaẋi ka athu aia ni ku a kaia-kaia-mu; a a kola-kola
Job30:6 A tunga mu makôlo mua vundu
Job30:7 A zumina mu kaẋi ka isasa
Job30:8 Ene anʼa malaji
Job30:9 Maji-phe kiki
Job30:10 A ngi zembe muene kiavulu
Job30:11 Mbata Nzambi mukolo uê ua u jituna
Job30:12 Ku mbandu ia dilu
Job30:13 Njila iami a i sengulula
Job30:14 O kieza mu ku ngi lungulukila
Job30:15 Kua ngʼiza mauoma
Job30:16 O kiki
Job30:17 Mu usuku
Job30:18 Mukonda dia kukata kuami kuala ni nguzu ia vulu kinéne
Job30:19 Nzambi
Job30:20 Nga di kola kokué
Job30:21 Ua ngi kitukila ni usuéia; ua muʼlua nʼeme ni nguzu ia lukuaku lué.
Job30:22 U ngi zangumuna ni kitembu hé u ngi bhangesa kuendela ku thandu diê; mu kibazu kia kibhungu muene mu u ngi sengumuina.
Job30:23 Maji-phe
Job30:24 Ku ndumba ia mavu ma jinzu ja budika
Job30:25 Manhi eme nga kambe kudila
Job30:26 Mukonda dia kiki
Job30:27 Moxi diami mua mu fulujuka
Job30:28 Nga mu kuenda ni kuxiketela
Job30:29 Nga di bhange ngi ndandu ia jimbulu
Job30:30 O kikonda ku mukutu uami kiia ni kuxiketela hé ki sonoka
Job30:31 Kienhiki
Job31:1 Nga te kikutu ni mesu mami; ngi ma talesa-phe kiebhi ku monʼa kilumba kia muzeletete?
Job31:2 Kuma kua Nzambi
Job31:3 Manhi ki kuene o kutexika phala mukua ituxi
Job31:4 Inga Nzambi o jinjila jami ka mu ji mona? O uendelu uami uoso ka mu u ualula?
Job31:5 Se ngende ni mangonha
Job31:6 Nzambi a ngi pezale ku jipezu ja iuka kiambote
Job31:7 Se mu uendelu uami nga bhambuka mu njila
Job31:8 Kuabhu-phe
Job31:9 Se o muẋima uami ua diʼehelela kudiangukila muhatu
Job31:10 Kuabhu-phe
Job31:11 Mukonda se kiene ki ngi bhanga
Job31:12 mbata kieji ku kala túbhia tu jikinisa katé mu kibuika
Job31:13 Se nga di tunu kubhana kima kia tokala ku mubhika uami ua diiala mba ua muhatu
Job31:14 bheneʼobho-phe
Job31:15 Ió ua ngi iudika mu vumu dia mamʼetu
Job31:16 Se kima kiandalele o jingadiama eme nga ki jijidile
Job31:17 mba o dikânda diami nga di di ubheka uami
Job31:18 (mukonda tundé mu undenge uami
Job31:19 se nga mono muthu ua mu fua mukonda dia kukamba kizuatu
Job31:20 se o miongo iê ki i ngi tanesa
Job31:21 se o lukuaku luami nga-lu zengela monʼa kitungu
Job31:22 kuabhu-phe
Job31:23 Kuma o njumbu ia Nzambi
Job31:24 Se eme nga dielela ku ulu
Job31:25 mba eme nga sanguluka mukonda dia kuvula kua jimbongo jami
Job31:26 se nga tale ku dikumbi kioso ki dia kexe mu kubenha
Job31:27 anga mu kasuèkele muẋima uami u ngʼehela ku di nganala
Job31:28 kiki ue kieje ku ngi kala kituxi ki ngi belesa ku afundixi; mbata kieje kuila kala nga di tunu Nzambi uene ku diulu.
Job31:29 Se nga sangulukila o uíndua ua mukuetu ua ngi zembe
Job31:30 (dikanu diami ue ki ngi diʼehela ku ta kituxi
Job31:31 se athu mu bhata diami ka kiambe muene
Job31:32 Muthu ua tundu dikanga
Job31:33 Se ngedi kala Adá
Job31:34 Kuabhu-phe
Job31:35 Uaué
Job31:36 Ni kidi muene o kutatela kuê ngeje ku kuʼambata bhu kisuxi kiami
Job31:37 O uendelu uami ngeji ku mu londekesa-u o konda iê
Job31:38 Se o ixi iami i ngi bilukila ni ku di kola
Job31:39 se o ibundu iê nga i di
Job31:40 bhu kididi kia tidiku muʼime minha; bhu kididi kia sevada
Job32:1 Bheneʼobho athu kitatu ió anga eha ku vutuila Jobe kuma a mono ua mu di lungise kiá muene-muène.
Job32:2 Anga Edihu
Job32:3 Njinda iê ue anga i mu kuata ku makamba a tatu a Jobe
Job32:4 Edihu-phe ua kinga Jobe nʼa dianga kuzuela
Job32:5 Edihu kia mono kuila
Job32:6 Bhenhobho-phe
Job32:7 eme ngixi: O izuua i zuele
Job32:8 Ni kidi muene
Job32:9 O makota ki ene kiá ngó ejiia
Job32:10 O kiki-phe
Job32:11 Talesenu
Job32:12 O ki nga mi di suí
Job32:13 Phala ue ki mu di thathe
Job32:14 Talenu-phe
Job32:15 Mua kakuka-ze! mua lémbua kiá kuvutula
Job32:16 Nga kinga muene
Job32:17 Eme ue
Job32:18 Kuma ngala ni ia vulu ia kuzuela
Job32:19 Mu mala mua ngi nane kala vinhu ia ubhe ia kambe kididi bhu tundila o mulenge
Job32:20 Ngʼehedienu-phe ngi zuele
Job32:21 Tamanu ki ngi bhange kathômbo kʼathu
Job32:22 Mbata eme ki ngʼijidila ku di uabhesa; kuma se ki kiene
Job33:1 Eie-phe
Job33:2 Kindala nga-nda kuzuela
Job33:3 Maba mami edikiza kuma muẋima uami ki uala ni ku di uabhesa
Job33:4 Nzumbi ia Nzambi iene ia ngi bhange; o mulenge ua Muteni-a-Ioso uene ua ngi bhana o muenhu.
Job33:5 Se ua tena ngi kuatese makutu
Job33:6 Tala
Job33:7 Mukonda dia kiki
Job33:8 O mu kidi kiene
Job33:9 Eme nga zele
Job33:10 Nzambi ua mu sota ngó bhua ku ngi kuatela
Job33:11 U ngi ta inama iami bhu ditaka
Job33:12 Tala-phe
Job33:13 Phalaʼhi u zoka ni muene
Job33:14 Kana-phe
Job33:15 O mu nzoji mba mu kisukila kia usuku
Job33:16 muene-phe u jikula o mátui ma athu
Job33:17 Phala muthu u mu katula ku ioso ia sola kubhanga
Job33:18 phala kuebhesa o nzumbi iê ku dikungu
Job33:19 A mu bazela ue bhu hama iê ni misusu
Job33:20 Katé ni muenhu uê ki uandala kúdia
Job33:21 O xitu iê iia muene ni kujikinina ku mesuʼê a kumona; o ifuba iê ia di suekele
Job33:22 O nzumbi iê iia ni kululama ku dikungu
Job33:23 Maji se muene u kala ni anju iia ni kudionda

Job33:25 Bheneʼobho-phe o xitu jê ji beta dingi kubuingita
Job33:26 Ni kidi kioso
Job33:27 Ua kà tala ku athu anga u zuela
Job33:28 Maji o Nzambi ua bhulula o muenhu uami kuia mu kina; o muenhu uami iu ua vutuka mu kumona dingi o mukengeji.

Job34:1 Edihu anga u zuela dingi
Job34:2 Enu muejiia
Job34:3 Mbata dítui di lola o maka
Job34:4 O kioso kia iuka tu sote ku ki tungula phala etu; o mu kaẋi ketu tu tongolole kioso kia uabha-mu.
Job34:5 Mukonda Jobe uambe
Job34:6 Sumbala nga lunguʼami
Job34:7 Muthu nanhi u soka ni Jobe
Job34:8 Hé uenda mu kizomba kia iá a bhanga kia ibha
Job34:9 Kuma uambe
Job34:10 Mu kienhiki-phe
Job34:11 Mbata o muthu ua kà mu vutuila kia fuama mu imbamba iê ia bhanga jinga; u bhangesa muene kuila muthu ni muthu u tambula kia fuama o njila iê.
Job34:12 Kidi muene
Job34:13 Nanhi ua mu bhana o kutumina ngongo? Ima ioso ia moneka ku mesu ni iii ki i moneka
Job34:14 Se Nzambi ua tele muẋima uê mu kubhanga phulu ku muthu
Job34:15 xitu ioso ieje kúfua
Job34:16 Eie Jobe se moxi dié muala kutongoloka
Job34:17 Mbé
Job34:18 Mbé sobha ene ku muʼila: Xé! Muthu ua ibha? Mba o ilamba a i tanga
Job34:19 Kuambe dingi ió kene ni kubhanga katungu ka uthu ua ilamba
Job34:20 Ene muʼanzanzʼumu a fua. Ku tula muʼaxaxe ka usuku
Job34:21 Mbata o mesu a Nzambi phe
Job34:22 Kana-ku kitombe mba kizenji kia kalunga kia vundu kinéne mu suama iá oso a bhanga kia ibha.
Job34:23 Mbata o Nzambi ka bhindamena kithangana kia vulu ni kutala o muthu
Job34:24 O Mazonda u a jimisa
Job34:25 Mukonda muene uejiia o ibhangelu iâ; o mu usuku
Job34:26 Mukonda dia kukala isuéia
Job34:27 Mbata muene a mu xisa
Job34:28 Mu kubhanga kiki
Job34:29 Muene se nʼa bhana kutululuka
Job34:30 Phala o muthu uala ni mangonha
Job34:31 Kuma
Job34:32 Kioso ki nga lémbua kumona
Job34:33 mbé muene ua-nda ku ku futa kala ki ua mesena eie
Job34:34 Athu oso ala ni kilunji a-nda kuzuela kumoxi ni eme
Job34:35 Jobe ua didi kuzuela
Job34:36 Aiué
Job34:37 Kuma ku kituxi kiê ua bandekesa-ku kubhukumuka; u beta jimbanda muʼaxaxi kʼetu

Job35:4 Eme-phe nga-nda ku ku vutuila
Job35:5 Tala ku diulu
Job35:6 Eie se u ta kituxi
Job35:7 Se eie uala u muthu ua iuka
Job35:8 O kikexilu kié kia ku kamba henda ki tena ngó ku bhanga kia ibha ku muthu ni mukuenu kala eie; o kuiuka kué kuzediuisa ngó monʼa muthu.
Job35:9 Mukonda dia ku a bhondeleka kiavulu
Job35:10 Maji ki bhuala ngó muthu
Job35:11 u beta ku tu longa ni tuijiie

Job36:1 Edihu u kuata dingi kuzuela
Job36:2 Kinga dingi bhuʼòfele
Job36:3 Tundé ku makanga ngi kiʼamba dingi lua mukuá
Job36:4 Mbata mu ku tanga kidi
Job36:5 Tala-ze! Sumbala o Nzambi ua kulu kinéne
Job36:6 Muenhu ua kisuéia ka uʼehela
Job36:7 Ku athu a iuka muene ka katula-ku o mesu mê; maji u a xikika kumoxi ni jisobha ku kiandu
Job36:8 Se a a kutu mu jingidinhá
Job36:9 muene-phe u a ejidisa imbamba iâ ioso ia bhange
Job36:10 U jikula ue o mátui mâ
Job36:11 O kia muʼivua hé a mu bhikila
Job36:12 O kia kamba-phe ku muʼivua
Job36:13 Athu a ibha mixima
Job36:14 Kalunga ka a dia mu unzangala hanji
Job36:15 O phulungu-phe ua tate

Job36:17 Maji eie-phe
Job36:18 Enda-phe ni ku di langa
Job36:19 Eie ua fika kuma muene ua-nda kusuua kiavulu o umvuama ué
Job36:20 O usuku ku uinde ngó
Job36:21 Di lange-phe
Job36:22 Tala-phe
Job36:23 Nanhi u tena ku muʼibhula ioso ia bhange muene mu njila iê
Job36:24 Ta-kiu ku muxima
Job36:25 Athuʼoso a mu i mona; o muthu uimana dikanga ni ku i tongolola.
Job36:26 Kidi bá! Nzambi ukôla! Tua lémbua ku mu tongolola: o izuua ia mivu iê
Job36:27 Kuma
Job36:28 Iene i lunduluka ku matuta
Job36:29 Mbebhu muthu u tena kutongolola kioso kia mu futunuka matuta
Job36:30 Talesa-ze
Job36:31 Kuma o mu ima ienhiʼi-phe

Job37:1 Ima ioso iii i teketesa ue muẋima uami
Job37:2 Bhanenu mátui ku kibazu kia nzaji ia Nzambi
Job37:3 Muene u di kolela bhoxi dia diulu dioso
Job37:4 Kienhokio-phe
Job37:5 Ni dízui diê
Job37:6 Mukonda muene uambela kikulakaji uixi: Nokena ku mavu; ni mvula ni kibhungu ua ambela: suinenu!
Job37:7 Mu ku bhanga kiki
Job37:8 O iama ioso i bokona mu jingenda jâ
Job37:9 O mu jihota ja sulu muene mu tunda kitembu kia kibhungu; o ku itembu ia thunda
Job37:10 Ku mulenge ua Nzambi
Job37:11 O utalalu uê uavulu
Job37:12 Ene-phe kiá
Job37:13 Muene u bheka ngó ima ioso iii phala kubazela
Job37:14 Eie-phe Jobe
Job37:15 Manhi eie uejiia kioso Nzambi kia mu kalakala o madiuanu iâ? Ni muene kia bhangesa o nzaji ku telaka mu dituta diê?
Job37:16 Mjimbu ia kioso kia mu kuimana matuta mu dimbinza
Job37:17 U bhangesa kuila izuatu ié-eie i tema kioso mungongo ki mu tululuka kiambote mukonda dia kitembu kia sulu?
Job37:18 Inga eie ua di tele-nê kumoxi
Job37:19 Tu longe kioso ki tua-nda ku mu tangela mukonda etu a tu kondoloka ku kitombe
Job37:20 Sai muthu uia kua muene ni ku mu tangela i ngene mu zuela? Inga o kiki kieju kala kala kuinda kuila muthu a mu sana-sana?
Job37:21 Tala-ze
Job37:22 O kubenha kua kidifua kia ulu kuijiia ku thunda
Job37:23 Kua Muteni-a-Ioso ki tu tena ku mu bhiẋila; muene ukôla mu kutena kuê
Job37:24 Kiene athu kiene ku mu kuatela uoma; mukonda muene kene mu ku tala kua ió a di fika kuijiia mu miẋima iâ.
Job38:1 Kia bhiti imʼiii
Job38:2 Nanhi muenʼiú uala ku xikelesa ikutu iami ni kuzuela ngó maka ma uoua?
Job38:3 Kindala-phe dikute kinhonga kiê
Job38:4 Eie ua kexile kuebhi kioso eme ki nga te madisesa ma ixi? Ngi tangele-kiu hanji se eie uejiia muene.
Job38:5 Nanhi ua i te mu izongelu iê
Job38:6 O ixikamenu iê ia tula kuebhi
Job38:7 Kithangana kiebhi jithéthembua ja kimene ki ja kexile mu kuimbila kumoxi ni kusanguluka
Job38:8 Mba nanhi ua jika musanza ua kalunga ni mabhitu
Job38:9 Kioso eme ki nga te o matuta ni a mu kale kizuatu
Job38:10 Kioso eme ki nga u xindila jimbambe
Job38:11 Anga ngi uambela
Job38:12 Manhi tunde eie kia kuvuala ki uandeka o izuua ié
Job38:13 Phala iene i naminine kua suku oxi
Job38:14 Iene ioso i di bhanga kala mavu koxʼa kidimbu
Job38:15 O mukengeji uê
Job38:16 Manhi eie ua bokona kiá katé bhu otho ia musanza ua kalunga
Job38:17 Manhi o mabhitu a kúfua eie a ku tukuluila-u kiá
Job38:18 O kuzanza kua ixi ioso eie ua kuijiia muene kiambote? Ngambele na-kiu hanji
Job38:19 O njila iala kuebhi
Job38:20 Eie phala u a bheke mu jimbambe jâ ni kutongolola jinjila jiia kʼonzo iâ?
Job38:21 Eie o ku tanga o kidi ua kʼijiia muene
Job38:22 Mbebhu eie ua bokuene kiá mu mabhakelu ma kikulakaji eie ua mono o umvuama ua matadi a mvula
Job38:23 U nga kondeka katé bhu kithangana kia mukondo
Job38:24 O njila iala kuebhi iia kuene mu kutunda o mukengeji u di muanga
Job38:25 Nanhi muene ua bhange o mikunguiji ia mvuila ia kibhungu
Job38:26 Phala i bhangese kunoka mu ngongo
Job38:27 Nda ixi ia kikangalakata ni kibuika i nue menha
Job38:28 Mbé o mvula iala ue ni tata? Inga nanhi ua mu vuala o mabebe ma dimume?
Job38:29 O menha kia di kuata matadi
Job38:30 O menha a kola muene ngé kala ditadi
Job38:31 Inga eie u tena ku kuika o malubhambu a jithéthembua ja Ndumbe ia Ngombe mba ku jituna mikolo ia jithéthembua ja Udiiono?
Job38:32 Mba eie u tena kubhanga o mabhongolokelu a jithéthembua ja Zodíiaku bhu ithangana iê
Job38:33 Eie uejiia ilèkelelu ia diulu ni kutanga utuminu uê ku thanduʼaʼxi?
Job38:34 Mba eie u tena kuzangumuna o mbimbi ié katé ku matuta phala o ndumba ia menha ni i ku vungina?
Job38:35 Inga uambela o jinzaji kuila tunde-nu
Job38:36 Nanhi uate o kuijiia koxi dia muẋima ua muthu
Job38:37 Nanhi muene
Job38:38 Phala o fufutila i kituke dikènde dia kolo
Job38:39 Eie o hoji ia mukaji u tena ku i tela unhanga? Mba o nzala ia tuana tua jihoji eie u tena ku i fuisa
Job38:40 Kioso ene kia butama mu mauína mâ
Job38:41 Nanhi mukua ku iudikila o ilombelombe kúdia kuâ
Job39:1 Jihoha
Job39:2 Jimbeji jâ ja kuimita
Job39:3 Jene ji kotama phala kuteta tuana tuâ
Job39:4 Tuana tuâ u sanga tua nete
Job39:5 Nanhi uʼehelela mikete ku mukáu
Job39:6 iene nga i bhana inzu iê
Job39:7 Muene uolela kiʼevua kulunguta kua mbanza ionéne
Job39:8 O milundu iene ididi iê ia kudila o sabhelela
Job39:9 O kuila o kaluimba u mesena ku ku xibhidila? Inga mʼusuku uiza mu kuzeka mu kibhanga kié?
Job39:10 Manhi u tena ku mu kuikila ku mubhanga ni mikolo? Mba u kaiela kuema dié ni ku ku sesumuina mavu a kudima mu ikhobo?
Job39:11 Inga u mu dielela muene mukonda dia nguzu iê ia vulu? Mba ikalakalu ié-eie u muʼehela-iu muene ku i bhanga kia tokala?
Job39:12 Inga u mu bhangesa kuila imbamba i ua kunu u ku bhekela na-iu mʼonzo
Job39:13 O kihendembumba u bhuka mabhabha mê ni kusanguluka; muene uala ni mabhabha ni jisala ja dibânda.
Job39:14 Muene maiaki mê u ma xá mu mavu
Job39:15 Anga u katula-ku o muẋima
Job39:16 Anʼê u a sasa kia ibha kala ki anʼê; sumbala o kikalakalu kiê ki di bota
Job39:17 Mbata Nzambi o kuijiia ua muʼimina-ku
Job39:18 Maji kia-nda kuila nhanhá
Job39:19 Eie o kabalu u ka bhana nguzu
Job39:20 Mbé u ka bhangesa kutuka kala kihoho? Mazulu mê mu ku bhuima kala túbhia
Job39:21 Ikoto iê i kanda-kanda bhoxi mu dikôlo
Job39:22 Uoma kene na-u mba kusasumuka; ka vutuka-phe ku dima mukonda dia kulenga xibhata.
Job39:23 Mu ku mu kondela muene
Job39:24 Ni ku di sakesa ni ku di kukumuna
Job39:25 Ithangana ioso ki xika koloneta muene uila: Ndokuenu! O ita u i nuha dikanga
Job39:26 O kuila kahaúla ka mu tuka bhulu mukonda dia kilunji kie-èie
Job39:27 Inga eie ua mu tumina holokoko phala ni i di leka ni ku ta kikalanga kiê bhu ditala dia lebha?
Job39:28 Holokoko ua tunga ku matadi a lebha
Job39:29 Bheneʼobho bhene bhua muena o mbole iê; o mesu mê a i muena dikanga.
Job39:30 Anʼê a xibha manhinga
Job40:1 Ngana anga uambela dingi Jobe mu kitaphephe muenhomo
Job40:2 Manhi o kuzoka mu ku bilukila Muteni-a-Ioso
Job40:3 Jobe-phe anga u vutuila Ngana
Job40:4 Ngana
Job40:5 Nga zuela lumoxi
Job40:6 Bheneʼobho
Job40:7 Kindala di kute bhu kinhonga kala u dikuenze; eme nga-nda ku kuibhula
Job40:8 Ni kidi kiene
Job40:9 Inga uala ni lukuaku kala Nzambi
Job40:10 Di kembese-phe ni matunda ni unéne; di zuike ungana ni fuma.
Job40:11 Lundulula o jingiji ja njinda ié
Job40:12 Tonginina oso a di zangeleka
Job40:13 A vungine eneʼoso kumoxi mu fufutila
Job40:14 Bheneʼobho-phe kiá
Job40:15 Kindala-phe tongolola o nguvu
Job40:16 Tala-phe
Job40:17 Hé uandala
Job40:18 O ifuba iê kala malumbungu ma ngôndo
Job40:19 Maji muene-phe
Job40:20 Kidi muene
Job40:21 Muene-phe u zeka mʼoxi a isasa ia vundu
Job40:22 O miẋi ia vundu i mu vungina ni kilembeketa kiâ; o isasa ia misalakelu ia ngiji ia mu kondoloka.
Job40:23 Se o ngiji i di bhanga masenza
Job40:24 Mbé sai-ku muthu u tena ku i kuata
Job41:1 Eie u tena ku kuata o ngandu ku nzolo
Job41:2 U tena ku mu ta mukolo mu mazulu
Job41:3 Manhi muene ua-nda kudionda kiavulu? Mba u ku zuelesa ni kilendu kioso?
Job41:4 Muenʼió eie u ta-nê kikutu? Inga u mu bhanga mubhikʼé u xalelà-ku?
Job41:5 Ua-nda tonoka-nê kala kanjila
Job41:6 Akuenu mu kisangela kié a ta-nê uenji? Inga a mu uanena ku abadi akua kusumbisa?
Job41:7 U tena ku muʼizalesa kikonda ni jinzolo
Job41:8 Kuaku lué
Job41:9 Athu ene mu ku di metena mu ku dielela kuâ; mbé muthu i kamba ku mu bha kibhalu mu ku i mona ngó?
Job41:10 Kana-ku muthu ua di kake u fikisa ku i tonesa. Nanhi-phe muenʼió u tena kuzangumuka bhu pholo iami?
Job41:11 Nanhi ua dianga ku ngi bhana
Job41:12 Ki nga-ndu di xibha ku mbandu ia idiandu iê
Job41:13 Nanhi u tena kujikula izuatu ia malombo mê? Nanhi u tena ku bokuena bhu jinganzuánzua jê ja di bunjika.
Job41:14 Mabhitu ma dikanu diê nanhi u tena ku ma jikula? Mukonda uoma uala ku mazu mê ma kondoloka.
Job41:15 O mikalatata ia ibalabala iê
Job41:16 I di toteka muene kumoxi
Job41:17 I di naminina kumoxi anga i di kuatenena muene
Job41:18 O ki i ta ngexexe imoxi
Job41:19 Mu kanu diê mu tunda sama ja túbhia; muia ni kuila jisoso manu-manu.
Job41:20 Mu mazuluʼê muia ni kufuafua dixi
Job41:21 O muha ua dikanu diê
Job41:22 Mu xingu iê muene mua tunga o nguzu; ku mu tukulukila
Job41:23 O idiandu ia mukutu uê
Job41:24 O muẋima uê ua kolo kala ditadi
Job41:25 Muene se u fundumuka
Job41:26 Se bhu kala muthu u mu vunda xibhata ku thandu
Job41:27 Kua muene
Job41:28 O musongo ua mufula muene ka u lenge; o matadi a ku takula ni mbala-fundu
Job41:29 Se a mu takula jimbangala
Job41:30 Kʼoxiʼa divumu diê
Job41:31 O ididi ia zongo muene u i bhangesa kufulujuka kala kiene kufulujuka ímbia iala bhu jiku; o musanza ua kalunga u u kitula mukua ni kiene kufulujuka o unguendu.
Job41:32 Mua bhiti muene mu xala hoka ia mukengeji u di muika; o mua zongo mu zela ni muene
Job41:33 Mungongo ki muala kima kia ku mu sokesa na-kiu
Job41:34 Kima né kia lebha
Job42:1 Bheneʼobho Jobe u vutuila Jihova
Job42:2 Nga kʼijiia muene kiambote kuila
Job42:3 Kala ki uambe
Job42:4 Eie uambe uixi: Ngʼivue
Job42:5 Ngana
Job42:6 Kienʼiki kia ngi bhekesa ku di kuma eme-muène; nga diela muene
Job42:7 Anga ki bhita kuila o Ngana kia zubha kuzuela maka iá kua Jobe
Job42:8 Kuatenu-phe
Job42:9 Anga aia
Job42:10 Jihova anga u lungulula kikexilu kia Jobe
Job42:11 Bheneʼobho-phe kiá
Job42:12 Kienhiki
Job42:13 Ana ue ua kexile ni a mukuá dingi
Job42:14 Mona ua dianga ua muhatu ua mu luku dijina uixi
Job42:15 O mu ixi ioso muenhomo ki mu monekene dingi ahetu a beta kuuabha kala anʼa Jobe. Tatʼâ anga u a bhana undundu muʼaxaxe ka phange jâ ja mala.
Job42:16 Kia bhiti imʼiii
Job42:17 Jobe-phe kioso kiá kia fu
Psalms1:1 Ua zediua o muthu ió ka ẋikina kuenda mu phangu ia iiala ia bhumu
Psalms1:2 Muene-phe o ngalasa iê u i sanga mu ngonge ia Jihova; o ngonge iê iene ia banza mu muanha ni mu usuku.
Psalms1:3 Muthu ió u kala mukuâ ni muxi uòphaphe bhu mbanduʼa honga ia menha
Psalms1:4 Ió abhumu-phe ki kiene; maji a soka ni ibhiate i phephuluka ni kitembue.
Psalms1:5 Kala kiki
Psalms1:6 kuma Jihova uejiia njila ia athu aiuka; njila-phe ia athu abhumu ia kutexika.
Psalms2:1 Phala-hi matumbu a salumuka kiki
Psalms2:2 Jisobha mu ngongo ja di bhongolola
Psalms2:3 Exi: Tu katule ophi iâ mu xingu ietu
Psalms2:4 Ió ua xikama ku maúlu ua olela; Ngana anga u a bhanga kasekelu.
Psalms2:5 Kindala u a temena ni njinda
Psalms2:6 Eme-phe
Psalms2:7 Ki ngʼedi ngi kola ngonge
Psalms2:8 Ngi bhinge
Psalms2:9 U a tolola ni mbangala ia felu; u a bhanga imenga-imenga kala ímbia ia mavu.
Psalms2:10 Kiki-phe
Psalms2:11 Kota mu toloke kua Jihova
Psalms2:12 Bhombenu mona
Psalms3:1 Jihova
Psalms3:2 Avulu muene ala ku ngʼamba
Psalms3:3 Maji Eie-phe
Psalms3:4 Nga suína dízui ni ku dikola kua Jihova
Psalms3:5 Nga zekele
Psalms3:6 Ki ngi kala dingi ni uoma
Psalms3:7 Balumuka
Psalms3:8 Kubhuluka ku tunda kua Jihova; o ku thandu dia mundu uê ku kale dibesá.
Psalms4:1 Ngʼivue kioso ki ngi dikola
Psalms4:2 Enu malʼenu
Psalms4:3 Ijiienu-kiu kuma Jihova
Psalms4:4 Kalenu ni uoma
Psalms4:5 Nzambi mu mu satela ni kidi
Psalms4:6 Sai athu avulu ala kuila: Tu sanga kuebhi o kibhuku? Jihova phe tu bhetukile ngó o pholo ié
Psalms4:7 Ngalasa i ua ngi te ku muẋima uami kota
Psalms4:8 Kala kiki
Psalms5:1 Bhana dítui ku maka mami
Psalms5:2 Ivua dízui diami dia kudikola
Psalms5:3 Kukia ngó
Psalms5:4 Kuma eie ku Nzambi ia kuila u xikina kuuabhela ituxi; mukua phulu-phe ka tena kukula musonhi ué.
Psalms5:5 Akua izala ka tena kuimana ku mesu mé; eie ua di zemba ni ene oso akalakala ituxi.
Psalms5:6 Athu oso a tanga makutu; Eie hinu ua-nda kua kà a jima o mbutu; muthu uoso uaiibha ni manhinga
Psalms5:7 Maji eme-phe
Psalms5:8 Ngendese
Psalms5:9 Kuma enhó kuzuela kuâ ki kuala ni kukumbidila; miẋima iâ moxi ia di bhange kizakazaka kia usuéia; bhu dikelengu diâ
Psalms5:10 A êlese ku mulonga
Psalms5:11 Maji oso-phe a lengela kokué
Psalms5:12 Kuma eie
Psalms6:1 Jihova
Psalms6:2 Ngi kuatele henda
Psalms6:3 Ni ku muẋima moxi nga bhondalala ni lamba; eie-phe
Psalms6:4 Bhomba muẋima
Psalms6:5 Kuma mu kúfua ki muala dingi ku ku xinganeka; kuʼalunga
Psalms6:6 Nga bhuila kiá mukonda dia kukema kuami! Usuku ni usuku hama iami ngi i betesa; ila muene kiololo ni masoxi!
Psalms6:7 Mesuʼami iá a bhua-bhu kiá ni kudila; kala kumona dingi kiambote
Psalms6:8 Tundenu bhu mbandu iami
Psalms6:9 Jihova ua ngʼivu kiá o kudionda kuami; Jihova ua xikina o musambu uami.
Psalms6:10 Jinguma jami joso a-nda kudiuana
Psalms7:1 Jihova
Psalms7:2 Kuma a hamena o muenhu uami kala hoje ia bhindamena ku ngi dia; a mesena a ngi sanujuna ku idiandu
Psalms7:3 Jihova
Psalms7:4 se ngaii mu lokalala ió ua di xibhê
Psalms7:5 nguma ió-phe a ngi kaie
Psalms7:6 Balumuka
Psalms7:7 Kionge kia mundu a ku bhongoloke muene; eie u xikame mu kaẋi kâ bhu ditala dia dikota.
Psalms7:8 Jihova mukua kufundisa o ifuẋi ioso
Psalms7:9 Mukua phulu
Psalms7:10 Ngubu iami iala kua Nzambi
Psalms7:11 Nzambi mufúndixi ua kidi
Psalms7:12 Se o muthu nguê kutunda ku njila iaiibha
Psalms7:13 ua maneka kiá o ibhakatu iê ia ita; misongo iê iala kuasa ku jinguma i bambula túbhia.
Psalms7:14 Iala-ze
Psalms7:15 Ua j ikula diela
Psalms7:16 Ufe uê ua mu vutukila mu mútue uê muene
Psalms7:17 Eme-phe ngi sakidila jinga Jihova mu kutetuluka kuê; ngimba ni kuximana o dijina dia Jihova
Psalms8:1 U Jihova
Psalms8:2 Mu kuzuela ku tunda mu kanu dia anʼauisu
Psalms8:3 Kioso ki ngʼila ngi talesa ku diulu
Psalms8:4 Muthu muene ua soko kiebhi
Psalms8:5 Sumbala kiene
Psalms8:6 Ua mu bhana o kutambula konda ia imbamba ioso i ua iudika; o ima ioso ua i te bhoxi dia inama iê.
Psalms8:7 Ni jimbudi joso ni jingombe
Psalms8:8 Ni jinjila ji bhita bhulu
Psalms8:9 U Jihova
Psalms9:1 Ngi ximana Jihova ni muẋima uami uoso; ngi fumanesa ikalakalu iê ia madiuanu.
Psalms9:2 Ngi sangulukila mo mué
Psalms9:3 Mukonda o jinguma jami eie ua ji vutula ku ja tundu; mu kumona o pholo ié
Psalms9:4 Kuma eie ua ngi bhana o kulunga
Psalms9:5 Matumbu eie ua a bazela
Psalms9:6 Jinguma jami ja buila
Psalms9:7 Jihova-phe kiandu kiê kia xikamena kunanga; o kibhuna kiê kia kufundisila kene ku ki lundumuna.
Psalms9:8 Muene u fúndisa o mundu ni kubatula mu kidi; o akua mabhata u a tetuluila kioso kia tokala mu uiukilu uê.
Psalms9:9 Jihova muene o mbonge ia matala
Psalms9:10 Oso a ku ijiia o dijina
Psalms9:11 Imbenu diximanu dia Jihova
Psalms9:12 Kioso ki eza mu kuibhula o mulonga ua kijibha
Psalms9:13 Ngi kuatele henda
Psalms9:14 Ua ngi vutula-phe phala ngi ku ximane kiavulu muene
Psalms9:15 Matumbu a dibhale mu diela dia kande ene; inama iâ iafu mu uanda ua telele akuʼâ.
Psalms9:16 Jihova ua di monekena mu kaxtiku ka a bhesa; mukua phulu ua mu kuata mu ima ia bhange muene ni maku mê.
Psalms9:17 Akua phulu a kà a takuila mu bombo dia kalunga; ni athu oso kiá a kamba kuxinganeka Nzambi.
Psalms9:18 Mbata hinu bhu kala ni kizuua
Psalms9:19 Balumuka
Psalms9:20 A kuatese uoma
Psalms10:1 Ua sukila-hi ngó mu kanga
Psalms10:2 Isuéia
Psalms10:3 Kuma kisuéia u ta nzabala ia kimbamba kia mu kala mu luimbi luê; mukua kúdia mangonha u tènda Jihova
Psalms10:4 O muthu uaiibha
Psalms10:5 Mu jinjila jê joso uenda ni kuzediua izuua ioso; o kubatula kua eie
Psalms10:6 Ku muẋima uê
Psalms10:7 Mu kanu diê mua muizala ni jindaka
Psalms10:8 U baluka mu jisanzala kala kifumbe; muthu sé ngó kikuma u mu jibhila muene mu iangu. O mesu mê ala mu sota o jingadiama a lémbua kubhânga
Psalms10:9 U suama ni kubatamena akuá
Psalms10:10 U di koteka
Psalms10:11 Anga u tanga ku muẋima uê
Psalms10:12 Balumuka
Psalms10:13 Phalahi kisuéia u kala mu tobhesa Nzambi
Psalms10:14 Eie-phe ua ki mono; kuma u mukua kutala o ikalakalu ia athu ni malamba mâ moso; phala eie u ki kuate muene konda bhu maku mé; eie muene hinu u zuela ku mulonga uâ; kokué kuene ku di bhakula uoso ua lémbua kubhânga; eie muene u dilemba dia jihukunhi.
Psalms10:15 Bukula
Psalms10:16 Jihova eie u muenexi
Psalms10:17 Eie-phe Jihova
Psalms10:18 Eie u kala u dilemba dia jihukunhi ni abhika
Psalms11:1 Kua Jihova kuene ku nga lengela! Enu-phe muala ku ngʼila kiebhi
Psalms11:2 Ku ki mono? kisueia-ze ua zenga kiá o uta ua mufula
Psalms11:3 Se madisesa oso ala ku a bula-bhu
Psalms11:4 Jihova-phe uala hanji mu Tembulu ie ikôla; Jihova kiandu kiê kia xikama ku diulu; mesuʼê a tono muene ni kengelela
Psalms11:5 Jihova u tungula athu
Psalms11:6 Enhó a bhumu hinu u a nokesa mvula ia makala ku thandu diâ
Psalms11:7 Kuma Jihova uaiuka
Psalms12:1 Meia! u Jihova! kuma mujitu ua kambe; akua kitongola ka vulu muʼaxaxi ka anʼathu.
Psalms12:2 Kala muthu u tanga makutu kua mukuá; mizumbu iâ ia kutobhesa ngó akuʼá; a zuela ni miẋima iiadi.
Psalms12:3 Jihova hinu u batula o mizumbu i bhomba kiki
Psalms12:4 kuma ala kuila: Dimi dietu diene di tu mbolomona na-diu akuetu; tua dielela o mizumbu ietu
Psalms12:5 Mukonda-phe dia ngadiama a mu tatesa
Psalms12:6 Maka ma Jihova ma kenzuluka; ma soko ni phalata iózunze bhu jiku; a i zunza lusambuadi katé iabhu o dixilu.
Psalms12:7 Eie-muène-phe
Psalms12:8 Mukonda iiala iabhumu ala kunama ku mbandu joso; a sekala ene a a zangeleka kukala ku kijingo.
Psalms13:1 Mbambe bhebhi
Psalms13:2 Kifua ngiia jinga ngó ni kukuata jiphata kienhiki
Psalms13:3 Ngi Suue
Psalms13:4 Sumba nguma iami uila
Psalms13:5 Eme-phe nga dielela mu kulenduka kué; muẋima uami u sanguluka mu kuila eie ua ngi bhulula!
Psalms13:6 Ngʼimbila Jihova
Psalms14:1 Kiôua u kí amba ku muẋima uê
Psalms14:2 Sui! ku anʼathu kuala Jihova mu diulu
Psalms14:3 Ene oso a baluka
Psalms14:4 Ene oso-ó a kalakala ituxi
Psalms14:5 Hinu bhu kala kizuua kiâ kia di uana
Psalms14:6 Ngadiama uandala kuzuela
Psalms14:7 Euá! Tamanu ku Ziione ku tunda kubhanduluka kua Izalaiele! Jihova hinu kia kà bhongolola jihutile jê ku makanga
Psalms15:1 Jihova
Psalms15:2 U kala muthu ua tenena mu kuenda kuê
Psalms15:3 Ka xingi ndaka ni dimi diê
Psalms15:4 Muthu uala kifusa muene u mu mona kusekala
Psalms15:5 ka bhana kitadi mu kutambula avasu
Psalms16:1 Ngi kondeke
Psalms16:2 Ngambe ku muẋima uami
Psalms16:3 Athu é angene
Psalms16:4 Malamba mâ mʼaia ni kusokoloka
Psalms16:5 Jihova muene u kala undundu uami
Psalms16:6 Mu kuxinda jimbambe
Psalms16:7 Nga sakidila Jihova ua ngi bhana phangu; katé ni muẋima mu usuku ua ngi longo kilunji.
Psalms16:8 Jihova izuua ioso nga mu bhaka bhu pholo iami; o mukonda dia muene ku ngʼimanena bhua zukama
Psalms16:9 Kala kiki

Psalms17:1 Ivua
Psalms17:2 Mulonga uami nga kinga eie ku u batula; mesu é a tongolole ioso ia tokala mu kuiuka.
Psalms17:3 Eie ua lola kiá muẋima uami; ua ngi tokuesa mu usuku; ua ngi sale
Psalms17:4 Muʼaxaxi kʼathu ngi banza jinga o maka a tunda ku mizumbu ié; njila i bheka athu mu kubaluka nga fulu ku i enda.
Psalms17:5 Makànda mami ma kuata mu ikoka ié
Psalms17:6 Nga dikola ko kué
Psalms17:7 Idikiza jihenda jé ji diuanesa athu; eie u mukua ku a kudila ku iiala
Psalms17:8 Ngi xitile
Psalms17:9 akua phulu ka ngi mone
Psalms17:10 Enhó a bumbu ni kuneta
Psalms17:11 Kuoso ku tu di tela
Psalms17:12 A di fangana kala hoji i hamena kúdia mbole; a soko ni munzangala ua hoje ua batamena mu kisasa.
Psalms17:13 Balumuka
Psalms17:14 Lukuaku lué lu ngi kudile
Psalms17:15 Eme-phe nginda ngi mona pholo ié ni kulúnga; muẋima u ngi zela
Psalms18:1 Eme ngi ku zola ni muẋima uoso
Psalms18:2 Jihova muene ditadi diami dia kipena
Psalms18:3 Ngenda ni kudikola kua Jihova
Psalms18:4 Mabhuku a kalunga a-lu sota ku ngi bobesa
Psalms18:5 A ngi louele mikolo ia ku ngi sungila mu bombo dia kalunga
Psalms18:6 O mu kubhondalala kuami anga ngʼixana Jihova
Psalms18:7 Bhenhobho ixi i tunguta
Psalms18:8 Mu mazulu mê mu fuafua dixi
Psalms18:9 Diulu ua di bheteka iu ua tuluka; o bhoxi dia inama iê kitombe kʼila muene bui.
Psalms18:10 U endela ku xelube
Psalms18:11 U di vunga kitombe
Psalms18:12 O kubenha kua pholo iê
Psalms18:13 Jihova anga u numina ku diulu
Psalms18:14 U asa mifula iê
Psalms18:15 Koxi a menha anga ku moneka ni kioso ki enda jihonga jê
Psalms18:16 Nzambi lukuaku luê ua lu sunununa muene tunde ku diulu kuala; iu ua ngi kuata
Psalms18:17 Ua ngi tambula ku nguma iami iasuina kinéne
Psalms18:18 Kuma ene a ngi tuuama mu kizuua kiami kia uíndua; maji Jihova-phe muene ua ngi bande.
Psalms18:19 Ua ngi bheka ue kididi kiadisanze; ua ngi kudidla
Psalms18:20 Jihova ua ngi bhange kia tokala mu kulunga kuami; ua kaiela makuʼami a hatu
Psalms18:21 Kuma nga kuata muene jinjila ja Jihova
Psalms18:22 Mbata ima ioso ia tendelela
Psalms18:23 Ka ngi mono ue ni miẋima iiadi bhu pholo iê
Psalms18:24 Jihova kiene kia ngi bhangela kia tokala mu kulunga kuami; ua kaiela kuzela kua makuʼami a hatu
Psalms18:25 Mukua henda
Psalms18:26 Ua di zelesa
Psalms18:27 Mukonda athu a tate
Psalms18:28 Jihova u ngi bambuila kandeia kami
Psalms18:29 Kuma mu nguzu ié
Psalms18:30 Nzambi
Psalms18:31 Kuma Nzambi iengi iebhi
Psalms18:32 Nzambi muene ua ngi bhana o ukuenze
Psalms18:33 U bhangesa inama iami i soka ni ia hoha; ngi kanduka ididi ia di leka.
Psalms18:34 Ua longo makuʼami kubhânga ku ita; uta ua mufula ua utadi ua nguzu
Psalms18:35 Ua ngi bhana ue o ngubu ia ubhulukilu ué; ngʼemana mukonda lukuaku lué lua ngi kuata; o ku dʼivua ni eie kuene kua ngi bhana kijingo.
Psalms18:36 Ua ngi bhana kuta makanda ma nguzu; bhoso bhu nga diota ki ngi xangumuka.
Psalms18:37 Jinguma jami nga ji kaie
Psalms18:38 Nga a beta-beta
Psalms18:39 Kuma eie ua ngi kutu ni nguzu ia kubhânga; ua ngi lendesa ku a tolola ió oso a ngi balukila.
Psalms18:40 Jinguma jami eie ua ji bhesa lusolo; oso a ngi zembele eie ua a jimi o mbutu.
Psalms18:41 Edile tu dikola
Psalms18:42 Bhenhobho nga a fufujula
Psalms18:43 Eie ua ngi kudila mu jimvunda ja mundu; ua ngi bhangesa kukala ngi mútue ua akua matumbu; kifuẋi kia athu ki nga ejidile
Psalms18:44 A ngʼivu ngó fuma
Psalms18:45 Enhó akua makanga
Psalms18:46 Jihova u kôla; a tane-ku
Psalms18:47 Muene Nzambi ua ngi bhela-nâ kaxtiku
Psalms18:48 Muene ua ngi kudila ku jinguma jami
Psalms18:49 Mukonda dia kiki
Psalms18:50 Kutolola kua nzungule kua bhana sobha ié ua mu te ku ungana; jihenda ji vula jʼedikiza kua muthu ué ua mu undu ni maji; kua Davidi ni mbutu iê
Psalms19:1 Maúlu ma tumbula o fuma ia Nzambi; o mu dinga ni dinga mua dʼidikiza o ufunu ua maku mê.
Psalms19:2 Kizuua ki tangela o kizuua kia mukuá imʼiii
Psalms19:3 Kibhuala kuzuela ku tunda bhu dimi
Psalms19:4 maji o njimbuʼiii-phe a ivisa mu ngongo ioso; o hundu iê ia jimbuluka muene katé ku maẋokololo maʼxi. Maúlu Nzambi ua ma bhanga balaka ia dikumbi;
Psalms19:5 Diene
Psalms19:6 U katuka bhu muxinda uaʼxi ni diulu
Psalms19:7 Ngonge ia Jihova ia di uabhela
Psalms19:8 Ijila ia Jihova ia tetuluka
Psalms19:9 Uoma ua Nzambi ua ujitu
Psalms19:10 Maka mê kota mu kuta
Psalms19:11 Mene ma dimuna selevende ié
Psalms19:12 Nanhi u tena ku di tongolola o isenga iê-muêne? Ngi loloke
Psalms19:13 Selevende ié
Psalms19:14 O kuzuela kuami kua dikanu
Psalms20:1 Jihova a ku ivue bhu kizuua kia kíbhidi; dijina dia Nzambi ia Jakobo di ku kale ditala dia di leka.
Psalms20:2 Ku mbanza iê ku tunde a ku banda
Psalms20:3 A lembalale o maujitu u ua mu bhakuila jinga
Psalms20:4 Muene a ku bhese kia ku kala ku muẋima; kima ki ua kane kubhanga
Psalms20:5 Etu tu kola kikóue mu kumona ubhulukilu uê; mu dijina dia Nzambi ietu
Psalms20:6 Kiki nga kʼijiia kiá kuma
Psalms20:7 Amoxi a di fiiala makalu a ita
Psalms20:8 Ene a bulukuta
Psalms20:9 Kúdila muenexi ué
Psalms21:1 Muenexi ua sanguluka mu nguzu ié
Psalms21:2 Eie ua mu bhana kia solo o muẋima uê; kua mu imina kia bhingi ni mizumbu iê.
Psalms21:3 Kuma eie ua mu kauidila ni madibesá ni mahitula; ua mu zuika kitundu kia ulu ua fina ku mútue.
Psalms21:4 Muene ua ku bhingi muenhu
Psalms21:5 Fuma iê iavulu mukonda eie ua mu bhulula; eie ua mu te dibete dia ujitu ni ungana.
Psalms21:6 Mbata eie ua mu bhana kuzediua kunangenena; ua mu vudixila ngalasa iê mu kukala bhu pholo ié.
Psalms21:7 Kuma muenexi ua dielela kua Jihova; o jihenda ja Suke-ku ja mu bhake kididi
Psalms21:8 Luluaku lué eie luia ni kusota jinguma jê joso; o lué lua dilu lu bhixila muene katé kuala ió oso a ku zembe.
Psalms21:9 U a oha kala mu forno iakusuka ni túbhia
Psalms21:10 Eie
Psalms21:11 Kuma enhó a kanena ku ku bhanga phulu; a funhine ndunge ia ufe
Psalms21:12 Kuma eie ua-nda ku a bhesa lusolo; misongo ié ua-nda ku a asa na-iu mu jipholo.
Psalms21:13 Zangalala
Psalms22:1 Nzambi iami
Psalms22:2 Nzambi iami
Psalms22:3 Eie-phe
Psalms22:4 Jitata jetu ja ku dielela jinga; a ku dielela jinga
Psalms22:5 A dikola jinga kokué
Psalms22:6 Eme-phe ngi kabamba ngó
Psalms22:7 Oso a ngi mona a ngi bhanga kasekelelu; a buetula mizumbu
Psalms22:8 Ua di fiiala Jihova
Psalms22:9 Eie-muène-phe ua ngi katula mu divumu; eie ua ngi dielelesa kioso ki ngala hanji ku mele a mamʼetu.
Psalms22:10 Eie-muène ua ngi tambula konda tunde mu mala; eie u Nzambi iami tunde mu vumu dia mamʼetu.
Psalms22:11 Kana ku ngi kala dikanga
Psalms22:12 Iama iavulu ia ngi balukila ni ku ngi tungika
Psalms22:13 A ngi hamena ni ku ngi bhanena mu kanu
Psalms22:14 Nga ẋamuka kala menha
Psalms22:15 Bhu xingu bhua ngi kukuta kala kimènga kia mavu; dimi dia ngi naminina ku jinganzuánzua; ua ngi takuila mu fufutila ia mavu a kalunga.
Psalms22:16 Kiene ki ngalʼiki
Psalms22:17 ifuba iami ioso i xikina muene ku i tanga! Ene-phe ia a ngi tala
Psalms22:18 A uana mudiá o izuatu iami
Psalms22:19 Maji eie-phe u Jihova
Psalms22:20 Ngi kudile ku mukuale ua ngi zuikila; muenhu uami umoxièlele ki uie ni jímbua.
Psalms22:21 Bhu ngalʼabha
Psalms22:22 Kienhókio
Psalms22:23 Enu mu akua uôma ua Jihova
Psalms22:24 Kuma muene kene kutènda muthu
Psalms22:25 Eie-muène nga ku te thâthe bhu pholo ia athu avulu; kioso ki nga loko
Psalms22:26 Akua ujitu a kà dia muene ku fesa
Psalms22:27 Katé ku maẋokololo a jixi athu a xinganeke
Psalms22:28 Kuma ungana uangene ua Jihova; muene ua tokala ku tumina akua jixi joso.
Psalms22:29 Ni iá anete mu ngongo
Psalms22:30 Bhu kala-phe mbutu a di tuma ni Ngana; a kala mu ku mu bhikila
Psalms22:31 A kala mu tumbula o kukumbidila kuê
Psalms23:1 Jihova mubidi uami uala ku ngʼinga ki ngi bhindama ni kima kana.
Psalms23:2 U ngi bheka kunhoha mu iangu ia sabhelela; u ngi songuela bhuala menha matululuka.
Psalms23:3 U tambula konda ia muenhu uami; u ngʼendesa mu njila ja kuiuka mukonda dia dijina diê.
Psalms23:4 Né-mbe ngi bhita mu dikôlo dia kitombe kia kalunga
Psalms23:5 Eie u ngi bhangela meza ku pholo
Psalms23:6 Kidi muene
Psalms24:1 Ixi iangene ia Jihova ni jimbongo mu ngongo jê; mua mu tokala muene ni mundu uoso ua tungu-mu.
Psalms24:2 Mukonda muene ua xikika o ixi muʼaxaxi ka menha a kalunga; iu ua i kuatesa ni jingiji jezala menha.
Psalms24:3 Nanhi ua kà banda ku mulundu ua Jihova? Nanhi ua kèmana bhu kididi kiê kiangene?
Psalms24:4 Uoso makuʼê a mu zele
Psalms24:5 Muenhú muene o muthu u tambula dibesá dia Jihova; a mu bhana ue kulúnga kuala Nzambi iê ia kibhamuenhu.
Psalms24:6 Iú uene o muiji ua athu ene ku mu kenga muene; ene ene ni ku ku sota o pholo
Psalms24:7 Zangukenu mítue mu mabhitu a kimbaka
Psalms24:8 Muenexi uavu o kijingo mukuahi? Jihova mukua nguzu
Psalms24:9 Zangukenu mútue mu mabhitu a kimbaka
Psalms24:10 Muenexi uavu o kijingo mukuahi? Jihova u tumina o ifuẋi
Psalms25:1 Ko kué Ngana
Psalms25:2 Nzambi iami nga ku dielela
Psalms25:3 Kana bá! oso a ku kinga eie ka tena kukakuka; a kakuka kikale ió a baluka ni kubhuma.
Psalms25:4 Ngʼijidise jinjila jé
Psalms25:5 Ngʼendese
Psalms25:6 Xinganeka
Psalms25:7 Kana kuxinganeka kuzangata kuami kua undenge; mba u kaiela o itondalu iami
Psalms25:8 Jihova muthu uambote
Psalms25:9 Abelesela u a endesa ni kutetuluka; o alenduka u a edikiza mu njila iê.
Psalms25:10 Jinjila ja Jihova jene joso ja henda ni kidi; muene u di tuma ni ió oso a kuata kikutu kiê ni maumbangi mê.
Psalms25:11 Nga ku diondo
Psalms25:12 Muthu uebhi uene ni uoma ua Jihova? Muenhó Jihova u mu longa njila ia fuama kusola.
Psalms25:13 Muthu u kala kiki u tunga bhua tululuka; mbutu iê ia vuala iene i lundula ixi.
Psalms25:14 Ukamba ua Jihova u kala ni akua uoma uê; u a ejidisa kioso ki kala kikutu kiê.
Psalms25:15 Mesuʼami a kala jinga kua Jihova; kuma muene u ngi sukununa inama mu uanda.
Psalms25:16 Ngi bhane Ngana o pholo
Psalms25:17 Moxiʼa muẋima mua ngi kala malamba; ngʼendese u ngi katule mu jiphaxi.
Psalms25:18 Xinganeka o kukenanana kuami
Psalms25:19 Tongolola o jinguma jami
Psalms25:20 Ngi kudile
Psalms25:21 Kuiuka kuami ni kutetuluka ku ngi konde mbandu ni mbandu; kuma eie-muène
Psalms25:22 Nzambi iami
Psalms26:1 Ngi lúngise
Psalms26:2 Ngi tokuese
Psalms26:3 Kuma o henda ié nga i bhake muene ku mesu; kidi kié kiene ki ngenda jinga na-kiu izuua ioso.
Psalms26:4 Akua makutu ki ngi xikama-nâ; ki ngi xikina ku di ta kumoxi ni akua mangonha.
Psalms26:5 Junda ia ati a ituxi
Psalms26:6 Maku ami nga a sukula
Psalms26:7 Ngi suina dízui ni ku ku sakidila; ngi tubhula fuma ia ikalakalu ié ia madiuanu.
Psalms26:8 Jihova
Psalms26:9 Kana ku ngʼambata o muenhu uami ni akua ituxi kumoxi; muenhu uami ki u di bote ni ijibhanganga.
Psalms26:10 A bhingi makuʼâ a di teka ni usuéia; o kitadi kia kuzuela makutu a ki kuata dikumba.
Psalms26:11 Eme-phe nga mesena ki ngi kala ni ikuma; ngi kudile bhuoso bhu nga tatela
Psalms26:12 Kinama kiami kia kuata kiá mu njila iasokelela; ngi benzela Jihova mu kionge kia akuetu.
Psalms27:1 Jihova muene umuikinu uami
Psalms27:2 Kioso akua phulu
Psalms27:3 Né-mbe kifuxi kia ngi bhake mu kaẋi
Psalms27:4 Kima kimoxi ki nga bhingi kua Ngana
Psalms27:5 Kuma bhu kithangana kia jingongo
Psalms27:6 Ki bhangesa mútue uami u bhetuka
Psalms27:7 Ivua
Psalms27:8 Kioso eie ki uambe
Psalms27:9 Kana ku ngi suekela o pholo ié. Ngi mubhikʼe
Psalms27:10 Mukonda kioso o tatʼetu ni mamʼetu kia ngʼehelela
Psalms27:11 Ngi longe

Psalms28:1 Ko kué
Psalms28:2 Ivua dízui diami dia kudionda
Psalms28:3 Kana ku ngi koka kumoxi ni iiala iabhumu
Psalms28:4 A bhange kala kioso kia bhanga jinga ene
Psalms28:5 Mukonda kene kusuua ikalakalu ia Jihova
Psalms28:6 Jihova a tane-ku! Mukonda ua ngʼivu dízui diami dia kudionda.
Psalms28:7 Jihova muene nguzu iami
Psalms28:8 Jihova muene o nguzu ia mundu uê; muene ue u bhana o muenhu kua muthu uê ua mu undu ni maji.
Psalms28:9 Bhulula
Psalms29:1 Bhakulenu kua Jihova
Psalms29:2 Jihova mu tumbuidienu o fuma ia tokala dijina diê; Jihova mu sambedienu mu izuatu iazele
Psalms29:3 Dízui dia Jihova di bhita ku thanduʼa menha; Nzambi uene ni kubenha
Psalms29:4 Dízui dia Jihova kutena kuahi ngó! dízui dia Jihova diezala unéne!
Psalms29:5 Dízui dia Jihova di bukula o mixi ia misédulu; xi
Psalms29:6 U bhangesa milundu kutuka-tuka
Psalms29:7 dízui dia Jihova di uana túbhia mu jiphandanda.
Psalms29:8 Dízui dia Jihova di teketesa o kikangalakata; Jihova u tungutisa muene kikangalakata kia Kadexe.
Psalms29:9 Dízui dia Jihova di bhangesa kuila jimbâmbi ji vuala o tuana! Dízui dia Jihova di bhangesa kuila mixi ia matutu ku mikáu i zuluka; o mu Tembulu iê ene oso a dikola
Psalms29:10 Jihova ua xikama bhu kiandu kiê kia bhita o dilúvio; ni kiki hanji ueniê ku ungana
Psalms29:11 Jihova muene u bhana o nguzu ku mundu uê; Jihova u zediuisa o mundu uê ni kutululuka.

Psalms30:3 Ua ngi vutula

Psalms30:6 O ki nga kexe mu kubhanduluka

Psalms30:9 Eie

Psalms30:11 Kudila-phe eie ua ngi katula-ku
Psalms30:12 Phala o muenhu uami u ku imbile jinge o diximanu
Psalms31:1 Ko kué
Psalms31:2 Ngi bhetekele o mátui mé
Psalms31:3 Kuma eie u Ditadi diami dia kipena
Psalms31:4 Ngi sukunune mu uanda ua ngi tela manhanga; nga ku dielela eie ku ngi bhana o muenhu.
Psalms31:5 Nzumbi iami nga i bhakula bhu maku mé; Jihova
Psalms31:6 Enhó a ku kuma oso a landukila o iteka; eme bhabha-phe ngi dielela kua Jihova.
Psalms31:7 Ngi sanguluka
Psalms31:8 Kua xikina ku ngi bhakula bhu maku a nguma; uemika inama iami bhu kididi kia zanze.
Psalms31:9 Ngi kuatele henda
Psalms31:10 Kuma o muenhu uami uala kubhuila mu mukondo
Psalms31:11 Enhó a ngi zembe
Psalms31:12 Mukuâ ni kimbi kiófunde
Psalms31:13 Ku athu-athu ngʼivua kufueta kua mundu ala ku ngi longolola
Psalms31:14 Maji eme-phe
Psalms31:15 Mukonda o ithangana iami iala bhu maku mé; ngi kudile bhu maku a jinguma jami
Psalms31:16 Pholo ié i kale ni ngalasa
Psalms31:17 Kana ku ngi kakula
Psalms31:18 A bhane ububu
Psalms31:19 Jimbote jé kuvula kuahi
Psalms31:20 Kuma hinu eie u a sueka kididi kiakondama
Psalms31:21 Jihova a tane-ku! Kuma henda iê ia madiuanu
Psalms31:22 Nga zuela ngó lusolo
Psalms31:23 Jihova mu zodienu
Psalms31:24 Kolenu maku
Psalms32:1 Ua zedikua uoso kikuma kiê kióloloke
Psalms32:2 Ua zediua uoso kala dingi ni mulonga kua Ngana
Psalms32:3 O ki ngedile ngi dixibha
Psalms32:4 Kuma lukuaku lué lua ngi nemena muanha ni usuku; mukutu uia ni kuxoueta kala mu muanha ua kixibhu.
Psalms32:5 Ngixi-phe: Kota ngi di xikina kituxi kiami ko koué
Psalms32:6 Mukonda dia kiki
Psalms32:7 Kuma uoso ua kondamena ko kué
Psalms32:8 Ngi ku longesa
Psalms32:9 Kana kusoka ni kabalu ni mula a lémbua kuijiia
Psalms32:10 Abhukumuka a kala ni malamba avulu; ua dielela Jihova-phe
Psalms32:11 Tanenu-ku kua Jihova
Psalms33:1 Sangulukenu kua Jihova
Psalms33:2 Sakidilenu Jihova ni kuxika mbànza; mu imbidienu ni kakoxi ka kuinhi dia ngoji.
Psalms33:3 Mu tedienu mukumbi uê ua ubhe; xikenu uhete
Psalms33:4 Kuma kizuelu kia Jihova kia kufidila; kukalakala kuê kuoso kua ufiiele.
Psalms33:5 Muene u inda o kufúndisa kua kidi ni kutetuluka; ixi iezala ni jimbote ja tundu kua Jihova.
Psalms33:6 Kizuelu kia Jihova kiene kia bhanga o diulu; kifuẋi kioso kiala-ku kiejila ku muha ua dikanu diê.
Psalms33:7 U kuata menha a kalunga kala ua a bhake mu mbinda; o musanza uazongo u u lunda mu mabhakelu mê.
Psalms33:8 Ixi ioso i kuate uoma ua Jihova; oso a tungu mu ngongo a mu ijiie kuma ukôla!
Psalms33:9 Kuma muene uazuela ngó
Psalms33:10 Jihova u fudisa o phangu ia akua jixi; kikutu kia athu mu ngongo u ki sukika.
Psalms33:11 Phangu ia Jihova kene ku i lungulula
Psalms33:12 Ixi ioio i zediua
Psalms33:13 Jihova ku diulu u zongola bhoxi; ana athu ene oso ki bhuala ua mu jimbi.
Psalms33:14 Bhu kididi kiê bhua tungu
Psalms33:15 Ene oso muene ua a bhanga o mixima iâ moxi
Psalms33:16 Sobha ka fike kuila kilômbo kia dikota ki mu bhana kulenda; dizonda ue ka di fiiale o nguzu iê iavulu.
Psalms33:17 Kabalu makutu
Psalms33:18 Diesu dia Jihova-phe di kala kua iá a mu kala ni uoma uê; ni kua iá a dielela o henda iê.
Psalms33:19 Ku a langa o muenhu uâ mu kaẋi ka iluezu ia kúfua; ni ku a bhana o kulaia mu thembu ia nzala.
Psalms33:20 Etu
Psalms33:21 Muẋima uetu u sangulukila mua muene; mukonda tua dielela o dijina diê dikola.
Psalms33:22 O henda ié
Psalms34:1 Ngi benzela Jihova mu thembu joso; diximanu diê di kala jinga mu kanu diami.
Psalms34:2 Muẋima uami u ta thâthe iê mu dielela ki bhanga Jihova; oso abelesela kia kʼivua
Psalms34:3 Ngi bandienu
Psalms34:4 Nga soto Jihova
Psalms34:5 Oso a tala kua muene
Psalms34:6 Ngadiamʼiii ia dikola
Psalms34:7 Anjo ia Jihova i kala jinga ku kilangidilu kia iá a mu kuatela uôma
Psalms34:8 Lolenu
Psalms34:9 Jihova mu kuatedienu uoma
Psalms34:10 Inda o minzangala ia jihoje
Psalms34:11 Zenu anandenge
Psalms34:12 Muthu uebhi ua mesena o muenhu
Psalms34:13 Aiuka! dimi dié ki di kale ni phulu
Psalms34:14 Ku phulu
Psalms34:15 Mesu ma Jihova ma lûngu kua iá aiuka
Psalms34:16 Pholo ia Jihova i luualela oso a bhanga phulu
Psalms34:17 Aiuka-phe a dikola
Psalms34:18 Jihova ua zukama kua iá a toloka miẋima
Psalms34:19 Uaiuka u mona jiphaxi javulu; maji o Jihova-phe u mu kudila mu jiphaxi jê jene joso.
Psalms34:20 U langa ifuba iê ioso; ni kimoxi ngó ki ki bukuka.
Psalms34:21 O mukua phulu
Psalms34:22 Jihova-phe u tambula konda ia muenhu ua jiselevende jê; kana muthu u sekala ua mu dielela muene.
Psalms35:1 Fúnda o mulonga uami
Psalms35:2 Kuata o ngubu ni kadiakonda u imane mu ku ngi zokelela.
Psalms35:3 Zenga o dionga
Psalms35:4 A lémbue-ku
Psalms35:5 A kale mukua ni ibhiate iala kuphephuluka ni kitembu; anjo ia Jihova aie ni ku a kaia.
Psalms35:6 Njila iâ i kale javundu
Psalms35:7 Kuma a ngi tela uanda ua ku ngi kuata; sumbala o mulonga u nga te ki u moneka; sé ngó kikuma
Psalms35:8 Enhó-phe kibuika kiâ a ki tukumuke; a fue muene mu uanda ua telele akuâ; a dibhale ene mu diela diâ dia kande.
Psalms35:9 Eme-phe muẋima uami u sangulukila mua Jihova; ngi tana
Psalms35:10 Ngevu muene katé ni ifuba iami i ki tanga
Psalms35:11 Jimbangi ja isuéia ja balumuka; a ngi tatela ima ki nga ijiia ngó.
Psalms35:12 Eme nga a bhange mbote
Psalms35:13 Ene-phe kia kexe mu kata
Psalms35:14 Ngʼila muene kala phange iami
Psalms35:15 Maji eme-phe bhu nga tâtela
Psalms35:16 A xinga jindaka
Psalms35:17 Eie-phe
Psalms35:18 Phala ngi ku ximane mu kionge kia dikota; ngi ku sakidile bhua bhongoloka o mundu uavulu.
Psalms35:19 Kuehele jinguma jami ku ngʼolela uoua mu kingoho; a ngi zembe sé kikuma ka kale mu di jika-jika mesu
Psalms35:20 Kuma ene kene kuzuela ima ia kutululuka
Psalms35:21 A bhana muene mu kanu ni ku ngonesa
Psalms35:22 Eie-phe ue ua ki mono
Psalms35:23 Phaphumuka
Psalms35:24 Ngi fundise
Psalms35:25 Ka kale dingi mu kuila ku miẋima iâ
Psalms35:26 A kakuke
Psalms35:27 Embe-phe
Psalms35:28 Kienhiki
Psalms36:1 O ku di nganala kua muthu ku tunda ku muẋima mu kubhuma kuê; o ku mesu mê ki kua mu kala uoma ua Nzambi.
Psalms36:2 Kuma o muthu mu kuxinganeka kuê
Psalms36:3 Maka ma dikanu diê ufe
Psalms36:4 Bhu hama iê bhua zeka
Psalms36:5 O kulenduka kué
Psalms36:6 o Kuiuka kué kua soko ni milundu ia makota; o kufundisa kué mukua ni musanza uazongo ua kalunga. Jihova
Psalms36:7 O kulenduka kué
Psalms36:8 Musonhi ué-eie
Psalms36:9 Mukonda ko kué kuene kuala o kitu kia muenhu; o mu mukengeji ué muene mu tua kà muena kuzela.
Psalms36:10 Kolokota
Psalms36:11 Kuehele kinama kia akua izala ku ngi diata; mba lukuaku lua isuéia ku ngi landameka.
Psalms36:12 Akua kubhanga a phulu iá a zeka ianhá; a a te bhoxi ka tena dingi kubalumuka-bhu.
Psalms37:1 Ku kale mu jiphata mukonda dia iá a bhanga kiaiibha; kuile uixi a lunguʼá akua kubhanga phulu
Psalms37:2 Mukonda kà nanga ku a sua kala iangu
Psalms37:3 Dielela kua Jihova
Psalms37:4 Ngalasa ié i tunde mu ku di tuma ni Jihova; muene u ku bhana ki ua solo mu muẋima.
Psalms37:5 Njila ié i uenda bhakula-iu kua Jihova
Psalms37:6 Muene u idikiza o kidi kié kala muanha; kulunga kué ku moneka muene kala kumbi dia mediia.
Psalms37:7 Niohena kua Jihova
Psalms37:8 Eie-phe
Psalms37:9 Mukonda oso a bhanga ima iaiibha
Psalms37:10 Bhu bhita ngó kathangana
Psalms37:11 Oso-phe alenduka
Psalms37:12 Mukua phulu u kanena ió mukua kidi; u mu kokotela muene ku mazu.
Psalms37:13 Maji Jihova-phe u mu olela
Psalms37:14 Akua phulu a fomona xibhata
Psalms37:15 Maji o xibhata iâ-phe
Psalms37:16 Kota kiatolo kiala na-kiu o muthu uaiuka; ku indi jimbongo javulu ja akua phulu a ndumba.
Psalms37:17 Kuma akua phulu ió
Psalms37:18 Jihova uejiia o izuua ia athu a iuka; o undundu uâ u nangenena katé ku hádia ni hádia.
Psalms37:19 Ka kala ni jisonhi mu izuua iaiibha; o mu izuua ia nzala
Psalms37:20 Maji isuéia-phe i buila muene; jinguma ja Jihova a soka ni iẋinji ia túbhia; aia ni kujidila mu dixi
Psalms37:21 Mukua phulu u sobha ngó
Psalms37:22 Kuma oso a a lungisa kuala Jihova
Psalms37:23 Makànda ma muthu uambote Jihova u a tambula konda; uendelu uê u mu uabhela.
Psalms37:24 Né ua di bhale
Psalms37:25 Tunde mu undenge
Psalms37:26 Kumbi dioso u kuatela henda
Psalms37:27 Ku ituxi tunde-ku
Psalms37:28 Kuma Jihova kia mu uabhela o kubatula mu kidi; a di tuma-nê ka ehelela
Psalms37:29 Ixi-phe i xalela ku athu iá aiuka
Psalms37:30 Dikanu dia muthu uaiuka di zuela uhete
Psalms37:31 Ngonge ia Nzambi ií ku muẋima uê; kana dikanda diê di xangumuka.
Psalms37:32 Ua bhukumuka u batamena iú uaiuka
Psalms37:33 Jihova-phe ka mu ehela bhu maku mê; né ku mulonga
Psalms37:34 Kinga kua Jihova
Psalms37:35 Nga muene kiá kisuéia ku kijingo kiavulu; u zanda muene kala kimuẋi kiakômo kia mono mavu.
Psalms37:36 Maji
Psalms37:37 Batekela o muthu u bhanga ima ia kidi
Psalms37:38 Iá-phe a xibhaka
Psalms37:39 O kubhuluka-phe kua akua kidi
Psalms37:40 Jihova u a kuatekesa
Psalms38:1 Jihova
Psalms38:2 Kuma o misongo i ua ngʼase
Psalms38:3 Mu jixitu jami ki mua ngi kala dingi kima kia disanze
Psalms38:4 Mukonda ikuma iami ia ngi bhiti ku thandu
Psalms38:5 Jifidila jami ja nuha
Psalms38:6 Nga kotama
Psalms38:7 Kuma mu mbunda mua ngʼizala ni misusu ia kutemanana; o mu jixitu jami ki muala ngó kima kia disanze.
Psalms38:8 Nga iokojoka
Psalms38:9 Ngana
Psalms38:10 Miẋima iami iala ku ngi titila
Psalms38:11 O makamba mami ni jinzukame jami
Psalms38:12 Enhó ue ala ku ngi seia o muenhu uami
Psalms38:13 Eme-phe
Psalms38:14 Nga di bhange kala muthu kevu kia mu ambe
Psalms38:15 Kuma nga dielela ko kué
Psalms38:16 Nga ku ambela
Psalms38:17 Kuma ki ngalʼiki
Psalms38:18 Nga di ẋikina-phe o kuêla kuami; kituxi kiami ngi ki diéla
Psalms38:19 Jinguma jami
Psalms38:20 Ni ió akua kubhanga phulu kua mukuâ ua a bhange mbote
Psalms38:21 Eie
Psalms38:22 Endela-ku mu ku ngi kuatekesa
Psalms39:1 Ngedile ngixi: Ngi di langa o kuzuela
Psalms39:2 Nga dixibhʼami muene
Psalms39:3 Kathangana muẋima ki ua xikina dingi
Psalms39:4 Ngi londekeze
Psalms39:5 Talesa izuua iami mu ku i zonga
Psalms39:6 Kidi muene
Psalms39:7 Ki ngalʼiki-phe
Psalms39:8 Ngi bhulule ku ituxi iami ioso; kana ku ngʼehelela
Psalms39:9 Ngedi nʼemuene húdi
Psalms39:10 Ngi katule-diu
Psalms39:11 Kuma eie ki u bazela muthu
Psalms39:12 Ngʼivue Jihova
Psalms39:13 Ngi sosoluele hanji
Psalms40:1 Jihova nga mu kinga ni kienhenge; muene ua ngi bhetamena
Psalms40:2 Ua ngi zaula ue mu dikungu dia kubhondalala
Psalms40:3 Ua ngi te muimbu uobhe mu kanu diami
Psalms40:4 U lúnga o muthu ió u dielela kua Jihova
Psalms40:5 Jihova
Psalms40:6 Kusata mienhu
Psalms40:7 Ngʼetaia-phe
Psalms40:8 Nga sanguluka mu kubhanga ki ua mesena eie u Nzambi iami; xi
Psalms40:9 Nga bhana jingolokela ja mabatuilu mé ma kuiuka bhu kionge kia mundu uavulu; ki nga xikina kudixibha
Psalms40:10 Mbote ié
Psalms40:11 Eie ue

Psalms40:13 Ki ku uabhele

Psalms40:17 Eme-phe
Psalms41:1 U zediua o muthu ió uoso u xinganeka ngadiama; kuma mu kizuua kia dilamba
Psalms41:2 Jihova u mu kondeka
Psalms41:3 Jihova u mu bhana nguzu bhoxi dia kukata; anga u mu balumuna-bhu
Psalms41:4 Eme ngedi
Psalms41:5 Jinguma ja kuata ku ngi longolola
Psalms41:6 Né bhu kala muthu uiza ku ngi kunda
Psalms41:7 Ene oso a ngi zembe
Psalms41:8 Exi: Uhaxi ua kufua kiá ua mu kuatʼó; o bhoxi bhua zekʼobho
Psalms41:9 Katé ni kuphatele kuami

Psalms42:1 Mukuâ ni mbâmbi i haha
Psalms42:2 Muenhu uami ua ngʼizala ni dinhota dia Nzambi
Psalms42:3 Muanha ni usuku
Psalms42:4 Kienhiki ngʼila ki xinganeka
Psalms42:5 O kiki
Psalms42:6 Eie
Psalms42:7 Honga i dʼitaiela ni honga ia mukuá
Psalms42:8 Suke kiene
Psalms42:9 Nga kʼàmbela Nzambi
Psalms42:10 Môndo uala ku ngi ta o jinguma jami ua di bhange mukua ni xibhata ia mu ngi toma mu ifuba; kioso ki ala ku ngʼila izuua ioso
Psalms42:11 Eie
Psalms43:1 Ngi tetuluile
Psalms43:2 Kuma eie
Psalms43:3 Ngi tumikise
Psalms43:4 Phala ngi bhixile bhu kalatódio ka Nzambi

Psalms44:1 Etu tua kʼivila jinga mu mátui metu
Psalms44:2 Kioso o lukuaku lué ki lua kaia o matumbu
Psalms44:3 Kuma ixi ka i tambula ni xibhata iâ ene
Psalms44:4 Eie u Nzambi
Psalms44:5 Mu nguzu ié tu lundumuna oso a tu zembe; mu dijina dié tu a titidila muene bhoxi oso a tu balukila.
Psalms44:6 Uta uami ua mufula ki uene u ngi dielela
Psalms44:7 Maji ua tu bhana o muenhu
Psalms44:8 Thâthe ietu
Psalms44:9 Maji o kiki-phe eie ua tu ehelela
Psalms44:10 Ua-lu tu bhesa lusolo
Psalms44:11 Eie ua tu bhakula
Psalms44:12 Mundu ué
Psalms44:13 Tua bongo malebhu ku akua madiembu u tua zukama na-u; tua di bhange tu jisemenhi
Psalms44:14 Tua fumana mukua ni Sabhu ku akua jixi ja matumbu; athu amukuá kia tu mona a kubuakesa ku mítue.
Psalms44:15 Izuua ioso usébhue uami ua ngi naminina
Psalms44:16 Mukonda dia dízui dia ió u ta o jisèka
Psalms44:17 Sumbala ima iene ioso iii ia tu iza
Psalms44:18 Muẋima uetu ki ua vutuka ku dima
Psalms44:19 Kia bhiti kiebhi
Psalms44:20 Se etu tuedile o dijina dia Nzambi ietu tu di jimba
Psalms44:21 Manhi o Nzambi u kamba ku ki ijiia
Psalms44:22 Xi
Psalms44:23 Phaphumuka-ze
Psalms44:24 Phala-hi pholo ié u i sueka
Psalms44:25 Kuma o muẋima uetu ua toloka katé mu fufuta bhoxi; o mukutu uetu ua fufujuka muene mu mavu.
Psalms44:26 Balumuka
Psalms45:1 Muẋima ua ngi fulujuka ni maka mambote; ngi ta mukumbi uami ua kutanga maka a tokala ni sobha; dimi diami mukuâ ni pena iakuata hete ia kusoneka.
Psalms45:2 Eie kuuabha kué kuengi
Psalms45:3 Dizonda dia kimi! maneka o xibhata ié bhu ditabela

Psalms45:6 Kiandu kié

Psalms49:1 Ivenu maka iá
Psalms49:2 Ni enu mu akua lazu
Psalms49:3 Dikanu diami di zuela ni unjimu; o kubanza kuami
Psalms49:4 Ngʼividila kiambote ku tunda o kifika; o Sabhu iami ngenda ni ku i xikila ku mbànza.
Psalms49:5 Phalahi ngi kala ni uoma ua izuua iaiibha
Psalms49:6 Ió oso a dielela umonhi uâ

Psalms49:8 Mukonda kukula
Psalms49:9 A ki lémbua muene
Psalms49:10 Kikale ene oso muene mu aia; ni njimu i fuê; ni kiôua ni bulutu ene oso kiómuene

Psalms49:20 Muthu ku kijîngo kene kunanga; ua soko ni ibhaku i bhanga ngó tuizuua.

Psalms50:2 Kididi kia Ziione

Psalms51:9 Bhana pholo kuengi

Psalms51:12 Tona dingi ku ngi bhana o ngalasa ia ubhulukilu ué; u ngi fikidile ni vondadi ia ku ku tumaka.

Psalms52:1 Ua kakela-hi ni ufe anga uia ni ku di thatha
Psalms52:2 Eie dimi dié di funha usuéia uoso
Psalms52:3 Eie o phulu ia ku kala kota
Psalms52:4 Maka a kudia akuenu ene a beta ku ku uabhela

Psalms52:8 Eme bhabha-phe
Psalms52:9 Izuua ioso ngi ku sakidila jinga eie

Psalms54:1 Ngi bhulule
Psalms54:2 Ngʼivue
Psalms54:3 Kuma athu engi a balumuka mu ku ngi sota
Psalms54:4 Talesa-phe
Psalms54:5 Muene hinu u ijiia kufuta o phulu ia iá ala ku ngi tola o manhanu; a jimise

Psalms54:7 Kuma eie ua ngi kudila mu phaxi
Psalms55:1 Bhana dítui
Psalms55:2 Ngi suue
Psalms55:3 Mukonda dia mitendu ia ku di kola-kola kua nguma
Psalms55:4 Muẋima moxi uala ku ngi titila kiavulu
Psalms55:5 Kua ngʼiza kubhuuama ni kuteketa
Psalms55:6 Ngixi-phe: Tamano nga kexile ni mabhabha kala diembe! Ngeje dkutuka mu sota kididi kiami kia kunhohena.
Psalms55:7 Ngeje kulengela muene ku makanga
Psalms55:8 Kindala muene ngeje kulenga kavuanza kâ; anga ngi kala kididi kia kondama
Psalms55:9 A muange
Psalms55:10 Usuku ni muanha ala kunhunga-nhunga ku thandu dia kimbaka; dibhata dia tungu kiavulu ungulungumba ni ituxi;
Psalms55:11 U sanga muala usuéia uoso; o mu nzunga iâ nuka mu kamba mauiii ni makutu.
Psalms55:12 Mukonda ua ngi nongena ki nguma iami
Psalms55:13 Ki bhinga eie u soko diami ua ki bhange
Psalms55:14 Ki tua kexile tu di kunda maka mambote; tuendela kumoxi mu kuia ni mundu mʼonzo ia Nzambi.
Psalms55:15 Kalunga-ka-ngombe a ambate
Psalms55:16 O ki ngalʼemʼiki-phe
Psalms55:17 Ni ngoloxi
Psalms55:18 U ngi kudila o muenhu uami ni kutululuka
Psalms55:19 Nzambi-phe u ngʼivua
Psalms55:20 Muenhó ua zengela maku mê ku akuá a kexe-nê kiambote; o kikutu kia ukamba ua ki fukula.
Psalms55:21 Mu kanu diê mu nengana kiambote kala matheka
Psalms55:22 Se uevu kimbamba kia ku xina
Psalms55:23 Enhó-phe
Psalms56:1 Ngi kuatele henda
Psalms56:2 Enhó a mu ngi kanena ithangana ioso
Psalms56:3 Mu kithangana kioso-kioso-phe ki ngiza o uoma
Psalms56:4 Kua Nzambi
Psalms56:5 Izuua ioso ala kubhengeleka o izuelu iami; ixingakenu iâ ioso ia ku ngi bhanga phulu.
Psalms56:6 A ta kikutu mudiâ
Psalms56:7 Kifua mu ufe kala iú
Psalms56:8 Inhunginu iami ioso eie uaʼijiia: o masoxi mami moso
Psalms56:9 Kioso eme ki ngi di kola kokué
Psalms56:10 Kua Nzambi kuene ku ngi tunda o kulunga
Psalms56:11 Kua Nzambi kuene ku ngi dielela
Psalms56:12 Ioso i nga di hambelela ko kué
Psalms56:13 Kuma eie ua ngi kula o muenhu uami kuʼalunga; ua fudisa inama iami kuẋangumuka
Psalms57:1 Ngi kuatele henda
Psalms57:2 Ngi dikola jinga kua Nzambi
Psalms57:3 Muene ku diulu u katula uzonda ua ku ngi bhulula mu lusebu
Psalms57:4 Mukonda o muenhu uami ua batukila muʼaxaxi ka jihoje; nga zeka mu kaẋi ka athu a uama túbhia; anʼathu muene edi o mazu kenéne kala jisosa ni matoma
Psalms57:5 Zangalala
Psalms57:6 Kuma a ngi tela uanda ua ku ngi kuata o inama
Psalms57:7 Muẋima uami ua ku dielela
Psalms57:8 Phaphumuka
Psalms57:9 Ngi ku ximana
Psalms57:10 Kuma o henda ié ia dikota
Psalms57:11 Zangalala
Psalms58:1 Kífua mua zuela
Psalms58:2 Kana
Psalms58:3 Mukonda akua kubhuma
Psalms58:4 Ala ni ikolakola ia di fu ni ia nhoka; mukuâ ni diuta dia muxilu
Psalms58:5 Phala di lémbue kuívua o dízui dia nganga
Psalms58:6 A bukule mazu mu kanu
Psalms58:7 A bhite kindala kala hungulule ia menhʼa mvula; o ki ela asa athu
Psalms58:8 Kala huelendende
Psalms58:9 A kituke kala minha ia te bhu jiku
Psalms58:10 Uaiuka-phe hinu u ki sakidila
Psalms58:11 Bhenhobho athu a kèla
Psalms59:1 Ngi kudile ku jinguma jami
Psalms59:2 Ngi kudile kua ió a kalakala lusebu
Psalms59:3 Kuma ia-ue-iá
Psalms59:4 A di iudika muene
Psalms59:5 Eie muene nga ku indi
Psalms59:6 Mu ngoloxi joso eza
Psalms59:7 Tongolola-kiu
Psalms59:8 Maji eie-phe
Psalms59:9 Mukonda eie u nguzu iami
Psalms59:10 Nzambi iami u ngi sanga ni kulenduka kué; u ngi bhanga jivondadi kua ió jinguma jami ala ku ngi séia.
Psalms59:11 Kana ku a jibha
Psalms59:12 Mukonda dia kituxi kia dikanu diâ
Psalms59:13 A buidise ni njinda ié
Psalms59:14 Eze dingi mu ngoloxi
Psalms59:15 Ende ni kubungana mu sota kúdia
Psalms59:16 Eme-phe ngi ku imbila mukonda dia nguzu ié iavulu; ngi suína dízui mu kimene
Psalms59:17 Eie
Psalms60:1 Ngana Nzambi
Psalms60:2 Ixi ua i teketesa
Psalms60:3 O mundu ué ua a talesa hadi; ua tu nuisa vinhu ia kubhendujuka.
Psalms60:4 Akua uoma ué eie ua a bhana dibandela
Psalms60:5 Mukonda a nʼé a jihenda a bhingi ku a bhandulula
Psalms60:6 Nzambi ua zuela mu kuzela kuê kukola
Psalms60:7 Ngileiade uami eme
Psalms60:8 Mouabhe kitutu kiami kia kusukuila inama; Edomo nga mu takuila o sabhatu iami; Fidíxia nga mu tolola
Psalms60:9 Kilolo nanhi
Psalms60:10 Kifua kʼeie muène
Psalms60:11 Tu bande
Psalms60:12 Mu nguzu ia Nzambi tu bhanga muene undanda; kuma muene u titidila o jinguma jetu bhoxi.
Psalms61:1 Ivua
Psalms61:2 Tunde ku maẋokololo kua suku o ixi ngi dikola ko kué

Psalms61:4 Ngi kala jinga izuua ioso mu balaka ié
Psalms61:5 Kuma eie
Psalms61:6 Muenexi

Psalms61:8 Kienhiki ki ngi bhangesa kuila ngi ximana jinga o dijina dié
Psalms62:1 Kidi kiene! muẋima uami ua ximbakata mu kinga Nzambi; kua muene ngó ku ngi tundila o kubhanduluka.
Psalms62:2 Nzambi muene ngó o ditadi diami di ngi bhana muenhu; kua muene ku nga kondamena
Psalms62:3 Mbambe bhebhi
Psalms62:4 Ene a-lu di longesa mudiâ phala kulundumuna o muthu uangene bhu ditala diê dia ujitu; kia a uabhela o makutu; a hanza muene ni dikanu diâ maji o ku muẋima moxi-phe akua mázui.
Psalms62:5 Muẋima uami di xibhié
Psalms62:6 Muene ngó o ditadi diami di ngi lengela; muene kubhuluka kuami; kua muene ku nga kondamena
Psalms62:7 Kua Nzambi kuene kua ngi kala o kulaia
Psalms62:8 Enu mu mundu
Psalms62:9 Mukonda
Psalms62:10 Kana ku di fiiala ungúngu
Psalms62:11 Nzambi ua zuela kima kimoxi; eme nga kʼivu muene luiadi: Kuma o kutena kua ngene kua Nzambi.
Psalms62:12 Ni kulenduka kua ku tokala
Psalms63:1 Ngana Nzambi
Psalms63:2 Phala kutongolola o kukula kué ni kuuabha kué

Psalms64:1 Ivua dízui diami
Psalms64:2 Ngi sueke

Psalms64:6 A funha milonga

Psalms64:9 Kia kà bhangesa athu oso kukala ni uoma

Psalms65:1 Jiphèmbele ja ku xikamena mu Ziione
Psalms65:2 Eie u mukua kuívua o kusamba
Psalms65:3 Eme ki ngalʼiki

Psalms65:5 Ima ia undanda
Psalms65:6 Eie

Psalms65:9 Ixi u i zungila

Psalms65:11 Muvu ua u te kitundu kia jimbote jé

Psalms66:1 Kolenu

Psalms68:4 Imbilenu Nzambi
Psalms68:5 Tata ia jihukunhi
Psalms68:6 Phulungu ua xala ubheka
Psalms68:7 Ngana Nzambi
Psalms68:8 Ixi i kala mu tunguta
Psalms68:9 Eie

Psalms68:11 Ngana muene ua bhana o kizuelu kiê; o ahatu a bhana jinga o jingolokela
Psalms68:12 Jisobha ni ilómbo iâ
Psalms68:13 Sumbala eie ua xikamene mu ibhanga ia ibhaku
Psalms68:14 Muteni-a-ioso kia phephulula jisobha bhenhobho

Psalms68:16 Eie u mulundu-phe ua lebha o jisungu

Psalms68:18 Eie ki ua bande bhuluʼèlele
Psalms68:19 Ngana a tane-ku! mukua kuila izuua ioso u tu ahula o kimbamba kia tu xina
Psalms68:20 Nzambi ietu
Psalms68:21 Xi
Psalms68:22 Ngana uixi: Né ku Baxane ku uala
Psalms68:23 Phala u bonde o kinama kié mu manhinga ma jinguma jé; mbé o dimi dia jímbua jé di lese ue o manhinga mâ
Psalms68:24 Ene a u mono
Psalms68:25 Akua kuimba a tuamena
Psalms68:26 Tumbulenu Nzambi bhu kionge kia mundu

Psalms68:30 Bazela
Psalms68:31 Ku Ijitu hinu ku tunda ilamba eza mù dionda; o Itiópia kindala u sunununa o maku mê kua Nzambi.
Psalms68:32 Enu ilômbo ioso mu ngongo
Psalms68:33 Mukua kuendela ku matuta ma diulu
Psalms68:34 Ambenu-kiu kuma Nzambi ukôla
Psalms68:35 Eie
Psalms69:1 Ngi bhulule
Psalms69:2 Nga kuzuka mu kizakazaka mua kambe o dimanenu; nga kutuka muʼjiia dia menha azongo a mesena ku ngʼambata ni hungulule.
Psalms69:3 Nguzu ia ngi bhu ni kudikola; o bhu xingu bhua ngi kukuta
Psalms69:4 Iá a ngi zembe sé kikuma
Psalms69:5 Eie-phe
Psalms69:6 Ki ki bhite
Psalms69:7 Mukonda eme nga bongo malebhu
Psalms69:8 Muʼaxaxe ka phange jami nga dí bhange ngi muthu uengi
Psalms69:9 Kuma o muanu uaʼnzo ié uene ua ngi di
Psalms69:10 Nga didi
Psalms69:11 O ki ngedi ngi zuata mulele ua kidinhaji
Psalms69:12 A xikama bhu njangu
Psalms69:13 Eme-phe ki ngalʼiki
Psalms69:14 Ngi sunge Ngana
Psalms69:15 Kuehele hungulule ia menha ku ngi bhitula; ki ngi bobe mu jiia dia dikota; ka ngi minhe mu bombo dia kalunga.
Psalms69:16 Ngʼivue
Psalms69:17 Mubhikʼé kana ku mu suekela o pholo ié; ngʼivue muene kindala
Psalms69:18 Ngana
Psalms69:19 Eie
Psalms69:20 Malebhu a ngi tolola o muẋima moxi
Psalms69:21 Kúdia kuami a ngi bhana ndululu; kia ngi kuata o dinhota
Psalms69:22 Enhó-phe
Psalms69:23 Mesuʼâ a kale ni kavunda

Psalms69:25 Kilômbo kiâ ki xale ngùndu; ki bhu kale muthu u tunga mu balaka jâ.
Psalms69:26 Kuma uoso eie ua mu beta

Psalms70:5 Eme-phe bhabha
Psalms71:1 Ko kué
Psalms71:2 Ngi kudile mu kutetuluka kué
Psalms71:3 U ngi kale u ndánji iami ia kutungila
Psalms71:4 Eie u Nzambi iami
Psalms71:5 Kuma eie-muène u kidielelu kiami
Psalms71:6 Kokué kuene ku nga xamenena
Psalms71:7 Athu avulu a ngi mono ngi kidiuanu; maji eie-phe u Dilengelu diami.
Psalms71:8 Dikanu diami dʼizale ni diximanu dié
Psalms71:9 Kana ku ngi kaia mu thembu iami ia kukuka; kana ku ngʼehelela ki u mona nguzu ií ngi bhua kiá!
Psalms71:10 Kuma
Psalms71:11 Exi: Nzambi ua mu ehelela; enu
Psalms71:12 Eie-phe
Psalms71:13 Enhó a kakule
Psalms71:14 Eme
Psalms71:15 Dikanu diami di tanga jinga o kukumbidila kué
Psalms71:16 Eme ngi ta jinga o dibete dia undanda ua Ngana Nzambi; ngi tumbula jinga o kukumbidila kua muene
Psalms71:17 Eie
Psalms71:18 O ki nga kukʼiki
Psalms71:19 O kukumbidila kué
Psalms71:20 Eie ua ngi bhitisa mu jiphaxi ni malamba a vula matelu
Psalms71:21 Ua ngi bandekeza dingi o kijingo
Psalms71:22 Bhabha eme ue
Psalms71:23 Mizumbu iami i kala jinga ni huii mu ku ku imbila eie; katé ni muẋima moxi
Psalms71:24 Mu tanga jinga o kukumbidila kué
Psalms72:1 O muenexi mu bhane kutongoloka kué
Psalms72:2 Phala muene a fundise o mundu ué ni utuminu ua kidi
Psalms72:3 Ku milundu ku tunde kutululuka phala o mundu
Psalms72:4 Ngana hinu u fundisa o jingandiama
Psalms72:5 Athu a ku kale ni uoma ku miji ni miji
Psalms72:6 Muene a tule kala mvula i noka mu dikèla
Psalms72:7 Mu izuua iê athu aiuka à kala mu kuzanda
Psalms72:8 Utuminu uê u tunda ku musanza katé ku musanza ua mukuá
Psalms72:9 Akua kikangalakata a kà mu diundila muene
Psalms72:10 Jisobha ja Talxixi ni mu ikolo a kà mu bhana o lubhaku; o jisobha ja Xeba ni Saba ja kà mu bhekela maujitu.
Psalms72:11 Katé ni jisobha joso ji diunda bhu pholo iê; ilômbo ia miji ioso i kala mu mu bhikila muene.
Psalms72:12 Kuma muene u bindumuna o phulungu kioso kia dikola; ni ngadiama
Psalms72:13 U lendukila o ngadiama ni phulungu ua bhondalala
Psalms72:14 U jituna o mienhu iâ ku ungungu ua kúdia mangonha o manhinga mâ ma kala ni valolo ia dikota ku mesu mê.
Psalms72:15 Mu kienhiki
Psalms72:16 Mu ngongo mu kale nzungule ia masa katé ni ku thandu dia milundu; ixina iê i kale mu lokosa kala muxitu ua Libano; athu mu jimbonge joso a kale mu fuafua kala iangu mu mukáu.
Psalms72:17 Dijina diê di nangenena katé ku hádia ni hádia; diia ni kusambuka muene ni ku mululu ni ku mulaula
Psalms72:18 Jihova Nzambi a tane-ku! muene Nzambi ia Izalaiele; muene ngó ubheka uê uene mu bhanga o madiuanu!
Psalms72:19 A ximane dijina diê dikola
Psalms72:20 Misambu ia Davidi dia monʼa Jese ia suku bhenhabha. Mahezu.
Psalms73:1 Ni kidi kiene Nzambi u bhanga mbote kua Izalaiele
Psalms73:2 Eme-phe kua ngi xedi ngó kuxia mu njila; makànda mami mandekele kiá kuẋangumuka.
Psalms73:3 Kuma phata ia ngi kuatele ia iá abhumu
Psalms73:4 Kuma ni mu kúfua kuâ
Psalms73:5 Ka moneka mavuua kala athu amukuá; kene kutata kala ki tata akuá.
Psalms73:6 Ukumbu uâ-phe kifua lubhambu lua zuata mu xingu; a di futu ni kusuína kala dibeka dia zuata.
Psalms73:7 Mesuʼâ a tundu mu mútue mukonda dia kuneta; a fika nzungule ia imbamba ia ku di kaka mu miẋima iâ.
Psalms73:8 A bhanga kasekelu ku akuá; a kanena ku a bhanga ungungu; a zuela muene ni izala ioso.
Psalms73:9 Dikanu diâ dʼila kala diala kuzuelela ku diulu; o dimi diâ di nama kunu mu ngongo.
Psalms73:10 Mundu uangene-phe
Psalms73:11 Exi; Nzambi-ze u kʼijiia kiebhi? o Suke-ku mbé imʼiii uala ku i tongolola muene?
Psalms73:12 Talenu hanji kioso kiala! Ene-ze akua phuluʼá! Ki bhuala ngó kima ki a tatesa
Psalms73:13 Kifua-ze eme nga tale ngó hadi ia ku di zelesa o muẋima ni kusukula o makuʼami nʼa bhue o maxaka.
Psalms73:14 Kuma kumbi dioso dia kambàmba
Psalms73:15 Se ngedile ngixi ngi zuela kala ene
Psalms73:16 Anga ngi kala mu banza-phe
Psalms73:17 Katé ki nga bokona mu tembulu ia Nzambi
Psalms73:18 Kidi kiene
Psalms73:19 Kindala muene athu bhua kexile a-bhu-bhu; a diuana kisuma
Psalms73:20 Mukuâ ni nzoji
Psalms73:21 Kioso mu thulu ki mua ngi xitile
Psalms73:22 Kutobha-phe ku nga kexe na-ku
Psalms73:23 Suke kiene
Psalms73:24 Eie u ngi bhana kaiula kioso ki ngenda jinga kunu
Psalms73:25 Ku diulu nanhi dingi ua ngi kala-ku
Psalms73:26 Xitu jami ni muẋima moxi
Psalms73:27 Ió-ze a ku baluka eie u Ngana
Psalms73:28 Eme-phe kia ngi uabhela o kuzukama kua Nzambi; nga solo Ngana Nzambi
Psalms74:1 Eie Nzambi
Psalms74:2 Xinganeka o kifuẋi kié ki ua sumba tunde mʼokulu
Psalms74:3 Zanguka
Psalms74:4 A ku zembeʼó
Psalms74:5 Ejiie ni kuenda kala athu aia ni makuua mu kukoka miẋi mu kaxi ka muxitu ua vundu.
Psalms74:6 O imbamba ia ufunu uoso ua kuseta
Psalms74:7 Tembulu ié a i te mu túbhia; a ku fukuila o dibhata di ua tele o dijina dié mu ngongo; o dibhezelu dié ia a di sengulula muene katé bhoxi.
Psalms74:8 Ambe ku mixima iâ
Psalms74:9 Ki bhuala dingi ijimbuete ietu
Psalms74:10 Mbambe
Psalms74:11 Lukuaku lué kifua ua lu sungu kiá muene
Psalms74:12 Né kienhiki
Psalms74:13 Eie ua batula o kalunga mu kaxi ni nguzu ié; eie ua bulu o mítue ia midikixi mu menha.
Psalms74:14 Eie ua bulu Ó mútue ua ngàndu mu kaxi
Psalms74:15 Eie ua jikula otho phala mu fuafue menha ma di bhange ngiji; eie ue ua kukutisa jihonga nuka mua kambele menha.
Psalms74:16 O muanha ué eie
Psalms74:17 Ixi eie ua i xindi ni jimbambe jê ni mvula ni kixibhu eie-muène ua a bhanga.
Psalms74:18 Maji-phe xinganeka-kiu: Nguma ja ku lokalala eie u Jihova; mbutu ia jisemenhi a ẋonguena o dijina dié.
Psalms74:19 Kana kubhakula o muenhu ua diembe dié dia kinjimbe ku iama ia hame; o muenhu ua anʼé a a tatesa
Psalms74:20 Ta-ku muẋima ku kikutu kié; kuma o jihota joso javundu mu ngongo
Psalms74:21 Phulungu
Psalms74:22 Balumuka
Psalms74:23 Kana kukamba kuívua o dízui diodio dia jinguma jé; o kavanza kâ ka ku sange
Psalms75:1 Tua ku sakidila
Psalms75:2 Eme kioso ki ngi bhixila bhu thembu iatokala
Psalms75:3 Ixi né ia botomoka ni ene athuʼê a tungu momo

Psalms75:5 Kana kubhetuka o lumbinga lué; kana kubhetula pholo kua Suke-ku ni izala; kana kuzuela ima kua Nzambi ni xingu ia thathamana.

Psalms77:1 Meia! u Nzambi

Psalms77:8 Henda iê
Psalms77:9 Nzambi o kuila kejidila dingi kulenduka? kifua o kiadi kiê ua ki jikila kiá mu njinda?
Psalms77:10 Ngixi-phe: Kiki kia ngi bhonzo! maji-phe nga lembalala o mivu ia lukuaku lua dilu lua Suke-ku.

Psalms78:39 Ua lembalala kuma ene ala ngó xitu ia hatu; mulenge u bhita
Psalms78:40 Lukuxi luosʼulu lua mu kitukila mu kikangalakata; a mu nhemuna jinga mʼoxi ia kukuta i bhekela o ngunzu!
Psalms78:41 A tona dingi kulokalala Nzambi

Psalms90:6 mu kimene i sabhuluka
