Psalms91:1 Ió ua tunga mu kibúta kia kondama kia Suke-ku
Psalms91:2 ua kéla kuma: Jihova dilengelu
Psalms91:3 Ka kambe ku ku kudila ku múkala ua dinhanga
Psalms91:4 Muene u ku vungina ni jisala jê
Psalms91:5 Ku kala ni kekenha
Psalms91:6 Mba dibhebhu diendela mu kitombe
Psalms91:7 Né kua dibhale midi bhu mbandu ié
Psalms91:8 U tala ngó ni mesu
Psalms91:9 Eie bhobho-phe
Psalms91:10 Ku fike kuma u takana ni uíndua
Psalms91:11 Kuma muene u tuma o jianjo jê ku ku tambula konda
Psalms91:12 Jene ji ku zangula bhu maku
Psalms91:13 Ua kà diota o hoje ni diuta; munzangala ua hoje ni nhoka u i titidila muene bhoxi.
Psalms91:14 Mukonda ua ngi naminina ni henda
Psalms91:15 Muene kia ngʼixana
Psalms91:16 U laia izuua iavulu
Psalms92:1 Kima kiambote o kusakidila jinga Jihova
Psalms92:2 Mbé kuidikiza o kulenduka kué mu kimene
Psalms92:3 Ku i xikila muene ku mujika ua kuinhi dia ngoji
Psalms92:4 Kuma eie
Psalms92:5 Ufunu ua ikalakalu ié
Psalms92:6 Bulutu ima ienhiʼii ka i xinganeka; o semenhi u lémbua ku i ijiia.
Psalms92:7 Sumbala abhukumuka a fuafua muene kala iangu
Psalms92:8 Eie-phe
Psalms92:9 Iala-ze
Psalms92:10 Eme-phe u ngi vudisila o nguzu iami kala ia phakasa; kuma eie ua ngʼundu ni maji mengi ma kindala.
Psalms92:11 Mesúʼami à ki mona
Psalms92:12 Uaiuka-phe u koma kala diie; u kula hé u jinga kala muxi ua muxitu ua Libano.
Psalms92:13 Oso a a phaphe mʼonzo ia Jihova
Psalms92:14 Katé ni mu ukukilu
Psalms92:15 Mbebhu o kuidikisa kuma Jihova ua tetuluka; muene ditadi diami dia kipena
Psalms93:1 Jihova ua hingi ungana uê! Ua zuata kijîngo! Jihova ua zuata
Psalms93:2 Eie Ngana kiandu kiê kia kuata tunde xahulu; tunde dia tunde Eie nuka uà kambele-ku.
Psalms93:3 Masenza ma jingiji
Psalms93:4 Maji o menha mavulu ue né ma numina
Psalms93:5 Eie umbangi ué uoso u ua bhana ua kidi kiene; mʼonzo ié
Psalms94:1 U Jihova ua tokala o kubhesa o kaxtiku
Psalms94:2 Zangumuka
Psalms94:3 U Jihova
Psalms94:4 A di thatha
Psalms94:5 Mundu ué
Psalms94:6 Mutudi a mu jibha
Psalms94:7 Exi-phe: Jihova ka ki mono
Psalms94:8 Xinganekenu hanji enu jibulutu ja athu
Psalms94:9 Ua bhanga o dítui
Psalms94:10 Mukua kulonga madiembu
Psalms94:11 Jihova uejiia muene o kuxinganeka kua muthu
Psalms94:12 Muthu-phe u zediua
Psalms94:13 Phala mu izuua ia uíndua a ximbakate
Psalms94:14 Kuma Jihova ka tena kusenga o mundu uê
Psalms94:15 Aiukila mu njila kidi a ki sanga ku pholo; oso emana mixima nzanza
Psalms94:16 Nanhi muene u ngi bhângela kua ió akua phulu? nanhi u ngi banda mu kudituna kubhanga kiaiibha?
Psalms94:17 Se Jihova ua kambele ku ngi banda
Psalms94:18 Nga ki ambele kiá
Psalms94:19 Hele jivula jandekele ku ngi kuata mu muẋima
Psalms94:20 Manhi o kiiala kia di zangeleka
Psalms94:21 A di vubula kumoxi enhoso mu kúdia ió aiuka
Psalms94:22 Eme-phe
Psalms94:23 Kituxi kiâ-phe kia-nda kualuka
Psalms95:1 Ndokuenu
Psalms95:2 Tu bhixila bhu pholo iê ni kusakidila; tu mu kola ni kuimba jisálamu.
Psalms95:3 Kuma o Jihova
Psalms95:4 Jihonga joso ja mu ngongo jala bhu lukuaku luê; milundu ia di leka ue
Psalms95:5 Musanza ua kalunga uê muène
Psalms95:6 Ndokuenu tu bhetame
Psalms95:7 Mukonda muene Nzambi ietu; etu tu athu mu makèla mê
Psalms95:8 kana dingi kukola o mixima ienu kala bhu Medibah
Psalms95:9 Bhua ngi lokalela o jitata jenu
Psalms95:10 Muiji uenhú anga a ngi kuma mu makuinhi auana a mivu
Psalms95:11 Kia ngi bhangesa ku a lokela mu kuluuala kuami
Psalms96:1 Imbilenu Jihova muimbu uobhe; imbilenu Jihova enu mu jixi joso.
Psalms96:2 Imbilenu Jihova
Psalms96:3 Tumbulenu o fuma iê muʼaxaxi ka matumbu
Psalms96:4 Kuma Jihova munéne
Psalms96:5 Mukonda o jinzambi ja ifuẋi ioio
Psalms96:6 Ni ujitu ni ungana a mu kala bhu pholo iê; ni nguzu ni kuuabha kuala mu kididi kiê kiangene.
Psalms96:7 Bhakulenu kua Jihova enu mu miji ia athu
Psalms96:8 Bhakulenu kua Jihova o fuma ia tokala dijina diê; zenu ni maujitu
Psalms96:9 Bhezenu Jihova mu kukemba kuazele kua uiukilu uê; mu kuatedienu uoma enu oso mua tungu mu ngongo.
Psalms96:10 Tangenu-kiu ku matumbu muixi: Jihova ua hinge ungana uê. Muene ixi ua i kuatesa bhu kididi
Psalms96:11 Diulu di tane-ku
Psalms96:12 Ku mukáu ku kale ngalasa
Psalms96:13 Bhu pholo ia Jihova
Psalms97:1 Jihova ua hingi ungana uê; ixi ioso i tane-ku! Ni mu ikolo iê iavulu a kale ni ngalasa.
Psalms97:2 Ni matuta ni kitombe a mu bhaka mu kaẋi; kiandu kiê kia di fikidila mu kubatula mu kidi ni kukumbidila.
Psalms97:3 Ku pholo Iê ku tuamena túbhia
Psalms97:4 Jinzaji jê ji telaka mu ngongo; ixi ia ki mono
Psalms97:5 Milundu ia sengumuka kala sela bhu pholo ia Jihova
Psalms97:6 Maúlu ma kola kutetuluka kuê
Psalms97:7 Jisonhi ji kuata oso a bheza o mahamba maseta athu
Psalms97:8 Ziione kia kʼivu
Psalms97:9 Kuma
Psalms97:10 Enu mua zolo Jihova
Psalms97:11 Mukengeji a u kuua
Psalms97:12 Sangulukenu mua Jihova
Psalms98:1 Imbilenu Jihova muimbu uobhe; kuma Muene ua bhange madiuanu; lukuaku luê lukôla
Psalms98:2 Jihova uedikiza ubhulukilu uê; o kukumbidila kuê
Psalms98:3 Ua xinganeka o henda iê ni kidi kiê
Psalms98:4 Dikodienu kua Jihova ni kusanguluka
Psalms98:5 Mbànza i kuate mu kuximana Jihova
Psalms98:6 Ni koloneta ni dízui dia mbungu
Psalms98:7 Kalunga ka zume
Psalms98:8 Jihonga ji bhabhe kibhûbhu; o milundu ue i tele kumoxi o nzongo iâ ia kutana.
Psalms98:9 Bhu pholo ia Jihova
Psalms99:1 Jihova ua hingi ungana uê; akua jixi a tekete; Muene ua xikama bhu kaẋi ka jixelubini; ixi i tungute.
Psalms99:2 Jihova kilamba mu mbanza iê ia Ziione; Muene ua zangalala ku thandu dia akua jixi joso.
Psalms99:3 A ximane dijina diê
Psalms99:4 Eie
Psalms99:5 Jingisenu Jihova Nzambi ietu
Psalms99:6 Jinganga jê sai
Psalms99:7 U a zuelesa jinga mu mufumbeji ua dituta
Psalms99:8 Eie uà etaia jinga muene
Psalms99:9 Jingisenu Jihova
Psalms100:1 Tumbujukenu ni ngalasa kua Jihova
Psalms100:2 Jihova mu sedivilienu ni kutana
Psalms100:3 Ijiienu-kiu
Psalms100:4 Bokuenenu bhu mabhitu mê ni kusakidila
Psalms100:5 Kuma Jihova muthu uambote; kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua; o kukumbidila kuê ku xalela ku miji ioso.
Psalms101:1 Ni kulenduka ni kufundisa mu kidi ngi ku ta ku mukumbi; eie-muène u Jihova ngi ku imbila jinga jisálamu.
Psalms101:2 Ngi sota kuenda jinga ni kilunji mu njila iaiuka; nga ku indi kiavulu
Psalms101:3 Ki ngi kala ni kima kia ufusa ku mesu mami; imbamba i bhanga ió adianguka
Psalms101:4 Muẋima uadianguka nguami na-u; o ima iaiibha ki ngandala ngó ku ijiia.
Psalms101:5 Uoso uenda ni kabódio ka kutatela mukuâ
Psalms101:6 Mesu ami a kala jinga mu sota o jifiiele mu ngongo
Psalms101:7 Uoso mukua kunganala ió ki ngi kala-nê monzo iami; o makua kutanga makutu
Psalms101:8 Izuua ioso kabasa kuaki
Psalms102:1 Ngʼivue musambu uami
Psalms102:2 Kana ku ngi suekela o pholo ié
Psalms102:3 Kuma izuua iami iala kúbhua mukuâ ni dixi
Psalms102:4 Muẋima uami ua xoueta
Psalms102:5 Mukonda dia kuenda ni kukema
Psalms102:6 Nga soko ni kingungu-a-xitu ku mukáu; nga di bhange kala kihutukudia mu jingûndu.
Psalms102:7 Ngi fula o kilu mu usuku
Psalms102:8 Jinguma jami ala ku ngi sekalesa kumbi dioso; oso a ngi luualelʼó a-lu-ia ni ku ngi bha malebhu.
Psalms102:9 Ngadi o uthókua kala mbolo
Psalms102:10 Kifua nga ku iibhila kiá
Psalms102:11 Izuua iami kifua kizuzúmbia kia ngoloxi
Psalms102:12 Eie-phe
Psalms102:13 Sai bhuoso hinu bhu u balumukina
Psalms102:14 Mukonda
Psalms102:15 Athu mu jixi kiene kia kà kala ni uoma ua dijina dia Jihova
Psalms102:16 Kioso kia mona Jihova ua tungu dingi Ziione
Psalms102:17 Ua suu kiá o kusamba kua jihukunhu; kala mu kudituna dingi o ku di tenda kuâ.
Psalms102:18 Kima kiki kia bhingi ku ki soneka
Psalms102:19 Mukonda tunde ku ditala dia mbanza iê
Psalms102:20 phala evue o mikemu ia ió a a kuika; mbé o kujituna oso a xikamena ku a jibha.
Psalms102:21 Phala athu a tumbule o fuma ia Jihova mu Ziione
Psalms102:22 kioso kia kà bhongoloka o mundu ua di muange
Psalms102:23 Nzambi ua ngi sosolola nguzu iami mu njila mu ngejila; o izuua iami ua i selula
Psalms102:24 Ngixi-phe Nzambi iami
Psalms102:25 Eie tunde mʼokulu
Psalms102:26 Hádia ene a budika
Psalms102:27 Eie-phe kiene ki uene kiene; o mivu ié ki i moneka bhu ia suku.
Psalms102:28 Anʼa selevende jé a kala bhua kondama

Psalms104:1 Tanesa
Psalms104:2 Ua di te mukengeji kala divunga; ua futununa o maúlu kala dibeka dia balaka.
Psalms104:3 O mixi ia inzo ié ia thandu
Psalms104:4 Muene
Psalms104:5 Ua tena kutula madisesa maʼxi katé ia kuata
Psalms104:6 Iú ua futu-ku menha mazongo kala kizuatu
Psalms104:7 O ki ua a tumu dingi
Psalms104:8 Milundu anga i zanguka
Psalms104:9 Ua a xindi ni mbambe iâ
Psalms104:10 Ua te ni ithu i fuafua menha mu jihonga; o jingiji ji kungulukila mu milundu.
Psalms104:11 Kuene ku ua bhana kúnua o jixitu joso mu iangu; ni jijumendu ja mukáu ji bhuisa-bhu dinhota diâ.
Psalms104:12 Mu jimbandu ni jinjila ji bhita bhulu
Psalms104:13 Ku jinzo jê ja thandu
Psalms104:14 U sabhukisa iangu ia kúdia kua ibhaku
Psalms104:15 ni vinhu phala muẋima ua muthu u sanguluke
Psalms104:16 Miẋi ia Jihova iezala sumu
Psalms104:17 jinjila kuene kua tungila ikalanga iâ; dibànda-phe u tungila ku muxi ua faia.
Psalms104:18 Milundu ia di leka dilengelu dia jihoha
Psalms104:19 Ua iudika mbeje
Psalms104:20 U bheka-ku usuku ni kuvunda kuê
Psalms104:21 Jindumbe ja jihoji
Psalms104:22 Kumbi ki di tunda
Psalms104:23 Muthu-phe u tunda mú kuata o thonga iê
Psalms104:24 Eie
Psalms104:25 Kunhá kalunga ké
Psalms104:26 Muene mu endela jinaviiu; ni kibaleia ua mu bhanga phala a tonokene muenhomo.
Psalms104:27 Ene oso-â eie-muène a ku kinga
Psalms104:28 Kioso Eie ki u a bhana
Psalms104:29 Ki u sueka pholo ié
Psalms104:30 Eie-phe kioso ki u a tumikisa ngó o Nzumbi ié
Psalms104:31 Fuma ia Jihova i nangenene kienhiki! Jihova a sanguluke mu ikalakalu iê!
Psalms104:32 Ua bhingi se oxi u i zongola
Psalms104:33 Kioso ki ngala kulaia
Psalms104:34 O kubanza kuami kua muẋima kua muene
Psalms104:35 Akua ituxi ende ni kubhua-mu mu ngongo
Psalms105:1 Sakidilenu Jihova
Psalms105:2 Mu imbidienu

Psalms105:6 Enu
Psalms105:7 Muene
Psalms105:8 Kikutu kiê nuka ki mu jimba katé ku hádia ni hádia; o kizuelu kiê ua ki tendelela ni ku midi ia miji.
Psalms105:9 Kiene kia kikutu kia ta ni Mbalahamu
Psalms105:10 Anga u ki tonena dingi kua Jakobo
Psalms105:11 Uixi: Eie-muène ngi ku bhana o ixi ia Kanana

Psalms105:13 Kia mu nhungana hanji
Psalms105:14 Muene kehela muthu ku a bhanga phulu; ua bazela makota a jingana mukonda diâ-ene

Psalms105:16 Uexana o nzala
Psalms105:17 Ua tuamekesa diiala bhu pholo iâ; muene Zuze
Psalms105:18 Inama iê a i kuama mu ditaka; o jifelu ja jingidinhá ja mu bokona ku muẋima moxi.
Psalms105:19 Katé kia bhixila bhu thembu ia mu lekelela
Psalms105:20 Muenexi anga u mu tuma
Psalms105:21 U mu ta ku pholo mù tumina o dibhata diê; muene u tambula konda ia jimbongo jê joso.
Psalms105:22 Phala makota ma athu a a kute
Psalms105:23 Izalaiele anga u kulumuka mu Ejito; Jakobo u di bhanga nzuángiza mʼoxi ia Hame.
Psalms105:24 Muene anga u sokolola kiavulu o muiji uê
Psalms105:25 U a lungulula o muẋima phala mundu uê a u zembe
Psalms105:26 U katula Mozé
Psalms105:27 A tubhula mabhebhu muʼaxaxi kâ
Psalms105:28 Ua tumikisa-ku kitombe

Psalms105:30 Mazote anga ma di vuala mʼoxi iâ ioso

Psalms105:32 Bhu kididi kia mvula
Psalms105:33 Ni mivide iâ
Psalms105:34 U zuela dingi
Psalms105:35 Anga ki dia o idima ioso mʼoxi iâ
Psalms105:36 U jibha ana oso a phandekumbi mʼoxi iâ
Psalms105:37 Mundu uê katé kia a katula mʼoxi muenhomo
Psalms105:38 A kua Ejito kia a uabhela
Psalms105:39 U futununa dituta
Psalms105:40 Ene kia mu bhingi
Psalms105:41 Ua jikula mu ndanji
Psalms105:42 Kuma kizuelu kiê kikôla ua ki te muẋima; ni Mbalahamu
Psalms105:43 Kala kiki

Psalms106:1 Haleluia! Sakidilenu Jihova; kuma muene mukua kubhanga mbote; mukonda o jihenda jê ki jene kúbhua.
Psalms106:2 Nanhi u tena kutanga o ikalakalu ia undanda ua Jihova? Mba
Psalms106:3 Azediua ió oso a kumbidila o kidi kia fuama; ni ió izuua ioso a bhanga o ima iaiuka.
Psalms106:4 Eme-phe
Psalms106:5 Phala eme ngi mone ue o kubhanduluka kua athu é angene
Psalms106:6 Ituxi tua i ta jinga kala o jitata jetu
Psalms106:7 Jitata jetu ka tongolola kiambote
Psalms106:8 Maji kiene kimoxi
Psalms106:9 Kalunga Kakusuka ua ka temena
Psalms106:10 Ua a kudila bhu lukuaku lua ió ua a kanena jinga; ua a tambula bhu maku a ngungu-a-nzumba.
Psalms106:11 Menha a bhita ku thandu dia jinguma jâ; né muthu umoxi ngó ka subhuka-ku.
Psalms106:12 Bhenhobho a xikana kiua o maka mê; anga emba hanji ni ku mu ximana.
Psalms106:13 Kindala-phe o ikalakalu iê ia a jimbiʼê kiá; nguauâ dingi kubhinga o kaiula kê.
Psalms106:14 A kala ni luimbi luavulu mu kikangalakata
Psalms106:15 Muene anga u a bhana kia Seme o vondadi iâ
Psalms106:16 A kala ni difutu dia Mozé bhu kilombo
Psalms106:17 Mavu anga a jikuka
Psalms106:18 Kua uama túbhia mu junda ia mundu uâ; a bhukumukʼó auka ku mulengo.
Psalms106:19 Anga a iudika kangombe ka ulu ku mulundu ua Holebe
Psalms106:20 A xia ió ukôla
Psalms106:21 Nzambi
Psalms106:22 ni madiuanu mʼoxi ia Hame
Psalms106:23 Kia mu bhangesa kuila
Psalms106:24 Ixi iauabha ia edikiza anga a i nongena
Psalms106:25 A hina-hina ngó ni kulongolola mu jifundu jâ muala; o kuívua dízui dia Jihova
Psalms106:26 Muene anga u loka ni kuzangula lukuaku
Psalms106:27 uixi anʼenu hinu ngʼa sebulula muʼaxaxi ka matumbu
Psalms106:28 Anga aia dingi mu ku di ta kua Bahale-Piiole; hé a dia o jisata ja satela o iteka iafu.
Psalms106:29 Mu kienhiki
Psalms106:30 Bhenhobho bhua zanguka Finehase
Psalms106:31 Anga a mu lungisa
Psalms106:32 Anga a mu lokalalʼâ dingi
Psalms106:33 mukonda a mu thathamesa o muẋima moxi
Psalms106:34 Mu kuiza-ku ue
Psalms106:35 maji a di lungu-nâ mu umatumbu uâ
Psalms106:36 A bheza o iteka iâ
Psalms106:37 Ni anʼâ a mala ni anʼâ ahatu a a satela uâ ku madimonho.
Psalms106:38 Iá a ẋamujuna manhinga
Psalms106:39 Kienhiki kia di bolesa ni imbamba iâ
Psalms106:40 Kia bhangesa o njinda ia Jihova kuuama kala túbhia
Psalms106:41 Anga u a thelekala bhu maku a matumbu; oso a a zembe
Psalms106:42 Jinguma enda ni ku a bhikisa
Psalms106:43 Luavulu muene Ngana ua a kudila; maji ene-phe kene kunanga mu kuxibhaka
Psalms106:44 Kiene kimoxi
Psalms106:45 U xinganeka o kikutu kiê
Psalms106:46 U bhangesa kuila ni ió oso a a kutu
Psalms106:47 Tu bhulule
Psalms106:48 A tane-ku
Psalms107:1 Ximanenu Jihova
Psalms107:2 Oso a a kula kuala Jihova
Psalms107:3 Ni iâ muene a bhongolola ni ku a takana ku jixi
Psalms107:4 Kuma enhá mu kikangalakata mua texikile
Psalms107:5 Nzala ia a te
Psalms107:6 Bhenhobho a dikola kua Jihova mu lamba diâ
Psalms107:7 Hé u a songuela mu njila ia iuka
Psalms107:8 Tamano-phe a ximana jinga Jihova
Psalms107:9 Kuma o muẋima ua dinhota
Psalms107:10 Sai ni iá a xikamene muʼavundu
Psalms107:11 Mukonda a kitukila o maka ma Nzambi
Psalms107:12 Kiene kia bhekela o ku a tolola muẋima ni ubhika; o kia di bhukana
Psalms107:13 Bhenhobho a dikola kua Jihova mu lamba diâ
Psalms107:14 Muene u a katula mua vundu ni mu kizenji kia kalunga
Psalms107:15 Tamano-phe a ximana jinga Jihova
Psalms107:16 Kuma o mabhitu a utadi uakolo
Psalms107:17 Sai amoxi-mu
Psalms107:18 Kúdia kuoso kua a ludila
Psalms107:19 Bhenhobho a dikola kua Jihova mu lamba diâ; muene-phe u a kudila mu kubhondala kuâ.
Psalms107:20 U tuma o kizuelu kiê
Psalms107:21 Tamano-phe a ximana jinga Jihova
Psalms107:22 A mu satele jisata ja kusakidila
Psalms107:23 Oso ene mu kutuka muʼalunga mu jinaviiu
Psalms107:24 Enhá ala jimbangi ja ikalakalu ia Jihova
Psalms107:25 Kuma u tuma
Psalms107:26 A banda kala a mu-ia ku diulu
Psalms107:27 A kala ni munhunga
Psalms107:28 Bhenhobho a dikola kua Jihova mu lamba diâ
Psalms107:29 U bhangesa kuila o kibhungu ki batama
Psalms107:30 Ene-phe a tana-ku
Psalms107:31 Tamano-phe a ximana jinga Jihova
Psalms107:32 A mu tange o fuma bhu kionge kia mundu
Psalms107:33 Muene jihonga ja menha ua ji kitula mukáu ua kisekele
Psalms107:34 Ixi ia vudile kuima
Psalms107:35 Bhuamukuá
Psalms107:36 U bhangesa iá akua nzala
Psalms107:37 A dima mábhia
Psalms107:38 Ku dibesá diê
Psalms107:39 Maji bhuamukuá a sosoloka dingi
Psalms107:40 Anʼa jingana u a lunduluila kabaxa
Psalms107:41 Maji-phe o phulungu u mu katula mu lusebu
Psalms107:42 Emana nzanza kia ki mona
Psalms107:43 Uoso ua tongoloka muẋima a xinganeke o imʼiii
Psalms108:1 Muẋima uami ua di iudika
Psalms108:2 Phaphumuka eie kakoxi ni mbànza! Eme-muène ngi di meneka kuila kiluua ngó kúkia.
Psalms108:3 Muʼaxaxi ka madiembu
Psalms108:4 Kuma jihenda jé ja vulu
Psalms108:5 Zangalala
Psalms108:6 Mukonda anʼé a jihenda a bhingi ku a kudila
Psalms108:7 Nzambi ua zuela mu kuzela kuê kukola; eme-phe ngi tana-ku! o ixi ia Xikeme ngi i uana
Psalms108:8 Ngileiade uami eme
Psalms108:9 Muabhe kitutu kiami kia kudisukuila; mua Edomo muene mu nga tula o sabhatu iami; Fidíxia nga mu tolola
Psalms108:10 Kilolo nanhi u ngi bheka mu mbonge iakolo? nanhi u ngi songuela mu kuia katé kua Edomo?
Psalms108:11 Manhi kʼEie-muène
Psalms108:12 Tu bande
Psalms108:13 Mu nguzu ia Nzambi tu bhanga muene undanda; kuma muene u titidila o jinguma jetu bhoxi.
Psalms109:1 Kana kudixibha
Psalms109:2 Kuma o dikanu dia kiiala kiabhumu
Psalms109:3 Ene a ngi kondo ni maka a unguma
Psalms109:4 Mu ku a zola
Psalms109:5 Mu mbote i nga a bhange
Psalms109:6 Muenhó
Psalms109:7 Kioso kia fúnda
Psalms109:8 Izuua iê
Psalms109:9 Anʼê a kale jihukunhi
Psalms109:10 Anʼê a kale anhungani a hatu
Psalms109:11 Mukua kúdia mangonha a mu bhûnde ima ioso iala-na-iu
Psalms109:12 Ki bhu kale muthu u mu kuatela henda; mba bhu kala muthu u xinganeka anʼê ala mu uhukunhu.
Psalms109:13 Muiji uê u batuke muene
Psalms109:14 Jihova ende ni kuxinganeka jinga muene o kubhukumuka kua jitata jê; o kituxi kia manhʼâ ka ki jimune
Psalms109:15 O ikuma iâ i kale jinge muene ku mesu a Jihova
Psalms109:16 Mukonda o muene ue ka xikina kukuatela henda; ni ngadiama ni phulungu ua mu zukutisa jinga muene
Psalms109:17 O kuxinga jindaka
Psalms109:18 U ta mázui kala kiene o kizuatu kiê kia zuata; ma mu bokone-phe ku muẋima uê-muène kala menha
Psalms109:19 O mázui ma mu kale kiá kala dibeka diê dia di futu; ele muene kala phonda iê iene kukuta mu mbunda.
Psalms109:20 Nganhu iâ i kale kienhiki
Psalms109:21 Kala-phe u dilemba diami
Psalms109:22 Mukonda ngi ngadiama
Psalms109:23 Nga soko ni kizúzumbi kia ngoloxi
Psalms109:24 Mukonda dia kujila kúdia
Psalms109:25 Ki ngalʼiki ene a ngi bhanga kasekelu; ela a ngi mona
Psalms109:26 Ngi kuatekese-phe eie u Jihova
Psalms109:27 Mbé a ki mone kuma lukuaku lué luene lua kalakala; nʼa kʼijiie kuma eie u Jihova ua ki bhange.
Psalms109:28 Ene a te-â o jihasa
Psalms109:29 Ene oso a ngi balukilʼó
Psalms109:30 Eme-phe
Psalms109:31 Kuma ua tate-ó
Psalms110:1 Jihova ua ki ambe kua Ngana HU iami
Psalms110:2 Jihova u ku tumikisa o mbasá ié ia nguzu tunde mu Ziione
Psalms110:3 Makuenze mé ma kà di bheka muene mu vondadi iâ
Psalms110:4 Jihova ua loka
Psalms110:5 Ngana ua ku imanena ku mbandu ié ia madilu
Psalms110:6 Muene u batula o milonga muʼaxaxi ka jixi
Psalms110:7 U nuina ku ngiji mu njila iê
Psalms111:1 Haleluia! Ngi ximana Jihova ni muẋima uami uoso
Psalms111:2 Ikalakalu ia Jihova ia makota muene
Psalms111:3 O kukumbidila kuê ki kuene kufula.
Psalms111:4 Ikalakalu iê ia madiuanu ia xala muene fuma; Jihova ualenduka
Psalms111:5 U bhana mbole ia kúdia kua ió a mu kala ni uoma; o kikutu kiê nuka ki mu jimba.
Psalms111:6 Nguzu iê ia kukalakala ua ʼidikiza ku mundu uê
Psalms111:7 Ufunu ua maku mê ua kidi ni kutetuluka; o ijila iê ioso ia ufiiele
Psalms111:8 I xalela muene sé dizubhilu
Psalms111:9 Ua tumu kukula o mundu uê
Psalms111:10 O kukala ni uoma ua Nzambi
Psalms112:1 Haleluia! Ua lungu o muthu ió uene ni uoma ua Jihova
Psalms112:2 Anʼê a kala mazonda mu ngongo
Psalms112:3 Mʼonzo iê mu kala kubhanduluka
Psalms112:4 O muthu uaiuka
Psalms112:5 U mona mbote
Psalms112:6 Muthu ió uemana kididi
Psalms112:7 Ka kala ni uoma ua ku mu tudila njimbu iaiibha; kuma muẋima uê ua di fikidila ni kudielela Jihova.
Psalms112:8 Muẋima uê ua kuata bhu kididi
Psalms112:9 Kʼemina
Psalms112:10 O kisuéia-phe u ki mona mesu
Psalms113:1 Haleluia! Ximanenu
Psalms113:2 Dijina dia Jihova a di tumbule ni ki tualʼiki
Psalms113:3 Tunde ku tundila o dikumbi
Psalms113:4 Jihova ua jîngi
Psalms113:5 Kadi nanhi

Psalms113:7 Ngadiama u mu zangula
Psalms113:8 Phala a mu xikamese ni anʼa jingana
Psalms113:9 U bhangesa kuila
Psalms114:1 Kia tunda Izalaiele mu Ijito
Psalms114:2 Juda ua di bhange muiji uê ukôla
Psalms114:3 Kalunga kioso ki ka mono
Psalms114:4 Milundu ia petajaka ni ngalasa kala ilumbe ia jimbudi
Psalms114:5 Ihi kia ku kuata
Psalms114:6 Mu milundu mua petajaka kala ilumbe ia jimbudi? mu tuthuthulundu mua tonoka kala tuana tua ibhaku?
Psalms114:7 Teketa muene u ixi ia kimi
Psalms114:8 Ua tenene kuila
Psalms115:1 Etʼuetu kana
Psalms115:2 Phalahi ki bhinga matumbu a kèla
Psalms115:3 Etu Nzambi ietu-phe uene mu diulu; mukua kubhanga ioso iandala.
Psalms115:4 Iteka ia ene phalata ni ulu
Psalms115:5 Ikala ni makanu
Psalms115:6 Ikala ni mátui
Psalms115:7 Ikala ni maku
Psalms115:8 Ki kala o iteka iene
Psalms115:9 Eie Izalaiele
Psalms115:10 Enu dibhata dia Alá
Psalms115:11 Enu mu akua uôma ua Jihova

Psalms116:4 Bhenhobho anga ngi dikola mu dijina dia Jihova
Psalms116:5 Jihova ua lenduka
Psalms116:6 Jihova uene mu langa ió atobho; nga bhondalalele kiá
Psalms116:7 Tunda-ku

Psalms116:10 Eme nga xikana
Psalms116:11 nga zuela-phe ngó lusolo
Psalms116:12 Kiki-phe ngi bhakula kima kiahi kua Jihova

Psalms117:1 Ximanenu Jihova
Psalms117:2 kuma jihenda jê javulu ja tu kuatela; o kidi kia Jihova kiemanenà-ku katé ku hádia ni hádia. Ximanenu Jihova.
Psalms118:1 Sakidilenu Jihova
Psalms118:2 Izalaiele a ki ambe dingi
Psalms118:3 Dibhata dia Alá a ki ambe dingi
Psalms118:4 Oso ala ni uôma ua Jihova a ki ambe ue dingi
Psalms118:5 Bhu kíbhidi bhu nga kexile
Psalms118:6 Jihova uala bhu mbandu iami
Psalms118:7 Jihova uala bhu mbandu iami
Psalms118:8 Kota kudielela kua Jihova
Psalms118:9 Kota kudielela kua Jihova
Psalms118:10 Akua jixi a ngi kondolokele
Psalms118:11 A ngi salumukina muene a tona
Psalms118:12 A ngi salumukina kala jinhuki; maji a jimi kala túbhia tu uamena mu minha; kuma mu dijina dia Jihova nga a batela muene bhoxi.
Psalms118:13 Eie ua ngi nenguna muene ni nguzu phala ku ngi bhalesa; maji Jihova phe ua ngi kuatekesa.
Psalms118:14 Jihova muene nguzu iami
Psalms118:15 Ivenu! ku jifundu ja athu aiuka kuala dízui dia kukola kikóue; kuma lukuaku lua Jihova lua bhange undanda!
Psalms118:16 Lukuaku lua Jihova lua di leka
Psalms118:17 Ki ngi fu dingi
Psalms118:18 Jihova ua ngi bhe muene kaxtiku kavulu; maji ka ngʼehelela ni ngi fue.
Psalms118:19 Ngi jikuidienu o mabhitu a kuiuka
Psalms118:20 Iá ene o mabhitu a Jihova; kikale athu aiuka
Psalms118:21 Ngi ku sakidila muene
Psalms118:22 O ditadi dia ditunu jimesene ja kutunga
Psalms118:23 Kienhiki
Psalms118:24 Kizuua kia leluʼiki Jihova ua ki tungula; phala tu sanguluke
Psalms118:25 Tu bhulule
Psalms118:26 A tane-ku ió uoso uiza mu dijina dia Jihova; tu sange Ngana! Tua mi menekena tunde mʼonzo ia Jihova mumu.
Psalms118:27 Jihova muene Nzambi ietu
Psalms118:28 Eie-eie u Nzambi iami
Psalms118:29 Enu mundu sakidilenu Jihova
Psalms119:1 Azediua ió oso a iukila kiambote mu njila
Psalms119:2 A lungu ió aiuka o umbangi uê
Psalms119:3 Euá
Psalms119:4 Eie ua tu bhana o phangu ni ndongo phala tu kuate muanu mu ku i aiuka.
Psalms119:5 Tamano ngi di fikidila mu uendelu uami
Psalms119:6 Jisonhi-phe ki jeje ku ngi kuata
Psalms119:7 Ngi ku sakidila
Psalms119:8 Ngi i kuata muene
Psalms119:9 Munzangala ua diiala u di zelesa kiebhi o uendelu? Ki kale u di langa kiambote
Psalms119:10 Nga ku soto
Psalms119:11 Maka mé nga a kondeka moxi dia muẋima uami
Psalms119:12 A ku tanese
Psalms119:13 Mizumbu iami ia kuata mukumbi ua kutanga o kufundisa kua dikanu dié
Psalms119:14 Nga sanguluka mu ku kutuka mu njila ia umbangi ué
Psalms119:15 Ngi kuata mu kubanza o jiphangu jé
Psalms119:16 O kutonoka kuami
Psalms119:17 Ngi bhandulule
Psalms119:18 Ngi jikule o mesu
Psalms119:19 Ngi nzuángiza ngó mu ngongo mumu; itumu ié i tukuluke muene
Psalms119:20 Muenhu uami ua iokojoka mukonda dia hânji ia kuijiia o matendelelu mé jithembu joso.
Psalms119:21 Eie
Psalms119:22 Eme-phe ngi katule o môndo ni malebhu; kuma o umbangi ué nga u kuata muene.
Psalms119:23 Jingungu kioso ki ja xikamene ni ku ngi ta ikutu
Psalms119:24 Maumbangi mé ue mene ma ngi kala mu vondadi
Psalms119:25 Muenhu uami ua fufujuka mu mavu; ngi phaphumune kala kiambe o maka mé.
Psalms119:26 Nga ku kundu o mauendelu ami oso
Psalms119:27 Ngʼijidise o njila ia mutendelu ué; phala ngi kale mu xinganeka jinga o madiuanu mé.
Psalms119:28 Muenhu uami ua botomoka ni lamba; eie-muène u ngi bhana nguzu ka kiambe o maka mé.
Psalms119:29 O uendelu ua makutu u ngi xale bhua lebha; maji o ngonge ié ngi bhane-iu muene ni kulenduka.
Psalms119:30 Eme nga solo uendelu ua ufiiele; ima ioso i ua tetulula nga i bhake muene ku mesu.
Psalms119:31 Nga naminina ku umbangi ué; Eie
Psalms119:32 Uendelu ua itumu ié
Psalms119:33 Ngi longe
Psalms119:34 Ngi bhane kilunji
Psalms119:35 Ngʼendese
Psalms119:36 Muẋima uami u zuame ku umbangi ué
Psalms119:37 Ngi katule mesu mu kutala ima ia ulalu
Psalms119:38 Kumbidila jiplomesa jé kua selevende ié
Psalms119:39 Ngi katule o kusebha kuala ku ngi kuata uoma
Psalms119:40 Ngi tale
Psalms119:41 Jihenda jé jize ji ngi sange
Psalms119:42 Phala ngi kale ni kia kuvutuila ió uoso u ngi ta môndo
Psalms119:43 O uanji ua kidi kié
Psalms119:44 Nga solo ngi kaiela ngonge ié sé kufula
Psalms119:45 Ngenda jinga muene mu ikoka iatu
Psalms119:46 Ngi tanga jinga o umbangi ué
Psalms119:47 O kutonoka kuami
Psalms119:48 Maku ami nga a leka mu kuxikana o itumu ié
Psalms119:49 Lembalala
Psalms119:50 Kiene kia ngi bhetula o muẋima mu kubhita mu jiphaxi
Psalms119:51 Akua izala a ngi tobhesa muene kiavulu; maji o ngonge ié-phe
Psalms119:52 Ioso ia ua lekelʼeie tunde mʼokulu
Psalms119:53 Maji nga thathamana muene kiavulu
Psalms119:54 Maka ma kaiula ké
Psalms119:55 Dijina dié
Psalms119:56 Muene mua ngi kala o kuzediua kuami
Psalms119:57 Jihova muene dikânda diami di nga solo; nga ki tange muene kuma
Psalms119:58 Nga diondo ni muẋima uami uoso
Psalms119:59 Nga xinganeka kuoso ku ngi bheka o jinjila jami
Psalms119:60 Nga bhange lusolo
Psalms119:61 Mikolo ia ísueia ia ngi bhidile muene; maji eme-phe o ngonge ié ki ia ngi jimbi
Psalms119:62 Ni mu kaẋi ka usuku
Psalms119:63 Ngi dikamba dia ió oso a ku kala ni uoma
Psalms119:64 U Jihova
Psalms119:65 Selevende ié ua mu bhanga jinga mbote
Psalms119:66 Ngi longe kutongoloka ni kukala ni kilunji; kuma o itumu ié nga i xikana.
Psalms119:67 Kioso ki nga kexile
Psalms119:68 Eie
Psalms119:69 Akua izala a ngʼona kiavulu milonga; maji eme-phe ni muẋima uami uoso
Psalms119:70 Ene mixima iâ ia nete kala banha
Psalms119:71 Kima kiambote
Psalms119:72 Ngonge i tunda mu kanu dié nga i mono kota mu kuta
Psalms119:73 Maku é ene a ngi bhanga
Psalms119:74 Oso akua uoma ué
Psalms119:75 Nga kʼijiia muene
Psalms119:76 Nga ku diondo-phe
Psalms119:77 Jihenda jé
Psalms119:78 Akua izala ió
Psalms119:79 Oso akua uoma ué
Psalms119:80 Eme-phe muẋima uami u iukile mu mixinda ia jingonge jé
Psalms119:81 Muenhu uami ua senduka ni ku kinga o ubhulukilu ué
Psalms119:82 Mu mesu muala ku ngi bhita-bhita kiá
Psalms119:83 Mbata nga di bhange kala mbinda ia kibha
Psalms119:84 Izuua ia selevende ié
Psalms119:85 A kua izala a ngi kandeia madiela
Psalms119:86 Itumu ié ioso-phe ia kidi; ene a ngi zukutisa sé kikuma; Eie
Psalms119:87 Kua kambele ngó
Psalms119:88 Ngi bhane nguzu iobhe mu kiadi kié
Psalms119:89 U Jihova
Psalms119:90 O ufiiele ué u bhixila ku miji ni miji
Psalms119:91 Katé ni lelu ima ioso ii nangʼiii
Psalms119:92 Se nga kambele vondadi ia kukala mu ngonge ié
Psalms119:93 Nuka ijila ié ia kà ngi jimba
Psalms119:94 Eie-muène ua ngʼivu
Psalms119:95 Athu abukumuka a ngi batamena phala ku ngi jikinisa; maji eme-phe ngi kana kuxinganeka o umbangi ué.
Psalms119:96 Nga mono kuila ima ioso né iauabha
Psalms119:97 Ngonge ié ku ngi uabhela kuahi! Ngi i xinganeka kumbi dioso dia kambàmba.
Psalms119:98 Eie
Psalms119:99 Nga beta kutongoloka
Psalms119:100 Ngejiia muene
Psalms119:101 Njila joso jaiibha
Psalms119:102 Jindóngo jé nga ditunu ku ji xia ni ngʼila muengi; mukonda eie ua ngi longo kiá.
Psalms119:103 Maka mé nga a lola
Psalms119:104 Mu ijila ié muene mu nga kuatela o kilunji; njila ja kujimbidisa eme nga di zembe na-ju.
Psalms119:105 Maka mé kandeia ka inama iami
Psalms119:106 Nga loka muene
Psalms119:107 Nga bhondalala kiavulu muene
Psalms119:108 Xikina
Psalms119:109 Muenhu uami ithangana ioso kifua nga u zenzeka bhu maku
Psalms119:110 Isueia a ngi tela mukala; maji o ijila ié ki ngi i lueza.
Psalms119:111 Umbangi ué uene u nga tambula kuma undundu uami sé thembu
Psalms119:112 Muẋima uami nga u lungisa mu kualuka o jingonge jé
Psalms119:113 Nga di zemba ni akua mixima iiadi; maji o ngonge ié ia ngi uabhela muene.
Psalms119:114 Eie u dilengelu diami
Psalms119:115 Ngi tundidienu bhu mbandu
Psalms119:116 Ngi fikidile
Psalms119:117 Eie se u ngʼimika
Psalms119:118 Eie
Psalms119:119 A bhukumuka mu ngongo eie u a kita dixidilu dia kutexe; eme-phe kiene kia ngi katela o umbangi ué.
Psalms119:120 Xitu ja ngi teketa mukonda dia uoma ué
Psalms119:121 Eme nga kumbidila o kidi ni kuiuka; kana-phe ku ngʼehelela kua ió andala ku ngi bhanga usuéia.
Psalms119:122 Eie-muène
Psalms119:123 Mu mesu mú ngi vunda ni kutala mu kukinga o ubhulukilu ué
Psalms119:124 Selevende ié mu bhange kala ki tuma o kiadi kié
Psalms119:125 Ngi selevende ié muene; ngi bhane kilunji
Psalms119:126 Dikumbi dieza kiá dia eie u Jihova kukalakala; kuma ene o ngonge ié a i somboka kiavulu.
Psalms119:127 Eme-phe itumu ié nga indi muene
Psalms119:128 Kala kiki
Psalms119:129 Umbangi ué
Psalms119:130 Bhua jimbuluila o maka mé a muika
Psalms119:131 Nga bhane mu kanu diami ni kuhaha; mukonda dia hânji ia kukuata o itumu ié.
Psalms119:132 Ngi tale kunu ku ngala
Psalms119:133 Ngʼendese o makanda mami mu njila ia maka mé; kana dingi kituxi ni ki ngi tolola.
Psalms119:134 Ngi kule ku ubhika ua athu mu ngongo; phala ngi kale mu kualuka o jindôngo ja ijila ié.
Psalms119:135 Pholo ié i ngi muikine ngi selevende ié
Psalms119:136 Kisoxi muene kiala ku ngi buabumuka mu mesu kala ngiji
Psalms119:137 Eie
Psalms119:138 Umbangi ué u ua tubhula ua tetuluka muene
Psalms119:139 O muanu uami
Psalms119:140 Maka mé ma zele
Psalms119:141 Nga tolo muene
Psalms119:142 O kuiuka kué kuiuka ku nangenena; o ngonge ié kiene o kidi.
Psalms119:143 Phaxi ni lamba ia ngi kuata muene; maji o kubindumuka kuami kuala mu itumu ié.
Psalms119:144 O kuiuka kua umbangi ué
Psalms119:145 Nga di kola ni muẋima uami uoso; ngʼivue u Jihova
Psalms119:146 Nga di kola ko kué
Psalms119:147 Munhá ngó
Psalms119:148 Ngi fula kilu mu usuku
Psalms119:149 Ngʼivue o dízui diami
Psalms119:150 Enhó andala ku ngi bhanga o phulu
Psalms119:151 Eie-phe ua ngi zukama
Psalms119:152 O umbangi ué ió
Psalms119:153 Ngi tale ki nga bhondalala
Psalms119:154 Ngi fundile milonga iami
Psalms119:155 Oso abhukumuka o kubhuluka ku a kala dikanga
Psalms119:156 Jihenda jé
Psalms119:157 Avulu muene alu ngi zukutisa
Psalms119:158 Ki nga mono ió a dianguka
Psalms119:159 Eme-phe ngi tale
Psalms119:160 Tunde ku dimatekenu katé ku dizubhilu
Psalms119:161 Ilamba ia ngi zuididika sé kikuma; maji ku muẋima uami-phe
Psalms119:162 Nga sanguluka mu kuívua o maka mé
Psalms119:163 O kubhuma kua ngi iibhila
Psalms119:164 Lusambuadi ku kizuua ngi kala mu ku ku ximana
Psalms119:165 Kutululúka kuavulu ku kala kua ió oso a zola o ngonge ié; phala ene
Psalms119:166 U Jihova
Psalms119:167 O muenhu uami uene mu kualuka o umbangi ué; kuma uene u nga bhindamena kiavulu.
Psalms119:168 Ijila ié nga i kuata muene kumoxi ni ma-umbangi mé; mukonda o jinjila jami joso
Psalms119:169 Kudikola kuami
Psalms119:170 O kusamba kuami
Psalms119:171 Mizumbu iami i kale mu ku ku imbila; mukonda eie ua ngi longo o jiphangu jé.
Psalms119:172 Dimi diami di kuate mukumbi uê ua kuimba; kuma o itumu ié ioso ia kidi ni kulunga.
Psalms119:173 Lukuaku lué luize mu ku ngi kuatekesa
Psalms119:174 O kubhuluka kué
Psalms119:175 Muenhu uami u laie
Psalms119:176 Ku nga tundu nga jimbila kala mbudi; selevende ié Ngana

Psalms120:2 Eie u Jihova
Psalms120:3 Eie u dimi dia ufe
Psalms120:4 A ku ase kuala o dizonda ni misongo iatu; a ku te makala ma túbhia mauama.
Psalms120:5 Kokolo diami
Psalms120:6 Muenhu uami ua xikama okulu kumoxi ni athu nguâ kutululuka.
Psalms120:7 Eme ngala kuinda paze
Psalms121:1 Ngi bhetula mesuʼami ku milundu
Psalms121:2 Kubhanduluka kuami ku tunda kua Jihova
Psalms121:3 Ka ku ehela kinama kié kuẋangumuka; Ió uene mu ku ku langa
Psalms121:4 Kidi-ze

Psalms121:6 Dikumbi ki di ku kuama mu muanha
Psalms121:7 Jihova u ku xitila kuoso kuambe ku ku bhanga o phulu; muene u ku inga o muenhu ué.
Psalms121:8 Jihova u ku endesa mu kukatuka ni mu kubhikila
Psalms122:1 Nga sanguluka kioso kia ngʼambela
Psalms122:2 Kumbi dia kuzediua kia tula o inama ietu mu nzunga ié
Psalms122:3 Jeluzaleme

Psalms122:6 Sambenu phala Jeluzaleme a kale ni kutululuka; oso a ku zola
Psalms122:7 O kuzediua ku tunge mu palaxu jê jauabha.
Psalms122:8 Mukonda dia jiphange jami ni makamba mami
Psalms122:9 Mukonda dia inzo ia Jihova
Psalms123:1 Ko kué ku nga zambula mesu

Psalms123:4 Andeka okulu ni ku tu tobhesa katé kia tu kumu muene

Psalms135:21 Jihova a tane-ku
Psalms136:1 Sakidilenu Jihova o mbote iê; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:2 Sakidilenu Nzambi ia jinzambi; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:3 Sakidilenu Ngana ia jingana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:4 U bhanga madiuanu
Psalms136:5 Ua kala ni uhete ua kuiudika maúlu; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:6 Uombo mavu kuthandu
Psalms136:7 Ua tena kubhanga imuiku ia makota; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:8 Dikumbu di tumina mu muanha; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:9 Ni mbeje ni jithéthembua ji tumina mu usuku; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:10 Ua beta ana a phandekumbi mu Ijito; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:11 Iu ua katula Izalaiele muʼaxaxi kâ; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:12 Ni kànda dia nguzu
Psalms136:13 Ua tena kubatula Kalunga Kakusuka mu kaẋi; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:14 Iú ua bhangesa Izalaiele kubhitila mu kaẋi ka menha; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:15 Maji Falaó ni kilômbo kiê ua a kukumuina muʼAlunga kakusuka; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:16 Uendesa o mundu uê mu kikangalakata; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:17 Ua beta makota a jingana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:18 Ua buidisa jisobha ja fumana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:19 Sihone sobha ia Mamodi; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:20 Ni Hoke sobha ia Basane; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:21 Ua bhana oxi iâ ku i bhingana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:22 Ikale undundu uangene ua selevende iê Izalaiele; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:23 Ua tu lembalala mu ditala dietu dia kutola; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbha.
Psalms136:24 Ua tu kudila ku jinguma jetu ala ku tu kanena; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.
Psalms136:25 U bhana kúdia ku jixitu joso; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua.

Psalms145:21 Dikanu diami di sakalala mu kuximana Jihova; o xitu ioso
Psalms146:1 Ximanenu Jihova! Eie ue u muenhu uami moxi
Psalms146:2 Katé bhuoso bhu ngà laiela
Psalms146:3 Kana kudielela jingana mu ngongo
Psalms146:4 Mukonda o anʼathu kubhuima kuâ kúbhua
Psalms146:5 U zediua o muthu ió kubhanduluka kuê kua mu kala kua Nzambi ia Jakobo
Psalms146:6 Ua bhanga o diulu ni ixi
Psalms146:7 U bhesa kaxtiko mu bhângela ió a a bhikisa; hé u bhana kúdia kua ió a tate ni nzala
Psalms146:8 Jihova u jikula o mesu a ifofo; Jihova u bhetula ió a zeka bhoxi; Jihova u zola ió aiuka.
Psalms146:9 Jihova u langa jinzuángiza; u tambula konda ia jihukunhi ni atudi; maji o njila-phe ia ísueia u i bhengeleka.
Psalms146:10 Jihova kà tunda dingi ku ungana uê; o Nzambi ié
Psalms147:1 Ximanenu Jihova! kima kiambote o kuimba mù ximana Nzambi ietu; kiki-phe kia touala
Psalms147:2 Jihova u tungisa dingi Jeluzaleme; hé u bhongolola akua Izalaiele a di muangene.
Psalms147:3 Akexe ni kikote kia muẋima u a saka
Psalms147:4 Jithéthembua muene u ji kuata o konda; u jʼixana joso muene mu majina mâ.
Psalms147:5 Ngana ietu u kôla
Psalms147:6 Jihova u zangeleka ió a di tululula; abhukumuka-phe u a tununa muene katé bhoxi.
Psalms147:7 Imbidienu Jihova ni kusakidila; xikenu o mbànza mu ximana Nzambi ietu.
Psalms147:8 Muene
Psalms147:9 Kiama mu iangu muene u ki bhana o kúdia
Psalms147:10 Nguzu ia kabalu ki iene i mu uabhela; o inama ia bhebhuluka ia diiala ki iene ia ximana.
Psalms147:11 Ki uabhela Jihova athu a mu kala ni uôma uê
Psalms147:12 Ximana Jihova
Psalms147:13 Mukonda muene ua kolesa dingi o jitalanga ja mabhitu mé; anʼé moxi dié ua a bhana kuzediua.
Psalms147:14 Muene ua ku bhana o kutululuka katé kua suku o mbambe ié
Psalms147:15 U tubhula o ngonge iê mu ngongo; kizuelu kiê kienda muene lusolo.
Psalms147:16 U lalumuna o neve kala lá
Psalms147:17 U takujula matadi a mvula kala jimbundu; o ku mbàmbi iê
Psalms147:18 U tuma dingi kizuelu kiê
Psalms147:19 Uidikiza o maka mê kua Jakobo
Psalms147:20 Kana-ku dingi mbutu iʼathu ua a bhange kiki; ki u a ebhula o jiphangu jê
Psalms148:1 Ximanenu Jihova ku maúlu; mu ximanienu ku matala.
Psalms148:2 Mu ximanienu enu mu ji-anjo jê;
Psalms148:3 Mu ximanienu enu mu kumbi ni mbeje; Ximanenu enu mu jithéthembua ja kubenha.
Psalms148:4 Mu ximanienu
Psalms148:5 A ximane o dijina dia Jihova
Psalms148:6 Iene ioso ua i te mu ididi iê
Psalms148:7 A ximane Jihova
Psalms148:8 Túbhia ni matadi ma mvula
Psalms148:9 Milundu ku mukáu
Psalms148:10 Mu iama
Psalms148:11 Mu jisobha mu ngongo
Psalms148:12 Mu nzangi ia mala
Psalms148:13 Ene oso Ximanenu o dijina dia Jihova; mukonda diene ngó o dijina dia a tundu ene oso; muene ngó Sukè-ku mu ngongo ni ku maulu.
Psalms148:14 Lumbinga lua povo iê ua lu bhana dingi nguzu
Psalms149:1 Ximanenu Jihova
Psalms149:2 Izalaiele a sanguluke ni ió uoso ua mu bhanga; anʼa Ziione a kale ni ngalasa
Psalms149:3 A mu ximane o dijina ni kukina; a mu ximane ni kuxika kisàka ni kakoxi.
Psalms149:4 Kuma Jihova u sanzuka ni mundu uê; muene ua-nda ku uabhesa abelesela ni ubhulukilu uê.
Psalms149:5 Akua kikutu kiê a di te nzabala; embe ni ngalasa bhu jihama jâ bhua zeka.
Psalms149:6 Jithathe ja kuximana jinga Nzambi ji kale bhu xingu iâ
Psalms149:7 mu kuvutula phonzo muʼaxaxi ka matumbu
Psalms149:8 phala kukuta o jisobha jâ ku malubhambu
Psalms149:9 Mbé ku a bhanga kioso kia tokala mu kuêla kuâ kuòsoneke; kiene o kijingo kia akua kikutu kiê
Psalms150:1 Ximanenu Jihova. Ximanenu Nzambi ku mbanza iê ikôla; mu ximanienu ku dimbinza diedikiza o nguzu iê.
Psalms150:2 Mu ximanienu mukonda dia ikalakalu iê ia undanda; mu ximanienu kala kia tokala mu ulamba uê ua uabha kiavulu.
Psalms150:3 Mu ximanienu ni dízui dia koloneta; mu ximanienu ni kakoxi ni mbànza.
Psalms150:4 Mu ximanienu ni ngoma ni kukina; mu ximanienu ni mújika ua jingoji
Psalms150:5 Mu ximanienu ni jingoma ja ngondo
Psalms150:6 Uoso o muenhu uala-ku
Proverbs1:1 Jisabhu ja Solomá

Proverbs1:7 Uoma ua Jihova diene o dimatekenu dia unjimu. Maji o iôua-phe a dituna o kuijiia kua unjimu ni ulongelu.

Proverbs10:1 Jisabhu ja Solomá. Mona ua dimuka u bheka kusanguluka kua tatʼâ; maji mona-phe kia kala dilaji dia hatu
Proverbs10:2 Jimbongo ja kubhuma jene mu di bota; maji o kuiuka ku kudila muthu ku kalunga.
Proverbs10:3 Jihova kene kuila muthu ua iuka u mu ehelela mu nzala; maji o luimbi lua mukua ituxi u lu vutula kuema.
Proverbs10:4 Uoso u kalakala ni lukuaku lua usonde
Proverbs10:5 Uoso u muna bhu mvula
Proverbs10:6 Mabesá ma tula ku mútue ua muthu uaiuka; maji o dikanu dia athu a bhumu diezala ni usuéia.
Proverbs10:7 Delembalelu dia muthu uaiuka di kala dibesá
Proverbs10:8 O muthu ua dimukina ku muẋima
Proverbs10:9 Uoso uenda ni muẋima uazele
Proverbs10:10 Mukua kubhalula ni mesu
Proverbs10:11 Dikanu dia muthu ua iuka
Proverbs10:12 Luma lu balumuna jimvunda; maji o henda iavungina o itondalu ioso.
Proverbs10:13 Unjimu u u sanga ku mizumbu ia mukua kilunji; maji o mbangala ia xikamena kubeta mu kunda dia muthu ua kambe kilunji.
Proverbs10:14 O Jinjimu
Proverbs10:15 O mvuama

Proverbs22:4 O kuditolesa ni kuxila Jihova
Proverbs22:5 Mu njila ia mukua ituxi muezala minha ni mabhèbhe; uoso-phe u kondeka o muenhu uê
Proverbs22:6 Longa mona-ndenge mu njila ioso ia tokala o kuendela; katé kieza mu ku kuka
Proverbs22:7 Mvama muene patalá ia jingadiama; mukua ku sobha muene selevende ia ió mukua kusobhesa.
Proverbs22:8 Uoso u kuua usuéia
Proverbs22:9 Uoso uene ni utalelu ua mbote
Proverbs22:10 Semenhi mu kaie

Proverbs22:14 Dikanu dia muhatu uengi
Proverbs22:15 Uôua ua nhenganana ku muẋima ua mona-ndenge; maji kabasa u bhita ku mbangala
Proverbs22:16 Uoso u bhondeleka o ngadiama
Proverbs22:17 Bheteka mátui mê uividile o uanji ua jingambi
Proverbs22:18 Kuma maka-phe enhá kima kia mbote
Proverbs22:19 Phala uende ni kudielela jinga kua Jihova
Proverbs22:20 Abha
Proverbs22:21 phala ku ku tetuluila o maka ma kidi
Proverbs22:22 O ngadiama kana ku mu nhana o kiê
Proverbs22:23 Kuma Jihova ua-nda ku mu bhângela mvunda iê; oso-phe a mu bhundile kiki
Proverbs22:24 Mukua njinda
Proverbs22:25 Phala ku di longe o jinjila jê anga u labhula-mu o dibhèbhe hinu di kúdia o muenhu bhu xingu.
Proverbs22:26 Kana kuta kisangelu ni akua ku di bhana maku
Proverbs22:27 Kuma o ki u lémbua bhu u nomuena phala kufuta dikongo
Proverbs22:28 Kana kusondolola o jimbambe jʼokulu ja tele adiʼé.
Proverbs22:29 Eie ua mono muthu uala ni makidikidi mu kikalakalu kiê? Muenhó-phe hinu a-nda ku mu xikika bhu pholo ia jingana; ka tena ku mu tula ngó bhuamoxi ni athu ió a sebhuluka.
Proverbs23:1 Kioso ki u xikama ku meza mu kúdia ni nguvulu
Proverbs23:2 Tula o phoko bhu dikelengu dié

Ecclesiastes1:1 Maka a tele Ndongixi (Mulongixi)
Ecclesiastes1:2 Kingoho mu kingoho! Mulongixi
Ecclesiastes1:3 O muthu u bhanduluka-ku ihi ku kikalakalu kiê kioso kia mu bhanga ni hadi kulu dia mundʼuku?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Ku tunda muiji
Ecclesiastes1:5 O dikumbi di tunda
Ecclesiastes1:6 O kitembu kiia ku Sulu
Ecclesiastes1:7 O jingiji joso jiia ní ku kungulukila mu kalunga
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ima ioso ienhiʼii i bhuidisa kinéne
Ecclesiastes1:9 O kima kia kexile-ku kiá
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kuala kima kiela exi: Tala
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kuma o ima ia bhiti kiá athu kene ku i lembalala dingi; o ima ia kèza-ku ue
Ecclesiastes1:12 Eme
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ngixi-phe
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nga tonginina ku ikalakalu ioso iene kubhanga athu kulu-dia-mundu
Ecclesiastes1:15 O kia bhengalala
Ecclesiastes1:16 Anga ngi zuela mu muẋima uami
Ecclesiastes1:17 Anga ngiia
Ecclesiastes1:18 Mbata o mu kuvula o kuijiia
Ecclesiastes2:1 Hé ngʼambela o muẋima uami
Ecclesiastes2:2 Katé ni kuolela nga ku mono kutekuka; o ngalasa iene i ngi bhandululʼahi?
Ecclesiastes2:3 Nga kenga mu muẋima uami kioso ki ngi di-ta mu kúnua vinhu
Ecclesiastes2:4 Anga ngi di iudikila ima ia matunda! Nga di-tungila jinzo; nga didimina mábhia a mivide.
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nga didimina jindombe ni mabakala a itulu; mixi i bhana o ibundu
Ecclesiastes2:6 Nga bhange ue ni izanga ia menha
Ecclesiastes2:7 Nga sumbu abhika a mala ni abhika a ahetu; nga kexile ue ni abhika a a vualela kiá ku bhata diami; nga vuile ue ndumba dia jingombe ni jimbudi
Ecclesiastes2:8 O phalata ni ulu anga ngi i bhaka ku maxita-maxita
Ecclesiastes2:9 Anga o ku kula kuami ku vula kinéne
Ecclesiastes2:10 Iene ioso iandalele o mesuʼami
Ecclesiastes2:11 Anga ngi bhetuka o mesu mu kutala ima ioso ia kalakala o maku mami
Ecclesiastes2:12 Anga ngi lungulukila ue o kutongolola ki kala o kuijiia
Ecclesiastes2:13 Bhenhobho nga mono kuila o kuijiia kua beta muene kota mu ku ta o uôua ndenge
Ecclesiastes2:14 O njimu mesuʼê a mu kala mu mútue
Ecclesiastes2:15 Anga ngi kiʼamba mu muẋima uami
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mbata ki tu fike kuila o njimu a kà beta o ku mu lembalala
Ecclesiastes2:17 Anga o muenhu iú u ngi iibhila
Ecclesiastes2:18 Anga o ikalakalu iami ioso i nga bhange kulu-dia-mundu i ngi iibhila mukonda dia uxilu u nga-nda ku i xila o muthu uoso hádia ua-nda ku ngi bhingana.
Ecclesiastes2:19 Kuma nanhi ua kʼijiia se u kala njimu mba u kala kiôua kia hatu? Maji-phe o muenhú muene-muène ua kà i lundula
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kienhiki kia ngi bhekesa kuambela o muẋima uami
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kuma sai muthu o kikalakalu kiê u ki bhanga ni unjimu uoso ni kuijiia kuoso ni uhete ua maku a sakalala
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mbata kima kiahi kiene
Ecclesiastes2:23 Kuma o izuua iê ioso ia jindolo ngó
Ecclesiastes2:24 Manhi ki kima kiambote muene o muthu kúdia ni kúnua
Ecclesiastes2:25 Mbata se ki luene
Ecclesiastes2:26 Kuma o muthu ua iuka
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ima ioso iala ni kithangana kiê kia i xindila Nzambi; iene ioso i bhita kulu dia mundʼuku iala ni thembu iê.
Ecclesiastes3:2 Sai thembu ia kuvuala
Ecclesiastes3:3 Sai thembu ia kujibha
Ecclesiastes3:4 Sai thembu ia kudila ni thembu ia kuolela; thembu ia mukondo
Ecclesiastes3:5 Sai thembu ia kumuanga matadi
Ecclesiastes3:6 Sai thembu ia kusota
Ecclesiastes3:7 Sai thembu ia kutandula
Ecclesiastes3:8 Sai ithangana ia kuzola ni ithangana ia kuzemba; ithangana ia ita
Ecclesiastes3:9 O mukalakadi-phe u katula-ku ihi ku kiókio kiene mu kukalakala?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nga mono kuma
Ecclesiastes3:11 Ima ioso Nzambi ua i bhange ni kuuabha bhu thembu iê; iú ua zangula o mundu uene
Ecclesiastes3:12 Kí kia ngi tetulukila muene
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ni kuila ue
Ecclesiastes3:14 Mbate nga kʼijiia kuila
Ecclesiastes3:15 O ima i tu mona lelu
Ecclesiastes3:16 Nga mono ue dingi kulu dia mundu kunu
Ecclesiastes3:17 Anga ngʼila ku muẋima uami
Ecclesiastes3:18 Anga ngʼamba ue dingi ku muẋima uami
Ecclesiastes3:19 Mukonda kioso ki bhita ku anʼathu
Ecclesiastes3:20 Ene oso muene aia kididi kimoxi; ene oso-phe
Ecclesiastes3:21 Nanhi muene u ki tanga kuila o jinzumbi ja anʼathu jiia bhulu
Ecclesiastes3:22 Eme nga ki mono muene
Ecclesiastes4:1 Anga ngi lunguluka dingi
Ecclesiastes4:2 Anga ki ngi bhekesa kuila
Ecclesiastes4:3 Maji o ua beta hanji o kulúnga bhu kaẋiʼabha
Ecclesiastes4:4 Inda nga mono ue kuma o kukalakala kuoso ni kusakalala o maku mu ibhangelu
Ecclesiastes4:5 O kiôua-phe u di-koteka kiá o maku mê
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kota o lukuaku luezala ni kutululuka ni kunhoha
Ecclesiastes4:7 Anga ngi lunguluka lua mukuá
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kuala muthu uala ngó ubhekèlele uê
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kota o ku kala kiiadi
Ecclesiastes4:10 Mbata se bhu kala muthu u di bhala
Ecclesiastes4:11 Se kiiadi ue a zeka bhuamoxi
Ecclesiastes4:12 Se bhu kala muthu u sota kutolola-bhu umoxi
Ecclesiastes4:13 O munzangala ua ngadiama uala njimu
Ecclesiastes4:14 Mbata bhuala iú u tunda muene mu kaleia
Ecclesiastes4:15 Kulu-dia-mundu
Ecclesiastes4:16 O mundu uê ua kexile mu kutumina
Ecclesiastes5:1 Kinama kié langa-kiu
Ecclesiastes5:2 O dikanu dié ki di zuela lusolo
Ecclesiastes5:3 Kuma mu kubhanga ima ia vulu
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kioso ki u plometela kima kua Nzambi
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kota ku kamba kubhana polomesa
Ecclesiastes5:6 Dikanu dié ku di ehele ni di bhangesa mukutu ué ku ta kituxi
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mukonda
Ecclesiastes5:8 Se u mona mu ixi o jingadiama a ji tatesa
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ki tunda mu mavu ki bhandulula ene oso; katé ni sobha u dielela mu mábhia ku mukáu.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Uoso u zola o kitadi
Ecclesiastes5:11 Mbata bhuoso bhu vudila o jimbongo
Ecclesiastes5:12 O kilu kia muthu u kalakala
Ecclesiastes5:13 O kima ue ki nga mono kia ibha dingi kiavulu kulu dia mundu
Ecclesiastes5:14 O kikala u bhita ni uíndua uoso-uoso
Ecclesiastes5:15 Muthu-phe kala kia tundu mu vumu dia mamʼâ
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kienhiki ue kima kia ibha kiavulu muene
Ecclesiastes5:17 Kia kexile ku muenhu u dia usuku izuua ioso
Ecclesiastes5:18 Kima-phe kia mbote ki nga mono o kuiuka
Ecclesiastes5:19 Kuma o muthu ió a mu bhana o itadi ni jimbongo ja vulu kuala Nzambi
Ecclesiastes5:20 Mbata o muene ue ka kà vudila kuxinganeka kiavulu o izuua ia muenhu uê
Ecclesiastes6:1 Sai kima kia ibha ki ngene mu kumona Kulu-dia—Mundu
Ecclesiastes6:2 o muthu a mu bhana o itadi ni jimbongo ni ujitu kuala Ngana Nzambi
Ecclesiastes6:3 Kuma se bhu kala muthu u vuala hama ia mona

Ecclesiastes6:5 O ió-phe uoso kiluua a mona dikumbi mba u dʼijiia

Ecclesiastes7:1 Kota o kufumana kiambote ni uthu

Ecclesiastes7:3 O dilamba kota jingolela ndenge
Ecclesiastes7:4 Kienhiki o muẋima ua njimu uala mʼonzo ia thambi
Ecclesiastes7:5 O kuívua ue kioso o njimu ki ia mu bazela
Ecclesiastes7:6 Mukonda o kuolela kua kiôua
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ni kidi kiene
Ecclesiastes7:8 O ku mona disukilu dia ima kota
Ecclesiastes7:9 Kana kulenguluka ku kala ni njinda mu muenhu ué
Ecclesiastes7:10 Nuka u tanga
Ecclesiastes7:11 O kuijiia kua soko ni undundu mu kuuabha; oso ala ni muenhu
Ecclesiastes7:12 Mukonda o kuijiia ku vungina o muthu kala kilembeketa
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tongolola kiambote o kikalakalu kia Nzambi
Ecclesiastes7:14 Mu izuua ia diláu
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ima iosuʼiii nga i mono mu kithangana kia izuua ia muenhu uami: kuila sai-ku muthu ua iuka
Ecclesiastes7:16 Eie-phe ku kale u muthu uambote kinéne
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ku kale ue u mukua phulu kinéne
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kota o kubhaka kiki
Ecclesiastes7:19 O unjimu u beta kubhana o kusuína ku njimu
Ecclesiastes7:20 Kidi bá! Mu ngongo kana-mu muthu ua iuka
Ecclesiastes7:21 Muẋima ué kana ku u ta mu kuividila ngó ioso i zuela athu
Ecclesiastes7:22 Mukonda eie-muène ue
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ima iosuʼiii nga i tongolola ni unjimu ni kuijiia; eme ngʼedi ngixi: Hádia ngiza kuijiia; manhi-phe o kuijiia kuene hanji kua ngi kala dikanga.
Ecclesiastes7:24 O kima kia kexile-ku kiá
Ecclesiastes7:25 Anga ngi lunguluka dingi
Ecclesiastes7:26 Eme nga bongo-mo kima kia beta o kulula kúfua ndenge; kienhiki: O muhatu uedi
Ecclesiastes7:27 Mutudi-a-makaphe

Ecclesiastes7:29 Talenu-phe
Ecclesiastes8:1 Nanhi u soka ni njimu? Nanhi muene u soka ni ió uejiia? Nanhi uejiia kioso kia jimbulula o ima? O muthu uejiia ni pholo iê i lelama
Ecclesiastes8:2 Eme ngi kuʼambela: O kijila kia sobha aluka-kiu
Ecclesiastes8:3 Bhu pholo iê ku lenguluke ku sondoloka-bhu
Ecclesiastes8:4 Mbata o kizuelu kia sobha kiala ni nguzu; nanhi ua-nda ku muʼila: Ihi
Ecclesiastes8:5 Uoso-phe uaiuka ijila
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kuma ima ioso iala ni kithangana kiê kia ku i bhanga
Ecclesiastes8:7 Mukonda kejiia kioso ki a-nda ku mu bhita; o kioso ue ki kia-nda ku mu bhita
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kana-ku muthu u tena ku tumina o muenhu uê kuila u kole
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ima ioso ienhiʼii nga i mono kioso ki nga te o muẋima uami mu ku tongolola o ima ioso iene mu kubhanga athu mu ngongo; kuma sai ni kithangana
Ecclesiastes8:10 Nga mono ue akua phulu ku a funda mu jimbila ni kutululuka
Ecclesiastes8:11 Mukonda dia kuila o ibhangelu ioso ia ibha ka mu i fundisila-bhu kiá kindala
Ecclesiastes8:12 O mukua ituxi némbe o kuiibha u ku bhanga mu luhama
Ecclesiastes8:13 Maji o mukua phulu u lémbua ku kala kiambote
Ecclesiastes8:14 Maji mu ngongo muala dingi ima ia mukuá ia ukumbu iene ku bhanga-mu: O kuila sai ni athu a iuka a bhita ni ima ia fuama o ibhangelu ia athu a ibha. Sai ni iá aiibha a bhita ni ima ia fuama o ibhangelu ia athu a iuka. Ngi ki amba muene kuila
Ecclesiastes8:15 Anga o kusanguluka ngi ku tula ditala dia di leka
Ecclesiastes8:16 O kioso ki nga te o muẋima uami mu kutongolola o kuijiia
Ecclesiastes8:17 kiene ki nga mono o ibhangelu ioso ia Nzambi
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ima ioso ienhiʼii nga i lungujula kiavulu ni muẋima uami
Ecclesiastes9:2 Mu ngongo ima ioso iene imoxi i bhita ku athuʼoso: O ki bhita ku muthu ua iuka
Ecclesiastes9:3 Kienhiki kiene o kima kia iibha ku ima ioso iene mu ku bhanga Kulu-dia-Mundu; kuila athu oso ima i a bhita kumoxi; kuila ue o muẋima ua anʼathu uezala ufusa; o ku muẋima uâ ni ku muenhu uâ kuala ngó kutulumba ni kubhanga kiaiibha
Ecclesiastes9:4 Tala-phe
Ecclesiastes9:5 Kuma ió oso ala ni muenhu ejiia kuila a-nda kúfua
Ecclesiastes9:6 Katé ue ni henda iâ
Ecclesiastes9:7 Kala kiki-phe
Ecclesiastes9:8 O izuatu ié izele jinge mu thembu joso
Ecclesiastes9:9 Kemba jinga ni muhatu ua kazola ké
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kioso kia kuiza bhu maku phala ku ki bhanga
Ecclesiastes9:11 O ki nga lunguluka
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ni kuila ue o muthu kʼejiia o thembu iê; mukua ni jimbiji kia ji tamba ni uanda ua usuéia
Ecclesiastes9:13 Nga mono ue ku mundu kiuila
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kuma
Ecclesiastes9:15 O muenhomo-phe mua tungule o ngijiue ia ngadiama
Ecclesiastes9:16 Bhenhobho nga kiambe muene
Ecclesiastes9:17 O maka ma jinjimu-ze a fuama kua evua ni kilunji kia batama
Ecclesiastes9:18 Kuma o unjimu kota
Ecclesiastes10:1 Mukuâ ni luhamue lua-fu
Ecclesiastes10:2 O muẋima ua njimu uene ku kadilu kê
Ecclesiastes10:3 O kiôua katé ni kiʼaia mu njila
Ecclesiastes10:4 O njinda ia nguvulu se ia ku lungulukila
Ecclesiastes10:5 Sai ue dingi ni kima ki nga mono o ku ibha Kulu-dia-Mundu
Ecclesiastes10:6 hé o kióua a mu xikika kididi kia di leka
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nga mono ue abhika a di nenge ku jikabalu
Ecclesiastes10:8 Uoso u kanda dikungu
Ecclesiastes10:9 O uoso u tuta o matadi
Ecclesiastes10:10 O utadi kuila ua xibhi
Ecclesiastes10:11 O nhoka se i dianga ku numata
Ecclesiastes10:12 O njimu

Ecclesiastes10:14 Né-mbe o kiôua u vudisa ndumba dia maka
Ecclesiastes10:15 O ukalakalelu ua maiôua u a bhuidisa
Ecclesiastes10:16 Kokolo dié! eie u ixi ua bhingi kuila o sobha ié monandenge
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ua lungu! eie u ixi ua bhingi o sobha ié monʼa jingana
Ecclesiastes10:18 Mukonda dia umonha uavulu o mukambu ua hongo ia ʼnzu u lundumuka
Ecclesiastes10:19 Athu o kuolela ene mu dʼixanenaku; o vinhu i sanguluisa o muenhu; maji mu ima ioso o kitadi kiene ki zuela.
Ecclesiastes10:20 O sobha ku mu xinge

Ecclesiastes11:2 Ioso i uala na-iu uana ni sambuadi
Ecclesiastes11:3 Kioso o matuta kiezala ni menha

SongOfSongs5:1 Nga bokona kiá mu kadíbhia kami
SongOfSongs5:2 Eme ngele ku kilu maji muẋima uami moxi ua tonoʼê. Ngividila dízui dia kazola kami ua mu ṗhuṗha
SongOfSongs5:3 Nga zula kiá izuatu iami; ngi i zuata dingi lua mukuá? Inama iami nga i sukula kiá; manhi ngi i xidisa dingi?
SongOfSongs5:4 Kazola kami ua te lukuaku luê bhu dizungu dia dibhitu
SongOfSongs5:5 Anga ngi balumuka mu ku jikuila kazola kami; kienhokio maku mami ma kala mu zunzumuka uasu ua sumuna
SongOfSongs5:6 Kazola kami nga mu jikuila dibhitu
SongOfSongs5:7 Alangidi a kexile mu kulanga o mbonge
SongOfSongs5:8 Nga mi lokela enu mu anʼa ilumba ia Jeluzaleme
SongOfSongs5:9 Kazola ké uala nʼihi ia tundu
SongOfSongs5:10 Mukonda o kazola kami uedi ni kuzela ni kukusuka; muene ua beta ku di tungula mu makuinhi a jimidi.
SongOfSongs5:11 Mútue uê mukua ni ulu uôzunze kiambote; jindemba jê kala isaka ia ndende
SongOfSongs5:12 O mesu mê edi kala mesu a jiphomba jala bhu mbandu ia menha ma mu kunguluka; u fika kala a a sukula ni lete
SongOfSongs5:13 Tu matama tuê kala kakisengu ka balasamu ia dizumba
SongOfSongs5:14 O maku mê medi kala malenge ma ulu
SongOfSongs5:15 O tuluingi tuê kala jiphiladi ja ditadi dia mamole
SongOfSongs5:16 O uzuelelu uê u touala

SongOfSongs6:7 Mukuá ni ibhasu iiadi ia jilomá
SongOfSongs6:8 Ahetu a sobha
SongOfSongs6:9 Maji diembe diami
SongOfSongs6:10 Nanhi muenʼiú ua mu tukuluka ni ku di muika kala ukielu ua kimene
SongOfSongs6:11 Nga kulumuka mu kadíbhia kami ka miẋi ia Minongela
SongOfSongs6:12 Ki kia bhiti-phe
SongOfSongs6:13 Vutuka
SongOfSongs7:1 O inama ié ku uabha kuahi
SongOfSongs7:2 O thumbu ié mukuá ni kopho ia kikondoluesa
SongOfSongs7:3 O tumele tué tuiadi
SongOfSongs7:4 O xingu ié kudiengeta kala inzu ia matala iòtunge ni mazu a nzamba. O mesu mé kala jindombe mu honga ia Hezebone
SongOfSongs7:5 O mútue ué ua di leka kala mulundu ua Kalamelu; o jindemba ja mútue ué mukuá ni thanga ia pulúpula ia kusuka kiambote; sobha ua di kutu mu jingindu jé.
SongOfSongs7:6 Eie ua uabha
SongOfSongs7:7 O ku tolomoka kué kua di fuangana kala diaie; o mele mé iene o isaka iê ia jindende.
SongOfSongs7:8 Eme ngambele
SongOfSongs7:9 O kutouala kua jibeju mukuá ni vinhu ia uabha kiambote. Xi
SongOfSongs7:10 Eme ngi uangene ua kazola kami; o muene ue ua mu dʼivua kala ngala ku mu sunga.
SongOfSongs7:11 Izá
SongOfSongs7:12 Tua kà di meneka jinga mu kimenemene ngó
SongOfSongs7:13 Miẋi ia mandalákula i bhana dizumba diê diambote; o bhu muelu ua dibhitu dietu
SongOfSongs8:1 Aiué! Tamanu eie ua kexile u phangʼiami ia diiala
SongOfSongs8:2 Ngeji ku kuambata hé ngi ku bokuesa mʼonzo ia mamʼetu
SongOfSongs8:3 O lukuaku lué lua kiasu lueje ku kala koxʼa mútue uami
SongOfSongs8:4 Nga mi lokela
SongOfSongs8:5 Nanhi muenʼiú
SongOfSongs8:6 Ngi te ku muẋima ué kala kidimbu
SongOfSongs8:7 Menha né-mbe a vula
SongOfSongs8:8 Tuala ni kaphange ketu ka muhatu kòfele
SongOfSongs8:9 Muene se u kala kimbaka
SongOfSongs8:10 Xi
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomá ua kexi ni díbhia dia mivide mu Bale-Hamone; díbhia dienʼidi anga u bhana athu ku di langa; eneʼá-phe aia ni kuila
SongOfSongs8:12 O díbhia diami dia mivide dia ngi tokala
SongOfSongs8:13 Eie
SongOfSongs8:14 Izá lusolo

Isaiah15:2 Iu banda ku Baiite
Isaiah15:3 A zuata idinhaji mu jinzunga jâ; ia kumbila ku matala
Isaiah15:4 Kienhiki ni Hexebone ni Eleiale

Isaiah15:6 Kuma o kukamba menha ma Nidime kua dibhange ue kíbhidi; mbata iangu iakukuta kiá
Isaiah15:7 Kienhiki nzungule ioso ia bhongoluele
Isaiah15:8 Kuma ngololo ianda kukondoloka mu jimbambe ja Mouabhe; ku kumba kuâ kua-nda kubhiẋila ku Englaíme
Isaiah15:9 Kuma menha ma Dimone mezala manhinga
Isaiah16:1 Tumikisenu jimbudi kua muenexi ua tumina oxi
Isaiah16:2 He ki mua ki bhange
Isaiah16:3 Sota kaiula
Isaiah16:4 Oso atungani ami
Isaiah16:5 Mbata kua-nda kukala kiandu kia henda kia difikidila
Isaiah16:6 Ukumbu ua Mouabhe tua u ivu fuma
Isaiah16:7 Kala kiki
Isaiah16:8 Kuma o mábhia ma Hexebone ma xala ivuza; muvide ua Sibama ki uala kuima dingi; jingana ja ifuẋi jala mu titidila kiá o milenga iê iabetele kuuabha; phaphu iê ia bhixila mu Jazele; ene ala kunhungana ngó mu kikangalakata; o jithangu jê ja sambuka kiá
Isaiah16:9 Kienhiki ngi dila kiá ni udidilu ua Jazele
Isaiah16:10 O kutana ni kusangulukila o mulenga uima idima iavulu
Isaiah16:11 Kienhiki mu mala mua ngi lunguta
Isaiah16:12 Kioso Mouabhe kia-nda kuila bhu thala ia milundu bhua mu kumu kiá
Isaiah16:13 Kiki kiene kizuelu kia tanga Jihova mu kanena Mouabhe
Isaiah16:14 Maji kiki-phe Jihova uambe
Isaiah17:1 Kinemenu kia Damasku. Talesa
Isaiah17:2 Jimbanza ja Alouele ja kà xala ngùndu; ja kà xalela kiá makêla ma ilunga ia ibhaku
Isaiah17:3 O mbonge ia Ifalaíme ia kà suka bhenhobho
Isaiah17:4 Bhu thembu bhenhobho kijingo kia Jakobo kia kà tunuka
Isaiah17:5 Mukonda kia kà bhita kala mumuni u muna idima mʼóbhia
Isaiah17:6 Maji hanji mua kà subhuka tumasa tua jinjonjombolo
Isaiah17:7 Bhu kizuua kieneʼokio
Isaiah17:8 Ka kà suua dingi jikalatódio
Isaiah17:9 Mu kizuua kieneʼokio o jimbonge já ja nguzu ja kà kala uila ididi ia xala jingùndu mu ditutu mba bhu mazokozoko a milundu
Isaiah17:10 Mukonda o Nzambi ié ia Kibhamuenhu ua mu jimbi
Isaiah17:11 o mu kizuua ki ua kà i phapha
Isaiah17:12 O ilunga ionéne ia mundu
Isaiah17:13 Akua jixi a kà numina kala kiene kunumina dibhubha dia menha
Isaiah17:14 Ku ola ia ngoloxi
Isaiah18:1 Lamba dia oxi ia te dizumbila dia jimvela jê kala mabhabha
Isaiah18:2 U tuma ilôlo iendela ku musanza
Isaiah18:3 Enu oso mua tunga kulu dia mundu
Isaiah18:4 Mbata Jihova ua ngʼambela kiki: Eme nga-nda kudixibhidila bhu bhata diami ni kutala mu kanga
Isaiah18:5 Mbata kuila o thembu ia kumuna ki ieza-bhu luua
Isaiah18:6 Jene a kà ji bunda bhuamoxi anga a ji buangidika phala jinjila ku mulundu
Isaiah18:7 O Kifuẋi-phe kia athu a lebha
Isaiah19:1 Muzambu ua Ijitu. Talesa koko
Isaiah19:2 Kuma akua-Ijitu nga kà a zokesa ni akua-Ijitu; kala muthu ua kà bhânga ni phangʼiê
Isaiah19:3 Muenhu ua akua-Ijitu ua kà bhuamu moxi diâ; o ki ata phangu
Isaiah19:4 Eme-phe nga kà bhakula akua Ijitu bhu maku ma ngana iatemanana; sobha i kala ndaxi
Isaiah19:5 O menha ma kizanga kia kalunga a kà bhuinhina
Isaiah19:6 Jingiji ue ja kà bola anga ji bhuinina; o mixinji ia ngiji ia Ijitu ia kà kukuta; ni madianga ni jimbamba ja kà xoueta hé ji xoxouela.
Isaiah19:7 O iẋoka ku mbanduʼa ngiji ia Nilu
Isaiah19:8 O atona a jimbiji a kà kema
Isaiah19:9 Oso a bhotele jinge linho ia fina a kà kakuka
Isaiah19:10 Oso a kexe kufutila athu phala ku a kalakela
Isaiah19:11 Mu kidi
Isaiah19:12 Kindala-phe o jinjimu jé
Isaiah19:13 Kiene ki ngambe
Isaiah19:14 Jihova ua a lunduluila kiá nzumbi ia mudiangu
Isaiah19:15 Ijitu ka kà tena kukatula-ku kima ku kikalakalu kià bhanga mútue
Isaiah19:16 Mu thembu iná akua-Ijitu à kala mukuâ ni ahatu
Isaiah19:17 O ixi ia Juda ia kà kala kidiuanu kua akua-Ijitu
Isaiah19:18 Mu thembu muná kua kà kala mbonge jitanu mʼoxi ia Ijitu
Isaiah19:19 O mu thembuʼomo
Isaiah19:20 Kiene ki kala kijimbuete ki bhana umbangi kua Jihova dia Ilômbo Ieta
Isaiah19:21 Jihova muene ua kà didikiza ku akua-Ijitu
Isaiah19:22 Jihova anga ua kà kuama akua-Ijitu
Isaiah19:23 Bhu kizuuʼokio kuà kala kikoka ki tunda ku Ijitu kiia ku Asídia; akua Asídia eza ku Ijitu
Isaiah19:24 Mu thembu ieneʼoio Izalaiele muene ua kà kala tatu ku konda ia Ijitu ni Asídia
Isaiah19:25 Mbata Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta

Isaiah21:1 Muzambu ua tokala kiphenza kia kizanga kia kalunga. Kala o ibhungu ia kitembu kia sulu ki kungulula ioso
Isaiah21:2 Kisunji kiaiibha kia ngi londekeza; mukua-ufe u bhanga o ufe uene
Isaiah21:3 Kienhiki miongo ia ngi kate kiavulu muene; kua ngʼiza misusu kala misusu ia ió uala ku isenda; lamba dia ngi kondo ni kuívua nga lémbua; nga iokojoka katé nga lémbua kumona.
Isaiah21:4 O miẋima iala ku ngi titila kiavulu
Isaiah21:5 Ene ia a zala meza

Isaiah21:7 O kioso ki a mona kibuka kia masoladi a mondala jikabalu
Isaiah21:8 Muene iu ua di kola kala hoji: Ngana! Ngedi o mu muanha ngemana bhu ditala dia kilangidilu ni kutala
Isaiah21:9 Talenu! Kindala kù kuiza kifuxi kia mala
Isaiah21:10 Uaué
Isaiah21:11 Muzambu kua Nduma. Nzôngo ia ngi bhixila ia tundu ku Seíle
Isaiah21:12 Eme mulangi: O kimene kí kiza
Isaiah21:13 Muzambu ua Alábia
Isaiah21:14 Tundenu ni menha mu kauidile akua-dinhota; akua-bhata kʼoxi ia Tema tundenu ni jimbolo mu kauidila o jingòmbo oso a lenge.

Isaiah21:17 O a subhuka ku mundu ua iá a kuatele mifula

Isaiah28:5 Mu kizuuʼokio
Isaiah28:6 Jihova u kala ue muene unjimu ua uoso u xikama bhu kibhuna kia kufundisa milonga; muene o kimbaka kia oso a sota kuvutula jinguma katé bhu muelu ua sanzala.
Isaiah28:7 Maji ni athu enhá ue
Isaiah28:8 Mukonda ni meza mâ moso mezala induxila

Isaiah30:1 Jihova uambe
Isaiah30:2 Hé a kulumuka mu Ijitu
Isaiah30:3 Maji o undanda ua Falaó ua kà mi sonoesa o pholo
Isaiah30:4 Mukonda o ilamba iê iala mu Zouane
Isaiah30:5 Ene oso-phe sonhi ja kà a kuata muene
Isaiah30:6 Muzambu ua iama ku sulu: ku ixi ia mukondo ni jingongo a kàmbata jimbongo jâ a ji tuika ku makunda a tujumenda
Isaiah30:7 Kuma Ijitu ua-nda ku a banda ngó makutu; ka a bhandulula kima; o kienhiki nga ki kola kiá
Isaiah30:8 Ndé-phe kiá kindala
Isaiah30:9 Mukonda athu iâ kuhuka kuvula
Isaiah30:10 A tangela akua lumono
Isaiah30:11 Njila xenu-iu bhu mbandu

Isaiah30:19 Mbata athu a kà tunga muene mu Ziione
Isaiah30:20 Sumbala Jihova ua kà mi bhana
Isaiah30:21 O mátui mé
Isaiah30:22 Divunga dia iteka ié ia phalata
Isaiah30:23 Kienhokio-phe Jihova ua-nda ku ku bhana o mvula ku mbutu ié i u kuna bhoxi
Isaiah30:24 Ni jingombe ni jiseseme ja jibulu
Isaiah30:25 O ku milundu ioso ia di-leka ni ku tu-thuthulûndu tuoso tua zanguka

Isaiah30:27 Talesa
Isaiah30:28 O muha ua kubhuima kuê kala ngiji ia xamujuka ni menha
Isaiah30:29 Muʼaxaxi kenu-phe mua-nda ku kala muimbu kala mu usuku ua kutulula o kizokola kikôla; muẋima ua-nda ku mi sanguluka kala muthu u xika ngaieta mu kuiza ku mulundu ua Jihova
Isaiah30:30 Jihova ua kʼèvisa o fuma ia dízui diê
Isaiah30:31 Mbata o dízui dia Jihova diene dia kà bhanga isasake kua Asídia

Isaiah31:1 Kokolo dia ió oso a kulumuka ku Ijitu mu ku sota-ku dikuatekesu
Isaiah31:2 Hanji-phe
Isaiah31:3 Kuma akua-Ijitu
Isaiah31:4 Mbata Jihova kiene kia ngʼambelʼiki
Isaiah31:5 Jihova dia Ilômbo Ieta u zenzama mu ku kondeka Jeluzaleme mukuâ ni ki zenzama jinjila bhulu; u mu bhângela
Isaiah31:6 Bilukenu-phe kua ió a mu bhukumukina kinéne kuala anʼa Izalaiele.
Isaiah31:7 Kuma mu kizuua kiókio kala muthu ua kà texe mahamba mê ma phalata
Isaiah31:8 O Asídia ua kà laúka ku xibhata
Isaiah31:9 Muene ua kà di-texila ku ndanji iê ia dilengelu
Isaiah32:1 Talesenu
Isaiah32:2 Dikuenze muenhó ua kà kala disuamenu kiza o kitembu
Isaiah32:3 O mesu a iá
Isaiah32:4 Muẋima-phe ua iá a tobho
Isaiah32:5 O seletete ka-nda ku mu ixana dingi mujitu; o kinjenje ka kà mu ila dingi mubhani
Isaiah32:6 Mbata o seletete uzuela useletete uoso
Isaiah32:7 O jindunge joso ja kinjenje
Isaiah32:8 Maji muthu a mu edi mujitu
Isaiah32:9 Enu ahatu
Isaiah32:10 Kuma mu muvu ni izuua
Isaiah32:11 Teketenu
Isaiah32:12 Bhua-nda kukala ku di-bunda bhu jithulu
Isaiah32:13 Kua-nda kuiza minha ni isasa kulu diaʼxi ia mundu uami; kiene kimoxi ni ku thanduʼa jinzo ja kutana
Isaiah32:14 Mbata dizemba dia kà xala ngundu
Isaiah32:15 katé o Nzumbi i tunda bhulu kia kà di-lundulula ku thandu dietu; mu kizuuʼokio
Isaiah32:16 O kutetuluka kua kà kala mu kikangalakata
Isaiah32:17 O ibundu ia kuiuka ia kà kala kutululuka; o ukalakelu ua kuiuka o kunhoha ni ku kondama mu thembu joso.
Isaiah32:18 O athu ami anga a kà tunga mu diembu dia batama
Isaiah32:19 Maji né hanji ki u kulumuka mu muxitu kua kà noka mvula ia matadi
Isaiah32:20 Mua zediua enu oso mu akua ku kuua-kuua ku mbanduʼa menha moso; anga mu bhitisa-ku o kinama kia ngombe ni kia bulu.
Isaiah33:1 Kokolo diê u mubhundi
Isaiah33:2 Jihova
Isaiah33:3 Mundu ua-nda kulenga
Isaiah33:4 Kiene kiua kia-nda kua kà bhongolola o madibhundila u mua xi bhoxi

Isaiah33:6 Mu ithangana ié
Isaiah33:7 Talesa-ze
Isaiah33:8 Ikoka iabolo
Isaiah33:9 Oxi ikema

Isaiah33:12 O ifuẋi ku mundu
Isaiah33:13 Enu muène ku makanga

Isaiah33:15 Kikale uoso uenda ni kuiuka

Isaiah33:17 Eie o mesuʼé a kà mona Muenexi mu uuabhelu uê

Isaiah33:19 Athu ió

Isaiah34:1 Bhiẋilenu kunu
Isaiah34:2 Kuma njinda ia Jihova ia zenzama ku thandu a ifuẋi ioso-lolo
Isaiah34:3 O imbi iâ ibhinga ku i texe-texe ngó mu kanga
Isaiah34:4 O ilômbo ioso iene bhulu ia kà buika
Isaiah34:5 Kuma o xibhata iami ia kodiuila mu diulu; talesa-phe ia kà tuluka mu Idomo phala kua fundisa
Isaiah34:6 Xibhata ia Jihova iezala ni manhinga
Isaiah34:7 O tuluimba tua kà tuluka-nâ kumoxi
Isaiah34:8 Kuma-phe kiene o kizuua kia phonzo ia Jihova
Isaiah34:9 O jingiji ja Idomo ja kà biluka uasu
Isaiah34:10 Ni mu muanha ni mʼusuku ki ia kà jima; o dixi diê di banda jinga katé ku hádia ni hádia; ku tunda muiji kuiza muiji ni ku i buikisa; ku tunda mivu kuiza mivu nuka mua kà bhita dingi muthu.
Isaiah34:11 Maji ni kikulungu ni káhombo a ʼivua
Isaiah34:12 O midikixi muene mu ia kà bhanga dibhata diâ; ungana a kà uʼiẋanena anʼa jingana
Isaiah34:13 O mu mazêmba mê mua kà sabhuka minha
Isaiah34:14 O jimbulu ni jingato ja isangu
Isaiah34:15 O kangimbi muene mua kà tela kikalanga kiê
Isaiah34:16 Sotenu mu divulu dia Jihova
Isaiah34:17 Kuma muene ua i tela jisorte ja ku i uanena oxi

Isaiah35:8 Anga mua kà jikuka o kikoka ni njila
Isaiah35:9 Muenhomo ki mua kà batuila hoji
Isaiah35:10 O jihule ja Jihova a kà vutuka
Isaiah36:1 Anga ki bhita mu muvu ua kuinhi ni uana ua sobha Ezekiia kuma Senakedibe
