Isaiah48:22 Maji o athu abhumu
Isaiah49:1 Ngʼivienu
Isaiah49:2 Dikanu diami ua di kitula xibhata iatu
Isaiah49:3 Iú ua ngʼambela: Eie u selevende iami; u Izalaiele
Isaiah49:4 Eme-phe
Isaiah49:5 Kiki-phe
Isaiah49:6 Muene uambe dingi: O kukala ngó u selevende iami
Isaiah49:7 Jihova
Isaiah49:8 Jihova ua zuela kiki: Sai thembu ia tokala i nga kuividila
Isaiah49:9 Phala uambele iá a a kutu
Isaiah49:10 Ka kala dingi ni nzala
Isaiah49:11 Anga milundu iami ioso ngi i bhanga njila; o ikoka iami a kà i zangumuna.
Isaiah49:12 Talesa
Isaiah49:13 Imbenu
Isaiah49:14 Maji Ziione
Isaiah49:15 Manhi muhatu u tena kujimba monʼê ua mu vuala
Isaiah49:16 Talesa
Isaiah49:17 Anʼê a-nda kuiza lusolo kokué
Isaiah49:18 Bhetula-ze o mesu mé u kengelele mbandu ni mbandu
Isaiah49:19 Kuma ni mu ikangalakata ié
Isaiah49:20 Katé ni ana a uhukunhu ué a-nda ku ku ambela mu dítui
Isaiah49:21 Eie-phe ua-nda kuila ni muẋima ué
Isaiah49:22 Jihova uambe kiki: Nga kà zangula lukuaku luami
Isaiah49:23 O jisobha a kà ku sasela ana; ana ilumba a jisobha a kala iledi ié; a kà ku diundila jinga ni pholo bhoxi
Isaiah49:24 Manhi dizonda a tena ku mu tambula o mbole iê ia unhanga? Anga ió a a kutu mu kikuma kia kidi
Isaiah49:25 Maji
Isaiah49:26 O ió a ku bhondeleka ngʼa dikila niʼxitu jâ-ene
Isaiah50:1 Jihova ua zuela kiki
Isaiah50:2 Mukonda diahi
Isaiah50:3 Eme maúlu ngene ku a zuika kitombe bui
Isaiah50:4 Jihova Nzambi ua ngi bhana dimi dia uanji
Isaiah50:5 Jihova Nzambi ua ngi xitununa mátui
Isaiah50:6 O dikunda diami ngi di bhakuila ió oso a ngi beta
Isaiah50:7 Kuma Jihova Nzambi muene u ngi banda
Isaiah50:8 Muene u ngi lungisa iú-ue bhua zukama; nanhi u ngi ta mulonga? Tu tukulukile bhuamoxi; nguma iami nanhi? a bhixile bhabha kokuami.
Isaiah50:9 Mua mono-ze
Isaiah50:10 Mukuahi mudienu uambe kuxila Jihova
Isaiah50:11 Talesa
Isaiah51:1 Enu-oso mua ku ta muẋima ku ufundisilu ua kidi
Isaiah51:2 Talenu Mbalahamu
Isaiah51:3 Mbata Jihova ua-nda kukonda malamba kua Ziione
Isaiah51:4 Athuʼami
Isaiah51:5 O uiukilu uami ua zukama; ubhulukilu uami iú tomboka kiá; maku mami mene ma-nda kutetuluila o mundu; ikolo ia-nda ku ngi xikamena ni kukinga
Isaiah51:6 Bhetulenu mesu menu ku maúlu
Isaiah51:7 Enu
Isaiah51:8 Kuma axikamena ku a kesa kala kabamba ki ka kesa o kizuatu
Isaiah51:9 Phaphumuka
Isaiah51:10 Ki eie-muène ua kukutisa o menha mu musanza ua kalunga
Isaiah51:11 Kienhiki kiene kia kà vutuka oso a a kula kuala Jihova
Isaiah51:12 Eme
Isaiah51:13 Anga u jimba Jihova ua ku bhanga
Isaiah51:14 O hutile uoso a mu balakala-phe ka nangʼiê kujituka
Isaiah51:15 Mbata eme Jihova
Isaiah51:16 Eme-phe ngi ta maka mami mu kanu dié
Isaiah51:17 Phaphumuka
Isaiah51:18 Ku ana oso a vuala muene
Isaiah51:19 Ima iiadi iii ua bhiti na-iu muene; mukuahi ua ku kuatela o henda? O kubuika ni kusekala
Isaiah51:20 O anʼéambuka kiá
Isaiah51:21 Kienhiki-phe
Isaiah51:22 Ngana ié
Isaiah51:23 Inda nga kà di tula bhu maku ma ió a ku tatesele
Isaiah52:1 Phaphumuka
Isaiah52:2 Dikukumune o fufuta
Isaiah52:3 Mukonda Jihova Nzambi
Isaiah52:4 Mbata Jihova Nzambi
Isaiah52:5 Kiki-phe ngi bhanga kiebhi
Isaiah52:6 Mukonda dia kiki
Isaiah52:7 Inama iê kuuabha kuahi
Isaiah52:8 Ivua dízui dia alangidiʼé
Isaiah52:9 Uenu bulukutu ni kuimba
Isaiah52:10 Jihova ua funha lukuaku luê lu kôla bhu pholo ia ifuẋi ioso; o maẋokololo moso maʼxi ma-ndu mona ubhulukilu ua tundu kua Nzambi ietu.
Isaiah52:11 Tundenu-ku
Isaiah52:12 Kuma ki mua-nda kutunda ni lusolo
Isaiah52:13 Talesa
Isaiah52:14 Kala kia sasumuka athu a vulu mu ku mu mona
Isaiah52:15 Mu kiki
Isaiah53:1 Nanhi ua xikana o maka metu? Nanhi muene kua mu tukulukila o lukuaku lua Jihova?
Isaiah53:2 Kuma muene uaii ni ku kula bhu pholo ia Nzambi mukuâ ni luthangu lu fuafua
Isaiah53:3 Kia kexi
Isaiah53:4 Kidi kiene
Isaiah53:5 Maji muene a mu kuama mukonda dia itondalu ietu
Isaiah53:6 Etu oso tua kexi mu kuenda kala jimbudi ja jimbidila; kala muthu u di-texila ni njila iê; maji-phe o mulonga ua tu tokala etu-oso
Isaiah53:7 O kia mu tatesele
Isaiah53:8 Tembu ia mu tobhesa mu kufunda
Isaiah53:9 Mbila iê a i te bhuamoxi ni ingumba; ni mvuama bhu kufua kuê; mbata muene ka bhangele phulu
Isaiah53:10 Maji kiene-phe kia uabhelele Jihova
Isaiah53:11 Kienhiki
Isaiah53:12 Mukonda dia kiki
Isaiah54:1 Tana-ku eie u mbaku ua kambe kuvuala; imba
Isaiah54:2 Balaka ié kudisa-iu
Isaiah54:3 Mbata eie ua-nda kusokoloka ni ku kadilu ni ku kiasu; mbutu ié ia-nda kúvua akua-jixi
Isaiah54:4 Ku kale ni uoma
Isaiah54:5 Mbata Mubhangi ué muene munumiʼé
Isaiah54:6 Mbata Jihova ua ku ixana kala muhatu a mu ambudisa
Isaiah54:7 Nga ku ehelela kathangana kòfele; maji nga-nda ku kuongeka ni jihenda ja nzungule;
Isaiah54:8 Mu kutema kuavulu nga ku suekela pholo iami mu kathangana kòfele; maji nga-nda ku ku lendukila ni henda ki iene kúbhua; kiene kia zuela Jihova
Isaiah54:9 Mbata o kiki kia kà ngi kala mukuâ ni dilúvio dia Noué; kala ki nga lokele kuila o sulumbembe ia menha ma Noué ki ia kà bita dingi kulu dia mundu; kiene ki nga loka kuila eme nuka dingi nga kà ku kuatela njinda
Isaiah54:10 Kuma milundu hádia isondoloka
Isaiah54:11 Eie
Isaiah54:12 Nga-nda ku ku bhangela jinjanena ja kidistalo
Isaiah54:13 Anʼé oso a kala maxibulu a Jihova; o kutululuka kua anʼé kua kà di-xala.
Isaiah54:14 Nga kà ku xikika ku thanduʼa uiukilu; o kubhondalala kua kà ku kala dikanga
Isaiah54:15 Tala-ze
Isaiah54:16 Talesa
Isaiah54:17 Falamenda ioso-ioso iòbhange phala ku ku kuama
Isaiah55:1 Enu
Isaiah55:2 Kitadi kienu mua mu ki zangela-hi ku ima ia ngoho ki kúdia? O ima i tunda mu ikalakalu ia maku menu anga mu i zangela ngoho mu ioio ki i tena kuikutisa? Kuatenu kilunji mu ngʼivue
Isaiah55:3 Bhetekenu o mátui menu
Isaiah55:4 Talesa
Isaiah55:5 Tala-ze
Isaiah55:6 Sotenu Jihova
Isaiah55:7 mukua-ituxi ehe o njila iê
Isaiah55:8 Mbata mabanzelu mami ki mene o mabanzelu menu
Isaiah55:9 Kala kia di-leka maúlu kuthandu diaʼxi
Isaiah55:10 Kala kisonoka o mvula bhoxi
Isaiah55:11 kiene ue kià kala o kizuelu ki tunda mu kanu diami; kiene ki kia kà vutuka kia hatu kokuami
Isaiah55:12 Mbata enu mua kà katuka ni kusanguluka
Isaiah55:13 bhu kididi kia musonge
Isaiah56:1 Jihova
Isaiah56:2 Uazediua o muthu uoso u bhanga kiki
Isaiah56:3 Uoso monʼa nzuángiza
Isaiah56:4 Mbata Jihova uambe: Jingolambole joso
Isaiah56:5 Eme ue mʼonzo iami ni mu malumbu mami nga kà a bhana-mu kididi
Isaiah56:6 Oso ue ana a jinzuangiza
Isaiah56:7 Eme ue nga kà ambata ku mulundu uami ukôla
Isaiah56:8 Jihova Nzambi
Isaiah56:9 Enu mu iama ioso ia mukáu
Isaiah56:10 Alangidiʼâ oso ala ifofo
Isaiah56:11 Ômbua jenhiji jala jingandixi
Isaiah56:12 Ene kia di ambela
Isaiah57:1 Muthu uaiuka iu uia muʼalunga
Isaiah57:2 Nʼa bokona muene ku uembu; a-nda kunhohena bhu mianza iâ
Isaiah57:3 Enu-phe bhiẋilenu bhabha
Isaiah57:4 Mukuahi muene mua mu nangena? Nanhi mua mu mu bhanena mu kanu
Isaiah57:5 Mua senduka ni mahamba bhu makota a miẋi ia uisu
Isaiah57:6 Dikânda dié diala ku matadi maẋanana mene mu jingiji; enhá ene o undundu ué; ku matadi kuenhuku eie ue kuene ku ua mu lunduluila o mubhaku ué ua maluvu anga u a bhana ima ia maujitu; ima iii mbé eme i ngi sangulukisa?
Isaiah57:7 Muanza ué kaxi ua u zale bhu thalʼa milundu ia di-leka; kuene ku uene kubanda mu bhana o jisata.
Isaiah57:8 Ujika ikolo ié kuema dia mabhitu ni ilúmbua mu kikumbi kia muelu; eme ua ngi baluka
Isaiah57:9 Anga uia ku dihamba dia Mulôko ni maji
Isaiah57:10 Ua huha ngó dikanga
Isaiah57:11 Mukuahi ua ku kuatele uôma mba hele? Kia ku bhekela ku-ta o makutu
Isaiah57:12 Eme nga-nda kutadika kuiuka kué
Isaiah57:13 O ki u dikola
Isaiah57:14 Anga à kela: Sengululenu
Isaiah57:15 Kuma Munéne ua dileka
Isaiah57:16 Kuma eme ki ngi jijilʼami kuzoka izuua ioso
Isaiah57:17 Njinda ia ngi kuatele mukonda dia usuéia ua unjenje uâ anga ngʼa beta; kuma kia ngi kuata o kutema
Isaiah57:18 Eme ngala kumona o jinjila jâ
Isaiah57:19 Ibundu itunda ku mizumbu eme-muène ngi i iudika; ngi bhana paze kua ió ala ku makanga
Isaiah57:20 Maji athu abhumu mukuâ ni mabhuku ma musanza ma temanana
Isaiah57:21 Nzambi iami
Isaiah58:1 Dikole ni dízui dia suina
Isaiah58:2 Sumbala kiene
Isaiah58:3 Exi-phe: Tua jidilaʼhi ngoho eie-muène ku ki suu? Tua di-taleselaʼhi hadi
Isaiah58:4 Talesenu
Isaiah58:5 Mbé kuene o kujila ku nginda emeʼuku? ngixi muthu a di huhe muenhu uê kumbi dioso dia kambàmba? o kubheteka mútue kala mbamba
Isaiah58:6 Abha o kujila ku nga solo eme
Isaiah58:7 Abha ku uane ue o mbolo ié ni uoso uala ni nzala? o jingadiama ja bhondalala
Isaiah58:8 Kienhokio-phe kiene kia kà di-muika mukengeji ué kala kuma kuákie
Isaiah58:9 Bhenhobho o ki u dikola
Isaiah58:10 se mukua nzala u mu jikuila muẋima
Isaiah58:11 O Jihova u ku endesa izuua ioso
Isaiah58:12 Oso a tokala ku mbutu ié
Isaiah58:13 Se kinama kié u ki vutula ku sabhalu
Isaiah58:14 kienhókio ua kà sangulukila mua Jihova
Isaiah59:1 Tala-ze
Isaiah59:2 Maji o ikuma ienu iene ia di bhange kibatulu kia xiti bhu kaxi nʼenu ni Nzambi ienu; o ituxi ienu iene ia mu vungu pholo
Isaiah59:3 Mbata maku menu ma kasana ni manhinga
Isaiah59:4 Ki bhuala muthu u dikola mu ku sota kulûnga
Isaiah59:5 Alangela maiaki ma dizuua-mbinga
Isaiah59:6 Uandanda uâ ki u xikina ku u bhanga kizuatu
Isaiah59:7 Inama iâ i lenga mu ku bhanga phulu
Isaiah59:8 Njila ia kutululuka a lémbua ku ijiia
Isaiah59:9 Mukonda dia kienhiki
Isaiah59:10 Tua mu babajalela ku iphapha kala tu ifofo
Isaiah59:11 Etuʼenhoso tua mu dila kala itôto
Isaiah59:12 Mukonda o kubhukumuka kuetu kuavulu bhu pholo ie
Isaiah59:13 Tuedi ni kulueza
Isaiah59:14 Kienhiki o ufundisilu ua kidi ua vutuka kuema
Isaiah59:15 Kiene muene
Isaiah59:16 O kia mono kana-ku muthu mukua kilunji
Isaiah59:17 Kuma ua zakela kulúnga kala kivunga-thulu kia ita
Isaiah59:18 Kioso kia tokala mu ikalakalu iâ
Isaiah59:19 Kiene kia kà xila kiua dijina dia Jihova tundé ku mazanga
Isaiah59:20 Anga kua kèza Mukudi mu Ziione
Isaiah59:21 Kienhiki
Isaiah60:1 Phaphumuka
Isaiah60:2 Kuma uamono kitombe kia vungina oxi
Isaiah60:3 Ni akua-jixi joso a kèndela ku mukengeji ué
Isaiah60:4 Bhetula mesu mé ku mbandu joso u mone: ene-oso ia di bhongolola mu kuiza kokué
Isaiah60:5 Eie-phe ua kà ki mona anga u benha ni kusanguluka
Isaiah60:6 A-nda ku kuizalesa ni jikamelu; ni jikamelu ji tunda ku Midiiane ni ku Efa
Isaiah60:7 Ilunga ioso ia jimbudi ja Kedale ia kéza kokué
Isaiah60:8 Akuahi iá a mu kuijiia bhulu a diambatesa kala matuta
Isaiah60:9 Ni kidi kiene
Isaiah60:10 O anʼa jithungiembu ene a kà ku tungila o imbaka ié
Isaiah60:11 Kala kiki
Isaiah60:12 Mbata kifuxi mba utuminu
Isaiah60:13 O kutunzama kuoso kua Libano kua kèza kokué
Isaiah60:14 Ni ana a ió oso a ku huhile eie
Isaiah60:15 Bhu kididi kia ku kuehelela
Isaiah60:16 Eie ua-nda kuámua o lete ia akua jixi
Isaiah60:17 Bhu kididi kia kobidi nga kèza ni ulu
Isaiah60:18 Mʼoxi ié ki mungu dingi evua-mu o kuhâma
Isaiah60:19 Dikumbi ki diene dingi di ku muikina mu muanha
Isaiah60:20 Dikumbi dié ki dia kà fua dingi; o mbeji ié ki i xikina kuia ku mujijima
Isaiah60:21 Ene oso ku mundu ué a kà kala athu aiuka; ene a kà lundula oxi katé ku hádia ni hádia; a kà kala thangu ja ubhe ji nga phaphe eme
Isaiah60:22 Kamona kandenge
Isaiah61:1 Nzumbi ia Ngana Nzambi ua ngi tula ku thandu; mukonda o Ngana ua ngʼundu kutudila jingadiama njimbu ia mbote; ua ngi tumu kusaka oso ala ni kikote mu muẋima; ni kuxika ngonge ia ufolo ua abhika
Isaiah61:2 Ni kukola o muvu ua Ngana ua kubhanduluka
Isaiah61:3 ni kubhana ngonge kuamba akua-malamba mu Ziione a a zuike izuatu ia makembu bhu kididi kia utôkua
Isaiah61:4 Ene a kà tunga jingùndu jòkulu
Isaiah61:5 Bua kà kala jinzuangiza
Isaiah61:6 Maji enu-phe a kà mʼixana Jinganga ja Jihova
Isaiah61:7 Mukonda dia sonhi i mua tambula mu luiadi ni malebhu
Isaiah61:8 Mbata eme ngi Jihova
Isaiah61:9 O mbutu iâ a kà i mona
Isaiah61:10 Nga kà sangulukila kiavulu mua Jihova
Isaiah61:11 Mbata mukuâ ni kikala o mavu a sabhukisa o ngolôngo iê
Isaiah62:1 Mukonda dia henda ia Ziione ki nga-nda ku dixibha
Isaiah62:2 Akua-jixi a kà mona kuiuka kué
Isaiah62:3 Ua-nda kukala-phe u kitundu kia ungana bhu lukuaku lua Jihova
Isaiah62:4 Ki bhu kala dingi o ku ku luka exi: Na-Ubheka
Isaiah62:5 Kala munzangala ua diiala kia sakana ni kilumba
Isaiah62:6 Jeluzaleme
Isaiah62:7 ki mu di-xibhe
Isaiah62:8 Jihova ua loka ni lukuaku luê lua dilu
Isaiah62:9 Maji oso amuni ene a i dia
Isaiah62:10 Bhitenu
Isaiah62:11 Talesa
Isaiah62:12 A-nda ku a luka exi: Mundu Uangene
Isaiah63:1 Mukuahi-ú u tunda ku Idomo
Isaiah63:2 O kiki-phe izuatu ia ku kusukila-hi kiki? ni izuatu iedi kala ia ió ua mu kama mu ditangi dia vinhu?
Isaiah63:3 Ditangi nga di kame muene ubheka uami
Isaiah63:4 Mbata kizuua kia kuvutula phonzo kia ngi kexe kiá ku muẋima; o muvu ua jihule jami uezabhu.
Isaiah63:5 O ki nga tale ku mukonda
Isaiah63:6 Eme-phe nga titidila o ifuẋi ni njinda
Isaiah63:7 Ngi tumbula kulenduka kua Jihova
Isaiah63:8 Kuma muene uambele
Isaiah63:9 Mu lamba diâ dioso ni muene uevile dilamba
Isaiah63:10 Maji ene a baluka
Isaiah63:11 O ki eza-ku-phe
Isaiah63:12 Ió ua bhangesa o kuaku luê lua ulamba kuendesa o lukuaku lua kadilu lua Mozé
Isaiah63:13 Ki muenhó ua a batesele mu makôlo
Isaiah63:14 Anga o Nzumbi ia Jihova ua a bhana dinhohenu
Isaiah63:15 Ividila tundé ku maúluʼoko
Isaiah63:16 Maji-phe
Isaiah63:17 O kiki-phe
Isaiah63:18 O povo ié iangene
Isaiah63:19 Etu tu athuʼê
Isaiah64:1 Ó Ngana! Tamanu ua budile maúlu anga u tuluka
Isaiah64:2 Mukuâ ni muzukuta
Isaiah64:3 Kala kiná ki ua kexe kubhanga madiuanu a bhingi kiluua tua a mona
Isaiah64:4 Mbata tundé mʼokulu kiluua a kʼivua
Isaiah64:5 Eie ua-ia jinga kutakana ni muthu u sangulukila kubhanga kioso kia iuka
Isaiah64:6 Kuma etu-oso tuedi kala kima kia sotama
Isaiah64:7 Ki bhuala dingi u hingila o dijina diê
Isaiah64:8 Maji kindala-phe
Isaiah64:9 Ku thathamane kinéne
Isaiah64:10 Madiembuʼé a ngene a biluka jingùndu; Ziione kilombo ngundu
Isaiah64:11 Onzo ietu ikôla mua kexe o kijingu
Isaiah64:12 Kifua
Isaiah65:1 A ngi sota kuala athu ka kexe mu ngʼibhula; a ngi sange kua ió ka kexi mu ngi sota; ku athu mu dijina diami ka tokalele-mu
Isaiah65:2 Kumbi dioso dia kambàmba nga sunununa maku mami ku mundu ua xibhaka
Isaiah65:3 athu a kuata ku ngi thathamesa kiki bhu pholo iami izuua ioso
Isaiah65:4 a xikama bhu jimbila
Isaiah65:5 aia ni ku di ambela mudiâ
Isaiah65:6 Tala-ze
Isaiah65:7 Jihova uambe: O ikuma ienu
Isaiah65:8 Jihova uambe kiki: Mukuâ ni mu kisaka kia jiʼuva kia sanga-mu o vinhu iobhe
Isaiah65:9 Nga ká sokolola mbutu mua Jakobo
Isaiah65:10 Salone ua kà dí-bhanga kibhanga kia jimbudi
Isaiah65:11 Maji enu-phe
Isaiah65:12 eme ue nga-nda ku mi xinda kúfua ku xibhata
Isaiah65:13 Kala kiki
Isaiah65:14 Talesa
Isaiah65:15 Mua kà xisa o majina menu kuma dilebhu kua athuʼami ósole; Jihova Nzambi phe ua-nda ku mi jibha
Isaiah65:16 Kienhiki uoso u sanga dibesá mu ngongo
Isaiah65:17 Talesa
Isaiah65:18 Maji enu mua-nda kusangulukila kiá muene mu kima ki ngi iudika
Isaiah65:19 Anga ngʼenda ni kutanena mu Jeluzaleme ni kusangulukila mu athuʼami: muene kà kèvua-mu dingi mbimbi ia kudila
Isaiah65:20 Ki muà kala dingi mona u laia ngó izuua iófele
Isaiah65:21 Ene-phe a kà tunga jinzo
Isaiah65:22 Ene ka kà tunga phala akuâ engi kukala-mu; ka kà phapha phala athu engi ku i dia; mbata o izuua ia mundu uami ia kà soka ni izuua ia ukudilu ua muxi
Isaiah65:23 Ene ue ka kà kalakala mu kingoho
Isaiah65:24 Anga kia kà bhita
Isaiah65:25 Ni kimbungu ni seseme ia mbudi a kà dila dikèla dimoxi
Isaiah66:1 Jihova uambe kiki: O diulu kiandu kiami
Isaiah66:2 Kuma lukuaku luami luene lua bhange imbamba iosuʼiii
Isaiah66:3 Uoso u jibha ngombe ia sata
Isaiah66:4 Eme uami nga kà a solela lusebu phala ene
Isaiah66:5 Ivenu kizuelu kia Jihova
Isaiah66:6 Mu mbanza mumu mua-nda kutunda dízui dia kibulukutu
Isaiah66:7 Kioso kiluua eza ku isènda
Isaiah66:8 Kienhiki mukuahi ua ki ivile kiá? nanhi ua muene ima i kala kiki? mua fika-phe oxi ia muvimba i tena ku di-vuala mu kizuua kimoxi? kifuxi kia muvimba
Isaiah66:9 Mbé ngi jikula divumu
Isaiah66:10 Tanenu kumoxi ni Jeluzaleme
Isaiah66:11 phala muámue
Isaiah66:12 Mbata Jihova uambe kiki: talesaze
Isaiah66:13 Kala mona kia mu bhombesa kuala mamʼâ
Isaiah66:14 Kiki mua-nda kubuingita kala mafe a kindemvuna; bhenhobho lukuaku lua Jihova luà fumanena ku jiselevende jê
Isaiah66:15 Mbata
Isaiah66:16 Kuma Jihova ua-nda kuila o kuku u kuata túbhia
Isaiah66:17 Ene oso akua ku dilumba anga a di-bonzela mu mábhia
Isaiah66:18 Mbata o ima iâ ia bhanga nga ʼijiia
Isaiah66:19 Nga kà ta kijimbuete muʼaxaxi kâ
Isaiah66:20 Anga ene a kèza ni jiphange jenu
Isaiah66:21 O mua ene ue
Isaiah66:22 Kuma
Isaiah66:23 Hé kima-phe
Isaiah66:24 Ene-phe a kà tunda mu kutala
Jeremiah1:1 Maka ma Jelemiia
Jeremiah1:2 Kua muene kuene kuejile kizuelu kia Jihova
Jeremiah1:3 Anga ki mu iza ue mu izuua ia Jehoiakimi
Jeremiah1:4 Kienhiki
Jeremiah1:5 Kioso ngoho kiluua ngi kʼumba mu vumu dia mamʼenu
Jeremiah1:6 Eme bhenhobho ngixi: Èlé! Ngana Nzambi
Jeremiah1:7 maji Jihova ua ngambela
Jeremiah1:8 Ku kale ni uoma bhu phola iâ
Jeremiah1:9 Jihova iú ua sunununa o lukuaku luê
Jeremiah1:10 Iala! lelu dienhidi
Jeremiah1:11 Kua ngi tula dingi kizuelu kia Jihova
Jeremiah1:12 Anga Jihova u ngambela uixi: Eie ua mono muene kiambote

Jeremiah1:14 Jihova phe u ngambela uixi: Ku suku kuenhoko kuene kua-nda ku tunda kisunji hinu ki tula ku thandu dia athu oso a tunga mu ngongo.

Jeremiah2:7 Emiʼeme nga mi bokuesa mu ixi ia idima nda mudie o kibundu kiê ni mbote iê: maji enu-phe ki mua zubha kubokona-mu
Jeremiah2:8 O jinganga a lembua kuila: Jihova uala kuebhi? O jimesene ja kitumu a lembua ku ngʼijiia; o alongi a ngi tondalela ijila; o jipolofeta a zambuila Bahale ni ku landukila ima ki i bhandulula kima!
Jeremiah2:9 Kala kiki nga-nda ku-zoka nʼenu
Jeremiah2:10 Kala kiki

Jeremiah2:14 Manhi Izalaiele mubhika? inga mamvala? a mu kutila-hi-phe kiki?

Jeremiah2:19 O usuéia ué ua-nda ku ku bhana njumbu
Jeremiah2:20 Mʼukulu munhá kioso eme ki nga kexile mu kubukujula ophi ié ni kubatujula o mikolo ié
Jeremiah2:21 Eme muène nga ku phaphele kala muvide ua mbutu ia uabha
Jeremiah2:22 O ki ualʼiki-phe né-mbe u di sukula ni Salitre

Jeremiah2:25 Inda ditune kuenda kinama kié mu kanga sé sabhatu
Jeremiah2:26 Kala ki tandanganha o muiii kuila a mu kuata

Jeremiah2:28 O jinzambi jé-phe ji ua di iudikila jala kuebhi? ji balumuke se ji tena ku ku kudila bhu kithangana kia ku bhondalala kué: Mbata jinzambi jé
Jeremiah2:29 Mu luilʼahi phata nʼeme? Enu oso muene mua ngi tondalela
Jeremiah2:30 Anʼenu nga tale ngó hadi ia ku a beta; ene ka xikina ku a bazela: o xibhata ienu ia jikinisa jipolofeta jenu mukua ni hoji i sanujuna.
Jeremiah2:31 Enu muiji ua kime! Suuenu maka ma Jihova: mbé ki ngalʼeki nga di bhange ngi kikangalakata kiahatu kua Izalaiele? inga nga di bhange ngi mukáu ua kitombe kiedi bui? Phalahi phe mundu uami
Jeremiah2:32 Manhi monʼa kilumba u jimba makembu mê

Jeremiah2:34 Katé ni ku mixiku ia izuatu ié kuala ue manhinga a mienhu ia athu a kambele kikuma
Jeremiah2:35 Eie-phe hanji ua mu kuila: Nga di zele
Jeremiah2:36 Eie ua tutumbilahi kiosuʼokio ni ku lungulula njila iê? Ni ku Ijitu kuenhoko a-nda kua ku kuatesa jisonhi
Jeremiah2:37 Ni kua muenhó hinu eie u tunda-ku ni maku mu mútue; kuma o idielelu ié Jihova ua i tende

Jeremiah12:1 Eie
Jeremiah12:2 Eie ua a phaphe
Jeremiah12:3 Maji
Jeremiah12:4 Enu mala! mbambe bhebhi oxi i kuata ku dila kiki
Jeremiah12:5 Abha-phe se ki uala ku lusolo ni iá akua kulenga ni iama bhoxi
Jeremiah12:6 Kuma-ze katé ni jiphange jê
Jeremiah12:7 Onzo iami nga i ehelela
Jeremiah12:8 Undundu uami ngi u kita hoji iala mu kitumba: o kia ngi zuminʼokio kiene ki nga mu zembela.
Jeremiah12:9 Undundu uami ua di fu ni njila ia vulu mabaka; jinjila ja mu kondo mbandu ni mbandu: enu mu iama-phe
Jeremiah12:10 Abidi a nzungule a ngi senguluila o mulenga uami ua mivide
Jeremiah12:11 A di bhange ngundu muene
Jeremiah12:12 Mu ididi ioso ia di leka ia kikangalakata mua tundu akua kubuikisa; mbata o xibhata ia Jihova i leleka tundé hota ia ixi katé hota ia mukuâ; ki bhuala xitu i kala ni kutululuka.
Jeremiah12:13 A kuu tiliku
Jeremiah12:14 Jihova uambe kiki
Jeremiah12:15 Anga kia kà bhita
Jeremiah12:16 Anga kia kà bhita kuila
Jeremiah12:17 O ki ela-phe nguâ kuivua
Jeremiah13:1 Jihova ua ngʼambela kiki: Ndé
Jeremiah13:2 Eme nga sumbu o phonda
Jeremiah13:3 Kizuelu-phe kia Jihova kia ngi tula lua kaiadi
Jeremiah13:4 Katula o phonda i ua sumbu u i zuate mu mbunda
Jeremiah13:5 Eme ngaʼii
Jeremiah13:6 Kia bhiti-phe kuma
Jeremiah13:7 Eme ngele ku Ufalate
Jeremiah13:8 Kizuelu-phe kia Jihova kia ngi tula
Jeremiah13:9 Jihova uambe kiki: Kienhiki ue ki nga-nda kubolesa o izala ia Juda ni izala ia vulu ia Jeluzaleme.
Jeremiah13:10 Mundu ua iibha iú
Jeremiah13:11 Kuma
Jeremiah13:12 Uila kiki
Jeremiah13:13 Eie-phe a tangele: Jihova uambe kiki: Talenu
Jeremiah13:14 Hé nga a sasujula ni ku a bekujula ku akuâ
Jeremiah13:15 Batekelenu
Jeremiah13:16 Jingisenu Jihova
Jeremiah13:17 O kiki se mu kamba ku kʼivua
Jeremiah13:18 Tangela sobha ni na mvuale: Ditulululienu
Jeremiah13:19 Madiembu ma sulu a ma jika
Jeremiah13:20 Bhetulenu mesu menu
Jeremiah13:21 Ua-nda kuzuela kiebhi
Jeremiah13:22 Kioso-phe ki ua kèla mu muẋima ué: Mukonda diahi
Jeremiah13:23 Mukua Itiiópia mbé utena kubilula o kikonda kiê? Inga ingo i tena kuxa madinga mê? Hé kiene-phe
Jeremiah13:24 Uila kiki nga-nda ku a muanga-muanga kala iẋinji ia ixina ia tiliku
Jeremiah13:25 Jihova uambe: Ioso nzongo i nga-nda ku ku zongela eme
Jeremiah13:26 Eme-phe ue nga-nda ku ku zakula o izuatu ié ia moxi katé ki i kuiza mu mesu; hé u xala ua zula muene tuẋi-a-thakala.
Jeremiah13:27 Isunji ié nga i mono
Jeremiah14:1 Kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kua Jelemiia kia tumbula hàmba ia dikota.
Jeremiah14:2 Juda iú dila
Jeremiah14:3 Jingana jâ ja beta ukota
Jeremiah14:4 Kuma mavu ma jikujuka
Jeremiah14:5 Jimbambi ue ku tutu ji vuala hé ji takuila ana bhobho
Jeremiah14:6 Ni mikete ia mikáu i sambela ku ididi ia di leka
Jeremiah14:7 Kia di kalela kiua kuma o ikuma ietu iene ia tu kundula
Jeremiah14:8 Eie u Kidielelu kia Izalaiele
Jeremiah14:9 Kima kiahi ki uidila kala muthu a mu tukumuisa

Jeremiah14:12 Kioso kia jila

Jeremiah14:15 Uila kiki
Jeremiah14:16 O mundu ua mu zambuila ene

Jeremiah14:18 O ki ngiia ngiie ku mukáu

Jeremiah15:2 Kienhokio-phe
Jeremiah15:3 Kuma nga-nda ku a endela ni mavuua ma uana
Jeremiah15:4 Nga-nda ku a balakesa ku mautuminu moso ma ixi; mukonda dia Manasa
Jeremiah15:5 Kuma mukuahi u ku kala ni henda
Jeremiah15:6 Jihova uambe
Jeremiah15:7 Nga-nda ku a bhiata ni mbangu bhu mielu ia oxi; o mundu uami nga u buba
Jeremiah15:8 O atudiʼâ a ahatu a beta ku di vualulula o museke ua kizanga kia kalunga ndenge; ku mediia nga takana-ku mubuikixi phala kubuikisa mama ia minzangala: nga mu tumu ku mu tukumuisa

Jeremiah16:1 O kizuelu kia Jihova anga ki ngi sanga
Jeremiah16:2 Eie kana ku sakana muhatu
Jeremiah16:3 Mbata Jihova uambe kiki: Ku mbandu ia ana a mala ni anʼa ahatu oso a-nda ku a vualela bhu kididi kiki
Jeremiah16:4 Kuma a-nda kúfua ni mahaxi ma xixima
Jeremiah16:5 Mbata kienhiki kiambe Jihova
Jeremiah16:6 Ni makota ni jindenge hinu à kʼafua
Jeremiah16:7 Né-mbe ku a bhana kima bhu lamba
Jeremiah16:8 Eie ue kana kubokona monzo ia kizokola
Jeremiah16:9 Mbata Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta
Jeremiah16:10 Kia kà kala-phe kiki: O ki uà kèla ua zubha ku a jimbuila maka mosoʼ ama
Jeremiah16:11 Eie-phe ua kà a tangela uixi: Mukonda jitata jenu a ngi xisa
Jeremiah16:12 Enu-phe mua beta ku zanga

Jeremiah16:14 Uila kiki
Jeremiah16:15 Maji ela: Jihova u kola! ua tombola ana a Izalaiele koxi ia kusuku ni ku jixi joso ku a a takuile; mbata eme nga-nda ku a vutula ku ixi iâ i nga bhele ku jitata jâ.
Jeremiah16:16 Talesa nga-nda ku tuma atona a nzungule
Jeremiah16:17 Mbata mesu mami ma lungu muene ku jinjila jâ joso; ene ka suama bhu pholo iami
Jeremiah16:18 Kima kia dianga nga-nda kua bhana futu luiadi mu kuiibha kuâ ni kituxi kiâ
Jeremiah16:19 Jihova tata
Jeremiah16:20 Mbé o muthu u di iudikila muene o jinzambi jê
Jeremiah16:21 Kala kiki
Jeremiah17:1 O kituxi kia Juda kiòʼsoneke ni songo ia felu
Jeremiah17:2 Ni anʼâ ue kia banza o jikalatódio jâ
Jeremiah17:3 Eʼ mulundu uami uene mu mukáu! o mvuama ué ni mabhakelu mé moso nganda ku a bhakula ku mbole
Jeremiah17:4 Eʼ muenhé-phe ua di bhange-kiu
Jeremiah17:5 Jihova uambe kiki: Ua xixima o muthu u dielela ku muthu
Jeremiah17:6 Kuma ua-nda kukala mukuâ ni muixi ua mutamálaka mu ixi ia kisekele
Jeremiah17:7 Muthu uoso-phe u dielela kua Jihova
Jeremiah17:8 Kuma muene ua kà kala mukuâ ni muixi uó-phaphe ku mbanduʼa ngiji

Jeremiah17:10 Eme ngi Jihova eme ngi solokota o muẋima

Jeremiah17:17 Ku ngi diuanese; eie u dilengelu diami bhu kizuua kia divuua.

Jeremiah18:1 O kizuelu kia Jihova
Jeremiah18:2 Balumuka
Jeremiah18:3 Eme nga kulumuka ku bhata dia ngumbi
Jeremiah18:4 O kitutu-phe
Jeremiah18:5 Bhenhobho-phe
Jeremiah18:6 Mbé eme ue ki nga soko-bho o ku mi bhanga kala kia bhange o ngumbi iú
Jeremiah18:7 Bhu kithangana kioso ki ngi kanena o kifuxi mba utuminu
Jeremiah18:8 O ki kala o kifuẋiʼokio ki nga kanena
Jeremiah18:9 O bhu kithangana ue kioso ki ngi kanena muiji
Jeremiah18:10 o ki kala ene a bhanga kima kiaiibha bhu pholo iami
Jeremiah18:11 Kala kikiphe
Jeremiah18:12 Maji ene-phe exi: Ku tale hadi
Jeremiah18:13 Uila kiki
Jeremiah18:14 Manhi muthu u di fulʼé o neve ia Libanu anga u sola mukáu ua di zale ndanji? inga o menha ma talala ma tunda makanga ni ku kunguluka ene ku ma landuka?
Jeremiah18:15 Kienhiki o mundu uami ene ku ngi jimba muene
Jeremiah18:16 phala kubhangesa kuila oxi iâ i biluke kima kia kisunji ki kuatesa uoma ni kasekelu ki kʼabhu dingi; uoso u bhita-mu u diuana anga u bhuka ku mútue!
Jeremiah18:17 Eme nga-nda ku a muanga ni kitembu kia thunda bhu pholo ia nguma iâ; nga-nda kua edikiza dikunda
Jeremiah18:18 Bhenhobho ene exi; Izenu tu di kunde kioso ki tu bhanga mu kununguna Jelemiia; kuma-phe o ngonge ia nganga mba kaiula ka ngambi
Jeremiah18:19 Ngi tale diesu Jihova
Jeremiah18:20 Manhi mbote a i futa ni phulu? Oko a kande o diela phala o muenhu uami! Lembalala kuma eme ngemana bhu pholo ié-eie

Jeremiah19:8 Ni mbonge iii nga kà i bhanga kidiuanu
Jeremiah19:9 Nga-nda ku a disa ue o xitu ia anʼâ a mala ni a ahatu

Jeremiah22:3 Jihova uambe kiki: Kumbidila ubatuilu ua mbote ni uiukilu
Jeremiah22:4 Kuma se mu kidi kiene
Jeremiah22:5 O ki mu fula ku bhana o mátui ku maka iá

Jeremiah22:7 Mbata nga-nda ku ku kasela abuikixi
Jeremiah22:8 Anga o ifuẋi ia ndumba ia kà ku bhita mu mbongeʼumu

Jeremiah22:10 O uafu ki mu mu dile

Jeremiah22:19 A-nda ku mu funda ufundilu ua bulu
Jeremiah22:20 Banda ku Libanu
Jeremiah22:21 Muʼaxaxi ka jimbonge jê eme nga kexi ku ku dimuna

Jeremiah22:24 Kala ki ngala ku muenhu eme ngi Jihova
Jeremiah22:25 Hé ngi ku bhakula bhu lukuaku lua ió abhindamena o muenhu ué
Jeremiah22:26 Hé ngi mi takula nʼeie ni mamʼenu uà ku vuala
Jeremiah22:27 Maji oxi ia mu kuinda eneʼoio phala kualukila-mu

Jeremiah23:4 Hé nga kà ji bhana abidi a tokala o ku jinga

Jeremiah23:6 O mu izuua iê Juda ua kà bhuluka

Jeremiah23:9 Muẋima ua ngi budika moxi

Jeremiah23:11 Mbata kixi o polofeta
Jeremiah23:12 Uila kiki njila iâ ia-nda ku a kala muene mukuâ ni ididi ia ẋanana mua vundu: a-nda ku a lundujula anga a di-bhalela muenhomo
Jeremiah23:13 Mu jipolofeta ja Samádia nga di uana-mu lusebu; a kuata ku zambuila kua Bahale ia a luezesa o mundu uami ua Izalaiele o njila.
Jeremiah23:14 Maji mu jipolofeta ja Jeluzaleme nga di uana-mu kisunji kionéne: èhé
Jeremiah23:15 Uila kiki Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta uambe kiki ku jipolofeta: Talesenu o jipolofeta jiji nga-nda ku ji disa lojina

Jeremiah23:17 Thembu joso a kuata kuambela iá a ngi zembe eme
Jeremiah23:18 Abha mukuahi-phe ua nange mu kikutu kia Jihova

Jeremiah23:21 Jipolofeta jiji kʼeme nga ji tumu
Jeremiah23:22 Maji-phe
Jeremiah23:23 Jihova ua kiʼambe
Jeremiah23:24 Jihova uixi: Saiku muthu u suama muene mu masuamenu
Jeremiah23:25 Ngène mu kuívua ima i zuela jipolofeta jojo
Jeremiah23:26 Kia kà suka bhebhi ni kubhita kienhiki ku miẋima ia jipolofeta ji zambula makutu
Jeremiah23:27 A fika kuila mundu uami a u jimbisa dijina diami mukonda dia jinzoji jâ jala mu kuia ni ku di tangela mudiâ

Jeremiah25:1 O kizuelu kieza kua Jelemiia ku mbandu ia kifuxi kioso kia Juda ku muvu ua kauana ua Nzuakí
Jeremiah25:2 Jelemiia
Jeremiah25:3 Tundé mu muvu ua katatu ua Joziia
Jeremiah25:4 Jihova ue ua mi tumikisa abhikʼé oso
Jeremiah25:5 Kia tange
Jeremiah25:6 Ki mu kaiele jinzambi ja ngene phala ku ji bhikila ni ku ji bheza
Jeremiah25:7 Maji né kienhokio-phe
Jeremiah25:8 Kala kiki
Jeremiah25:9 nga-nda ku tuma kutakana miji ioso iala kusuku
Jeremiah25:10 O nzongo ia kutonoka
Jeremiah25:11 O ixi ioso iii ia kà di bhanga kikangalakata i kituka kima ki bheka uoma; anga o miji iii ia kà bhikila sobha ia Babilonha mu makuinhi sambuadi a mivu.
Jeremiah25:12 Kia kà bhita-phe kiki: kuila makuinhi sambuadi a mivu a tenena kiá
Jeremiah25:13 Izuelu iami ioso i nga tange mu kuzoka nʼoxi iii nga kà i bheka ku thandu dia ixi ienhiʼii muene
Jeremiah25:14 Mukonda ene uâ a-nda ku di uanena na-u kuala miji ia vulu ni sobha ja makota; kienhiki-phe nga-nda ku a vutuila kala ima iâ ia bhanga jinga ni kioso kiala ikalakalu ia maku mâ.

Jeremiah25:16 Phala a nue

Jeremiah25:19 ni kua Falaó

Jeremiah25:26 ni ku jisobha joso ja ku Suku

Jeremiah25:28 Kia kà kala-phe kiki: kuila se a di tunu kutambula o nganza bhu lukuaku lué phala kúnua
Jeremiah25:29 Talesenu hanji kuma mu mbonge ia luku dijina diami
Jeremiah25:30 Eie-phe ua kà a zambuila mu upolofeta maka mosoʼama

Jeremiah25:33 Oso a kà a bhakula ku kalunga kuala Jihova kizuuʼokio
Jeremiah25:34 Enu mu tubhila
Jeremiah25:35 Abidi kà ka kala ni dilengelu diâ
Jeremiah25:36 Ívua ku dikola kua tubhila ni ku kumba kua makota ma kilunga! Kuma Jihova ua jikinisa o sabhelela ia kúdia kuâ.

Jeremiah50:13 Mukonda dia njinda ia Jihova
Jeremiah50:14 Anuʼenuʼoso muʼoleka o mufula
Jeremiah50:15 Te-nu nzongo ia kuzoka-nê! Mu kondolokienu! Muene ue ua tolokʼê kiá! Madisesa mê ma lundumuka
Jeremiah50:16 Uoso u kuna ni ió uoso uambata kibholola bhu thembu ia kumuna
Jeremiah50:17 Izalaiele ua soko ni mbudi ia jimbila; a mu kaiesa kuala jihoji; sobha ia Asídia muene ua dianga ku mu dia; o kua suku kunu
Jeremiah50:18 Kala kiki
Jeremiah50:19 Anga Izalaiele ngi mu vutukisa mu kibuta kiê
Jeremiah50:20 Mu izuuʼomo ni mu kithanganʼokio
Jeremiah50:21 Banda mu kuzoka ni Melataimi
Jeremiah50:22 Munumango ua ita uala mu ngongo ni kibuika kia dikota!
Jeremiah50:23 Kiṗhuṗhilu kia ixi ioso a ki batula
Jeremiah50:24 Nga ku tela mabhebhe
Jeremiah50:25 Jihova ua jikula mu dilundilu diê
Jeremiah50:26 Zenu-phe mu lue-nê
Jeremiah50:27 Tungombe tuê tuoso jibhenu-tu ni xibhata
Jeremiah50:28 Dienhidi diene o dízui dia iá a lenge
Jeremiah50:29 Babilonha mu bhongoluedienu oso akua kuasa ni misongo
Jeremiah50:30 Kala kiki minzangala iê ia mala a-nda ku fuila mu jinzunga; o makuenziʼê oso a ita bhu kizuuʼokio
Jeremiah50:31 Kiki-phe
Jeremiah50:32 Kienhiki
Jeremiah50:33 Jihova dia Ifuẋi uambe kiki: Anʼa Izalaiele ni anʼa Juda a a talesa o hadi kumoxi; o ió oso ambata anʼa Izalaiele ku ubhika
Jeremiah50:34 Maji-phe o Mukudi uâ
Jeremiah50:35 O xibhata ia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia akua Kaldeia
Jeremiah50:36 O xibhata ia-nda kuiza kua oso a tanga o makutu
Jeremiah50:37 O xibhata ia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia jikabalu jâ ni ku thandu dia makalu mâ ni ku thandu dia kifuẋi kia athu a di bundu kumoxi mu kaxi kâ; ene-phe a kà di bhanga kala ahetu; xibhata ia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia jimbongo jâ
Jeremiah50:38 Kikukute kia kà laukila ku thandu dia menha mâ
Jeremiah50:39 Kiene kia-ndo bhekesa kuila mu tunga ngó iama ia ixi ia kisekele ni iama ia mukáu mu ikolo; ni i minzoue muene ue mu ia kà tunga; ki mungu dingi mua kà kala athu
Jeremiah50:40 Mukuá ni Nzambi kia jikinisa Sodoma ni Ngomola ni jimbanza ja zukamene na-ju
Jeremiah50:41 Tala
Jeremiah50:42 A ka kuata mifula ni madionga bhu maku; athu a di kake
Jeremiah50:43 Sobha ia Babilonha uevu fuma iâ
Jeremiah50:44 Talesa
Jeremiah50:45 Kala kiki
Jeremiah50:46 Ixi ia teketa ku kinuminu kia Babilonha kioso kia mu tolola; o kudikola kuê a kuʼivu mu kaxi ka miji ioso.
Jeremiah51:1 Jihova uambe kiki: Tala
Jeremiah51:2 Hádia ngi tumikisa akua kubhiata
Jeremiah51:3 O muasi a misongo oleke mufula uê mu kuzoka ni iú uejiia ue kuoleka o mufula
Jeremiah51:4 Hádia a fuila mu ixi ia akua Kaldeia
Jeremiah51:5 Mukonda Izalaiele ni Juda ka ehelela luua kuala Nzambi iâ
Jeremiah51:6 Mu kaxi ka Babilonha lengenu-mu! O muthu ni muthu a bhulule muenhu uê. Ki mu di jikinise anuʼenu mu ku ibha kuêmuène; mukonda o kiki kiene o kithangana kia phonzo ia Jihova; Muene hádia u mu bhana kioso kia mu fuama.
Jeremiah51:7 Babilonha ua di bhangele kala kopho ia ulu bhu lukuaku lua Jihova
Jeremiah51:8 Maji mu kithangana kimoxi
Jeremiah51:9 Kuma Babilonha tuandelele ku mu saka nʼa disanze maji muene ua lémbua kudisanza; muʼambudisienu
Jeremiah51:10 O kulunga kuetu
Jeremiah51:11 Zelesenu misongo
Jeremiah51:12 Olekenu dibandela ku thandu dia imbaka ia Babilonha
Jeremiah51:13 Eie
Jeremiah51:14 Jihova dia Ifuẋi ua di lokela muenemuène
Jeremiah51:15 Kuma muene ua bhange o ixi ni kutena kuê
Jeremiah51:16 Muene kia di ta mutendu mu kuivisa dízui diê
Jeremiah51:17 Bheneʼobho-phe athu a tobha
Jeremiah51:18 Kuma iteka kingoho
Jeremiah51:19 Dikanda dia Jakobo-phe ki kiene ki dia di fu; mukonda Muene muene ua bhange o ima ioso; o Izalaiele uene o muiji ua undundu uê; Jihova dia Ilombo Ita
Jeremiah51:20 Eie eie u kiṗhuṗhilu kiami
Jeremiah51:21 Ni kabalu ni iú ua sambela-ku ngʼa sasujula nʼeie; ni dikalu ni uoso uia mu dikalu ngʼa sasujula nʼeie.
Jeremiah51:22 Ni diiala ni múhetu ngʼa sasujula ni eie; ni munzangala ni ua kuka ngʼa sasujula nʼeie; ni munzangala ua diiala ni kilumba kia muzeletete ngʼa sasujula nʼeie.
Jeremiah51:23 Mubidi ni kilunga kiê nga kà a sasujula ni eie; kidimakaji ni ngombe jê jiiadi nga kà a sasujula nʼeie; jikabhitangu ni atumini nga kà a sasujula nʼeie.
Jeremiah51:24 Anga mua kà ki mona ku mesuʼenu
Jeremiah51:25 Eme bhabhʼú
Jeremiah51:26 Momuʼè ka kà katula-mu ditadi dia thungi mba ditadi dia ku tela madisesa
Jeremiah51:27 Lekenu o mvela mu ngongo
Jeremiah51:28 Zelesenu akua jixi mu kuzoka-nê: ni jisobha ja Mediia ni tubhitangu tuê ni ilamba iê ioso ni ixi ioso ia utuminu uê.
Jeremiah51:29 Kieneʼokio-phe o ixi ia kà teketa
Jeremiah51:30 O mazonda a Babilonha kubhânga a kuʼeha
Jeremiah51:31 Muambatiʼa mikanda ua kà lenga mu ku takana ni muambatiʼa mikanda ua kamukuá
Jeremiah51:32 O matabhu a kuvuua a ma xitila
Jeremiah51:33 Mukonda Jihova dia Ifuẋi
Jeremiah51:34 Nabukodonozolo
Jeremiah51:35 O kusuina kua ngi bhange eme ni xitu iami
Jeremiah51:36 Uila kiki Jihova uambe: Tala
Jeremiah51:37 O Babilonha anga u kituka maxita
Jeremiah51:38 A kà kumuina kumoxi kala minzangala ia jihoji; a kà di zumina muene kala tuana tua jihoji.
Jeremiah51:39 Ki a-nda kuila a salumuka eme ngʼa bhana kúnua kuâ
Jeremiah51:40 Nga-nda ku a kulumuisa kala jimbudi jiia bhu dijibhilu
Jeremiah51:41 Sezake a mu tambula
Jeremiah51:42 O musanza ua kalunga ua bande ku thandu dia Babilonha
Jeremiah51:43 Jimbanza jê joso ja kituka bhoxi-mavu
Jeremiah51:44 Hádia Bele mu Babilonha
Jeremiah51:45 Enu mu mundu uami
Jeremiah51:46 O miẋima ki i mi titile mba mu kala ni uoma ua kibulukutu ki muʼivua mu ngongo; mbata mua-nda kuila kuiza muvu ni kibulukutu kiê
Jeremiah51:47 Uila kiki
Jeremiah51:48 Ni diulu ni ixi
Jeremiah51:49 Kala Babilonha kia bhangesa ku dibhala jithomiue ja Izalaiele
Jeremiah51:50 Enu-phe mua subhuka ku xibhata ndénuʼenu
Jeremiah51:51 Mua kà kiʼamba
Jeremiah51:52 Uila kiki
Jeremiah51:53 Mukonda nê-mbe hanji o Babilonha u banda katé ku diulu mba u kolesa o kitala kia kimbaka kiê
Jeremiah51:54 O nzôngo ia kudikola a ivu mu Babilonha
Jeremiah51:55 mukonda Jihova ua jimisa Babilonha
Jeremiah51:56 Mukonda o mubuikixi ua-nda ku muʼendela
Jeremiah51:57 Nga kà kodiuisa o ilamba iê
Jeremiah51:58 Jihova phe
Jeremiah51:59 O kizuelu kia tumikisa Jelemiia
Jeremiah51:60 Jelemiia hé u soneka mu divulu dibhebhu dioso dia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia Babilonha; maka oso enhá òʼsoneke kiá ku mbandu ia Babilonha.
Jeremiah51:61 Jelemiia hé uambela Selaia
Jeremiah51:62 Hé ua kà zuela
Jeremiah51:63 Anga kia kà kala-phe kiki: Kioso eie ki ua kà zubha kiá kutanga o divulu didi
Jeremiah51:64 hé uà kʼèla uixi: Kienhiki ue kia kà njoboka Babilonha
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiia kioso kia hingi ungana
Jeremiah52:2 Anga u bhanga ioso ia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova
Jeremiah52:3 Mukonda dia kienhiki-phe
Jeremiah52:4 Mu ku bhiẋila-phe mu muvu ua kávua
Jeremiah52:5 Mbonge anga a i konda kienhiki katé mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni umoxi ua utuminu ua sobha Zedekiia.
Jeremiah52:6 Bhu mbeji ia kauana
Jeremiah52:7 Kiene kia jikula dizungu mu mbonge anga makuenze oso a mu lua ita hé a lenga
Jeremiah52:8 Maji o Kifuẋi kia masoladi ma jikaldeu sobha a mu kaiela hé a mu kuatela mu kiphenza kia Jedikó
Jeremiah52:9 O iá anga sobha a mu kuta
Jeremiah52:10 Anʼa Zedekiia anga a a batula mitue kuala sobha ia Babilonha
Jeremiah52:11 Anga u tufula o mesu a Zedekiia
Jeremiah52:12 O bhu mbeji ia katanu
Jeremiah52:13 Anga uoha inzu ia Jihova ni dizemba dia sobha
Jeremiah52:14 O Kifuẋi kioso kia masoladi ma akua Kaldeia
Jeremiah52:15 O jingadiama ja ngadiadia mu Kifuẋi
Jeremiah52:16 Maji ku jingadiama ja ngadiadia mu ixi
Jeremiah52:17 Jikaldeu inga a bula dingi o jiphiladi ja ngondo ja kexile mʼonzo ia Jihova
Jeremiah52:18 Ambata ue ni jímbia
Jeremiah52:19 Kabhitangu ka kilangidilu anga u zangula ue ni jikopho
Jeremiah52:20 Ni jiphiladi jiiadi ni musanza umoxiʼèlele ua kalunga
Jeremiah52:21 O jiphiladi-phe
Jeremiah52:22 Ku mútue ua philadi kua kexile kapitele ka ngondo; o kitala kia kapitele
Jeremiah52:23 Kala mbandu ku kala makuinhiʼ vua a jilomá ni kisamanu
Jeremiah52:24 Kabhitangu ka kilangidilu
Jeremiah52:25 O mu mbonge uambata-mu ue ngolambole imoxi ua kexi mu kutumina athu oso aia ku ita; ni sambuadi dia athu ngambi ja maka a kexile kumoxi ni sobha
Jeremiah52:26 Kioso Nebuzaladane
Jeremiah52:27 O sobha ia Babilonha anga ua a beta u a jibhila bhu Dibalah
Jeremiah52:28 O mundu uambata Nabukodonozolo ku ubhika mu muvu ua kasambuadi uenhú: Midi jitatu ni makuinhi aiadi ni kitatu kia jijudé.
Jeremiah52:29 O mu muvu ua kuinhi ni nake dia utuminu ua Nabukodonozolo
Jeremiah52:30 O mu muvu ua makuinhi aiadi ni kitatu ua utuminu ua Nabukodonozolo
Jeremiah52:31 Anga ki bhita kuila mu muvu ua makuinhi a tatu ni sambuadi ua uhutile ua Nzuakí
Jeremiah52:32 Anga u mu zuelesa ni ujitu uoso
Jeremiah52:33 Anga u mu zula izuatu iê ioso ia kexile na-iu mu kiboiongo; hé uia ni kudia jinga kúdia bhu pholo ia sobha izuua iê ioso ia kexile ku muenhu.
Jeremiah52:34 Anga aia muene ni ku mu bhanga kiambote kuala sobha ia Babilonha
Lamentations1:1 Kuahi ngó
Lamentations1:2 Usuku uoso ua kudila kinhenge; o masoxi mê a kuata kunguluka jinga ngó mu pholo; o muʼaxaxi ka makamba mê ki muala ngó u mu konda dilamba; o makamba mê moso-lolo ma mu bhange ndunge; a biluka muene jinguma jê.
Lamentations1:3 Juda uaii ku ubhika
Lamentations1:4 Ikoka ia Ziione í dila
Lamentations1:5 Jinguma jê ja mu iokola
Lamentations1:6 Kilumba kia Ziione kijingu kioso kia mu-bhu; ilamba iê ioso ia kituka mukuâ ni jisoko ja lémbua kubonga sabhelela; mu kuenda a kala mu kuimajana
Lamentations1:7 Mu makumbi a malamba-mê Jeluzaleme iú lembalala-ke ima iê ia ujitu ni malau
Lamentations1:8 Jeluzaleme uate kituxi kiaiibha kiavulu
Lamentations1:9 Dixidilu diê dia mu kala ku izuatu iê
Lamentations1:10 Jeluzaleme ima iê ioso ia matunda ia kexe na-iu
Lamentations1:11 Mundu uê uoso aia ni kukema mu kusota mbolo ia kúdia; a bhana muene ima iâ iabeta o ku ta kalu mu toloko ia kúdia
Lamentations1:12 Enu kifua ki kia mi kate
Lamentations1:13 Ua tumikisa túbhia mu ifuba iami
Lamentations1:14 O kanga ia itondalu iami
Lamentations1:15 Jihova ua diatela bhoxi o mazonda mami moso ma ita
Lamentations1:16 Mukonda dia ima ienhiʼii
Lamentations1:17 Ziione u kala mu kuzanza o maku mê
Lamentations1:18 Jihova ualunguʼê muene; mbata éme-ku
Lamentations1:19 Makamba mami nga exana kiua
Lamentations1:20 Talesa
Lamentations1:21 Athu ia evua muene kioso ki ngala kukema
Lamentations1:22 Tamanu o kubhuma kuâ kuoso ku di monekena bhu pholo ié eie; nda u a bhange kala ki ua ngi bhange emʼiki
Lamentations2:1 Kuahi ngó o kutema kua Jihova
Lamentations2:2 Mabhata moso-lolo ma Jakobo
Lamentations2:3 Kioso kia uama o njinda iê
Lamentations2:4 Mufula uê ua uoleka kiá ni luma
Lamentations2:5 Jihova ua di bhange kiá kala nguma; Izalaiele ua mu jikinisa; ua jikinisa o mazêmba mê moso; ua mu buikisila o jimbonge; o kilumba kia Juda iú ua mu sokoluela o kudila ni mukondo.
Lamentations2:6 Balaka iê ua mu budila-iu ni usuéia
Lamentations2:7 Jihova kalatódio kê ua ka ẋimbuka
Lamentations2:8 Jihova ua kanene kusengulula o kimbaka kia monʼa kilumba kia Ziione; uatandeleka ngoji
Lamentations2:9 Imabhitu iê ia lundumuka bhoxi
Lamentations2:10 O ikulakaji ia monʼa kilumba Ziione a xikama ni ene mu mavu
Lamentations2:11 Mesu mami ma fefetela ni masoxi
Lamentations2:12 Tuana ebhula a mamʼâ
Lamentations2:13 Ngi ku tela umbangi uahi? Eie kilumba
Lamentations2:14 Misesedi ié
Lamentations2:15 Athu oso a bhita mu kikoka
Lamentations2:16 Nguma jê joso-lolo muene
Lamentations2:17 Jihova ua bhange kioso kia kanene
Lamentations2:18 O muẋima ua Jeluzaleme ua di kola kua Jihova; eie kimbaka kia kilumba
Lamentations2:19 Balumuka
Lamentations2:20 Tala Jihova
Lamentations2:21 Ni ikulakaji ni tuana tua ndenge
Lamentations2:22 Eie ua bhiti ku mbandu joso ni ku kolomona ima ioso i ngi kuatesa uoma
Lamentations3:1 Eme nga di muena jingongo kia tuluka o mbangala ia njinda ié.
Lamentations3:2 Muene ua ngi zangula iú ua ngí batesa mu kitombe
Lamentations3:3 Kutanga o kidi
Lamentations3:4 Ua ngi sekalesa o xitu iami ku mukutu
Lamentations3:5 Ua ngi tungila kixitu
Lamentations3:6 Ua ngi xikika mu ididi mua vundu
Lamentations3:7 Ua ngi kondela ku mbandu joso kala lumbu
Lamentations3:8 Bhu suske dia ku dikola
Lamentations3:9 Jinjila jami ua ji xiti ni matadi mòsonge; jihoka jami muene ua ji bhengeleka.
Lamentations3:10 Uixi kala kitôto mu ku ngi batamena; mukuâ ni hoji ia tela.
Lamentations3:11 Ua ngi tungamesa mu jinjila jami
Lamentations3:12 Uoleka mufula uê
Lamentations3:13 Misongo ia tundu mu kizu kiê
Lamentations3:14 Nga biluka ngi diba dia kasekelelu ka mundu uami; eme ngi mukumbi uâ
Lamentations3:15 Ua ngi kumisa ni ma-kulula
Lamentations3:16 Ua ngi disa mbuelekese ja kisèkele
Lamentations3:17 O muenhu uami ua u katula ku paze
Lamentations3:18 Ngixi-phe: Kuabhu
Lamentations3:19 Lembalala
Lamentations3:20 Ima ienhiʼii muenhu uami hanji uala ku i lembalala
Lamentations3:21 Maji eme-phe
Lamentations3:22 Kuma o jihenda ja Jihova jene-ze ja bhiti-bhu
Lamentations3:23 Imene ioso kuila ngó kúkia
Lamentations3:24 Jihova muene kimanga kiami
Lamentations3:25 Jihova muthu ua mbote phala ió oso a mu nhenganana muene
Lamentations3:26 Kima kiambote o ku kala ni kudielela
Lamentations3:27 Kima kiambote phala muthu o kutala hadi ni kànga ia Jihova mu thembu ia undenge.
Lamentations3:28 Ni ku di xikamena kididi kia ubheka
Lamentations3:29 Adiunde ni muzumbu bhoxi; sumba mu kubhanga kiókio bhu kala kubhanduluka!
Lamentations3:30 A bhane ditama diê kua uoso u mu bha jihuxi; adie muene jindaka
Lamentations3:31 Mbata Jihova kene kuila uẋimbuka
Lamentations3:32 Kuma
Lamentations3:33 Kuma muene o kubeta anʼathu ni ku a bhondeleka
Lamentations3:34 Ku diata-diata bhoxi dia inama o jipelezo joso jaʼxi
Lamentations3:35 kuselula o kulûnga kua muthu bhu pholo ia Suke-ku
Lamentations3:36 kúdia o mangonha kua mukuenu bhu dimanda diê
Lamentations3:37 Mukuahi muene uzuela
Lamentations3:38 Mu kanu dia Ió ua Suka-ku
Lamentations3:39 Muthu ua muenhu u kuatela-hi-phe ku ditata? Inda muthu ni muthu a di tate mukonda dia ituxi iê!
Lamentations3:40 Jinjila jetu tu ji tongolole kiambote
Lamentations3:41 Tu lekienu o miẋima ietu ni maku kua Nzambi ku diulu
Lamentations3:42 Tua tondala
Lamentations3:43 Ua tu vungu ni njinda ié
Lamentations3:44 Ua di jikila mu matuta
Lamentations3:45 Ua tu tula muʼaxaxi ka ifuẋi kala tu makololo
Lamentations3:46 Nguma jetu joso ja bhâne makanu ni ku tu lebhula.
Lamentations3:47 Kua tuiza kingûmba ni diêla
Lamentations3:48 Mesu mami ma lundulula mikunguiji ia menha
Lamentations3:49 Mesuʼami
Lamentations3:50 Ngi kuata kienhiki katé Jihova
Lamentations3:51 Mesuʼami ala ku ngi vunza o muẋima moxi kuma kia ngi kate kiavulu mukonda dia anʼa ilumba a tokala mu mbonge iami.
Lamentations3:52 Nguma jami ja ngi zembe sè kikuma
Lamentations3:53 A takuila muenhu uami mu dikungu
Lamentations3:54 Menha anga a ngi bhita bhu thala ia mútue; ngixi-phe: Eme nga fuʼó!
Lamentations3:55 Jihova
Lamentations3:56 Eie dízui diami ua dʼivu; ku sueke o dítui
Lamentations3:57 Eie kizuua ki nga ku bhingile
Lamentations3:58 Eie Jihova

Lamentations3:61 Malebhu mâ

Lamentations3:63 Tongolola-u Ngana
Lamentations3:64 Jihova
Lamentations3:65 Eie u a bhana o ufuófuo ua muẋima
Lamentations3:66 Zuididika-u
Lamentations4:1 Kuahi ngó o kuhimba kua himbi o ulu! O ulu ua fina ua uabhele kiambote
Lamentations4:2 Anʼa Ziione
Lamentations4:3 Katé ni mabheku ku mukáu a bheteka o thulu
Lamentations4:4 O dimi dia mona bhu maku
Lamentations4:5 Oso a dile jinge o ima ia ximbuka kiambote
Lamentations4:6 Mukonda o kituxi kia monʼa kilumba kia mundu uami
Lamentations4:7 O ilamba iê ki ia kexi
Lamentations4:8 Maji o kiki a xikelela ni ene dikala ndenge; o kia bhita mu nzunga ka ejiia dingi. Kikonda kiâ kia naminina ni kiene ku ifuba
Lamentations4:9 Afu ku xibhata a beta ujitu
Lamentations4:10 Maku ma ahatu
Lamentations4:11 Jihova ua kumbidila o njinda iê
Lamentations4:12 O jisobha mu ngongo
Lamentations4:13 Kima kiki kieza mukonda dia ituxi ia misesedi
Lamentations4:14 A babajala mu kuenda kala ifofo mu jinzunga
Lamentations4:15 Kia kexi hanji
Lamentations4:16 Kuma o njinda ia Jihova
Lamentations4:17 Etu-phe mesu a sukile ni kutalela kuoso ku tu tunda o dikuatekesu
Lamentations4:18 O ki tua zangula jinga díkanda dia kuenda
Lamentations4:19 Akua ku tu bhesa lusolo
Lamentations4:20 O na tudilu dia kubhuima kuetu a tu ûndila-nê kua Jihova
Lamentations4:21 Eie-phe
Lamentations4:22 O kaxtiku ka kikuma kié
Lamentations5:1 Lembalala
Lamentations5:2 Undundu ua muiji uetu uai ku athu engi; jinzo jetu akua makanga a ji tambula.
Lamentations5:3 Tuaxalela tu jihukunhu
Lamentations5:4 Menha etu a kúnua
Lamentations5:5 A tu langata
Lamentations5:6 Tua leka o maku etu ku akua Ijito ni ku akua Asídia
Lamentations5:7 Jitata jetu a zangele
Lamentations5:8 Abhika ene ala ku tu tumina
Lamentations5:9 O kutakana ngó kúdia kuetu kututu
Lamentations5:10 Kikonda kia tu hîmbi-ni-kiene kala forno
Lamentations5:11 Ahatu mu Ziione a a bhange undumbu
Lamentations5:12 Jingana a ji nhenga muene ni maku mâ
Lamentations5:13 Minzangala a i jijidika exi
Lamentations5:14 Adiakimi ka mu xikama dingi bhuʼnangu dia mundu bhu muelu
Lamentations5:15 Kukembela o muenhu kua tu-bhu
Lamentations5:16 Kitundu ku mútue kia tu laúka. Kokolo dietu
Lamentations5:17 Kiene kia tu bhekela kuambuka katé ni muẋima moxi
Lamentations5:18 Hanji kia senguluka o mulundu ua Ziione
Lamentations5:19 Eie-phe
Lamentations5:20 Eie-phe u tu landuka kièbhi
Lamentations5:21 Tu vutule dingi kokué
Lamentations5:22 Phala-hi
Ezekiel1:1 Ku muvu ua makuinhi a tatu
Ezekiel1:2 Mu kizuua kia katanu ku mbeji (mu muvu ua katanu ua uhutile ua sobha Nzuakí).
Ezekiel1:3 O kizuelu kia Jihova anga kiza muene kua Izekiiele
Ezekiel1:4 Mu kutala
Ezekiel1:5 O mu kaxi kê anga mu kala mu kutunda kídifua kia iama i uana; o kídifua kiá kienhiki: a kala ni kídifua kala kia muthu.
Ezekiel1:6 Ene anga a kala ni jipholo jiuana-jiuana
Ezekiel1:7 O inama iâ ia tandelela; o makanda mâ ma inama medi kala ki kala o kidiatelu kia monʼa ngombe
Ezekiel1:8 Anga a kala ni maku a muthu mʼoxi dia mabhabha mâ
Ezekiel1:9 O mabhabha eneʼâ aia ni kudibudika kiiadi kiâ; ka lunguluka kioso kia kala mu kuenda; muthu uendela kuoso kua lungila o pholo iê.
Ezekiel1:10 O pholo jâ ji kala ni kídifua kia pholo ia muthu; ku mbandu ia lukuaku lua kiasu
Ezekiel1:11 O jipholo jâ ni mabhabha mâ
Ezekiel1:12 Kala muthu kuoso kua talela o pholo kuene kuʼaia; kuoso o nzumbi ku ia bhingi o kuia
Ezekiel1:13 O ku tala o iama ienhiʼii
Ezekiel1:14 O iama iia anga iza ni kulenga
Ezekiel1:15 O ki nga kuata kutala o iama iii
Ezekiel1:16 O ku tala o malola
Ezekiel1:17 O kiela kuenda
Ezekiel1:18 O malola eneʼâ kitala kiê kulebha kuahi
Ezekiel1:19 O kioso o iama ki i kuata o kuenda
Ezekiel1:20 O kuoso kua solo o nzumbi kuia
Ezekiel1:21 Ene kiela kuenda
Ezekiel1:22 O ku mítue ia iama anga ku kala kidifua kia muthandu ua diulu
Ezekiel1:23 O bhoxi dia muthandu
Ezekiel1:24 O ene kiʼaia ni kuenda
Ezekiel1:25 Ku thandu dia muthandu ua kexile bhulu dia mítue iâ evu-ku dizui. O ene kioso kiemana
Ezekiel1:26 O kuthandu dia muthandu ua kexile kulu dia mítue iâ
Ezekiel1:27 Eme nga mono kidifua kia kìphembe ni ukalelu kala túbhia mʼoxi diê
Ezekiel1:28 Mukuâ ni ki kala o hongolo ku diulu
Ezekiel2:1 Anga u ngʼambela
Ezekiel2:2 Bhenhobho kioso muene kia mu zuela ni eme
Ezekiel2:3 Muene ua ngʼambela
Ezekiel2:4 O anʼâ a thathamana jipholo
Ezekiel2:5 O ene-phe
Ezekiel2:6 Eie-phe
Ezekiel2:7 Maji eie-phe
Ezekiel2:8 Maji eie-phe
Ezekiel2:9 O ki nga tale
Ezekiel2:10 Anga u di zala bhu pholo iami
Ezekiel3:1 Bhenhobho u ngʼambela
Ezekiel3:2 Kienhókio hé ngi jikula o dikanu diami
Ezekiel3:3 Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel3:4 Anga u ngʼambela
Ezekiel3:5 Mukonda eie ka ku tumikisa ku muiji u zuela mbimbi iengi
Ezekiel3:6 Mba ku ndumba dia miji i dingula
Ezekiel3:7 Maji o dibhata dia Izalaiele
Ezekiel3:8 Talaphe
Ezekiel3:9 O dibhomo dié nga di bhange kala utadi ua diiamande mu kukola
Ezekiel3:10 Iú ua ngʼambela dingi
Ezekiel3:11 Zangula-phe
Ezekiel3:12 Anga o Nzumbi ia Nzambi u ngi balumuna
Ezekiel3:13 Anga ngʼivua o kinuminu kia mabhabha a iama a muia ni ku di-beta-beta kumoxi ni kinuminu kia malola ku pholo diâ
Ezekiel3:14 Bhenhobho
Ezekiel3:15 Anga ngiza ku iá a a kutu
Ezekiel3:16 Anga ki bhita kuila
Ezekiel3:17 Eié monʼa muthu: Eme nga ku bhana u kale u mulangidi ua dibhata dia Izalaiele; eie uenda ni kuívua o maka a tunda mu dikanu diami
Ezekiel3:18 Kioso eme ki ngiia o muthu ua iibha
Ezekiel3:19 Maji
Ezekiel3:20 Kiene ue kimoxi ni muthu ua iuka ki eha o kuiuka kuê anga u di-tela muengi
Ezekiel3:21 Maji
Ezekiel3:22 O lukuaku lua Ngana
Ezekiel3:23 Anga ngi balumuka
Ezekiel3:24 Bhenhobho
Ezekiel3:25 Mukonda
Ezekiel3:26 Eme ue nga-nda kubhangesa kuila o dimi dié di naminina mu kanu
Ezekiel3:27 Maji kioso ki nga-nda kuila nga zuela nʼeie
Ezekiel4:1 Eie-phe
Ezekiel4:2 O iene ta na-iu mu mukonda u i tungile kimbaka
Ezekiel4:3 Eie-phe uzangula kienga kia felu
Ezekiel4:4 Uzeka ue kimbanji ku mbandu ia lukuaku lué lua kiasu
Ezekiel4:5 Mukonda eme nga ku xindila o mivu ia kuiibha kuâ kia soko o dialuilu dia izuua
Ezekiel4:6 O ki ua-nda kuila ua zubha o kutenesa izuua iii
Ezekiel4:7 O pholo ié i talela jinga koko kua Jeluzaleme a mu kondo
Ezekiel4:8 Eie-phe nga-nda ku ku kuta ni mikolo
Ezekiel4:9 Eie-phe u zangula o tiliku
Ezekiel4:10 O kúdia kué ku u dia
Ezekiel4:11 O menha mé a kúnua ua kà a zonga ue
Ezekiel4:12 O ioso i u dia ila kala mbolo ja sevada
Ezekiel4:13 Jihova anga uila
Ezekiel4:14 Eme bhenhobho
Ezekiel4:15 Anga u ngʼambela
Ezekiel4:16 Bhenhobho iú ua ngi tangela
Ezekiel4:17 Phala o kúdia ni kúnua ku a kambe
Ezekiel5:1 Eie-phe
Ezekiel5:2 Mbandu ia katatu
Ezekiel5:3 U katula-ku ue tuma tuofele u tu kuta ku mizumbu ia kizuatu kié.
Ezekiel5:4 O ku tuenhutu
Ezekiel5:5 O Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: Iú kiá muene Jeluzaleme! Nga mu te mu kaxi ka miji ni ka jixi ja mu kala mu jimbandu.
Ezekiel5:6 Maji muene-phe o mabatuilu mami ua ma lungulula mu ufusa
Ezekiel5:7 Kala kiki
Ezekiel5:8 Mukonda-phe dia kiki
Ezekiel5:9 Momuʼé nga-nda kubhanga-mu kima kiluua ngi ki bhanga
Ezekiel5:10 Kala kiki
Ezekiel5:11 Uala kiki
Ezekiel5:12 Mbandu ié ia katatu ia-nda kúfua ku dibhebhu
Ezekiel5:13 O njinda iami hé i di kumbidila momuʼé kienhiki
Ezekiel5:14 Hé ngi ku tula mu mukondo; ua sebuluka mu kaxi ka miji ia ku kala mu jimbandu jé; ene oso a bhita a ki mona mesu.
Ezekiel5:15 O kusebuluka kué ni fuma iaiibha i ua-nda kukala na-iu
Ezekiel5:16 Kioso eme ki nga-nda ku a asa o misongo ia nzala i kuatesa uôma
Ezekiel5:17 Anga ku thandu dienu ngi tumikisa-ku nzala
Ezekiel6:1 Kizuelu kia Jihova anga ki tulukila kokuʼami
Ezekiel6:2 Eie monʼa muthu
Ezekiel6:3 Ua kà tanga kiki: Enu mu milundu ia Izalaiele
Ezekiel6:4 O Jikalatódio jenu joso ja kà xala bhoxi-mavu
Ezekiel6:5 Anga o imbi ia anʼa Izalaiele nga kà i zeleka bhu mesuʼa iteka iâ bhene; o ifuba ienu hé ngi i muangena mu jimbandu ja jikalatódio jenu ue.
Ezekiel6:6 Mu ididi ienu ioso ia kutunga
Ezekiel6:7 O ió oso a a tubujula
Ezekiel6:8 Maji-phe nga-ndu xisa-ku masubhu
Ezekiel6:9 Kienhokio-phe
Ezekiel6:10 Ene nda à kʼijiia ku hádia
Ezekiel6:11 O Jihova
Ezekiel6:12 Uoso uala dikanga
Ezekiel6:13 Kieneʼokio
Ezekiel6:14 Nganda kusunununa o lukuaku luami ku thandu diâ mu kuzoka-nâ
Ezekiel7:1 Kieneʼokio o kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kokuami
Ezekiel7:2 Eie-phe
Ezekiel7:3 Kindala-phe o dizubhilu dí-diza kokué
Ezekiel7:4 O diesu diami ki dia kà ku kondeka
Ezekiel7:5 Kienhiki ki ambe Jihova Nzambi
Ezekiel7:6 O dizubhilu dí-diza
Ezekiel7:7 Kuêla kué kua bhixila
Ezekiel7:8 Ni lusolo luoso nga-ndu lundulula o njinda iami ku thnadu dié kindala
Ezekiel7:9 O diesu diami ki dia kà ku kondeka
Ezekiel7:10 Talenu
Ezekiel7:11 O kusuina kua kulu kiá ku kuate itulu
Ezekiel7:12 Kithangana ki kiza
Ezekiel7:13 Mbata o uoso u sumbisa
Ezekiel7:14 O koloneta a i xiki kiá
Ezekiel7:15 Ku kanga kuala xibhata
Ezekiel7:16 Kua kà subhuka ngó oso a kà subhuka momuʼâ
Ezekiel7:17 O maku moso ma kà botomoka
Ezekiel7:18 Anga a ka di-kuta jisaku
Ezekiel7:19 O phalata iâ a kà i takuila ngó mu jinzunga
Ezekiel7:20 O matunda ma makembu mâ
Ezekiel7:21 O matunda enʼiá a kà a bhakula bhu maku ma athu engi nʼa kale mbole iâ
Ezekiel7:22 Hé ngʼa a suekela o pholo iami
Ezekiel7:23 Eie bhanga lubhambu
Ezekiel7:24 Anga ngʼixana athu a beta kota mu kuiibha
Ezekiel7:25 O kibuika kí kiza; ene a kà sota o kutululuka
Ezekiel7:26 Kua kʼèza uíndua mu uíndua
Ezekiel7:27 Sobha ua kà di-kuata mukondo
Ezekiel8:1 Anga ki bhita kuila
Ezekiel8:2 O ki nga tale
Ezekiel8:3 Anga u sunununa bheneʼobho kima kiedi kala lukuaku
Ezekiel8:4 O ki ngi tala
Ezekiel8:5 Anga u ngʼambela
Ezekiel8:6 Anga u ngʼambela
Ezekiel8:7 Anga u ngi bheka bhu dibhitu dia kimbaka: Bheneʼobho nga tale
Ezekiel8:8 Uixi: Ndoko-phe
Ezekiel8:9 Bheneʼobho
Ezekiel8:10 Anga ngi bokona. O ki ngʼedi suí
Ezekiel8:11 Nga mono ue ni makuinhi sambuadi a muthu
Ezekiel8:12 Kieneʼokio anga u ngʼambela
Ezekiel8:13 Anga u ngʼambela dingi
Ezekiel8:14 Hé u ngi bheka bhu muelu ua dibhitu dia inzu ia Ngana
Ezekiel8:15 Uixi: Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel8:16 Anga u ngi bheka dingi mu kimbaka kia moxi kia inzu ia Ngana
Ezekiel8:17 Bhenhobho u ngʼambela
Ezekiel8:18 Kala kiki
Ezekiel9:1 Bhenbhobho hé u ngi kolela mu mátui ni dízui dia suina
Ezekiel9:2 Ngi tala
Ezekiel9:3 O kubenha kua Nzambi ia Izalaiele
Ezekiel9:4 Ngana hé u mu ambela
Ezekiel9:5 Akuá hé u ambela
Ezekiel9:6 A kuka jibhenu
Ezekiel9:7 Uixi: Inzu kasanesenu-iu muizalese o malumbu mê ni imbi
Ezekiel9:8 Anga ki bhita-phe
Ezekiel9:9 Muene-phe uixi: O kuiibha kua dibhata dia Izalaiele ni dibhata dia Juda kua vulu kinene
Ezekiel9:10 Kala kiki
Ezekiel9:11 Bhenhobho ngi mona muthu ua zuata o linhu
Ezekiel10:1 Kienhokio-phe ki nga tale nga mono kuila ku diulu dia kexile ku thandu dia mítue ia jixelube kua tukuluka ku thandu diâ
Ezekiel10:2 Iu ua zuelesa o muthu ua zuata o linhu
Ezekiel10:3 Bhenhobho jixelube ja kexilile ku mbandu ia ʼkuaku lua kúdia lua inzu
Ezekiel10:4 Kienhokio o unéne ua Jihova anga u tunda ku thandu dia xelubini iala bhu muelu ua kubokuena mʼonzo; o mʼonzo anga muizala dituta
Ezekiel10:5 O kinuminu kia mabhabha a jixelubini
Ezekiel10:6 Kioso-phe muene kia ambela o diiala ua zuata linhu
Ezekiel10:7 Bhenhobho xelubini imoxi u sunununa lukuaku luê muʼaxaxe ka jixelubini katé ku túbhia tua kexile mu kaxi ka jixelubini; hé u tu zangula
Ezekiel10:8 Ku jixelubini hé ku tukuluka kídifua kia lukuaku lua muthu moxiʼa mabhabha mâ.
Ezekiel10:9 Kienhokio-phe nga tale
Ezekiel10:10 Mu kuibhula o kidifua kiê
Ezekiel10:11 Ene ki aia ni kuenda
Ezekiel10:12 O mukutu uâ uene uoso
Ezekiel10:13 O malola nga evu a exana muene
Ezekiel10:14 Kala xelubini ia kexile ni pholo jiuana: pholo ia dianga ia kexile pholo ia xelubini; o pholo ia kaiadi
Ezekiel10:15 O jixelubini anga a zangumuka bhulu; iii iene o iama i nga muene bhu mbanduʼa ngiji ia Kebale.
Ezekiel10:16 O jixelubini ki jiia ni kuenda
Ezekiel10:17 Ene kioso ki emana
Ezekiel10:18 Bheneʼobho o unéne ua Jihova anga u tunda bhu muelu ua inzu iê
Ezekiel10:19 Jixelubini bhenhobho anga jʼoleka mabhabha mâ
Ezekiel10:20 Ene-â
Ezekiel10:21 Ene oso a kala ni pholo jiuana ni mabhabha auana kala muthu
Ezekiel10:22 O kidifua kia pholo jâ
Ezekiel11:1 Bheneʼobho Nzumbi ua ngi fundumuna iú ua ngi bheka bhu dibhitu dia mbandu ia thunda ia inzu ia Jihova
Ezekiel11:2 Anga u ngʼambela uixi; Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel11:3 Ene akua kuila exi: O kithangana kia kutunga o jinzu
Ezekiel11:4 Uila kiki: Zambuila-nâ ima ia ku a bilukila; zambula
Ezekiel11:5 O Nzumbi phe ia Jihova anga i tula kokuʼami
Ezekiel11:6 Imbi ienu mua i vudisa mu mbanzʼumu
Ezekiel11:7 Kala kiki-phe Ngana dia Jihova uambe
Ezekiel11:8 Muala ni uoma ua xibhata
Ezekiel11:9 Anga muʼaxaxe-kê nga kà mi tundisa-mu
Ezekiel11:10 Mua kà tenuka ku xibhata; Ku maẋokololo a Izalaiele kuene ku nga kà mi fundisila; phala muʼa kʼèjiie kuila eme ngi Ngana.
Ezekiel11:11 O mbanza iii ki ia-nda kuẋikina ku mi kala ímbia
Ezekiel11:12 Hé mua kà kʼijiia kuila eme ngi Ngana
Ezekiel11:13 Anga ki bhita kuila kioso ki nga mu zambuila mu uanji ua upolofeta
Ezekiel11:14 Bhenheʼobho o kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kokuʼami
Ezekiel11:15 Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel11:16 Uila kiki
Ezekiel11:17 Kala kiki
Ezekiel11:18 Anga a kʼèza mueneʼomo
Ezekiel11:19 Hé nga kà a bhana muẋima uâ umoxi
Ezekiel11:20 Mbhebhu aie ni kuenda mu jingonge jami
Ezekiel11:21 Maji o ió ala ni muẋima ua kuenda kala kia xindi o muẋima ua ima iâ iaiibha
Ezekiel11:22 Kienhókio o jixelubini ji leka o mabhabha mâ
Ezekiel11:23 O unéne ua Jihova anga u zangumuka tundé mu kaxi ka mbonge
Ezekiel11:24 Kia zubha kubhita imʼiii
Ezekiel11:25 O ala ku ubhika hé ngʼa tangela ima ioso ia ngi londekesele Ngana.
Ezekiel12:1 Anga kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kokuami
Ezekiel12:2 Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel12:3 Eie-phe tata
Ezekiel12:4 U katuila imbamba ié bhu kanga mu muanha uatu
Ezekiel12:5 U iudika ndungulu mu mutôto hé u katuila-bhu o imbamba nʼu i bheka ku kanga ene ia a tala.
Ezekiel12:6 Ua kà i ambata bhu isuxi
Ezekiel12:7 Eme nga bhange kienhiki
Ezekiel12:8 O ki kuákie
Ezekiel12:9 Monʼa diiala o dibhata diodio
Ezekiel12:10 Tangela-u
Ezekiel12:11 Amba-kiu
Ezekiel12:12 O muenexi uala muʼaxaxi-kâ uà kʼambata ue o imbamba iê bhu isuxi mu usuku
Ezekiel12:13 O uanda uami ue nga kà u tandeleka ku thandu diê hé a mu kuata mu dibhebhe diami; anga nga kà mu bheka ku Babilonha
Ezekiel12:14 O ió oso a kà kala mu mbandu jê phala ku mu banda
Ezekiel12:15 Kioso ki ngʼa muangenesena mu miji ni ku a uanena mu jixi
Ezekiel12:16 Maji momuʼâ nga-nda kuxamu
Ezekiel12:17 Kienhokio-phe o kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kokuami
Ezekiel12:18 Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel12:19 Akuaʼxi ua kà ambela
Ezekiel12:20 O jimbanza ja tungile
Ezekiel12:21 O kizuelu kia Jihova anga kʼiza dingi kokuami
Ezekiel12:22 Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel12:23 Eie-phe ambela-u kiki: O Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: O iseièngele iii nga-nda ku i bhuisa-ku
Ezekiel12:24 Mukonda ki kua-nda kukala dingi kisukila kia ngoho

Ezekiel13:1 Anga o kizuelu kia Jihova kʼiza dingi kokuʼami
Ezekiel13:2 Monʼa iala
Ezekiel13:3 O Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: Kokolo dia misesedi ia maioua
Ezekiel13:4 Eie Izalaiele
Ezekiel13:5 Mu misula ki mu bande-mu
Ezekiel13:6 Ala mu kumona kingoho ni kuzambula makutu
Ezekiel13:7 Enu ki mua mu mona isukila ia kingoho
Ezekiel13:8 Kala kiki
Ezekiel13:9 O lukuaku luami lua-nda kubilukila o misesedi a mona kingoho ni kuzambula makutu; o mu kionge kia mundu uami ene ka kà kala-mu
Ezekiel13:10 Mukonda-phe
Ezekiel13:11 Tangela ió a mu kunga-ku o hàla ki iôlunge
Ezekiel13:12 Tala-ze
Ezekiel13:13 Kala kiki
Ezekiel13:14 Anga o kipena ki mua kunga o hàla ia kambe kulungisa ngi ki bula
Ezekiel13:15 Kienhiki ki nga-nda kua kâ kumbidila o njinda iami ku kipena kiokio ni kua iá oso a ki kunga o hàla ki iòlunge; anga nga kà miʼambela
Ezekiel13:16 O jipolofeta ja Izalaiele
Ezekiel13:17 Eie-phe
Ezekiel13:18 Phala u a tangele
Ezekiel13:19 Mu kaxi ka athuʼami
Ezekiel13:20 Kala kiki
Ezekiel13:21 Hé o matoka menu nga kà a tandula
Ezekiel13:22 Mbata enu o muẋima ua muthu ua iuka mua u bhekesa dilamba ni mangonha menu
Ezekiel13:23 kala kiki
Ezekiel14:1 Anga ku ngi sanga athu a tokala ku ikulakaji ia Izalaiele hé a xikama bhu pholo iami.
Ezekiel14:2 Bhenhobho o kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kokuʼami
Ezekiel14:3 Monʼa iala
Ezekiel14:4 Kala kiki
Ezekiel14:5 Phala ni ngi tena o kukuatela dibhata dia Izalaiele mu muẋima uê
Ezekiel14:6 Kala kiki
Ezekiel14:7 Kuma muthu uoso-uoso ua tokala mu dibhata dia Izalaiele mba ku jinzuángiza ala kunhunganena mua Izalaiele
Ezekiel14:8 O pholo iami nga kà i ta mu kulungulukila o muthu muenhó
Ezekiel14:9 Se o musesedi a mu tobhesa
Ezekiel14:10 O kikuma kiâ a kà kiʼambata ene ku thandu diâ; o kikala o kikuma kia iu uibhula
Ezekiel14:11 Phala o dibhata dia Izalaiele ki di ngʼixe dingi eme
Ezekiel14:12 Kizuelu kia Jihova kieza dingi kokuami
Ezekiel14:13 Monʼa muthu
Ezekiel14:14 Né-mbe hanji mu kaxi kâ mu kala kitatu kiki: Noué
Ezekiel14:15 Se mu ixi eme ngi bhitisa-mu iama i bhanga usuéia
Ezekiel14:16 né-mbe hanji o mala atatu iá a kala muʼaxaxe ka ixiʼoio
Ezekiel14:17 Mba
Ezekiel14:18 né-mbe hanji o mala kitatu ió a kexe muenhomo
Ezekiel14:19 Mba-phe sʼeme ngi tumikisa kipheku ku ixi ieneʼoio o njinda iami anga ngi i lunduluila ku thandu diê ni manhinga phala kuvuza-mu o athu ni iama
Ezekiel14:20 né-mbe kiá Noué
Ezekiel14:21 Mukonda Jihova uambe kiki: Kuambe dingi se Jeluzaleme eme ngi mu tumikisa o afundixʼami aiibha ió kiuana
Ezekiel14:22 Maji
Ezekiel14:23 Anga malamba oso a kà mʼibhua
Ezekiel15:1 Anga o kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kokuami
Ezekiel15:2 Monʼa diiala
Ezekiel15:3 Manhi a katula-ku muẋi ua kubhanga kima kioso-kioso? Inga a katula-ku phapha ioso-ioso ia kunhenga ingolongondo?
Ezekiel15:4 Tala-ze
Ezekiel15:5 Abha
Ezekiel15:6 Kala kiki
Ezekiel15:7 Hé nga kà lungisa o pholo iami kokuâ mu ku zoka-nâ; ene a-nda kua kà fomoka mu túbhia
Ezekiel15:8 O ixi anga nga kà i kitula jingùndu
Ezekiel16:1 Anga o kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kokuami
Ezekiel16:2 Monʼa diiala
Ezekiel16:3 zuela
Ezekiel16:4 Eie-phe
Ezekiel16:5 Ki bhuala diesu dioso-dioso dia ku kuatelele henda
Ezekiel16:6 Eme-phe
Ezekiel16:7 Eme nga ku bhangesa ku di vualulula kala luthangu lua ubhe ku muxitu
Ezekiel16:8 Eme-phe
Ezekiel16:9 Eme nga ku sukula ni menha
Ezekiel16:10 Eme nga ku zuika ni ima ia matunda
Ezekiel16:11 Nga ku kembesa ni makembu ma soko
Ezekiel16:12 Bhu dibhomo nga ku te phelu ia nzaji
Ezekiel16:13 Kienhiki
Ezekiel16:14 O fuma ié iaii ku miji ioso
Ezekiel16:15 Maji eie ua dielela ngó o kuuabha kué
Ezekiel16:16 Eie ua katula jinga muene ku izuatu ié
Ezekiel16:17 Eie ua zangula o makembu mé ma ku di-zakela
Ezekiel16:18 Eie ua zangula O izuatu ié ia kubordala
Ezekiel16:19 Ni mbolo iami
Ezekiel16:20 Sumbala ua bhange iii
Ezekiel16:21 Eie ua jibha anʼami
Ezekiel16:22 O mu maufusa é oso
Ezekiel16:23 ʼKí kiedi-phe
Ezekiel16:24 Ua tungu inzu ia undumbu
Ezekiel16:25 Mu thungi joso ja jinjila ua tunga jinga-mu ididi ia dileka
Ezekiel16:26 Ua bhange ue undumbu ni anʼa akua Ijitu
Ezekiel16:27 Kala kiki
Ezekiel16:28 Ua bhange ue undumbu ni ana a akua Asídia
Ezekiel16:29 Inda o jiphanda jé ua ji sokolola dingi mʼoxi ia Kanana katé ni mu Kaldeia
Ezekiel16:30 Jihova Nzambi phe
Ezekiel16:31 O ki ua tunga jinga o jinzu jé
Ezekiel16:32 Uediʼé ngó kala u muhetu ua mukua jiphanda
Ezekiel16:33 Idianzunga ioso ene mu ku a futa
Ezekiel16:34 Kala kiki
Ezekiel16:35 Kala kiki
Ezekiel16:36 Jihova Nzambi
Ezekiel16:37 Tala
Ezekiel16:38 Anga ngi ku fundisa muene kala kiene kufundisa ahetu a ta jiphanda
Ezekiel16:39 Anga ngi ku bhakula bhu maku mâ
Ezekiel16:40 Kienhókio a kà bandesa kibuka ki ku kitukila
Ezekiel16:41 O jinzu jé a kà ji oha mu túbhia
Ezekiel16:42 Kienhiki
Ezekiel16:43 Mbata-phe eie kua xinganeka o izuua ia unzangala ué
Ezekiel16:44 Talesa-ze
Ezekiel16:45 Eie-phe
Ezekiel16:46 O kota dié dia muhetu
Ezekiel16:47 Sumbala kiene
Ezekiel16:48 Jihova uambe-phe kiki: Nga loka muene
Ezekiel16:49 Tala-ze o kituxi kia Sodoma dia phangiʼé: Izala
Ezekiel16:50 A di zangeleka ia a bhange ufusa bhu pholo iami; kala kiki
Ezekiel16:51 O phangiʼé Samádia ue
Ezekiel16:52 Eie u tala hadi ni sonhi jé
Ezekiel16:53 Eme-phe o jihutile jâ nga-nda ku ji vutûla; o jihutile ja Sodoma ni ja anʼê a ahétu
Ezekiel16:54 phala o lebhu dié uie ni kuenda na-diu
Ezekiel16:55 Kioso jiphange jé
Ezekiel16:56 Eie-phe
Ezekiel16:57 Kiki ua dibhange kala muene; ua kituka u kima kia malebhu ku anʼa ahetu a tokala ku Sídia
Ezekiel16:58 Eie o uama ué ni maufusa mé
Ezekiel16:59 Mukonda o Jihova Nzambi uambe
Ezekiel16:60 Maji-phe né kienhókio
Ezekiel16:61 Bhenhobho o jinjila jé uanda kua kà ji lembalala
Ezekiel16:62 Mukonda eme nga-nda kua kà ta o kikutu kiami ni eie
Ezekiel16:63 mbé uie ni ku ki lembala
Ezekiel17:1 Anga kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kokuami
Ezekiel17:2 Monʼa diiala
Ezekiel17:3 Uixi: Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: Kiholokoko kimoxi
Ezekiel17:4 Anga ki katula muene o sungu ia beta kulebha ia jithangu jê
Ezekiel17:5 Ua zangula ue ku mbutu iaʼxi
Ezekiel17:6 Iiʼia sabhuka
Ezekiel17:7 Anga ku kala dingi kiholokoko kia mukuá
Ezekiel17:8 Muvide iú a u kunine mu mavuʼa mbote
Ezekiel17:9 Zuela-kiu kuila: Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: Mbé muvide uenhó u kala ni kuzediua? Muene ka-nda kua kà u vuza o jindanji
Ezekiel17:10 Manhi se uòphaphe
Ezekiel17:11 Kienhokio-phe o kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kokuaʼmi kuila:
Ezekiel17:12 Uila kiki

Ezekiel17:14 Phala o utuminu uenhó u toloke
Ezekiel17:15 Maji muene-phe ua mu bhukumukinʼé
Ezekiel17:16 Jihova Nzambi ua tange
Ezekiel17:17 O Falaó
Ezekiel17:18 Mbata o mulôko ua di tunu-u
Ezekiel17:19 Kala kiki

Ezekiel17:21 O jingômbo jê joso ni masoladi ê oso
Ezekiel17:22 O Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: Eme ue nga-nda kukatula ku dizoko-zoko dia musédulu anga ngi u phapha; ku ndômbo-ndômbo iê ia tundu akuâ kuene ku nga-nda kubatula o kindemvuna hé nga kà ki phapha ku mulundu ua dileka uedi kunzangalá.

Ezekiel18:1 Anga o kizuelu kia Jihova kʼiza kokuami

Ezekiel18:4 Talesenu
Ezekiel18:5 Kuma o muthu se ua iuka
Ezekiel18:6 u fula kudila jisata ja iteka ku milundu
Ezekiel18:7 ka xikina kubhondeleka muthu uoso-uoso
Ezekiel18:8 O kitadi kiê ka xikina ku ki bhana ni kuvualesa
Ezekiel18:9 u kuata kuenda kiambote mu jingonge jami ni kualuka mabatuilu mami
Ezekiel18:10 O muene-phe kia vuala mona uala muii
Ezekiel18:11 hé u tokoka o kualuka o ijila ioso ioio
Ezekiel18:12 ni kubhondeleka o phulungu ua tate
Ezekiel18:13 Kitadi u ki sobhesa ni kuvualesa
Ezekiel18:14 Kia kà kala-phe
Ezekiel18:15 u fula kudila o jisata ja mahamba ku milundu
Ezekiel18:16 ka xikina kubhondeleka muthu

Ezekiel18:18 O tatʼâ kuma ua bhange ungulungumba
Ezekiel18:19 Maji enu muexi: Mukonda diahi o mona kʼambata o ikuma ia tatʼâ? Mukonda o mona ua bhange iaiuka

Ezekiel18:21 Maji o mukua phulu-phe
Ezekiel18:22 O ikuma iê iosololo ia bhanga jinga ka kà i xinganeka dingi ni ku mu bhanga phulu; mukonda dia kuiuka kua bhangiʼuku

Ezekiel22:9 O iiala ia hame ue ia kexile momué
Ezekiel22:10 Tata a i zudila momué (Katé o jisonhi jê kia ji mono ku tuana); o muhatu uala mu ijila a mu tela jiphanda momué.
Ezekiel22:11 Iú ua bhange ufusa ni muhatuʼa mukuá momué; o ió ua kasanesa kiá muene mukaji a monʼê; o mukuá dingi ua te jiphanda

Ezekiel25:16 kala kiki
Ezekiel25:17 Hé nga kà a vutuila phonzo ia dikota
Ezekiel26:1 Anga ki bhita ku muvu ua kakuinhi ni umoxi
Ezekiel26:2 Monʼa diiala
Ezekiel26:3 Kala kiki
Ezekiel26:4 Miji ienhoio ia-nda kua kà bula o imbaka ia Tilu
Ezekiel26:5 Ki kala mu kaxi ka musanza ua kalunga
Ezekiel26:6 O anʼê ahatu
Ezekiel26:7 Mukonda
Ezekiel26:8 O anʼê a ahatu
Ezekiel26:9 O mu kuzoka nʼeie
Ezekiel26:10 O mukonda dia tubalu tuâ o kuvula
Ezekiel26:11 Muene ua kà diota mu jinzunga jé joso ni ikoto ia tubalu tuê; o mundu ué muene ua kà u jibha ni xibhata
Ezekiel26:12 Ene hé a kà nhana o umonhi ué
Ezekiel26:13 Hé nga kà zubhaku o kilungutu kia mimbu ié
Ezekiel26:14 Eie-muène hé ngi ku kitula u ditadi dia kabhuetete; hé ua kà di bhanga u dianekenu dia manda ma atona
Ezekiel26:15 O Jihova Nzambi ua tange kiki
Ezekiel26:16 Ilamba ioso ku musanza a kà tuluka ku iandu iâ
Ezekiel26:17 Hé a kà ta mbùndu ia ku ku dila
Ezekiel26:18 O kiki-phe
Ezekiel26:19 Mukonda o Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki
Ezekiel26:20 kuabhu-phe kienhókio nga-nda kuà ku tuluila kiá kumoxi ni iá a tuluka mu kina
Ezekiel26:21 Eie-phe nga-nda kuà ku bhanga kima ki di uanesa kinéne
Ezekiel27:1 Anga o kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kokuami
Ezekiel27:2 Eie-phe monʼa diiala
Ezekiel27:3 U tangele Tilu
Ezekiel27:4 O mu kaxi ka musanza ua kalunga muene muala o mbambe jé; o ió oso a ku tungu
Ezekiel27:5 Mukuâ ni naviiu
Ezekiel27:6 O mikaluvádiu ia Basane iene ia bhange na-iu o ihandu phala eie; o dianda dia akua Sídia
Ezekiel27:7 Linhu ia fina ia Ijitu
Ezekiel27:8 O ia a tunga mu Sidone ni mu Alavade ene a kexile o atabhuidiʼé; o jinjimu jé
Ezekiel27:9 O adiakime mu Jebale kumoxi ni jinjimu jâ
Ezekiel27:10 O Jipelesa
Ezekiel27:11 O ana a Alavade ni kifuẋi kié kia masoladi
Ezekiel27:12 Talxixi ua-ta jinga uenji nʼeie
Ezekiel27:13 Ni Javane ni Tubale ni Meseke
Ezekiel27:14 O ku mabhata ma Tongalama a bheka jinga bhu itanda ié o jikabalu ni iá akua kusambela ku jikabalu
Ezekiel27:15 O anʼa Dedane ene a kexile asumbixi é; ikolo ia vulu ia di bhangele sumbixilu dia lukauku lué; o mazu a nzamba ni miẋi ia kaxiki a ku bhana jinga na-iu mu kingoho ku maujitu.
Ezekiel27:16 O Sídia ua-ta jinga o uenji nʼeie
Ezekiel27:17 Ni Juda ni ixi ia Izalaiele
Ezekiel27:18 Damasku ue ua-ta jinga uenji nʼeie
Ezekiel27:19 O Dane ue
Ezekiel27:20 O Dedane ua-ta jinga uenji nʼeie
Ezekiel27:21 O Alábia ni ilamba ioso ia Kedale
Ezekiel27:22 O jingenji ja Seba ni Lahama
Ezekiel27:23 Ni Halane
Ezekiel27:24 O iá kiá a kexile ene afuni é mu ima ioso ia kufuna
Ezekiel27:25 O jinaviiu ja Talxixi
Ezekiel27:26 Athabhuidiʼé a ku bheka mua zongo o menha; o kitembue kia thunda kia kubhondelekela muʼaxaxi ka musanza.
Ezekiel27:27 O jimbongo jé
Ezekiel27:28 O ku kinuminu kia mutendu ua atabhuidiʼé oxi ja ku kala mu jimbandu jê ja kà teketa.
Ezekiel27:29 O ió a tena kukuata o kihandu
Ezekiel27:30 Hé o dízui diâ a kà dʼivua muene
Ezekiel27:31 Hé a kà di ta mabhaia mu mítue mukonda dié-eie
Ezekiel27:32 Mu lamba diâ
Ezekiel27:33 Kioso o mauenji mé kia kexile ku ma tuta ku musanza ua kalunga
Ezekiel27:34 Bhu thembu ia ku bhondeleka ku misanza ia kalunga
Ezekiel27:35 Ene oso a tunga mu ikolo a kakuka mukonda dié-eie; o jisobha jâ a teketa kinéne
Ezekiel27:36 O jingenji mu kifuẋi aku tela jisupiia; eie ua di bhange u kima ki kakukisa; ki mungu dingi u kala-ku katé ku hádia ni hádia.
Ezekiel28:1 O Kizuelu kia Jihova anga kiza kokuami
Ezekiel28:2 Eie monʼa iala
Ezekiel28:3 tala-phe
Ezekiel28:4 O mu kuijiia kuè ni kutongoloka kué
Ezekiel28:5 O mu kuijiia kué
Ezekiel28:6 Uila kiki
Ezekiel28:7 tala-ze
Ezekiel28:8 Ene a kà ku bhangesa kutuluka mu kina
Ezekiel28:9 Bhu mesuʼa iú uoso ua mu ku jibha
Ezekiel28:10 Ua kà fua kalunga ka akua mabôlo
Ezekiel28:11 O kizuelu kia Jihova kieza dingi kokuami
Ezekiel28:12 Eie monʼa diiala
Ezekiel28:13 Ua kexile mu Edene; mu kadíbhia ka Nzambi; o matadi oso a phelu ia nzaji ene a kexile o divunga dié
Ezekiel28:14 Eie-phe ua kexi u xelube ia kilangidilu ia unde ni maji phala kukuatekesa
Ezekiel28:15 Ua kexile ua tenena mu njila jé joso
Ezekiel28:16 Mukonda dia kusokoloka kua mauenji mé
Ezekiel28:17 Muẋima ué ua zangalala mukonda dia kuila eie ua uabha kiavulu
Ezekiel28:18 Mukonda dia nzungule ia ikuma ié
Ezekiel28:19 Muʼaxaxe ka ifuẋi

Ezekiel28:22 u zuele

Ezekiel28:24 Phala o muiji ua Izalaiele
Ezekiel28:25 O Jihova Nzambi
Ezekiel28:26 A kà tunga momo ni kukondama
Ezekiel29:1 Mu muvu ua kakuinhi
Ezekiel29:2 Eie monʼa diiala o pholo ié talela-iu mu kuzoka ni Falaó
Ezekiel29:3 Zuela
Ezekiel29:4 Maji eme-phe nga-nda ku ta jinzolo mu jinganzuánzua jé
Ezekiel29:5 Hé nga kà ku xisa mu kikangalakata
Ezekiel29:6 Anga ene oso a tunga mu Ijitu a kà kʼijiia kuila emeʼeme ngi Jihova

Ezekiel29:8 Kala kiki

Ezekiel29:11 Ki mua kà bhita kinama kia muthu mba kinama kia kiama

Ezekiel29:13 Maji-phe o Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: Kioso kia-nda kúbhua o makuinhia-uana a mivu
Ezekiel29:14 Hé nga kà bhuisa-ku o ubhika ua akua Ijitu
Ezekiel29:15 Ene a kà kala dingi bhoxiʼèlele o mautuminu oso ndenge
Ezekiel29:16 O kudielela kua a dielela jinga o muiji ua Izalaiele ka-nda kukala na-ku dingi

Ezekiel37:12 Kala kiki

Ezekiel37:14 Anga nga kà ta o nzumbi iami mʼoxi dienu
Ezekiel37:15 O kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kokuami
Ezekiel37:16 Eie-phe
Ezekiel37:17 Anga u i bunjika kumoxi
Ezekiel37:18 O ki kala o anʼa mundu ué a ku zuelesa
Ezekiel37:19 Eie-phe u a ambela
Ezekiel37:20 Anga o iẋimbu ia miẋi ku ua soneka ua kà kala-na-iu bhu maku mé
Ezekiel37:21 Hé u a ambela-phe
Ezekiel37:22 Ni ngʼà bhange muiji umoxi ngó mu ngongo
Ezekiel37:23 Ene ue ki mungu a di kasanesa dingi ni mahamba mâ
Ezekiel37:24 Anga o mubhikʼami Davidi muene ua kà kala sobha iâ
Ezekiel37:25 Hé a kà tunga mu ixi i nga bhana kua mubhikʼami Jakobo
Ezekiel37:26 Anga nga kà ta-nâ kikutu kia uembu; kiene ue kia kà kala kikutu ki nangenena; nga kà a phapha muene
Ezekiel37:27 O balaka iami ia kà kala ni ene
Ezekiel37:28 Anga akua jixi a kà kʼijiia kuila eme-muène Jihova
Ezekiel38:1 O kizuelu kia Jihova kieza dingi kokuami
Ezekiel38:2 Monʼa diiala
Ezekiel38:3 Uamba kiki: O Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki
Ezekiel38:4 nga-nda ku ku bhangesa kuvutuka
Ezekiel38:5 Akua Pelesa
Ezekiel38:6 ni Ngomele ni masoladiʼê oso; ni dibhata dia Tokalma
Ezekiel38:7 Di iudike-phe
Ezekiel38:8 Mbata kia-nda kubhita izuua ia vulu
Ezekiel38:9 Kienhokio-phe
Ezekiel38:10 O Jihova Nzambi uambe kiki: O mu kizuuʼomo kia kà bhita kuila o ku muẋima ué ua kà kala ni ixinganeku
Ezekiel38:11 Ua kʼàmba
Ezekiel38:12 Mbebhu o kutambula o madibhundila ni kuzangumuna o mbole
Ezekiel38:13 O Seba ni Dedane ni iá a tungu mu Talxixi kumoxi ni tuhoji tuâ tuoso
Ezekiel38:14 Kala kiki eie monʼa diiala zambula uambele
Ezekiel38:15 Eie-phe ua kà tunda bhu kididi kié ku jimbandu ja kusuku
Ezekiel38:16 Anga eie ua kà banda mu kúlua ni mundu uami ua Izalaiele
Ezekiel38:17 O Jihova Nzambi
Ezekiel38:18 Jihova Nzambi uixi: Kia-nda kua kà bhita-phe
Ezekiel38:19 Mbata o mu muanu uami nga kiambe
Ezekiel38:20 kia kà bhinga katé ni jimbiji muʼalunga ja kà teketa bhu pholo iami
Ezekiel38:21 Mukonda nga kà muʼ ixanena o xibhata ku thandu dia milundu iami ioso
Ezekiel38:22 Anga mu ku zoka-nê nga kà mu bilukila ni dibhebhu ni manhinga; ni mvula ia kungulula-musoke
Ezekiel38:23 Mu kienhiki eme nga-nda ku di kudisa anga ngi di kolêsa
Ezekiel39:1 Eie-phe monʼa diiala
Ezekiel39:2 Eme nga-nda ku ku tesa jihinji
Ezekiel39:3 anga o mufula ué ua ku kala bhu lukuaku lua kiasu ngi ku katula-na-u
Ezekiel39:4 Eie-muène ua kà tenukina ku milundu ia Izalaiele
Ezekiel39:5 Jihova Nzambi uambe kuma: Ua kà buila ngambu mu mukáu ua hatu
Ezekiel39:6 O Mangongo nga kà mu tumikisa túbhia
Ezekiel39:7 Anga nga kʼèjidisa o dijina diami dikola muʼaxaxe ka mundu uami ua Izalaiele
Ezekiel39:8 Tala-ze
Ezekiel39:9 Kienhokio-phe o ene oso a tungu mu jisanzala ja Izalaiele a kà tunda
Ezekiel39:10 Kà kʼeza dingi ni jihuinhi mu ditutu
Ezekiel39:11 Anga kia kà bhita-phe kuila
Ezekiel39:12 O muiji ua Izalaiele uene ua kʼènda ni ku a funda mu sambuadi dia mbeji
Ezekiel39:13 Kiene muene
Ezekiel39:14 Hé a kà tungula-ku athu enda ni kunhunga mu ixi mbé nʼai ni kufunda ió oso a tenukina mu kanga dia hatu
Ezekiel39:15 O akua kunhunga mu ixi
Ezekiel39:16 O dijina ue dia mbonge a kà ixana kiá
Ezekiel39:17 Eie-phe monʼa diiala
Ezekiel39:18 Mua-nda kúdia o xitu ia iiala ia nguzu
Ezekiel39:19 Anga mua kà dia o maji hé a mi kuma
Ezekiel39:20 Anga o ku meza mami
Ezekiel39:21 Eme anga nga kà ta o matunda mami muʼaxaxe ka akua jixi

Ezekiel39:26 anga o jisonhi jâ
