Matthew26:45 Anga uiza ku jixibulu
Matthew26:46 Fundumukenu
Matthew26:47 Kioso Jezú kiala hanji mu zuela
Matthew26:48 Muène ua mu thelekala-phe ua a bhele kijimbuete
Matthew26:49 Juda bhenhobho anga u bhiẋila kua Jezú
Matthew26:50 Jezú-phe u mu ambela
Matthew26:51 Muthu umoxi-phe
Matthew26:52 Jezú anga u mu ambela
Matthew26:53 Inga mua fika ki ngi tena kubhinga Tata iami
Matthew26:54 Maka mòsoneke mu Madivulu-phe ma Ngana
Matthew26:55 Kithanganʼokio Jezú anga u ambela o mundu eza mu ku mu kuta
Matthew26:56 Kiene kiosuʼiki-phe kia bhiti
Matthew26:57 Iá a kuata Jezú
Matthew26:58 Phetele-phe u mu kaiela dikanga ku dima
Matthew26:59 Kiki jinganga ja makota
Matthew26:60 maji a u lémbua
Matthew26:61 exi: Ialʼú ua tangele
Matthew26:62 Nganga ia dikota anga u imana
Matthew26:63 Jezú-phe ua di xibhê. Nganga ia dikota anga u mu ambela
Matthew26:64 Jezú u mu ambela uixi: Eiemuène ua ki tange
Matthew26:65 Nganga ia dikota anga u tandujula izuatu iê
Matthew26:66 Enu-phe mua fika kiebhi? Ene a vutula
Matthew26:67 Anga a mu ṗhamena mathe mu pholo
Matthew26:68 Zambula
Matthew26:69 Phetele-phe hanji kia xikama bhu kanga mu lumbu. Monʼa kilumba
Matthew26:70 Muène-phe udituna bhu pholo ia ene oso
Matthew26:71 Kia tubhuka ku mbalanda-phe
Matthew26:72 Muène anga udituna dingi ni kulôka
Matthew26:73 Kubhanga kithangana
Matthew26:74 Muène anga u kuata kuxinga ni kulôka
Matthew26:75 Phetele anga u tukumuka o maka ma tangele Jezú
Matthew27:1 Kukia ni kimene
Matthew27:2 Anga a mu kuta
Matthew27:3 Juda-phe
Matthew27:4 Nga te kituxi mu thelekala o manhinga ma muthu uaiuka! Kuala ene-phe: Etu kia tu kuatelahi? Maka mé eie. Eie-muène soka na-kiu!
Matthew27:5 Juda muène bhenhobho
Matthew27:6 Jinganga ja makota anga ji katula itadi ia phalata
Matthew27:7 Kia zubha ku di longesa mudiâ
Matthew27:8 Kididi kiókio kiene kia kʼixanena
Matthew27:9 Bhenhobho bhua bhiti dingi kima kia soneka Jelemiia
Matthew27:10 anga a i bhana mu kididi kia mumbiʼa jímbia
Matthew27:11 Kiki Jezú uemana bhu pholo ia nguvulu
Matthew27:12 Kia mu tatela o jinganga ja makota ni adiakimi ku Jijudé-phe
Matthew27:13 Pilatu anga a mu ambela
Matthew27:14 Muène-phe ka kumbulula
Matthew27:15 Bhu Fesa ia Phasu-phe
Matthew27:16 Thembu íii anga a kala ni pelezu imoxi ia fumana
Matthew27:17 Kioso-phe mundu kia bhongolokʼiki
Matthew27:18 Mbata Pilatu muene ua kʼijiia kuila o Jezú a mu thelekala ngoho mukonda dia dixinga dia mu kuatelele ene.
Matthew27:19 Kioso ue kia xikama Pilatu bhu kibhuna kia kufundisila
Matthew27:20 Jinganga ja makota-phe
Matthew27:21 Nguvulu anga u kumuna
Matthew27:22 Kuala Pilatu: O Jezú-phe
Matthew27:23 Kuala muène: Phala-hi? Muène ua te kituxi kiahi? Ene-phe a di kola dingi kiavulu
Matthew27:24 Pilatu-phe kia mono kuma ka lende kima
Matthew27:25 Mundu uoso anga u kumbulula
Matthew27:26 Muène anga u a jituina Balaba; o Jezú-phe u mu bhesa jixikote
Matthew27:27 Masoladi a nguvulu Pilatu
Matthew27:28 Anga a mu zula
Matthew27:29 Anga enda kitundu kia jithangu ja minha
Matthew27:30 Anga a mu ṗhamena mathe
Matthew27:31 Kia zubha ku mu bhanga kasèkelu
Matthew27:32 Kia kala mu tunda
Matthew27:33 Kia bhiẋila bhu kididi a kʼixana Ngolongota
Matthew27:34 A mu bhana vinhu iòlunge ni ndululu. Muène-phe kia i lola
Matthew27:35 Kia zubha ku mu phaphela ku dikulusu
Matthew27:36 Anga a xikama
Matthew27:37 Ku mutuelu uê anga a ta-ku ka dibaia kòsoneke
Matthew27:38 Kienhókio ni ifumbe iiadi a i phaphela-nê kumoxi ku makulusu
Matthew27:39 Oso ala kubhita-bhu anga a mu xinga
Matthew27:40 Eieʼó
Matthew27:41 Ni jinganga ja makota ni jimesene ja kulonga o Kitumu
Matthew27:42 Ua bhulula athu engi
Matthew27:43 Ua kexi mu kudielela Nzambi
Matthew27:44 Ni ifumbe ue
Matthew27:45 Kiki tunde ku mediia mu ola ia kasamanu
Matthew27:46 Ku bhixila mu ola ia kàvua
Matthew27:47 Amoxi emana-bhu
Matthew27:48 Mukuá anga u lenga kindala
Matthew27:49 Akuá-phe exi: Ambula
Matthew27:50 Jezú anga u di kola dingi luamukuá ni dízui dia suina
Matthew27:51 Kibatulu kia Tembulu anga ki tanduka mu ʼaxaxe
Matthew27:52 jimbila anga ji jikuka; mikutu iamukuá ia akua Ngana aia okulu ku kilu
Matthew27:53 Jezú muène ue kia zubha kufukunuka
Matthew27:54 Bhenhobho kabhitangu ni masoladi iá oso aia-nê mu langidila Jezú
Matthew27:55 Ni ahatu avulu iá bhobho
Matthew27:56 Mudiâ mu kala ni Madiia dia Manda
Matthew27:57 Kutula mu ngoloxi
Matthew27:58 Zuze muenhú anga uia kua Pilatu
Matthew27:59 Zuze anga u katula kimbi
Matthew27:60 Anga u ki tula mu mbila iê-muène ia ubhe ia jikuile mu ndànji. Anga u kundumuna kiditadi kiònene bhu muelu ua mbila
Matthew27:61 Madiia dia Manda iú bhobho
Matthew27:62 Mu kimene
Matthew27:63 Ngana
Matthew27:64 Kiki-phe tuma kulanga o mbilʼoio ni muanu uoso
Matthew27:65 Pilatu anga ua ambela
Matthew27:66 Ene anga aia

Matthew28:2 Talesa-phe
Matthew28:3 O kídifua kiê kala nzaji
Matthew28:4 Mukonda dia uôma uê
Matthew28:5 Anju-phe i zuelesa ahatu
Matthew28:6 Muène bhabha kala-bhu; ua fukunuka
Matthew28:7 Endelenu-ku
Matthew28:8 Ene anga a katuka lusolo bhu mbila
Matthew28:9 Talesa-phe
Matthew28:10 Jezú anga ua ambela
Matthew28:11 Kioso-phe Ahetu kiala hanji mu kuia
Matthew28:12 Ene-phe kia di bhongolola ni adiakimi ku Jijudé
Matthew28:13 Enu muá kela
Matthew28:14 Se nguvulu u kʼivua
Matthew28:15 Ene anga a tambula kitadi
Matthew28:16 Kuinhi dia xibulu nʼimoxi-phe
Matthew28:17 O kia mu mono
Matthew28:18 Jezú anga uiza
Matthew28:19 Enu-phe ndenu
Matthew28:20 ni ku a longa kualuka ima ioso kiá i nga mi tumu eme. Talenu
Mark1:1 O njimbu iambote ia Jezú Kristu
Mark1:2 Kala kia ki soneka mua polofeta Izaia
Mark1:3 u kala dízui di di kola mu ditutu
Mark1:4 Kienhiki Nzuá dia Batizu kia tukuluka mu ditutu
Mark1:5 O athu a tungu mu ixi ioso ia Judeia anga a tunda ku mu sanga
Mark1:6 O Nzuá muéne ua zuata ndemba ja kamelu
Mark1:7 Anga u kala mu tangela o mundu
Mark1:8 Eme nga mi batizala ni menha
Mark1:9 Anga ki bhita mu izuʼomo kuma Jezú u tunda ku Nazalé
Mark1:10 Kithangana kia kala mu zauka ku menha
Mark1:11 Anga dízui di tunda ku diulu
Mark1:12 Kithangana o Nzumbi i mu takula ku ditutu.
Mark1:13 Anga u kala kuenhoko
Mark1:14 Kia zubha Nzuá ku mu ta mu ʼaleia
Mark1:15 O thembu ia tenena kia
Mark1:16 O kia kexi kubhita bhu mbandu ia kizanga kia Ngalileia
Mark1:17 Jezú ua ambela
Mark1:18 Ene kithanganʼokio a xa o manda
Mark1:19 Kuenda-ku dingi kadikanga
Mark1:20 Kithanganʼokio Jezú kiiadi kia u a exana. Ene anga a xa tatʼâ Zebedeu mu bote
Mark1:21 Anga aia ku Kafanau. Kithanganʼokio
Mark1:22 Athu anga a diuana ulongelu ue. Kuma ua a longo ni ungana
Mark1:23 Kithanganʼokio mu dilombe dia mu kala diiala uala ni nzumbi iaxidi. Muene iu ua di kola
Mark1:24 Etu tua kuata-hi ni eie Ngana
Mark1:25 Jezú anga u mu bazela
Mark1:26 O nzumbi iaxidi anga i mu vunda bhoxi
Mark1:27 Ene oso anga a diuana
Mark1:28 O fuma ia Jezú kithanganʼokio anga i sambuka mikau ioso mʼoxi ioio ia Ngalileia.
Mark1:29 Kithanganʼokio
Mark1:30 Ukouʼa Ximá ua muhatu ua kexi kukata febele. O kia bhixila Jezú
Mark1:31 Muene anga uiza
Mark1:32 Mu ngoloxi
Mark1:33 O mbonge ioso anga i bhongoloka bhu kanga dia ʼnzo mua kexi Jezú.
Mark1:34 Muene anga u saka avulu a kate mahaxi moso-moso
Mark1:35 Mu kimene-phe
Mark1:36 Ni Ximá ni akua anga a kala ku mu sota ku mbandu joso.
Mark1:37 O kia mu sange
Mark1:38 Muene-phe ua ambela
Mark1:39 Anga uia ku Ngalileia ioso ni kutanga maka ma Njimbu Iambote mu malombe má
Mark1:40 Anga kuiza mukua dibhute ni kudionda
Mark1:41 Jezú-phe
Mark1:42 Kithanganʼokio o dibhute di mu xa
Mark1:43 Muéne anga u mu kusa
Mark1:44 Aiuka
Mark1:45 Maji muéne-phe kia zubha kutunda-bhu
Mark2:1 Kia bhiti tuʼizuua
Mark2:2 Mundu anga u bhongoloka katé mʼonzo muezala ni bhu kanga
Mark2:3 a mu bhekela haxi ia kila
Mark2:4 O ki a sange kuila ka tena ku mu bhixila mukonda dia mundu
Mark2:5 Jezú kia mono o kuxikana kuá
Mark2:6 Bhu kala-phe amoxi ku jimesene ja kulonga Kitumu
Mark2:7 Ialʼú uala ku tangela-hi kisunji kiki? Muthu iú ua mu ẋonguena Nzambi! Ua tena ku loloka ituxi
Mark2:8 Kithanganʼokio Jezú kuma uevu ku muẋima ué ioso iala mu banza ene
Mark2:9 Kiebhi kia uabha-bhu ku ki bhanga? O kuambela haxi ia kila kuila
Mark2:10 Phala-phe mu kʼijjie kuma Eme ngi Monʼa Muthu ngala ni ungana mu ngongo ua kuloloka ituxi
Mark2:11 Nga ku tumu kubalumuka
Mark2:12 Muéne anga u balumuka
Mark2:13 Muéne anga u tunda lua mukuá
Mark2:14 O kia kala mu kubhita
Mark2:15 Anga ki bhita kuma Jezú ni maxibulu mé kia xikama ku meza mu kúdia mʼonzo ia Levi
Mark2:16 Asoneki-phe ni jifalizeu
Mark2:17 Jezú kia zubha ku kʼivua
Mark2:18 O jixibulu ja Nzuá ni jifalizeu anga a kala mu jila. Athu amukuá anga eza kua Jezú
Mark2:19 Jezú anga ua ambela
Mark2:20 Izuua ií iiza-phe
Mark2:21 Kana muthu u banda kitetele kiòbhe ku dikoza diokulu. Se u ki bhanga
Mark2:22 Kana muthu ue u ta vinhu ia uisu mu isudi iokulu; se u ki bhanga
Mark2:23 Anga ki bhita kuma
Mark2:24 Kuala jifalizeu: Talesa
Mark2:25 Muene ua ambela
Mark2:26 Mukonda muene ua bokuene mʼonzo ia Nzambi
Mark2:27 Anga Jezú ua ambela
Mark2:28 Uila kiki
Mark3:1 Muene anga u bokona dingi mu dilombe dia kusambela Nzambi
Mark3:2 Ene anga a kala ku mu tonginina mba u mu saka kia sabhalu
Mark3:3 Anga u ambela o muthu ua kukuta lukuaku uixi: Imana bhu ʼaxaxiʼabha.
Mark3:4 Anga ua ambela
Mark3:5 Muene ua exi suí
Mark3:6 Jifalizeu anga a tunda
Mark3:7 Jezú-phe u tunda bhenhobho ni jixibulu je
Mark3:8 ni ku Jeluzaleme
Mark3:9 Muene anga u ambela jixibulu je ku mu sotela bote mu a di longa jinga
Mark3:10 Kuma ua sakula mundu uavulu
Mark3:11 Ni oso ala ni jinzumbi ja xidi
Mark3:12 Jezú muene anga nzumbi ja xidi u ji kidika kiavulu phala ka mu tange.
Mark3:13 Anga Jezú u banda ku mulundu
Mark3:14 Anga u sola kuinhi ni kiiadi oso a-ndu kala-nâ
Mark3:15 He ua a bhana o kusaka mahaxi ni kutundisa o madimonho.
Mark3:16 O kuinhi ni kiiadi enhá: Ximá
Mark3:17 Ni Tiiaku
Mark3:18 ni Mandele
Mark3:19 ni Juda mukua Kadiota
Mark3:20 Anga u bokona mʼonzo
Mark3:21 O jindandu jé kia zubha ku kʼivua
Mark3:22 O jimesene ja kulonga Kitumuphe
Mark3:23 Muéne anga ua exana
Mark3:24 Kilombo kia sobha se kia di lungulukila ene mudiá
Mark3:25 Ni akua bhata se a di lungulukila ene mudiá
Mark3:26 O ki kala Satana ua di kitukila muéne
Mark3:27 Muthu-phe kubokona mʼonzo ia dizonda
Mark3:28 Ngi mi ambela kidi
Mark3:29 Uoso-phe u ẋonguena o Nzumbi Ikóla
Mark3:30 Mukonda ene a mu ambe exi: Muéne uala ni nzumbi iaxidi.
Mark3:31 Mamʼá ni jiphange jé anga eza
Mark3:32 O kifuẋi kia xikama kia mu bhake bhuʼaxaxi
Mark3:33 Kuala muéne: Mamʼetu nanhi? O pange jami akua-hi?
Mark3:34 Muéne bhenhobho ua tonginina oso a mu kondoloka ni kuxikama
Mark3:35 Kuma uoso u bhanga vondadi ia Nzambi
Mark4:1 Muéne anga u kuata dingi kulonga bhu mbandu ia kizanga kia Ngalileia. Anga bhu bhongoloka kifuxi kia dikota
Mark4:2 Anga u a longa ima iavulu mu ifika; mu kulonga kué iu ua ambela
Mark4:3 Ivenu! Muthu umoxi
Mark4:4 O kia kala mu ku kuua
Mark4:5 Jamukuá ja sonokena bhu ndánji
Mark4:6 Kiatu o muanha-phe
Mark4:7 Jamukuá ja sonokena mu minha
Mark4:8 Jamukuá ja sonokena mu mavu mambote
Mark4:9 Anga ua ambela
Mark4:10 O kia kala ku ubheka
Mark4:11 Muéne anga ua ambela
Mark4:12 Phala kia tala a tale
Mark4:13 Anga ua ambela
Mark4:14 Mukuni a jimbutu
Mark4:15 Oso-phe a a kuua bhu mbanduʼa njila
Mark4:16 Oso a a kuua bhu ndanji ue
Mark4:17 Kuma ka moneka jindanji-phe
Mark4:18 Sai amukuá a a kuu mu minha
Mark4:19 o jihele ja mundu iu
Mark4:20 Oso-phe a a kuu mu mavu ma mbote
Mark4:21 Jezú anga ua ambela dingi
Mark4:22 Kuma kima kioso kiòfute
Mark4:23 Se bhuala muthu uala ni matui ma kuivila
Mark4:24 Anga ua ambela dingi
Mark4:25 Kuma uoso uala
Mark4:26 Ngana Jezú uixi: Kienhiki o Utuminu ua Nzambi uedi kala muthu u ta mbutu mu mavu.
Mark4:27 Anga u zeka
Mark4:28 O mavu a di imina ene
Mark4:29 O kibundu-phe ki kia-nda kúbhia
Mark4:30 Uixi: O Utuminu ua Nzambi tu u fika kiebhi? Tu u lombolola ni kixanga kiahi?
Mark4:31 Ua di fangana ni lumbundu lua mbutu ia mustarda
Mark4:32 O kia lu kuua
Mark4:33 Anga u a tela maka mu ifika iavulu kala iíi
Mark4:34 Ka a tangela kima se kifika. Maji ku ubheka
Mark4:35 Kizuua kienhókio
Mark4:36 Ene anga a sulula o mundu
Mark4:37 Ku musanza anga ku balumuka kitembu kia suina
Mark4:38 Muene-phe
Mark4:39 Muene anga u tona
Mark4:40 Anga ua ambela
Mark4:41 Uôma anga u a kuata kiavulu
Mark5:1 Jezú ni maxibulu mê anga a kuáka ku sambua dia kizanga kia Ngalileia
Mark5:2 O kia zubha kutomboka mu bote
Mark5:3 O mu jimbila
Mark5:4 Kuma a mu kuta jinga kia luavulu
Mark5:5 Ni mu muanha ni mu usuku
Mark5:6 O kia mono Jezú mu ikanga
Mark5:7 anga u di kola ni dízui dia suina
Mark5:8 Muene ua zuela kiki
Mark5:9 Jezú ua mu ibhula
Mark5:10 Anga u kala mu diondolola Jezú kuila o nzumbi jaxidi
Mark5:11 Bhenhobho-phe mu mulundu mu kala kilunga kia dikota kia jingulu jala mu mudia bhua butu.
Mark5:12 Anga o jinzumbi jene a mu dionda
Mark5:13 Jezú anga ua ehela. O jinzumbi jaxidi anga ji tunda
Mark5:14 Oso a kexile ku jʼinga-phe
Mark5:15 A bhixila kua Jezú
Mark5:16 Io oso a ki mono
Mark5:17 Anga a kuata ku mu dionda kutunda mu mikau ia.
Mark5:18 O kia kala mu ku di longa mu bote
Mark5:19 Jezú-phe ka mu ehela
Mark5:20 Muene anga u katuka
Mark5:21 Kia zubha Jezú kuzauka dingi ku sambua
Mark5:22 Anga ku mu sanga muthu ua tokala ku makota ma dilombe dijina diê Jailu
Mark5:23 Anga u mu dionda kiavulu
Mark5:24 Anga u katuka-nê
Mark5:25 Anga bhu kala muhatu ua kate kibhubhe kia manhinga
Mark5:26 Jimbongo je joso ja kexile na-ju
Mark5:27 Kuma uevu o fuma ia Jezú
Mark5:28 Mukonda uixi: Se nga mu babata ngo ku kizuatu kie
Mark5:29 Kithanganʼokio o kibhubhe kie kia manhinga kia batuka
Mark5:30 Jezú-phe kithanganʼokio kuma uevu kuila mu mukutu ue mua tundu umbanda
Mark5:31 Kuala jixibulu je: O mundu ua u mono a ku xina
Mark5:32 Muene-phe u kuata kukengelela mu mundu
Mark5:33 O muhatu-phe ni kuteketa ni uoma
Mark5:34 Muene iu ua mu ambela
Mark5:35 Kioso-phe Jezú kia kexile hanji mu zuela
Mark5:36 Jezú-phe ka a suu kia zuela
Mark5:37 Muene kʼehela dingi muthu ku mu kaiela
Mark5:38 Anga a bhixila kʼonzo ia dikota dia dilombe
Mark5:39 O Muene kia zubha kubokona
Mark5:40 Anga a mu olela uoua. Muene-phe u a tubhula bhu kanga ene oso
Mark5:41 Anga u kuata o mona mu lukuaku
Mark5:42 Kithanganʼokio o kilumba u balumuka
Mark5:43 Bhenhobho Jezú muene u a kidika kiavulu
Mark6:1 Muene anga u tunda bhenhobho
Mark6:2 Kutula kia sabhalu
Mark6:3 Manhi ki muene musongi a mabaiʼu
Mark6:4 Jezú-phe uixi: O polofeta kana bhama bhu mu kamba ujitu
Mark6:5 Muene mueneʼomo mu Nazalé ka tenene dingi kubhanga-mu kisumua; kima ngo kia bhange
Mark6:6 Anga u diuana mukonda dia kuxibhaka kua. Jezú anga u nhunga kia ngo mu jisanzala ni kulonga.
Mark6:7 Anga u ixana o kuinhi dia xibulu ni kiiadi
Mark6:8 Anga u a tendelela kuma: Ki mu ambate huta ia njila
Mark6:9 maji mu zuata jihaii
Mark6:10 Uixi dingi: Dioso dibhata di mua tula
Mark6:11 Bhuoso-phe bhua kamba ku mi tambulula
Mark6:12 O maxibulu anga a muangana
Mark6:13 A tundisa madimonho
Mark6:14 Sobha Helode anga u kʼivua
Mark6:15 Amukuá-phe exi: Elija. Amukuá exi: Polofeta
Mark6:16 Helode-phe kia kʼivu
Mark6:17 Kuma Helode muene ua tumine kukuata Nzuá
Mark6:18 Mukonda Nzuá uambelele Helode
Mark6:19 Helodiia anga u mu kuatela luma
Mark6:20 Mukonda Helode muene ua kexile ni uoma ua Nzuá
Mark6:21 Ku bhiẋila-phe bhu kizuua kia tokala kia Helode kutenesa mivu
Mark6:22 O kieza monʼa Helodiia muene
Mark6:23 Anga u mu lokela
Mark6:24 Muene anga u tunda
Mark6:25 Kithangana kienhókio monʼa kilumba u bokona muala sobha ni lusolo
Mark6:26 Sobha anga Ukenana kiavulu
Mark6:27 Kithanganʼokio sobha u katula disoladi ku alangidiʼê
Mark6:28 Anga u bheka mutue bhu dilonga
Mark6:29 Jixibulu ja Nzuá ki a zubha ku kʼivua
Mark6:30 Jipoxolo anga ji bhongoloka kua Jezú
Mark6:31 Muene iu ua ambela
Mark6:32 Anga aia mu bote ku kididi kia ubheka ku mukau.
Mark6:33 Mundu uavulu-phe a a mono kuia
Mark6:34 Muene kia zubha kutomboka
Mark6:35 O kia lembe o dikumbi
Mark6:36 A muanganese
Mark6:37 Muene-phe ua a vutuila
Mark6:38 Kuala muene: Muala ni mbolo jikuẋi? Ka talesienu. O kia zubha ku talesa exi: Jitanu
Mark6:39 Jezú bhenhobho iu ua a tumu kuxikama ku iangu ia uisu
Mark6:40 Ene he a xikama ku misambu
Mark6:41 Muene anga u tambula o mbolo jitanu ni mbiji jiiadi
Mark6:42 Ene oso anga a dia
Mark6:43 O ku ibhasu ia jimbolo ni ia jimbiji ia subhuka-ku
Mark6:44 Ene-phe adi ku jimbolo
Mark6:45 Kithanganʼokio Jezú u tuma jixibulu je ku di lônga mu bote
Mark6:46 O kia zubha ku di lekela-nê
Mark6:47 Kutula mu ngoloxi
Mark6:48 O kia mono a tate ni kuzaula
Mark6:49 Ene-phe kia mono Jezú uala kuendela ku thanduʼa menha
Mark6:50 Kuma ene oso a mu mono
Mark6:51 Anga u bhixila ku bote
Mark6:52 Kuma ni kisúmua kia jimbolo ki kia a tetulukila luua
Mark6:53 O kia zubha kuzauka
Mark6:54 O kia zubha kutomboka
Mark6:55 A lengela ku mbandu joso
Mark6:56 Muene bhuoso bhua tula jinga
Mark7:1 Kua mu bhongolokela jifalizeu ni amoxi-moxi ku jimesene ja Kitumu a tundile ku Jeluzaleme.
Mark7:2 Ene a mono jixibulu je jimoxi-mu jí jidia mbolo ni maku maxidi
Mark7:3 Mbata jifalizeu ni Jijudé joso kene kudia se kusukujula kiavulu o maku
Mark7:4 Kia tunda ue bhu kitanda
Mark7:5 Jifalizeu ni jimesene ene mu longa o Kitumu
Mark7:6 Muene ua ambela
Mark7:7 A ngi bheza-phe ngo makutu ni kulonga ijila ia tumu ngo athu
Mark7:8 Enu mu-xa kitumu kia Nzambi
Mark7:9 Uixi dingi: Kidi kiene
Mark7:10 Kuma Mozé
Mark7:11 Enu-phe mu longa
Mark7:12 Muthu io ka bhingi dingi kuila tatʼâ ni mamʼa ua a bhanga ujitu.
Mark7:13 Kienhiki
Mark7:14 Jezú anga u ixana dingi o kifuẋi
Mark7:15 Kana kima ku kanga dia muthu ki tena ku mu bokona ni ki mu kasanesa; maji o ima-phe i tunda moxi dia muthu
Mark7:16 Uoso uala ni matui ma kuívua
Mark7:17 O kia zubha kubokona mʼonzo
Mark7:18 Muene
Mark7:19 mukonda ki ki bokona mu muẋima
Mark7:20 Uixi: Kioso ki tunda moxiʼ a muthu
Mark7:21 Kuma moxi
Mark7:22 Maluimbi
Mark7:23 Ima ioso iíi iaiibha i tunda moxi
Mark7:24 Jezú anga u balumuka
Mark7:25 Kithanganʼokio-phe muhatu uavu kamona-kê ka muhatu
Mark7:26 Muhatu iú-phe ngelèku
Mark7:27 Muene-phe
Mark7:28 Muhatu ua mu vutuila
Mark7:29 Kuala muene: Mukonda dia kuvutula kue kua mbote
Mark7:30 O muhatu anga uia kuʼonzo iê
Mark7:31 Kutunda dingi mu jimbandu ja Tilu
Mark7:32 Anga bhu kala athu a mu bhekela muxilu
Mark7:33 Muene anga u mu katula mu kifuẋi
Mark7:34 Bhenhobho anga u talesa ku diulu
Mark7:35 Mátui-mê anga ma xitunuka
Mark7:36 Muene anga u a tendelela kuma ka ki tangele muthu; ene-phe a suina ni ku ki fumanesa.
Mark7:37 Anga a diuana dingi kiavulu
Mark8:1 Mu izuua muenhomo
Mark8:2 O mundu nga a kuatela henda
Mark8:3 Se nga a muanganesa ni nzala
Mark8:4 Kuala jixibulu: Kúdia-phe tu ku sanga kuebhi mu iangʼumu
Mark8:5 Uixi: Muala ni mbolo jikuẋi? Exi sambuadi.
Mark8:6 Muene anga u tuma o kifuẋi kuxikama bhoxi. U katula sambuadi dia mbolo
Mark8:7 A kala ue ni tumbiji. Muene anga u tu benzela
Mark8:8 Anga enhoso a dia
Mark8:9 Ene oso a di kua kambele ngo mu tenesa midi jiuana. Muene anga u a muanganesa.
Mark8:10 Kithanganʼokio Jezú u di longa mu bote ni jixibulu je
Mark8:11 Jifalizeu anga eza a kuata-nê jiphata. A bhindamena kuila u idikiza kisuma phala kulondekesa kuila o kutena kue kua tundu muene ku diulu
Mark8:12 Muene anga u di tula muenhu ni mukondo ua muẋima
Mark8:13 Anga u a xa
Mark8:14 Jixibulu a jimbi-ku o kuambata jimbolo; mu bote anga mu kala ngo imoxi.
Mark8:15 Muene anga u kala mu ku a tendelela
Mark8:16 Ene anga a kuata ku di fetela
Mark8:17 Jezú kia kʼivu
Mark8:18 Mesu sai
Mark8:19 Ki nga uanena o mbolo jitanu
Mark8:20 O ki nga uanena sambuadi dia mbolo
Mark8:21 Kuala Muene: Kífua mua tokoka ku kʼijiia?
Mark8:22 Muene anga u bhixila ku Betesáida. Anga a mu bhekela kifuôfo
Mark8:23 Muene u mu kuata mu lukuaku u mu endesa kate kia tundu mu sanzala. O kia mu ṗhamena tumathe mu mesu
Mark8:24 Muene ua kengelela
Mark8:25 Jezú anga u mu tula dingi o maku luamukuá ku thanduʼa mesu. O kifuôfo kia tonginina dingi
Mark8:26 Anga u mu tuma kuia ku bhata dia
Mark8:27 Kienhokio Jezú anga uenda ni jixibulu je kate ku jizanzala ja Sezaleia ia Filipe. Mu njila anga u ibhula jixibulu
Mark8:28 Maxibulu a mu tangela
Mark8:29 Muene ua ebhula: Enu-phe muixi
Mark8:30 Muene anga u a tendelela kuma ka ki tange ku athu.
Mark8:31 Anga u kuata ku a longa kuma o Monʼa Muthu u bhinga u bhita ku jiphaxi javulu; ni ku mu di tuna kuala adiakime a Jijudé
Mark8:32 Jezú mu kuzuela
Mark8:33 Muene-phe kia sakuka
Mark8:34 Bhenhobho Jezú anga u ixana o mundu
Mark8:35 Kuma uoso uambe kubhulula o muenhu ue
Mark8:36 O muthu u bhanduluka-hi
Mark8:37 Mba muthu u bhana muenhu ue mu kima kiahi?
Mark8:38 Uoso u kala ni jisonhi jami eme ni ja maka mami ku muiji iu ua jiphanda ni ituxi
Mark9:1 Anga ua ambela
Mark9:2 Kia bhiti izuua isamanu
Mark9:3 O izuatu iê i benha ni kuzela kuavulu
Mark9:4 Maxibulu kitatuʼ iki a mono kua a tukulukila ni Elija ni Mozé
Mark9:5 Phetele anga u kumbulula
Mark9:6 Kuma Phetele kʼejiia dingi kia zuela
Mark9:7 Anga kuiza dituta
Mark9:8 Muʼanzanzʼomo
Mark9:9 O kia kala mu tuluka ku mulundu
Mark9:10 Ene
Mark9:11 Anga a mu ibhula
Mark9:12 Kuala muene: Kidi kiene
Mark9:13 Nga mi ambela-phe kuma Elija uejile kia; maji ene a mu bhange ioso ia mesena
Mark9:14 O kieza bhua xedi o jixibulu
Mark9:15 Kithanganʼ okio kifuẋi kioso
Mark9:16 Muene ua ebhula
Mark9:17 Kuala muthu mu kifuẋi
Mark9:18 Bhuoso-phe bhu i mu kuatela i mu vunda bhoxi
Mark9:19 Muene u a kumbulula
Mark9:20 Anga eza-nê. O nzumbi iaiibha ki ia zubha kumona Jezú
Mark9:21 Anga u ibhula tata
Mark9:22 Sai luavulu i mu vubula mu tubhia
Mark9:23 Kuala Jezú: Eie se u tena kuxikana! Kuma ima ioso i xikina kua io ua xikana.
Mark9:24 Kithanganʼokio
Mark9:25 Jezú kia mono bhuala ku di bhongolola mundu
Mark9:26 O ki ia zubha ku di kola
Mark9:27 Jezú-phe u mu kuata mu lukuaku
Mark9:28 O kia zubha kubokona mʼonzo
Mark9:29 Kuala muene: Mbutu iíi ia nzumbi
Mark9:30 Kutunda bhenhobho Jezú ni maxibulu mê a bhita mu Ngalileia. Muene ka mesenene bhu kala muthu u kʼijiia kuila muene ueza.
Mark9:31 Kuma u kala mu longa jixibulu je
Mark9:32 Ene-phe
Mark9:33 Jezú ni maxibulu mê anga a bhixila ku Kafanau. O kia zubha kubokona mʼonzo
Mark9:34 Ene-phe a dixibha. Kuma ene mu njila a kuatele phata ia uoso u kala o dikota.
Mark9:35 Jezú anga u xikama
Mark9:36 Anga u katula kamona
Mark9:37 Uoso u tambulula kamona mukua ni kaka mu dijina diami
Mark9:38 Nzuá anga u mu ambela
Mark9:39 Kuala Jezú-phe: Kana ku mu kidika! Mukonda kana muthu u tena kubhanga kisuma mu dijina diami
Mark9:40 Kuma uoso ka tu zembe
Mark9:41 Kuma uoso u mi bhana kunua kopho ia menha mukonda mua tokala Kristu
Mark9:42 Uoso ue ku tuana tutu tua ngi xikana
Mark9:43 Ni lukuaku lue
Mark9:44 Mua bhingi dibhuka die ki di fu
Mark9:45 Ni kinama kiê se kia ku bhangesa ku di bhala
Mark9:46 Mua bhingi o dibhuka die ki di fu
Mark9:47 Ni diesu die se di ku bhangesa ku di bhala
Mark9:48 Mua bhingi dibhuka die ki di fu
Mark9:49 Mukonda muthu uoso a ka mu tôua ni tubhia.
Mark9:50 Môngua ua di uabhela kiua! Môngua-phe se uabhu o kutouala kue
Mark10:1 Kubalumuka bhenhobho
Mark10:2 Anga kuiza Jifalizeu
Mark10:3 Muene ua a kumbulula uixi: Mozé ua mi tumu kiebhi?
Mark10:4 Exi: Mozé uehela o ku mu bhangela mukanda ua lubongo
Mark10:5 Kuala Jezú-phe: Mukonda dia kukola kua miẋima ienu
Mark10:6 Tunde-phe ku dimatekenu dia kubhanga ima ioso
Mark10:7 Kienhiki ki bhangesa diiala di xa tatʼâ ni mamʼa
Mark10:8 ene kiiadi kia anga a kala xitu imoxi ngo. Uila kiki
Mark10:9 Kioso-phe kia bandeka Nzambi
Mark10:10 Kutula mʼonzo jixibubulu ji mu kumuna dingi o makʼama.
Mark10:11 Muene iu ua ambela
Mark10:12 O muhatu ue
Mark10:13 Anga amoxi-mu a kala ku mu bhekela tuana tua ndenge
Mark10:14 Jezú-phe kia ki mono
Mark10:15 Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Uoso u kamba kutambulula o Utuminu ua Nzambi kala kamona ka ndenge
Mark10:16 Anga u tu tambula bhu jihata je
Mark10:17 Mu kutunda bhenhobho
Mark10:18 Jezú ua mu ambela
Mark10:19 O ijila ua ijiia? Kana kujibha
Mark10:20 Kuala munzangala: Mesene
Mark10:21 Jezú ua muʼixi sui
Mark10:22 O munzangala anga u sonoka pholo ki evu o hundu iíi
Mark10:23 Jezú-phe
Mark10:24 Jixibulu anga a diuana o maka mê. Jezú-phe ua kumuna dingi
Mark10:25 Inda o kamelu kubhita bhu dizungu dia nguia
Mark10:26 Ene anga a sasumuka kiavulu
Mark10:27 Sui kuala Jezú
Mark10:28 Phetele anga u kuata kuzuela
Mark10:29 Kuala Jezú: Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Kana muthu u xa dibhata
Mark10:30 he u kamba kutambula luhama ku muenhu iu
Mark10:31 Sai-phe kindala a dianga
Mark10:32 Anga a kala mu njila mu kubanda ku Jeluzaleme. Jezú anga u tuamenena
Mark10:33 Talesenu
Mark10:34 Ene a mu bhanga kasekelu
Mark10:35 Kienhokio Tiiaku ni Nzuá
Mark10:36 Kuala Jezú: Mua mesena ngi mi bhanga kiebhi?
Mark10:37 Exi: U tu bhesa kuma iú u xikama ku mbandu iê ia kadilu
Mark10:38 Kuala Jezú: Enu ki mua kʼijiia ngo kioso ki mua bhingi. Kífua mu tena kunua dikáu di ngi nua eme? Ni kutambula o batizu ia ngi batizala na-iu Eme?
Mark10:39 Exi: Tua soko-bho. Kuala Jezú: Kidi! Dikáu di ngi nua eme
Mark10:40 Maji o kuxikama ku madilu mami-phe
Mark10:41 O dikuinhi kia zubha ku kʼívua
Mark10:42 Jezú anga ua exana ene oso
Mark10:43 Mudienu-phe
Mark10:44 O uoso uendi o ku kala ku pholo
Mark10:45 Kuma ni Monʼa Muthu ue
Mark10:46 Jezú ni maxibulu mê he a bhixila mu sanzala ia Jelikó. O mu kutunda mu Jelikó
Mark10:47 O ki evu kuila muene Jezú dia Nzalé ua-lu bhita
Mark10:48 Mundu anga a mu bazela
Mark10:49 Jezú anga uimana
Mark10:50 Muene kia takula o kizuatu kiê ku dima
Mark10:51 Jezú iu ua mu kumbulula
Mark10:52 Jezú anga u mu ambela
Mark11:1 Jezú ni maxibuluʼê kia zukama ku Jeluzaleme
Mark11:2 Ndenu ku sanzala ia mi lulama bhabha. Kithangana ki mua tula
Mark11:3 He bhu kala muthu u mʼila kuila: Mua-lu bhanga-hi? Mua kela: Ngana ua i bhindamena. Muene kindala u i tumikisé.
Mark11:4 Anga aia
Mark11:5 Ku athu emana-bhu
Mark11:6 Anga a kumbulula kala kia a longesa Jezú
Mark11:7 O kabulu anga eza na-ku kua Jezú
Mark11:8 Bhu kala athu avulu a mu zalela izuatu ia mu njila; amukuá a zala isasa ia su mu mukau.
Mark11:9 Ni ia a mu tuamenena
Mark11:10 Tanesenu o usobha ueza-ku
Mark11:11 Jezú anga u bokona mu Jeluzaleme
Mark11:12 Kukia ni kimene
Mark11:13 O kia mono mufiku mu kanga
Mark11:14 Muene anga uambela o muxi
Mark11:15 Kioso Jezú ni maxibuluʼê kia bhixila mu Jeluzaleme
Mark11:16 Kehela muthu kubhita mu Tembulu ni kitutu kiosokioso.
Mark11:17 Muene anga u kala mu kulonga enhoso
Mark11:18 O makota ma jinganga ni jimesene ja kulonga o Kitumu a kʼívua
Mark11:19 Kutula mu ngoloxi
Mark11:20 O ki kuakie kia kala mu kubhita mu kimene
Mark11:21 Phetele kia ki tukumuka
Mark11:22 Jezú ua a kumbulula
Mark11:23 Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Uoso ua kela mulundu iu: Zangumuka bhabha
Mark11:24 Uila kiki ngi mi ambela: Ioso ima i mu bhinga mu kusamba
Mark11:25 O ki mu kala mu kuimana ni kusamba
Mark11:26 Kuma se mu kamba kuloloka akuenu
Mark11:27 Anga a bhixila dingi mu Jeluza leme. O muene kia kala mu jeta mu Tembulu
Mark11:28 anga a mu ambela
Mark11:29 Kuala Jezú: Eme uami ngi mʼibhula ue kima kimoxi
Mark11:30 O batizu ia Nzuá ia tundile ku diulu kua Nzambi
Mark11:31 Ene a banza ni muẋima
Mark11:32 O ki tuila: Ku athu
Mark11:33 Anga a vutuila Jezú
Mark12:1 Anga Jezú u kuata ku a tela ifika
Mark12:2 Ku tula bhu thembu ia tokala kubhongolola idima
Mark12:3 Jingunza anga ji mu kuata
Mark12:4 Anga u tuma-ku mubhika uamukuá. Muene ue anga a mu kuama mu mutue
Mark12:5 Anga u tuma dingi mukua. Maji o muenhu idimakaji ia mu jibha. Ni akua dingi avulu: Iá
Mark12:6 O mukua mulenga-phe kua mu xala kia ngoho monʼe a mu zola. Ne kienhókio
Mark12:7 Maji o jingunza jenhiji-phe ji di longesa
Mark12:8 Anga a mu kuata
Mark12:9 Ngana
Mark12:10 Enu kiluua mu tanga makʼama
Mark12:11 dienhidi dia tundu kua Ngana
Mark12:12 Ene anga a sota ku mu kuata
Mark12:13 Ene anga a katula athu ku jifalizeu ni ku akua Helode
Mark12:14 O kia zubha kutula
Mark12:15 Muène-phe kuma uejiia o makutuʼa
Mark12:16 Anga a mu tambuisa-diu. Ua ambela
Mark12:17 Bhenhobho Jezú ua ambela: Bhanenu-phe Sézalu
Mark12:18 Kua mu kane dingi o jisaduseu
Mark12:19 Mesene
Mark12:20 Kua kexile-phe sambuadi dia mala
Mark12:21 Kiubha kiê anga u mu lundula
Mark12:22 Sambuadi dioso dia sakana-nê
Mark12:23 Ku difukunukinu-phe muenhu ua kala mukajiʼa nanhi? Kuma sambuadi dioso dia mu sakana!
Mark12:24 Jezú ua ambela
Mark12:25 Mukonda kioso kia ka fukunuka o madifundu
Mark12:26 O kia madifundu-phe mba a fukunuka
Mark12:27 Mu kuzuela kiki-phe
Mark12:28 Mesene imoxi ia Kitumu ua zuka-mene-bhu
Mark12:29 Jezú ua vutula
Mark12:30 Ngana-phe
Mark12:31 Okia kaiadi kiki: Mukuenu u mu zola
Mark12:32 Kuala o mesene ia Kitumu
Mark12:33 O ku mu zola ni muẋima uoso
Mark12:34 Jezú kia mono kuma o mesene ia Kitumu ua kumbulula ni kilunji
Mark12:35 Jezú anga u kumbulula kia kala mu longa mu Tembulu
Mark12:36 Se o Davidi muene
Mark12:37 Davidi muene se ua mu edi Ngana
Mark12:38 Mu kulonga kue
Mark12:39 Ni kusola o ibhuna ia jingana mu malombe
Mark12:40 Ene a dia mabhata ma ngene ma atudi
Mark12:41 Jezú anga u xikama bha lulama ni bhu dizaku. He u kala mu talesa o mundu ki ala kuta kitadi mu dizaku. Anga kukala ni jimvuama javulu
Mark12:42 Anga kuiza mutudi uala ngadiama
Mark12:43 Muene anga uixana jixibulu je
Mark12:44 Kuma ene oso a katula ngo ku kiki kia subhuka ku nzungule; muene-phe
Mark13:1 Jezú kia kala mu kutunda mu Tembulu
Mark13:2 Jezú ua mu ambela
Mark13:3 O kia xikama ku Mulundu ua Midiva bhua lulama ni bhu Tembulu
Mark13:4 Tu tangele o thembu kia ka bhita imʼiíi. O Kijimbuete kiê kiahi
Mark13:5 Jezú anga u kuata ku a zuelela
Mark13:6 Sai athu avulu
Mark13:7 O ki mu ívua ita ni minumango ia ita
Mark13:8 Kuma kifuẋʼiki
Mark13:9 Enu-phe di langienu! Kuma a ka mi kuta ni ku mi thelekala bhu kionge phala ku mi fundisa
Mark13:10 Mukonda ki bhinga o Njimbu Iambote a dianga ku i boka ni ku i sanhalesa ku akua jixi joso.
Mark13:11 O kia mi kuta he a kala ku mi bheka mu ku mi bhakula
Mark13:12 Muthu ua ka bhakula phangʼiê
Mark13:13 A ka mi zemba kuala athu oso
Mark13:14 Jezú anga u zuela dingi
Mark13:15 O uoso uala ku thandu dia ʼnzo iê
Mark13:16 O uala kia ku mukau
Mark13:17 Lamba dia ahatu ió-phe oso a ka kala ni mavumu
Mark13:18 Sambenu kua Nzambi
Mark13:19 Kuma izuuʼoio kua kala divuua dia dikota
Mark13:20 Ngana se ua kambele kufikisa izuuʼ oio
Mark13:21 Kienhókio se ku kala muthu u ku ambela
Mark13:22 Mukonda kua ka tukuluka ji-Kristu ja makutu
Mark13:23 Enu-phe di langienu! Talesenu
Mark13:24 Mu izuuʼomo-phe
Mark13:25 O jithéthembua ja ka lauka ku diulu
Mark13:26 Kienhókio kiene kia ka mona o Monʼa Muthu iu uiza ku matuta ni kutena kuavulu ni ungana.
Mark13:27 Muene ua ka tuma ji-anju je ni ji bhongolole athuʼê angene ku mbandu jiuana ku tunda o kitembu
Mark13:28 Ku mufiku-phe di longienu-ku kifika kiê: Luthangu lue ki lu di bhanga kia kindemvuna he lu buingita isasa
Mark13:29 Kiene ue enu
Mark13:30 Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Muiji iú ki u buila
Mark13:31 O diulu ni oxi hinu i buila; o maka mami-phe ki ma ka buila.
Mark13:32 Jezú anga u lombolola dingi
Mark13:33 Alukenu-phe
Mark13:34 Kia kela mukua ni muthu uaii mu uenji
Mark13:35 Langidilenu-phe! Kuma kithangana kioso hinu kʼiza ngana ia dibhata
Mark13:36 phala ki ki bhite kuila sumba uiza ku mbulu nʼa mi sange muaienu ku kilu!
Mark13:37 Kioso ki nga mi tangela enu
Mark14:1 Kiki kuila kua kambe izuua iiadi mu fesa ia Phasu
Mark14:2 Exi-phe
Mark14:3 O kia kala mu Betanha mʼonzo ia Ximá mukua dibhute
Mark14:4 Bhu kala athu bhenhobho
Mark14:5 Hinu maji a ma sumbisa mu hama jitatu ja madenádia
Mark14:6 Jezú-phe
Mark14:7 Mbata jingadiama mua xalela-na-ju; kithangana kioso ki mua mesena ku a bhanga jimbote
Mark14:8 Muhatu iú ua bhange kioso kia tena. Mukonda muene
Mark14:9 Kidi kiene-phe
Mark14:10 Juda mukua Kadiota
Mark14:11 Ene kia zubha ku kʼívua
Mark14:12 Kutula mu kizuua kia dianga kia Fesa ia Jimbolo ji Kamba kithûthume
Mark14:13 Muene anga u tuma jixibulu jiiadi
Mark14:14 o mʼonzo muoso mua bokona
Mark14:15 Muene-phe
Mark14:16 O jixibulu jiiadiʼojo anga jiia
Mark14:17 Kutula mu ngoloxi
Mark14:18 O kia xikama ku meza
Mark14:19 Anga a kala ni mukondo
Mark14:20 Jezú muene-phe ua vutula
Mark14:21 Kuma Monʼa Muthu ua-nda kufua kala kia muambe o Mikanda Ikola. Maji o muthu ió-phe
Mark14:22 O kia kala mu kudia
Mark14:23 Anga u katula o kopho
Mark14:24 Uixi: Ia
Mark14:25 Ngi mi ambela kidi
Mark14:26 O ki a zubha kuimba o muimbu
Mark14:27 Jezú anga u ambela maxibulu mê
Mark14:28 Hinu-phe ki ngi fukunuka
Mark14:29 Kuala Phetele-phe: Né-mbé ene oso a lenga nʼa ku xisa
Mark14:30 Jezú u vutuila Phetele
Mark14:31 Phetele-phe u ki suinina kiavulu ni ku ki zuela
Mark14:32 Jezú ni maxibulu-mê anga a bhixila kididi kiòxite kikonzo
Mark14:33 Anga u katula Phetele
Mark14:34 Anga ua ambela ene
Mark14:35 Anga muene u sondoloka-ku kofele u di bhala bhoxi
Mark14:36 Anga u kala mu samba
Mark14:37 Anga uiza
Mark14:38 Langenu
Mark14:39 Anga uia dingi u samba
Mark14:40 Anga uiza luamukuá
Mark14:41 Anga uiza lua katatu
Mark14:42 Fundumukenu
Mark14:43 Kithanganʼokio Jezú kioso kia kexile hanji mu zuela
Mark14:44 O Juda
Mark14:45 O kia zubha kutula bhuala Jezú kithanganʼokio Juda u mu bhixila
Mark14:46 Kienhokio anga Jezú a mu tula maku
Mark14:47 Kua ia emana-bhu-phe
Mark14:48 Jezú anga u a kumbulula
Mark14:49 Nga nange izuua ioso ni enu mu tembulu ni kulonga
Mark14:50 Anga maxibulu a mu xa
Mark14:51 Bhu kala-phe munzangala ua diiala
Mark14:52 Muene-phe ua a xangumuka
Mark14:53 Jezú anga aia-nâ
Mark14:54 Phetele-phe ua mu kaiela Jezú dikanga ku dima
Mark14:55 Bhenhobho
Mark14:56 Sumbala jimbangi javulu ja makutu ja mu tatela
Mark14:57 Bhu kala ni ia emana
Mark14:58 Etu tua mu ivu kuzuela
Mark14:59 Kate ni enhá a tokoka kuzuela kima kimoxi.
Mark14:60 Nganga ia dikota anga u imana bhu ʼaxaxi
Mark14:61 Muene-phe ua di xibhe
Mark14:62 Jezú uixi: Eme-muene. Enuʼenu oso hadia mua ka mona Monʼa Muthu ua xikama ku madilu ma Nzambi Uatena Ioso
Mark14:63 Nganga ia dikota
Mark14:64 Enuʼenu muevu o diẋongo dia ẋonguena Nzambi bhenhabha! O kiki mua fika kiebhi? Ene oso kuma a mu kitukila
Mark14:65 Amoxi-mu anga a kuata ku mu ṗhamena mathe. A mu futa o pholo
Mark14:66 Phetele kia xikama ku lumbu bhoxi
Mark14:67 O kia mono Phetele
Mark14:68 Muene-phe ua di tunu uixi: Muenho eme ki ngi mu ijiia. Ki nga kʼijiia ue ngo kioso eie ki uala kuzuela. Anga u tubhuka ku mbalanda; kienhokio dikolombolo anga di kokola.
Mark14:69 Monʼa kilumba anga u mu mona
Mark14:70 Muene iú ua ditunu luamukuá. Kubhanga kathangana ene ue emana-bhu
Mark14:71 Phetele muene-phe u kuata kuxinga ni kuloka
Mark14:72 Kithanganʼokio dikolombolo di kokola lua kaiiadi. Phetele anga u tukumuka o maka a mu ambela Jezú kuila: Dikolombolo bhu dia ka kokuela luiadi
Mark15:1 Kithangana
Mark15:2 Pilatu anga u mu ibhula
Mark15:3 Jinganga ja makota anga a mu tatela ima iavulu.
Mark15:4 Pilatu anga u mu ibhula dingi
Mark15:5 Jezú-phe nguê dingi kukumbulula kima
Mark15:6 Mu Fesa-phe ia Phasu
Mark15:7 Kienhokio anga kukala pelezo
Mark15:8 O mundu anga a bhixila kua Pilatu a kuata ku mu bhinga kubhanga kioso kiene ku a bhanga jinga kia.
Mark15:9 Pilatu ua kumbulula
Mark15:10 Kuma muene ua mono kuila
Mark15:11 Jinganga ja makota-phe ji kala mu funhisa o mundu
Mark15:12 Pilatu anga u kumuna dingi
Mark15:13 Ene a di kola dingi
Mark15:14 Kuala Pilatu: Phala-hi? O kituxi kie kia te
Mark15:15 Anga
Mark15:16 O masoladi anga aia-nê ku lumbu lua palasu
Mark15:17 Anga a mu zuika kapote kakusuka
Mark15:18 Anga a kuata ku mu menekena exi: Tana-ku! Eie u sobha ia Jijudé!
Mark15:19 Anga a mu beta ni muxi mu mutue
Mark15:20 O kia zubha ku mu sebulula
Mark15:21 Anga a kuata muthu uala mu bhita njila ie
Mark15:22 Anga Jezú eza-nê bhu Ngolongota
Mark15:23 Anga a mesena ku mu bhana vinhu iolunge ni milongo i sosolola o misusu
Mark15:24 Anga a mu batela ku dikulusu
Mark15:25 Mu ola ia katatu
Mark15:26 Anga a soneka ku thandu o xitasá ie: Sobha ia Jijudé.
Mark15:27 Anga a mu-ta kumoxi ku makulusu ni ifumbe iiadi. O iú ku madilu
Mark15:28 Anga ki bhita kala kiosoneke mu Madivulu a Nzambi
Mark15:29 Athu oso ala kubhita bhobho anga a mu nanzesa
Mark15:30 Di kudile-phe eʼ muene
Mark15:31 Ni jinganga ja makota kiòmuene ni alongi a Kitumu
Mark15:32 Kristu
Mark15:33 Ku bhixila mu ola ia mediia
Mark15:34 Mu ola ia kavua. Jezú anga u di kola ni dízui dia suina: Eloi
Mark15:35 Amoxi emana-bhu
Mark15:36 Anga bhu kala muthu
Mark15:37 O Jezú-phe anga u di kola
Mark15:38 O kibatulu kia Tembulu
Mark15:39 Kienhokio
Mark15:40 Sai ni ahatu emana mu kanga mu kutalesa. Mudia mu kala ni Madiia dia Manda
Mark15:41 Ahatu enhá
Mark15:42 Kubhiẋila mu ngoloxi
Mark15:43 kuiza Zuze mukua Limateia. Muenhu muadiakime ua tokala ku Kionge kia Jitata. Muene ue muthu ua kexi mu kinga o Utuminu ua Nzambi. Anga u-bhua uoma
Mark15:44 Pilatu anga u kala ni phata
Mark15:45 O kia zubha ku kʼijiia kua kabhitangu
Mark15:46 Muene anga uiza ni thanga ia dilasola dia linhu ia fina
Mark15:47 Ni Madiia dia Manda

Mark16:2 O mu Lumingu
Mark16:3 Bhenhobho
Mark16:4 O kia talesa

Mark16:6 Muene he ua ambela

Mark16:12 Kia bhiti imʼiíi

Luke1:1 Kamba diami Tiiófilu: Athu avulu kiá a kuata kusoneka mu Mikanda o ima ioso ia bhitile mu dietu.
Luke1:2 Ene a i soneka kala kia tu tangelele na-iu oso a kexile jimbangi tunde ku dimatekenu
Luke1:3 Eme uami ki nga zubha ku ibhudisa kiambote tunde ku ia tundile
Luke1:4 eie ue ni u ijiie o kidi kia ima ioso iene ku ku longa.
Luke1:5 Mu izuua ia Helode
Luke1:6 Kiiadi kiâ anga a kala athu aiuka bhu pholo ia Nzambi
Luke1:7 Ene-phe ka moneka mona
Luke1:8 Anga ki bhita kuma
Luke1:9 Muène anga ki mu tokala
Luke1:10 O kifuẋi kioso kia diembu anga ki kala bhu kanga mù samba
Luke1:11 Anga ku mu tukulukila mukunji ua Ngana
Luke1:12 Zakadiia anga u sasumuka kia mu mono
Luke1:13 Mukunji anga u mu ambela
Luke1:14 Eie ua-ndu kala ni kutana ni kusanguluka; mu ku mu vuala kuê
Luke1:15 Mukonda muène u kala kota dia muthu bhu pholo ia Ngana
Luke1:16 Ndumba dia akua Izalaiele
Luke1:17 Muène u kala mukunji ua Nzambi
Luke1:18 Zakadiia anga u ambela mukunji
Luke1:19 Mukunji anga u mu tambuijila
Luke1:20 Kiki-phe u kala u dibubu
Luke1:21 Kiosuʼiki-phe imʼiíi iala kubhita
Luke1:22 Kia zubha kutunda-phe
Luke1:23 O Zakadiia
Luke1:24 Kia bhiti izuua iòfele
Luke1:25 Eué! Ngana ua ngi bhange o mbote! Izuuʼiíi muène ia ngi xinganeka o ku ngi katula muôndo muʼaxaxi ka akuetu. Kana-ku dingi muthu ua-nda ku ngi tela dibete.
Luke1:26 Nzebele mu kuimita kuê
Luke1:27 Mukunji uambata njimbu phala ku i tula kua monʼa muhatu
Luke1:28 Mukunji anga u bokona
Luke1:29 Madiia anga u sasumuka kiavulu
Luke1:30 Mukunji-phe
Luke1:31 Talesa
Luke1:32 Muène uandu kala kota dia muthu
Luke1:33 Muène ua kà tumina o dibhata dia Jakobo katé ni ku hádia. O Ungana uê ki uá kà-bhua dingi.
Luke1:34 Madiia bhenhobho anga u ambela o mukunji
Luke1:35 Mukunji u mu vutuila
Luke1:36 Xinganeka hanji ndandu ié Nzebele
Luke1:37 Mukonda kua Nzambi
Luke1:38 Madiia uixi: Emeʼamiʼú
Luke1:39 Ki bhua bhiti tu-izuua
Luke1:40 Anga u bokona mʼonzo ia Zakadiia
Luke1:41 Bhenhobho Nzebele ki evu umenekenu ua Madiia
Luke1:42 Anga u di kola ni dízui dia suina
Luke1:43 Eme kia ngi tundila kuebhi
Luke1:44 Talesa
Luke1:45 Eie ua zediua
Luke1:46 Kuala Madiia: Muẋima uami ua ximana Ngana
Luke1:47 o nzumbi iami ia sanguluka mua Nzambi
Luke1:48 Mukonda muène ua te mesu mu kutola kua mubhikʼê! Talesa
Luke1:49 Mukonda Muteniʼa ioso ua ngi bhange ima iònene; dijina diê di kôla!
Luke1:50 O henda iê ia kalé ku miji ni miji ku thandu dia iá oso a mu xila.
Luke1:51 Ua bhange ima ia nguzu ni lúkuaku luê
Luke1:52 Anʼa jingana ua a tulula ku iandu
Luke1:53 Uezalesa akua nzala ni jimbote
Luke1:54 Ua kuatekesa Izalaiele dia mubhikʼê
Luke1:55 Mukonda ua xinganeka o henda ia kuatela Mbalahamu ni luvualu luê
Luke1:56 Madiia anga ukala ni Nzebele mu jimbeji jitatu. Ki ja-bhu
Luke1:57 Kiki izuua ia Nzebele
Luke1:58 Akua bhata ni jindandu jê
Luke1:59 Kizuua kia kanake anga eza kusaia o kamona. Anga a mesena ku mu ixana dijina dia tatʼâ Zakadiia.
Luke1:60 Manhʼâ-phe u tambuijila
Luke1:61 Akuâ a mu ambela
Luke1:62 Anga a bhalula tatʼâ
Luke1:63 Zakadiia anga u bhinga kadibaia ka kusonekena
Luke1:64 Kathanganʼoko dikanu diê di jikuka
Luke1:65 Jinzukame jê
Luke1:66 Oso muene a ívua
Luke1:67 Zakadiia
Luke1:68 Sakidilenu Ngana
Luke1:69 ua tu zangelekela Mubhuludi ua nguzu phala ku tu bhulula u tundu mu mbutu ia mubhikʼê Davidi—
Luke1:70 kala kia zuela mu kanu dia jipolofeta jê tunde xahulu—
Luke1:71 kuma Nzambi ua tanga ku tu bhulula bhu maku ma jinguma jetu
Luke1:72 uambe kulondekesa o henda ku jitata jetu
Luke1:73 Kia mulôko
Luke1:74 kuila u tu kudila bhu maku ma jinguma jetu
Luke1:75 mu kuzela ni kuiuka bhu pholo iê
Luke1:76 Eie-phe kamona
Luke1:77 ni kuijidisa athuʼê ki kala o kubhuluka
Luke1:78 mukonda Nzambi ietu
Luke1:79 Ni kumuikina oso a xikama mu kuvunda kua kizenji kia kalunga; mbé o kuendesa inama ietu mu njila ia kutululuka.
Luke1:80 Anga o kamona kenda ni kukula
Luke2:1 Mu Izuua iná anga ku tunda ngonge kua Sézalu Nguxi
Luke2:2 O ku soneka kua diangʼuku kua bhiti kioso ki ala Siléniu nguvulu mu Sídia.
Luke2:3 Ene oso anga aia mu ku di sonekesa
Luke2:4 Zuze anga u tunda mu Ngalileia
Luke2:5 Mbata muène mukua muiji ua Davidi. Uaii mu ku di sonekesa kumoxi ni Madiia dia kílemba kiê. O muène uala kiá mu mikutu iiadi.
Luke2:6 Ene kioso ki ala bhenhobho
Luke2:7 Anga u vuala monʼê ua dianga
Luke2:8 Ku jimbandu kuenhʼoko anga ku kala abidi a jimbudi
Luke2:9 Mukunji ua Ngana anga u tukuluka bhu mbandu iâ
Luke2:10 Mukunji-phe ua ambela
Luke2:11 Mbata lelu
Luke2:12 Kiki kiene o kijimbuete kiê: Mu sanga kamona kòfute mu milele
Luke2:13 Muʼanzanzʼumu
Luke2:14 Fuma i kale ia Nzambi mu diulu! O mu ngongo uembu mu ʼaxaxe kʼathu oso a mu uabhela!
Luke2:15 Anga ki bhita kuila
Luke2:16 Anga aia makidikidi
Luke2:17 O kia ka mono
Luke2:18 Oso a kʼivu anga a diuana ima ia a tangela abidi.
Luke2:19 Madiia-phe
Luke2:20 Abidi anga a vutuka ni kutonda ni kuximana Nzambi mu ima ioso ievu
Luke2:21 O kia tena nake dia izuua
Luke2:22 O kia tena izuua ia kubonza adiʼê
Luke2:23 Kala kia ki soneka mu Kitumu kia Ngana kuma
Luke2:24 Anga a bhana ue sata
Luke2:25 Kiki ku kala mu Jeluzaleme diiala diexana Ximinhá. Muenió muthu ua mbote
Luke2:26 Muène-phe a mu ijidisa-kiu kuala Nzumbi Ikôla
Luke2:27 Anga uia mu Tembulu
Luke2:28 muène u mu tambula bhu maku
Luke2:29 Kiki Ngana
Luke2:30 Kuma mesu mami ma mono kiá o ubhulukilu ué
Luke2:31 uene u ua iudika bhu pholo ia akua jixi joso;
Luke2:32 mukengeji u londekesa o njila ia Nzambi ku akua matumbu. Ni kubhana fuma ia mundu ué ua Izalaiele.
Luke2:33 Tatʼâ ni mamʼâ anga a diuana ima Ximinhá iala ku mu tumbula.
Luke2:34 Ximinhá anga u mu benzela
Luke2:35 Eie muène hinu xibhata i ku tubula muẋima uémuène
Luke2:36 Anga bhu kala ue Ana
Luke2:37 Hanji-phe kia xala mutudi
Luke2:38 Kithanganʼokio anga u tukuluka bhenhabha
Luke2:39 O kia zubha kubhanga ioso ia tokala mu Kitumu kia Ngana
Luke2:40 O mona anga u kala mù kula ni kusuina ni kuvula o kuijiia

Luke9:39 Nzumbi iaiibha-phe iene ku mu kuata
Luke9:40 Nga diondele jixibulu jé ku i tundisa

Luke9:42 Mona kioso-phe ki ala mù kuiza

Luke9:45 Ene-phe kizuelu kiókio ka kʼivu

Luke9:54 O jixibulu jê

Luke10:7 Hé mu kala mʼonzo muenhomo

Luke10:15 Eie ue
Luke10:16 Bhenhobho Jezú anga u ambela o maxibuluʼê
Luke10:17 O makuinhi sambuadi ni kiiadi anga a vutuka ni kusanguluka
Luke10:18 Muène ua ambela uixi: Kiene muene! Eme nga muene Satana ua laúka ku diulu kala nzaji.
Luke10:19 Talenu
Luke10:20 Maji-phe kana kusangulukila o madimonho ma mi tolokela; inda mu sangulukila o majina menu kuma a ma soneka ku diulu.
Luke10:21 Kumbi dienhódio Jezú u sanguluka kiavulu mua Nzumbi Ikôla
Luke10:22 Ima ioso a ngi bhana-iu eme kuala Tata iami. Kana muthu-phe uejiia se Mona mukua-hi; ua muijiia ngó muène Tata. Kana muthu ue uejiia se Tata mukuahi; ua muʼijiia ngó muène Mona
Luke10:23 Bhenhobho Jezú anga u sakukila kuala o jixibulu jê
Luke10:24 Mukonda ngi mi ambela kuma
Luke10:25 Anga bhu balumuka mesene ia Kitumu
Luke10:26 Kuala Jezú: A soneka kiebhi mu Kitumu? Eie uene mù tanga kiebhi?
Luke10:27 Muéne u vutula
Luke10:28 Kuala Jezú: Eie ua vutula kiambote! Bhanga kienhókio
Luke10:29 O mesene ia Kitumu-phe mukonda uandala ku di bhembula
Luke10:30 Jezú anga u vutula
Luke10:31 Sai ue nganga u kulumukina o njila ienhoio
Luke10:32 Levita ue kiene kimoxi. Kia tula bhenhabha
Luke10:33 Bhu kala-phe mukua Samádia
Luke10:34 Anga u mu bhixila
Luke10:35 Ki kuákie
Luke10:36 Jezú anga uibhula o mesene ia Kitumu
Luke10:37 Mesene ia Kitumu uixi: Uoso ua mu kuatela o henda. Jezú anga u mu ambela
Luke10:38 Jezú ni maxibulu mê kia kala mu kuenda njila
Luke10:39 Marta ukala ue ni phangʼiê dijina diê Madiia
Luke10:40 Marta anga u juuala ni kukalakala kiavulu. Bhenhobho
Luke10:41 Ngana-phe ua mu vutuila
Luke10:42 Maji kia kate-phe ngó kima kimoxi: Madiia ua solo o mbandu iambote
Luke11:1 Kizuuʼiki
Luke11:2 Jezú anga u ambela
Luke11:3 Tu bhane o kúdia kuetu kua kizuua ni kizuua ku tua bhindamena.
Luke11:4 Tu loloke o ikuma ietu; mukonda etu uetu tu loloka uoso u tu sombola. Ku tu ehele ku di bhala mu ku tu diangula.
Luke11:5 Jezú u a ambela dingi
Luke11:6 Mukonda kamba diami ua ngi tula ku bhata
Luke11:7 Muenió-phe
Luke11:8 Anga mukuá u jiza ni kubunda. Ngi mi ambela
Luke11:9 Eme-phe ue ngi mi ambela: Bhingenu
Luke11:10 Mukonda uoso u bhinga
Luke11:11 Tata kuẋi mudienu
Luke11:12 Mba ua mu bhingi diiaki
Luke11:13 Enu-phe
Luke11:14 Jezú anga u kala mù tundisa o dimonho dia bhangesele muthu kukala dibubu
Luke11:15 Maji amukuá mudiâ-phe a zuela
Luke11:16 Amukuá mu ku mu fikisa
Luke11:17 Maji
Luke11:18 O utuminu ua Satana-phe
Luke11:19 O ki kala eme nga-lu tundisa o madimonho mu nguzu ia Belezebubu
Luke11:20 O ki ki kala-phe eme nga tundisa madimonho mu mulembu ua Nzambi
Luke11:21 Kindanda-phe se kiala ni uta
Luke11:22 Se kuiza-phe kindanda kia mukuá kia mu tundu ku nguzu
Luke11:23 Uoso ka di te kumoxi ni Eme
Luke11:24 O Ngana Jezú hé u zuela dingi
Luke11:25 O kia vutuka
Luke11:26 Bhenhobho uia
Luke11:27 Muène kioso kia kexi kuzuela imʼiíi
Luke11:28 Muène-phe u vutula
Luke11:29 Kia bhongoloka o kifuẋi
Luke11:30 Mukuâ ni Jona kia bilukile kijimbuete ku akua Ninive
Luke11:31 Mu kizuua kia kufundisa
Luke11:32 Mu kizuua kia kufundisa
Luke11:33 Jezú anga u kuata dingi kuzuela
Luke11:34 O kimuiku kia mukutu-phe
Luke11:35 Alukenu-phe phala o kumuika ku muala-na-ku moxi
Luke11:36 Mukonda o mukutu uenu uoso se ua di muika
Luke11:37 Jezú kia kexile hanji mu zuela
Luke11:38 Falizeu-phe ua mu diuana kia mu mono kuila ka dianga hanji ku di sukula.
Luke11:39 Ngana Jezú anga u mu ambela
Luke11:40 Ioua! Uoso ua bhange mbandu ia kanga
Luke11:41 Kala kiki
Luke11:42 Lamba dienu-phe
Luke11:43 Lamba dienu
Luke11:44 Lamba dienu! Kuma mua di fangana jimbila ki ja moneka ku mesu
Luke11:45 Bhenhobho
Luke11:46 Muène-phe u vutula
Luke11:47 Lamba dienu! Mukonda mu tunga ni uhete uoso o jimbila ja jipolofeta
Luke11:48 Kienhiki muala mu jimbangi
Luke11:49 Mukonda dia kiki
Luke11:50 Kienhiki ki bhangesa kuila o manhinga moso ma jipolofeta ma xamujuka mu ngongo
Luke11:51 Tunde ku manhinga ma kúfua kua Abele
Luke11:52 Lamba dienu
Luke11:53 Jezú kia zubha ku tunda muenhomo
Luke11:54 Kuma a mu batamena phala ku mu kuata mu kima kioso-kioso ki tunda mu dikanu diê.
Luke12:1 Bhu ʼaxaxiʼabha
Luke12:2 Kana kima-phe kiòbateke
Luke12:3 Mukonda ima ioso i mua zuelela mu ʼavundu
Luke12:4 Jezú anga uamba dingi
Luke12:5 Eme ngi mi londekesa-phe uoso mu mu kuatela uôma: Mu kala ni uôma ua Nzambi
Luke12:6 Abha
Luke12:7 Enu-phe
Luke12:8 Ngi mi ambela: Uoso u ngi xikana eme bhu pholo ia athu
Luke12:9 Maji uoso-phe u ngi di tuna bhu pholo ia athu
Luke12:10 Uoso u zuela maka maiibha
Luke12:11 Hinu kia mi bheka mu ku mi fundisa mu malombe
Luke12:12 Mukonda o Nzumbi Ikôla
Luke12:13 Kuala muthu mu kifuẋi
Luke12:14 Jezú-phe uixi: Ialʼé
Luke12:15 Uambela enhoso
Luke12:16 Jezú anga ua tela kifika
Luke12:17 Muène anga u kala mù banza ni muẋima uê
Luke12:18 Uixi: Ngi bhanga kiki: Ngi bula o inganja iami
Luke12:19 Anga ngambela o muenhu uami
Luke12:20 Nzambi-phe ua mu ambela
Luke12:21 Ngana Jezú anga u lombolola
Luke12:22 Jezú anga uambela jixibulu jê
Luke12:23 Kuma o muenhu kota
Luke12:24 Xinganekenu o ilombelombe
Luke12:25 Nanhi ue mudienu
Luke12:26 Kama-phe kʼònjongo-njongo se mua ka lémbua
Luke12:27 Talenu o itulu ku mukáu
Luke12:28 Nzambi-phe kia zuika kiki o iangu ku mukáu
Luke12:29 Kala kiki
Luke12:30 Kuma ima ioso iíi iene ia mu sota o ifuẋi ia mu ngongo. Enu-phe Tata ienu ua kʼijiia kuma ima iíi mua i bhindamena.
Luke12:31 Diangenu-phe o ku ta Utuminu ua Nzambi mu mienhu ienu
Luke12:32 Jezú uixi dingi: Ki mu kale ni uôma
Luke12:33 Sumbisenu ioso i muala na-iu
Luke12:34 Mukonda kuoso kua mi kala o jimbongo
Luke12:35 Ngana Jezú anga ua ambela dingi uixi: Di iudikienu
Luke12:36 Mu di fangana kala athu a kinga ngana iâ
Luke12:37 Azediua abhika ió
Luke12:38 Se muène ueza mu masungidilu ma kaiadi
Luke12:39 Ijiienu-kiu kuila
Luke12:40 Enu uenu di iudikienu; mukonda o kumbi ki mu di fika
Luke12:41 Phetele anga u mu ambela
Luke12:42 Ngana Jezú
Luke12:43 Mubhika ió u zediua kʼiza ngana iê ni a mu sange ua kumbidila!
Luke12:44 Ngi mi ambela kidi
Luke12:45 Mubhika ió-phe
Luke12:46 Ngana ia mubhika ió ua-nda kuiza kizuua muène ka ki fika
Luke12:47 Kuma o mubhika ió
Luke12:48 Maji uoso-phe ka kʼijiia
Luke12:49 Ngana Jezú hé u zuela dingi
Luke12:50 Sai-phe batizu ia bhingi ku ngi batizala na-iu; muẋima ua ngi suku
Luke12:51 Mua fika ngeza mù bheka kutululuka mu ngongo? Nga mi ambela
Luke12:52 Mukonda
Luke12:53 Tata u zoka ni mona
Luke12:54 Jezú anga uambela dingi o kifuẋi
Luke12:55 Ki mu mona mulenge u tunda ku sulu ni kubhusa
Luke12:56 Akua mangonha! Enu muejiia kutungula o pholo ia ixi ni diulu
Luke12:57 Muène anga u a zuelela dingi
Luke12:58 Ki u kala mu kuia ni nguma ié kua xefe
Luke12:59 Ngi ku ambela kuma

Luke13:7 Anga uambela o kidimakaji kiê

Luke13:22 Jezú anga u bhita mu jimbanza ni ku mabhata mu kulonga
Luke13:23 Muthu uamukuá anga u mu ibhula

Luke14:6 Anga a lémbua ku mu vutuila o maka enhá.

Luke14:10 Inda se a kuixana
Luke14:11 Mukonda uoso u di zangula

Luke14:14 nda u kale ni kuzediua. Mukonda ene ka tena ku ku vutuila
Luke14:15 Ki evu o makʼama

Luke16:2 Anga u mu ixana

Luke16:4 Ah! Ngejiia kiá kioso ki ngi bhanga
Luke16:5 Anga uixana akua makongo ma muadiʼê
Luke16:6 Uixi: Hâma ia ithu ia maji. Kuala kimbadi: Tambula o mukanda ué; xikama malusolo
Luke16:7 Anga uambela ua mukuá
Luke16:8 Ngana iê anga u ximana o kimbadi kia mangonha

Luke16:10 Uoso u bhanga kidi mu kama kòfele
Luke16:11 Kuma enu se mua kambe kubhanga kidi mu umvuama ua mangonha ma mundu iú

Luke18:3 Anga mu mbanza muenhomo mu kala ni mutudi ua muhatu
Luke18:4 Kithangana kiavulu muene
Luke18:5 Maji
Luke18:6 Ngana uixi: Ívua kia zuela o mufundixi ió ua mangonha.
Luke18:7 Abha
Luke18:8 Ngi mi ambela-phe kuma u a fundisa lusolo
Luke18:9 Jezú anga u ta dingi o kifikʼiki
Luke18:10 Mala kiiadi a bandele mu Tembulu mu kusamba. Umoxi falizeu

Luke18:12 Eme ngi jila luiadi ku semana; ngi bhana kua Nzambi o dijimu dia ima iami ioso i ngi mona.

Luke18:14 Ngi mi ambela kuma

Luke18:22 Kia kʼivu

Luke19:6 Muène anga u lenguluka
Luke19:7 Ene oso-phe kia ki mono

John3:19 O kuêla kuenhuku: O mukengeji ueza mu ngongo

John3:21 Maji oso-phe a bhanga o kidi

John3:24 (Mukonda Nzuá kiluua a mu ta muʼaleia).

John4:1 Ngana kia zubha ku kʼijiia kuma jifalizeu a mu ivu ni kubhanga ni kubatizala jixibulu javulu
John4:2 (Sumbala Jezú ki muène ua kexile mù batizala
John4:3 Muène ua xi mu Judeia
John4:4 Mu njila kia mu bhingi kubhita mu Samádia.
John4:5 Anga u tula bhu sanzala ia Samádia i exana Sikale
John4:6 Bhene bhu kixima kia Jakobo. Jezú kuma ua tundu ni kubhuila mu njila
John4:7 Muhatu ua mukua Samádia anga uiza mù sunga menha. Jezú ua mu ambela
John4:8 (Kuma jixibulu jê jaii mu sanzala mu sumba kúdia.)
John4:9 Muhatu ua mukua Samádia
John4:10 Jezú anga u mu vutuila
John4:11 Muhatu
John4:12 Tatʼetu Jakobo

John4:24 Nzambi Nzumbi
John4:25 Muhatu ua mu ambela
John4:26 Kuala Jezú: Eme-muène ngi Kristu

John4:29 Zenu mu sange diiala dia ngi tangela ima ioso i nga bhanga jinga. O kuila ki mùene Kristu?

John4:36 Uoso u kalakala
John4:37 Mbata

John4:40 Ene akua Samádia kia zubha kusanga Jezú

John6:1 Kia bhiti imʼiíi Jezú u zaúka ku sámbua dia kizanga kia Ngalileia (a kʼixana ue kia Tibeliiade).

John6:3 Jezú anga u banda ku mulundu
John6:4 Kienhókio o Phasu
John6:5 Jezú kia bhetula o mesu
John6:6 (Jezú uambela Filipe
John6:7 Felipe uixi: Jimbolo ja hama jiiadi ja itadi ki ji soko
John6:8 Xibulu iê imoxi
John6:9 Bhabha bhuala kamunzangala uala ni jimbolo jitanu ni mbiji jiiadi; ji soka-hi-phe ku mundu uosʼú?
John6:10 Jezú uixi: Ambelenu o mundu uoso a xikame bhoxi. (Bhu kididi bhenhobho sai-bhu iangu iavulu.) Anga a xikama; ku midi jitanu ja athu kua kambe ngó mù kutena.
John6:11 Jezú anga u tambula o jimbolo
John6:12 Kia zubha kuikuta
John6:13 Ene anga a tu nona. Anga ezalesa kuinhi dia ngalu ni kiiadi
John6:14 Athu kia zubha kumona o kidiuanu kia bhange Jezú
John6:15 Jezú kia mono kuma andala kuiza ku mu ambata mu nguzu ni ku mu bhanga sobha
John6:16 Kutula mu ngoloxi
John6:17 Anga a di longa mu mbáluku
John6:18 Anga kuiza kitembu kiavulu
John6:19 Ene kia zubha kulemala kiá musanzu ua kilómetro jitanu mba jisamanu
John6:20 Muène-phe
John6:21 Ene anga a mu tambulula mu mbáluku ni kusanguluka
John6:22 O kifuẋi kia xala ku sámbua dia kizanga
John6:23 sumbala ki kuákie kuejile jibáluku jamukuá ja tundu mu Tibeliiade
John6:24 athu kia mono kuma ni Jezú ni jixibulu jê
John6:25 O kia zubha ku mu sanga ku sámbua
John6:26 Jezú ua a vutuila

John6:28 Ene a mu ambela
John6:29 Kuala Jezú: O kikalakalu kia Nzambi kienhiki
John6:30 Exi: Eie-phe u bhanga kisuma kiahi
John6:31 Jitata jetu ja dile maná mu ixi ia isekele

John6:33 Mukonda o mbolo ia bhana Nzambi
John6:34 Ene a mu ambela
John6:35 Jezú ua ambela
John6:36 Nga mi ambela-phe kiá
John6:37 Oso a ngi bhana kuala Tata
John6:38 Mbata eme nga tuluka mu diulu
John6:39 O vondadi-phe ia ió uoso ua ngi tumu
John6:40 Mbata o vondadi ia Tata iami ienhiʼii: Kuila uoso ua tale ku Mona
John6:41 Jijudé bhenhobho ji kuata ku mu longolola
John6:42 Exi: Muenhú ki muène Jezú
John6:43 Jezú ua a vutuila

John6:45 Kiôsoneke mu divulu dia Jipolofeta

John6:48 Eme ngi mbolo ia muenhu.

John6:54 Uoso u dia xitu iami
John6:55 Kuma o xitu iami kúdia kua kidi
John6:56 Uoso u dia o xitu iami
John6:57 Kala eme kia ngi tumu Tata iami uala ni muenhu
John6:58 Iíi iene o mbolo ia tuluka mu diulu. Ki i soko dingi ni mbolo jitata jenu ia dile

John10:1 Jezú uixi: Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Uoso ka bokuena bhu dibhitu mu kibhanga kia jimbudi
John10:2 Uoso-phe u bokuena bhu dibhitu
John10:3 Mukua-dibhitu u mu jikuila. O jimbudi jívua o dízui diê. Uixana jimbudi ja mu tokala
John10:4 Kia tundisa o jimbudi jê joso
John10:5 Muthu uengi ki ji mu kaiela
John10:6 Jezú ua a tela kifikʼ iki
John10:7 Jezú anga ua ambela dingi
John10:8 Oso a ngi diangelele
John10:9 Eme ngi dibhitu. Se muthu u bokuena ko-kuami
John10:10 O muíi uiza ngó mu kunhana
John10:11 Eme ngi mubidi uambote. O mubidi uambote
John10:12 O mukua-nganhu
John10:13 Mukua-nganhu u lenga
John10:14 Eme ngi mubidi uambote. Mukuâ ni Tata kia ngʼijiia
John10:15 Eme-phe o jimbudi ngi ji bhela o muenhu uami bhu kididi.

John20:12 Anga u mona ji-anjo jiiadi
John20:13 Jene ji mu ibhula
John20:14 Kiene kia zuela kiki
John20:15 Jezú anga u mu ibhula
John20:16 Kuala Jezú: Madiia! Muène ua sakuka
John20:17 Jezú u mu ambela
John20:18 Madiia dia Manda
John20:19 Kutula mu ngoloxi
John20:20 Kia zubha kuzuela kiki
John20:21 Jezú anga ua ambela dingi
John20:22 O kia zuela kiki
John20:23 Muthu uoso mu mu loloka ituxi iê
John20:24 Tomé
John20:25 Jixibulu ni akuá anga a mu tangela
John20:26 Kia bhiti nake dia izuua
John20:27 Anga uambela Tomé
John20:28 Tomé uetaiua
John20:29 Jezú uixi: Mukonda ua ngi mono
John20:30 Sai dingi madiuanu mavulu ma bhangele Jezú bhu pholo ia jixibulu
John20:31 Maji imʼiíi-phe iòsoneke
John21:1 Kia bhiti kiki
John21:2 Ua a tukulukila kiki; Ximá Phetele
John21:3 Ximá Phetele anga uambela akuá
John21:4 Kúkia ni kimene-phe
John21:5 Jezú anga ua ambela
John21:6 Muene uixi: Kuzenu uanda ku mbandu ia kadilu ia bote
John21:7 Xibulu a mu zola kuala Jezú
John21:8 Jixibulu jamukuá-phe
John21:9 O kia zubha kutomboka ku kanga
John21:10 Jezú uixi: Bekenu-ku
John21:11 Ximá Phetele anga u di longa
John21:12 Jezú anga ua ambela
John21:13 Jezú anga uiza
John21:14 Lulu tatu kiá
John21:15 Bhenhobho kia zubha kudiaúla
John21:16 Anga u mu ambela lua kaiadi
John21:17 Anga u mu ambela lua katatu
John21:18 Kidi kiene ngi ku ambela: Ki ua kexile u munzangala
John21:19 Mùene ua zuela kiki
John21:20 Phetele anga u sakuka
John21:21 Phetele kia mu mono
John21:22 Jezú
John21:23 Kizuelu kiki anga ki sambuka mu jiphange joso ja xikana Jezú
John21:24 Muenhó muene o xibulu ua bhana umbangi uê ua ima ioso iíi; o ima ioso iu ua i soneka. Etu-phe tuejiia kuma o umbangi uê ua kidi.
John21:25 Sai dingi ima ia mukuá iavulu ia bhangele Jezú. Se kuila ioso a i soneka
Acts1:1 Mu divulu diami dia dianga
Acts1:2 katé bhu kizuua kia mu tambula bhulu. Muène
Acts1:3 Kuma kia zubhile kubhita ni phaxi ia kúfua kuê
Acts1:4 O kizuua kia bhongolokele luamukuá
Acts1:5 Kuma Nzuá ua mi batizala ni menha
Acts1:6 Kioso Jipoxolo enʼiá kia bhongoloka ni Jezú
Acts1:7 Kuala muène: Enu ka mi bhana-kiu
Acts1:8 Maji enu-phe muandu tambula kutena
Acts1:9 O kia zubhile kuzuela imʼ iíi
Acts1:10 Ene-phe hanji ki a kuata kutonginina bhulu
Acts1:11 Exi: Enu mu akua Ngalieleia
Acts1:12 Jipoxolo kienhókio anga a vutuka ku Mulundu a uixana ua Midiva
Acts1:13 O kia zibha kubhiẋila
Acts1:14 Ene oso-â anga a jijila ni muẋima umoxi o kusamba ni kubhinga
Acts1:15 Ki bhua bhiti tu-izuua
Acts1:16 Enu akuetu mu jiphange
Acts1:17 Kuma muène ua tokalele mudietu
Acts1:18 Diialʼ odio-phe ua sumbile mukáu ni kazabu ka mu bhana mu kubhukumuka kuê. O mu mukáu uenʼ ió
Acts1:19 Kienʼ iki anga ki fumana ku akua bhata oso mu Jeluzaleme. Kiene kia bhangesa mukáu uenʼió ku u luka mu dimi dia ene
Acts1:20 Mbata kiene kiòsoneke mu divulu dia Jisalamu
Acts1:21 Uila kiki
Acts1:22 tunde bhu batizu ia Nzuá
Acts1:23 Anga a ta athu kiiadi ku pholo: Zuze a mu ixana Barsaba
Acts1:24 Anga a samba
Acts1:25 phala a tambule kididi mu kukalakala ni etu ku ukunji iú ua upoxolo. Mukonda o Juda kikalakalu ʼiki ua ki tokoka
Acts1:26 Anga a a tela jisorte phala bhu kiiadʼ iki kutungula-bhu umoxi. O Sorte hé i kuata Matiia
Acts2:1 Kizuua kia Pendekoxi ki kia zubhile kubhiẋila
Acts2:2 Anga a tukumuka ku diulu kua dʼivisa kala kitembu kiasuina kiala mu tuluka ni kuona
Acts2:3 Kua a tukulukila ni madimi ma di uanununa kala túbhia tuala kulekujuka
Acts2:4 Ene oso anga ezala ni Nzumbi Ikôla
Acts2:5 Kienhókio mu Jeluzaleme mua tula Jijudé
Acts2:6 O Kienʼ iki ki kia fumana
Acts2:7 Ene oso anga a bhana mu kanu
Acts2:8 Tuala mu kuivua-phe kiebhi
Acts2:9 Sumbala etu oso tueza
Acts2:10 mu Fidíjia ni mu Pamfídia
Acts2:11 Ni akua Keleta
Acts2:12 Ene oso anga a diuana
Acts2:13 Amoxi-phe a zombala
Acts2:14 Phetele-phe ki emana ni akuâ
Acts2:15 Athu iá muala ku a fika kuila a kodiua? Kana! Athu iá ki mu a fike kukodiua
Acts2:16 Maji o kia mu bhitʼ iki-phe
Acts2:17 Talesenu
Acts2:18 Ni ku thandu dia abhika ami a mala ni a ahatu

Acts2:20 Dikumbi dia kà kituka usuku
Acts2:21 Kienhokio-phe ki bhita kuma

Acts2:23 muenʼió

Acts2:39 Kuma o kizuelu kiê kia bhana
Acts2:40 Phetele anga u kala mu ku a bhana umbangi
Acts2:41 Bhenhobho-phe avulu a tambulula o njimbu ia Phetele
Acts2:42 Ene oso anga a kolokota mu ulongelu ua jipoxolo
Acts2:43 Kana muenhu bhenhobho ua kambe kukala ni uôma mba ujitu ua jipoxolo. O ene anga a kala mu bhanga isuma ni ijimbuete iavulu.
Acts2:44 Ene oso a xikana hé a kala kumoxi
Acts2:45 O jixi jâ
Acts2:46 Izuua ioso a jiza ni muẋima umoxi o kubhongoloka jinga mu Tembulu ni kubukula o mbolo ku bhata

Acts3:1 Kiki-phe

Acts6:4 Etu-phe
Acts6:5 Hundu iii ia jipoxolo anga i uabhela mundu uoso. Anga a sola Xitevá
Acts6:6 Eniá anga a a bheka bhu pholo ia Jipoxolo
Acts6:7 Kienʼiki maka ma Nzambi anga ma kuata ku sambuka. O mundu ua jixibulu hé u sokoloka kiavulu mu Jeluzaleme. Ku kala ue ni kibuka kia dikota kia jinganga a xikana kutumaka kixikanuʼiki.

Acts7:2 Kuala Xitevá: Enu jiphange mu akuetu

Acts7:4 Kieniokio muène a nga u tunda mʼoxi ia akua Kaladeia
Acts7:5 Nzambi muène
Acts7:6 Nzambi anga u mu tangela kiki
Acts7:7 Nzambi anga uila dingi
Acts7:8 Nzambi anga u bhana Mbalahamu o kikutu kia kusaia
Acts7:9 O jikukululu kia kuata dixinga dia Zuze
Acts7:10 Hé u mu kudila mu malamba mê moso. O Zuze kia tukuluka kua Falaó
Acts7:11 Kieniokio-phe kukala nzala i bhita mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu
Acts7:12 Mu kubhita thembu
Acts7:13 Ku njila ia kaiadi Zuze u di tukulula ku jiphange jê
Acts7:14 Zuze anga u tuma kutakana tatʼâ Jakobo
Acts7:15 Jakobo anga u kulumuka mu Ijitu
Acts7:16 Imbi iâ anga a i ambata hé eza na-iu mu Xikeme. Anga a a funda mu mbila ia sumbile Mbalahamu
Acts7:17 Kia zukama-phe mu thembu ia Nzambi kukumbidila o kikutu kia tele ni mulôko bhu kaxi kê ni Mbalahamu
Acts7:18 Hé a kala kieniokio katé ki eza-ku sobha iengi mu Ijitu
Acts7:19 Sobha muenʼiú anga u dimukina muiji uetu
Acts7:20 O mu thembu ieneʼ oio
Acts7:21 Maji o kia mu texi
Acts7:22 Kieniokio Mozé anga a mu longa unjimu uoso ua akua Ijitu
Acts7:23 Xitevá uambe dingi
Acts7:24 O kia sange-ku muthu ua tokala ku muiji uê ala ku mu bhanga usueia
Acts7:25 Mozé muene ua fikile kuma o phange jê a kʼijiia ue kuma Nzambi
Acts7:26 Kukia ni kimene
Acts7:27 Iú-phe
Acts7:28 Kifua eie uandala u ngi jibha uila ki ua jibha mukua Ijitu mazá?
Acts7:29 Mozé anga u lenga ki evu o kizueluʼiki
Acts7:30 Kia zubha kubhanga-ku makuinhi a uana a muvu
Acts7:31 Mozé kia ki mono
Acts7:32 Eme ngi Nzambi ia jitata jenu
Acts7:33 Bhenhobho Ngana u mu ambela
Acts7:34 Nga tongolola muene o phaxi ia mundu uami mu Ijitu
Acts7:35 Xitevá uamba dingi uixi: Mozé imoxi iii
Acts7:36 Muene muthu ua katula anʼ a Izalaiele mu Ijitu
Acts7:37 Muene Mozé umoxiʼú u tangela anʼ a Izalaiele
Acts7:38 Mozé muene anga u di bhongolola ni mundu ua Izalaiele mu kikangalakata
Acts7:39 Muenʼiú-phe jitata jetu ka ẋikinine ku di tuma-nê
Acts7:40 Hé a tangela Alá
Acts7:41 Anga a bhanga kidifua kia monʼ a ngombe mu izuuʼomo
Acts7:42 Maji o Nzambi-phe ua a sondoloka
Acts7:43 Oko mua nhata jinga o balaka ia Moloko
Acts7:44 Jitata jetu ja kexile ni balaka ia kikutu kia Nzambi mu kikangalakata. Balaka ieneʼoio a i kalakala kala kia lekela muène Nzambi anga u tangela Mozé kuma a i bhange
Acts7:45 O iene kia i lundula o jitata jetu
Acts7:46 Davidi iú
Acts7:47 Maji Salomá-phe muène ua tungu onzo ia Nzambi.
Acts7:48 Sumbala Ió Uasuka ku Ukota kene kutunga mu jinzu jokalakale ni maku ma muthu
Acts7:49 Diulu kiandu kiami
Acts7:50 Manhi lukuaku luami ki luene lua bhange o imbamba ioso iii?
Acts7:51 Mu kuzumbuka Xitevá
Acts7:52 Polofeta kuẋi jitata jenu ja kambele ku mu zukutisa? Ene a jibha jinga o akunji a Nzambi
Acts7:53 Enu mua tambula o Kitumu mu kusedivila kua ji-anju
Acts7:54 Kienʼiki ene oso a tokala ku Kionge kia Jitata ki evu o makʼ ama
Acts7:55 Maji muène-phe uezala ni Nzumbi Ikôla
Acts7:56 Bhenhobho uixi: Talesenu! Nga mono diulu dia jikuka
Acts7:57 Ene-phe matui a ma jika
Acts7:58 A mu kukila ku kanga dia mbonge
Acts7:59 Ene kioso kia mu bûba Xitevá ni matadi
Acts7:60 Anga u fukama
Acts8:1 Saúlu ue ua ki mono kuuabha
Acts8:2 Ku kala athu a ujitu a fûnda Xitevá
Acts8:3 Saúlu-phe u kala mu muanga o Ngeleja
Acts8:4 Eniá-phe
Acts8:5 Felipe anga u kulumuka mu mbonge ia Samádia ni kukolela athu koko o Njimbu ia Kristu.
Acts8:6 Ifuẋiʼoio ni muenhu umoxi a tambulula imbamba ioso ia a tangela Felipe. Ene oso a kala mu ku mu ivua kiambote anga a mona isumua ia bhange.
Acts8:7 Kuma ku kala athu avulu o nzumbi jaiibha jala na-ju ji tunda ni ku di kola; avulu a kate kila
Acts8:8 Kienʼiki
Acts8:9 Bhu kala-phe muthu bhenhobho
Acts8:10 Muenʼiú ene oso a tungu mu mbonge
Acts8:11 Ene oso a mu tambulula jinga
Acts8:12 Maji ene ki a xikana Felipe-phe
Acts8:13 Ni muene Ximá
Acts8:14 Kiki o Jipoxolo ja xala mu Jeluzaleme
Acts8:15 Ene kia zubha kutula
Acts8:16 Kuma o Nzumbi Ikôla kiluua a tuluka ku thandu dia muthu mudiâ. Ene a a batizala ngó mu dijina dia Ngana Jezú.
Acts8:17 Anga o Phetele ni Nzuá a tula maku ku thanduʼ a mitue iâ
Acts8:18 Kiki Ximá kia mono kuma Nzumbi Ikôla a mu tambuila mu ku a tula maku ma Jipoxolo ku mitue iâ
Acts8:19 Eme uami ngi bhanienu o kutenʼ uku
Acts8:20 Phetele-phe ua mu ambela
Acts8:21 Eie mu Njimbu iii kuala-mu ni kibatu mba kididi
Acts8:22 Diela kindala o kubhuma kué kuku
Acts8:23 Kuma nga ku mono uezala mu luimbi
Acts8:24 Ximá bhenhobho u kumbulula Phetele ni Nzuá
Acts8:25 Phetele ni Nzuá bheniobho kia zubha kubhana umbangi
Acts8:26 Mukunji ua Ngana-phe u ambela Felipe
Acts8:27 Muene u di iudika
Acts8:28 Muene ua xikama mu dikalu diê
Acts8:29 Nzumbi Ikôla anga u ambela Felipe uixi: Bhixila
Acts8:30 Felipe anga u lengela ku dikalu
Acts8:31 Kuala muène: Ki ngala kutanga ki ngi jimbulukila kiebhi
Acts8:32 O kibatu kia maka mu Mikanda ia Ngana muala kutanga Ngolambole
Acts8:33 A mu sebulula mu kufunda
Acts8:34 Ngolambole anga u kumbulula
Acts8:35 Mu ku mu lomboluela Felipe anga u kuata kuzuela
Acts8:36 O ki aia ni kuenda mu njila
Acts8:37 Felipe

Acts8:39 O ki a kala mu zauka mu menha

Acts9:1 Saúlu-phe hanji a zumina jixibulu ja Ngana
Acts9:2 u mu bhinga mikanda ia kuia na-iu ku malombe mua mu sambela o Jijudé mu Damásku
Acts9:3 O kia kala mu kuenda
Acts9:4 Muene ua di bhale bhoxi
Acts9:5 Kuala muène: Eie nanhi
Acts9:6 Muene-phe ni kuteketa ni kudiuana
Acts9:7 Bheniobho athu ala kuenda ni Saúlu emana ni kimbuua
Acts9:8 Saúlu anga u balumuka bhoxi; o kia tona mesu
Acts9:9 Anga u bhanga izuua itatu ku ufofo
Acts9:10 Mu Damásku-phe mu kala xibulu ia Jezú
Acts9:11 Kuala Ngana: Balumuka
Acts9:12 o mu kusamba ua mono muthu dijina diê Ananiia
Acts9:13 Ananiia-phe u kumbulula
Acts9:14 O kiki ua mu kuiza kunu ku Damásku mukonda ua tambula kusuina ku jinganga ja makota
Acts9:15 Maji Ngana u ambela Ananiia
Acts9:16 Eme-muène ngi mu longesa o jiphaxi javulu ja bhingi kuila muène u ji bhita mukonda dia dijina diami.
Acts9:17 Ananiia anga u katuka

Acts9:19 Bhenhobho
Acts9:20 Muene kithanganʼ okio
Acts9:21 Oso a mu ivua jinga anga a diuana
Acts9:22 Saúlu-phe u suina dingi kiavulu mu kuzuela ni kutena. O Jijudé ja akua Damásku anga u ji belesa ku maka
Acts9:23 Kia zubha kubhita izuua iavulu
Acts9:24 Saúlu anga uivua o ndunge iâ. Mukonda ene a kexi mu kulangidila o mielu ioso ia mbonge
Acts9:25 Kizuua kimoxi
Acts9:26 Saúlu anga uia
Acts9:27 Barnabé-phe uiza ku mu kuatekesa
Acts9:28 Kia bhiti kiki
Acts9:29 Jijudé ja akua Ngelexa anga u zuela-nâ

Acts9:32 Anga ki bhita kuma
Acts9:33 Anga u sanga-mu muthu diiala dijina diê Eneia

Acts9:35 Bhenhobho oso a tungu mu Lida
Acts9:36 Kiki ku Jopa ku kala xibulu ia muhatu dijina diê Tabita. (Mu Ngeleku ku di lombolola ela: Kasexi). Muhatu iú ua vula jimbote ni jimola jene kubhanga mu kukuatekesa o jingadiama.

Acts9:38 Kuma bhu Lida bhua zukama ni bhu Jopa

Acts11:1 Kiki jipoxolo ni jiphange ku Judeia a kʼ ivua kuila akua matumbu a tambula ue o maka ma Nzambi.

Acts11:3 exi: Eie ua bokona
Acts11:4 Phetele-phe u matekena bhua tundu o maka
Acts11:5 Eme nga kexile mu mbonge ia Jopa mu kusamba
Acts11:6 Ki nga zambula o mesu

Acts11:9 Dizui ku diulu anga di ngi kumbulula dingi

Acts11:12 O Nzumbi ia Nzambi anga u ngi longesa kuia-nâ

Acts11:21 O lukuaku lua Ngana anga lu kala-nâ

Acts14:1 Anga kibhita dingi mu Ikônio
Acts14:2 Maji o Jijudé-phe
Acts14:3 Kienʼiki Jipoxolo anga a bhanga thembu iavulu mu Ikônio mueniomo. Ene a bhua uôma ni kutanga o maka ma Ngana. Muène Ngana anga u kala mbangi ia maka ma kiadi kiê
Acts14:4 O mu mbonge o mundu ua akua bhata anga u muangunuka. Ia a di bande ku Jijudé
Acts14:5 Jijudé-phe
Acts14:6 O Phaulu ni Barnabé hé a kʼ ivua
Acts14:7 Anga a longa o Maka Mambote kuenioko.
Acts14:8 Ku Listra anga ku kala muthu ua xikama jinga mu nzunga
Acts14:9 Muenʼ iú anga uivua Phaulu uala kuta maka. Phaulu kia mu edi sûi
Acts14:10 Hé u mu ambela ni dizui diasuina

Acts14:16 Nzambi muène mʼ okulu uehela akua-jixi joso kuenda kioso kia a tumu o miẋima iâ.
Acts14:17 Maji mu thembu joso Nzambi ka kambele-phe ku dʼ idikiza kioso Muène kiene
Acts14:18 Sumbala-phe kiene
Acts14:19 Kueniuku-phe ue kueza Jijudé ji tunda ku Andiioka ni ku Ikônio. Anga a bhomba mundu
Acts14:20 Maji kioso-phe kia mu imanena o jixibulu
Acts14:21 O kia zubha kulonga o Maka Mambote mu mbongeʼ omo
Acts14:22 Ene anga a kala mu kukolesa o miẋima ia jixibulu ni ku a longesa kujijila o kuxikana. A kala ue mu longa kuma tu bhinga tu bokona mu Utuminu ua Diulu mu kubhita ni malebhu mavulu.
Acts14:23 O kia zubha kunomiiala adiakime a kala ku pholo mu Ngeleja joso
Acts14:24 Bhenhobho Phaulu ni Barnabé anga a tandulula
Acts14:25 O kia zubha kutanga Maka mu Peleje
Acts14:26 Koko anga a di longa

Acts15:1 Ku kala athu ku Judeia a kulumuka kuenioko
Acts15:2 Anga ki bhekela Phaulu ni Barnabé kukuata jiphata ni mala enʼió

Acts15:5 Kieniokio-phe
Acts15:6 Bhenhobho o Jipoxolo ni adiakime anga a di bhongolola mu kutetulula o makʼ ama.

Acts15:8 O Nzambi uejiia o muẋima ua ene-oso

Acts15:20 Inda tu a sonekena ngó mukanda kuila

Acts15:22 Kieniókio Jipoxolo ni adiakime ni Ngeleja ioso
Acts15:23 Anga a a sonekena mukanda ua kuila kiki: Ni etu tu Jipoxolo

Acts15:26 Akuetu enʼiá a bhiti mu iluezu ia kubhulaka ku a jibha mukonda dia dijina dia Ngana ietu Jezú Kristu.

Acts15:34 Sila-phe u sola kuxala hanji bhenhobho.]
